BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select 
  CAST(MR_BUCKET as varchar(64)) as MR_BUCKET, CAST(MR_CASH as numeric(18,6)) as MR_CASH, CAST(MR_CURR as varchar (6)) as MR_CURR, CAST(MR_CURVE as varchar(30)) as MR_CURVE, CAST(MR_DELTA as numeric(18,6)) as MR_DELTA, CAST(MR_DELTAC as varchar(6)) as MR_DELTAC, CAST(MR_DV01_ZERO as numeric(18,6)) as MR_DV01_ZERO, CAST(MR_DV01_PAR as numeric(18,6)) as MR_DV01_PAR, CAST(MR_DV02_ZERO as numeric(18,6)) as MR_DV02_ZERO, CAST(MR_DV02_PAR as numeric(18,6)) as MR_DV02_PAR, CAST(MR_FC as numeric(18,6)) as MR_FC, CAST(MR_FMLY as varchar(20)) as MR_FMLY, CAST(MR_GAMMA as numeric(18,6)) as MR_GAMMA, CAST(MR_GAMMAC as varchar(6)) as MR_GAMMAC, CAST(MR_GROUP as varchar(20)) as MR_GROUP, CAST(MR_INSTR as varchar(20)) as MR_INSTR, CAST(MR_MV as numeric(18,6)) as MR_MV, CAST(MR_PC as numeric(18,6)) as MR_PC, CAST(MR_PFOLIO as varchar(35)) as MR_PFOLIO, CAST(MR_PL as numeric(18,6)) as MR_PL, CAST(MR_RISK as varchar(30)) as MR_RISK, CAST(MR_TYPE as varchar(30)) as MR_TYPE, CAST(MR_TYPO as varchar(30)) as MR_TYPO, CAST(MR_VEGA as numeric(18,6)) as MR_VEGA, CAST(MR_VEGAC as varchar(6)) as MR_VEGAC 
 from
 (
 select
 '' as MR_BUCKET,0  as MR_CASH,'' as MR_CURR, '' as MR_CURVE, 0 as MR_DELTA, ''  as MR_DELTAC, 0 as MR_DV01_ZERO, 0 as MR_DV01_PAR, 0 as MR_DV02_ZERO, 0 as MR_DV02_PAR, M_FUTURE as MR_FC, M_FAMILY as MR_FMLY, 0 as MR_GAMMA, '' as MR_GAMMAC, M_GROUP as MR_GROUP, M_INSTRUMEN as MR_INSTR, M_MV as MR_MV, M_PAST as MR_PC, M_PORTFOLIO as MR_PFOLIO, M_PL as MR_PL, 'StopLoss'  as MR_RISK, M_TYPE as MR_TYPE, M_TYPOLOGY as MR_TYPO, 0 as MR_VEGA,'' as MR_VEGAC 
 from ERM_SL_REP where  M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
UNION ALL
select 
'' as MR_BUCKET, M_CASH as MR_CASH, M_CURRENCY as MR_CURR, '' as MR_CURVE, M_FX_DELTA as MR_DELTA, M_DCURRENCY as MR_DELTAC, 0 as MR_DV01_ZERO, 0 as MR_DV01_PAR, 0 as MR_DV02_ZERO, 0 as MR_DV02_PAR, 0 as MR_FC, M_FAMILY as MR_FMLY, 0 as MR_GAMMA, '' as MR_GAMMAC, M_GROUP as MR_GROUP, M_INSTRUMEN as MR_INSTR, 0 as MR_MV, 0 as MR_PC, M_PORTFOLIO as MR_PFOLIO, 0 as MR_PL, 'OpenPosition'  as MR_RISK, M_TYPE as MR_TYPE, M_TYPOLOGY as MR_TYPO, 0 as MR_VEGA, '' as MR_VEGAC 
from ERM_OP_REP where  M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
UNION ALL
select 
'' as MR_BUCKET, 0 as MR_CASH, '' as MR_CURR, '' as MR_CURVE, M_FX_DELTA as MR_DELTA, M_DCURRENCY as MR_DELTAC, 0 as MR_DV01_ZERO, 0 as MR_DV01_PAR, 0 as MR_DV02_ZERO, 0 as MR_DV02_PAR, 0 as MR_FC, M_FAMILY as MR_FMLY, M_FX_GAMMA as MR_GAMMA, M_GCURRENCY as MR_GAMMAC, M_GROUP as MR_GROUP, M_INSTRUMEN as MR_INSTR, 0 as MR_MV, 0 as MR_PC, M_PORTFOLIO as MR_PFOLIO, 0 as MR_PL, 'FXGreeks'  as MR_RISK, M_TYPE as MR_TYPE, M_TYPOLOGY as MR_TYPO, M_FX_VEGA as MR_VEGA, M_VCURRENCY as MR_VEGAC 
from ERM_FXGR_REP where  M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
UNION ALL
select M_DATE as MR_BUCKET, 0 as MR_CASH, M_CURRENCY as MR_CURR, M_CURVE_NAM as MR_CURVE, 0 as MR_DELTA, '' as MR_DELTAC, M_DV01__ZER as MR_DV01_ZERO, M_DV01__PAR as MR_DV01_PAR,  M_DV02__ZER as MR_DV02_ZERO, M_DV02__PAR as MR_DV02_PAR, 0 as MR_FC, M_FAMILY as MR_FMLY, 0 as MR_GAMMA, '' as MR_GAMMAC, M_GROUP as MR_GROUP, M_INSTRUMEN as MR_INSTR, 0 as MR_MV, 0 as MR_PC, M_PORTFOLIO as MR_PFOLIO, 0 as MR_PL, 'IRGreeks' as MR_RISK, M_TYPE as MR_TYPE, M_TYPOLOGY as MR_TYPO, 0 as MR_VEGA, '' as MR_VEGAC 
from ERM_IRGR_REP where  M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
) T1

TRIM(M_DESC): Hedge Accounting Query
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
SELECT FV.M_HEDGEREFE AS Hedge_Reference,
       FV.M_OPSOBJECT AS Trade_Origin_Ref,
       FV.M_COMPONENT AS Comp_Type,
       FV.M_COMPONEN1 AS Comp_Percentage,
       FV.M_DATE AS ASSESSMENT_DATE,
       FV.M_AMOUNT AS FV_Amount,
       FV.M_H_COMP_DAT as Computing_Date,
       MR.M_HEDGEDFVV AS HDGD_FVV,
       MR.M_HEDGINGFV AS HDGG_FVV,
       (case 
       WHEN FV.M_COMPONENT in ('Hedged','Theoretical hedged') THEN  MR.M_HEDGEDFVV
       WHEN FV.M_COMPONENT in ('Hedging','Theoretical hedging') THEN MR.M_HEDGINGFV
       END) as FVV,

       MR.M_HEDGEDCUM as CUM_HDGD_FVV,
       MR.M_HEDGINGCU as CUM_HDGG_FVV,
       
       (case 
       WHEN FV.M_COMPONENT in ('Hedged','Theoretical hedged') THEN  MR.M_HEDGEDCUM
       WHEN FV.M_COMPONENT in ('Hedging','Theoretical hedging') THEN  MR.M_HEDGINGCU
       END) as Cum_FVV,
       MR.M_FVVARIATI AS Comp_FVV,
       MR.M_CUMULATED AS Comp_Cum_FVV,
       MR.M_COSTOFHED AS COH_Variation,
       MR.M_COSTOFHE1 AS COH_Cum_Variation,
       MR.M_COHVARIAT AS Comp_COH_Variation,
       MR.M_CUMULATE1 AS Comp_COH_Cum_Variation,
       MR.M_OCIBALAN1 AS OCI_BAL_VAR,
       MR.M_OCIBALANC AS OCI_BAL,
       INF.M_EXTERNALR AS External_Ref,
       INF.M_DESCRIPTI AS Hedge_Desc,
       INF.M_ACTUALDAT AS Hedge_Actual_Date,
       INF.M_VERSION AS Hedge_Version,
       INF.M_TYPE AS Hedge_Type,
       INF.M_VALIDATIO AS Validation_Status,
       INF.M_STRATEGY_ AS Hedge_Strategy,
       INF.M_RISKMANAG AS Hedge_Risk_ManagObj,
       INF.M_STARTDATE AS Hedge_Start_Date,
       INF.M_ENDDATE AS Hedge_End_Date,
       INF.M_LABEL AS Entity,
       INF.M_CURRENCY AS Hedge_Currency,
       INF.M_PROSPECTI AS Prosp_Eff_Method,
       INF.M_PROSPECT1 AS Prosp_Formula,
       INF.M_PROSPECT2 AS Prosp_Type,
       INF.M_PROSPECT3 AS Prosp_Low,
       INF.M__PROSPECT AS Prosp_High,
       INF.M_PROSPSHIF AS Prosp_Shifter,
       INF.M_RETROSPEC AS Retro_Eff_Method,
       INF.M_RETROSPE1 AS Retro_Formula,
       INF.M_RETROSPE2 AS Retro_Type,
       INF.M_RETROSPE3 AS Retro_Low,
       INF.M_RETROSPE4 AS Retro_High,
       INF.M_RETROSHIF AS Retro_Shifter,
       INF.M_TYPOLOGY AS Trade_Typology,
       INF.M_INSTRUMEN AS Trade_Inst_Disp_Label,
       INF.M_TRADE_DAT AS Trade_Date,
       INF.M_TRADE_ACT AS Trade_Act_Date,
       INF.M_MATURITY_ AS Trade_Maturity,
       INF.M_PORTFOLIO AS Trade_Portfolio,
       INF.M_COUNTERPA AS Trade_Counterparty,
       INF.M_ACCOUNTIN AS ACC_METHOD,
       INF.M_IMV AS Initial_MV,
       INF.M_IMV_CURRE AS Initial_MV_Cur,
       INF.M_SPREAD AS Credit_Spread,
       EFF.M_TYPE AS Eff_Type,
       EFF.M_ASSESSME1 AS Assessment_Formula,
       EFF.M_EFFECTIVE AS Formula_Results,
       EFF.M_ASSESSME2 AS Formula_Eff_Results,
       EFF.M_ASSESSME3 AS Eff_Result,
       EFF.M_SCENARION AS Scenario_NB,
       EFF.M_HEDGEDLEG AS MT_HDGD_LEGPAYOUT,
       EFF.M_HEDGEDRES AS MT_HDGD_RESULT,
       EFF.M_HEDGINGLE AS MT_HDGG_LEGPAYOUT,
       EFF.M_HEDGINGRE AS MT_HDGG_RESULT,
       EFF.M_MT_MAN_CO AS MT_MAN_CONF,
       EFF.M_MT_THRESH AS MT_THRESHOLD,
       EFF.M_MT_TOLERA AS MT_TOLERANCE,
       EFF.M_MT_TYPE AS MT_CRITERIA
   
FROM HDG_FV_REP FV
  JOIN HDG_MR_REP MR
    ON FV.M_HEDGEREFE = MR.M_REFERENC1
   AND FV.M_OPSOBJECT = MR.M_REFERENCE
   AND FV.M_DATE = MR.M_ENDPERIOD
   AND FV.M_REF_DATA = MR.M_REF_DATA
  JOIN HDG_TRADE_REP INF
    ON FV.M_HEDGEREFE = INF.M_REFERENCE
   AND FV.M_OPSOBJECT = INF.M_TRADEORIG
   AND FV.M_REF_DATA = INF.M_REF_DATA
  JOIN HDG_EFF_REP EFF
    ON FV.M_HEDGEREFE = EFF.M_REFERENCE
   AND FV.M_DATE = EFF.M_ASSESSMEN
WHERE INF.M_SIMULATED = 0
AND   FV.M_SIMULATED = 0
AND   FV.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N

TRIM(M_DESC): Retrieve all fixings needing to be done today
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select
XG.M_NB Trade_nb,
XG.M_CONTRACT Contract_nb,
XG.M_CMP_TYPO Typology,
XG.M_INSTRUMENT Trade_Instrument,
XG.M_TP_PFOLIO Portfolio, 
XG.M_TP_CNTRP Counterparty,
XG.M_TRN_FMLY Transaction_family,
XG.M_TRN_GRP Transaction_group,

-- fix for futures that have the number of contracts in nominal and CTR in ccy1
 (CASE XG.M_TRN_GRP
	WHEN 'FUT' THEN XG.M_TP_IQTYS*XG.M_TP_SECLOT
 ELSE XG.M_TP_IQTYS
 END) Nominal,
 
 (CASE XG.M_TRN_GRP
	WHEN 'FUT' THEN (CASE XG.M_TP_UQTYEQ 
   													WHEN XG.M_TP_FXBASE THEN XG.M_TP_FXUND
                   ELSE XG.M_TP_FXBASE
                   	END ) 
 ELSE XG.M_TP_UQTY
 END) Ccy1,

(CASE XG.M_TP_QTYEQS
	WHEN 0 THEN 0
 ELSE XG.M_TP_PRICE
 END) Price,
 
-1*XG.M_TP_QTYEQS Other_Nominal,
XG.M_TP_UQTYEQ Ccy2,
XG.M_TP_DTEUNDI Maturity,
XG.M_FOPINITU Init_User,
XG.M_CNT_SRCMOD Source,
XG.M_TP_SECLOT Lot_Size,
XG.M_XG_FIXING Fixing_Date,
XG.M_XG_FIXKEY Fixing_Instrument,

(CASE XG.M_XG_FIXED
 WHEN 'N' THEN 'notFixed'
 ELSE XG.M_XG_FIXED
 END) Fixed,

XG.M_XG_FIXKEY2 Fixing_Source,
XG.M_AMD_STS2 amdstatus2,
XG.M_TP_INITSD InitSD,

-- temporary fix for a problem displaying some characters (cf FXCDEF2685)
(CASE SUBSTR(XG.M_XG_FIXTYPE, 1, 7) || SUBSTR(XG.M_XG_FIXTYPE, 18, 1)
 WHEN 'Asian Nw' THEN 'Asian NDF - Between two dates'
 WHEN 'Asian FS' THEN 'Asian Fixing - Start date'
 WHEN 'Asian FE' THEN 'Asian Fixing - End date'
 WHEN 'Asian FB' THEN 'Asian Fixing - Between two dates'
 ELSE XG.M_XG_FIXTYPE
 END) Fixing_Type				
 
from
FIXING_REP XG

where
XG.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
and XG.M_TP_PFOLIO@MxAuthorizedPortfolio:C
and XG.M_XG_FIXING <=  TO_DATE(MxToDate(MxGetLoginDate()), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
and XG.M_XG_FIXED = 'N'
and XG.M_AMD_STS2 <> 'NA'
and XG.M_AMD_STS2 <> 'CA'
and XG.M_TRN_FMLY = 'CURR'
and XG.M_TP_INITSD = 'Y'
and (XG.M_TRN_GRP = 'FXD' or XG.M_TRN_GRP = 'FUT')

select 
CAST (M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER  AS CHAR(30))            ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
CAST (''   AS CHAR(30))            SWIFT_ADDRESS,
CAST (M_CURRENCY        AS CHAR(3))             CURRENCY,
CAST (M_CLOSING_BALANCE AS DECIMAL(26,3))       CLOSING_BALANCE, 
CAST (M_OPENING_BALANCE AS DECIMAL(26,3))       OPENING_BALANCE,
CAST (M_2ND_REFERENCE   AS VARCHAR2(24))        SND_REFERENCE,
CAST (M_1ST_REFERENCE   AS VARCHAR2(24))        FST_REFERENCE, 
CAST (M_AMOUNT          AS DECIMAL(26,3))       AMOUNT,
CAST (M_TRADE_DATE      AS DATE)                TRADE_DATE,
CAST (M_BLANK           AS CHAR(5))             BLANK,
CAST (M_VALUE_DATE      AS DATE)                VALUE_DATE,
CAST (M_TYPE            AS VARCHAR2(10))        TYPE,
CAST (M_D_C             AS CHAR(1))             D_C,
CAST (M_DEPARTMENT_CODE AS CHAR(3))             DEPARTMENT_CODE,
CAST (M_TRADE_DATETIME  AS VARCHAR2(30))        TRADE_DATETIME,
CAST (M_CONTRACT        AS DECIMAL(24,0))       CONTRACT,
CAST (MY_RANK           AS DECIMAL(24,0))       MY_RANK
from (
    SELECT 
    M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, M_CURRENCY,
    CASE WHEN MY_RANK=1 THEN CALC_AMT--M_AMOUNT+0  -- GET OPENING BALANCE FOR YESTERDAY
    ELSE CALC_AMT --M_AMOUNT
    END 
    AS M_CLOSING_BALANCE, 
    
    /*(select NVL(sum(M_AMOUNT),0) from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP WHERE TO_CHAR(M_VALUE_DAT,'YYYYMMDD')='20220806' 
    and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)=TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)) as M_OPENING_BALANCE, */
    
    ---get opening as closing of 6th or migration date
    (select sum(M_AMOUNT) from BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP WHERE TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYYMMDD')='20220806' 
    and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)=TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) and TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')) as M_OPENING_BALANCE,
    
    /*(
        select NVL(sum(M_AMOUNT),0) from BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP --- BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP 
        WHERE 
       -- TO_CHAR(M_VALUE_DAT,'YYYYMMDD')=TO_CHAR((select M_REP_DATE2-1 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N),'YYYYMMDD')
        TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYYMMDD')=TO_CHAR((select M_REP_DATE2-1 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N),'YYYYMMDD')
        and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)=TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
        and TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')
        
    ) as M_OPENING_BALANCE, */
   ---- -14193643.03 as M_OPENING_BALANCE, 
    M_2ND_REFERENCE, M_1ST_REFERENCE, M_AMOUNT, M_TRADE_DATE, 
    M_BLANK, M_VALUE_DATE, M_TYPE, M_D_C, M_DEPARTMENT_CODE, M_TRADE_DATETIME, M_CONTRACT,MY_RANK
    from 
    (
     select M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, M_CURRENCY, 
     M_CLOSING_BALANCE, M_OPENING_BALANCE, M_2ND_REFERENCE, M_1ST_REFERENCE,  M_AMOUNT as CALC_AMT,
     (case when M_AMOUNT<0 then ABS(M_AMOUNT) else -1*ABS(M_AMOUNT) end) as M_AMOUNT, M_TRADE_DATE, 
     M_BLANK, M_VALUE_DATE, M_TYPE, (case when M_AMOUNT<0 then 'C' else 'D' end) M_D_C, M_DEPARTMENT_CODE, M_TRADE_DATETIME, M_CONTRACT,RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER ORDER BY M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_VALUE_DATE,M_CONTRACT) MY_RANK
        from (    
        select M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CURRENCY,sum(M_CLOSING_BALANCE) M_CLOSING_BALANCE,sum(M_OPENING_BALANCE) M_OPENING_BALANCE,
        M_TYPE||M_2ND_REFERENCE as M_2ND_REFERENCE,M_TYPE||M_1ST_REFERENCE as M_1ST_REFERENCE,sum(M_AMOUNT) M_AMOUNT,M_TRADE_DATE,M_BLANK,M_VALUE_DATE,M_TYPE,M_DEPARTMENT_CODE,M_TRADE_DATETIME,M_CONTRACT
        from (
               select --DISTINCT
                M_ACCOUNT_N as M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER
               --,'' as M_SWIFT_ADDRESS
               ,M_CURRENCY as M_CURRENCY
               ,0 as M_CLOSING_BALANCE
               ,0 as M_OPENING_BALANCE
               ,NVL(TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT,NOS.M_ID) as M_2ND_REFERENCE
               ,NVL(TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT,NOS.M_ID) as M_1ST_REFERENCE
               ,M_AMOUNT as M_AMOUNT
               , case 
                    when NOS.M_PROD_ID=0 and NOS.M_PRODUCERO=0 then M_VALUE_DAT
                    else TP_ALL.M_TP_DTESYS 
                   end  as M_TRADE_DATE
               ,null as M_BLANK
               ,M_VALUE_DAT as M_VALUE_DATE
                ,case 
                --when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('FT Nostro Nostro') then 'MXFT'
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('FT Nostro Nostro') then 'MX'
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Banknotes','Dual Currency Deposit','Spot','SAMA Bill') or M_PRODUCER1 like '%FX%' then 'MXFX'
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad','Murabaha Borrowing','Repo SAMA','RR SAMA','Murabaha Borrowing',
                'Wakala Placement','SAMA Purchase','RR Murabaha','RR Waad','Murabaha Placement','Wakala Borrowing','DPM Murabaha') then 'MXMM'
                when M_PRODUCER1 like '%LTM%' or M_PRODUCER1 like '%Sukuk%' then 'MXFI'
                when M_PRODUCER1 like '%Fund%' or M_PRODUCER1 like '%Equity%' then 'MXEQ'
                when M_PRODUCER1 like '%PRS%' then 'MXIR'
                --when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('DPM Murabaha','SFRM','SGDM') then 'MXIR'   
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('SFRM','SGDM') then 'MXIR'       
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Brokerage Fee') then 'MXBR'
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('SCF','SCF BR VAT RC','SCF BR WHT PAY','SCF BR VAT') then 'MXSCF'
                else 'MX' end as M_TYPE
               --,case when M_AMOUNT<0 then 'D' else 'C' end as M_D_C
               ,'999' as M_DEPARTMENT_CODE
               ,TP_ALL.M_TP_DTESYS ||' '||M_TP_TIMSYS as M_TRADE_DATETIME
               ,TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT
              
               from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP NOS, (select distinct M_CONTRACT, M_REF_DATA,M_TP_DTESYS,M_REP_DATE2, M_TP_TIMSYS,M_CNT_SRCMOD from TP_ALL_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N) TP_ALL --TP_ALL_REP TP_ALL
               where 1=1
               ---and TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT(+)=NOS.M_PROD_ID  -- fix as per pega case C-1226227
               and TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT(+)=DECODE(NOS.M_PROD_ID,0,NOS.M_PRODUCERO,NOS.M_PROD_ID) -- fix as per pega case C-1226227
               and TP_ALL.M_REF_DATA(+)=@MxDataSetKey:N
               and TRIM(NOS.M_BENEFICIA) is not null and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N) is not null 
               and NOS.M_AMOUNT !=0 --and NOS.M_SETTLEMEN in 'SETTLED' 
               and NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N<>'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KS' 
               ---- aggrgate change
              --------------------- to get data from migration data--------------
               and TO_CHAR(M_VALUE_DAT,'YYYYMMDD')<>'20220806' --- since the data migrated on 6th august --- need to change once whole sum data is finalised
               AND M_VALUE_DAT>to_date('06-AUG-22','DD-MON-YY') --- need to change once whole sum data is finalised
               and (M_VALUE_DAT<=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N) or TRIM(TP_ALL.M_REP_DATE2) is null)
               -------------------------------------to get data from migration data--------------
               
               ---As per user request neglecting commodity, scf
               AND TRIM(M_PRODUCER1) not in ('Murabaha Commodity','SCF','SCF BR VAT RC','SCF BR WHT PAY','SCF BR VAT','Collateral','SCF BR WHT NPAY')
               --AND TRIM(M_PRODUCER1) not in ('Collateral')
               ---As per user request neglecting T24 deals and ones which was not picked due to prod id coming as zero
              AND (TRIM(TP_ALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD)<>'T24.NOSTRO' or TRIM(TP_ALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD) is null)
               AND TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED') --AND TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT<>1550
               --and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)<>'008100000300008'
               and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)<>'008100000300008'
               and DECODE(NOS.M_PROD_ID,0,NOS.M_PRODUCERO,NOS.M_PROD_ID)<>1550
               -- or M_PROD_ID=0)
               -------only last EOD data-----
               --AND (M_VALUE_DAT=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N) or TRIM(TP_ALL.M_REP_DATE2) is null) 
               -------only last EOD data-----
               ------------------- and TRIM(NOS.M_VALIDATIO)='Settled' --- in ('Released','Settled','TechSettled','InstrToValidate')   
               --and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)='008100014040009' --JPM
               --and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)='008100018830004' ---SCB
               --ORDER BY M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CONTRACT
               
                union all
                
               
               select 
                M_ACCOUNT_N as M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER
               --,'' as M_SWIFT_ADDRESS
               ,M_CURRENCY as M_CURRENCY
               ,0 as M_CLOSING_BALANCE
               ,0 as M_OPENING_BALANCE
               ,NOS.M_PROD_ID as M_2ND_REFERENCE
               ,NOS.M_PROD_ID as M_1ST_REFERENCE
               
               ,M_AMOUNT as M_AMOUNT
               ,null as M_TRADE_DATE
               ,null as M_BLANK
               ,M_VALUE_DAT as M_VALUE_DATE ---TP_ALL.M_TP_DTEPMT
              ,'MXCOL' as M_TYPE
               --,case when M_AMOUNT<0 then 'D' else 'C' end as M_D_C
               ,'999' as M_DEPARTMENT_CODE
               ,'' as M_TRADE_DATETIME
               ,NOS.M_PROD_ID
               
               from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP NOS
               where 1=1
               and TRIM(NOS.M_BENEFICIA) is not null and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N) is not null 
               and NOS.M_AMOUNT !=0 
               and NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N<>'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KS'
               ---- aggrgate change
                and TO_CHAR(M_VALUE_DAT,'YYYYMMDD')<>'20220806' --- since the data migrated on 6th august
               AND M_VALUE_DAT>to_date('06-AUG-22','DD-MON-YY') --- need to change once whole sum data is finalised
               and M_VALUE_DAT<=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)
               ---- aggrgate change
               AND TRIM(M_PRODUCER1) in ('Collateral')
               AND TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')
               --and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)<>'008100000300008'
               and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)<>'008100000300008'
               ------------and TRIM(M_VALIDATIO)='Settled' ---- in ('Released','Settled','TechSettled','InstrToValidate')   
               
           )
           group by M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CURRENCY,M_2ND_REFERENCE,M_1ST_REFERENCE,M_TRADE_DATE,M_BLANK,M_VALUE_DATE,M_TYPE,M_DEPARTMENT_CODE,M_TRADE_DATETIME,M_CONTRACT
           )
    )  where M_AMOUNT !=0 
    ORDER BY MY_RANK,M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CONTRACT
)
ORDER BY MY_RANK,M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CONTRACT

TRIM(M_DESC): Status modifications & manual validations of contract versions
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select 
'VALID_STAT' as FLAG,
--CTP_LABEL as CTP_LABEL,
NVL(TRIM(CPDF.M_NAME),CTP_LABEL) as CTP_LABEL, ---updated by Riyas as per the BAB Requirement
FC_PORTFOLIO as PORTFOLIO,
FC_CFAMILY as FC_CFAMILY,
FC_CGROUP as FC_CGROUP,
FC_CTYPE as FC_CTYPE,
max(FC_TYPOLOGY) as CONTRACT_TYPO,
FC_CID as TRADE_NUMBER,
FC_ORIGIN_ID as FC_ORIGIN_ID,
FC_ID as CONTRACT_NUMBER,
FC_VERSION as CONTRACT_VERSION,
max(COALESCE(ORIG_EVT.M_NAME,'')) as ORIG_EVT,
max(COALESCE(LAST_EVT.M_NAME,'')) as LAST_EVENT_REFERENCE,
max(ORIG_EVT.M_DESC) as ORIG_EVENT_LABEL,
max(LAST_EVT.M_DESC) as LAST_EVENT_LABEL,
min(TS_TIME_LONG) as TS_TIME_LONG,
to_char(max(to_timestamp('01/01/1970','DD/MM/YYYY') + numtodsinterval(TS_TIME_LONG/1000,'SECOND')),'HH24:MI:SS') as STATUS_TIME,
cast(max(to_timestamp('01/01/1970','DD/MM/YYYY') + numtodsinterval(TS_TIME_LONG/1000,'SECOND')) as date) as STATUS_DATE,
case 
    when COALESCE(max(LAST_EVT.M_NAME),'') <> '' 
        then (case min(FC_LAST_EVENT_ACTION) when '1' 
                    then 'Insertion of ' when '8' then 'Cancellation of ' when '2' 
                    then 'Cancel & Re-event of ' else ' '  end) || max(LAST_EVT.M_DESC) else '' end as EVENT_ACTION,
null as JOB_DESCRIPTION,
null as STP_LAST_VALIDATOR,
STP_STATUS_VALIDATION_LEVEL as VALIDATION_STATUS,
null as STP_LAST_VALIDATION_DATE,
'' as STP_LAST_VALIDATION_TIME,
to_char(max(to_timestamp('01/01/1970','DD/MM/YYYY') + numtodsinterval(TS_TIME_LONG/1000,'SECOND')),'HH24:MI:SS') as SORT_TIME
from STPFC_ENTRY_TABLE STPFC
LEFT join CLASS_MAPPING_DBF LAST_EVT on LAST_EVT.M_ID= STPFC.FC_LAST_EVENT_CLASS_ID
LEFT join CLASS_MAPPING_DBF ORIG_EVT on ORIG_EVT.M_ID= STPFC.FC_ORIGIN_EVENT_CLASS_ID
left join TRN_CPDF_DBF CPDF
 on TRIM(STPFC.CTP_LABEL)=TRIM(CPDF.M_DSP_LABEL)
where (TO_TIMESTAMP('01/01/1970','DD/MM/YYYY') + numtodsinterval(STATUS_TIME_LONG/1000,'SECOND'))>=@FirstDate:D and (TO_TIMESTAMP('01/01/1970','DD/MM/YYYY') + numtodsinterval(STATUS_TIME_LONG/1000,'SECOND'))<=@SecondDate:D 
and TRIM(STPFC.CTP_LABEL) is not null ---updated by Riyas as per the BAB Requirement
group by FC_PORTFOLIO,FC_CFAMILY,FC_CGROUP,FC_CTYPE,FC_ORIGIN_ID,FC_VERSION,FC_ID,CTP_LABEL,FC_CID,STP_STATUS_VALIDATION_LEVEL,CPDF.M_NAME
union all
select 
'MAN_VAL' as FLAG,
--CTP_LABEL as CTP_LABEL,
NVL(TRIM(CPDF.M_NAME),CTP_LABEL) as CTP_LABEL, ---updated by Riyas as per the BAB Requirement
FC_PORTFOLIO as PORTFOLIO,
FC_CFAMILY as FC_CFAMILY,
FC_CGROUP as FC_CGROUP,
FC_CTYPE as FC_CTYPE,
max(FC_TYPOLOGY) as CONTRACT_TYPO,
0 as TRADE_NUMBER,
FC_ORIGIN_ID as FC_ORIGIN_ID,
0 as CONTRACT_NUMBER,
min(FC_VERSION) as CONTRACT_VERSION,
null as ORIG_EVT,
null as LAST_EVENT_REFERENCE,
null as ORIG_EVENT_LABEL,
null as LAST_EVENT_LABEL,
min(TS_TIME_LONG) as TS_TIME_LONG,
to_char(max(to_timestamp('01/01/1970','DD/MM/YYYY') + numtodsinterval(TS_TIME_LONG/1000,'SECOND')),'HH24:MI:SS') as STATUS_TIME,
cast(max(to_timestamp('01/01/1970','DD/MM/YYYY') + numtodsinterval(TS_TIME_LONG/1000,'SECOND')) as date) as STATUS_DATE,
' '  as EVENT_ACTION,
min(JOB_DESCRIPTION) as JOB_DESCRIPTION,
STP_LAST_VALIDATOR as STP_LAST_VALIDATOR,
null as VALIDATION_STATUS,
STP_LAST_VALIDATION_DATE as STP_LAST_VALIDATION_DATE,
to_char(STP_LAST_VALIDATION_TIME,'HH24:MI:SS') as STP_LAST_VALIDATION_TIME,
to_char(STP_LAST_VALIDATION_TIME) as SORT_TIME
from STPFC_ENTRY_TABLE STPFC
left join TRN_CPDF_DBF CPDF
 on TRIM(STPFC.CTP_LABEL)=TRIM(CPDF.M_DSP_LABEL)
where (TO_TIMESTAMP('01/01/1970','DD/MM/YYYY') + numtodsinterval(STATUS_TIME_LONG/1000,'SECOND'))>=@FirstDate:D and (TO_TIMESTAMP('01/01/1970','DD/MM/YYYY') + numtodsinterval(STATUS_TIME_LONG/1000,'SECOND'))<=@SecondDate:D and STP_LAST_VALIDATOR is not null and STP_LAST_VALIDATOR<>' '
and TRIM(STPFC.CTP_LABEL) is not null ---updated by Riyas as per the BAB Requirement
group by FC_PORTFOLIO,FC_CFAMILY,FC_CGROUP,FC_CTYPE,FC_ORIGIN_ID,CTP_LABEL,STP_LAST_VALIDATOR,STP_LAST_VALIDATION_DATE,STP_LAST_VALIDATION_TIME,CPDF.M_NAME

TRIM(M_DESC): Fixings between 2 dates/Overdue fixings
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select
  TP_REP.M_TRN_FMLY as Trade_family
, case
    when (
        FIX.M_XG_LEG        =0
        and TP_REP.M_TRN_GRP='RTRN'
      )
      then TP_REP.M_INSTRUMENT
      else FIX_IND.M_INDEX_LAB
  end                         as Fixing_index
, DECODE(TRIM(TP_REP.M_TP_DSCTYPE),'Interest rate swaps',TP_REP.M_CMP_TYPO,TP_REP.M_TP_DSCTYPE) as Trade_type_desc ---updated by Riyas as per BAB Requirement
, TP_REP.M_NB                 as Trade_number
, TP_REP.M_CONTRACT           as Contract_number
, TP_REP.M_CNT_ORG            as ORIGIN_CONTRACT_NUMBER
, TP_REP.M_CNT_VS2            as Contract_version
, TP_REP.M_INSTRUMENT         as Instrument
, TP_REP.M_TP_DTEEXP          as TRADE_EXPIRY_DATE
, TP_REP.M_TP_PFOLIO          as Portfolio
, TP_REP.M_TP_CNTRP           as COUNTERPART_LABEL
, to_number(OPT.M_TP_STRIKE)  as Strike
, to_number(FX.M_TP_FXCTFF)   as FX_cnt_spot_FF
, to_number(FIX.M_SC2_FD_FN)  as SPOTCV
, FIX.M_XG_START              as Period_S_date
, FIX.M_XG_END                as Period_E_date
, to_number(FIX.M_XG_NOMINAL) as Period_nominal
, FIX.M_XG_NOMCUR             as Nominal_ccy
, FIX.M_XG_FIXED              as Is_fixed
, to_number(FIX.M_XG_FIXRT1)  as Fixed_rate1
, to_number(FIX.M_XG_FIXRT2)  as Fixed_rate2
, to_number(FIX.M_XG_FIXMRG)  as Fixed_margin
, to_number(FIX.M_XG_FIXMOD)  as Mod_fixed_rate
, to_number(FIX.M_XG_FIXAMT)  as Fixed_amount
, FIX.M_XG_FIXAMTC            as Fixed_amount_ccy
, FIX.M_XG_LEGPR              as Leg_Pay_Receive
, FIX.M_XG_PAYMNT             as Period_payment_date
, FIX.M_XG_FIXING             as Period_fixing_date
, to_number(FIX.M_XG_SV)      as Fixing_sensitivity
, TP_REP.M_CMP_TYPO           as Trade_typology
, TP_REP.M_TRN_GRP            as Trade_group
, TP_REP.M_TRN_TYPE           as Trade_type
from
  FIXING_REP FIX
  join
    TP_ALL_REP TP_REP
    on
      (
        FIX.M_REF_DATA      = TP_REP.M_REF_DATA
        and FIX.M_TP_PFOLIO = TP_REP.M_TP_PFOLIO
        and FIX.M_NB        = TP_REP.M_NB
      )
  join
    TP_FX_REP FX
    on
      (
        FIX.M_REF_DATA      = FX.M_REF_DATA
        and FIX.M_TP_PFOLIO = FX.M_TP_PFOLIO
        and FIX.M_NB        = FX.M_NB
      )
  join
    TP_OPT_REP OPT
    on
      (
        OPT.M_REF_DATA      = FX.M_REF_DATA
        and OPT.M_NB        = FX.M_NB
        and OPT.M_TP_PFOLIO = FX.M_TP_PFOLIO
      )
  left join
    FIXING_INDEX_REP FIX_IND
    on
      FIX.M_XG_INDEX=FIX_IND.M_INDEX
where
  FIX.M_REF_DATA        =@MxDataSetKey:N
  and TP_REP.M_AMD_STS2<>'NA'
  and TP_REP.M_TP_LQTY2 > 0
  and FIX.M_XG_FIXING  >= @FirstFixingDate:D
  and FIX.M_XG_FIXING  <= @SecondFixingDate:D
--  and TP_REP.M_TP_PFOLIO@MxPortfolio:C
--  and TP_REP.M_TP_PFOLIO@MxAuthorizedPortfolio:C
  and FIX.M_XG_FIXED=@IsFixed:C

TRIM(M_DESC): Counterparties audit based on DBF tables
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select
case AUD.M_ACT_COM0 when 'Insertion' then 'Insertion' when 'Deleting' then 'Deletion' else 'Modification' end as EVENT_ACTION,
AUD.M_USR_NAME as USER_LABEL,
AUD.M_USR_GROUP as GROUP_LABEL,
AUD.M_USR_DESK as DESK,
AUD.M_ACT_COM3 as COUNTERPART_LABEL,


case AUD.M_ACT_COM0 when 'Insertion' then '' when 'Deleting' then '' else AUD.M_ACT_COM0 end as MODIFIED_FIELD,
case AUD.M_ACT_COM0 when 'Deleting' then '' when 'Amend.Time' then to_char(to_date(MOD(AUD.M_ACT_COM1, 86400),'SSSSS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') else AUD.M_ACT_COM1 end as OLD_VALUE,
case AUD.M_ACT_COM0 when 'Insertion' then '' when 'Amend.Time' then to_char(to_date(MOD(AUD.M_ACT_COM2, 86400),'SSSSS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') else AUD.M_ACT_COM2 end as NEW_VALUE,
AUD.M_DATE_CMP as COMPUTER_DATE,
to_char(to_date(MOD(AUD.M_TIME_CMP, 86400),'SSSSS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') as COMPUTER_TIME,
AUD.M_DATE_CMP as EVENT_SYSTEM_DATE

from TRN_AUD_DBF AUD  
where AUD.M_TYPE LIKE 'COUNTERP%' and AUD.M_DATE_CMP>=@FirstAuditDate:D and AUD.M_DATE_CMP<=@SecondAuditDate:D

TRIM(M_DESC): Events audit between two dates
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select
  case
    when STL.M_V_EVSTLNB > 0
      then 'STL'
    when STL.M_V_EVSTLNB = 0
      then 'TRD'
  end as IMPACT_TYPE
, case MK.M_V_ACTION
    when 1
      then 'Insert'
    when 2
      then 'Modify'
    when 4
      then 'Delete'
    when 8
      then 'Cancel'
  end             as ACTION
, MK.M_V_EVT_CLS  as LAST_EVENT_REFERENCE
, CLS_MPG.M_DESC  as LAST_EVENT_LABEL
, MK.M_V_EVT_REF  as EVENT_REFERENCE
, MK.M_V_EVT_OREF as EVENT_ORIGIN_REFERENCE
, MK.M_V_EVT_VER  as EVENT_VERSION
, MK.M_V_DATE     as EVENT_DATE
, MK.M_V_SYSDATE  as EVENT_SYSTEM_DATE
, case MK.M_V_LAT
    when 0
      then 'No'
    when 1
      then 'Yes'
  end          as IS_LATE_TRADING
, MK.M_V_TSD   as EVENT_TIMESTAMP_DATE
, MK.M_V_TSH   as EVENT_TIMESTAMP_TIME
, MK.M_V_ACTOR as EVENT_ACTOR
, case
    when (
        MK.M_V_TRD_REF <> MK.M_NB
        and MK.M_V_DATE > MK.M_V_SYSDATE
      )
      then 'Past event'
    when (
        MK.M_V_TRD_REF <> MK.M_NB
        and MK.M_V_DATE < MK.M_V_SYSDATE
      )
      then 'Future event'
      else 'Today'
  end             as EVENT_DATE_POSITION
, MK.M_CNT_ORG    as ORIGIN_CONTRACT_NUMBER
, TP.M_TP_CREATOR as TRADE_CREATOR
, MK.M_V_VERSION  as CONTRACT_VERSION
, MK.M_CONTRACT   as CONTRACT_NUMBER
, MK.M_MRPL_ONB   as ORIGIN_TRADE_NUMBER
, MK.M_NB         as TRADE_NUMBER
, MK.M_V_AVQTY    as AVAILABLE_QUANTITY
, TP.M_TP_IQTY    as INITIAL_QUANTITY
, MK.M_V_IMPQTY   as IMPACTED_QUANTITY
, case
    when ltrim(MK.M_V_STP_STS) is null
      then TP.M_STP_STATUS
      else MK.M_V_STP_STS
  end             as VALIDATION_STATUS
, MK.M_AMD_STS2   as AMENDMENT_STATUS
, TP.M_TP_TRADER  as TRADER
, TP.M_TRN_FMLY   as TRADE_FAMILY
, TP.M_TRN_GRP    as TRADE_GROUP
, TP.M_TRN_TYPE   as TRADE_TYPE
, TP.M_INSTRUMENT as INSTRUMENT
, TP.M_TP_PFOLIO  as PORTFOLIO
, TP.M_TP_CNTRP   as COUNTERPART_LABEL
, TP.M_TP_DTETRN  as TRADE_DATE
, MK.M_V_ACTDT    as TRADE_ACTUAL_DATE
, TP.M_TP_DTESYS  as TRADE_SYSTEM_DATE
, TP.M_TP_BS      as BUYSELL
, OPT.M_TP_CP     as CALLPUT
, OPT.M_TP_AE     as AMERICANEUROPEAN
, TP.M_TP_DTEEXP  as TRADE_EXPIRY_DATE
, TP.M_TP_CUTOFF  as CUT_OFF
, OPT.M_TP_STRIKE as STRIKE
, TP.M_TP_PRICED  as PRICE
, TP.M_TP_PRICEDN as PRICE_NOTATION
, TP.M_CNT_TYPO   as CONTRACT_TYPOLOGY
, TP.M_CMP_TYPO   as TRADE_TYPOLOGY
from
  EVT_HIS_REP MK
  join
    EVT_MAPPING_REP CLS_MPG
    on
      (
        CLS_MPG.M_REF_DATA=MK.M_REF_DATA
        and CLS_MPG.M_ID  =MK.M_V_EVT_CLS
      )
  join
    EVT_STL_REP STL
    on
      (
        STL.M_REF_DATA      = MK.M_REF_DATA
        and STL.M_CNT_ORG   = MK.M_CNT_ORG
        and STL.M_V_VERSION = MK.M_V_VERSION
        and STL.M_TP_PFOLIO = MK.M_TP_PFOLIO
      )
  join
    TP_ALL_REP TP
    on
      (
        MK.M_REF_DATA      = TP.M_REF_DATA
        and MK.M_NB        = TP.M_NB
        and MK.M_TP_PFOLIO = TP.M_TP_PFOLIO
      )
  left join
    TP_OPT_REP OPT
    on
      (
        OPT.M_REF_DATA      = TP.M_REF_DATA
        and OPT.M_NB        = TP.M_NB
        and OPT.M_TP_PFOLIO = TP.M_TP_PFOLIO
      )
where
  MK.M_REF_DATA       =@MxDataSetKey:N
  and MK.M_V_EVT_REF <> 0
  and
  (
    (
      MK.M_V_TRD_REF = MK.M_NB
      and
      (
        (
          TP.M_TP_DTESYS     >= @FirstAuditDate:D
          and TP.M_TP_DTESYS <= @SecondAuditDate:D
        )
        or
        (
          TP.M_TP_DTETRN     >= @FirstAuditDate:D
          and TP.M_TP_DTETRN <= @SecondAuditDate:D
        )
        or
        (
          MK.M_V_ACTDT     >= @FirstAuditDate:D
          and MK.M_V_ACTDT <= @SecondAuditDate:D
        )
      )
    )
    or
    (
      MK.M_V_TRD_REF <> MK.M_NB
      and
      (
        (
          MK.M_V_DATE     >= @FirstAuditDate:D
          and MK.M_V_DATE <= @SecondAuditDate:D
        )
        or
        (
          MK.M_V_SYSDATE     >= @FirstAuditDate:D
          and MK.M_V_SYSDATE <= @SecondAuditDate:D
        )
      )
    )
  )

TRIM(M_DESC): Accounting Closing Balances Extraction

E.M_LABEL as ENTITY,
B.M_EN_AMTC as CREDIT_BALANCE,

B.M_EN_AMTN as NET_BALANCE,

I.M_DSP_LABEL as ACC_ACCOUNT_CUR,

from TRN_ACJS_DBF B
inner join TRN_PLIN_DBF I on B.M_INSTRUMENT = I.M_ID
inner join TRN_ENTD_DBF E on B.M_ENTITY = E.M_REF
inner join TRN_ACA1_DBF A on B.M_EN_ACCOUNT = A.M_REFERENCE

where B.M_EN_DATE<=@HigherDate:D and B.M_EN_DATE>=@LowerDate:D

BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select
  T1.M_ENTITY     as ENTITY
, T1.M_NB_TRN     as TRADE_NUMBER
, T2.M_CNTCLSREF  as CLASSIFICATION_REF
, T2.M_CNTCLSLBL  as CLASSIFICATION_LABEL
, T2.M_CONTRACT   as CONTRACT_NUMBER
, T2.M_CNT_VS2    as CONTRACT_VERSION
, T1.M_VAL_DATE   as VALUE_DATE
, T1.M_EN_DATE    as ENTRY_DATE
, T1.M_PAY_DAT    as ENTRY_PAYMENT_DATE
, T1.M_EN_AMT     as ENTRY_AMOUNT
, T1.M_EN_CUR     as ENTRY_CUR
, T1.M_ACC_SEC    as ACC_SECTION
, T1.M_NB_BS      as BUYSELL
, ACR1.M_RULE_LB  as RULE_LABEL
, T1.M_EN_DEBIT   as DEBIT_ACCOUNT
, T1.M_EN_CREDIT  as CREDIT_ACCOUNT
, ACA1C.M_CLASS   as CREDIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS
, ACA1D.M_CLASS   as DEBIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS
, T1.M_EN_COMMENT as ENTRY_COMMENT
, T1.M_NB         as ENTRY_ID
, T1.M_TRN_FMLY   as TRADE_FAMILY

, T1.M_TRN_TYPE   as TRADE_TYPE
, T2.M_CNT_TYPO   as CONTRACT_TYPO
, T2.M_TP_PFOLIO  as PORTFOLIO
, T2.M_INSTRUMENT as INSTRUMENT
, T1.M_NB_RULE    as RULE_NB
from
  ACC_JOURNAL_REP T1
  left join
    TP_ALL_REP T2
    on
      (
        T1.M_REF_DATA  =T2.M_REF_DATA
        and T1.M_NB_TRN=T2.M_NB
        --and T1.M_NB_BS =T2.M_TP_BS
      )
  left join
    ACC_RULES_REP ACR1
    on
      (
        ACR1.M_RULE_NB    = T1.M_NB_RULE
        --and T1.M_REF_DATA =ACR1.M_REF_DATA
        and ACR1.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalData_ACC_DAILY:N
      )
  left join
    ACC_ACCOUNT_REP ACA1C
    on
      (
        ACA1C.M_LABEL        = T1.M_EN_CREDIT
        and ACA1C.M_REF_DATA = T1.M_REF_DATA
      )
  left join
    ACC_ACCOUNT_REP ACA1D
    on
      (
        ACA1D.M_LABEL        = T1.M_EN_DEBIT
        and ACA1D.M_REF_DATA = T1.M_REF_DATA
      )
where
  T1.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N

TRIM(M_DESC): Audit log of all Admin activity
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select 
AUDIT1.M_CONN_ID as CONNECTION_ID, 
case AUDIT1.M_LOG_TYPE when 'USER_POLICY_CHANGE' then 'USER_POLICY_CHANGE - User: ' || AUDIT1.M_ENTITY 
when 'REMOVE_USER_FROM_GROUP' then 'REMOVE_USER_FROM_GROUP - User: ' || AUDIT1.M_ENTITY
when 'USER_DESCRIPTION_MODIFIED' then 'USER_DESCRIPTION_MODIFIED - User: ' || AUDIT1.M_ENTITY
when 'USER_CODE_MODIFIED' then 'USER_CODE_MODIFIED - User: ' || AUDIT1.M_ENTITY
when 'CHANGE_PASSWORD' then 'CHANGE_PASSWORD - User: ' || AUDIT1.M_ENTITY
when 'ADD_USER_TO_GROUP' then 'ADD_USER_TO_GROUP - User: ' || AUDIT1.M_ENTITY
when 'RESET_PASSWORD' then 'RESET_PASSWORD - User: ' || AUDIT1.M_ENTITY
when 'ADD_USER' then 'ADD_USER - User: ' || AUDIT1.M_ENTITY
when 'ADD_GROUP' then 'ADD_GROUP - Group: ' || AUDIT1.M_ENTITY
when 'REMOVE_GROUP' then 'REMOVE_GROUP - Group: ' || AUDIT1.M_ENTITY
else AUDIT1.M_LOG_TYPE || ' : ' || AUDIT1.M_ENTITY
end as EVENT_ACTION, 
to_char(AUDIT1.M_LOG_DATE, 'MON DD YYYY HH:MI:SS')  as COMPUTER_DATE, 
case AUDIT1.M_COL_NAME when 'M_PASSWORD' then '*******' else AUDIT1.M_OLD_VAL end as OLD_VALUE, 
case AUDIT1.M_COL_NAME when 'M_PASSWORD' then '*******' else AUDIT1.M_NEW_VAL end as NEW_VALUE, 
CONNECTION1.M_USER_NAME as USER_LABEL, 
AUDIT1.M_COL_NAME as MODIFIED_FIELD

from 
MX_USER_ADMIN_AUDIT_DBF AUDIT1, 
MX_USER_CONNECTION_DBF CONNECTION1 

where 
AUDIT1.M_CONN_ID = CONNECTION1.M_REFERENCE 
and AUDIT1.M_LOG_DATE >= @FirstDate:D and AUDIT1.M_LOG_DATE <=@SecondDate:D

TRIM(M_DESC): User login activity report
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
/*
Selection of users connections with concreate group. No services connection are returned.
to return service connection rows as well, please comment the last 'where and' condition for this part only.
*/
select

USERS.M_LABEL as USER_LABEL,
USER_CONN.M_GROUP_NAME as GROUP_NAME,
case USERS.M_PUB_PASS when 0 then 'YES' else 'NO' end as USER_IS_PASS_PRV, 
to_char(USERS.M_PASS_CD) as USER_PASS_CD,
USERS.M_DESC as USER_DESC, 
case USER_CONN.M_EVENT_TYPE when 0 then 'FAILED' else 'SUCCESS' end as CONN_STATUS, 
USER_CONN.M_EVENT_DESC as CONN_LOGIN_MSG, 
case USERS.M_LOCKED when 0 then ' ' when 1 then 'IS LOCKED' end as USER_INFO, 
USER_CONN.M_STAT_IP as CONN_MACHINE_IP, 
USER_CONN.M_STAT_NAME as CONN_MACHINE_NAME,
to_char(USER_CONN.M_LOGOUT_DATE,'MON DD YYYY')  as CONN_LOGOUT_DATE, 
to_char(USER_CONN.M_EVENT_DATE,'MON DD YYYY') as CONN_LOGIN_DATE,
to_char(USER_CONN.M_EVENT_DATE,'HH:MI:SS') as CONN_LOGIN_TIME

from 
MX_USER_DBF USERS left join  MX_USER_CONNECTION_DBF USER_CONN  on USERS.M_LABEL = USER_CONN.M_USER_NAME 

where 
USER_CONN.M_EVENT_DATE >=@FirstDate:D and USER_CONN.M_EVENT_DATE <=@SecondDate:D 
and USERS.M_LABEL=@UserLabel:C

union 

/*
Selection of users connections with bad user name input
*/

select 
USER_CONN.M_USER_NAME as USER_LABEL,
USER_CONN.M_GROUP_NAME as GROUP_NAME,
'NO' as USER_IS_PASS_PRV, 
' ' as USER_PASS_CD,  
' ' as USER_DESC, 
case USER_CONN.M_EVENT_TYPE when 0 then 'FAILED' else 'SUCCESS' end as CONN_STATUS, 
USER_CONN.M_EVENT_DESC as CONN_LOGIN_MSG, 
'NOT IN DATABASE' as USER_INFO ,  
USER_CONN.M_STAT_IP as CONN_MACHINE_IP,  
USER_CONN.M_STAT_NAME as CONN_MACHINE_NAME, 
to_char(USER_CONN.M_LOGOUT_DATE,'MON DD YYYY')  as CONN_LOGOUT_DATE, 
to_char(USER_CONN.M_EVENT_DATE,'MON DD YYYY') as CONN_LOGIN_DATE,
to_char(USER_CONN.M_EVENT_DATE,'HH:MI:SS') as CONN_LOGIN_TIME 

from
MX_USER_CONNECTION_DBF USER_CONN 

where 
USER_CONN.M_EVENT_DATE >=@FirstDate:D and USER_CONN.M_EVENT_DATE <=@SecondDate:D
and USER_CONN.M_USER_NAME=@UserLabel:C
and USER_CONN.M_USER_NAME  NOT IN (select M_LABEL from MX_USER_DBF USERS)

M_BROKERAGE_AMT, M_SALE_COUNTERPARTY, M_COUNTERPARTY_NAME, M_SETTLEMENT_DATE, M_MATURITY_DATE, M_PRINCIPAL, M_PRINCIPAL_IN_USD, M_RATE, 
M_TOTAL_PROFIT, M_NO_OF_DAYS, M_SELL_AMOUNT, M_SUM_PRODUCT, M_MARKET_RATE, M_ACCRUAL, M_YIELD, M_INPUTTER_2, M_INPUTTER_2_NAME, M_INPUTTER_2_TIME,
M_INPUTTER_1, M_INPUTTER_1_NAME, M_INPUTTER_1_TIME, M_AUTHORIZER, M_AUTHORIZER_NAME, M_AUTHORIZER_TIME, M_CPARTY_LIMIT_CODE, M_COMPANY_NAME, M_DEPT_CODE,

TRIM(M_DESC): Audit on contract attributes changes
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select
  M1.M_ACTION              as EVENT_ACTION
, M1.M_V_EVT_CLSL          as LAST_EVENT_LABEL
, M1.M_V_DATE              as EVENT_DATE
, M1.M_V_ACTDT             as TRADE_ACTUAL_DATE
, M1.M_V_LAT               as IS_LATE_TRADING
, M1.M_V_TSD               as EVENT_TIMESTAMP_DATE
, M1.M_V_TSH               as EVENT_TIMESTAMP_TIME
, M1.M_V_ACTOR             as EVENT_ACTOR
, M1.M_CNT_ORG             as ORIGIN_CONTRACT_NUMBER
, M1.M_VERSION             as CONTRACT_VERSION
, M1.M_CONTRACT            as CONTRACT_NUMBER
, M1.M_ORIGIN_TRADE_NUMBER as ORIGIN_TRADE_NUMBER
, M1.M_NB                  as TRADE_NUMBER
, M1.M_V_EVT_REF           as EVENT_REFERENCE
, M1.M_V_EVT_VER           as EVENT_VERSION
, M1.M_TP_PFOLIO           as PORTFOLIO
, M2.M_FLD_LBL             as MODIFIED_FIELD
, M2.M_FLD_VAL             as NEW_VALUE
, M2.PREV_VALUE            as OLD_VALUE
from
  (
    select
      case MK.M_V_ACTION
        when 1
          then 'INSERT'
        when 2
          then 'MODIFY'
        when 4
          then 'DELETE'
        when 8
          then 'CANCEL'
      end as M_ACTION
    , MK.M_V_EVT_CLS
    , CLS_MPG.M_DESC as M_V_EVT_CLSL
    , MK.M_V_STP_STS as M_V_STP_STS
    , MK.M_V_DATE
    , M_V_ACTDT
    , M_V_LAT
    , M_V_TSD
    , M_V_TSH
    , M_V_ACTOR
    , MK.M_CNT_ORG
    , MK.M_V_VERSION as M_VERSION
    , MK.M_CONTRACT
    , MK.M_MRPL_ONB as M_ORIGIN_TRADE_NUMBER
    , MK.M_NB
    , MK.M_REF_DATA
    , MK.M_V_EVT_REF
    , MK.M_V_EVT_VER
    , MK.M_TP_PFOLIO
    from
      EVT_HIS_REP     MK
    , EVT_MAPPING_REP CLS_MPG
    where
      MK.M_TP_PFOLIO@MxPortfolio:C
      and MK.M_REF_DATA     =@MxDataSetKey:N
      and CLS_MPG.M_REF_DATA=MK.M_REF_DATA
      and CLS_MPG.M_ID      =MK.M_V_EVT_CLS
      and MK.M_V_VERSION   <>1
      and
      (
        (
          MK.M_V_ACTDT     >= @FirstDate:D
          and MK.M_V_ACTDT <= @SecondDate:D
        )
        or
        (
          MK.M_V_DATE     >= @FirstDate:D
          and MK.M_V_DATE <= @SecondDate:D
        )
        or
        (
          MK.M_V_SYSDATE     >= @FirstDate:D
          and MK.M_V_SYSDATE <=@SecondDate:D
        )
      )
  )
  M1
  left join
    (
      select
        T1.M_CMP_ORG as M_CMP_ORG
      , T1.M_CNT_ORG
      , T1.M_VERSION as M_VERSION
      , T1.M_FLD_LBL
      , T1.M_FLD_VAL
      , COALESCE(T2.M_FLD_VAL,'') as PREV_VALUE
      , T1.M_REF_DATA             as M_REF_DATA
      from
        (
          select
            M_CMP_ORG
          , M_CNT_ORG
          , M_VERSION
          , M_FLD_LBL
          , M_FLD_VAL
          , M_REF_DATA
          from
            CNT_EVT_AUD_REP
          where
            M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
        )
        T1
      , (
          select
            M_CMP_ORG
          , M_CNT_ORG
          , M_VERSION
          , M_VERSION + 1 as PREV_VERSION
          , M_FLD_LBL
          , M_FLD_VAL
          , M_REF_DATA
          from
            CNT_EVT_AUD_REP
          where
            M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
        )
        T2
      where
        T1.M_REF_DATA    =T2.M_REF_DATA
        and T1.M_CMP_ORG =T2.M_CMP_ORG
        and T1.M_VERSION =T2.PREV_VERSION
        and T1.M_FLD_LBL =T2.M_FLD_LBL
        and T1.M_FLD_LBL<>'Action'
        and T1.M_FLD_LBL<>'Event'
        and T1.M_FLD_VAL<>T2.M_FLD_VAL
    )
    M2
    on
      (
        M1.M_REF_DATA               =M2.M_REF_DATA
        and M1.M_ORIGIN_TRADE_NUMBER=M2.M_CMP_ORG
        and M1.M_VERSION            =M2.M_VERSION
      )

select  
GROUPS.M_LABEL as GROUP_LABEL, 
case(GROUPS.M_TYPE) 
when 0 then 'MX USER ADMNISTRATOR'
when 1 then 'MX LICENSE ADMNISTRATOR'
when 2 then 'MX right ADMNISTRATOR'
when 3 then 'MX MIDDLEWARE ADMNISTRATOR'
when 4 then 'MX INSTALL'
when 5 then 'MX GROUP'
when 6 then 'MLC GROUP'
when 7 then 'MLC right ADMNISTRATOR' end as GROUP_CATEGORY,
GRPD.M_DESC as GROUP_DESCRIPTION,
case (GRPD.M_BO_FO)
when 0 then 'FRONT OFFICE GROUP'
when 1 then 'P&L CONTROL GROUP'
when 2 then 'PROCESSING GROUP' end as GROUP_TYPE, 
GRPD.M_TRN_OFFSET as AREA_CODE, 
case(GRPD.M_DATE_MODE)
when 0 then 'DD/MM/YY'
when 1 then 'MM/DD/YY'
when 2 then 'YY/MM/DD'
else 'Default' end as DATE_DISPLAY,
case (bitand(GRPD.M_RGT_DEVICE,2)) when 2 then 'X' end as DEVICE_ACCESS_RIGHT,
case (bitand(GRPD.M_RGT_DEVICE,4)) when 4 then 'X' end as DEVICE_INSERT_RIGHT,
case (bitand(GRPD.M_RGT_DEVICE,8)) when 8 then 'X' end as DEVICE_SUPPRESS_RIGHT,
case (bitand(GRPD.M_RGT_DEVICE,16)) when 16 then 'X' end as DEVICE_MODIFY_RIGHT,
GRPD.M_CUT_OFF as DEFAULT_CUT_OFF,
A.M_LABEL as REPORTING_TEMPLATE_LABEL,
CWT.M_LABEL as CHINESE_WALL_TEMPLATE,
GRPD.M_DAP_TMPL as DATA_PUBLISHER_TEMPLATE,
OSP.M_LABEL AS OSP_RIGHT_TEMPLATE,
CONSHDR.M_LABEL as DATA_CONSISTENCY_TEMPLATE,
NAV.M_LABEL as NAVIGATION_TEMPLATE,
EM.M_LABEL as PL_CONTROL_TEMPLATE,
MUB.M_LABEL as PORTFOLIO_TREE_TEMPLATE,
ROL.M_LABEL as ROLE_TYPE,
case (GRPD.M_ACTIVITY)
when 'C' then 'X' end as CONFIGURATOR,
GRPD.M_DST_PROF as DISTRIBUTION_PROFILE,
PTF_ATMP.M_LABEL as PORTFOLIO_ALIAS_TEMPLATE,
CWT_IRS.M_LABEL as CWT_IRS_TEMPLATE,
CWT_LD.M_LABEL as CWT_LD_TEMPLATE,
CWT_CD.M_LABEL as CWT_CD_TEMPLATE,
T1.M_LABEL AS STP_RIGHTS_LABEL,
EFF_R.M_LABEL as HEDGE_EFFECTIVNESS_TEMPLATE,
STRAT_R.M_LABEL as STRATEGY_CODE_TEMPLATE,
STAT.M_LABEL as STATEMENT_CATEGORY_TEMPLATE,
TREE_R.M_LABEL as HIERARCHY_RIGHT_TEMPLATE,
JOIN_R.M_LABEL as JOIN_TEMPLATE,
TRN_EST.M_LABEL as ENTITY_SET_RIGHTS,
case (GRPD.M_IMP_PAST)
when 1 then 'X' end as ALLOW_IMPACT_PAST,
DSKD.M_LABEL as DESK_LABEL,
PC.M_LABEL as PROCESSING_CENTER_LABEL,
GRPD.M_TIMEZONE as TIME_ZONE,
TAB_UTLT.M_LABEL as USER_TABLE_LAYOUT
FROM TRN_GRPD_DBF GRPD
left outer join TABLE#STRUCT#TAB_UTLT_DBF TAB_UTLT on TAB_UTLT.M_REFERENCE = GRPD.M_UT_LAY_TPL
left outer join TRN_PC_DBF PC on PC.M_REFERENCE = GRPD.M_PC
left outer join TRN_DSKDL_DBF DSKDL on (DSKDL.M_CTN = GRPD.M_FODS and DSKDL.M_REF <> 0)
left outer join TRN_DSKD_DBF DSKD on DSKD.M_REFERENCE= DSKDL.M_REF
left outer join TRN_EST_DBF TRN_EST on TRN_EST.M_REFERENCE = GRPD.M_ENTSET_TPL
left outer join CSF_JOIN_RGTH_DBF JOIN_R on JOIN_R.M_REFERENCE = GRPD.M_JOIN_RIGHT
left outer join CSF_TREE_RGTH_DBF TREE_R on TREE_R.M_REFERENCE = GRPD.M_TREE_RIGHT
left outer join HEDGE#STAT_TMPL_DBF STAT on STAT.M_REFERENCE = GRPD.M_STAT_TPL
left outer join HEDGE#STRAT_TMPL_DBF STRAT_R on STRAT_R.M_REFERENCE = GRPD.M_STRCDE_TPL
left outer join HEDGE#EFF_TMPL_DBF EFF_R on EFF_R.M_REFERENCE = GRPD.M_EFF_RUL
left outer join GRP_STP_DBF GRP_STP on GRP_STP.M_GRP_REF = GRPD.M_REFERENCE
left join STP_RGH_TPL_GBL_DBF T1 on GRP_STP.M_RIGHT_DATA = T1.M_REFERENCE
left outer join CWT_RTGEN_LD_DBF CWT_LD on CWT_LD.M_REFERENCE=GRPD.M_CWT_LD
left outer join CWT_RTGEN_CD_DBF CWT_CD on CWT_CD.M_REFERENCE=GRPD.M_CWT_CD
left outer join CWT_RTGEN_IRS_DBF CWT_IRS on CWT_IRS.M_REFERENCE=GRPD.M_CWT_IRS
left outer join PTF_ATMP_DBF PTF_ATMP on PTF_ATMP.M_REF = GRPD.M_PTF_ATMPL
left outer join ROLE_DBF ROL on ROL.M_REFERENCE=M_ROLE
left outer join MUB#MUB_TPL_DBF MUB on MUB.M_REFERENCE = GRPD.M_MUB_TMPL
left outer join EM_CFGT_DBF EM on EM.M_REFERENCE = GRPD.M_PLC_TMPL
left outer join NAV_TMPL_DBF NAV on NAV.M_REFERENCE = GRPD.M_NAV_TMPL
left outer join CONS_HDR_DBF CONSHDR on GRPD.M_CONS = CONSHDR.M_REFERENCE
left outer join OSP_RIGHTS_DBF OSP on GRPD.M_OSP_RIGHTS = OSP.M_REFERENCE
left outer join CTP_CWT_DBF CWT on GRPD.M_CTP_CWT = CWT.M_REFERENCE
left outer join ACT_RGTTMP_DBF A on GRPD.M_REP_TMPL = A.M_LABEL
left outer join MX_GROUP_DBF GROUPS on ltrim(rtrim(GRPD.M_LABEL)) = ltrim(rtrim(GROUPS.M_LABEL))
WHERE GROUPS.M_LABEL = @GroupLabel:C
order by GROUP_LABEL, GROUP_CATEGORY

TRIM(M_DESC): MarketDataAudit
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select  t2.M_COMMENT as BODY_COMMENT,
t2.M_DIM1 as DIM1,
t2.M_DIM2 as DIM2,
t2.M_DIM3 as DIM3,
t2.M_GROUP as MX_GROUP,
t2.M_HCOMMENT as HEADER_COMMENT,
t2.M_KEY as DATA_KEY,
t2.M_LINK as DATA_LINK,
t1.M_LINK_NUM as DATA_LINK_NUM,
t2.M_MODIFDATE as MODIF_DATE,
t2.M_MODIFTIME as MODIF_TIME,
t2.M_NEW_VALA as NEW_VALUE_ASK,
t2.M_NEW_VALB as NEW_VALUE_BID,
t2.M_OLD_VALA as OLD_VALUE_ASK,
t2.M_OLD_VALB as OLD_VALUE_BID,
t2.M_PARAMALIAS as PARAM_ALIAS,
t2.M_PARAMDATE as PARAM_DATE,
t2.M_PARAMDESK as PARAM_DESK,
t2.M_PARAMETER as PARAMETER,
t2.M_PL_DATE as PL_DATE,

t2.M_TYPE as DATA_TYPE,

from MPAUD_HD_DBF t1, MPAUD_BD_DBF t2
where t1.M_LINK = t2.M_LINK
and t1.M_MODIFDATE>=@ModifiedDate1:D
and t1.M_MODIFDATE<=@ModifiedDate2:D

TRIM(M_DESC): Job audit data for graphs based on view execution jobs
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select
'Summary' as REPORT_TYPE,	
   T1.M_IDJOB as IDJOB,
   T1.M_DATE as JOB_DATE,
   T1.M_STATUS as STATUS,
   T1.M_BATCH as BATCH,
   T1.M_CTX as TYPE,
   T1.M_TIME as START_TIME,
   T1.M_OUTPUTTYPE as EXT_OUTPUT,
   floor(T1.M_TIME / 3600) as START_TIME_H,
   floor(T1.M_ENDTIME / 3600) as END_TIME_H,
   T1.M_ENDTIME as END_TIME,
   case 
   	when T1.M_STATUS  = 'Done'  then 
   		(case 
             when T1.M_ENDTIME - T1.M_TIME< 0 then ((86400-T1.M_TIME)+T1.M_ENDTIME) 
   		    else (T1.M_ENDTIME - T1.M_TIME) 
   		end) 
   	else 0 
   	end as TIME_TAKEN_SECONDS,
    case 
    when T2.M_NB_ROWS  is null then 0 
    else T2.M_NB_ROWS end 
    as NB_ROWS,
    case 
     when T2.M_TAG_DATA is null then '*Not applicable*'
         else T2.M_TAG_DATA
          end as LABEL_OF_DATA,
    case 
   	 when (T2.M_NB_ROWS<=0) then 0
   	 when  T2.M_NB_ROWS is null then 0
   	else 
   	 (case 
       when T1.M_STATUS = 'Done' then 
   	 		(case 
            	when (T1.M_ENDTIME - T1.M_TIME< 0) then (((86400-T1.M_TIME)+T1.M_ENDTIME)/T2.M_NB_ROWS) 
   	 		    else ((T1.M_ENDTIME - T1.M_TIME)/T2.M_NB_ROWS) 
   	 		end) 
   	 	else 0 
   	 	end)
   	 end as SECONDS_PER_LINE,
   	 T1.M_FLTTEMP as CURR_GFLTR,
	 case 
      when T1.M_SCNTMPL is null then 'None' 
      when T1.M_SCNTMPL = ''  then 'None' 
       else T1.M_SCNTMPL 
      end as CURR_STMPL,
	 T1.M_CLASS as CURR_GFLTCLASS,
	 '' as USER_NAME,
	 '' as GROUP_NAME,
	 '' as DESK_NAME,
	 '' as DESK_TYPE,
     '' as OUTPUT_TABLE,
     '' as DYNAMIC_TABLE,
     null as GENERATION_COMPUTING_DATE,
     null as COMPUTING_DATE_2,
     '' as MARKET_SET_2,
     null as COMPUTING_DATE_1,
     '' as MARKET_SET_1,
     null as COMPUTING_DATE_0,
     '' as MARKET_SET_0,
     '' as PREF_TRANSACTION_TYPE,
     '' as PREF_PFOLIOS,
     '' as PREF_CTRPS,	
     '' as PREF_ENTITIES,
     '' as PREF_INSTRS,
     '' as PREF_SCANTBL,
     '' as PREF_EXP1,
     '' as PREF_EXP2,
	 '' as EXCLUDE_ITEMS_F,
     '' as EXCLUDED_ITEMS,
     ''  as POSTF_EXP,
     '' as LATE_TRADING,
     '' as GLOBAL_FILTER,
     '' as DATA_GENERATION_STATUS,
     '' as PURGED,
     '' as HOUR_ID,
     T1.M_PROCESS_NB as M_PROCESS_NB,
	  T1.M_BATCH_SIZE as M_BATCH_SIZE,
	  T1.M_RETRIES as M_RETRIES,
     T1.M_THRESHOLD as M_THRESHOLD
      
from ACT_JOBS_REP T1
left join (
	 select
   		M_IDJOB as M_IDJOB,
      	M_TAG_DATA as M_TAG_DATA,
      	sum(M_NB_ROWS) as M_NB_ROWS
   from DYN_AUDIT_REP where M_DATEGEN >= (select min(M_DATE) from ACT_JOBS_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)
   group by M_IDJOB, M_TAG_DATA) T2
	on (T1.M_IDJOB = T2.M_IDJOB)
	where T1.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N

UNION ALL

select
'Detailed' as REPORT_TYPE,	 
		 T4.M_IDJOB as IDJOB,
		 T4.M_DATE as JOB_DATE,
   	     T4.M_STATUS as STATUS,
         T4.M_BATCH as BATCH,
         T4.M_CTX as TYPE,
         T4.M_TIME as START_TIME,
         T4.M_OUTPUTTYPE as EXT_OUTPUT,
         floor(T4.M_TIME / 3600) as START_TIME_H,
    	 floor(T4.M_ENDTIME / 3600) as END_TIME_H,
         T4.M_ENDTIME as END_TIME,
         case
  		 when  T4.M_STATUS  = 'Done'  then 
   	      (case 
               when T4.M_ENDTIME - T4.M_TIME< 0  then ((86400-T4.M_TIME)+T4.M_ENDTIME) 
   		      else (T4.M_ENDTIME - T4.M_TIME)
   	       end) 
   	     else 0 
       	end as TIME_TAKEN_SECONDS,
         
         T3.M_NB_ROWS as NB_ROWS,
         case 
         when T3.M_TAG_DATA is null then '*Not applicable*'
         else T3.M_TAG_DATA
          end as LABEL_OF_DATA,
         0 as SECONDS_PER_LINE,
         
         T4.M_FLTTEMP as CURR_GFLTR,
    	  case 
    		when T4.M_SCNTMPL  is null then 'None' 
         when T4.M_SCNTMPL = ''  then 'None' 
         else T4.M_SCNTMPL 
        end as CURR_STMPL,
	     
	     T4.M_CLASS as CURR_GFLTCLASS,
		 T3.M_USER as USER_NAME,
		 T3.M_GRP as GROUP_NAME,
		 T3.M_DESK as DESK_NAME,
		 T3.M_DESKTYPE as DESK_TYPE,
         T3.M_OUTPUTTBL as OUTPUT_TABLE,
         T3.M_TABLEDYN as DYNAMIC_TABLE,
         T3.M_DATEKEY as GENERATION_COMPUTING_DATE,
         T3.M_REP_DATE2 as COMPUTING_DATE_2,
         T3.M_MKT_SET2 as MARKET_SET_2,
         T3.M_REP_DATE1 as COMPUTING_DATE_1,
         T3.M_MKT_SET1 as MARKET_SET_1,
         T3.M_REP_DATE0 as COMPUTING_DATE_0,
         T3.M_MKT_SET0 as MARKET_SET_0,
         T3.M_FLT_TRNT as PREF_TRANSACTION_TYPE,
         T3.M_FLT_PF as PREF_PFOLIOS,
         T3.M_FLT_CTRP as PREF_CTRPS,	
         T3.M_FLT_ENT as PREF_ENTITIES,
         T3.M_FLT_INS as PREF_INSTRS,
         T3.M_FLT_TBL as PREF_SCANTBL,
         T3.M_FLT_EXP as PREF_EXP1,
         T3.M_FLT_EXP2 as PREF_EXP2,
		 -- this flag states if the job has been executed with excluded items
         case coalesce(EXCLUDE_JOBS.IDGEN,0)
         when 0 then 'No'
         else 'Yes' end as EXCLUDE_ITEMS_F,
         -- This field provides the list of excluded items
         case coalesce(EXCLUDE_JOBS.IDGEN,0)
         when 0 then ''
         else 'TO BE FILLED' end as EXCLUDED_ITEMS,
         T3.M_FLT_POST  as POSTF_EXP,
         T3.M_LATE_TRAD as LATE_TRADING,
         T3.M_FLT_LBL as GLOBAL_FILTER,
         T3.M_EXE_STATUS as DATA_GENERATION_STATUS,
         T3.M_DELETED as PURGED,
	      '' as HOUR_ID,
	     T4.M_PROCESS_NB as M_PROCESS_NB,
		 T4.M_BATCH_SIZE as M_BATCH_SIZE,
		 T4.M_RETRIES as M_RETRIES,
       T4.M_THRESHOLD as M_THRESHOLD
        
from DYN_AUDIT_REP T3
right join ACT_JOBS_REP T4 on T3.M_IDJOB = T4.M_IDJOB
-- to check if the job has been run with excluded items
left join (select distinct M_AUDIT_REF as IDGEN from DYN_AUDIT_EXCL_ITM_REP) EXCLUDE_JOBS on T3.M_ID=EXCLUDE_JOBS.IDGEN
where T3.M_DATEGEN >= (select min(M_DATE) from ACT_JOBS_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)
and T4.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N

UNION ALL

select
'Cube' as REPORT_TYPE,	
   T7.M_IDJOB as IDJOB,
   T7.M_DATE as JOB_DATE,
   T7.M_STATUS as STATUS,
   T7.M_BATCH as BATCH,
   T7.M_CTX as TYPE,
   T7.M_TIME as START_TIME,
   '' as EXT_OUTPUT,
   floor(T7.M_TIME / 3600) as START_TIME_H,
   floor(T7.M_ENDTIME / 3600) as END_TIME_H,
   T7.M_ENDTIME as END_TIME,
   case 
   	when T7.M_STATUS  = 'Done'  then 
   		(case 
             when T7.M_ENDTIME - T7.M_TIME< 0 then ((86400-T7.M_TIME)+T7.M_ENDTIME) 
   		    else (T7.M_ENDTIME - T7.M_TIME) 
   		end) 
   	else 0 
    end as TIME_TAKEN_SECONDS,
    0 as NB_ROWS,
    '' as LABEL_OF_DATA,
    0 as SECONDS_PER_LINE,
    '' as CURR_GFLTR,
    '' as CURR_STMPL,
    0 as CURR_GFLTCLASS,
    '' as USER_NAME,
	'' as GROUP_NAME,
	'' as DESK_NAME,
	'' as DESK_TYPE,
    '' as OUTPUT_TABLE,
    '' as DYNAMIC_TABLE,
    null as GENERATION_COMPUTING_DATE,
    null as COMPUTING_DATE_2,
    '' as MARKET_SET_2,
    null as COMPUTING_DATE_1,
    '' as MARKET_SET_1,
    null as COMPUTING_DATE_0,
    '' as MARKET_SET_0,
    '' as PREF_TRANSACTION_TYPE,
    '' as PREF_PFOLIOS,
    '' as PREF_CTRPS,	
    '' as PREF_ENTITIES,
    '' as PREF_INSTRS,
    '' as PREF_SCANTBL,
    '' as PREF_EXP1,
    '' as PREF_EXP2,
	'' as EXCLUDE_ITEMS_F,
    '' as EXCLUDED_ITEMS,
    ''  as POSTF_EXP,
    '' as LATE_TRADING,
    '' as GLOBAL_FILTER,
    '' as DATA_GENERATION_STATUS,
    '' as PURGED,
    T7.HOUR_ID as HOUR_ID,
    T7.M_PROCESS_NB as M_PROCESS_NB,
	T7.M_BATCH_SIZE as M_BATCH_SIZE,
	T7.M_RETRIES as M_RETRIES,
   T7.M_THRESHOLD as M_THRESHOLD
    
    from
(select * from
(
	select
	M_REF_DATA,
	M_STATUS,
	M_CTX,
	M_BATCH,
	M_IDJOB,
	M_DATE,
	M_TIME,
	M_ENDTIME,
	M_PROCESS_NB as M_PROCESS_NB,
	M_BATCH_SIZE as M_BATCH_SIZE,
	M_RETRIES as M_RETRIES,
   M_THRESHOLD as M_THRESHOLD,

 	  case when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=0 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=0) THEN '12 am'  END as hour0,
      case	when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=1 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=1) THEN '1 am'  END as hour1,
      case	when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=2 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=2) THEN '2 am'  END as hour2,
      case	when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=3 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=3) THEN '3 am'  END as hour3,
      case	when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=4 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=4) THEN '4 am'  END as hour4,
      case	when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=5 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=5) THEN '5 am'  END as hour5,
      case	when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=6 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=6) THEN '6 am'  END as hour6,
      case	when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=7 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=7) THEN '7 am'  END as hour7,
      case	when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=8 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=8) THEN '8 am'  END as hour8,
      case	when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=9 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=9) THEN '9 am'  END as hour9,
      case	when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=10 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=10) THEN '10 am'  END as hour10,
      case	when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=11 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=11) THEN '11 am'  END as hour11,
      case	when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=12 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=12) THEN '12 pm'  END as hour12,
      case	when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=13 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=13) THEN '1 pm'  END as hour13,
      case	when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=14 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=14) THEN '2 pm'  END as hour14,
      case	when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=15 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=15) THEN '3 pm'  END as hour15,
      case	when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=16 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=16) THEN '4 pm'  END as hour16,
      case	when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=17 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=17) THEN '5 pm'  END as hour17,
      case	when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=18 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=18) THEN '6 pm'  END as hour18,
      case	when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=19 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=19) THEN '7 pm'  END as hour19,
      case	when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=20 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=20) THEN '8 pm'  END as hour20,
      case	when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=21 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=21) THEN '9 pm'  END as hour21,
      case	when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=22 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=22) THEN '10 pm'  END as hour22,
      case	when  (floor(M_TIME / 3600)  <=23 AND  floor(M_ENDTIME /3600) >=23) THEN '11 pm'  END as hour23,
      case	when  (M_ENDTIME-M_TIME)<0 THEN 'Within next day'  END as wnd
from ACT_JOBS_REP ) T5,
(
	select '12 am' as HOUR_ID from DUAL
	union   
	select '1 am' as HOUR_ID from DUAL
	union   
	select '2 am' as HOUR_ID from DUAL
	union   
	select '3 am' as HOUR_ID from DUAL
	union   
	select '4 am' as HOUR_ID from DUAL
	union   
	select '5 am' as HOUR_ID from DUAL
	union   
	select '6 am' as HOUR_ID from DUAL
	union   
	select '7 am' as HOUR_ID from DUAL
	union 
	select '8 am' as HOUR_ID from DUAL
	union  	
	select '9 am' as HOUR_ID from DUAL
	union   
	select '10 am' as HOUR_ID from DUAL
	union   
	select '11 am' as HOUR_ID from DUAL
	union   
	select '12 pm' as HOUR_ID from DUAL
	union   
	select '1 pm' as HOUR_ID from DUAL
	union   
	select '2 pm' as HOUR_ID from DUAL
	union   
	select '3 pm' as HOUR_ID from DUAL
	union   
	select '4 pm' as HOUR_ID from DUAL
	union   
	select '5 pm' as HOUR_ID from DUAL
	union

	union

	union

	union   
	select '9 pm' as HOUR_ID from DUAL
	union   
	select '10 pm' as HOUR_ID from DUAL
	union   
	select '11 pm' as HOUR_ID from DUAL
	union   
	select 'Within next day' as HOUR_ID from DUAL
	) T6
where 
T5.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
and (
T6.HOUR_ID = T5.hour0
or T6.HOUR_ID = T5.hour1 
or T6.HOUR_ID=T5.hour2 
or T6.HOUR_ID=T5.hour3 
or T6.HOUR_ID=T5.hour4
or T6.HOUR_ID=T5.hour5
or T6.HOUR_ID=T5.hour6
or T6.HOUR_ID=T5.hour7
or T6.HOUR_ID=T5.hour8
or T6.HOUR_ID=T5.hour9
or T6.HOUR_ID=T5.hour10
or T6.HOUR_ID=T5.hour11
or T6.HOUR_ID=T5.hour12
or T6.HOUR_ID=T5.hour13
or T6.HOUR_ID=T5.hour14
or T6.HOUR_ID=T5.hour15
or T6.HOUR_ID=T5.hour16
or T6.HOUR_ID=T5.hour17
or T6.HOUR_ID=T5.hour18
or T6.HOUR_ID=T5.hour19
or T6.HOUR_ID=T5.hour20
or T6.HOUR_ID=T5.hour21
or T6.HOUR_ID=T5.hour22

 )

TRIM(M_DESC): AU26 Calendar Audit SQL request
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select
--audited data
M_MX_REF_JOB,
M_REF_DATA,
M_DATE as AUD_DATE,
M_CAL_REF as AUD_CALEDAR_REF,
M_TIME as AUD_TIME,
M_TIME_S AUD_TIME_SEC,
case
	when M_ACTION like '%INSERTION%' then 'Insertion'
	when M_ACTION like '%DELETION%' then 'Deletion'
	else 'Modification'
end as AUD_GLOBAL_ACTION,
M_SUBACT_REF as AUD_SUBACT_REF,
case
 when M_SUB_ACTION like '%WEEKEND0%' then 'Sunday' 
 when M_SUB_ACTION like '%WEEKEND1%' then 'Monday' 
 when M_SUB_ACTION like '%WEEKEND2%' then 'Tuesday' 
 when M_SUB_ACTION like '%WEEKEND3%' then 'Wednesday' 
 when M_SUB_ACTION like '%WEEKEND4%' then 'Thursday' 
 when M_SUB_ACTION like '%WEEKEND5%' then 'Friday' 
 when M_SUB_ACTION like '%WEEKEND6%' then 'Saturday' 
 when M_SUB_ACTION like 'INSERT_%_HOLIDAY' then M_NEW_VALUE
 when M_SUB_ACTION like '%DESCRIPTION%' then M_NEW_VALUE
 when M_SUB_ACTION like 'DELETE_%_HOLIDAY' then M_OLD_VALUE

 else
  case
	 when M_ACTION like '%INSERTION%' or M_ACTION like '%DELETION%'  then 'All'
    else 'None'
   end 
end as AUD_SUB_ACTION,
case
	when M_OLD_VALUE  = '0' then 'Not weekend day'
	when M_OLD_VALUE  = '1' then 'Is weekend day'
	when M_OLD_VALUE like '%../../..%' then 
	 case
	 	when M_SUB_ACTION like '%DELETE_%_%' then M_NEW_VALUE
	 	else M_OLD_VALUE
	 end
	else M_OLD_VALUE
end as AUD_OLD_VALUE,

case
	when M_NEW_VALUE = '0' then 'Not weekend day'
	when M_NEW_VALUE  = '1' then 'Is weekend day'
	when M_NEW_VALUE = '' then M_NEW_VALUE
	else 
	 case
	 	when M_SUB_ACTION like '%DELETE_%_%' then '../../..'
	 	else M_NEW_VALUE
	 end
end as AUD_NEW_VALUE,
M_TYPE as AUD_TYPE,
M_DESK as AUD_DESK,
M_GROUP as AUD_GROUP,
M_USER as AUD_USER,
case 
	when M_ACTION like '%INSERTION%' then 'Insert new calendar'
	when M_ACTION like '%DELETION%' then 'Delete calendar'
	else --modification
		case
			when M_SUB_ACTION like '%DESCRIPTION%' then 'Modify calendar description' 
			when M_SUB_ACTION like '%WEEKEND%' then 
			 case
			 	when M_NEW_VALUE = '1' then 'Insert a weekend day'
			 	else 'Delete a weekend day'
			 end
			when M_SUB_ACTION like '%INSERT_SPECIAL_HOLIDAY%' then 'Insert special holiday'
			when M_SUB_ACTION like '%DELETE_SPECIAL_HOLIDAY%' then 'Delete special holiday'
			when M_SUB_ACTION like '%INSERT_YEARLY_HOLIDAY%' then 'Insert yearly holiday'
			when M_SUB_ACTION like '%DELETE_YEARLY_HOLIDAY%' then 'Delete yearly holiday'
			else 'Calendar was saved with no modifications to audited parameters'
		end
end	as ACTION_DESCRIPTION,
-- Configuration data
case
 when M_C_DSPLBL is null then 'Calendar does not exist anymore'
 else M_C_DSPLBL
end as CAL_CONF_DSPLBL,
M_C_DESC as CAL_CONF_DESC,
M_C_SWTCDE as CAL_CONF_SWFTCODE,
case
	when M_C_ISUNION = 1 then 'Yes'
	else 'No'
end as CAL_CONF_ISUNION,
case
	when M_C_SU = 1 then 'Yes'
	else 'No'
end as CAL_CONF_SUNDAY,
case
	when M_C_MO = 1 then 'Yes'
	else 'No'
end as CAL_CONF_MONDAY,
case
	when M_C_TU = 1 then 'Yes'
	else 'No'
end as CAL_CONF_TUESDAY,
case
	when M_C_WE = 1 then 'Yes'
	else 'No'
end as CAL_CONF_WEDNESDAY,
case
	when M_C_TH = 1 then 'Yes'
	else 'No'
end as CAL_CONF_THURSDAY,
case
	when M_C_FR = 1 then 'Yes'
	else 'No'
end as CAL_CONF_FRIDAY,
case
	when M_C_SA = 1 then 'Yes'
	else 'No'
end as CAL_CONF_SATURDAY

from CAL_AUDIT_REP
where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N

TRIM(M_DESC): Time zones static data
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select	
   TZ.M_LABEL as TIME_ZONE,
	TZ.M_DESC as TIME_ZONE_DESCRIPTION,
	TZ.M_SHIFT/3600 as SHIFT_TO_GMT, 
	DST_SET.M_LABEL as DST_SET, 
	DST_SET.M_DESC as DST_DESCRIPTION, 
	DST_DAT.M_DATE as DATE_OF_CHANGE, 
	DST_DAT.M_LOC_TIME/3600 as LOCAL_TIME_AT_CHANGE,	-- convert to hours
   DST_DAT.M_ADJUST/3600 as SHIFT_AT_CHANGE	-- convert to hours
from
   -- DAT_TZONE contains time zone information
	DAT_TZONE_DBF TZ 
   -- DAT_DSTSET_DBF contains daylight saving time set
	left join DAT_DSTSET_DBF DST_SET on TZ.M_DST=DST_SET.M_REFERENCE 
   -- DAT_DSTTR_DBF contains daylight saving time transition
	left join DAT_DSTTR_DBF DST_DAT on DST_SET.M_REFERENCE=DST_DAT.M_DST_SET

    when fx.M_DELTA_SPLT = 0 then 'No'
    when fx.M_DELTA_SPLT = 1 then 'Yes'
end as DeltaSplit,
fx.M_MDL_CNF_ID as ModelsAssIDPrice,
fx.M_MDL_CNF as ModelsAssTmplPrice,
fx.M_MDL_C_ID_S as ModelsAssIDSim,
fx.M_MDL_CNF_S as ModelsAssTmplSim,
case
    when fx.M_CORREL_SNS = 0 then 'Vega'
    when fx.M_CORREL_SNS = 1 then 'Inherited from Contract settings'
    when fx.M_CORREL_SNS = 2 then 'Natural'
end as VolatilityExposureView,
case
    when fx.M_ON_LINE_FP = 0 then 'Inherited from contract setting'
    when fx.M_ON_LINE_FP = 1 then 'Imported from OTC'
end as PriceFuture
from PR_PCNFG_DBF fx

TRIM(M_DESC): AU39-FxModelSetting
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
-- Extract FX model setting information
select distinct 
	MD.M_DATE as M_DATE,
	MD.M_CONFIG as M_CONFIG,
	MD.M_INSTRUMENT as M_INSTRUMENT,
	MD.M_MODEL as M_MODEL,
	MD.M_SETTING as M_SETTING,
	MD.M_VALUE as M_VALUE,
	MD.M_INDEX as M_INDEX,
	MD.M_INST_ID as M_INST_ID,
	MD.M_MODEL_ID as M_MODEL_ID,
	MD.M_CONTRACT as M_CONTRACT,
	MA.M__DATE_ as M__DATE_,
	MA.M_USER as M_USER,
	MA.M_RGT_GROUP as M_RGT_GROUP,
	MA.M_DESK as M_DESK,
	MA.M_ALIAS as M_ALIAS,
	MA.M_LABEL as M_LABEL,
	MA.PricingContect as PricingContect,
	MA.M_TEMPLATE as M_TEMPLATE,
	MA.isCustomized as isCustomized,
	MA.M_FO_DESK as M_FO_DESK,
	MA.M_FO_SETTING as M_FO_SETTING,
	MA.M_ROUTER as M_ROUTER
from (
	-- FXD model assignmnet which is combined of default assignement and router assignment
	select distinct 
		T2.M__DATE_ as M__DATE_,
		T1.M_FO_DESK as M_FO_DESK,
		T1.M_FO_SETTING as M_FO_SETTING,
		T1.M_ROUTER M_ROUTER,
		case
			when T1.M_USER < 0 then 'Default'
			else (select M_LABEL from MX_USER_DBF U0 where U0.M_REFERENCE = T1.M_USER)
		end as M_USER,
		case
			when T1.M_RGT_GROUP < 0 then 'Default'
			else (select M_LABEL from TRN_GRPD_DBF G0 where G0.M_REFERENCE = T1.M_RGT_GROUP)
		end as M_RGT_GROUP,
		T1.M_DESK as M_DESK,
		T1.M_ALIAS M_ALIAS,
		T1.M_ROUTER as M_LABEL,
		case 
			when T3.M_CONTEXT = 1 then 'Pricing'
			when T3.M_CONTEXT = 2 then 'Simulation'
		end as PricingContect,
		T1.M_TEMPLATE as M_TEMPLATE,
		T3.M_TEMPLATE as M_CONFIG,
		case
			when T1.M_CUSTOM = 1 then 'customized'
			when T1.M_CUSTOM = 0 then 'default'
		end as isCustomized
	from (
		-- fxd model setting, default model assignment
		select 
			distinct F0.M_DATE as M_DATE, 
			F0.M_LABEL as M_FO_DESK, 
			T0.M_LABEL as M_FO_SETTING, 
			'no-router, default config' as M_ROUTER, 
			T2.M_LABEL as M_TEMPLATE, 
			-100 as M_USER, 
			-100 as M_RGT_GROUP, 
			'Default' as M_DESK, 
			'Default' as M_ALIAS, 
			T2.M_CUSTOM as M_CUSTOM 
		from TRN_DSKD_DBF F0
			inner join TRN_STG_DBF T0 on F0.M_STG_LBL = T0.M_LABEL 
			inner join TRN_STGB_DBF T1 on T0.M_REFERENCE = T1.M_REFERENCE 
			inner join FXD_MDL_GSET_DBF T2 on T1.M_SETTING = T2.M_REFERENCE 
		where  T1.M_CLASS_ID = 'MKuZo41593'
		union
		-- fxd model setting, router assignment
		select distinct F0.M_DATE as M_DATE, 
			F0.M_LABEL as M_FO_DESK, 
			T0.M_LABEL as M_FO_SETTING, 
			T1.M_ROUTER as M_ROUTER, 
			T2.M_LABEL as M_TEMPLATE, 
			T4.M_USER as M_USER, 
			T4.M_RGT_GROUP as M_RGT_GROUP, 
			T4.M_DESK as M_DESK, 
			T4.M_ALIAS as M_ALIAS, 
			T2.M_CUSTOM as M_CUSTOM 
		from TRN_DSKD_DBF F0
			inner join TRN_STG_DBF T0 on F0.M_STG_LBL = T0.M_LABEL 
			inner join TRN_STGB_DBF T1 on T0.M_REFERENCE = T1.M_REFERENCE 
			inner join RS_FXD_MDLH_DBF T3 on T1.M_ROUTER = T3.M_LABEL 
			inner join RS_FXD_MDLB_DBF T4 on T3.M__INDEX_ = T4.M__INDEX_ 
			inner join FXD_MDL_GSET_DBF T2 on T4.M_SETTING = T2.M_REFERENCE 
		where T1.M_CLASS_ID = 'MKuZo41593'
		) T1
			inner join FXDMDL_RTGH_DBF T2 on T1.M_TEMPLATE = T2.M_LABEL and T2.M__DATE_ = T1.M_DATE 
			inner join FXDMDL_RTGB_DBF T3 on T2.M__INDEX_ = T3.M__INDEX_
	) MA -- MA model assignment table
left join (
	-- FXD detailed model setting
	select distinct T1.M_DATE as M_DATE,
	T1.M_CONFIG as M_CONFIG,
	T1.M_INSTRUMENT as M_INSTRUMENT,
	T1.M_MODEL as M_MODEL,
	TO_CHAR(ltrim(T6.M_LABEL0 || T6.M_LABEL1)) as M_SETTING,
	case
		when T6.M_LABEL0 <> ' ' then T1.M_LABEL
		else TO_CHAR(T1.M_NUM)
	end as M_VALUE,
	T1.M_INDEX as M_INDEX,
	T1.M_INST_ID as M_INST_ID,
	T1.M_MODEL_ID as M_MODEL_ID,
	case
		when T1.M_CONTRACT = ' ' then 'Default'
		else T1.M_CONTRACT
	end as M_CONTRACT
	from
	( select distinct T1.M_DATE as M_DATE,

			when T1.M_INST_ID = -14 then 'Rebate Strip'

			when T1.M_INST_ID = -19 then 'American on Future ST'
			when T1.M_INST_ID = -20 then 'Simple Quanto'

			when T1.M_INST_ID = -31 then 'One Barrier Forward Start'
			when T1.M_INST_ID = -32 then 'Basket Geometric'
			when T1.M_INST_ID = -33 then 'Asian Quanto Fixed'
			when T1.M_INST_ID = -34 then 'Asian Quanto Floating'
			when T1.M_INST_ID = -35 then 'Time option'

			when T1.M_INST_ID = -42 then 'Double Barrier Quanto'
			when T1.M_INST_ID = -43 then 'Touch Rebate Quanto'
			when T1.M_INST_ID = -51 then 'Fader'
			when T1.M_INST_ID = -52 then 'Volswap'

			when T1.M_INST_ID = -60 then 'Mbar'
			when T1.M_INST_ID = -61 then 'Target Redemption'
			when T1.M_INST_ID = -62 then 'Forward Vol Agreement'
			when T1.M_INST_ID = -63 then 'Dual'
			when T1.M_INST_ID = -64 then 'Accumulator'
			when T1.M_INST_ID = -65 then 'TWI Option'
			when T1.M_INST_ID = -66 then 'Corrswap'
			when T1.M_INST_ID = -67 then 'Passport'
			when T1.M_INST_ID = -68 then 'Bso'
			when T1.M_INST_ID = -69 then 'Pivot Target Redemption'

			when T1.M_MODEL_ID = -23 then 	'KIKO Black Scholes'
			when T1.M_MODEL_ID = -24 then		'Default'

			when T1.M_MODEL_ID = -1024 then	'Tremor2_MC'

			when T1.M_MODEL_ID = -1027 then	'Tremor1Strip_PDE'
			when T1.M_MODEL_ID = -1028 then	'Tremor2Strip_PDE'
			when T1.M_MODEL_ID = -1029 then	'Tremor3_PDE'
			when T1.M_MODEL_ID = -1030 then	'Tremor3_MC'
			when T1.M_MODEL_ID = -1031 then	'Tremor3Strip_PDE'
			when T1.M_MODEL_ID = -1032 then	'Intrinsic_MC'
			when T1.M_MODEL_ID = -1012 then	'REPLICATION'
			else (TO_CHAR(T1.M_MODEL_ID) || ' upmapped model')
		end as M_MODEL, 
		T1.M_MODEL_ID as M_MODEL_ID,
		T1.M_LABEL as M_LABEL,
		T1.M_NUM as M_NUM,
		T1.M_INDEX as M_INDEX
		from (
			select T1.M_DATE     as M_DATE, 
				T1.M_CONFIG   as M_CONFIG, 
				T2.M_CONTRACT as M_CONTRACT, 
				T1.M_INST_ID  as M_INST_ID, 
				T1.M_MODEL_ID as M_MODEL_ID, 
				T4.M_LABEL    as M_LABEL, 
				T4.M_NUM      as M_NUM, 
				T4.M_INDEX    as M_INDEX 
			from MDL_CONF_DBF T1 
				inner join MDLCFG_K_DBF T2 on ( T1.M_CATEGORY = T2.M_CATEGORY and T1.M_INST_ID = T2.M_INSTRUMENT and T1.M_MODEL_ID = T2.M_MODELID and T1.M_CONFIG_ID = T2.M_CONFIGID)
					inner join VARFLDVH_DBF T3 on T2.M_REF = T3.M_NUM
					inner join VARFLDVB_DBF T4 on T3.M_LINK = T4.M_LINK
			where  T1.M_DATE >= (select Min(M_DATE) from TRN_DSKD_DBF)
			union
			select T1.M_DATE as M_DATE,
				 T1.M_CONFIG  as M_CONFIG,
				 T2.M_CONTRACT as M_CONTRACT,
				 T1.M_INST_ID as M_INST_ID,
				 T2.M_MODELID as M_MODEL_ID,
				 T4.M_LABEL as M_LABEL,
				 T4.M_NUM as M_NUM,
				 T4.M_INDEX as M_INDEX
			from MDL_CONF_DBF T1
					 inner join MDLCFG_K_DBF T2 on ( T1.M_CATEGORY = T2.M_CATEGORY and T1.M_INST_ID = T2.M_INSTRUMENT and T1.M_CONFIG_ID = T2.M_CONFIGID)
					 inner join VARFLDVH_DBF T3 on T2.M_REF = T3.M_NUM
					 inner join VARFLDVB_DBF T4 on T3.M_LINK = T4.M_LINK
			  where  T2.M_CONTRACT <> ' 'and T1.M_DATE >= (select Min(M_DATE) from TRN_DSKD_DBF)) T1
	 ) T1
	 inner join VARFLDDH_DBF T5 on cast(SUBSTR(T1.M_MODEL, 1,15) as CHAR(15)) = cast(T5.M_LABEL0 as CHAR(15))
	 inner join VARFLDDB_DBF T6 on T1.M_INDEX = T6.M_INDEX and T5.M_LINK = T6.M_LINK
	) MD -- model setting table
on MD.M_CONFIG = MA.M_CONFIG and MD.M_DATE = MA.M__DATE_

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
