-- this flag indicates if the field is stored in the datamart table
'' as DYN_FLD_STORED_DM,
-- This flag indicates if the dynamic table is defined with a postfilter containing TBLFIELD or RQWHERE
'' as DYN_RQWHERE_TBLFIELD_POST,
-- this flag indicates if the dynamic table is defined with RQWHERE or TBLFIELD parser function in the prefilter expression
'' as DYN_RQWHERE_TBLFIELD_PRE,
-- the dynamic table status
'' as DYN_OBJECT_STATUS,
-- END: FIELDS FOR DYNAMIC TABLE -- 
-- START: FIELDS FOR BATCH -- 
-- The batch type
'' as BATCH_TYPE,
-- The batch label
'' as BATCH_LABEL,
-- The batch description
'' as BATCH_DESC,
-- Historization mode
'' as BATCH_HIS_MODE,
-- Are there other batches of feeders with same label of data with different historization mode
'' as LABEL_WITH_DIFFERENT_MODE,
-- Computing date 0
'' as COMP_DATE0,
-- Computing date 1
'' as COMP_DATE1,
-- Batch label of data
'' as LABEL_DATA,
-- Global filter name
'' as GLOBAL_FILTER_NAME,
-- Scanner template label
'' as SCANNER_TMPL_LABEL,
-- Datamart table label
DM_TABLE.M_LABEL as DM_LABEL,
-- Global filter class
0 as GLOBAL_FILTER_CLASS,
-- Data are precomputed flag
'' as BATCH_DATA_PRE_COMP_F,
-- number of different historization mode used for this label of data
0 as NUM_DIF_HIS_MODE, 
-- if the batch is connected with real time
'No' as REAL_TIME_CONNECTED,
-- The number of Datamart tables configured in the feeder
0 as NUMBER_TABLES_FEEDER,
-- Batch status
'' BATCH_OBJECT_STATUS,
-- Intraday object type: extraction, feeder or stored procedures
'' as ITD_OBJECT_TYPE,
-- Intraday object type: extraction / feeder / stored procedure label
'' as ITD_OBJECT_LBL,
-- Intraday object description
'' as ITD_OBJECT_DESC,
-- Feeder status
'' as FEEDER_STATUS,
-- END: FIELDS FOR BATCH --
-- START: FIELDS FOR Datamart tables --
-- Datamart table description
DM_TABLE.M_DESC as DM_TABLE_DESC,
-- Datamart table owner: Client or Murex
DM_TABLE.M_OWNER as DM_TABLE_OWNER,
-- Number of rows stored in the datamart table
coalesce(NUMBER_ROWS.NUMBER_RECORDS,0) as DM_NUMBER_RECORDS,
-- Number of fields of the datamart table
DM_TABLE.M_NUMBER_F as DM_TABLE_NUMBER_FIELDS,
-- Number of datamart tables having this dynamic table as datasource
DM_TABLE.M_DM_SAME as DM_TABLE_SAME_SRC,
-- check on Datamart tables status
-- CHECK: performance. Datamart table defined with more than @MaxNumberRecordsDatamartTable:N. This value is filled at run time
case 
when (NUMBER_ROWS.NUMBER_RECORDS >= @MaxNumberRecordsDatamartTable:N)
then '2-Configuration impacting performance'
-- CHECK: Configuration. Datamart table defined with more than @MaxNumberFieldsDatamartTable:N. This value is filled at run time
when (DM_TABLE.M_NUMBER_F >= @MaxNumberFieldsDatamartTable:N)
then '3-Configuration to check'
-- CHECK: configuration. Datamart tables configured with the same dynamic table as datasource
when (DM_TABLE.M_DM_SAME >= 2)
then '3-Configuration to check'
-- CHECK: configuration. Datamart table configured but does not contain any record. Is the table needed?
when (NUMBER_ROWS.NUMBER_RECORDS = 0)
then '3-Configuration to check'
else '4-No configuration issue detected' end as DM_TABLE_STATUS
-- END: FIELDS FOR Datamart tables -- 
from
AU_DMTABLE_REP DM_TABLE left outer join (select sum(M_NB_ROWS) as NUMBER_RECORDS, M_OUTPUTTBL from DYN_AUDIT_REP where M_DELETED='N' group by M_OUTPUTTBL) NUMBER_ROWS on (NUMBER_ROWS.M_OUTPUTTBL=DM_TABLE.M_LABEL) 
where DM_TABLE.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N

TRIM(M_DESC): Datamart Objects Modifications Audit
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select
T1.M_ID as IDH, 
T2.M_ID as IDB, 
T1.M_REF as ObjectLabel, 
case T1.M_ACTION 
when 'INSERT IMPORT' then 'create'
when 'INSERT' then 'create'
when 'MODIFY IMPORT' then 'update'
when 'MODIFY' then 'update'
when 'DELETE' then 'delete' end as Action, 
T1.M_CMP_DATE as ComputerDate, 
T1.M_CMP_TIME as ComputerTime, 
T1.M_CMP_TIME1 as Duration,
T1.M_SYS_DATE as SystemDate, 
T1.M_USR_NAME as UserName,
T1.M_USR_GROUP as UserGroup, 
T1.M_USR_DESK as UserDesk, 
case
	when T1.M_TYPE like '%BAT EXTR%' then 'Batch of Extractions'
	when T1.M_TYPE like '%BAT FEED%' then 'Batch of Feeders'
	when T1.M_TYPE like '%EXTRACTION%' then 'Extraction'
	when T1.M_TYPE like '%FEEDER%' then 'Feeder'
	when T1.M_TYPE like '%VAR SET%' then 'Variable set'
	when T1.M_TYPE like '%FILTER%' then 'Global Filter'
	when T1.M_TYPE like '%M DYN TBL%' then 'Murex dynamic table'
    when T1.M_TYPE like '%MA DYN TBL%' then 'Murex additional dynamic table'
    when T1.M_TYPE like '%U DYN TBL%' then 'User dynamic table'
    when T1.M_TYPE like '%UA DYN TBL%' then 'User additional dynamic table'
    when T1.M_TYPE like '%DM TABLE%' then 'Datamart table'
	else T1.M_TYPE
end   
as ObjectType, 
'N/A' as ObjectSubType,
T2.M_OLD_VALUE as OldValue, 
T2.M_NEW_VALUE as NewValue
from ACT_AUDH_DBF T1 left join ACT_AUDB_DBF T2 on T1.M_ID=T2.M_ID
where T1.M_SYS_DATE<=@HigherBoundaryDate:D and 
T1.M_SYS_DATE>=@LowerBoundaryDate:D
union all
select 
0 as IDH,
AUDIT_LIST.M_REFERENCE as IDB,
case  coalesce(EXCL_LIST.M_LABEL,'deleted list')
-- the list has been physically deleted
when 'deleted list' then AUDIT_LIST2.List_Name
else EXCL_LIST.M_LABEL end as ObjectLabel,
AUDIT_LIST.M_ACTION as Action,
AUDIT_LIST.M_CMP_DATE as ComputerDate,
AUDIT_LIST.M_CMP_TIME as ComputerTime,
0 as Duration,
null as SystemDate,
AUDIT_LIST.M_USER as UserName,
AUDIT_LIST.M_GROUP as UserGroup,
'N/A' as UserDesk,
'Exclusion list' as ObjectType,
AUDIT_LIST.M_OBJECT as ObjectSubType,
AUDIT_LIST.M_BEFORE as OldValue,
AUDIT_LIST.M_AFTER as NewValue
from 
DM_AUDIT_EXCL_LIST_DBF AUDIT_LIST left outer join
DM_EXCL_LIST_DBF EXCL_LIST on (AUDIT_LIST.M_LIST_REF=EXCL_LIST.M_REFERENCE) left outer join
-- this join to be able to retrieve the name of the deleted list as they do not exist 
-- anymore in the table DM_EXCL_LIST_DBF
(select M_BEFORE as List_Name, M_ACTION as Action, M_LIST_REF as List_Reference from DM_AUDIT_EXCL_LIST_DBF where M_ACTION='delete' and M_OBJECT='label') AUDIT_LIST2 on (AUDIT_LIST2.List_Reference=AUDIT_LIST.M_LIST_REF)
where AUDIT_LIST.M_CMP_DATE<=@HigherBoundaryDate:D and 
AUDIT_LIST.M_CMP_DATE>=@LowerBoundaryDate:D

TRIM(M_DESC): This query provides information on excluded items
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
-- Select statement retrieving details on exclusion lists --
select 
0 as NUMBER_JOB, 
M_ITEM as EXCLUDED_ITEM,--- Label of the excluded item in the exclusion list
case(M_OBJ_TYPE) -- The type of object within the exclusion list 
		when 1 then 'Batch of feeders'
		when 2 then 'Batch of extractions'
  else '' end as OBJECT_TYPE,
--- Place holder fields for the *Union all* function to be successful
0 as JOB_REFERENCE,
null as COMPUTING_DATE,
'' as DATAMART_TABLE,
M_LIST_REF as LIST_REFERENCE,
M_EXCL_LIST as EXCLUSION_LIST_LABEL,--- Name of the exclusion list
M_OBJ_LBL as OBJECT_LABEL, --- Label given to the object in the exclusion list
M_OBJ_DES as OBJECT_DESCRIPTION, --- Description of the Object 
'LIST_DEFINITION' as TAG_DATA, --- Filtering field that will be used in the viewer
M_LIST_DESC as LIST_DESCRIPTION,
'' as JOB_USER,
0 as JOB_PID,
0 as JOB_ID,
'' as JOB_STATUS,
null as JOB_DATE,
M_USER_TRADE as TRADE_USER,
M_DATE_TRADE as TRADE_INSERTION_DATE,
-- this technical field outputs YES if the list contains at least one batch and NO otherwise
case coalesce(rtrim(M_OBJ_LBL),'no batch')
when 'no batch' then 'NO'
else 'YES' end as CONTAIN_BATCH
from 
AU_EXCL_ITEMS_REP
where 
M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
union all
--- Select statement retrieving all the batches of feeders and batch of extractions that are run with excluded items ---
select 
NUMBER_JOBS.NUMBER_RUNS as NUMBER_JOB, -- to count the number of jobs that excludes this trade per day
--- Place holder fields for the *Union all* function to be successful
cast(AUDIT_EXCL_ITEMS.M_ITEM_NB as varchar(10)) as EXCLUDED_ITEM, -- Trade number of the item in the exclusion list
CASE(AUDIT_JOB.M_CTX) -- The type of object within the exclusion list 
		when 'BF' then 'Batch of feeders'
		when 'BE' then 'Batch of extractions'
		else ''
end as OBJECT_TYPE, -- need object type from act job table
GEN_DATA_AUDIT.M_IDJOB as JOB_REFERENCE, -- Job reference
GEN_DATA_AUDIT.M_DATEKEY as COMPUTING_DATE, -- Computing date of data generation 
GEN_DATA_AUDIT.M_OUTPUTTBL as DATAMART_TABLE, -- Datamart table name
--- Place holder fields for the *Union all* function to be successful
0 as LIST_REFERENCE,
'' as EXCLUSION_LIST_LABEL,
AUDIT_JOB.M_BATCH as OBJECT_LABEL, -- Batch label
'' as OBJECT_DESCRIPTION, -- Place holder fields for the *Union all* function to be successful
'ITEMS EXCLUDED' as TAG_DATA, -- Filtering field that will be used in the viewer
'' as LIST_DESCRIPTION,
AUDIT_JOB.M_OWNER as JOB_USER,
AUDIT_JOB.M_PID as JOB_PID,
AUDIT_JOB.M_IDJOB as JOB_ID,
AUDIT_JOB.M_STATUS as JOB_STATUS,
AUDIT_JOB.M_DATE as JOB_DATE,
'' as TRADE_USER,
null as TRADE_INSERTION_DATE,
'' as CONTAIN_BATCH
from DYN_AUDIT_EXCL_ITM_REP AUDIT_EXCL_ITEMS -- Audit table on excluded items
	left outer join DYN_AUDIT_REP 	GEN_DATA_AUDIT -- Table for generated audit data 
		on AUDIT_EXCL_ITEMS.M_AUDIT_REF = GEN_DATA_AUDIT.M_ID
	left outer join ACT_JOBS_REP AUDIT_JOB  -- Audit table on datamart excecution jobs
		on AUDIT_JOB.M_IDJOB = GEN_DATA_AUDIT.M_IDJOB
 left outer join -- This nested query to retrieve number of jobs excluded by this trade
 ( 
  select count(*) as NUMBER_RUNS, TABLEA.EXCLUDED_TRADE as EXCLUDED_TRADE, TABLEA.JOB_EXECUTION_DATE as JOB_EXECUTION_DATE
		from
		(
				-- this distinct is needed as a batch can compute many tables and we should count the batch only 1 time!
     select distinct AUDIT_EXCL_ITEMS_BIS.M_ITEM_NB as EXCLUDED_TRADE, AUDIT_JOB_BIS.M_DATE as JOB_EXECUTION_DATE, AUDIT_JOB_BIS.M_BATCH, AUDIT_JOB_BIS.M_IDJOB
 				from DYN_AUDIT_EXCL_ITM_REP AUDIT_EXCL_ITEMS_BIS -- Audit table on excluded items
				left outer join DYN_AUDIT_REP 	GEN_DATA_AUDIT_BIS -- Table for generated audit data 
				on AUDIT_EXCL_ITEMS_BIS.M_AUDIT_REF = GEN_DATA_AUDIT_BIS.M_ID
				left outer join ACT_JOBS_REP AUDIT_JOB_BIS  -- Audit table on datamart excecution jobs
				on AUDIT_JOB_BIS.M_IDJOB = GEN_DATA_AUDIT_BIS.M_IDJOB
 				where
 				AUDIT_JOB_BIS.M_CTX IN ('BF','BE') and 
 				AUDIT_JOB_BIS.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N and
     AUDIT_JOB_BIS.M_STATUS='Done'       
		) TABLEA 
	group by TABLEA.EXCLUDED_TRADE, TABLEA.JOB_EXECUTION_DATE) NUMBER_JOBS on (NUMBER_JOBS.EXCLUDED_TRADE=AUDIT_EXCL_ITEMS.M_ITEM_NB and NUMBER_JOBS.JOB_EXECUTION_DATE=AUDIT_JOB.M_DATE) 
where
AUDIT_JOB.M_CTX IN ('BF','BE') and 
AUDIT_JOB.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N and
AUDIT_JOB.M_STATUS='Done'

TRIM(M_DESC): EQD Models settings audit
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
--Securities Evaluation Settings
     
      	select Model.M_EQ_E_CONF as Context, 
         case Eva.M_EQ_C_M 
          when 1 then 'Redefined as' 
          else 'Specific' 
          end as Models,
         case Eva.M_EQ_ME_CONF 
          when '' then Eva.M_EQ_E_CONF 
          else Eva.M_EQ_ME_CONF 
          end as ModelTemplate,
         case Eva.M_EQ_C_I 
          when 1 then 'Redefined as' 
          else 'Specific' 
          end as Instruments,
         case Eva.M_EQ_IE_CONF 
          when '' then Eva.M_EQ_E_CONF 
          else Eva.M_EQ_IE_CONF 
          end as InstrumentsTemplate,
         case Eva.M_EQ_S_I 
          when 1 then 'Redefined as' 
          else 'Specific' 
          end as Greeks,
         case Eva.M_EQ_SE_CONF 
          when '' then Eva.M_EQ_E_CONF 
          else Eva.M_EQ_SE_CONF 
          end as GreeksTemplate,
   
         --Models Settings
                           
         M_EQ_UT as Underlying_Type,
         M_EQ_OPT_T as Option_Type,
         case Model.M_EQ_FLEX_H 
          when ''  then (case Model.M_EQ_OPT_ST when 0 then 'American' when 1 then 'European' end) 
          else Model.M_EQ_FLEX_H 
          end as Option_SubType,
         M_EQ_O_MODEL as Model,
         case Model.M_EQ_PAR_EV 
          when 0 then 'No' 
          when 1 then 'CPU' 
          when 2 then 'GPU' 
          end as Parallel,
         case Model.M_EQ_O_MODEL 
          when 'Generic' then EQMBK4.M_XMETHOD  
          else 'N/A' end as Method,
         case Model.M_EQ_O_MODEL 
          when 'Generic' then EQMBK4.M_XLOCVOL   
          else 'N/A' 
          end as Local_Vol,
         case Model.M_EQ_O_MODEL 
          when 'Generic' then EQMBK4.M_XVOLSTO   
          else 'N/A' 
          end as Stochastic_Vol,
         case Model.M_EQ_O_MODEL 
          when 'Generic' then EQMBK4.M_XMILSTE 
          else 'N/A' 
          end as Vol_Scheme,
         case Model.M_EQ_O_MODEL 
          when 'Generic' then cast(EQMBK4.M_XINBPTH AS VARCHAR(10)) 
          else 'N/A' 
          end as NbMCPaths,
         case Model.M_EQ_O_MODEL 
          when 'Generic' then EQMBK4.M_XUNBPTH 
          else 'N/A' 
          end as MCPaths_Units,
         case Model.M_EQ_O_MODEL 
          when 'Generic' then EQMBK4.M_XINTRIN 
          else 'N/A' 
          end as IsInstrinsic,
         case Model.M_EQ_O_MODEL 
          when 'Generic' then EQMBK4.M_XRANGEN 
          else 'N/A' 
          end as Range_Gen,
         case Model.M_EQ_O_MODEL 
          when 'Generic' then EQMBK4.M_XBTSTRP 
          else 'N/A' 
          end as BootStrap,
         case Model.M_EQ_O_MODEL 
          when 'Generic' then (case cast(EQMBK4.M_XMCBADJ as VARCHAR(2)) when '0' then 'No' when '1' then 'Yes' end)  
          else 'N/A' 
          end as MC_Barr_Adjust,
         case Model.M_EQ_DACS 
          when 0 then 'No' 
          when 1 then 'Yes'  
          end as Digital_as_CS,
         M_EQ_CSV as Call_Spread,
         case  Model.M_EQ_S_SNS 
          when 0 then 'Default' 
          else 'Redefined' 
          end as Sensis,
         
         --Greeks Settings

         --Delta settings
         
        --case when Context =ModelTemplate then 
        CASE SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C
			     WHEN 401 THEN SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO
			    END AS Delta,
			    CASE SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C
			     WHEN 401 THEN SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_TE
			    END AS BucketedDelta,
			    CASE SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C
			     WHEN 401 THEN SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_EV
			    END AS DeltaEval,
			    CASE SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C
			     WHEN 401 THEN SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SH
			    END AS DeltaShiftSize,  
        CASE SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C
			     WHEN 401 THEN SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SHT
			    END AS DeltaShiftType,

        -- case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C when 401 then (select M_EQ_SNS_CO from EQ_SNSC_DBF left join EQ_MODEC_DBF on SNSC.M_EQ_E_CONF = Model.M_EQ_E_CONF) end  as DftDelta,
        CASE SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C
				    WHEN 401 THEN SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_TE
				   END AS BucketedDelta,
        -- case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C when 401 then (select M_EQ_SNS_TE from EQ_SNSC_DBF where (SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SI = 0)) end  as DftDeltaTerm,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 401 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_EV 
        end as DeltaEval,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 401 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SH 
         end as DeltaShiftSize,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 401 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SHT 
        end as DeltaShiftType,
         
         --Gamma Settings
         
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 402 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO  
         end as Gamma, 
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 402 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_TE 
         end as BucketedGamma,
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 402 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_EV 
         end as GammaEval,
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 402 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SH 
         end as GammaShiftSize,
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 402 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SHT 
         end as GammaShiftType,
         
         --Vega Settings
         
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 403 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO 
        end as Vega,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 403 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_TE 
        end as BucketedVega,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 403 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_EV 
        end as VegaEval,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 403 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SH 
        end as VegaShiftSize,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 403 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SHT 
        end as VegaShiftType,
        
        --Theta Settings
        
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 405 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO  
        end as Theta,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 405 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_TE 
        end as BucketedTheta,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 405 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_EV 
        end as ThetaEval,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 405 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SH 
        end as ThetaShiftSize,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 405 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SHT 
        end as ThetaShiftType,
        
        --Rho Settings
        
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 404 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO  
        end as Rho,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 404 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_TE 
        end as BucketedRho,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 404 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_EV 
        end as RhoEval,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 404 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SH 
        end as RhoShiftSize,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 404 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SHT 
        end as RhoShiftType,        
        
        --Div Sensi
        
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 418 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO  
        end as DivSns,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 418 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_TE 
        end as BucketedDivSns,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 418 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_EV 
        end as DivSnsEval,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 418 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SH 
        end as DivSnsShiftSize,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 418 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SHT 
        end as DivSnsShiftType,        
                
        --Borrow Sensi
        
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 419 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO 
         end as RepSns,      
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 419 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_TE 
         end as BucketedRepSns,
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 419 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_EV 
         end as RepSnsEval,
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 419 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SH 
         end as RepSnsShiftSize,
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 419 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SHT 
         end as RepSnsShiftType,          
        
         --FX Delta
         
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 100 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO  
         end as FxDelta,
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 100 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_TE 
         end as BucketedFxDelta,
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 100 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_EV 
         end as FxDeltaEval,
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 100 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SH 
         end as FxDeltaShiftSize,
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 100 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SHT 
         end as FxDeltaShiftType,   
         
         --FX Gamma
         
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 101 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO 
         end as FxGamma,
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 101 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_TE 
         end as BucketedFxGamma,
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 101 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_EV 
         end as FxGammaEval,
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 101 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SH 
         end as FxGammaShiftSize,
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 101 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SHT 
         end as FxGammaShiftType,      
         
         --FX Vega
         
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 102 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO 
         end as FxVega,
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 102 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_TE 
         end as BucketedFxVega,
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 102 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_EV 
         end as FxVegaEval,
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 102 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SH 
         end as FxVegaShiftSize,
         case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
          when 102 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SHT 
         end as FxVegaShiftType,      
         
         --Other sensis
         
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 2 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO   
        end as ZC_Convexity,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 421 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO 
        end as CreSns,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 411 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO  
        end as Zeta,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 410 then  SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO   
        end as CrossGamma,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 417 then  SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO  
        end as CorrelSns,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 423 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO  
        end as Vanna,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 424 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO  
        end as Volga,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 438 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO   
        end as DivYSns,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 2201 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO 
        end as Delta_FSI,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 2202 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO 
        end as Adapted_delta,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 2203 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO  
        end as Gamma_FSI,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 2204 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO 
        end as Adapted_gamma,      
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 2205 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO  
        end as Vanna_FSI,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 2206 then  SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO  
        end as Adapted_Vanna,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 2207 then  SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO  
        end as Delta_gap,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 2208 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO   
        end as Gamma_gap,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 2209 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO 
        end as Vega_gap,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 2210 then  SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO  
        end as SkewSns,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 2211 then  SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO   
        end as ConvSns,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 2216 then  SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO 
        end as ExerciseProba,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 2217 then  SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO   
        end as ProbaDensity,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 2219 then  SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO  
        end as KUProba,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 2220 then  SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO 
        end as KDProba,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 2218 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO  
        end as BucketedDivSns2,
        case SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_C 
         when 2221 then SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_CO  
        end as DeltaFixRisk
        
        --end
        
        from  EQ_MODEC_DBF Model
         
         --All required joins
         
         left join EQ_EVC_DBF Eva on Model.M_EQ_E_CONF = Eva.M_EQ_E_CONF
         left join  EQMBLOCK#EQMBSKL_DBF EQMBSKL on Model.M_EQ_UDB_I =  EQMBSKL.M_INT_NB
         left join  EQMBLOCK#EQMBK4_DBF EQMBK4 on EQMBK4.M_INT_NB = EQMBSKL.M_BK_INT_N
         
         --Condition for the join with sensi should be: if Eva.M_EQ_ME_CONF = '' (ie the models are specific to the context), then use the link below. Else if Eva.M_EQ_ME_CONF <>'', the sensi definition should be either the ones correspoinding to Model.M_EQ_S_SNS if <> 0 or the ones from SNSC.M_EQ_E_CONF = Eva.M_EQ_ME_CONF AND Model.M_EQ_S_SNS = 0.
         
         left join EQ_SNSC_DBF SNSC on  SNSC.M_EQ_SNS_SI = Model.M_EQ_S_SNS  and SNSC.M_EQ_E_CONF = Model.M_EQ_E_CONF

FROM  EQ_SIMC_DBF

TRIM(M_DESC): EQD Default Sensis
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
-- Securities Evaluation Settings
     
select s.M_EQ_E_CONF as Context,
	case s.M_EQ_S_I 
		when 1 then 'Redefined as' 
		else 'Specific' 
		end as Greeks,
	case s.M_EQ_SE_CONF 
		when ''  then s.M_EQ_E_CONF 
		else s.M_EQ_SE_CONF 
		end as GreeksTemplate,

	--Greeks Settings
     
	case t.M_EQ_SNS_C 
		when 401 then 'Delta' 
		when 402 then 'Gamma' 
		when 403 then 'Vega' 
		when 404 then 'Rho' 
		when 405 then 'Theta' 
		when 2 then 'ZC Cnx' 
		when 418 then 'DivSns' 
		when 419 then 'RepSns' 
		when 421 then 'CreSns' 
		when 100 then 'FXDelta' 
		when 101 then 'FXGamma'  
		when 102 then 'FXVega' 
		when 411 then 'Zeta'  
		when 410 then 'CrossGamma' 
		when 417 then 'Correl Sns' 
		when 423 then 'Vanna' 
		when 424 then 'Volga' 
		when 438 then 'DivY Sns' 
		when 2201 then 'Delta FSI' 
		when 2202 then  'Adapted Delta' 
		when 2203 then 'Gamma FSI' 
		when 2204 then 'Adapted Gamma' 
		when 2205 then 'Vanna FSI' 
		when 2206 then 'Adapted Vanna' 
		when 2207 then 'Delta Gap' 
		when 2208 then 'Gamma Gap' 
		when 2208 then 'Vega Gap' 
		when 2210 then 'SkewSns' 
		when 2211 then 'ConvSns' 
		when 2216 then 'Exercise Proba' 
		when 2217 then 'Proba Density' 
		when 2219 then 'Knock up Proba' 
		when 2220 then 'Knock dn proba' 
		when 2218 then 'Bucketed DivSns' 
		when 2221 then 'Delta Fix Risk'  
		end  as GreekName,
	case t.M_EQ_SNS_CO 
		when 0 then 'No' 
		else 'Yes' 
		end as IsComputed,
	case t.M_EQ_SNS_TE 
		when 0 then 'No' 
		when 1 then 'Mat' 
		when 2 then 'Mat and Strike' 
		end as IsBucketed,
	case t.M_EQ_SNS_EV 
		when 0 then 'Default'  
		when 1 then 'Analytic' 
		else 'Finite Diff' 
		end as EvalType,
	t.M_EQ_SNS_SH as ShiftSize,
	case t.M_EQ_SNS_SHT 
		when 0 then 'Up' 
		else 'Centered' 
		end as ShiftType
from  EQ_SNSC_DBF t
left join EQ_EVC_DBF s on s.M_EQ_E_CONF = t.M_EQ_E_CONF and t.M_EQ_SNS_SI = 0

TRIM(M_DESC): Chinese wall template and counterparts by group

-- ACT_BAT_DBF contains information about the intraday reporting objects (extractions, feeders, stored procedures)
from ACT_BAT_DBF BAT
-- ACT_DYN_DBF contains information about reporting objects (feeders, extractions or stored procedures) references in the batches
left outer join ACT_DYN_DBF ACT_DYN on (BAT.M_REF=ACT_DYN.M_REF)
-- ACT_SETREP_DBF contains batches configuration of execution
left outer join ACT_SETREP_DBF BATCH_DEF on (BATCH_DEF.M_REFBAT=BAT.M_REF)
-- ACT_SET_DBF contains batches main screen configuration
left outer join ACT_SET_DBF BATCH_NAME on (BATCH_NAME.M_REF=BATCH_DEF.M_REFSET)
left outer join ACT_EXTR_DBF EXTR on (BAT.M_REF=EXTR.M_REF_BATCH)
left outer join ACT_REQXTR_DBF REQ on (REQ.M_REF=EXTR.M_REF_REQ)
left outer join ACT_STDPRC_DBF SP on (BAT.M_REF=SP.M_REF_BATCH)
left outer join ACT_REQPROC_DBF REQPROC on (SP.M_REF_REQ=REQPROC.M_REF)
left outer join DAPFILTER_DBF FILTER on (FILTER.M_LABEL=BATCH_NAME.M_FLTTEMP)
left outer join (select M_TYPE, M_FILTER_REF from DAPFLT_DAT_DBF COMP_DATE where COMP_DATE.M_INDEX=0) COMP_DATE0 on (COMP_DATE0.M_FILTER_REF=FILTER.M_FILTER_REF)
left outer join (select M_TYPE, M_FILTER_REF from DAPFLT_DAT_DBF COMP_DATE where COMP_DATE.M_INDEX=1) COMP_DATE1 on (COMP_DATE1.M_FILTER_REF=FILTER.M_FILTER_REF)
left outer join (select M_TYPE, M_FILTER_REF from DAPFLT_DAT_DBF COMP_DATE where COMP_DATE.M_INDEX=2) COMP_DATE2 on (COMP_DATE2.M_FILTER_REF=FILTER.M_FILTER_REF)
left outer join (select count(*) as NB_TIMES, max(M_DATE) as LAST_EXECUTION_DATE, M_BATCH from ACT_JOB_DBF where M_CTX in ('BE','BF','BP') group by M_BATCH) BATCH_JOB on (BATCH_JOB.M_BATCH=BATCH_NAME.M_LABEL)
left outer join (select count(*) as NB_TIMES, max(M_DATE) as LAST_EXECUTION_DATE, M_BATCH from ACT_JOB_DBF where M_CTX in ('E','F','P') group by M_BATCH) ITD_JOB on (ITD_JOB.M_BATCH=BAT.M_LABEL)
left outer join PROCESS#PS_ITEM_DBF ITEM on (ITEM.M_PARAM_LAB2=BATCH_NAME.M_LABEL and ITEM.M_UNIT in ('REP_BATCHES_FEED','REP_BATCHES_EXT','REP_BATCHES_PROC'))
left outer join PROCESS#PS_SCRPT_DBF PS on (PS.M_REF=ITEM.M_REF)
left outer join RPO_DMSETUP_TABLE_DBF DM on (ACT_DYN.M_OUTPUT=DM.M_LABEL)
left outer join RPO_DMSETUP_DYN_TABLE_DBF DYN on (DM.M_REFERENCE=DYN.M_REFERENCE)
left outer join RPO_CATEG_DBF CATEG on (BAT.M_CATEG=CATEG.M_REF)
left outer join DYNDBF1#TRN_DYND_DBF DYN1 on (DYN.M_DYN_TABLE_DIR_TYPE=0 and DYN1.M_CREATION=DYN.M_DYN_TABLE)
left outer join DYNDBF3#TRN_DYND_DBF DYN3 on (DYN.M_DYN_TABLE_DIR_TYPE=1 and DYN3.M_CREATION=DYN.M_DYN_TABLE)
left outer join DYNDBF2#TRN_DYND_DBF DYN2 on (DYN.M_DYN_TABLE_DIR_TYPE=2 and DYN2.M_CREATION=DYN.M_DYN_TABLE)
left outer join DYNDBF4#TRN_DYND_DBF DYN4 on (DYN.M_DYN_TABLE_DIR_TYPE=3 and DYN4.M_CREATION=DYN.M_DYN_TABLE)
-- We exclude technical Datamart table fields
left outer join RPO_DMSETUP_COLUMN_DBF COL on (DM.M_REFERENCE=COL.M_RPO_DMSETUP_TABLE_REF and COL.M_LABEL<>'MX_REF_JOB' and COL.M_LABEL<>'REF_DATA' and COL.M_LABEL<>'IDENTITY' and COL.M_LABEL<>'TIMESTAMP')
left outer join DYNDBF1#TRN_DYNU_DBF HF1 on (DYN.M_DYN_TABLE_DIR_TYPE=0 and HF1.M_CREATION=DYN.M_DYN_TABLE and HF1.M_DUP_LABEL=COL.M_RELATED_DATA)
left outer join DYNDBF3#TRN_DYNU_DBF HF3 on (DYN.M_DYN_TABLE_DIR_TYPE=1 and HF3.M_CREATION=DYN.M_DYN_TABLE and HF3.M_DUP_LABEL=COL.M_RELATED_DATA)
left outer join DYNDBF2#TRN_DYNU_DBF HF2 on (DYN.M_DYN_TABLE_DIR_TYPE=2 and HF2.M_CREATION=DYN.M_DYN_TABLE and HF2.M_DUP_LABEL=COL.M_RELATED_DATA)
left outer join DYNDBF4#TRN_DYNU_DBF HF4 on (DYN.M_DYN_TABLE_DIR_TYPE=3 and HF4.M_CREATION=DYN.M_DYN_TABLE and HF4.M_DUP_LABEL=COL.M_RELATED_DATA)
-- To check if the dynamic table is configured with prefilter: we are doing select distinct to avoid duplicates
left outer join (select distinct M_VALUE from DYNDBF1#TRN_DYNC_DBF) PRE1 on (DYN.M_DYN_TABLE_DIR_TYPE=0 and PRE1.M_VALUE=DYN.M_DYN_TABLE)
left outer join (select distinct M_VALUE from DYNDBF3#TRN_DYNC_DBF) PRE3 on (DYN.M_DYN_TABLE_DIR_TYPE=1 and PRE3.M_VALUE=DYN.M_DYN_TABLE)
left outer join (select distinct M_VALUE from DYNDBF2#TRN_DYNC_DBF) PRE2 on (DYN.M_DYN_TABLE_DIR_TYPE=2 and PRE2.M_VALUE=DYN.M_DYN_TABLE)
left outer join (select distinct M_VALUE from DYNDBF4#TRN_DYNC_DBF) PRE4 on (DYN.M_DYN_TABLE_DIR_TYPE=3 and PRE4.M_VALUE=DYN.M_DYN_TABLE)
-- To check if the dynamic table is configured with postfilter: we are doing select distinct to avoid duplicates
left outer join (select distinct M_CREATION from DYNDBF1#TRN_DYNO_DBF) POST1 on (DYN.M_DYN_TABLE_DIR_TYPE=0 and POST1.M_CREATION=DYN.M_DYN_TABLE)
left outer join (select distinct M_CREATION from DYNDBF3#TRN_DYNO_DBF) POST3 on (DYN.M_DYN_TABLE_DIR_TYPE=1 and POST3.M_CREATION=DYN.M_DYN_TABLE)
left outer join (select distinct M_CREATION from DYNDBF2#TRN_DYNO_DBF) POST2 on (DYN.M_DYN_TABLE_DIR_TYPE=2 and POST2.M_CREATION=DYN.M_DYN_TABLE)
left outer join (select distinct M_CREATION from DYNDBF4#TRN_DYNO_DBF) POST4 on (DYN.M_DYN_TABLE_DIR_TYPE=3 and POST4.M_CREATION=DYN.M_DYN_TABLE)
-- To get scanner template configuration
left outer join SCANNERCFG_DBF SCANNER on (SCANNER.M_REFERENCE=BATCH_NAME.M_SCNTMPL)
-- this last virtual table retrieve the datamart indexes
left outer join RPO_DMSETUP_COLUMN_INDEX_DBF IDX on (IDX.M_RPO_DMSETUP_COLUMN_REF=COL.M_REFERENCE)
where
BAT.M_EXECTX in (5,7,8)

TRIM(M_DESC): Securities audit
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select
AUDIT_SEC.M_USR_NAME as USER_LABEL,
AUDIT_SEC.M_USR_GROUP as GROUP_LABEL,
AUDIT_SEC.M_USR_DESK as Desk,
case AUDIT_SEC.M_ACTION when 'INS' then 'Insertion' when 'MOD' then 'Modification' when 'DEL' then 'Deletion' end as Action,
AUDIT_SEC.M_ID as Modification_Id,
AUDIT_SEC.M_ACT_COM0 as MODIFIED_FIELD,
AUDIT_SEC.M_ACT_COM1 as OLD_VALUE,
AUDIT_SEC.M_ACT_COM2 as NEW_VALUE,
AUDIT_SEC.M_DATE as EVENT_SYSTEM_DATE,
AUDIT_SEC.M_DATE_CMP as Computer_date,
--convert(varchar(10), dateadd(ss, AUDIT_SEC.M_TIME_CMP, "00:00:00"), 8) as Computer_time,
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MOD(AUDIT_SEC.M_TIME_CMP, 86400),'SSSSS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') as Computer_time,
nvl(SEC.M_SE_D_LABEL, AUDIT_SEC.M_ACT_KEY)  as SECURITY_LABEL,
SEC.M_SE_F_NAME as Security_full_name,
SEC.M_SE_GROUP as  Security_group,
SEC.M_SE_TYPE as Security_type,
SEC.M_SE_CATE as Security_category


from AUD_FCFG_DBF AUDIT_SEC  left outer join SE_HEAD_DBF SEC on AUDIT_SEC.M_ACT_KEY = SEC.M_SE_LABEL
where AUDIT_SEC.M_AUD_FILED = 'Securities' and ( AUDIT_SEC.M_ACTION<>'MOD' or (AUDIT_SEC.M_ACTION='MOD'and instr(AUDIT_SEC.M_ACT_COM0,'Timestamp-')=0 and AUDIT_SEC.M_ACT_COM0 <> ' '))
and AUDIT_SEC.M_DATE>=@FirstAuditDate:D and AUDIT_SEC.M_DATE<=@SecondAuditDate:D

TRIM(M_DESC): Group access rights
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select
  M_GRP_LABEL as GROUP_LABEL
, M_AISU      as RIGHTS
, M_LABEL     as MENU
, M_PATH      as PATH
, case
    when instr(M_PATH,'>')>0
      then substr(M_PATH, 1, instr(M_PATH,'>')-1)
      else M_PATH
  end as PATH_LABEL
, case
    when instr(M_PATH,'>')>0
      then substr(M_PATH, instr(M_PATH,'>'),(length(M_PATH)- instr(M_PATH,'>')))
      else M_PATH
  end         as PATH_REST
, M_NAV_LABEL as TEMPLATE
, M_NAV_CMT   as COMMENTS
from
  NAV_AUD_REP
where
  M_GRP_LABEL    = @GroupLabel:C
  and M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N

TRIM(M_DESC): Events audit between two dates
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select
  case
    when EVT_STL.M_V_EVSTLNB > 0
      then 'STL'
    when EVT_STL.M_V_EVSTLNB = 0
      then 'TRD'
  end as IMPACT_TYPE
, case MK.M_V_ACTION
    when 1
      then 'Insert'
    when 2
      then 'Modify'
    when 4
      then 'Delete'
    when 8
      then 'Cancel'
  end             as EVENT_ACTION
, MK.M_V_EVT_CLS  as LAST_EVENT_REFERENCE
, EVT_MPG.M_DESC  as LAST_EVENT_LABEL
, MK.M_V_EVT_REF  as EVENT_REFERENCE
, MK.M_V_EVT_OREF as EVENT_ORIGIN_REFERENCE
, MK.M_V_EVT_VER  as EVENT_VERSION
, MK.M_V_DATE     as EVENT_DATE
, MK.M_V_SYSDATE  as EVENT_SYSTEM_DATE
, case MK.M_V_LAT
    when 0
      then 'No'
    when 1
      then 'Yes'
  end          as IS_LATE_TRADING
, MK.M_V_TSD   as EVENT_TIMESTAMP_DATE
, MK.M_V_TSH   as EVENT_TIMESTAMP_TIME
, MK.M_V_ACTOR as EVENT_ACTOR
, case
    when (
        MK.M_V_TRD_REF <> MK.M_NB
        and MK.M_V_DATE > MK.M_V_SYSDATE
      )
      then 'Past event'
    when (
        MK.M_V_TRD_REF <> MK.M_NB
        and MK.M_V_DATE < MK.M_V_SYSDATE
      )
      then 'Future event'
      else 'Today'
  end                  as EVENT_DATE_POSITION
, EVT_STL.M_V_EVSTLNB  as EVENT_NB_SETTLEMENT
, EVT_STL.M_V_EVSTLIND as EVENT_SETTLEMENT_INDEX
, case
    when TP.M_TP_INITSD = 'Y'
      then EVT_STL.M_V_EVSTLAMT
      else ((-1)*EVT_STL.M_V_EVSTLAMT)
  end                  as EVENT_SETTLEMENT_AMOUNT
, EVT_STL.M_V_EVSTLCUR as EVENT_SETTLEMENT_CCY
, EVT_STL.M_V_EVSTLDTE as EVENT_SETTLEMENT_DATE
, MK.M_CNT_ORG         as ORIGIN_CONTRACT_NUMBER
, TP.M_TP_CREATOR      as TRADE_CREATOR
, MK.M_V_VERSION       as CONTRACT_VERSION
, MK.M_CONTRACT        as CONTRACT_NUMBER
, MK.M_MRPL_ONB        as ORIGIN_TRADE_NUMBER
, MK.M_NB              as TRADE_NUMBER
, MK.M_V_AVQTY         as AVAILABLE_QUANTITY
, TP.M_TP_IQTY         as INITIAL_QUANTITY
, MK.M_V_IMPQTY        as IMPACTED_QUANTITY
, case MK.M_V_STP_STS
    when ''
      then TP.M_STP_STATUS
      else MK.M_V_STP_STS
  end             as VALIDATION_STATUS
, MK.M_AMD_STS2   as AMENDMENT_STATUS
, TP.M_TP_TRADER  as TRADER
, TP.M_TRN_FMLY   as TRADE_FAMILY
, TP.M_TRN_GRP    as TRADE_GROUP
, TP.M_TRN_TYPE   as TRADE_TYPE
, TP.M_INSTRUMENT as INSTRUMENT
, TP.M_TP_PFOLIO  as PORTFOLIO
, TP.M_TP_CNTRP   as COUNTERPART_LABEL
, TP.M_TP_DTETRN  as TRADE_DATE
, MK.M_V_ACTDT    as TRADE_ACTUAL_DATE
, TP.M_TP_DTESYS  as TRADE_SYSTEM_DATE
, TP.M_TP_BS      as BUYSELL
, TPO.M_TP_CP     as CALLPUT
, TPO.M_TP_AE     as AMERICANEUROPEAN
, TP.M_TP_DTEEXP  as TRADE_EXPIRY_DATE
, TP.M_TP_CUTOFF  as CUT_OFF
, TPO.M_TP_STRIKE as STRIKE
, TP.M_TP_PRICED  as PRICE
, TP.M_TP_PRICEDN as PRICE_NOTATION
from
  EVT_HIS_REP MK
  join
    EVT_MAPPING_REP EVT_MPG
    on
      (
        EVT_MPG.M_REF_DATA=MK.M_REF_DATA
        and EVT_MPG.M_ID  =MK.M_V_EVT_CLS
      )
  join
    EVT_STL_REP EVT_STL
    on
      (
        EVT_STL.M_REF_DATA      = MK.M_REF_DATA
        and EVT_STL.M_CNT_ORG   = MK.M_CNT_ORG
        and EVT_STL.M_V_VERSION = MK.M_V_VERSION
        and EVT_STL.M_TP_PFOLIO = MK.M_TP_PFOLIO
      )
  join
    TP_ALL_REP TP
    on
      (
        MK.M_REF_DATA      = TP.M_REF_DATA
        and MK.M_NB        = TP.M_NB
        and MK.M_TP_PFOLIO = TP.M_TP_PFOLIO
      )
  left join
    TP_OPT_REP TPO
    on
      (
        TPO.M_REF_DATA      = TP.M_REF_DATA
        and TPO.M_TP_PFOLIO = TP.M_TP_PFOLIO
        and TPO.M_NB        = TP.M_NB
      )
where
  MK.M_REF_DATA       =@MxDataSetKey:N
  and MK.M_V_EVT_REF <> 0
  and
  (
    (
      MK.M_V_TRD_REF = MK.M_NB
      and
      (
        (
          TP.M_TP_DTESYS     >= @FirstAuditDate:D
          and TP.M_TP_DTESYS <= @SecondAuditDate:D
        )
        or
        (
          TP.M_TP_DTETRN     >= @FirstAuditDate:D
          and TP.M_TP_DTETRN <= @SecondAuditDate:D
        )
        or
        (
          MK.M_V_ACTDT     >= @FirstAuditDate:D
          and MK.M_V_ACTDT <= @SecondAuditDate:D
        )
      )
    )
    or
    (
      MK.M_V_TRD_REF <> MK.M_NB
      and
      (
        (
          MK.M_V_DATE     >= @FirstAuditDate:D
          and MK.M_V_DATE <= @SecondAuditDate:D
        )
        or
        (
          MK.M_V_SYSDATE     >= @FirstAuditDate:D
          and MK.M_V_SYSDATE <= @SecondAuditDate:D
        )
      )
    )
  )

select
  case H.M_ACTION
    when 'INSERT'
      then 'Insertion'
    when 'MODIFY'
      then 'Modification'
    when 'DELETE'
      then 'Deletion'
  end as ACTION
, case ltrim(rtrim(H.M_TYPE))
    when 'GRP'
      then 'General - Group Definition'
    when 'PS_DEF'
      then 'Workflows - Processing Script Def.'
    when 'PS_TMP'
      then 'Workflows - Processing Script Tmpl.'
    when 'VAL_ACT'
      then 'Workflows - Validation Tmpl.'
    when 'VAL_ACT_RL'
      then 'Workflows - Status Rules'
    when 'STP_TMP'
      then 'Workflows - Validation queues Tmpl.'
    when 'MARK_ACC'
      then 'Workflows - Market Prices Tmpl.'
    when 'REP_TMP'
      then 'Rights - Reporting Templ.'
    when 'ACC_MOD'
      then 'Rights - Acces on Module Tmpl.'
    when 'CTP_CWT'
      then 'Rights - Counterpart chinese wall'
    when 'NAV_RGT'
      then 'Rights - Navigation Tmpl.'
    when 'TRD_RGTSTS'
      then 'Rights - Trade rights by status Tmpl.'
    when 'HEDGE_EFF'
      then 'Rights - Pref. List Hedge Effetivness Tmpl.'
    when 'STGY_CODE'
      then 'Rights - Pref. List Strategy Code Tmpl.'
    when 'HRC_RGT'
      then 'Rights - Classification hierarchy Tmpl.'
    when 'JOIN_RGT'
      then 'Rights - Classification join Tmpl.'
    when 'DATA_CONS'
      then 'Consistency - Data consistency Tmpl.'
    when 'DAT_PUB'
      then 'Interfaces - Data publisher Tmpl.'
    when 'DAT_PUB_RL'
      then 'Interfaces - Data publisher Rules'
      else ltrim(rtrim(H.M_TYPE))
  end           as AUDIT_MODULE
, H.M_REF       as AUD_RECORD
, H.M_CMP_DATE  as AUDIT_DATE
, H.M_CMP_TIME  as AUDIT_TIME
, H.M_USR_NAME  as USER_LABEL
, H.M_USR_GROUP as GROUP_LABEL
, B.M_FLD_LABEL as AUDIT_ITEM
, B.M_OLD_VALUE as OLD_VALUE
, B.M_NEW_VALUE as NEW_VALUE
FROM
  AUD_CFGH_DBF H
  left join
    AUD_CFGB_DBF B
    on
      (
        H.M_ID = B.M_ID
      )
WHERE
  H.M_SYS_DATE     >= @FirstAuditDate:D
  and H.M_SYS_DATE <= @SecondAuditDate:D
order by
  ACTION
, AUDIT_DATE
, AUDIT_TIME
, USER_LABEL
, AUDIT_MODULE
, AUD_RECORD
, AUDIT_ITEM

select 
case
	when AUD_FCFG_DBF.M_ACTION = 'INS' then 'Insertion'
	when AUD_FCFG_DBF.M_ACTION = 'DEL' then 'Deletion'
 when AUD_FCFG_DBF.M_ACTION = 'MOD' then 'Modification'
 else AUD_FCFG_DBF.M_ACTION
end as ACTION, 
AUD_FCFG_DBF.M_DATE_CMP as COMPUTER_DATE, 
to_char(to_date(MOD(AUD_FCFG_DBF.M_TIME_CMP, 86400),'SSSSS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') as COMPUTER_TIME,
AUD_FCFG_DBF.M_USR_NAME as USER_LABEL, 
AUD_FCFG_DBF.M_AUD_FILED as TABLE_DESCRIPTION, 
AUD_FCFG_DBF.M_AUD_FILE as TABLE_NAME,
AUD_FCFG_DBF.M_ACT_COM1 as OLD_VALUE, 
AUD_FCFG_DBF.M_ACT_COM2 as NEW_VALUE,
case when AUD_FCFG_DBF.M_AUD_FILE='MARKET_PARAMETERS'
then (LTRIM(RTRIM(AUD_FCFG_DBF.M_ACT_KEY))  || LTRIM(RTRIM(AUD_FCFG_DBF.M_ACT_COM0)))
when AUD_FCFG_DBF.M_AUD_FILE='RT_CNFIG'
then (LTRIM(RTRIM(AUD_FCFG_DBF.M_ACT_COM0)))
when AUD_FCFG_DBF.M_AUD_FILE='TRN_PFLD.DBF'
then (LTRIM(RTRIM(AUD_FCFG_DBF.M_ACT_COM0)))
else (RTRIM(LTRIM(AUD_FCFG_DBF.M_ACT_KEY)))
end as RECORD_MODIFIED
FROM AUD_FCFG_DBF
WHERE ((M_ACTION = 'MOD' and M_ACT_COM0 <> '                    ') or (M_ACTION <>  'MOD' ))
and  AUD_FCFG_DBF.M_DATE_CMP >=@FirstAuditDate:D and AUD_FCFG_DBF.M_DATE_CMP<=@SecondAuditDate:D

UNION all 

SELECT
case when M_ACTION = 'DELETION' then 'Deletion'
when M_ACTION = 'INSERTION' then 'Insertion'
when M_ACTION = 'MODIFICATION' then 'Modification'
else null
end as ACTION, 
AUD_CALH_DBF.M_CMP_DATE as COMPUTER_DATE, 
AUD_CALH_DBF.M_CMP_TIME as COMPUTER_TIME,
AUD_CALH_DBF.M_USR_NAME as USER_LABEL, 
AUD_CALH_DBF.M_TYPE as TABLE_DESCRIPTION, 
'CAL_DEF' as  TABLE_NAME,
case when AUD_CALB_DBF.M_OLD_VALUE ='0' then ''
when AUD_CALB_DBF.M_OLD_VALUE = '1' then 'selected'
else AUD_CALB_DBF.M_OLD_VALUE end as OLD_VALUE, 
case when AUD_CALB_DBF.M_NEW_VALUE ='0' then ''
when AUD_CALB_DBF.M_NEW_VALUE = '1' then 'selected'
else AUD_CALB_DBF.M_NEW_VALUE end as NEW_VALUE,  
(LTRIM(RTRIM(AUD_CALH_DBF.M_REF)) || ' '|| AUD_CALB_DBF.M_FLD_LABEL)  as RECORD_MODIFIED
FROM AUD_CALH_DBF
LEFT join AUD_CALB_DBF on 
AUD_CALH_DBF.M_ID = AUD_CALB_DBF.M_ID
WHERE (AUD_CALH_DBF.M_ACTION <> 'MODIFICATION' or AUD_CALB_DBF.M_NEW_VALUE IS NOT NULL)
order by ACTION, COMPUTER_DATE, COMPUTER_TIME, USER_LABEL

/*
Display Combined portfolio and their level
*/
select
RGT.M_GROUP as GROUP_LABEL,
'Default Rights' as RIGHT_TYPE,  
TREE.M_LABEL as PORTFOLIO_LABEL, 
case RGT.M_ACCESS 
    when 0 then 'Read write' 
	when 1 then 'Read only' 
	when 2 then 'Deny'
	when 4 then 'Write only' 
end as RIGHTS,
M_HEIGHT as TREE_LEVEL,
'Combined' as PORTFOLIO_TYPE
from MUB#MUB_TREE_DBF TREE join MUB#GRP_RGT1_DBF RGT on RGT.M_NODE_REF = TREE.M_REF 
where 
TREE.M_TRE_GROUP='MUB' and 
TREE.M_TRE_NAME='MUB' and 
RGT.M_GROUP=@GroupLabel:C

union all

/*
Display Simple portfolio and their level
*/
select
A.GROUP_LABEL as GROUP_LABEL,
case when (RGT2.M_REF is null) then 'Default Rights' else 'Specific Rights' end as RIGHT_TYPE,
A.M_PTF_LABEL as PORTFOLIO_LABEL, 
A.M_PTF_RGT as RIGHTS,
M_HEIGHT as TREE_LEVEL,
'Simple' as PORTFOLIO_TYPE
from
(
	select PFRG.M_PTF_REF, PFRG.M_PTF_LABEL, 
	case PFRG.M_PTF_RGT 
	when 0 then 'Read write' 
	when 1 then 'Read only' 
	when 2 then 'Deny'
	when 4 then 'Write only' 
	end as M_PTF_RGT, 
    GRPD.M_LABEL as GROUP_LABEL
	from GRP_SPTF_DBF PFRG 
	inner join TRN_GRPD_DBF GRPD on  PFRG.M_GRP_REF = GRPD.M_REFERENCE
	inner join TRN_PFLD_DBF AA on PFRG.M_PTF_REF = AA.M_REF and AA.M_TYPE = 0
) A
left join MUB#GRP_RGT2_DBF RGT2 on (A.M_PTF_LABEL = RGT2.M_PFOLIO and  A.GROUP_LABEL= RGT2.M_GROUP)
join MUB#MUB_TREE_DBF TREE on A.M_PTF_LABEL = TREE.M_LABEL
where GROUP_LABEL=@GroupLabel:C
order by GROUP_LABEL,PORTFOLIO_LABEL

select 
M_GROUP as GROUP_LABEL, 
M_LABEL as COMBINED_PORTFOLIO, 
M_UNIT as SIMPLE_PORTFOLIO 
from MUB#GRP_COMB_DBF
where M_GROUP=@GroupLabel:C
order by GROUP_LABEL, COMBINED_PORTFOLIO

select 
C.M_LABEL as GROUP_LABEL,
'PRINTERS' as CATEGORY, 
A.M_LABEL as TEMPLATE_LABEL, 
A.M_REF as REFERENCE, 
B.M_PRINTLBL as ITEM_LABEL,
null as DESCRIPTION, 
case (B.M_VISIBLE)
when 'T' then 'X' end as VISIBLE_RIGHT, 
null as DELETE_RIGHT,
null as WRITE_RIGHT,
null as CAN_GENERATE_DATA_RIGHT,
case (A.M_RUNDATA) when 'T' then 'X' end as GRANT_DATA_GENERATION_RIGHTS
from TRN_GRPD_DBF C left outer join ACT_RGTTMP_DBF A on A.M_LABEL = C.M_REP_TMPL left outer join ACT_RGTPRT_DBF B on A.M_REF = B.M_REFTEMPL 
where C.M_LABEL=@GroupLabel:C 
union all
select 
C.M_LABEL as GROUP_LABEL,
'DIRECTORIES' as CATEGORY, 
A.M_LABEL as TEMPLATE_LABEL, 
A.M_REF as REFERENCE, 
E.M_LABELDIR as ITEM_LABEL, 
null as DESCRIPTION, 
case (D.M_VISIBLE)
when 'T' then 'X' end as VISIBLE_RIGHT, 
case (D.M_DELETE)
when 'T' then 'X' end as DELETE_RIGHT, 
case (D.M_WRITE)
when 'T' then 'X' end as WRITE_RIGHT,
null as CAN_GENERATE_DATA_RIGHT,
case (A.M_RUNDATA) when 'T' then 'X' end as GRANT_DATA_GENERATION_RIGHTS
from TRN_GRPD_DBF C left outer join ACT_RGTTMP_DBF A on A.M_LABEL = C.M_REP_TMPL left outer join  ACT_RGTDIR_DBF D on A.M_REF = D.M_REFTEMPL left outer join ACT_REFDIR_DBF E on D.M_REFDIR = E.M_REF
where C.M_LABEL=@GroupLabel:C
union all
select 
C.M_LABEL as GROUP_LABEL,
case when M_EXECTX = 5 then 'FEEDERS' 
else case when M_EXECTX = 6 then 'REPORTS'
else case when M_EXECTX = 7 then 'EXTRACTIONS'
else case when M_EXECTX = 8 then 'STORED PROCEDURES'
else case when M_EXECTX < 5 then 'SETS OF LAYOUT'
end end end end end as CATEGORY, 
A.M_LABEL as TEMPLATE_LABEL, 
A.M_REF as REFERENCE, 
G.M_LABEL as ITEM_LABEL, 
G.M_DESC as DESCRIPTION, 
case (F.M_VISIBLE)
when 'T' then 'X' end as VISIBLE_RIGHT,
null as DELETE_RIGHT,
null as WRITE_RIGHT,
case (M_GENDATA)
when 'T' then 'X' end as CAN_GENERATE_DATA_RIGHT,
case (A.M_RUNDATA) when 'T' then 'X' end as GRANT_DATA_GENERATION_RIGHTS
from TRN_GRPD_DBF C left outer join ACT_RGTTMP_DBF A on A.M_LABEL = C.M_REP_TMPL left outer join ACT_RGTBAT_DBF F on A.M_REF = F.M_REFTEMPL left outer join ACT_BAT_DBF G on F.M_REFBATCH = G.M_REF  
where C.M_LABEL=@GroupLabel:C
union all
select 
C.M_LABEL as GROUP_LABEL,
case when G.M_TYPE = 0 then 'BATCHES OF REPORTS' 
else case when G.M_TYPE = 1 then 'BATCHES OF FEEDERS'
else case when G.M_TYPE = 2 then 'BATCHES OF EXTRACTIONS'
else case when G.M_TYPE = 3 then 'BATCHES OF STORED PROCEDURES'
end end end end as TYPE_LABEL, 
A.M_LABEL as TEMPLATE_LABEL, 
A.M_REF as REFERENCE, 
G.M_LABEL as ITEM_LABEL, 
G.M_DESC as DESCRIPTION, 
case (F.M_VISIBLE)
when 'T' then 'X' end as VISIBLE_RIGHT,
null as DELETE_RIGHT,
null as WRITE_RIGHT,
null as CAN_GENERATE_DATA_RIGHT,
case (A.M_RUNDATA) when 'T' then 'X' end as GRANT_DATA_GENERATION_RIGHTS
from TRN_GRPD_DBF C left outer join ACT_RGTTMP_DBF A on A.M_LABEL = C.M_REP_TMPL left outer join ACT_RGTSET_DBF F on A.M_REF = F.M_REFTEMPL left outer join ACT_SET_DBF G on F.M_REFSET = G.M_REF
where C.M_LABEL=@GroupLabel:C
order by GROUP_LABEL, CATEGORY,ITEM_LABEL

from TRN_GRPD_DBF GRP left outer join DAP_CFGT_DBF A on A.M_NAME = GRP.M_DAP_TMPL left outer join DAP_CFG_DBF B on A.M_NAME = B.M_TEMPLATE left outer join DAP#DAP_RULH_DBF D on D.M_NAME = B.M_RULE

order by GROUP_LABEL, TYPE, ACTION

select

FROM TRN_GRPD_DBF GRPD right outer join MX_GROUP_DBF GROUPS on GRPD.M_LABEL = GROUPS.M_LABEL left outer join MX_USER_GROUP_DBF USER_G  on GROUPS.M_REFERENCE = USER_G.M_GROUP_ID left outer join MX_USER_DBF USERS on USER_G.M_USER_ID = USERS.M_REFERENCE

'6' as Filter_on_Data,
'7' as Data_Filter_Shared,
'8' as Action,

from 

(select 
            grp.M_LABEL as User_Group, 
            -- OSP rights: label is 255 char wide.. Make it more reasonable
            substr(osr.M_LABEL,1,30) as OSP_Right_Template,

            union all select 15 as Key, 'Flows Cash' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 16 as Key, 'Flows Security' as Right from DUAL

            union all select 18 as Key, 'Accounting Journal' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 19 as Key, 'Account Balances' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 20 as Key, 'Collateral Exchange Query' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 21 as Key, 'Business Event Inventory' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 22 as Key, 'Hedge Query' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 23 as Key, 'Pairing And Instruction Management' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 24 as Key, 'Call Loan Management' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 25 as Key, 'Operating Accounting Management' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 26 as Key, 'Nostro Account Management' as Right from DUAL
) R
on R.Key = oss.M_SCREEN_ID
where R.Key IS NULL
and grp.M_LABEL = @UserGroup:C

union all 

select 
            grp.M_LABEL as User_Group, 
            -- OSP rights: label is 255 char wide.. Make it more reasonable
            substr(osr.M_LABEL,1,30) as OSP_Right_Template,
            -- 
            R.Right as Right,
            case coalesce( oss.M_ACCESS_RIGHT, 0) 
                        when 0 then 'No'
                        when 1 then 'Yes'
                        else TO_CHAR(oss.M_ACCESS_RIGHT)|| ' ?'
            end as Access_R
from TRN_GRPD_DBF grp
join (
            select 1 as Key, 'Inventory Nostro Security' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 2 as Key, 'Inventory Nostro Cash' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 3 as Key, 'Inventory Liquidation' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 4 as Key, 'Liquidation Contributors' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 5 as Key, 'Corporate Actions' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 6 as Key, 'Datamart Extraction' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 7 as Key, 'Validation Right' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 8 as Key, 'Flows Netting' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 9 as Key, 'Fixing Procedure' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 10 as Key, 'Matcher Manager' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 11 as Key, 'Trade Query' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 12 as Key, 'Order Query' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 13 as Key, 'Matcher History' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 14 as Key, 'Matcher Incoming Messages' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 15 as Key, 'Flows Cash' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 16 as Key, 'Flows Security' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 17 as Key, 'Flows Physical' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 18 as Key, 'Accounting Journal' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 19 as Key, 'Account Balances' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 20 as Key, 'Collateral Exchange Query' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 21 as Key, 'Business Event Inventory' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 22 as Key, 'Hedge Query' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 23 as Key, 'Pairing And Instruction Management' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 24 as Key, 'Call Loan Management' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 25 as Key, 'Operating Accounting Management' as Right from DUAL
            union all select 26 as Key, 'Nostro Account Management' as Right from DUAL
) R
on 1 = 1
join OSP_RIGHTS_DBF osr
on grp.M_OSP_RIGHTS = osr.M_REFERENCE
left join OSP_RIGHTS_SCREEN_DBF oss
on  grp.M_OSP_RIGHTS = oss.M_OSP_RIGHTS 
and R.Key = oss.M_SCREEN_ID
where grp.M_LABEL = @UserGroup:C
) 
OSP 


union all

select
            grp.M_LABEL as User_Group, 
            -- OSP rights: label is 255 char wide.. Make it more reasonable
            substr(osr.M_LABEL,1,30) as OSP_Right_Template,
            substr(osv.M_LABEL,1,30) as Validation_Right_Template,
            -- Category / Sub-Category / Queue
            substr(osc.M_LABEL,1,130) as Category,
            substr(ossc.M_LABEL,1,80) as Sub_Category,
            substr(osq.M_LABEL,1,80) as Queue,
            case coalesce( orq.M_RIGHT, orsc.M_DEFAULT_RIGHT, orc.M_DEFAULT_RIGHT,0)
                        when 0 then 'N'
                        when 1 then 'R'
                        when 2 then 'RW'
                        else TO_CHAR(coalesce( orq.M_RIGHT, orsc.M_DEFAULT_RIGHT, orc.M_DEFAULT_RIGHT,0)) || ' ?'
            end as Queue_Right,
            case coalesce(orq.M_BULK_MODE, 0) 
                        when 0 then 'No'
                        else 'Yes'
            end as Bulk_validation_enabled,
            case coalesce(orq.M_NON_MODIF_MODE, 0) 
                        when 0 then 'No'
                        else 'Yes'
            end as Non_modifiable_auto_selection,
            -- Filter
            case
                        when coalesce(orq.M_OSP_FILTER,0) = 0 then '' -- No filter
                        else coalesce(substr(osf.M_LABEL,1,80), '(Anonymous)')
            end as Filter_on_Data,
            case
                        when coalesce(orq.M_OSP_FILTER,0) = 0 then '' -- No filter
                        when osf.M_SHARED = 0 then 'No'
                        else 'Yes'
            end as Data_Filter_Shared,
            -- Actions
            coalesce( substr(ora.M_LABEL,1,80), '' ) as Action,
            case
                        when ora.M_OSP_RIG_VAL_QUEUE is null then ''
                        when ora.M_ENABLED = 'N' then 'No'
                        else 'Yes'
            end as User_action_enabled,
            -- Filter on action
            case
                        when coalesce(ora.M_OSP_FILTER,0) = 0 then '' -- No filter
                        else coalesce(substr(ofa.M_LABEL,1,80), '(Anonymous)')
            end as Filter_on_Action,
            case
                        when coalesce(ora.M_OSP_FILTER,0) = 0 then '' -- No filter
                        when ofa.M_SHARED = 0 then 'No'
                        else 'Yes'
            end as Action_Filter_Shared,
            'View2' as Technical
from TRN_GRPD_DBF grp
join OSP_RIGHTS_DBF osr on grp.M_OSP_RIGHTS = osr.M_REFERENCE
join OSP_RIG_VAL_DBF osv on osr.M_OSP_RIG_VAL_TEMPLATE  = osv.M_REFERENCE
-- Branch: structure
join OSP_CATEGORY_DBF osc on 1 =1
join OSP_SUB_CATEGORY_DBF ossc on osc.M_REFERENCE = ossc.M_CATEGORY
join OSP_QUEUE_DBF osq on ossc.M_REFERENCE = osq.M_SUB_CATEGORY 
-- Rights
left join OSP_RIG_VAL_CATEGORY_DBF orc on (osv.M_REFERENCE = orc.M_OSP_RIG_VAL and osc.M_REFERENCE = orc.M_CATEGORY)
left join OSP_RIG_VAL_SUB_CATEGORY_DBF orsc on (osv.M_REFERENCE = orsc.M_OSP_RIG_VAL and ossc.M_REFERENCE = orsc.M_SUB_CATEGORY)
left join OSP_RIG_VAL_QUEUE_DBF orq on (osv.M_REFERENCE = orq.M_OSP_RIG_VAL and osq.M_REFERENCE = orq.M_QUEUE)
-- Filter
left join OSP_FILTER_DBF osf on orq.M_OSP_FILTER = osf.M_REFERENCE
-- Action
left join OSP_RIG_VAL_ACTION_DBF ora on orq.M_REFERENCE =  ora.M_OSP_RIG_VAL_QUEUE
-- Filter on action
left join OSP_FILTER_DBF ofa on ora.M_OSP_FILTER = ofa.M_REFERENCE
where grp.M_LABEL = @UserGroup:C

select 
GRP.M_LABEL as GROUP_LABEL,
CONSHDR.M_LABEL as TEMPLATE_LABEL,
CONSBDY.M_FAMILY as CATEGORY, 
CONSBDY.M_DSP_LABEL as ITEM, 
case (bitand(CONSBDY.M_RIGHTS,1)) when 1 then 'X' end as ACCESS_RIGHT,
case (bitand(CONSBDY.M_RIGHTS,2)) when 2 then 'X' end as INSERT_RIGHT,
case (bitand(CONSBDY.M_RIGHTS,4)) when 4 then 'X' end as MODIFY_RIGHT,
case (bitand(CONSBDY.M_RIGHTS,8)) when 8 then 'X' end as DELETE_RIGHT,
case (bitand(CONSBDY.M_RIGHTS,16)) when 16 then 'X' end as MANDATORY_RIGHT,
case (bitand(CONSBDY.M_RIGHTS,32)) when 32 then 'X' end as ACCOUNTING_RIGHT,
case (bitand(CONSBDY.M_RIGHTS,64)) when 64 then 'X' end as PAYMENT_RIGHT
FROM CONS_BDY_DBF CONSBDY, 
CONS_HDR_DBF CONSHDR, 
TRN_GRPD_DBF GRP 
WHERE GRP.M_CONS = CONSHDR.M_REFERENCE AND
CONSHDR.M_REFERENCE = CONSBDY.M_REFERENCE AND
GRP.M_CONS <> 0 AND
GRP.M_LABEL = @GroupLabel:C
order by GROUP_LABEL, CATEGORY, ITEM

BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
--The aim is to compute a variation between 4 different dates. 
-- To compute each dates, the union all function is used.
-- 4 dates and suffixes are as below (one for each Union all):
   -- @MxDataSetKey = "xxx_D"
   -- @MxHistoricalDataDtDReferenceDate = "xxx_1" 
   --@MxHistoricalDataMtDReferenceDate = "xxx_EOM"
   --@MxHistoricalDataYtDReferenceDate = "xxx_EOY"
-- Each ones of the union represents 1 dataset, and should compute value only for 1 specific date.
-- This is the reason why, for union computed below, some fields are having "0 as xxx_xx" means that we don't want to compute value for this specfic field on this specific dataset. 

-- On the first part of the code, the variations are computed by difference between 2 different date giving a new field, with a new suffixe:
   -- Sum("xxx_D") = "xxx_LtD" (No computation the value is taken as is for the "Life To Date"
   -- Sum("xxx_D") - Sum("xxx_1")  = "xxx_DtD"
   -- Sum("xxx_D") - Sum("xxx_EOM")  = "xxx_MtD"
   -- Sum("xxx_D") - Sum("xxx_EOY")  = "xxx_YtD"

-- One more condition is about the PTF: M_TP_PFOLIO@MxAuthorizedPortfolio:C
--Meaning that the user can see only the pportfolio on which he has access to.

-- Please note that this report is in accounting currency. All fields are as of: "xxx_R_xx"
-- The "R" stand for Reporting which is a computed field (horizontal field) in dynamic table MV. Meaning that the conversion is already done.

-- There are different field category:

-- U_xxx will be related to the unrealized field
-- MtM fields are designed to be able to compute the mark to market on the different products.
-- MtM fields are usually generated for and and stream based products. As they need specific formulas.
-- NDIF and IP fields are created to split the premium from the Initial payment.
-- The native IP fields are addding up all the different components, it needs to be split to have the premium / IP outstanding amount.

TRIM(M_DESC): PLAccrual with bonds from Liquidation in Instrument Currency
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
/*
This report generates the accrual P&L  (Realized and Unrealized) in underlying currency with bond reconciled positions with AVP projection using EY amortization.
The extraction presents three levels of code:
First level of code: Union of datasets at 2 different dates.  Join between financing (MV) and liquidation (LIQ) tables in every union.
Second level of code: variation between 2 different dates.
Third level of code: breakdowns and calculated fields definition.
*/



--Third level of code: Definition of the fields shown in the output: breakdowns and calculated fields.
--Calculated fields for bonds and non-bonds products involve different formulas.
SELECT

--Breakdown fields
PARENT4 AS Parent_4,
PARENT3 AS Parent_3,
PARENT2 AS Parent_2,
PARENT1 AS Parent_1,
PORTFOLIO AS Portfolio,
CURRENCY AS Currency,
PRODUCT AS Product,
INSTRUMENT AS Instrument,
CONTRACT AS Contract,
VERSION_ AS Version_,
GLOBAL_ID AS GLOBAL_ID,
TRADE_ID AS TRADE_ID,
LEG AS Leg,
LIQ_CCY AS Instr_Currency,
CLOSINGAM AS Closing_Am_P,
SIGNEDQUA AS Signed_Quan,
MKT_PRICE AS Mkt_Price,
AVP_AMO_E AS AVP_AmoP_E,

--Life to Date values
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN (T_R_PL_EY_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD) ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD) END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_LtD)+(IP_ACC_E_LtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD)+REALIZED_RES_EY_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD) END AS T_R_PL_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN (T_R_PL_LI_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD) ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD) END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_LtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_LtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_L_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_LtD)+REALIZED_RES_LIN_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD) END AS T_R_PL_LIN_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN (T_R_PL_EY_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD) ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD) END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_LtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_LtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD)+REALIZED_RES_EL_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD) END AS T_R_PL_EL_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN LIQ_INTEREST_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE (SUM_INTEREST_LtD) END AS Total_Interest_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN R_COUPON_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS R_Coupon_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN NETCPNACC_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS NetCpnAccStd_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN PAMO_EY_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD)END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_E_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN PAMO_LIN_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_L_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_LtD)END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_L_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_LIN_LtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD) END AS IP_Amortized_L_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_E_LtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD) END AS IP_Amortized_E_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_EY_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EY_LtD  END AS Realized_Res_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_LIN_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_LIN_LtD  END AS Realized_Res_Lin_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_EY_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EL_LtD  END AS Realized_Res_EL_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_EY_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_LIN_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_Lin_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN MTM_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE MV_Clean_All_LtD END AS Clean_MV_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_Unreal_Lin_LtD END AS IP_UNREAL_LIN_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_Unreal_EY_LtD END AS IP_UNREAL_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFF_LtD END AS NDIF_Unreal_EY_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFL_LtD END AS NDIF_Unreal_LIN_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_E_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_E_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_L_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_L_LTD,

BRK_FEE_NF_LtD,
FINANCING_LtD,
ONF_FEE_LtD,
CROSS_CURR_LtD,



















--Date2 to Date values
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN (T_R_PL_EY_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD) ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD) END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_XtD)+(IP_ACC_E_XtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_XtD)+REALIZED_RES_EY_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD) END AS T_R_PL_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN (T_R_PL_LI_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD) ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD) END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_XtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_XtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_L_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_XtD)+REALIZED_RES_LIN_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD) END AS T_R_PL_LIN_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN (T_R_PL_EY_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD) ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD) END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_XtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_XtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_XtD)+REALIZED_RES_EL_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD) END AS T_R_PL_EL_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN LIQ_INTEREST_XtD ELSE 0 END ELSE (SUM_INTEREST_XtD) END AS Total_Interest_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN R_COUPON_XtD ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS R_Coupon_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN NETCPNACC_XtD ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS NetCpnAccStd_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN PAMO_EY_XtD   ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_E_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_XtD) END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_E_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN PAMO_LIN_XtD   ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_L_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_XtD) END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_L_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_LIN_XtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD) END AS IP_Amortized_L_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_E_XtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD) END AS IP_Amortized_E_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_EY_XtD    ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EY_XtD  END AS Realized_Res_EY_XtD,

LIQ.M_PAMO_EY AS PAMO_EY_1,
LIQ.M_PAMO_LIN AS PAMO_LIN_1,
LIQ.M_R_PL AS R_PL_1,
LIQ.M_CG_EY AS CG_EY_1,
LIQ.M_CG_LIN AS CG_LIN_1,
LIQ.M_U_ACOST_E AS U_ACOST_E_1,
LIQ.M_U_ACOST_L AS U_ACOST_L_1,



LIQ.M_MTM AS MTM_1,
LIQ.M_U_PAMO_EY AS U_PAMO_EY_1,
LIQ.M_U_PAMO_EY AS U_PAMO_LI_1,

SUM(MV.M_U_UDIFF) AS U_UDIFF_1,
SUM(MV.M_U_UDIFL) AS U_UDIFL_1,
SUM(MV.M_U_IPUL) AS U_IPUL_1,
SUM(MV.M_U_IPUF) AS U_IPUF_1,
SUM(MV.M_U_MTM) AS U_MTM_1




FROM PLA_MV_REP MV
LEFT JOIN PLA_LIQBDA_I_REP LIQ
ON MV.M_REF_DATA=LIQ.M_REF_DATA AND MV.M_TP_PFOLIO=LIQ.M_PORTFOLIO AND MV.M_INSTRUMENT=LIQ.M_INSTRUMEN
WHERE MV.M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalDataReferenceDate:N

GROUP BY MV.M_PTF_PAREN4,
MV.M_PTF_PAREN3,
MV.M_PTF_PAREN2,
MV.M_PTF_PAREN1,
MV.M_TP_PFOLIO,
MV.M_MV_CUR,
MV.M_CNT_TYPO,
MV.M_INSTRUMENT,
LIQ.M_CCY,
LIQ.M_T_R_PL_EY,
LIQ.M_T_R_PL_LI,
LIQ.M_INTEREST,
LIQ.M_R_COUPON,
LIQ.M_NETCPNACC,
LIQ.M_PAMO_EY,
LIQ.M_PAMO_LIN,
LIQ.M_R_PL,
LIQ.M_CG_EY,
LIQ.M_CG_LIN,

LIQ.M_U_ACOST_E,
LIQ.M_U_ACOST_L,


LIQ.M_MTM,



LIQ.M_U_PAMO_EY,
LIQ.M_U_PAMO_LI,
LIQ.M_CLOSINGAM,
LIQ.M_SIGNEDQUA,
LIQ.M_MKT_PRICE,
LIQ.M_AVP_AMO_E,
MV.M_U_UDIFF,
MV.M_U_UDIFL,
MV.M_U_IPUL,
MV.M_U_IPUF,
MV.M_U_MTM,

CASE WHEN M_CNT_TYPO <> 'Bond' THEN MV.M_CNT_ORG ELSE 0 END,
CASE WHEN M_CNT_TYPO <> 'Bond' THEN MV.M_CNT_VS2 ELSE 0 END ,
CASE WHEN M_CNT_TYPO <> 'Bond' THEN MV.M_TP_GID ELSE '' END,
CASE WHEN M_CNT_TYPO <> 'Bond' THEN MV.M_NB ELSE 0 END ,
CASE WHEN M_CNT_TYPO <> 'Bond' THEN MV.M_MV_LEG ELSE 0 END) SUB_TABLE
GROUP BY  PARENT4,PARENT3,PARENT2,PARENT1,PORTFOLIO,CURRENCY,PRODUCT,INSTRUMENT,CONTRACT,VERSION_,GLOBAL_ID,TRADE_ID,LEG,LIQ_CCY, CLOSINGAM, SIGNEDQUA, MKT_PRICE, AVP_AMO_E
) SUB_TABLE2

TRIM(M_DESC): PLAccrual with bonds from Liquidation in Accounting Currency
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
/*
This report generates the accrual P&L  (Realized and Unrealized) in accounting currency with bond reconciled positions with AVP projection using EY and linear amortizations.
The extraction presents three levels of code:
First level of code: Union of datasets at 2 different dates.  Join between financing (MV) and liquidation (LIQ) tables in every union. 
Second level of code: variation between 2 different dates.
Third level of code: breakdowns and calculated fields definition.
*/



--Third level of code: Definition of the fields shown in the output: breakdowns and calculated fields. 
--Calculated fields for bonds and non-bonds products involve different formulas. 
SELECT

--Breakdown fields
PARENT4 AS Parent_4,
PARENT3 AS Parent_3,
PARENT2 AS Parent_2,
PARENT1 AS Parent_1,
PORTFOLIO AS Portfolio,
CURRENCY AS Currency,
PRODUCT AS Product,
INSTRUMENT AS Instrument,
CONTRACT AS Contract,
VERSION_ AS Version_,
GLOBAL_ID AS GLOBAL_ID,
TRADE_ID AS TRADE_ID,
LEG AS Leg,
LIQ_CCY AS Instr_Currency,

SIGNEDQUA AS Signed_Quan,
MKT_PRICE AS MKT_PRICE,
AVP_AMO_E AS AVP_AMO_E,
CLOSINGAM AS  Closing_Am_P,	   				
--Life to Date values
--Multiply all LTD and XTD values by FX_RATE
--
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN (T_R_PL_EY_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_LtD)+(IP_ACC_E_LtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD)+REALIZED_RES_EY_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN (T_R_PL_LI_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_LtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_LtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_L_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_LtD)+REALIZED_RES_LIN_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_LIN_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN (T_R_PL_EY_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_LtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_LtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD)+REALIZED_RES_EL_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_EL_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN LIQ_INTEREST_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE (SUM_INTEREST_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS Total_Interest_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN R_COUPON_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS R_Coupon_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN NETCPNACC_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS NetCpnAccStd_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN PAMO_EY_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_E_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN PAMO_LIN_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_L_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_L_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_LIN_LtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS IP_Amortized_L_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_E_LtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS IP_Amortized_E_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_EY_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EY_LtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_LIN_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_LIN_LtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_Lin_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_EY_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EL_LtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_EL_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_EY_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_LIN_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_Lin_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN MTM_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE MV_Clean_All_LtD*FX_RATE END AS Clean_MV_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_Unreal_Lin_LtD*FX_RATE END AS IP_UNREAL_LIN_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_Unreal_EY_LtD*FX_RATE END AS IP_UNREAL_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFF_LtD*FX_RATE END AS NDIF_Unreal_EY_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFL_LtD*FX_RATE END AS NDIF_Unreal_LIN_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_E_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_E_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_L_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_L_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN BRK_FEE_NF_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE BRK_FEE_NF_LtD*FX_RATE END ELSE BRK_FEE_NF_LtD*FX_RATE END AS BRK_FEE_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN FINANCING_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE FINANCING_LtD*FX_RATE END ELSE FINANCING_LtD*FX_RATE END AS FINANCING_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN ONF_FEE_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE ONF_FEE_LtD*FX_RATE END ELSE ONF_FEE_LtD*FX_RATE END AS ONF_FEE_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CROSS_CURR_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE CROSS_CURR_LtD*FX_RATE  END ELSE CROSS_CURR_LtD*FX_RATE  END AS CROSS_CURR_LtD,

--Date2 to Date values
--Multiply all LTD and XTD values by FX_RATE
-- 
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN (T_R_PL_EY_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_XtD)+(IP_ACC_E_XtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_XtD)+REALIZED_RES_EY_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN (T_R_PL_LI_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_XtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_XtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_L_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_XtD)+REALIZED_RES_LIN_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_LIN_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN (T_R_PL_EY_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_XtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_XtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_XtD)+REALIZED_RES_EL_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_EL_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN LIQ_INTEREST_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE (SUM_INTEREST_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS Total_Interest_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN R_COUPON_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS R_Coupon_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN NETCPNACC_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS NetCpnAccStd_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN PAMO_EY_XtD*FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_E_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_E_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN PAMO_LIN_XtD*FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_L_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_L_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_LIN_XtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS IP_Amortized_L_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_E_XtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS IP_Amortized_E_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_EY_XtD  *FX_RATE  ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EY_XtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_LIN_XtD*FX_RATE    ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_LIN_XtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_Lin_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_EY_XtD *FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EL_XtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_EL_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_EY_XtD*FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_LIN_XtD*FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_Lin_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN MTM_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE MV_Clean_All_XtD*FX_RATE END AS Clean_MV_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_UNREAL_LIN_XTD*FX_RATE END AS IP_UNREAL_LIN_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_UNREAL_EY_XTD*FX_RATE END AS IP_UNREAL_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFF_XtD*FX_RATE END AS NDIF_Unreal_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFL_XtD*FX_RATE END AS NDIF_Unreal_LIN_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_E_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_E_XTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_L_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_L_XTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN BRK_FEE_NF_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE BRK_FEE_NF_XtD*FX_RATE END ELSE BRK_FEE_NF_XtD*FX_RATE END AS BRK_FEE_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN FINANCING_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE FINANCING_XtD*FX_RATE END ELSE FINANCING_XtD*FX_RATE END AS FINANCING_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN ONF_FEE_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE ONF_FEE_XtD*FX_RATE END ELSE ONF_FEE_XtD*FX_RATE END AS ONF_FEE_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CROSS_CURR_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE CROSS_CURR_XtD*FX_RATE END ELSE CROSS_CURR_XtD*FX_RATE END AS CROSS_CURR_XtD





FROM (

-- On the second level of the code, the variations are computed by difference between 2 different date giving a new field, with a new suffix:
-- Sum("xxx_DAY") = "xxx_LtD" (No computation the value is taken as is for the "Life To Date"
-- Sum("xxx_DAY") - Sum("xxx_1")  = "xxx_XtD"

SELECT 
SUB_TABLE.PARENT4 AS PARENT4,
SUB_TABLE.PARENT3 AS PARENT3,
SUB_TABLE.PARENT2 AS PARENT2,
SUB_TABLE.PARENT1 AS PARENT1,
SUB_TABLE.PORTFOLIO AS PORTFOLIO,
SUB_TABLE.CURRENCY AS CURRENCY,
SUB_TABLE.PRODUCT AS PRODUCT,
SUB_TABLE.INSTRUMENT AS INSTRUMENT,
SUB_TABLE.CONTRACT AS CONTRACT,
SUB_TABLE.VERSION_ AS VERSION_,
SUB_TABLE.GLOBAL_ID AS GLOBAL_ID,
SUB_TABLE.TRADE_ID AS TRADE_ID,
SUB_TABLE.LEG AS LEG,
SUB_TABLE.LIQ_CCY,

SUB_TABLE.SIGNEDQUA,
SUB_TABLE.MKT_PRICE,
SUB_TABLE.AVP_AMO_E,
SUB_TABLE.CLOSINGAM,
--select the FX_RATE

SUB_TABLE.FX_RATE,




--Life to Date values
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS REALIZED_RES_EY_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_LIN_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS REALIZED_RES_LIN_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_EL_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS REALIZED_RES_EL_LtD,

CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.FINANCING_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS FINANCING_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_PAMO2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_PAMO_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACC_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_LIN_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCLIR_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCEYR2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_E_DEAD_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCEY2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_E_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.INTEREST_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS SUM_INTEREST_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.PREVENUE_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS NF_REVENUES_PAST_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_REY2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_LACC2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_L_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_RLI2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.MV_FBF2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS BRK_FEE_FIN_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.MV_NFBF2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS BRK_FEE_NF_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.ONF_FEE_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS ONF_FEE_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.XCCYST_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS  CROSS_CURR_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.T_R_PL_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS T_R_PL_EY_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.T_R_PL_LI_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS T_R_PL_LI_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.LIQ_INTEREST_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS LIQ_INTEREST_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.R_COUPON_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS R_COUPON_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.NETCPNACC_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS NETCPNACC_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.PAMO_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PAMO_EY_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.PAMO_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PAMO_LIN_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.R_PL_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS R_PL_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.CG_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS CG_EY_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.CG_LIN_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS CG_LIN_LtD,

CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_ACOST_E_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS U_ACOST_E_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_ACOST_L_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS U_ACOST_L_LtD,

CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.MTM_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS MTM_LtD,


CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_PAMO_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS U_PAMO_EY_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_PAMO_LI_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS U_PAMO_LI_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_UDIFF_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS  U_UDIFF_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_UDIFL_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS  U_UDIFL_LtD,
