TRIM(M_DESC): PLAccrual with bonds from Liquidation in Accounting Currency
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
/*
This report generates the accrual P&L  (Realized and Unrealized) in accounting currency with bond reconciled positions with AVP projection using EY and linear amortizations.
The extraction presents three levels of code:
First level of code: Union of datasets at 2 different dates.  Join between financing (MV) and liquidation (LIQ) tables in every union. 
Second level of code: variation between 2 different dates.
Third level of code: breakdowns and calculated fields definition.
*/



--Third level of code: Definition of the fields shown in the output: breakdowns and calculated fields. 
--Calculated fields for bonds and non-bonds products involve different formulas. 
SELECT

--Breakdown fields
PARENT4 AS Parent_4,
PARENT3 AS Parent_3,
PARENT2 AS Parent_2,
PARENT1 AS Parent_1,
PORTFOLIO AS Portfolio,
CURRENCY AS Currency,
PRODUCT AS Product,
INSTRUMENT AS Instrument,
CONTRACT AS Contract,
VERSION_ AS Version_,
GLOBAL_ID AS GLOBAL_ID,
TRADE_ID AS TRADE_ID,
LEG AS Leg,
LIQ_CCY AS Instr_Currency,

SIGNEDQUA AS Signed_Quan,
MKT_PRICE AS MKT_PRICE,
AVP_AMO_E AS AVP_AMO_E,
CLOSINGAM AS  Closing_Am_P,	   				
--Life to Date values
--Multiply all LTD and XTD values by FX_RATE
--
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN (T_R_PL_EY_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_LtD)+(IP_ACC_E_LtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD)+REALIZED_RES_EY_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN (T_R_PL_LI_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_LtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_LtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_L_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_LtD)+REALIZED_RES_LIN_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_LIN_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN (T_R_PL_EY_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_LtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_LtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD)+REALIZED_RES_EL_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_EL_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN LIQ_INTEREST_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE (SUM_INTEREST_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS Total_Interest_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN R_COUPON_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS R_Coupon_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN NETCPNACC_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS NetCpnAccStd_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN PAMO_EY_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_E_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN PAMO_LIN_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_L_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_L_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_LIN_LtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS IP_Amortized_L_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_E_LtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS IP_Amortized_E_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_EY_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EY_LtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_LIN_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_LIN_LtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_Lin_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_EY_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EL_LtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_EL_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_EY_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_LIN_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_Lin_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN MTM_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE MV_Clean_All_LtD*FX_RATE END AS Clean_MV_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_Unreal_Lin_LtD*FX_RATE END AS IP_UNREAL_LIN_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_Unreal_EY_LtD*FX_RATE END AS IP_UNREAL_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFF_LtD*FX_RATE END AS NDIF_Unreal_EY_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFL_LtD*FX_RATE END AS NDIF_Unreal_LIN_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_E_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_E_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_L_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_L_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN BRK_FEE_NF_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE BRK_FEE_NF_LtD*FX_RATE END ELSE BRK_FEE_NF_LtD*FX_RATE END AS BRK_FEE_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN FINANCING_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE FINANCING_LtD*FX_RATE END ELSE FINANCING_LtD*FX_RATE END AS FINANCING_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN ONF_FEE_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE ONF_FEE_LtD*FX_RATE END ELSE ONF_FEE_LtD*FX_RATE END AS ONF_FEE_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CROSS_CURR_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE CROSS_CURR_LtD*FX_RATE  END ELSE CROSS_CURR_LtD*FX_RATE  END AS CROSS_CURR_LtD,

--Date2 to Date values
--Multiply all LTD and XTD values by FX_RATE
-- 
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN (T_R_PL_EY_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_XtD)+(IP_ACC_E_XtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_XtD)+REALIZED_RES_EY_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN (T_R_PL_LI_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_XtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_XtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_L_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_XtD)+REALIZED_RES_LIN_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_LIN_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN (T_R_PL_EY_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_XtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_XtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_XtD)+REALIZED_RES_EL_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_EL_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN LIQ_INTEREST_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE (SUM_INTEREST_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS Total_Interest_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN R_COUPON_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS R_Coupon_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN NETCPNACC_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS NetCpnAccStd_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN PAMO_EY_XtD*FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_E_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_E_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN PAMO_LIN_XtD*FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_L_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_L_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_LIN_XtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS IP_Amortized_L_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_E_XtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS IP_Amortized_E_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_EY_XtD  *FX_RATE  ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EY_XtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_LIN_XtD*FX_RATE    ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_LIN_XtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_Lin_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_EY_XtD *FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EL_XtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_EL_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_EY_XtD*FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_LIN_XtD*FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_Lin_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN MTM_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE MV_Clean_All_XtD*FX_RATE END AS Clean_MV_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_UNREAL_LIN_XTD*FX_RATE END AS IP_UNREAL_LIN_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_UNREAL_EY_XTD*FX_RATE END AS IP_UNREAL_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFF_XtD*FX_RATE END AS NDIF_Unreal_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFL_XtD*FX_RATE END AS NDIF_Unreal_LIN_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_E_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_E_XTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_L_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_L_XTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN BRK_FEE_NF_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE BRK_FEE_NF_XtD*FX_RATE END ELSE BRK_FEE_NF_XtD*FX_RATE END AS BRK_FEE_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN FINANCING_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE FINANCING_XtD*FX_RATE END ELSE FINANCING_XtD*FX_RATE END AS FINANCING_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN ONF_FEE_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE ONF_FEE_XtD*FX_RATE END ELSE ONF_FEE_XtD*FX_RATE END AS ONF_FEE_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CROSS_CURR_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE CROSS_CURR_XtD*FX_RATE END ELSE CROSS_CURR_XtD*FX_RATE END AS CROSS_CURR_XtD





FROM (

-- On the second level of the code, the variations are computed by difference between 2 different date giving a new field, with a new suffix:
-- Sum("xxx_DAY") = "xxx_LtD" (No computation the value is taken as is for the "Life To Date"
-- Sum("xxx_DAY") - Sum("xxx_1")  = "xxx_XtD"

SELECT 
SUB_TABLE.PARENT4 AS PARENT4,
SUB_TABLE.PARENT3 AS PARENT3,
SUB_TABLE.PARENT2 AS PARENT2,
SUB_TABLE.PARENT1 AS PARENT1,
SUB_TABLE.PORTFOLIO AS PORTFOLIO,
SUB_TABLE.CURRENCY AS CURRENCY,
SUB_TABLE.PRODUCT AS PRODUCT,
SUB_TABLE.INSTRUMENT AS INSTRUMENT,
SUB_TABLE.CONTRACT AS CONTRACT,
SUB_TABLE.VERSION_ AS VERSION_,
SUB_TABLE.GLOBAL_ID AS GLOBAL_ID,
SUB_TABLE.TRADE_ID AS TRADE_ID,
SUB_TABLE.LEG AS LEG,
SUB_TABLE.LIQ_CCY,

SUB_TABLE.SIGNEDQUA,
SUB_TABLE.MKT_PRICE,
SUB_TABLE.AVP_AMO_E,
SUB_TABLE.CLOSINGAM,
--select the FX_RATE

SUB_TABLE.FX_RATE,




--Life to Date values
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS REALIZED_RES_EY_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_LIN_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS REALIZED_RES_LIN_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_EL_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS REALIZED_RES_EL_LtD,

CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.FINANCING_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS FINANCING_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_PAMO2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_PAMO_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACC_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_LIN_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCLIR_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCEYR2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_E_DEAD_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCEY2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_E_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.INTEREST_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS SUM_INTEREST_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.PREVENUE_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS NF_REVENUES_PAST_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_REY2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_LACC2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_L_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_RLI2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.MV_FBF2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS BRK_FEE_FIN_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.MV_NFBF2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS BRK_FEE_NF_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.ONF_FEE_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS ONF_FEE_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.XCCYST_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS  CROSS_CURR_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.T_R_PL_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS T_R_PL_EY_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.T_R_PL_LI_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS T_R_PL_LI_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.LIQ_INTEREST_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS LIQ_INTEREST_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.R_COUPON_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS R_COUPON_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.NETCPNACC_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS NETCPNACC_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.PAMO_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PAMO_EY_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.PAMO_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PAMO_LIN_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.R_PL_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS R_PL_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.CG_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS CG_EY_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.CG_LIN_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS CG_LIN_LtD,

CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_ACOST_E_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS U_ACOST_E_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_ACOST_L_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS U_ACOST_L_LtD,

CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.MTM_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS MTM_LtD,


CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_PAMO_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS U_PAMO_EY_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_PAMO_LI_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS U_PAMO_LI_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_UDIFF_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS  U_UDIFF_LtD,

/*
This report generates the accrual P&L  (Realized and Unrealized) in accounting currency with bond reconciled positions with AVP projection using EY and linear amortizations.
The extraction presents three levels of code:
First level of code: Union of datasets at 2 different dates.  Join between financing (MV) and liquidation (LIQ) tables in every union. 
Second level of code: variation between 2 different dates.
Third level of code: breakdowns and calculated fields definition.
*/



--Third level of code: Definition of the fields shown in the output: breakdowns and calculated fields. 
--Calculated fields for bonds and non-bonds products involve different formulas. 
SELECT

--Breakdown fields
PARENT4 AS Parent_4,
PARENT3 AS Parent_3,
PARENT2 AS Parent_2,
PARENT1 AS Parent_1,
PORTFOLIO AS Portfolio,
CURRENCY AS Currency,
PRODUCT AS Product,
INSTRUMENT AS Instrument,
CONTRACT AS Contract,
VERSION_ AS Version_,
GLOBAL_ID AS GLOBAL_ID,
TRADE_ID AS TRADE_ID,
LEG AS Leg,
LIQ_CCY AS Instr_Currency,

SIGNEDQUA AS Signed_Quan,
MKT_PRICE AS MKT_PRICE,
AVP_AMO_E AS AVP_AMO_E,
CLOSINGAM AS  Closing_Am_P,	   				
--Life to Date values
--Multiply all LTD and XTD values by FX_RATE
--
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN (T_R_PL_EY_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_LtD)+(IP_ACC_E_LtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD)+REALIZED_RES_EY_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN (T_R_PL_LI_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_LtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_LtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_L_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_LtD)+REALIZED_RES_LIN_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_LIN_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN (T_R_PL_EY_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_LtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_LtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD)+REALIZED_RES_EL_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_EL_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN LIQ_INTEREST_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE (SUM_INTEREST_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS Total_Interest_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN R_COUPON_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS R_Coupon_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN NETCPNACC_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS NetCpnAccStd_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN PAMO_EY_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_E_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN PAMO_LIN_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_L_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_L_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_LIN_LtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS IP_Amortized_L_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_E_LtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS IP_Amortized_E_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_EY_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EY_LtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_LIN_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_LIN_LtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_Lin_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_EY_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EL_LtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_EL_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_EY_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_LIN_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_Lin_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN MTM_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE MV_Clean_All_LtD*FX_RATE END AS Clean_MV_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_Unreal_Lin_LtD*FX_RATE END AS IP_UNREAL_LIN_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_Unreal_EY_LtD*FX_RATE END AS IP_UNREAL_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFF_LtD*FX_RATE END AS NDIF_Unreal_EY_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFL_LtD*FX_RATE END AS NDIF_Unreal_LIN_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_E_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_E_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_L_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_L_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN BRK_FEE_NF_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE BRK_FEE_NF_LtD*FX_RATE END ELSE BRK_FEE_NF_LtD*FX_RATE END AS BRK_FEE_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN FINANCING_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE FINANCING_LtD*FX_RATE END ELSE FINANCING_LtD*FX_RATE END AS FINANCING_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN ONF_FEE_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE ONF_FEE_LtD*FX_RATE END ELSE ONF_FEE_LtD*FX_RATE END AS ONF_FEE_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CROSS_CURR_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE CROSS_CURR_LtD*FX_RATE  END ELSE CROSS_CURR_LtD*FX_RATE  END AS CROSS_CURR_LtD,

--Date2 to Date values
--Multiply all LTD and XTD values by FX_RATE
-- 
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN (T_R_PL_EY_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_XtD)+(IP_ACC_E_XtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_XtD)+REALIZED_RES_EY_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN (T_R_PL_LI_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_XtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_XtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_L_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_XtD)+REALIZED_RES_LIN_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_LIN_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN (T_R_PL_EY_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_XtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_XtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_XtD)+REALIZED_RES_EL_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_EL_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN LIQ_INTEREST_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE (SUM_INTEREST_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS Total_Interest_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN R_COUPON_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS R_Coupon_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN NETCPNACC_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS NetCpnAccStd_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN PAMO_EY_XtD*FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_E_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_E_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN PAMO_LIN_XtD*FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_L_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_L_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_LIN_XtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS IP_Amortized_L_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_E_XtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS IP_Amortized_E_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_EY_XtD  *FX_RATE  ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EY_XtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_LIN_XtD*FX_RATE    ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_LIN_XtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_Lin_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_EY_XtD *FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EL_XtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_EL_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_EY_XtD*FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_LIN_XtD*FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_Lin_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN MTM_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE MV_Clean_All_XtD*FX_RATE END AS Clean_MV_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_UNREAL_LIN_XTD*FX_RATE END AS IP_UNREAL_LIN_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_UNREAL_EY_XTD*FX_RATE END AS IP_UNREAL_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFF_XtD*FX_RATE END AS NDIF_Unreal_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFL_XtD*FX_RATE END AS NDIF_Unreal_LIN_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_E_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_E_XTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_L_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_L_XTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN BRK_FEE_NF_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE BRK_FEE_NF_XtD*FX_RATE END ELSE BRK_FEE_NF_XtD*FX_RATE END AS BRK_FEE_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN FINANCING_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE FINANCING_XtD*FX_RATE END ELSE FINANCING_XtD*FX_RATE END AS FINANCING_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN ONF_FEE_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE ONF_FEE_XtD*FX_RATE END ELSE ONF_FEE_XtD*FX_RATE END AS ONF_FEE_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CROSS_CURR_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE CROSS_CURR_XtD*FX_RATE END ELSE CROSS_CURR_XtD*FX_RATE END AS CROSS_CURR_XtD





FROM (

-- On the second level of the code, the variations are computed by difference between 2 different date giving a new field, with a new suffix:
-- Sum("xxx_DAY") = "xxx_LtD" (No computation the value is taken as is for the "Life To Date"
-- Sum("xxx_DAY") - Sum("xxx_1")  = "xxx_XtD"

SELECT 
SUB_TABLE.PARENT4 AS PARENT4,
SUB_TABLE.PARENT3 AS PARENT3,
SUB_TABLE.PARENT2 AS PARENT2,
SUB_TABLE.PARENT1 AS PARENT1,
SUB_TABLE.PORTFOLIO AS PORTFOLIO,
SUB_TABLE.CURRENCY AS CURRENCY,
SUB_TABLE.PRODUCT AS PRODUCT,
SUB_TABLE.INSTRUMENT AS INSTRUMENT,
SUB_TABLE.CONTRACT AS CONTRACT,
SUB_TABLE.VERSION_ AS VERSION_,
SUB_TABLE.GLOBAL_ID AS GLOBAL_ID,
SUB_TABLE.TRADE_ID AS TRADE_ID,
SUB_TABLE.LEG AS LEG,
SUB_TABLE.LIQ_CCY,

SUB_TABLE.SIGNEDQUA,
SUB_TABLE.MKT_PRICE,
SUB_TABLE.AVP_AMO_E,
SUB_TABLE.CLOSINGAM,
--select the FX_RATE

SUB_TABLE.FX_RATE,




--Life to Date values
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS REALIZED_RES_EY_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_LIN_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS REALIZED_RES_LIN_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_EL_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS REALIZED_RES_EL_LtD,

CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.FINANCING_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS FINANCING_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_PAMO2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_PAMO_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACC_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_LIN_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCLIR_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCEYR2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_E_DEAD_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCEY2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_E_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.INTEREST_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS SUM_INTEREST_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.PREVENUE_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS NF_REVENUES_PAST_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_REY2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_LACC2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_L_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_RLI2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.MV_FBF2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS BRK_FEE_FIN_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.MV_NFBF2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS BRK_FEE_NF_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.ONF_FEE_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS ONF_FEE_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.XCCYST_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS  CROSS_CURR_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.T_R_PL_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS T_R_PL_EY_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.T_R_PL_LI_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS T_R_PL_LI_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.LIQ_INTEREST_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS LIQ_INTEREST_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.R_COUPON_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS R_COUPON_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.NETCPNACC_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS NETCPNACC_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.PAMO_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PAMO_EY_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.PAMO_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PAMO_LIN_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.R_PL_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS R_PL_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.CG_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS CG_EY_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.CG_LIN_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS CG_LIN_LtD,

CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_ACOST_E_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS U_ACOST_E_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_ACOST_L_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS U_ACOST_L_LtD,

CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.MTM_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS MTM_LtD,


CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_PAMO_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS U_PAMO_EY_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_PAMO_LI_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS U_PAMO_LI_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_UDIFF_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS  U_UDIFF_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_UDIFL_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS  U_UDIFL_LtD,

CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_IPUL_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS  IP_Unreal_Lin_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_IPUF_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS  IP_Unreal_EY_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_MTM_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS  MV_Clean_All_LtD,









-- Date2 to Date variationSUB_TABLE.REAL_EY_1
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_EY_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_EY_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS REALIZED_RES_EY_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_LIN_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_LIN_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS REALIZED_RES_LIN_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_EL_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_EL_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS REALIZED_RES_EL_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.FINANCING_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.FINANCING_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS FINANCING_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_PAMO2_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_PAMO2_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_PAMO_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACC_DAY)-SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACC_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_LIN_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCLIR_DAY)-SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCLIR_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCEYR2_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCEYR2_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_E_DEAD_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCEY2_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCEY2_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_E_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.INTEREST_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.INTEREST_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS SUM_INTEREST_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.PREVENUE_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.PREVENUE_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS NF_REVENUES_PAST_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_EY_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_EY_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_E_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_REY2_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_REY2_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_LACC2_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_LACC2_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_L_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_RLI2_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_RLI2_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.MV_FBF2_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.MV_FBF2_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS BRK_FEE_FIN_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.MV_NFBF2_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.MV_NFBF2_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS BRK_FEE_NF_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.ONF_FEE_DAY)-SUM(SUB_TABLE.ONF_FEE_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS ONF_FEE_XtD,

TRIM(M_DESC): PLAccrual with bonds from Liquidation in Instrument Currency
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
/*
This report generates the accrual P&L  (Realized and Unrealized) in underlying currency with bond reconciled positions with FIFO projection using EY amortization.
The extraction presents three levels of code:
First level of code: Union of datasets at 2 different dates.  Join between financing (MV) and liquidation (LIQ) tables in every union.
Second level of code: variation between 2 different dates.
Third level of code: breakdowns and calculated fields definition.
*/



--Third level of code: Definition of the fields shown in the output: breakdowns and calculated fields.
--Calculated fields for bonds and non-bonds products involve different formulas.
SELECT

--Breakdown fields
PARENT4 AS Parent_4,
PARENT3 AS Parent_3,
PARENT2 AS Parent_2,
PARENT1 AS Parent_1,
PORTFOLIO AS Portfolio,
CURRENCY AS Currency,
PRODUCT AS Product,
INSTRUMENT AS Instrument,
CONTRACT AS Contract,
VERSION_ AS Version_,
GLOBAL_ID AS GLOBAL_ID,
TRADE_ID AS TRADE_ID,
LEG AS Leg,
LIQ_CCY AS Instr_Currency,
CLOSINGAM AS Closing_Am_P,
SIGNEDQUA AS Signed_Quan,
MKT_PRICE AS Mkt_Price,
AVP_AMO_E AS AVP_AmoP_E,

--Life to Date values
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN (T_R_PL_EY_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD) ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD) END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_LtD)+(IP_ACC_E_LtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD)+REALIZED_RES_EY_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD) END AS T_R_PL_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN (T_R_PL_LI_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD) ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD) END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_LtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_LtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_L_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_LtD)+REALIZED_RES_LIN_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD) END AS T_R_PL_LIN_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN (T_R_PL_EY_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD) ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD) END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_LtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_LtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD)+REALIZED_RES_EL_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD) END AS T_R_PL_EL_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN LIQ_INTEREST_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE (SUM_INTEREST_LtD) END AS Total_Interest_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN R_COUPON_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS R_Coupon_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN NETCPNACC_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS NetCpnAccStd_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN PAMO_EY_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD)END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_E_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN PAMO_LIN_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_L_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_LtD)END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_L_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_LIN_LtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD) END AS IP_Amortized_L_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_E_LtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD) END AS IP_Amortized_E_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_EY_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EY_LtD  END AS Realized_Res_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_LIN_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_LIN_LtD  END AS Realized_Res_Lin_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_EY_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EL_LtD  END AS Realized_Res_EL_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_EY_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_LIN_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_Lin_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN MTM_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE MV_Clean_All_LtD END AS Clean_MV_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_Unreal_Lin_LtD END AS IP_UNREAL_LIN_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_Unreal_EY_LtD END AS IP_UNREAL_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFF_LtD END AS NDIF_Unreal_EY_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFL_LtD END AS NDIF_Unreal_LIN_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_E_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_E_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_L_LtD ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_L_LTD,

BRK_FEE_NF_LtD,
FINANCING_LtD,
ONF_FEE_LtD,
CROSS_CURR_LtD,



















--Date2 to Date values
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN (T_R_PL_EY_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD) ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD) END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_XtD)+(IP_ACC_E_XtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_XtD)+REALIZED_RES_EY_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD) END AS T_R_PL_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN (T_R_PL_LI_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD) ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD) END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_XtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_XtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_L_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_XtD)+REALIZED_RES_LIN_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD) END AS T_R_PL_LIN_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN (T_R_PL_EY_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD) ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD) END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_XtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_XtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_XtD)+REALIZED_RES_EL_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD) END AS T_R_PL_EL_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN LIQ_INTEREST_XtD ELSE 0 END ELSE (SUM_INTEREST_XtD) END AS Total_Interest_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN R_COUPON_XtD ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS R_Coupon_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN NETCPNACC_XtD ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS NetCpnAccStd_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN PAMO_EY_XtD   ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_E_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_XtD) END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_E_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN PAMO_LIN_XtD   ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_L_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_XtD) END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_L_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_LIN_XtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD) END AS IP_Amortized_L_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_E_XtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD) END AS IP_Amortized_E_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_EY_XtD    ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EY_XtD  END AS Realized_Res_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_LIN_XtD    ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_LIN_XtD  END AS Realized_Res_Lin_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_EY_XtD    ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EL_XtD  END AS Realized_Res_EL_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_EY_XtD   ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_LIN_XtD   ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_Lin_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN MTM_XtD ELSE 0 END ELSE MV_Clean_All_XtD END AS Clean_MV_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_UNREAL_LIN_XTD END AS IP_UNREAL_LIN_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_UNREAL_EY_XTD END AS IP_UNREAL_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFF_XtD END AS NDIF_Unreal_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFL_XtD END AS NDIF_Unreal_LIN_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_E_XtD ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_E_XTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_L_XtD ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_L_XTD,
BRK_FEE_NF_XtD,
FINANCING_XtD,
ONF_FEE_XtD,
CROSS_CURR_XtD














FROM (

-- On the second level of the code, the variations are computed by difference between 2 different date giving a new field, with a new suffix:
-- Sum("xxx_DAY") = "xxx_LtD" (No computation the value is taken as is for the "Life To Date"
-- Sum("xxx_DAY") - Sum("xxx_1")  = "xxx_XtD"

SELECT
SUB_TABLE.PARENT4 AS PARENT4,
SUB_TABLE.PARENT3 AS PARENT3,
SUB_TABLE.PARENT2 AS PARENT2,
SUB_TABLE.PARENT1 AS PARENT1,
SUB_TABLE.PORTFOLIO AS PORTFOLIO,
SUB_TABLE.CURRENCY AS CURRENCY,
SUB_TABLE.PRODUCT AS PRODUCT,
SUB_TABLE.INSTRUMENT AS INSTRUMENT,
SUB_TABLE.CONTRACT AS CONTRACT,
SUB_TABLE.VERSION_ AS VERSION_,
SUB_TABLE.GLOBAL_ID AS GLOBAL_ID,
SUB_TABLE.TRADE_ID AS TRADE_ID,
SUB_TABLE.LEG AS LEG,
SUB_TABLE.LIQ_CCY,
SUB_TABLE.CLOSINGAM,
SUB_TABLE.SIGNEDQUA,
SUB_TABLE.MKT_PRICE,
SUB_TABLE.AVP_AMO_E,

--Life to Date values
SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_EY_DAY) AS REALIZED_RES_EY_LtD,
SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_LIN_DAY) AS REALIZED_RES_LIN_LtD,
SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_EL_DAY) AS REALIZED_RES_EL_LtD,
SUM(SUB_TABLE.FINANCING_DAY) AS FINANCING_LtD,
SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_PAMO2_DAY) AS IP_PAMO_LtD,
SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACC_DAY) AS IP_ACC_LIN_LtD,
SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCLIR_DAY) AS IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD,
SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCEYR2_DAY) AS IP_ACC_E_DEAD_LtD,
SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCEY2_DAY) AS IP_ACC_E_LtD,
SUM(SUB_TABLE.INTEREST_DAY) AS SUM_INTEREST_LtD,
SUM(SUB_TABLE.PREVENUE_DAY) AS NF_REVENUES_PAST_LtD,
SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_EY_DAY) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD,
SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_REY2_DAY) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD,
SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_LACC2_DAY) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_L_LtD,

SUM(SUB_TABLE.T_R_PL_EY_DAY) AS T_R_PL_EY_LtD,
SUM(SUB_TABLE.T_R_PL_LI_DAY) AS T_R_PL_LI_LtD,
SUM(SUB_TABLE.LIQ_INTEREST_DAY) AS LIQ_INTEREST_LtD,
SUM(SUB_TABLE.R_COUPON_DAY) AS R_COUPON_LtD,
SUM(SUB_TABLE.NETCPNACC_DAY) AS NETCPNACC_LtD,
SUM(SUB_TABLE.PAMO_EY_DAY) AS PAMO_EY_LtD,
SUM(SUB_TABLE.PAMO_LIN_DAY) AS PAMO_LIN_LtD,
SUM(SUB_TABLE.R_PL_DAY) AS R_PL_LtD,

SUM(SUB_TABLE.CG_LIN_DAY) AS CG_LIN_LtD,

SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_ACOST_E_DAY) AS U_ACOST_E_LtD,
SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_ACOST_L_DAY) AS U_ACOST_L_LtD,

SUM(SUB_TABLE.MTM_DAY) AS MTM_LtD,


SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_PAMO_EY_DAY) AS U_PAMO_EY_LtD,
SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_PAMO_LI_DAY) AS U_PAMO_LI_LtD,

SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_UDIFF_DAY) AS  U_UDIFF_LtD,

-- Date2 to Date variation
(SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_EY_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_EY_1)) AS REALIZED_RES_EY_XtD,

(SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_PAMO2_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_PAMO2_1)) AS IP_PAMO_XtD,

(SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCEY2_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCEY2_1)) AS IP_ACC_E_XtD,

(SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_LACC2_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_LACC2_1)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_L_XtD,
(SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_RLI2_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_RLI2_1)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_XtD,
(SUM(SUB_TABLE.MV_FBF2_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.MV_FBF2_1)) AS BRK_FEE_FIN_XtD,
(SUM(SUB_TABLE.MV_NFBF2_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.MV_NFBF2_1)) AS BRK_FEE_NF_XtD,

(SUM(SUB_TABLE.R_COUPON_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.R_COUPON_1)) AS R_COUPON_XtD,

(SUM(SUB_TABLE.PAMO_EY_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.PAMO_EY_1)) AS PAMO_EY_XtD,
(SUM(SUB_TABLE.PAMO_LIN_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.PAMO_LIN_1)) AS PAMO_LIN_XtD,
(SUM(SUB_TABLE.R_PL_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.R_PL_1)) AS R_PL_XtD,
(SUM(SUB_TABLE.CG_EY_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.CG_EY_1)) AS CG_EY_XtD,
(SUM(SUB_TABLE.CG_LIN_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.CG_LIN_1)) AS CG_LIN_XtD,


(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_ACOST_E_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_ACOST_E_1)) AS U_ACOST_E_XtD,
(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_ACOST_L_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_ACOST_L_1)) AS U_ACOST_L_XtD,

(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_PAMO_LI_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_PAMO_LI_1)) AS U_PAMO_LI_XtD,

(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_MTM_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_MTM_1)) AS MV_Clean_All_XtD


FROM (

TRIM(M_DESC): PLAccrual with bonds from Liquidation in Accounting Currency
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
/*
This report generates the accrual P&L  (Realized and Unrealized) in accounting currency with bond reconciled positions with AVP projection using EY and linear amortizations.
The extraction presents three levels of code:
First level of code: Union of datasets at 2 different dates.  Join between financing (MV) and liquidation (LIQ) tables in every union. 
Second level of code: variation between 2 different dates.
Third level of code: breakdowns and calculated fields definition.
*/



--Third level of code: Definition of the fields shown in the output: breakdowns and calculated fields. 
--Calculated fields for bonds and non-bonds products involve different formulas. 
SELECT

--Breakdown fields
PARENT4 AS Parent_4,
PARENT3 AS Parent_3,
PARENT2 AS Parent_2,
PARENT1 AS Parent_1,
PORTFOLIO AS Portfolio,
CURRENCY AS Currency,
PRODUCT AS Product,
INSTRUMENT AS Instrument,
CONTRACT AS Contract,
VERSION_ AS Version_,
GLOBAL_ID AS GLOBAL_ID,
TRADE_ID AS TRADE_ID,
LEG AS Leg,
LIQ_CCY AS Instr_Currency,

SIGNEDQUA AS Signed_Quan,
MKT_PRICE AS MKT_PRICE,
AVP_AMO_E AS AVP_AMO_E,
CLOSINGAM AS  Closing_Am_P,	   				
--Life to Date values
--Multiply all LTD and XTD values by FX_RATE
--
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN (T_R_PL_EY_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_LtD)+(IP_ACC_E_LtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD)+REALIZED_RES_EY_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN (T_R_PL_LI_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_LtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_LtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_L_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_LtD)+REALIZED_RES_LIN_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_LIN_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN (T_R_PL_EY_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_LtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_LtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD)+REALIZED_RES_EL_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_EL_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN LIQ_INTEREST_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE (SUM_INTEREST_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS Total_Interest_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN R_COUPON_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS R_Coupon_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN NETCPNACC_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS NetCpnAccStd_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN PAMO_EY_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_E_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN PAMO_LIN_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_L_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_L_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_LIN_LtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS IP_Amortized_L_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_E_LtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS IP_Amortized_E_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_EY_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EY_LtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_LIN_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_LIN_LtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_Lin_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_EY_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EL_LtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_EL_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_EY_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_LIN_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_Lin_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN MTM_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE MV_Clean_All_LtD*FX_RATE END AS Clean_MV_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_Unreal_Lin_LtD*FX_RATE END AS IP_UNREAL_LIN_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_Unreal_EY_LtD*FX_RATE END AS IP_UNREAL_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFF_LtD*FX_RATE END AS NDIF_Unreal_EY_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFL_LtD*FX_RATE END AS NDIF_Unreal_LIN_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_E_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_E_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_L_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_L_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN BRK_FEE_NF_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE BRK_FEE_NF_LtD*FX_RATE END ELSE BRK_FEE_NF_LtD*FX_RATE END AS BRK_FEE_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN FINANCING_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE FINANCING_LtD*FX_RATE END ELSE FINANCING_LtD*FX_RATE END AS FINANCING_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN ONF_FEE_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE ONF_FEE_LtD*FX_RATE END ELSE ONF_FEE_LtD*FX_RATE END AS ONF_FEE_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CROSS_CURR_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE CROSS_CURR_LtD*FX_RATE  END ELSE CROSS_CURR_LtD*FX_RATE  END AS CROSS_CURR_LtD,

--Date2 to Date values
--Multiply all LTD and XTD values by FX_RATE
-- 
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN (T_R_PL_EY_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_XtD)+(IP_ACC_E_XtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_XtD)+REALIZED_RES_EY_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN (T_R_PL_LI_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_XtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_XtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_L_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_XtD)+REALIZED_RES_LIN_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_LIN_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN (T_R_PL_EY_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_XtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_XtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_XtD)+REALIZED_RES_EL_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_EL_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN LIQ_INTEREST_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE (SUM_INTEREST_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS Total_Interest_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN R_COUPON_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS R_Coupon_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN NETCPNACC_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS NetCpnAccStd_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN PAMO_EY_XtD*FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_E_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_E_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN PAMO_LIN_XtD*FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_L_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_L_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_LIN_XtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS IP_Amortized_L_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_E_XtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS IP_Amortized_E_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_EY_XtD  *FX_RATE  ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EY_XtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_LIN_XtD*FX_RATE    ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_LIN_XtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_Lin_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_EY_XtD *FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EL_XtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_EL_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_EY_XtD*FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_LIN_XtD*FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_Lin_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN MTM_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE MV_Clean_All_XtD*FX_RATE END AS Clean_MV_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_UNREAL_LIN_XTD*FX_RATE END AS IP_UNREAL_LIN_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_UNREAL_EY_XTD*FX_RATE END AS IP_UNREAL_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFF_XtD*FX_RATE END AS NDIF_Unreal_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFL_XtD*FX_RATE END AS NDIF_Unreal_LIN_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_E_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_E_XTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_L_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_L_XTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN BRK_FEE_NF_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE BRK_FEE_NF_XtD*FX_RATE END ELSE BRK_FEE_NF_XtD*FX_RATE END AS BRK_FEE_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN FINANCING_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE FINANCING_XtD*FX_RATE END ELSE FINANCING_XtD*FX_RATE END AS FINANCING_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN ONF_FEE_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE ONF_FEE_XtD*FX_RATE END ELSE ONF_FEE_XtD*FX_RATE END AS ONF_FEE_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CROSS_CURR_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE CROSS_CURR_XtD*FX_RATE END ELSE CROSS_CURR_XtD*FX_RATE END AS CROSS_CURR_XtD





FROM (

-- On the second level of the code, the variations are computed by difference between 2 different date giving a new field, with a new suffix:
-- Sum("xxx_DAY") = "xxx_LtD" (No computation the value is taken as is for the "Life To Date"
-- Sum("xxx_DAY") - Sum("xxx_1")  = "xxx_XtD"

SELECT 
SUB_TABLE.PARENT4 AS PARENT4,
SUB_TABLE.PARENT3 AS PARENT3,
SUB_TABLE.PARENT2 AS PARENT2,
SUB_TABLE.PARENT1 AS PARENT1,
SUB_TABLE.PORTFOLIO AS PORTFOLIO,
SUB_TABLE.CURRENCY AS CURRENCY,
SUB_TABLE.PRODUCT AS PRODUCT,
SUB_TABLE.INSTRUMENT AS INSTRUMENT,

SUB_TABLE.VERSION_ AS VERSION_,
SUB_TABLE.GLOBAL_ID AS GLOBAL_ID,
SUB_TABLE.TRADE_ID AS TRADE_ID,
SUB_TABLE.LEG AS LEG,
SUB_TABLE.LIQ_CCY,

SUB_TABLE.SIGNEDQUA,
SUB_TABLE.MKT_PRICE,
SUB_TABLE.AVP_AMO_E,
SUB_TABLE.CLOSINGAM,
--select the FX_RATE

SUB_TABLE.FX_RATE,




--Life to Date values
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS REALIZED_RES_EY_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_LIN_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS REALIZED_RES_LIN_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_EL_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS REALIZED_RES_EL_LtD,

CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.FINANCING_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS FINANCING_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_PAMO2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_PAMO_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACC_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_LIN_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCLIR_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCEYR2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_E_DEAD_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCEY2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_E_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.INTEREST_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS SUM_INTEREST_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.PREVENUE_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS NF_REVENUES_PAST_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_REY2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_LACC2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_L_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_RLI2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.MV_FBF2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS BRK_FEE_FIN_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.MV_NFBF2_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS BRK_FEE_NF_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.ONF_FEE_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS ONF_FEE_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.XCCYST_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS  CROSS_CURR_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.T_R_PL_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS T_R_PL_EY_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.T_R_PL_LI_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS T_R_PL_LI_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.LIQ_INTEREST_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS LIQ_INTEREST_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.R_COUPON_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS R_COUPON_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.NETCPNACC_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS NETCPNACC_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.PAMO_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PAMO_EY_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.PAMO_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PAMO_LIN_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.R_PL_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS R_PL_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.CG_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS CG_EY_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.CG_LIN_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS CG_LIN_LtD,

CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_ACOST_E_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS U_ACOST_E_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_ACOST_L_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS U_ACOST_L_LtD,

CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.MTM_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS MTM_LtD,


CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_PAMO_EY_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS U_PAMO_EY_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_PAMO_LI_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS U_PAMO_LI_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_UDIFF_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS  U_UDIFF_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_UDIFL_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS  U_UDIFL_LtD,

CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_IPUL_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS  IP_Unreal_Lin_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_IPUF_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS  IP_Unreal_EY_LtD,
CAST(SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_MTM_DAY) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS  MV_Clean_All_LtD,









-- Date2 to Date variationSUB_TABLE.REAL_EY_1
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_EY_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_EY_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS REALIZED_RES_EY_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_LIN_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_LIN_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS REALIZED_RES_LIN_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_EL_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.REAL_EL_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS REALIZED_RES_EL_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.FINANCING_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.FINANCING_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS FINANCING_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_PAMO2_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_PAMO2_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_PAMO_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACC_DAY)-SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACC_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_LIN_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCLIR_DAY)-SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCLIR_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCEYR2_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCEYR2_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_E_DEAD_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCEY2_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.IP_ACCEY2_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_ACC_E_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.INTEREST_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.INTEREST_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS SUM_INTEREST_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.PREVENUE_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.PREVENUE_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS NF_REVENUES_PAST_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_EY_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_EY_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_E_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_REY2_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_REY2_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_LACC2_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_LACC2_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_L_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_RLI2_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.NDIF_RLI2_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.MV_FBF2_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.MV_FBF2_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS BRK_FEE_FIN_XtD,

CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.T_R_PL_LI_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.T_R_PL_LI_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS T_R_PL_LI_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.LIQ_INTEREST_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.LIQ_INTEREST_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS LIQ_INTEREST_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.R_COUPON_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.R_COUPON_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS R_COUPON_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.NETCPNACC_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.NETCPNACC_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS NETCPNACC_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.PAMO_EY_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.PAMO_EY_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PAMO_EY_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.PAMO_LIN_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.PAMO_LIN_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS PAMO_LIN_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.R_PL_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.R_PL_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS R_PL_XtD,

CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.CG_LIN_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.CG_LIN_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS CG_LIN_XtD,


CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_ACOST_E_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_ACOST_E_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS U_ACOST_E_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_ACOST_L_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_ACOST_L_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS U_ACOST_L_XtD,


CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.MTM_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.MTM_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS MTM_XtD,

CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_PAMO_EY_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_PAMO_EY_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS U_PAMO_EY_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_PAMO_LI_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_PAMO_LI_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS U_PAMO_LI_XtD,


CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_UDIFF_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_UDIFF_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS U_UDIFF_XtD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_UDIFL_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_UDIFL_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS U_UDIFL_XtD,

CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_IPUL_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_IPUL_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_UNREAL_LIN_XTD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_IPUF_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_IPUF_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS IP_UNREAL_EY_XTD,
CAST((SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_MTM_DAY) - SUM(SUB_TABLE.U_MTM_1)) AS NUMERIC(20,6)) AS MV_Clean_All_XtD



FROM (

--On the first level of the code, all required fields are retrieved from the corresponding MV and LIQ tables. 
-- To compute different dates, union all function is used. Each ones of the union represents 1 dataset at 1 specific date.			
-- The equivalence between dates and suffixes are as below:
-- Date:   @MxDataSetKey = "xxx_DAY"
-- Date2:  @MxHistoricalDataReferenceDate:N = "xxx_1"  where date 2 can be defined to get the Daily, Monthly or Yearly variation. 

--Union 1: Dataset at date 1
SELECT 
MV.M_PTF_PAREN4 AS PARENT4,
MV.M_PTF_PAREN3 AS PARENT3,
MV.M_PTF_PAREN2 AS PARENT2,
MV.M_PTF_PAREN1 AS PARENT1,
MV.M_TP_PFOLIO AS PORTFOLIO,
MV.M_MV_CUR AS CURRENCY,
MV.M_CNT_TYPO AS PRODUCT,
MV.M_INSTRUMENT AS INSTRUMENT,
-- For bonds, data is aggregated by portfolio and instrument.
CASE WHEN M_CNT_TYPO <> 'Bond' THEN MV.M_CNT_ORG ELSE 0 END AS CONTRACT,
CASE WHEN M_CNT_TYPO <> 'Bond' THEN MV.M_CNT_VS2 ELSE 0 END AS VERSION_,
CASE WHEN M_CNT_TYPO <> 'Bond' THEN MV.M_TP_GID ELSE '' END AS GLOBAL_ID,
CASE WHEN M_CNT_TYPO <> 'Bond' THEN MV.M_NB ELSE 0 END AS TRADE_ID,
CASE WHEN M_CNT_TYPO <> 'Bond' THEN MV.M_MV_LEG ELSE 0 END AS LEG,
LIQ.M_CCY AS LIQ_CCY,
LIQ.M_CLOSINGAM AS CLOSINGAM,
LIQ.M_SIGNEDQUA AS SIGNEDQUA,
LIQ.M_MKT_PRICE AS MKT_PRICE,
LIQ.M_AVP_AMO_E AS AVP_AMO_E,
-- Fields coming from the detailed MV table should be aggregated.
SUM(MV.M_REAL_EY) AS REAL_EY_DAY,
SUM(MV.M_REAL_LIN) AS REAL_LIN_DAY,
SUM(MV.M_REALIZED) AS REAL_EL_DAY,
SUM(MV.M_FINANCING) AS FINANCING_DAY,
SUM(MV.M_IP_PAMO2) AS IP_PAMO2_DAY,
SUM(MV.M_IP_ACCEYR2) AS IP_ACCEYR2_DAY,
SUM(MV.M_IP_ACCEY2) AS IP_ACCEY2_DAY,
SUM(MV.M_IP_ACC2) AS IP_ACC_DAY,
SUM(MV.M_IP_ACCLIR2) AS IP_ACCLIR_DAY,
SUM(MV.M_INTEREST) AS INTEREST_DAY,
SUM(MV.M_PREVENUE) AS PREVENUE_DAY,
SUM(MV.M_NDIF_EY) AS NDIF_EY_DAY,
SUM(MV.M_NDIF_REY2) AS NDIF_REY2_DAY,
SUM(MV.M_NDIF_LACC2) AS NDIF_LACC2_DAY,
SUM(MV.M_NDIF_RLI2) AS NDIF_RLI2_DAY,
SUM(MV.M_MV_FBF2) AS MV_FBF2_DAY,
SUM(MV.M_MV_NFBF2) AS MV_NFBF2_DAY,
SUM(MV.M_ONF_FEE) AS ONF_FEE_DAY,
SUM(MV.M_XCCYST) AS XCCYST_DAY,

TRIM(M_DESC): PLAccrual with bonds from Liquidation in Reporting Currency
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
/*
This report generates the accrual P&L  (Realized and Unrealized) in accounting currency with bond reconciled positions with AVP projection using EY and linear amortizations.
The extraction presents three levels of code:
First level of code: Union of datasets at 2 different dates.  Join between financing (MV) and liquidation (LIQ) tables in every union. 
Second level of code: variation between 2 different dates.
Third level of code: breakdowns and calculated fields definition.
*/



--Third level of code: Definition of the fields shown in the output: breakdowns and calculated fields. 
--Calculated fields for bonds and non-bonds products involve different formulas. 
SELECT

--Breakdown fields
PARENT4 AS Parent_4,
PARENT3 AS Parent_3,
PARENT2 AS Parent_2,
PARENT1 AS Parent_1,
PORTFOLIO AS Portfolio,
CURRENCY AS Currency,
PRODUCT AS Product,
INSTRUMENT AS Instrument,
CONTRACT AS Contract,
VERSION_ AS Version_,
GLOBAL_ID AS GLOBAL_ID,
TRADE_ID AS TRADE_ID,
LEG AS Leg,
LIQ_CCY AS Instr_Currency,

SIGNEDQUA AS Signed_Quan,
MKT_PRICE AS MKT_PRICE,
AVP_AMO_E AS AVP_AMO_E,
CLOSINGAM AS  Closing_Am_P,	   				
--Life to Date values
--Multiply all LTD and XTD values by FX_RATE
--
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN (T_R_PL_EY_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_LtD)+(IP_ACC_E_LtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD)+REALIZED_RES_EY_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN (T_R_PL_LI_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_LtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_LtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_L_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_LtD)+REALIZED_RES_LIN_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_LIN_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN (T_R_PL_EY_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_LtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_LtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD)+REALIZED_RES_EL_LtD+BRK_FEE_NF_LtD+FINANCING_LtD+ONF_FEE_LtD+CROSS_CURR_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_EL_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN LIQ_INTEREST_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE (SUM_INTEREST_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS Total_Interest_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN R_COUPON_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS R_Coupon_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN NETCPNACC_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS NetCpnAccStd_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN PAMO_EY_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_E_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_E_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN PAMO_LIN_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_L_LtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_L_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_LIN_LtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS IP_Amortized_L_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_E_LtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_LtD+IP_PAMO_LtD)*FX_RATE END AS IP_Amortized_E_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_EY_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EY_LtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_LIN_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_LIN_LtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_Lin_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_EY_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EL_LtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_EL_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_EY_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CG_LIN_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_Lin_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN MTM_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE MV_Clean_All_LtD*FX_RATE END AS Clean_MV_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_Unreal_Lin_LtD*FX_RATE END AS IP_UNREAL_LIN_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_Unreal_EY_LtD*FX_RATE END AS IP_UNREAL_EY_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFF_LtD*FX_RATE END AS NDIF_Unreal_EY_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFL_LtD*FX_RATE END AS NDIF_Unreal_LIN_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_E_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_E_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_L_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_L_LTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN BRK_FEE_NF_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE BRK_FEE_NF_LtD*FX_RATE END ELSE BRK_FEE_NF_LtD*FX_RATE END AS BRK_FEE_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN FINANCING_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE FINANCING_LtD*FX_RATE END ELSE FINANCING_LtD*FX_RATE END AS FINANCING_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN ONF_FEE_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE ONF_FEE_LtD*FX_RATE END ELSE ONF_FEE_LtD*FX_RATE END AS ONF_FEE_LtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CROSS_CURR_LtD*FX_RATE ELSE CROSS_CURR_LtD*FX_RATE  END ELSE CROSS_CURR_LtD*FX_RATE  END AS CROSS_CURR_LtD,

--Date2 to Date values
--Multiply all LTD and XTD values by FX_RATE
-- 
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN (T_R_PL_EY_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_XtD)+(IP_ACC_E_XtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_XtD)+REALIZED_RES_EY_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN (T_R_PL_LI_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_XtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_XtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_L_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_XtD)+REALIZED_RES_LIN_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_LIN_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN (T_R_PL_EY_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE ELSE (BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END ELSE ((SUM_INTEREST_XtD)+(IP_ACC_LIN_XtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)+(PREM_DISC_ACC_E_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_XtD)+REALIZED_RES_EL_XtD+BRK_FEE_NF_XtD+FINANCING_XtD+ONF_FEE_XtD+CROSS_CURR_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS T_R_PL_EL_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN LIQ_INTEREST_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE (SUM_INTEREST_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS Total_Interest_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN R_COUPON_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS R_Coupon_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN NETCPNACC_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS NetCpnAccStd_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN PAMO_EY_XtD*FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_E_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_E_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_E_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN PAMO_LIN_XtD*FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE (PREM_DISC_ACC_L_XtD+PREM_DISC_ACC_DEAD_L_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS Prem_Disc_Amortized_L_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_LIN_XtD+IP_ACC_LIN_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS IP_Amortized_L_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN 0 ELSE (IP_ACC_E_XtD+IP_ACC_E_DEAD_XtD+IP_PAMO_XtD)*FX_RATE END AS IP_Amortized_E_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_EY_XtD  *FX_RATE  ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EY_XtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_LIN_XtD*FX_RATE    ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_LIN_XtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_Lin_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_EY_XtD *FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE  REALIZED_RES_EL_XtD*FX_RATE  END AS Realized_Res_EL_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_EY_XtD*FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY  THEN CG_LIN_XtD*FX_RATE   ELSE 0 END ELSE  0   END AS Capital_Gain_Lin_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN MTM_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE MV_Clean_All_XtD*FX_RATE END AS Clean_MV_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_UNREAL_LIN_XTD*FX_RATE END AS IP_UNREAL_LIN_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE IP_UNREAL_EY_XTD*FX_RATE END AS IP_UNREAL_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFF_XtD*FX_RATE END AS NDIF_Unreal_EY_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ELSE U_UDIFL_XtD*FX_RATE END AS NDIF_Unreal_LIN_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_E_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_E_XTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN U_ACOST_L_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END AS U_ACOST_L_XTD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN BRK_FEE_NF_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE BRK_FEE_NF_XtD*FX_RATE END ELSE BRK_FEE_NF_XtD*FX_RATE END AS BRK_FEE_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN FINANCING_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE FINANCING_XtD*FX_RATE END ELSE FINANCING_XtD*FX_RATE END AS FINANCING_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN ONF_FEE_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE ONF_FEE_XtD*FX_RATE END ELSE ONF_FEE_XtD*FX_RATE END AS ONF_FEE_XtD,
CASE WHEN PRODUCT ='Bond' THEN CASE WHEN CURRENCY =LIQ_CCY THEN CROSS_CURR_XtD*FX_RATE ELSE CROSS_CURR_XtD*FX_RATE END ELSE CROSS_CURR_XtD*FX_RATE END AS CROSS_CURR_XtD





FROM (

-- On the second level of the code, the variations are computed by difference between 2 different date giving a new field, with a new suffix:

FROM (

--On the first level of the code, all required fields are retrieved from the corresponding MV and LIQ tables. 
-- To compute different dates, union all function is used. Each ones of the union represents 1 dataset at 1 specific date.			
-- The equivalence between dates and suffixes are as below:
-- Date:   @MxDataSetKey = "xxx_DAY"
-- Date2:  @MxHistoricalDataReferenceDate:N = "xxx_1"  where date 2 can be defined to get the Daily, Monthly or Yearly variation. 

--Union 1: Dataset at date 1
SELECT 
MV.M_PTF_PAREN4 AS PARENT4,

--Fields coming from consolidated LIQ table should be grouped.

SUM(MV.M_U_IPUF) AS U_IPUF_DAY,
SUM(MV.M_U_MTM) AS U_MTM_DAY,

--Fields for date 2 in UNION 1 are set to 0.
SUM(0) AS REAL_EY_1,
SUM(0) AS REAL_LIN_1,

SUM(0) AS NDIF_EY_1,
SUM(0) AS NDIF_REY2_1,
SUM(0) AS NDIF_LACC2_1,
SUM(0) AS NDIF_RLI2_1,
SUM(0) AS MV_FBF2_1,
SUM(0) AS MV_NFBF2_1,
SUM(0) AS ONF_FEE_1,
SUM(0) AS XCCYST_1,
SUM(0) AS T_R_PL_EY_1,
SUM(0) AS T_R_PL_LI_1,

WITH ERM_SEC_POS_REPORT as (
select M_SE_ISIN, M_TP_DTEFST, NOMINAL, BID_PRICE, POSITION_INITIAL_VALUE, ATT1, ATT2, ATT4, M_TP_RTACR02, M_TP_DTETRN, M_TP_NOMINAL, M_TP_YIELD,
     case when NOMINAL>0 then 'L' else 'S' end as L_S,M_CIF, M_SECTOR_ID
from(
    select M_SE_ISIN, min(M_TP_DTEFST) as M_TP_DTEFST,sum(NOMINAL) NOMINAL,BID_PRICE,sum(POSITION_INITIAL_VALUE) POSITION_INITIAL_VALUE,
    ATT1,ATT2,ATT4,sum(M_TP_RTACR02) M_TP_RTACR02,MAX(M_TP_DTETRN) M_TP_DTETRN, sum(M_TP_NOMINAL) M_TP_NOMINAL,M_CIF, AVG(M_TP_YIELD) M_TP_YIELD, M_SECTOR_ID
    from (
          select PARTIES.M_CIF,
          TPALL.M_TP_YIELD,
          TRIM(DECODE(TRIM(SEC.M_SE_GROUP),'Bond',SEC.M_SE_ISIN,SEC.M_SE_D_LABEL)) as M_SE_ISIN,
          TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST,'DD/MM/YYYY') as M_TP_DTEFST,
          ABS(case  
              when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='EQUIT' then TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2 ---*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE 
              --when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='BOND' then TPALL.M_TP_IPAY-TPALL.M_TP_ACCAMT 
              else TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL end) 
              * DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_BS),'B',1,-1) as NOMINAL, -- for sell needs nominal to be negative amount
          DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_BS),'B','L','S') as L_S,
          --PL_DET.M_MP_SPOT2 as BID_PRICE,
          LIQ.M_SEC_MKT_P as BID_PRICE,
          ABS(case  
              when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='BOND' then (LIQ.M_SEC_MKT_P/100)*TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_SECLOTU
              else LIQ.M_SEC_MKT_P*TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_SECLOTU
          end)
          * DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_BS),'B',1,-1)  as POSITION_INITIAL_VALUE, -- for sell needs nominal to be negative amount
          case 
          when TRIM(SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP)='Mutual Fund - Equity' then 'MUTUAL_FUND'
          when SEC.M_SE_GROUP IN ('Bond')   then 'SUKUK' 
          when SEC.M_SE_GROUP IN ('Equity') then 'EQUITY' 
          else null end as ATT1,
          TRIM(SEC.M_SE_F_NAME) as ATT2,
          TRIM(SEC.M_SE_CUR) as ATT4,
          TPALL.M_TP_RTACR02,
          TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN,'DD/MM/YYYY') as M_TP_DTETRN,
          TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL ,
          PARTIES.M_SECTOR_ID
          from 
          TP_ALL_REP TPALL
          ,SECURITIES_REP SEC
          ,PARTIES_REP PARTIES
          ,PLA_LIQBDAVP_REP LIQ ---- PL_DETAILED_REP PL_DET,
          where 1 = 1
          AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
          and TPALL.M_TP_SECDLB=SEC.M_SE_D_LABEL(+) and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=SEC.M_REF_DATA(+)
          and PARTIES.M_LABEL(+)=SEC.M_SE_ISS and PARTIES.M_REF_DATA(+)=SEC.M_REF_DATA
          and SEC.M_SE_F_NAME=LIQ.M_INSTRUMEN(+) and SEC.M_REF_DATA=LIQ.M_REF_DATA(+)
         and TRIM(SEC.M_SE_D_LABEL)=TRIM(LIQ.M_INSTRUMEN(+)) and SEC.M_REF_DATA=LIQ.M_REF_DATA(+)
         and TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO=LIQ.M_PORTFOLIO(+) -- To fix the duplicates records
          and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N' and M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
          and TPALL.M_TRN_GRP IN ('BOND','EQUIT')
          AND TPALL.M_AMD_STS2<>'NA'

    )
    group by M_SE_ISIN,BID_PRICE,ATT1,ATT2,ATT4,M_CIF, M_SECTOR_ID
)
where NOMINAL>0 or (NOMINAL<0 and TRIM(M_CIF)='10347908')
)
