 CAST ( NULL as NUMBER(24,2)   )  AS FERMAT_ID,
 CAST ( NULL as VARCHAR2(16)   )  AS STAGING_SOURCE

from ERM_SEC_POS_REPORT B

select 
CAST (M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER  AS CHAR(30))            ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
CAST (''   AS CHAR(30))            SWIFT_ADDRESS,
CAST (M_CURRENCY        AS CHAR(3))             CURRENCY,
CAST (M_CLOSING_BALANCE AS DECIMAL(26,3))       CLOSING_BALANCE, 
CAST (M_OPENING_BALANCE AS DECIMAL(26,3))       OPENING_BALANCE,
CAST (M_2ND_REFERENCE   AS VARCHAR2(24))        SND_REFERENCE,
CAST (M_1ST_REFERENCE   AS VARCHAR2(24))        FST_REFERENCE, 
CAST (M_AMOUNT          AS DECIMAL(26,3))       AMOUNT,
CAST (M_TRADE_DATE      AS DATE)                TRADE_DATE,
CAST (M_BLANK           AS CHAR(5))             BLANK,
CAST (M_VALUE_DATE      AS DATE)                VALUE_DATE,
CAST (M_TYPE            AS VARCHAR2(10))        TYPE,
CAST (M_D_C             AS CHAR(1))             D_C,
CAST (M_DEPARTMENT_CODE AS CHAR(3))             DEPARTMENT_CODE,
CAST (M_TRADE_DATETIME  AS VARCHAR2(30))        TRADE_DATETIME,
CAST (M_CONTRACT        AS DECIMAL(24,0))       CONTRACT,
CAST (MY_RANK           AS DECIMAL(24,0))       MY_RANK
from (
    SELECT 
    M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, M_CURRENCY,
    CASE WHEN MY_RANK=1 THEN CALC_AMT--M_AMOUNT+0  -- GET OPENING BALANCE FOR YESTERDAY
    ELSE CALC_AMT --M_AMOUNT
    END 
    AS M_CLOSING_BALANCE, 
    
    /*(select NVL(sum(M_AMOUNT),0) from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP WHERE TO_CHAR(M_VALUE_DAT,'YYYYMMDD')='20220806' 
    and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)=TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)) as M_OPENING_BALANCE, */
    
    ---get opening as closing of 6th or migration date
    (select sum(M_AMOUNT) from BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP WHERE TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYYMMDD')='20220806' 
    and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)=TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) and TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')) as M_OPENING_BALANCE,
    
    /*(
        select NVL(sum(M_AMOUNT),0) from BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP --- BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP 
        WHERE 
       -- TO_CHAR(M_VALUE_DAT,'YYYYMMDD')=TO_CHAR((select M_REP_DATE2-1 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N),'YYYYMMDD')
        TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYYMMDD')=TO_CHAR((select M_REP_DATE2-1 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N),'YYYYMMDD')
        and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)=TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
        and TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')
        
    ) as M_OPENING_BALANCE, */
   ---- -14193643.03 as M_OPENING_BALANCE, 
    M_2ND_REFERENCE, M_1ST_REFERENCE, M_AMOUNT, M_TRADE_DATE, 
    M_BLANK, M_VALUE_DATE, M_TYPE, M_D_C, M_DEPARTMENT_CODE, M_TRADE_DATETIME, M_CONTRACT,MY_RANK
    from 
    (
     select M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, M_CURRENCY, 
     M_CLOSING_BALANCE, M_OPENING_BALANCE, M_2ND_REFERENCE, M_1ST_REFERENCE,  M_AMOUNT as CALC_AMT,
     (case when M_AMOUNT<0 then ABS(M_AMOUNT) else -1*ABS(M_AMOUNT) end) as M_AMOUNT, M_TRADE_DATE, 
     M_BLANK, M_VALUE_DATE, M_TYPE, (case when M_AMOUNT<0 then 'C' else 'D' end) M_D_C, M_DEPARTMENT_CODE, M_TRADE_DATETIME, M_CONTRACT,RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER ORDER BY M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_VALUE_DATE,M_CONTRACT) MY_RANK
        from (    
        select M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CURRENCY,sum(M_CLOSING_BALANCE) M_CLOSING_BALANCE,sum(M_OPENING_BALANCE) M_OPENING_BALANCE,
        M_TYPE||M_2ND_REFERENCE as M_2ND_REFERENCE,M_TYPE||M_1ST_REFERENCE as M_1ST_REFERENCE,sum(M_AMOUNT) M_AMOUNT,M_TRADE_DATE,M_BLANK,M_VALUE_DATE,M_TYPE,M_DEPARTMENT_CODE,M_TRADE_DATETIME,M_CONTRACT
        from (
               select --DISTINCT
                M_ACCOUNT_N as M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER
               --,'' as M_SWIFT_ADDRESS
               ,M_CURRENCY as M_CURRENCY
               ,0 as M_CLOSING_BALANCE
               ,0 as M_OPENING_BALANCE
               ,NVL(TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT,NOS.M_ID) as M_2ND_REFERENCE
               ,NVL(TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT,NOS.M_ID) as M_1ST_REFERENCE
               ,M_AMOUNT as M_AMOUNT
                              
                ----As per business requirement for entries generated for flows by events eg: Netting-----
                  --,TP_ALL.M_TP_DTESYS as M_TRADE_DATE
                  ,case 
                    when NOS.M_PROD_ID=0 and NOS.M_PRODUCERO=0 then M_VALUE_DAT
                    else TP_ALL.M_TP_DTESYS 
                   end as M_TRADE_DATE
                ----As per business requirement for entries generated for flows by events eg: Netting-----
               ,null as M_BLANK
               ,M_VALUE_DAT as M_VALUE_DATE
                ,case 
                --when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('FT Nostro Nostro') then 'MXFT'
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('FT Nostro Nostro') then 'MX'
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Banknotes','Dual Currency Deposit','Spot','SAMA Bill') or M_PRODUCER1 like '%FX%' then 'MXFX'
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad','Murabaha Borrowing','Repo SAMA','RR SAMA','Murabaha Borrowing',
                'Wakala Placement','SAMA Purchase','RR Murabaha','RR Waad','Murabaha Placement','Wakala Borrowing','DPM Murabaha') then 'MXMM'
                when M_PRODUCER1 like '%LTM%' or M_PRODUCER1 like '%Sukuk%' then 'MXFI'
                when M_PRODUCER1 like '%Fund%' or M_PRODUCER1 like '%Equity%' then 'MXEQ'
                when M_PRODUCER1 like '%PRS%' then 'MXIR'
                --when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('DPM Murabaha','SFRM','SGDM') then 'MXIR'   
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('SFRM','SGDM') then 'MXIR'       
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Brokerage Fee') then 'MXBR'
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('SCF','SCF BR VAT RC','SCF BR WHT PAY','SCF BR VAT') then 'MXSCF'
                else 'MX' end as M_TYPE
               --,case when M_AMOUNT<0 then 'D' else 'C' end as M_D_C
               ,'999' as M_DEPARTMENT_CODE
               ,TP_ALL.M_TP_DTESYS ||' '||M_TP_TIMSYS as M_TRADE_DATETIME
               ,TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT
              
               from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP NOS, (select distinct M_CONTRACT, M_REF_DATA,M_TP_DTESYS,M_REP_DATE2, M_TP_TIMSYS,M_CNT_SRCMOD from TP_ALL_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N AND M_CONTRACT<>1550) TP_ALL --TP_ALL_REP TP_ALL
               where 1=1
               ---and TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT(+)=NOS.M_PROD_ID  -- fix as per pega case C-1226227
               and TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT(+)=DECODE(NOS.M_PROD_ID,0,NOS.M_PRODUCERO,NOS.M_PROD_ID) -- fix as per pega case C-1226227
               and TP_ALL.M_REF_DATA(+)=@MxDataSetKey:N
               and TRIM(NOS.M_BENEFICIA) is not null and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N) is not null 
               and NOS.M_AMOUNT !=0 --and NOS.M_SETTLEMEN in 'SETTLED' 
               and NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N<>'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KS' 
               ---- aggrgate change
              --------------------- to get data from migration data--------------
               and TO_CHAR(M_VALUE_DAT,'YYYYMMDD')<>'20220806' --- since the data migrated on 6th august --- need to change once whole sum data is finalised
               AND M_VALUE_DAT>to_date('06-AUG-22','DD-MON-YY') --- need to change once whole sum data is finalised
               and (M_VALUE_DAT<=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N) or TRIM(TP_ALL.M_REP_DATE2) is null)
               -------------------------------------to get data from migration data--------------
               
               ---As per user request neglecting commodity, scf
               AND TRIM(M_PRODUCER1) not in ('Murabaha Commodity','SCF','SCF BR VAT RC','SCF BR WHT PAY','SCF BR VAT','Collateral','SCF BR WHT NPAY')
               --AND TRIM(M_PRODUCER1) not in ('Collateral')
               ---As per user request neglecting T24 deals and ones which was not picked due to prod id coming as zero
												AND (TRIM(TP_ALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD)<>'T24.NOSTRO' or TRIM(TP_ALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD) is null) ----- Fix for prod id=0 amd produer0=0
               
               AND TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')  /*AND TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT<>1550*/ ----- Fix for prod id=0 amd produer0=0
               --and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)<>'008100000300008'
               and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)='008100018830004'--'008100000300008'------ to get only SAMA nostro details
               and DECODE(NOS.M_PROD_ID,0,NOS.M_PRODUCERO,NOS.M_PROD_ID)<>1550 ----- Fix for prod id=0 amd produer0=0
               -- or M_PROD_ID=0)
               -------only last EOD data-----
               --AND (M_VALUE_DAT=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N) or TRIM(TP_ALL.M_REP_DATE2) is null) 
               -------only last EOD data-----
               ------------------- and TRIM(NOS.M_VALIDATIO)='Settled' --- in ('Released','Settled','TechSettled','InstrToValidate')   
               --and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)='008100014040009' --JPM
               --and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)='008100018830004' ---SCB
               --ORDER BY M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CONTRACT
               
                union all
                
               
               select 
                M_ACCOUNT_N as M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER
               --,'' as M_SWIFT_ADDRESS
               ,M_CURRENCY as M_CURRENCY
               ,0 as M_CLOSING_BALANCE
               ,0 as M_OPENING_BALANCE
               ,NOS.M_PROD_ID as M_2ND_REFERENCE
               ,NOS.M_PROD_ID as M_1ST_REFERENCE
               
               ,M_AMOUNT as M_AMOUNT
               ,null as M_TRADE_DATE
               ,null as M_BLANK
               ,M_VALUE_DAT as M_VALUE_DATE ---TP_ALL.M_TP_DTEPMT
              ,'MXCOL' as M_TYPE
               --,case when M_AMOUNT<0 then 'D' else 'C' end as M_D_C
               ,'999' as M_DEPARTMENT_CODE
               ,'' as M_TRADE_DATETIME
               ,NOS.M_PROD_ID
               
               from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP NOS
               where 1=1
               and TRIM(NOS.M_BENEFICIA) is not null and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N) is not null 
               and NOS.M_AMOUNT !=0 
               and NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N<>'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KS'
               ---- aggrgate change
                and TO_CHAR(M_VALUE_DAT,'YYYYMMDD')<>'20220806' --- since the data migrated on 6th august
               AND M_VALUE_DAT>to_date('06-AUG-22','DD-MON-YY') --- need to change once whole sum data is finalised
               and M_VALUE_DAT<=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)
               ---- aggrgate change
               AND TRIM(M_PRODUCER1) in ('Collateral')
               AND TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')
               --and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)<>'008100000300008'
               and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)='008100018830004'--'008100000300008'
               ------------and TRIM(M_VALIDATIO)='Settled' ---- in ('Released','Settled','TechSettled','InstrToValidate')   
               
           )
           group by M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CURRENCY,M_2ND_REFERENCE,M_1ST_REFERENCE,M_TRADE_DATE,M_BLANK,M_VALUE_DATE,M_TYPE,M_DEPARTMENT_CODE,M_TRADE_DATETIME,M_CONTRACT
           )
    )  where M_AMOUNT !=0 
    ORDER BY MY_RANK,M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CONTRACT
)
ORDER BY MY_RANK,M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CONTRACT

TRIM(M_DESC): Description: list of fields for OP11_HOLREFR_FX_REP
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
SELECT 
M_TRADE_NUMB AS Trade_number, 
M_INSTRUMENT AS Instrument, 
M_CURR1 AS Currency,  
M_CURR2 AS Other_currency, 
M_BS AS Direction, 
M_PORTFOLIO AS Portfolio, 
M_COUNTERPAR AS Counterpart, 
M_STATUS AS Status, 
M_MATURITY AS Maturity, 
M_TRA_TYPO AS Trade_typology, 
M_SPO_DE_CAL AS Spot_to_delivery_calendar,
M_DAT_VA_CAL AS Date_to_value_calendar, 
M_MODIFI_CAL AS Modified_calendar, 
M_IMPACT_CAL AS Impacted_calendar, 
M_IMPAC_TYPE AS Impact_type, 
M_MODIF_DATE AS Modified_date, 
M_MODIF_TYPE AS Modification_type,
CASE WHEN M_BS = 'S' THEN M_NOMINAL_2 * -1 ELSE M_NOMINAL_2 END AS Other_nominal,
CASE WHEN M_BS = 'B' THEN M_NOMINAL * -1 ELSE M_NOMINAL END AS Nominal

TRIM(M_DESC): AU24 SQL request
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select
C.EOD_DATE as EOD_DATE,
C.M_START_DATE as M_START_DATE,
C.M_END_DATE as M_END_DATE,
C.NORM_START_TIME as NORM_START_TIME,
C.NORM_END_TIME as NORM_END_TIME,

C.END_TIMESTAMP as END_TIMESTAMP,
C.WINDOW as WINDOW,
C.SCRIPT_TYPE as SCRIPT_TYPE,
C.S_HH as S_HH,
C.S_MM as S_MM,
C.S_SS as S_SS,
C.E_HH as E_HH,
C.E_MM as E_MM,
C.E_SS as E_SS,
C.M_ELAP_SEC as M_ELAP_SEC,
C.M_REF_DATA as M_REF_DATA,
C.M_MX_REF_JOB as M_MX_REF_JOB,
C.M_ERR_COUNT as M_ERR_COUNT,
C.M_CPU_SEC as M_CPU_SEC,
C.M_END_TIME as M_END_TIME,
C.M_DM_UTS as M_DM_UTS,
C.M_SCRIPT as M_SCRIPT,
C.M_START_TIME as M_START_TIME,
C.M_NB_TRADES as M_NB_TRADES,
C.M_SYB_SEC as M_SYB_SEC,
C.M_DESC as M_DESC,
C.M_USER as M_USER,
C.M_GROUP as M_GROUP,
C.M_UNIT_NAME as M_UNIT_NAME,
C.M_AUDT_TYPE as M_AUDT_TYPE,
C.M_UNIT as M_UNIT,

C.EOD_END_HR as EOD_END_HR,
C.S_HH_N as S_HH_N,
C.E_HH_N as E_HH_N,
case
	when C.EOD_START_HR <= 11.0 then CAST(C.EOD_START_HR as CHAR(2)) ||  ' am'
	else CAST(C.EOD_START_HR-12 as CHAR(2)) ||  ' pm'
end as EOD_STD_SRT_HR,
case
	when C.EOD_END_HR <= 11.0 then CAST(C.EOD_END_HR as CHAR(2)) ||  ' am'
	else CAST(C.EOD_END_HR-12 as CHAR(2)) ||  ' pm'
end as EOD_STD_END_HR,
	
-- Sample script time into 24 samples from 12pm EOD day, till 12 pm next Day
      -- EOD days samples
		case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=12 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=12) THEN 1  END as D1_hour12,
      case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=13 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=13) THEN 1  END as D1_hour13,
      case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=14 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=14) THEN 1  END as D1_hour14,
      case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=15 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=15) THEN 1  END as D1_hour15,
      case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=16 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=16) THEN 1  END as D1_hour16,
      case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=17 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=17) THEN 1  END as D1_hour17,
      case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=18 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=18) THEN 1  END as D1_hour18,
      case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=19 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=19) THEN 1  END as D1_hour19,
      case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=20 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=20) THEN 1  END as D1_hour20,
      case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=21 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=21) THEN 1  END as D1_hour21,
      case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=22 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=22) THEN 1  END as D1_hour22,
      case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=23 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=23) THEN 1  END as D1_hour23,
      --EOD+1 samples
		case when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME/ 3600)  <=24 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=24) THEN 1  END as D2_hour0,
      case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=25 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=25) THEN 1  END as D2_hour1,
      case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=26 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=26) THEN 1  END as D2_hour2,
      case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=27 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=27) THEN 1  END as D2_hour3,
      case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=28 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=28) THEN 1  END as D2_hour4,
      case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=29 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=29) THEN 1  END as D2_hour5,
      case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=30 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=30) THEN 1  END as D2_hour6,
      case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=31 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=31) THEN 1  END as D2_hour7,
      case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=32 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=32) THEN 1  END as D2_hour8,
      case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=33 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=33) THEN 1  END as D2_hour9,
      case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=34 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=34) THEN 1  END as D2_hour10,
      case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=35 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=35) THEN 1  END as D2_hour11,
      case	when  (floor(NORM_START_TIME / 3600)  <=36 AND  floor(NORM_END_TIME /3600) >=36) THEN 1  END as D2_hour12
     
from
(
select
B.EOD_DATE as EOD_DATE,
B.M_START_DATE as M_START_DATE,
B.M_END_DATE as M_END_DATE,

case 
  when B.WINDOW = 'End of day' then 
 	 case
    when (M_START_DATE = EOD_DATE AND M_END_DATE = EOD_DATE) then M_START_TIME
 	  when (M_START_DATE = EOD_DATE AND M_END_DATE > EOD_DATE) then M_START_TIME
 	  when (M_START_DATE > EOD_DATE AND M_END_DATE > EOD_DATE) then (M_START_TIME+86400)
	 end
end as NORM_START_TIME,

case 
  when B.WINDOW = 'End of day' then 
 	 case
    when (M_START_DATE = EOD_DATE AND M_END_DATE = EOD_DATE) then M_END_TIME
 	  when (M_START_DATE = EOD_DATE AND M_END_DATE > EOD_DATE) then (M_END_TIME+86400)
 	  when (M_START_DATE > EOD_DATE AND M_END_DATE > EOD_DATE) then (M_END_TIME+86400)
	 end
end as NORM_END_TIME, 
B.KEYDATE as KEYDATE,
B.START_TIMESTAMP as START_TIMESTAMP,
B.END_TIMESTAMP as END_TIMESTAMP,

B.WINDOW as WINDOW,
B.SCRIPT_TYPE as SCRIPT_TYPE,
B.S_HH as S_HH,
B.S_MM as S_MM,
B.S_SS as S_SS,
B.E_HH as E_HH,
B.E_MM as E_MM,
B.E_SS as E_SS,
B.M_ELAP_SEC as M_ELAP_SEC,
B.M_REF_DATA as M_REF_DATA,
B.M_MX_REF_JOB as M_MX_REF_JOB,
B.M_ERR_COUNT as M_ERR_COUNT,
B.M_CPU_SEC as M_CPU_SEC,
B.M_END_TIME as M_END_TIME,
B.M_DM_UTS as M_DM_UTS,
B.M_SCRIPT as M_SCRIPT,

B.M_START_TIME as M_START_TIME,
B.M_NB_TRADES as M_NB_TRADES,
B.M_SYB_SEC as M_SYB_SEC,
B.M_DESC as M_DESC,

B.M_USER as M_USER,
B.M_GROUP as M_GROUP,
B.M_UNIT_NAME as M_UNIT_NAME,
B.M_AUDT_TYPE as M_AUDT_TYPE,
B.M_UNIT as M_UNIT,
B.M_NPID as M_NPID,
B.EOD_START_HR as EOD_START_HR,
B.EOD_END_HR as EOD_END_HR,
B.S_HH_N as S_HH_N,
B.E_HH_N as E_HH_N


 from

(
select
TO_CHAR(M_START_DATE,'DD MON YYYY') || '  ' || (S_HH || ':' || S_MM || ':' || S_SS) as KEYDATE,
(S_HH || ':' || S_MM || ':' || S_SS) as START_TIMESTAMP,
(E_HH || ':' || E_MM || ':' || E_SS) as END_TIMESTAMP,
SCRIPT_TYPE,
S_HH,
S_MM,
S_SS,
E_HH,
E_MM,
E_SS,
M_ELAP_SEC,
M_REF_DATA,
M_MX_REF_JOB,
M_ERR_COUNT,
M_CPU_SEC,
M_END_TIME,
M_DM_UTS,
M_SCRIPT,
M_START_DATE,
M_START_TIME,
M_NB_TRADES,
M_SYB_SEC,
M_DESC,
M_END_DATE,
M_USER as M_USER,
M_GROUP as M_GROUP,
M_UNIT_NAME as M_UNIT_NAME,
M_AUDT_TYPE as M_AUDT_TYPE,
M_UNIT as M_UNIT,
M_NPID as M_NPID,
--create on-the-fly EOD_DATE to group scripts that started within the EOD window specified at run time by user using EOD_START_HR and EOD_END_HR
case
when cast(EOD_START_HR as NUMERIC) > cast(EOD_END_HR as NUMERIC)
  then case
    when cast(S_HH as NUMERIC) >= cast(EOD_START_HR as NUMERIC) then M_START_DATE
    when cast(S_HH as NUMERIC) <  cast(EOD_END_HR as NUMERIC) then M_START_DATE+ interval '1' day
    else M_START_DATE 
   end
  else case
    when cast(S_HH as NUMERIC) > cast(EOD_START_HR as NUMERIC) 
    then case
    	when cast(S_HH as NUMERIC)< cast(EOD_END_HR as NUMERIC) then M_START_DATE
    	else M_START_DATE
    end
  else M_START_DATE
  end
end
as EOD_DATE,

case
when cast(EOD_START_HR as NUMERIC) > cast(EOD_END_HR as NUMERIC)
  then case
     when cast(S_HH as NUMERIC) >= cast(EOD_START_HR as NUMERIC) then 'End of day'
     when cast(S_HH as NUMERIC) <  cast(EOD_END_HR as NUMERIC) then 'End of day'
     else 'Intra-day'
    end
  else case
    when cast(S_HH as NUMERIC) > cast(EOD_START_HR as NUMERIC) then case
    when cast(S_HH as NUMERIC)< cast(EOD_END_HR as NUMERIC) then 'End of day'
     else 'Intra-day'
    end
   else 'Intra-day'
  end
end
as WINDOW, 


cast(EOD_START_HR as NUMERIC) as EOD_START_HR ,
cast(EOD_END_HR as NUMERIC) as EOD_END_HR,
cast(S_HH as NUMERIC) as S_HH_N,
cast(E_HH as NUMERIC) as E_HH_N

from
(
select
M_AUDT_TYPE,	
M_CPU_SEC,	
M_DESC,	    
M_DM_UTS,	
M_ELAP_SEC,	
M_END_DATE,	
M_END_TIME,	
M_ERR_COUNT,	
M_GROUP,	    
M_NB_TRADES,
M_REF_DATA,
M_MX_REF_JOB,	
M_SCRIPT,	
M_START_DATE,
M_START_TIME,
M_SYB_SEC,	
M_UNIT,	    
M_UNIT_NAME,
M_USER,
M_NPID as M_NPID,
cast(coalesce(nullif(@EOD_START_HR:C, ' '),'18') as char(2)) as EOD_START_HR,
cast(coalesce(nullif(@EOD_END_HR:C, ' '),'6') as char(2)) as EOD_END_HR,
case 
when M_DM_UTS = 0 then 'Not Datamart'
else 'Datamart'
end as SCRIPT_TYPE,
case
when floor(M_START_TIME / 3600) > 9 THEN ltrim(to_char(floor(M_START_TIME / 3600),'99'))
else  '0' || ltrim(to_char(floor(M_START_TIME / 3600),'99'))
end as S_HH,
case
when mod(floor(M_START_TIME / 60), 60) > 9 THEN ltrim(to_char(mod(floor(M_START_TIME / 60), 60),'99'))
else  '0' || ltrim(to_char(mod(floor(M_START_TIME / 60) , 60),'99'))
end as S_MM,
case
when mod(M_START_TIME, 60) > 9 THEN ltrim(to_char(mod(M_START_TIME , 60),'99'))
else  '0' || ltrim(to_char(mod(M_START_TIME, 60),'99'))
end as S_SS,
case
when floor(M_END_TIME / 3600) > 9 THEN ltrim(to_char(floor(M_END_TIME / 3600),'99'))
else  '0' || ltrim(to_char(floor(M_END_TIME / 3600),'99'))
end as E_HH,
case
when mod(floor(M_END_TIME / 60), 60) > 9 THEN ltrim(to_char(mod(floor(M_END_TIME / 60) , 60),'99'))
else  '0' || ltrim(to_char(mod(floor(M_END_TIME / 60) , 60),'99'))
end as E_MM,
case
when mod(M_END_TIME, 60) > 9 THEN ltrim(to_char(mod(M_END_TIME, 60),'99'))
else  '0' || ltrim(to_char(mod(M_END_TIME , 60),'99'))
end as E_SS
from
PS_AUDIT_REP
where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
  )A
 )B
)C

 VIEW_REP.M_PILLAR as Pillar

,VIEW_REP.M_PORTFOLIO as Portfolio
,RATE_REP.M_LABEL as Curve_Name,

--- added as per user request to arrange the pillar in sequential order
,case 
when UPPER(SUBSTR(VIEW_REP.M_PILLAR,length(TRIM(VIEW_REP.M_PILLAR)),1))='D' then 2000+REGEXP_SUBSTR(VIEW_REP.M_PILLAR,'^[^D]+')
when UPPER(SUBSTR(VIEW_REP.M_PILLAR,length(TRIM(VIEW_REP.M_PILLAR)),1))='W' then 3000+REGEXP_SUBSTR(VIEW_REP.M_PILLAR,'^[^W]+')
when UPPER(SUBSTR(VIEW_REP.M_PILLAR,length(TRIM(VIEW_REP.M_PILLAR)),1))='M' then 4000+REGEXP_SUBSTR(VIEW_REP.M_PILLAR,'^[^M]+')
when UPPER(SUBSTR(VIEW_REP.M_PILLAR,length(TRIM(VIEW_REP.M_PILLAR)),1))='Y' then 5000+REGEXP_SUBSTR(VIEW_REP.M_PILLAR,'^[^Y]+')
else 0
end as pillar_order

,VIEW_REP.M_TOTAL_USD as Total_USD
,VIEW_REP.M_TOTAL_SAR as Total_SAR

TRIM(M_DESC): Moodys Security details Report SQl
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
----Security Details Report
WITH ERM_SEC_REPORT as (
    select distinct
    DECODE(TRIM(SEC.M_SE_GROUP),'Bond',SEC.M_SE_ISIN,SEC.M_SE_D_LABEL) as M_SE_ISIN
   ,DECODE(TRIM(SEC.M_SE_F_NAME),'',SEC.M_SE_D_LABEL,SEC.M_SE_F_NAME) SEC_DESC
   ,SEC.M_COUNTRY
   ,SEC.M_BT_SECTOR
   ,SEC.M_SE_CUR
   ,PARTIES.M_CIF
   ,case when M_SE_GROUP IN ('Bond') then NVL(LIQ.M_NOMINAL,1) else NVL(BB.M_TP_SECLOTU,1) end as UNITY_NOM        ----EQ_MKT_NOM.M_TP_NOMINAL end as UNITY_NOM
   ,case when M_SE_GROUP IN ('Bond') then LIQ.M_SEC_MKT_P else EQ_MKT_VAL.M_MP_SPOT2 end as M_SEC_MKT_P
   ,NVL(UPPER(SEC.M_BT_COUPON),'') as M_BT_COUPON
   ,case
        when BB.M_TP_RTMFRP0 like '%y%' then 'A'
        when BB.M_TP_RTMFRP0='6m' then 'S'
        when BB.M_TP_RTMFRP0='3m' then 'Q'
        when BB.M_TP_RTMFRP0 like '%m%' or BB.M_TP_RTMFRP0 like '%w%' then 'M'
    else 'N' end as COUPON_PERIODICITY
   ,UPPER(SEC.M_SE_COUP) as M_SE_COUP
   ,case when M_SE_GROUP IN  ('Bond') then 'B' else null end as BROKEN_PERIOD_TYPE
   ,TO_CHAR(SEC.M_SE_ISSD,'DD/MM/YYYY') as ISSUE_DATE
   ,TO_CHAR(SEC.M_SE_MAT,'DD/MM/YYYY') as MATURITY_DATE
   ,case when M_SE_GROUP IN  ('Bond') then 'C' else null end as CLEAN_DIRTY
   ,SEC.M_CTRY_DESC
   ,case when M_SE_GROUP IN ('Bond') and TRIM(SEC.M_BT_COUPON)='Floating' then SEC.M_SE_COUP else null end as SEC_MARGIN
   ,case when M_SE_GROUP IN ('Bond') and TRIM(SEC.M_BT_COUPON)='Floating' then 'B' else null end as FIX_RULE
   ,case when M_SE_GROUP IN ('Bond') and TRIM(SEC.M_BT_COUPON)='Floating' then UPPER(BB.M_TP_RTMFRP0) else null end as FIX_PERIO
   ,case 
    when TRIM(SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP)='Mutual Fund - Equity' then 'MF'
    when M_SE_GROUP IN ('Bond')   then 'B' 
    when M_SE_GROUP IN ('Equity') then 'E' 
    else null end as SEC_FAMILY
   ,case 
   when TRIM(SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP)='Listed Equity' then 'T'
   --SEC.M_SE_GROUP IN ('Bond') and SEC.M_COUNTRY='SA'  and SEC.M_BT_SECTOR='Government' then 'N'  
   else 'N'  
   end as MARKETABLE
   ,case 
   when SEC.M_SE_GROUP NOT IN ('Bond') then 'Saudi_Index'
   when SEC.M_SE_GROUP IN ('Bond') and TRIM(SEC.M_BT_COUPON)='Floating' then M_SE_CUR||'_LIB_SWAP' 
   else null end as CUR_NAME
   ,case 
      when TRIM(SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP)='Mutual Fund - Equity' then 'MUTUAL_FUND'
      when SEC.M_SE_GROUP IN ('Bond') and SEC.M_COUNTRY='SA'  and SEC.M_BT_SECTOR='Government' then 'KSA_SUKUK'
      when SEC.M_SE_GROUP IN ('Bond') and SEC.M_COUNTRY<>'SA' and SEC.M_BT_SECTOR='Government' then 'SOV_SUKUK'
      when SEC.M_SE_GROUP IN ('Bond') then 'SUKUK'
      when SEC.M_SE_GROUP IN ('Equity') then 'EQUITY'
      else null end as SEC_TYPE
     ,DECODE(TRIM(SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP),'Mutual Fund - Equity','T','N') as IS_FUND
     , case
         when SEC.M_SE_GROUP IN ('Bond') and SEC.M_COUNTRY='SA'  and SEC.M_BT_SECTOR='Government' then 'Y'
         else 'N' end  as IS_LIQUID
    ,DECODE(TRIM(SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP),'Mutual Fund - Equity',MF.TOTAL,null) as TOTAL
    ,DECODE(TRIM(SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP),'Mutual Fund - Equity',null,null) as NAVPS   -- update once field is made available / logic is provided from bussiness
    ,DECODE(TRIM(SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP),'Mutual Fund - Equity',SEC.M_SE_NOUT,null) as SHARES_OUTSTANDING
    ,DECODE(TRIM(SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP),'Mutual Fund - Equity',null,null) as NAV1  -- update once field is made available / logic is provided from bussiness
    ,case when SEC.M_SE_GROUP IN ('Bond') then 'P' else 'U' end as PRICE_INDICATOR
    ,case when SEC.M_SE_GROUP IN ('Bond') then 'F' else null end as AMORTIZING_TYPE
    ,case when SEC.M_SE_GROUP IN ('Bond') then 'VANILA_BOND' else null end as LIQ_SUB_TYPE
    ---- CR#629417 - Enrichment of Moody?s ERM to cater IFRS9 data requirements  START---
			,case 
         when TRIM(BB.M_TP_ACCSCT)='AC' then 'Held to Maturity'
         when TRIM(BB.M_TP_ACCSCT)='FVTOCI' then 'Available for Sale'
         when TRIM(BB.M_TP_ACCSCT)='FVTPL' then 'Trading'
     else '' END as ATT_02
     ---- CR#629417 - Enrichment of Moody?s ERM to cater IFRS9 data requirements  END---
   --- select * from SECURITIES_REP
    from 
    SECURITIES_REP SEC
    left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
        on PARTIES.M_LABEL=SEC.M_SE_ISS and PARTIES.M_REF_DATA=SEC.M_REF_DATA
    left outer join (select distinct M_INSTRUMEN,M_REF_DATA,M_SEC_MKT_P,M_NOMINAL from PLA_LIQBDAVP_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N) LIQ
     on TRIM(SEC.M_SE_D_LABEL)=TRIM(LIQ.M_INSTRUMEN) and SEC.M_REF_DATA=LIQ.M_REF_DATA
    --left outer join 
    inner join 
    (
        select distinct TPALL.M_TP_SECLBL,TP_RT.M_TP_RTMFRP0,TPALL.M_TP_SECLOTU,TPALL.M_TP_ACCSCT,/*TPALL.M_NB,*/TPALL.M_REF_DATA from 
        --BAB_TRN_ALL_REP 
          ( 
          select M_REF_DATA,M_TP_SECLBL,M_TP_SECLOTU,'' as M_TP_ACCSCT,M_NB,M_TRN_GRP,M_TP_INT,M_TP_STATUS2
          from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP where M_INSTRUMENT IN
           (
                select M_INSTRUMENT from 
               (   select  sum(TP_ALL.M_TP_LQTY2*DECODE(TP_ALL.M_TP_BS,'B',1,-1)) AGG_QTY,TP_ALL.M_INSTRUMENT from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP  TP_ALL
                   where TP_ALL.M_TP_INT='N' and TP_ALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
                   and TRIM(TP_ALL.M_TRN_GRP) IN ('BOND','EQUIT') and TP_ALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
                   group by TP_ALL.M_INSTRUMENT
               ) where AGG_QTY>0
           )   
                   and M_TP_INT='N' and M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
                   and TRIM(M_TRN_GRP) IN ('BOND','EQUIT') and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
          )
        TPALL, SECURITIES_REP SEC,TP_RT_REP TP_RT
        where 
        TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
        and TPALL.M_TP_SECLBL=SEC.M_SE_LABEL(+) and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=SEC.M_REF_DATA(+)
        and TPALL.M_NB=TP_RT.M_NB(+) and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TP_RT.M_REF_DATA(+)
        and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N' and M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
        and TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP) IN ('BOND','EQUIT')
    ) BB
    on TRIM(BB.M_TP_SECLBL)=TRIM(SEC.M_SE_LABEL)
   
    left outer join
    (
        select distinct M_INSTRUMENT, M_MP_SPOT2
        from pla_mv_rep where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
        --and M_INSTRUMENT like '%ATEL LEASING INCOM%'
        and M_NB in (
            select MAX(M_NB) M_NB from pla_mv_rep where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N 
            and TRIM(M_TRN_GRP) in ('EQUIT')
            group by M_INSTRUMENT
        )
        --and M_INSTRUMENT like '%ATEL LEASING INCOM%'  
    ) EQ_MKT_VAL
    on TRIM(EQ_MKT_VAL.M_INSTRUMENT)=TRIM(SEC.M_SE_D_LABEL)---M_SE_D_LABEL
 /*       left outer join
    (
        select M_INSTRUMENT,sum(M_TP_NOMINAL) M_TP_NOMINAL
        from pla_mv_rep where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
        --- and M_INSTRUMENT like '%ATEL LEASING INCOM%'        
        group by M_INSTRUMENT
    ) EQ_MKT_NOM
    on TRIM(EQ_MKT_NOM.M_INSTRUMENT)=TRIM(SEC.M_SE_D_LABEL)*/
    
       left outer join
    (
        select M_INSTRUMENT,sum(ABS(M_TP_IQTYS)*M_TP_PRICE) TOTAL from 
        BAB_TRN_ALL_REP TPALL, SECURITIES_REP SEC
        where 
        TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
        and TPALL.M_TP_SECLBL=SEC.M_SE_LABEL(+) and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=SEC.M_REF_DATA(+)
        and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N' and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
        and TRIM(SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP) is not null and TRIM(SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP)='Mutual Fund - Equity'
        group by M_INSTRUMENT
    ) MF
    on TRIM(MF.M_INSTRUMENT)=TRIM(SEC.M_SE_F_NAME)---M_SE_D_LABEL
    
        left outer join
    (   
        select M_TP_SECLBL,M_REF_DATA,
        sum(ABS(case  
              when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='EQUIT' then TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2 ---*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE 
              --when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='BOND' then TPALL.M_TP_IPAY-TPALL.M_TP_ACCAMT 
              else TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL end) 
              * DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_BS),'B',1,-1) 
              ) as NOMINAL 
        from 
        BAB_TRN_ALL_REP TPALL
        where 
        TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
        and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N' and M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
        and TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP) IN ('BOND','EQUIT')
        group by M_TP_SECLBL,M_REF_DATA
     ) ALL_DEALS
     on ALL_DEALS.M_TP_SECLBL=SEC.M_SE_LABEL and ALL_DEALS.M_REF_DATA=SEC.M_REF_DATA 
     
    -----------------------  
    where 
    SEC.M_SE_GROUP IN ('Bond','Equity')
    and SEC.M_SE_TYPE IN ('Coupon','Simple')   
    and SEC.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N 
    and (ALL_DEALS.NOMINAL>0 or (ALL_DEALS.NOMINAL<0 and TRIM(PARTIES.M_CIF)='10347908'))
)

TRIM(M_DESC): PL MTM9 - Sales Income Report Request
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
-- Trade Details

SELECT
TRD.M_TP_TRADER AS SalesPerson,
TRD.M_TP_CNTRP AS Counterpart,
TRD.M_TP_PFOLIO AS Portfolio,
TRD.M_CMP_TYPO AS Trade_Typology,
TRD.M_CNT_TYPO AS Contract_Typology,
TRD.M_PKG_TYPO AS Package_Typology,
TRD.M_TP_DTETRN AS Trade_Date,
TRD.M_TP_DTEFST AS Start_Date,
TRD.M_TP_DTEEXP AS Maturity,
TRD.M_CNTLEVTDT2 AS Event_Date,
-- Specific Case for FXD to know whether buying or selling the traded currency
CASE WHEN TRD.M_TRN_GRP = 'FXD' THEN 
	CASE WHEN TRD.M_TP_FXUND = TRD.M_TP_FXTRCCY THEN TRD.M_TP_BUY ELSE 
		CASE WHEN TRD.M_TP_BUY = 'B' THEN 'S' ELSE 'B' END
	END
-- Specific Case for rates to know whether lending or borrowing (Pay / Receive) on both loegs
	ELSE CASE WHEN TRD.M_TRN_GRP = 'ASWP' OR TRD.M_TRN_GRP = 'CS' OR TRD.M_TRN_GRP = 'IRS' THEN TRD.M_TP_RTPR0 || TRD.M_TP_RTPR1 ELSE
   CASE WHEN TRD.M_TRN_GRP = 'LN_BR' THEN TRD.M_TP_RTPR0
-- Generic Case
 ELSE  TRD.M_TP_BUY_E END END END AS Buy_Sell,
TRD.M_TP_CP AS Call_Put,
TRD.M_INSTRUMENT AS Instrument,
CASE WHEN TRD.M_TRN_GRP = 'FXD' THEN TRD.M_TP_FXAVQ2 ELSE TRD.M_TP_LQTY2 END AS Nominal,
CASE WHEN TRD.M_TRN_GRP = 'FXD' THEN TRD.M_TP_FXTRCCY ELSE TRD.M_TP_NOMCUR END AS Nominal_Currency,
TRD.M_AMD_STS2 AS Status,
'Trade Capture' AS Income_Type,
'' AS Event_Type,
UDF.M_VAAMT AS Income,
UDF.M_VAAMTCCY AS Income_Currency,
TRD.M_PACKAGE AS Package_Number,
TRD.M_CONTRACT AS Contract_Number,
TRD.M_NB AS Trade_Number,
TRD.M_TP_GID AS Global_ID,
TRD.M_REP_DATE2 AS Report_Date,
TRD.M_DTETRNBEG AS Income_Date,
0 AS Event_Number

FROM TP_ALL_REP TRD
JOIN TRD_UDF_REP UDF ON (TRD.M_UDF_REF2 = UDF.M_NB AND TRD.M_REF_DATA = UDF.M_REF_DATA)
WHERE TRD.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
--the filter used for client deals
AND UDF.M_CLIENT_IND = 'Y'
-- Filter out cancelled deals
AND TRD.M_AMD_STS2 <> 'NA'
-- Filter out closed deals coming from FX Allocaation
AND NOT(TRD.M_AMD_STS2 = 'CL' AND TRD.M_CNTLEVTL2 = 'FX  Allocation')
AND TRD.M_TP_DTETRN >= @LowerIncomeDate:D
AND TRD.M_TP_DTETRN <= @UpperIncomeDate:D

UNION ALL

-- Event Details

SELECT
EVT.M_V_ACTOR AS SalesPerson,
EVT.M_TP_CNTRP AS Counterpart,
EVT.M_TP_PFOLIO AS Portfolio,
EVT.M_CMP_TYPO AS Trade_Typology,
EVT.M_CNT_TYPO AS Contract_Typology,
EVT.M_PKG_TYPO AS Package_Typology,
EVT.M_TP_DTETRN AS Trade_Date,
EVT.M_TP_DTEFST AS Start_Date,
EVT.M_TP_DTEEXP AS Maturity,
EVT.M_V_DATE AS Event_Date,
-- Specific Case for FXD to know whether buying or selling the traded currency
CASE WHEN EVT.M_TRN_GRP = 'FXD' THEN 
	CASE WHEN EVT.M_TP_FXUND = EVT.M_TP_FXTRCCY THEN EVT.M_TP_BUY ELSE 
		CASE WHEN EVT.M_TP_BUY = 'B' THEN 'S' ELSE 'B' END
	END
-- Specific Case for rates to know whether lending or borrowing (Pay / Receive) on both loegs
	ELSE CASE WHEN EVT.M_TRN_GRP = 'ASWP' OR EVT.M_TRN_GRP = 'CS' OR EVT.M_TRN_GRP = 'IRS' THEN EVT.M_TP_RTPR0 || EVT.M_TP_RTPR1 ELSE
   CASE WHEN EVT.M_TRN_GRP = 'LN_BR' THEN EVT.M_TP_RTPR0
-- Generic Case
 ELSE  EVT.M_TP_BUY_E END END END AS Buy_Sell,
EVT.M_TP_CP AS Call_Put,
EVT.M_INSTRUMENT AS Instrument,
CASE WHEN EVT.M_TRN_GRP = 'FXD' THEN EVT.M_TP_FXAVQ2 ELSE EVT.M_TP_LQTY2 END AS Nominal,
CASE WHEN EVT.M_TRN_GRP = 'FXD' THEN EVT.M_TP_FXTRCCY ELSE EVT.M_TP_NOMCUR END AS Nominal_Currency,
EVT.M_AMD_STS2 AS Status,
'Event' AS Income_Type,
-- EVT_MAPPING is not currently working, replacing the below with an CTBL horizontal field
EVT_MAP.M_DESC AS Event_Type,
--EVT.M_V_EVT_NAME AS Event_Type,
EVT_UDF.M_EVT_VAAMT AS Income,
EVT_UDF.M_EVT_VACCY AS Income_Currency,
EVT.M_PACKAGE AS Package_Number,
EVT.M_CONTRACT AS Contract_Number,
EVT.M_NB AS Trade_Number,
EVT.M_TP_GID AS Global_ID,
EVT.M_REP_DATE2 AS Report_Date,
EVT.M_DTETRNBEG AS Income_Date,
EVT.M_V_EVT_REF AS Event_Number

FROM EVT_HIS_REP EVT
JOIN TRD_UDF_REP TRD_UDF ON (EVT.M_REF_DATA = TRD_UDF.M_REF_DATA AND EVT.M_UDF_REF2 = TRD_UDF.M_NB )
JOIN EVT_UDF_REP EVT_UDF ON (EVT.M_REF_DATA = EVT_UDF.M_REF_DATA AND EVT.M_V_EVT_REF = EVT_UDF.M_REFERENCE)
JOIN EVT_MAPPING_REP EVT_MAP ON (EVT.M_V_EVT_CLS = EVT_MAP.M_ID AND EVT.M_REF_DATA = EVT_MAP.M_REF_DATA)
WHERE EVT.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
-- The filter used for client deals
AND TRD_UDF.M_CLIENT_IND = 'Y'
-- Filter out cancelled deals
AND EVT.M_AMD_STS2 <> 'NA'
-- Filter in relevant events needed for the scope
AND EVT.M_V_EVT_CLS IN (
'1.512', -- ETU Modify
'1.516',  -- EXT Modify
'1.373',  -- Restructure   
'1.371',  -- Unwind   
'My',     -- Rate Amendmend   
'MySEc59594', -- Capital Decrease
'MXfLV51005' -- Capital Increase
)
-- AND EVT.M_V_EVT_CLS <> '1.220'
AND EVT.M_TP_INT = 'N'
AND EVT.M_V_ACTION <> 8
AND EVT.M_V_EVTSTLCV = 0
AND EVT.M_V_DATE >= @LowerIncomeDate:D
AND EVT.M_V_DATE <= @UpperIncomeDate:D

BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
-- This report is based on a PLVar report called ALLM_REPORTS.
-- It allows the user to explain the cause of the variation between one date and another.
-- It is from the view called: MX_ALL_PL Variance MtM (report-write)

-- One more condition is about the PTF: M_TP_PFOLIO@MxAuthorizedPortfolio:C
--Meaning that the user can see only the pportfolio on which he has access to.
select 
--M_START_DAT as START_DATE,
M_END_DATE as END_DATE,
M_EFFECT as EFFECT,
M_HORIZON as HORIZON,
M_ORIGIN_CU as ORIG_CCY,
M_PORTFOLIO as PORTFOLIO,
M_EFFECT_DE as EFFECT_DETAIL,
M_TYPOLOGY as PRODUCT,
M_INSTRUMEN as INSTRUMENT,
M_CURRENCY as CCY,
M_ORIGIN_RE as CONTRACT,
M_CONTRACT_ as CNT_VERSION,
M_REFERENCE as REFERENCE,
M_TRADE_NUM as TRADE_ID,
M_SOURCE as SOURCE,
M_P_L_VARIA as PL_VARIATION,
M_GLOBAL_ID as GLOBAL_ID,
M_ENTRY_DET as ENTRY_DETAIL,
M_CCP as CCP,
M_TENOR as TENOR,
M_EVALUATIO as EVALUATIONTYPE
from PLVARP_MRATES_REP
where
   M_REF_DATA in (
   -- selecting all datasets generated by the user running the extraction
   select M_REF_DATA 
   from DYN_AUDIT_REP 
   where 
   M_DELETED='N' 
   and M_OUTPUTTBL='PLVARP_MRATES.REP' 
   and M_USER=MxGetUser()
   and M_TAG_DATA='U_PLVAR' -- this is the value hardcoded in Batch of feeders (all users use same label of data)
   )
   and
   M_PORTFOLIO@MxAuthorizedPortfolio:C
   and M_PORTFOLIO=@MxPortfolio:C

TRIM(M_DESC): ERS Net position report
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select 
TP.M_TP_CNTRP 			as COUNTERPART_LABEL,
TP.M_NB 				as TRADE_NUMBER,
SEC.M_SE_F_NAME 		as SECURITY_FULL_NAME,
TP.M_TP_SECCOD 			as ISIN,
TP.M_INSTRUMENT 		as INSTRUMENT,
TP.M_C_CUR_PL 			as PL_CUR,
case 
    WHEN TP.M_TP_RTPR0 ='P' THEN TP.M_TP_LQTY2
									ELSE TP.M_TP_LQTY2*(-1) 
END as QUANTITY,
TP_COMP.M_TP_RTFXC02 as REFERENCE_PRICE,
case 
    WHEN TP.M_TP_RTPR0 ='P' THEN TP.M_TP_LQTY2* TP_COMP.M_TP_RTFXC02
									ELSE TP.M_TP_LQTY2*TP_COMP.M_TP_RTFXC02*(-1) 
END as POSITION_VALUE
FROM TP_ALL_REP TP, SECURITIES_REP SEC, TP_COMP_REP TP_COMP
WHERE SEC.M_SE_D_LABEL=TP.M_INSTRUMENT
AND TP.M_REF_DATA = SEC.M_REF_DATA
AND TP.M_REF_DATA = TP_COMP.M_REF_DATA
AND TP.M_NB = TP_COMP.M_NB
AND TP.M_TP_PFOLIO = TP_COMP.M_TP_PFOLIO
AND TP.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
and TP.M_TP_PFOLIO@MxAuthorizedPortfolio:C

TRIM(M_DESC): ERS Events report
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select
DETAILS.M_TP_CNTRP as COUNTERPART_LABEL,
DETAILS.M_NB as TRADE_NUMBER,
DETAILS.M_EVT_ID as EVENT_REFERENCE,
case 
    when DETAILS.M_TP_RTPR0='P' then 'Buyer'
    else 'Seller'
end as BUYER_SELLER,
DETAILS.M_LB_TRD_D as TRADE_CLOSING_DATE,
DETAILS.M_LB_DEL_D as EFFECTIVE_TERMINATION_DATE,
DETAILS.M_CD_CUR as CONTRACT_CURRENCY,
SEC.M_SE_F_NAME as SECURITIES,
DETAILS.M_INSTRUMENT as RIC_CODE,
SEC.M_SE_MARKET as EXCHANGE,
case
    when DETAILS.M_EVT_TYPE='Opening' then DETAILS.M_LB_NEW_Q
    else DETAILS.M_LB_RET_Q
end as QUANTITY,
case
    when DETAILS.M_EVT_TYPE='Opening' then 'Opening'
    when DETAILS.M_EVT_TYPE='Shares modification'  and DETAILS.M_LB_RET_Q > 0 then 'Increase'
    when DETAILS.M_EVT_TYPE='Shares modification'  and DETAILS.M_LB_RET_Q < 0 then 'Decrease'
    when DETAILS.M_EVT_TYPE='Early termination Total R' then 'Closing'
    when DETAILS.M_EVT_TYPE='Rate amendment'  then 'Re-rate'
end as O_I_C_D,
DETAILS.M_LB_PRICE as PRICE,
DETAILS.M_CD_MARG as CARRY_SPREAD,
DETAILS.M_TP_RTMNDD1 as APPLICABLE_INTEREST_RATE,
DETAILS.M_TP_RTDPF0 as DIVIDEND_RATIO
from EVT_DETAILS_REP DETAILS, SECURITIES_REP SEC
where DETAILS.M_REF_DATA=SEC.M_REF_DATA
and DETAILS.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
and SEC.M_SE_D_LABEL=DETAILS.M_INSTRUMENT

TRIM(M_DESC): SQL query for the PV01 PAR reports
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select M_CURRENCY as Currency,
M_CURVE_NAM as Curve_name,
M_TYPOLOGY as TYPOLOGY,
M_PL_INSTRU as PL_INSTRUMENT,
M_DAILY as DAILY,
M_BUCKET as Bucket,
M_BUCKETD as Bucket_Date,
M_INSTRUMEN as Instrument,
M_CONTRACT_ as contract,
M_TRADE_NUM as TRADE_NUMBER,
M_DISC_FWD as Disc_Fwd,
M_TODAY_CF_ as Today_CF_Other,
M_SENSI_CRO as Sensi_Cross,
M_PV01__PAR as PV01_PAR
,case 
when UPPER(TRIM(M_BUCKET))='O/N' then 1                                                           
when UPPER(TRIM(M_BUCKET))='S/N' then 2                                                            
when UPPER(TRIM(M_BUCKET))='T/N' then 3 
when UPPER(TRIM(M_BUCKET)) like '%M-%' then 4000+REGEXP_SUBSTR(M_BUCKET,'^[^M]+')+.5                                                      
when UPPER(SUBSTR(M_BUCKET,length(TRIM(M_BUCKET)),1))='D' then 2000+REGEXP_SUBSTR(M_BUCKET,'^[^D]+')
when UPPER(SUBSTR(M_BUCKET,length(TRIM(M_BUCKET)),1))='W' then 3000+REGEXP_SUBSTR(M_BUCKET,'^[^W]+')
when UPPER(SUBSTR(M_BUCKET,length(TRIM(M_BUCKET)),1))='M' then 4000+REGEXP_SUBSTR(M_BUCKET,'^[^M]+')
when UPPER(SUBSTR(M_BUCKET,length(TRIM(M_BUCKET)),1))='Y' then 5000+REGEXP_SUBSTR(M_BUCKET,'^[^Y]+')
else 6000
end as pillar_order
from PV01_PAR_REP
where  M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N

TRIM(M_DESC): PO03-PositionRepair Extraction
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select distinct
  T.M_TRADE_NUM as M_TRADE_NUM
from
  (
    select 
      T1.M_TRADE_NUM as M_TRADE_NUM
    from 
      POS_REP_DET_REP T1
    left join POS_REP_CONS_REP T2 on (T1.M_STRADE_NUM=T2.M_STRADE_NUM and T1.M_PORTFOLIO=T2.M_PORTFOLIO and T1.M_CURRENCY=T2.M_CURRENCY)
      where T2.M_TRADE_NUM is NULL
      and
        (
          ABS(T1.M_CAPITAL)     >0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_CASH)     >0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_FINANCING)>0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_MV)       >0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_PV_EFFECT)>0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_P_L__ABS_)>0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_REVENUES) >0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_FEE)      >0.01
        )
        AND
        (
          ABS(T1.M_CAPITAL)     >0.01
          or T1.M_CASH          =0
          or ABS(T1.M_FINANCING)>0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_MV)       >0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_PV_EFFECT)>0.01
          or T1.M_P_L__ABS_     =0
          or ABS(T1.M_REVENUES) >0.01
          or T1.M_FEE           =0
        )
    union

    select 
          T1.M_TRADE_NUM as M_TRADE_NUM
        from 
           POS_REP_CONS_REP T1
        left join POS_REP_DET_REP T2 on (T1.M_STRADE_NUM=T2.M_STRADE_NUM and T1.M_PORTFOLIO=T2.M_PORTFOLIO and T1.M_CURRENCY=T2.M_CURRENCY)
          where T2.M_TRADE_NUM is NULL
        and
        (
          ABS(T1.M_CAPITAL)     >0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_CASH)     >0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_FINANCING)>0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_MV)       >0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_PV_EFFECT)>0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_P_L__ABS_)>0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_REVENUES) >0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_FEE)      >0.01
        )
        AND T1.M_TRADE_NUM<>0
        AND
        (
          ABS(T1.M_CAPITAL)     >0.01
          or T1.M_CASH          =0
          or ABS(T1.M_FINANCING)>0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_MV)       >0.01
          or ABS(T1.M_PV_EFFECT)>0.01
          or T1.M_P_L__ABS_     =0
          or ABS(T1.M_REVENUES) >0.01
          or T1.M_FEE           =0
        )
     
    union
    select distinct
      T1.M_TRADE_NUM
    from
      POS_REP_CONS_REP T1
    , POS_REP_DET_REP  T2
    where
      (
        (
          T1.M_TRADE_NUM     IS NULL
          and T2.M_TRADE_NUM IS NULL
        )
        or
        (
          (
            T1.M_TRADE_NUM
          )
          =(T2.M_TRADE_NUM)
        )
      )
      and
      (
        (
          T1.M_PORTFOLIO     IS NULL
          and T2.M_PORTFOLIO IS NULL
        )
        or
        (
          (
            T1.M_PORTFOLIO
          )
          =(T2.M_PORTFOLIO)
        )
      )
      and
      (
        (
          T1.M_CURRENCY     IS NULL
          and T2.M_CURRENCY IS NULL
        )
        or
        (
          (
            T1.M_CURRENCY
          )
          =(T2.M_CURRENCY)
        )
      )
      AND
      (
        (
          ABS(T1.M_CASH - T2.M_CASH) >=1
        )
        or
        (
          ABS(T1.M_CAPITAL- T2.M_CAPITAL) >=1
        )
        or
        (
          ABS(T1.M_FINANCING- T2.M_FINANCING) >=1
        )
        or
        (
          ABS(T1.M_MV- T2.M_MV) >=1
        )
        or
        (
          ABS(T1.M_PV_EFFECT- T2.M_PV_EFFECT) >=1
        )
        or
        (
          ABS(T1.M_P_L__ABS_- T2.M_P_L__ABS_) >=1
        )
        or
        (
          ABS(T1.M_REVENUES- T2.M_REVENUES) >=1
        )
        or
        (
          ABS(T1.M_FEE- T2.M_FEE) >=1
        )
      )
  )
  T

, TRN.M_MF         as MF
, TRN.M_MFURGND    as MFUNMARGINED
, TRN.M_SUPDURATN  as SUPDURATION
, TRN.M_MATURDATE  as MATURITYDATE
, TRN.M_COLLAT     as COLLAT
, TRN.M_EFNTNL     as EFNTNL
, NBCONTRACTS.MSNBCONTRACTS 	as MSNBCONTRACTS
,
   --if NETSETCNTt>1, use AddonTradeUnmargined, else AddonTrade
  case
    when NETLEVEL.M_NETSETCNT > 1
      then TRN.M_ADDONTRDUR
      else TRN.M_ADDONTRADE
  end as ADDONTRADE
, abs
    (
      case
        when NETLEVEL.M_NETSETCNT > 1
          then TRN.M_ADDONTRDUR
          else TRN.M_ADDONTRADE
      end
    )
                        as ABSADDONTRADE
, TRN.M_ADDONTRDUR      as ADDONTRDUR
, abs(TRN.M_ADDONTRDUR) as ABSADDONTRDUR
, TRN.M_PNTNL           as PNTNL
, TRN.M_TRADEDATE       as TRADEDATE
, TRN.M_TRADEICA        as TRADEICA
,
   --NETLEVEL table returns the Margin set level data (M_NETTINGLEV = 1)
  NETLEVEL.M_EADUNCAPD  as NETEADUNCAPPED
, NETLEVEL.M_EADURGND   as NETEADUNMARGINED
, NETLEVEL.M_EAD        as NETEAD
, NETLEVEL.M_RPMCOST    as NETRC
, NETLEVEL.M_RPMCOSTURD as NETRCURGND
,
   --if NETSETCNTt>1, use PFEMultipleNettingSet, else PFE
  case
    when NETLEVEL.M_NETSETCNT > 1
      then NETLEVEL.M_PFEMULTI
      else NETLEVEL.M_PFE
  end as NETPFE
, case
    when NETLEVEL.M_NETSETCNT > 1
      then NETLEVEL.M_PFEMULTI
      else NETLEVEL.M_PFEURGND
  end                   as NETPFEURGND
, NETLEVEL.M_MV         as NETMV
, NETLEVEL.M_COLLATERAL as NETCOLLATERAL
,
   --TOTALS table returns aggregate calculations across all data. e.g. TOTALRC= sum(RCGross_i)
  TOTALS.TOTALRC    as TOTALRC
, TOTALS.TOTALADDON as TOTALADDON
, TOTALS.TOTALABSMV as TOTALABSMV
from
  ERM_SACCR_TRN_REP TRN
  join
    ERM_SACCR_UTIL_REP NETLEVEL
    on
      (
        NETLEVEL.M_REF_DATA       = TRN.M_REF_DATA
        and NETLEVEL.M_NETGRP0    = TRN.M_NETGRP0
        and NETLEVEL.M_CTRP       = TRN.M_CTRP
        and NETLEVEL.M_ENTITY     = TRN.M_ENTITY
        and NETLEVEL.M_NETTINGLEV = 1
      )
  join -- TOTALS
    (
      select
        CONTRACT.M_CTRP as M_CTRP
      , CONTRACT.M_ENTITY as M_ENTITY
      , CONTRACT.M_NETGRP0 as M_NETGRP0
      , CONTRACT.M_REF_DATA   as M_REF_DATA
      , sum(abs(CONTRACT.MV)) as TOTALABSMV
      , sum
          (
            case
              when CONTRACT.MV > 0
                then CONTRACT.MV
                else 0
            end
          )
        as TOTALRC
      ,
         --if NETSETCNTt>1, use AddonTrade, else AddonTrade Unmargined
        sum
          (
            case
              when ADDON.EAD = ADDON.EADUNCAPPED
                then
                case
                  when ADDON.NETSETCNT > 1
                    then CONTRACT.TRADEADDONUR
                    else CONTRACT.TRADEADDON
                end
                else abs(CONTRACT.TRADEADDONUR)
            end
          )
        as TOTALADDON
      from
        -- CONTRACTS
        (
          select
            TRN.M_CTRP			       as M_CTRP
          , TRN.M_ENTITY			   as M_ENTITY
          , TRN.M_NETGRP0			   as M_NETGRP0
          , TRN.M_CONTRACT			   as M_CONTRACT
          , TRN.M_REF_DATA             as M_REF_DATA
          , sum(TRN.M_MV)              as MV
          , sum(abs(TRN.M_ADDONTRDUR)) as TRADEADDONUR
          , sum(abs(TRN.M_ADDONTRADE)) as TRADEADDON
          from
            ERM_SACCR_TRN_REP TRN
          where
            TRN.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
          group by
            TRN.M_CTRP
          , TRN.M_ENTITY
          , TRN.M_NETGRP0
          , TRN.M_CONTRACT
          , TRN.M_REF_DATA
        )
        CONTRACT
        -- ADDON
        join
          (
            select
              UTIL.M_CTRP	   as M_CTRP
			, UTIL.M_ENTITY	   as M_ENTITY
			, UTIL.M_NETGRP0   as M_NETGRP0
            , UTIL.M_NETGRP1   as M_NETGRP1
            , UTIL.M_EADUNCAPD as EADUNCAPPED
            , UTIL.M_EAD       as EAD
            , UTIL.M_NETSETCNT as NETSETCNT
            , UTIL.M_REF_DATA  as M_REF_DATA
            from
              ERM_SACCR_UTIL_REP UTIL
            where
              UTIL.M_NETTINGLEV  = 1
              and UTIL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
          )
          ADDON
          on
            (
              ADDON.M_NETGRP0      = CONTRACT.M_NETGRP0
			  							and ADDON.M_CTRP     = CONTRACT.M_CTRP
			  							and ADDON.M_ENTITY   = CONTRACT.M_ENTITY
              and ADDON.M_REF_DATA = CONTRACT.M_REF_DATA
            )
      group by
        CONTRACT.M_CTRP
      , CONTRACT.M_ENTITY
      , CONTRACT.M_NETGRP0
      , CONTRACT.M_REF_DATA
    )
    TOTALS
    on
      (
        TRN.M_REF_DATA    = TOTALS.M_REF_DATA
        and TRN.M_CTRP    = TOTALS.M_CTRP
        and TRN.M_ENTITY  = TOTALS.M_ENTITY
        and TRN.M_NETGRP0 = TOTALS.M_NETGRP0
      )
  left join -- NBCONTRACTS
     (
	 select TRN.M_CTRP as M_CTRP,
           TRN.M_ENTITY as M_ENTITY,
           TRN.M_NETGRP0 as M_NETGRP0,
		   TRN.M_REF_DATA  as M_REF_DATA,
		   count (distinct TRN.M_CONTRACT)	as MSNBCONTRACTS			   
    from ERM_SACCR_TRN_REP TRN  
    where TRN.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
    group by 
        TRN.M_CTRP,
         TRN.M_ENTITY,
         TRN.M_NETGRP0,
		TRN.M_REF_DATA 		   
   )
   NBCONTRACTS
   on
   (
        TRN.M_REF_DATA    = NBCONTRACTS.M_REF_DATA
        and TRN.M_CTRP    = NBCONTRACTS.M_CTRP
        and TRN.M_ENTITY  = NBCONTRACTS.M_ENTITY
        and TRN.M_NETGRP0 = NBCONTRACTS.M_NETGRP0
      )
   
where
  TRN.M_COLPOSTYPE = '' and
  TRN.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N

TRIM(M_DESC): SQL Request for SACCR TRN reports
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
SELECT
TRN.M_CONTRACT  		as CONTRACT,
TRN.M_TRNKEY			as TRNKEY,
TRN.M_CTRP  				as COUNTERPARTY,
TRN.M_ENTITY  		as ENTITY,
TRN.M_TYPOLOGY 		as TYPOLOGY,
TRN.M_NETGRP0 		as NETTINGGROUP0,
TRN.M_NETGRP1 		as NETTINGGROUP1,
TRN.M_NETGRP2		as NETTINGGROUP2,
TRN.M_NETGRP3 		as NETTINGGROUP3,
TRN.M_NETGRP4 		as NETTINGGROUP4,
TRN.M_MV							 		as MV,
TRN.M_ENDDATE 		as ENDDATE,	
TRN.M_STARTDATE 		as STARTDATE,
TRN.M_EFNTNL	 	as EFNTNL,
TRN.M_ADJNTNL	 	as ADJNTNL,
TRN.M_DELTAADJ	 	as DELTAADJ,
TRN.M_SUPFACTOR 		as SUPFACTOR,
TRN.M_SUBCLASS	 	as SUBCLASS,
TRN.M_MF		as MF,
TRN.M_MFURGND		as MFUNMARGINED,
TRN.M_SUPDURATN	 	as SUPDURATION,
TRN.M_MATURDATE 		as MATURITYDATE,
TRN.M_COLLAT		as COLLAT,
TRN.M_PREHCCOL		as PREHCCOLLAT,
TRN.M_COLHAIRCUT		as COLLATHAIRCUT,
TRN.M_ADDONTRADE 		as ADDONTRADE,	
TRN.M_ADDONTRDUR		as ADDONTRDUR,
TRN.M_PNTNL 		as PNTNL,
TRN.M_TRADEDATE		as TRADEDATE,
TRN.M_TRADEICA 		as TRADEICA,
cast(TRN.M_INSTRUMENT as char(99))		as INSTRUMENT,
cast(TRN.M_COLPOSTYPE	as char(99)) 	as COLLATPOSTYPE,
cast(TRN.M_COLBALTYPE	as char(99))  as COLLATBALTYPE,
  --if  Margin set level EAD = Margin set level EAD Uncapped then (if NetSetCount>1, use AddonTradeUnmargined, else AddonTrade) else use AddonTradeUnmargined
(case 
  when MRGLEVEL.M_EAD = MRGLEVEL.M_EADUNCAPD then
    (case
        when MRGLEVEL.M_NETSETCNT > 1 then TRN.M_ADDONTRADE
        else TRN.M_ADDONTRDUR
     end) 
  else TRN.M_ADDONTRADE 
end ) as USEDADDONTRADE
 
 from 
 ERM_SACCR_TRN_REP TRN
 join ERM_SACCR_UTIL_REP MRGLEVEL on
 (MRGLEVEL.M_NETGRP0 = TRN.M_NETGRP0
 and MRGLEVEL.M_CTRP = TRN.M_CTRP
 and MRGLEVEL.M_ENTITY = TRN.M_ENTITY
 and TRN.M_REF_DATA = MRGLEVEL.M_REF_DATA)
where
TRN.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
and MRGLEVEL.M_NETTINGLEV = 1

TRIM(M_DESC): SQL Request for SACCR UTIL reports
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select
UTIL.M_CTRP                  			as CTRP,
UTIL.M_ENTITY        as ENTITY,
UTIL.M_MV            as MV,
UTIL.M_MVMAX             as MVMAX,
UTIL.M_MVMIN             as MVMIN,
UTIL.M_PREHCCOL         	as PREHCCOLLATERAL,
UTIL.M_COLLATERAL         	as COLLATERAL,
UTIL.M_TRADEICA           	as TRADEICA,
UTIL.M_NETSETCNT 				as NETSETCOUNT,
UTIL.M_NICA            as NICA,
UTIL.M_MTAPLUSTH        		as MTAPLUSTHRE,
UTIL.M_RPMCOST        		as RPLCMNTCOST,
UTIL.M_RPMCOSTURD             as RPLCMNTCURGND, 
UTIL.M_ADDONTRADE             as ADDONTRADE, 
UTIL.M_ADDON             as ADDON, 
UTIL.M_PFE    			as PFE, 
UTIL.M_ADDONTRDUR         		as ADDONTRADEURGND,
UTIL.M_ADDONURGND           	as ADDONURGND,
UTIL.M_PFEURGND      			as PFEURGND,
UTIL.M_PFEMULTI        		as PFEMULTI,
UTIL.M_EADUNCAPD             as EADUNCAPPED,
UTIL.M_EADURGND         	as	EADUNMARGINED,
UTIL.M_EAD     			as EAD,
UTIL.M_DELTAADJ  				as DELTAADJ,
UTIL.M_EFNTNL 				as EFNTNL,
UTIL.M_MULTIPLIER 				as MULTIPLIER,
UTIL.M_MULTIPLIUR 				as MULTIPLIERURGND,
UTIL.M_NETTINGLEV  			as NETTINGLEV,
UTIL.M_NETGRP0 		as NETTINGGROUP0,
UTIL.M_NETGRP1 			as NETTINGGROUP1,
UTIL.M_NETGRP2 			as NETTINGGROUP2,
UTIL.M_NETGRP3 			as NETTINGGROUP3,
UTIL.M_NETGRP4 			as NETTINGGROUP4,
-- if EAD= EADUncapped USEDPFE=PFE Uncapped else USEDPFE=PFE Unmargined 
(case 
  when UTIL.M_EAD = UTIL.M_EADUNCAPD then
  -- if Multi Netting Set > 1 PFE=PFE MultipleNettingSets else PFE=PFE Uncapped 
    (case
        when UTIL.M_NETSETCNT > 1 then UTIL.M_PFEMULTI
        else UTIL.M_PFE
     end) 
  else 
  (case
        when UTIL.M_NETSETCNT > 1 then UTIL.M_PFEMULTI
        else UTIL.M_PFEURGND
     end) 
end ) as USEDPFE,
-- if EAD= EADUncapped USEDRC= RC else USEDRC=RC Unmargined 
(case 
  when UTIL.M_EAD = UTIL.M_EADUNCAPD then
    UTIL.M_RPMCOST
  else 
  UTIL.M_RPMCOSTURD
end ) as USEDRC,
  -- if Mulri Netting Set > 1 USEDAddon=AddonUnmargined else USEDAddon=Addon 
(case 
  when UTIL.M_EAD = UTIL.M_EADUNCAPD then
   (case
        when UTIL.M_NETSETCNT > 1 then UTIL.M_ADDONURGND
        else UTIL.M_ADDON
     end)  
  else 
  UTIL.M_ADDONURGND
end ) as USEDADDON
from ERM_SACCR_UTIL_REP UTIL
where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N

TRIM(M_DESC): Substitution report sql request
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select
	M_CTP as Counterparty,--COL: Counterpart--
	M_LEGL_AGRMT as Agreement,--COL: Legal agreement--
	M_INS_DATE as Valuation_date,--COL: Insertion murex date --
	M_TYPE as Type_,--COL: Collateral exchange type--
	M_BASE_ID as ID,--COL: Collateral exchange origin ID--
	M_VERSION as Version,--COL: Collateral exchange version--
	M_REQ_TYPE as Requirement_type,--COL: Requirement type--
	case when M_COL_DIR = 'Return' then ''
	     when M_REQ_STAT = 'Partially Alloc' then 'Partially Allocated' else M_REQ_STAT end as Requirement_status,--COL: Requirement status --
	M_COL_DIR as Nature,--COL: Collateral nature--
	M_MOV_DIR as Direction,--COL: Movement direction
	M_ASSET_TYPE as Instrument_type,--COL: Asset type --
	M_INSTRUMENT as Instrument,--COL: Instrument --
	M_QUANTITY as Quantity,--COL: Quantity --
	M_FX_RATE as FX_rate,--COL: FX rate --
   M_PRICE as Price,--COL: Price --
	M_LOT_SIZE as Lot_size,--COL: Lot size --
	M_AS_COL_VAL as Collateral_value,--COL: Asset collateral value --
	M_HAIRCUT as Haircut, --COL: Haircut--
	M_SETTLEDATE as Settlement_date, --COL: Valuation date --
   M_PORTFOLIO as Account, -- Account name
   M_TTL_SUBVAL as TotSubtValue, -- Total substituted value
   M_CCY as ColExchCurrency, -- Collateral exchange currency
   M_PROC_DATE as Processing_date
from
	COL_EXC_ALLOC_REP 

where

	(M_TYPE = 'Substitution' or
	M_TYPE = 'Requested substitution') and
	M_DSPT_STAT<>'Cancelled' and
	M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N

SELECT
A.M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
A.M_AS_OF_DATE AS AS_OF_DATE,
A.M_TABLE_NAME AS TABLE_NAME,
A.M_MX_START_TIME AS MX_START_TIME,
B.M_MX_END_TIME AS MX_END_TIME,
B.M_MX_STATUS AS MX_STATUS
FROM 
	ACC_CONTROL_HIST_REP A
INNER JOIN 	ACC_CONTROL_HIST_REP B ON A.M_AS_OF_DATE = B.M_AS_OF_DATE
WHERE A.M_MX_STATUS = 'P' AND B.M_MX_STATUS = 'S'
AND TRIM(A.M_TABLE_NAME) = TRIM(B.M_TABLE_NAME)

select

INV.M_CLOSINGMV	as ClosingMV,

 when INV.M_POSITIONS = 'Theoretica' then 'Theoretical' 
 else INV.M_POSITIONS
end	as PositionSource,
case
 when INV.M_POSITIONT = 'Held_InTra' then 'Held in Transit'
 when INV.M_POSITIONT = 'Pledged_In' then 'Pledged in Transit'
 else  INV.M_POSITIONT
end as PositionType,

INV.M_PRICECURR	as PriceCurrency,
INV.M_SECAREADE	as SecAreaDefinition,
INV.M_SECCATEGO	as SecCategoryx,
INV.M_SECCURREN	as SecCurrency,
INV.M_SECISIN	as SecISIN,
INV.M_SECISSUE1	as SecIssuerCtry,
INV.M_SECISSUE2	as SecIssuerSector,
INV.M_SECISSUER	as SecIssuer,
INV.M_SECLABEL	as SecLabel,
INV.M_SECMATURI	as SecMaturity,
INV.M_SECSECTOR	as SecSector,
INV.M_SECSENIOR	as SecSeniority,
INV.M_SECCOUNTR as SecCountry,
INV.M_SECTYPE	as SecType,
INV.M_REQCURREN as ReqCurrency,
INV.M_SUBPOOL as Subpool,
INV.M_TRIPARTYA as Triparty,
case
	when AST.M_QUOT_MOD = 0 then 'Bid'
	else 'Mid' end as QuoteMode,

	when RA1.M_RATING <>'' then RA1.M_RATING
   else '' end as IssueRating ,

	when RA1.M_RATING_A <>'' then RA1.M_RATING_A 
   else '' end as IssueRatingAgency

left join COL_ASSET_COL_REP  AST    on (INV.M_COLLATERA = AST.M_LABEL and INV.M_REF_DATA = AST.M_REF_DATA)
left join COL_SECURITIES_REP  SEC    on (INV.M_SECLABEL  = SEC.M_SE_LABEL and INV.M_REF_DATA = SEC.M_REF_DATA)

left join COL_PARTIES_REP        PRTY  on (INV.M_SECISSUER = PRTY.M_CTP_LABEL  and INV.M_REF_DATA = PRTY.M_REF_DATA)

BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select * from (
				 select 
      T1.M_CMP_TYPO as TradeTypology,
      T1.M_CNT_TYPO as ContractTypology ,
      T1.M_CONTRACT as Contract,
      T1.M_NB as Trade_Number,
      T1.M_TP_BLEI as LegalEntityIdentifier,
      T1.M_TP_CNTRP as Counterparty,
      T1.M_TP_CNTRPID as CntrpyID ,
      T1.M_TP_DTETRN as Tradedate,
      T1.M_TP_PFOLIO as Portfolio,
      
      (case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV0='V' ) then T1.M_TP_RTDCN02
           else case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV1='V' )  then T1.M_TP_RTDCN12
                     else T1.M_TP_RTDCN02
                end
      end)as COUPON_PER,
      
      (case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV0='F' ) then T1. M_TP_RTMRTE0
       
           else case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV1='F' )  then T1. M_TP_RTMRTE1
                     else 0
                end
      end)as COUPON_RATE,
      
      (case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV0='F' ) then  T1.M_TP_RTMCNV0
       ----LTRIM( SUBSTR( T1.M_TP_RTMCNV0,INSTR(T1.M_TP_RTMCNV0,' '),15))
      
           else case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV1='F' )  then T1.M_TP_RTMCNV0 
        ----LTRIM(SUBSTR( T1.M_TP_RTMCNV0, INSTR(T1.M_TP_RTMCNV1,' '),15))
                     else ''
                end
      end)as DAY_COUNT,
      
      (case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV0='V' ) then T1.M_TP_RTMNDX0
           else case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV1='V' )  then T1.M_TP_RTMNDX1
                     else ''
                end
      end)as FLOAT_INDEX_PER,
      
      (case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV0='V' ) then upper(T1.M_TP_RTMFRC0)
           else case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV1='V' )  then upper(T1.M_TP_RTMFRC1)
                     else upper(T1.M_TP_RTMFRC0)
                end
      end)as FLOAT_PAY_PER,
      
      (case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV0='V' ) then T1.M_TP_RTFXC02
           else case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV1='V' )  then T1.M_TP_RTFXC12
                     else 0
                end
      end)as FLOAT_RATE,
      
      (case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV0='V') and (T1.M_TP_RTFV1='V') then T1.M_TP_RTFXC12
           else 0
      end)as FLOAT_RATE2,
      
      (case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV0='V' ) then upper(T1.M_TP_RTMFRF0)
           else case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV1='V' )  then upper(T1.M_TP_RTMFRF1)
                     else ''
                end
      end)as FLOAT_RESET_FREQUENCY,
      
      (case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV0='V') and (T1.M_TP_RTFV1='V') then T1.M_TP_RTMNDX1
           else ''
      end)as FLOAT2_INDEX_PER,
      
      (case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV0='V' ) then T1.M_TP_RTMMRG0
           else case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV1='V' )  then T1.M_TP_RTMMRG1
                     else 0
                end
      end)as SPREAD,
      
      
      T1.M_TP_TRADER as Trader,
      T1.M_TP_TYPO as TradeCategory ,
      T1.M_TRN_FMLY as Family,
      T1.M_TRN_GRP as Group_,
      T1.M_TRN_GTYPE as GroupType,
      T1.M_TRN_TYPE as Type_,
      T1.M_REF_DATA as REF_DATA_TP,
      T2.M_COLLATERAL as collateralAgreement,
      T2.M_COLLATERA0 as collateralAgreementType,
      T2.M_COLLATERA1 as collateralCounterparty,
      T2.M_COLLATERA2 as collateralCounterpartyIA,
      T2.M_COLLATERA3 as collateralDealMaturity,
      T2.M_COLLATERA4 as collateralIACurrency,
      T2.M_COLLATERA5 as collateralISIN,
      T2.M_COLLATERA6 as collateralMTMDate,
      T2.M_COLLATERA7 as collateralMTMValue,
      T2.M_COLLATERA8 as collateralNotional1,
      T2.M_COLLATERA9 as collateralOurIA,
      T2.M_COLLATER10 as collateralPartyID,
      T2.M_COLLATER11 as collateralProductTypology,
      T2.M_COLLATER12 as collateralStartDate,
      T2.M_COLLATER13 as collateralTradeCurrency,
      T2.M_COLLATER14 as collateralTradeDate,
      T2.M_COLLATER15 as collateralTradeID,
      --T2.M_COLLATER16 as Collateral_LEI,
      --T2.M_COLLATER17 as Collateral_MTM_Curr,
      --T2.M_COLLATER18 as Collateral_TradeCategory,
      --T2.M_COLLATER19 as Collateral_Trade_Curr2,
      T2.M_ENGINEDATE as EngineDate,
      T2.M__VCOLLATE0 as COLLATERAL_TRADE_ID_NUM,
      T2.M__VCOLLATER as COLLATERAL_FEEDER,
      T2.M_REF_DATA as REF_DATA_MLC,
      
      (case 
      when ((T2.M_COLLATERAL is NULL) and (T2.M_COLLATERA0 is NULL) ) or (T2.M__VCOLLATER='MX') then   'MX'
           else  'EXT'
      end) SOURCE,
      
      (case when ((T2.M_COLLATERA1 is NULL) and (T1.M_TP_CNTRP is not NULL))  then T1.M_TP_CNTRP
           else  case when ( (T1.M_TP_CNTRP is NULL) and (T2.M_COLLATERA1 is not NULL))  then T2.M_COLLATERA1
           else T1.M_TP_CNTRP
           end
      end) as COUNTERPART,
      
      
      (case when ((T2.M_COLLATERA1 is NULL) and (T1.M_CNT_TYPO is not NULL))  then T1.M_CNT_TYPO
           else  case when ( (T1.M_CNT_TYPO is NULL) and (T2.M_COLLATERA1 is not NULL) and (T2.M_COLLATER13 is not NULL) )  then T2.M_COLLATER13
           else T1.M_CNT_TYPO
           end
      end) as CONTRACT_TYPOLOGY,
      
      
      case when T2.M_COLLATER15 is NULL  then 'Uncollaterized'
           else T2.M_COLLATER15
      end as  COLLATERIZED
      ,T3.M_MXAGREEMEN as AGGREMENT_STATUS  --- Added as per user request to remove inactive collateral details
      
      from 
      
      COL_MLC_TRIRESOL_REP T2  left   join  COL_TP_REP T1
      on  
      ( T1.M_NB = to_number(trim( T2.M__VCOLLATE0)) and T1.M_REF_DATA =  T2.M_REF_DATA
      )
      --- Added as per user request to remove inactive collateral details
      left join COL_AGREEMENT_REP T3
      on TRIM(T2.M_COLLATERAL)=TRIM(SUBSTR(T3.M_NAME,0,15)) and T2.M_REF_DATA = T3.M_REF_DATA 
      
      where T1.M_REF_DATA =@MxDataSetKey:N 

) where TRIM(AGGREMENT_STATUS)='Y'  --- Added as per user request to remove inactive collateral details

TRIM(M_DESC): Margin Call report request
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
SELECT 
    FDR6c.M_CTP AS Counterparty,
    FDR6c.M_LEGL_AGRMT AS Collateral_agreement,
    FDR6c.M_VAL_DATE AS Valuation_date,
    FDR6c.M_TYPE AS Object_type,
    FDR6c.M_BASE_ID AS ID,
    FDR6c.M_VERSION AS Version,
    FDR6c.M_MOV_DIR AS Direction,
    FDR6c.M_COL_DIR AS Nature,
    FDR6c.M_REQ_TYPE AS Requirement_type,
    FDR6c.M_REQ_CCY AS Currency,
    FDR6c.M_AMNT_AGRED AS Agreed_amount,
    CAST (CASE RTRIM(FDR6c.M_REQ_STAT) WHEN 'Partially Alloc' THEN 'Partially Allocated' ELSE FDR6c.M_REQ_STAT END AS VARCHAR (20)) AS Requirement_status,
    FDR6c.M_PORTFOLIO AS Account,
    FDR6c.M_INSTRUMENT AS Instrument,
    FDR6c.M_QUANTITY AS Quantity,
    FDR6c.M_FX_RATE AS FX_Rate,
    CASE FDR6c.M_ASSET_TYPE WHEN 'Currency' THEN null ELSE FDR6c.M_PRICE END AS Price,
    FDR6c.M_HAIRCUT AS Haircut,
    FDR6c.M_AS_COL_VAL AS Collateral_value,
    FDR6c.M_SETTLEDATE AS Value_date,
    FDR6c.M_ASSET_TYPE AS Asset_type,
    FDR6c.M_CONTEXT AS Agreement_type,
    FDR6c.M_PROC_DATE as Processing_date
FROM 
    COL_EXC_ALLOC_REP FDR6c
    LEFT JOIN COL_PARTIES_REP FDR3 ON (FDR3.M_CTP_LABEL=FDR6c.M_CTP AND FDR3.M_REF_DATA=FDR6c.M_REF_DATA)
    LEFT JOIN COL_ORCH_AUDIT_REP FDR9 ON (FDR6c.M_RUN_ID=FDR9.M_RUN_ID_FK AND FDR6c.M_REF_DATA=FDR9.M_REF_DATA)

WHERE
    FDR6c.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
    AND (FDR6c.M_TYPE='Margin call' OR FDR6c.M_TYPE='Expected margin call')
    --AND FDR6c.M_GLB_STAT <> 'Cancelled'
    AND TRIM(FDR6c.M_GLB_STAT) not in ('Cancelled','Canceled')

SELECT 
CASE 
  WHEN COUNTERPARTY != 'ALL'
    AND REM_TR_BID_SPREAD IS NULL 
    AND REM_TR_ASK_SPREAD IS NULL 
    AND REM_CUST_BID_SPREAD IS NULL 
    AND REM_CUST_ASK_SPREAD IS NULL 
    AND BN_TR_BID_SPREAD IS NULL 
    AND BN_TR_ASK_SPREAD IS NULL 
    AND BN_CUST_BID_SPREAD IS NULL 
    AND BN_CUST_ASK_SPREAD IS NULL 
    THEN NULL
  WHEN COUNTERPARTY = 'ALL'
	  AND ASK IS NULL
    AND BID IS NULL
  	AND REM_CUST_ASK_NET IS NULL 
    AND REM_CUST_BID_NET IS NULL 
    AND REM_TR_ASK_NET IS NULL 
    AND REM_TR_BID_NET IS NULL 
    AND BN_CUST_ASK_NET IS NULL 
    AND BN_CUST_BID_NET IS NULL 
    AND BN_TR_ASK_NET IS NULL 
    AND BN_TR_BID_NET IS NULL 
  THEN NULL
  ELSE COUNTERPARTY
END COUNTERPARTY,
CASE 
  WHEN COUNTERPARTY != 'ALL'
    AND REM_TR_BID_SPREAD IS NULL 
    AND REM_TR_ASK_SPREAD IS NULL 
    AND REM_CUST_BID_SPREAD IS NULL 
    AND REM_CUST_ASK_SPREAD IS NULL 
    AND BN_TR_BID_SPREAD IS NULL 
    AND BN_TR_ASK_SPREAD IS NULL 
    AND BN_CUST_BID_SPREAD IS NULL 
    AND BN_CUST_ASK_SPREAD IS NULL 
    THEN NULL
  WHEN COUNTERPARTY = 'ALL'
    AND ASK IS NULL
    AND BID IS NULL
 		AND REM_CUST_ASK_NET IS NULL 
    AND REM_CUST_BID_NET IS NULL 
    AND REM_TR_ASK_NET IS NULL 
    AND REM_TR_BID_NET IS NULL 
    AND BN_CUST_ASK_NET IS NULL 
    AND BN_CUST_BID_NET IS NULL 
    AND BN_TR_ASK_NET IS NULL 
    AND BN_TR_BID_NET IS NULL 
    THEN NULL
  ELSE CONTRACT
END CONTRACT,
CAST(ASK AS VARCHAR(255)) AS ASK,
CAST(BID AS VARCHAR(255)) AS BID,
-- REMITTANCE
CAST(REM_CUST_ASK_NET AS VARCHAR(255)) AS REM_CUST_ASK_NET,
CAST(REM_CUST_BID_NET AS VARCHAR(255)) AS REM_CUST_BID_NET,
CAST(REM_TR_ASK_NET AS VARCHAR(255)) AS REM_TR_ASK_NET,
CAST(REM_TR_BID_NET AS VARCHAR(255)) AS REM_TR_BID_NET,
CAST(REM_TR_BID_SPREAD AS VARCHAR(255)) AS REM_TR_BID_SPREAD,
CAST(REM_TR_ASK_SPREAD AS VARCHAR(255)) AS REM_TR_ASK_SPREAD,
CAST(REM_CUST_BID_SPREAD AS VARCHAR(255)) AS REM_CUST_BID_SPREAD,
CAST(REM_CUST_ASK_SPREAD AS VARCHAR(255)) AS REM_CUST_ASK_SPREAD,
-- BANK NOTE
CAST(BN_CUST_ASK_NET AS VARCHAR(255)) AS BN_CUST_ASK_NET, 
CAST(BN_CUST_BID_NET AS VARCHAR(255)) AS BN_CUST_BID_NET,
CAST(BN_TR_ASK_NET AS VARCHAR(255)) AS BN_TR_ASK_NET,
CAST(BN_TR_BID_NET AS VARCHAR(255)) AS BN_TR_BID_NET,
CAST(BN_TR_BID_SPREAD AS VARCHAR(255)) AS BN_TR_BID_SPREAD,
CAST(BN_TR_ASK_SPREAD AS VARCHAR(255)) AS BN_TR_ASK_SPREAD,
CAST(BN_CUST_BID_SPREAD AS VARCHAR(255)) AS BN_CUST_BID_SPREAD,
CAST(BN_CUST_ASK_SPREAD AS VARCHAR(255)) AS BN_CUST_ASK_SPREAD
FROM (
  SELECT
    T1.M_COUNTERPARTY AS COUNTERPARTY,
    T1.M_CONTRACT AS CONTRACT,
    CASE 
      WHEN T1.M_ASK - T2.M_ASK = 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN T1.M_ASK = 0 AND (T2.M_ASK IS NULL OR T2.M_ASK = 0) THEN NULL
      ELSE T1.M_ASK
    END ASK,
    CASE
      WHEN T1.M_BID - T2.M_BID = 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN T1.M_BID = 0 AND (T2.M_BID = 0 OR T2.M_BID IS NULL) THEN NULL
      ELSE T1.M_BID
    END BID,  
    -- REMITTANCE
    CASE 
      WHEN T1.M_REM_CUST_ASK_NET - T2.M_REM_CUST_ASK_NET = 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN T1.M_REM_CUST_ASK_NET = 0 AND (T2.M_REM_CUST_ASK_NET = 0 OR T2.M_REM_CUST_ASK_NET IS NULL) THEN NULL
      ELSE T1.M_REM_CUST_ASK_NET
    END REM_CUST_ASK_NET,  
    CASE 
      WHEN T1.M_REM_CUST_BID_NET - T2.M_REM_CUST_BID_NET = 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN T1.M_REM_CUST_BID_NET = 0 AND (T2.M_REM_CUST_BID_NET = 0 OR T2.M_REM_CUST_BID_NET IS NULL) THEN NULL      
      ELSE T1.M_REM_CUST_BID_NET
    END REM_CUST_BID_NET,  
    CASE 
      WHEN T1.M_REM_TR_ASK_NET - T2.M_REM_TR_ASK_NET = 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN T1.M_REM_TR_ASK_NET = 0 AND (T2.M_REM_TR_ASK_NET = 0 OR T2.M_REM_TR_ASK_NET IS NULL) THEN NULL      
      ELSE T1.M_REM_TR_ASK_NET
    END REM_TR_ASK_NET,  
    CASE 
      WHEN T1.M_REM_TR_BID_NET - T2.M_REM_TR_BID_NET = 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN T1.M_REM_TR_BID_NET = 0 AND (T2.M_REM_TR_BID_NET = 0 OR T2.M_REM_TR_BID_NET IS NULL) THEN NULL   
      ELSE T1.M_REM_TR_BID_NET
    END REM_TR_BID_NET,
    CASE 
      WHEN T1.M_REM_TR_BID_SPREAD - T2.M_REM_TR_BID_SPREAD = 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN T1.M_REM_TR_BID_SPREAD = 0 AND (T2.M_REM_TR_BID_SPREAD = 0 OR T2.M_REM_TR_BID_SPREAD IS NULL) THEN NULL      
      ELSE T1.M_REM_TR_BID_SPREAD
    END REM_TR_BID_SPREAD,
    CASE 
      WHEN T1.M_REM_TR_ASK_SPREAD - T2.M_REM_TR_ASK_SPREAD = 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN T1.M_REM_TR_ASK_SPREAD = 0 AND (T2.M_REM_TR_ASK_SPREAD = 0 OR T2.M_REM_TR_ASK_SPREAD IS NULL) THEN NULL      
      ELSE T1.M_REM_TR_ASK_SPREAD
    END REM_TR_ASK_SPREAD,
    CASE 
      WHEN T1.M_REM_CUST_BID_SPREAD - T2.M_REM_CUST_BID_SPREAD = 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN T1.M_REM_CUST_BID_SPREAD = 0 AND (T2.M_REM_CUST_BID_SPREAD = 0 OR T2.M_REM_CUST_BID_SPREAD IS NULL) THEN NULL      
      ELSE T1.M_REM_CUST_BID_SPREAD
    END REM_CUST_BID_SPREAD,
    CASE 
      WHEN T1.M_REM_CUST_ASK_SPREAD - T2.M_REM_CUST_ASK_SPREAD = 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN T1.M_REM_CUST_ASK_SPREAD = 0 AND (T2.M_REM_CUST_ASK_SPREAD = 0 OR T2.M_REM_CUST_ASK_SPREAD IS NULL) THEN NULL      
      ELSE T1.M_REM_CUST_ASK_SPREAD
    END REM_CUST_ASK_SPREAD,
    -- BANK NOTE
    CASE 
      WHEN T1.M_BN_CUST_ASK_NET - T2.M_BN_CUST_ASK_NET = 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN T1.M_BN_CUST_ASK_NET = 0 AND (T2.M_BN_CUST_ASK_NET = 0 OR T2.M_BN_CUST_ASK_NET IS NULL) THEN NULL      
      ELSE T1.M_BN_CUST_ASK_NET
    END BN_CUST_ASK_NET,  
    CASE 
      WHEN T1.M_BN_CUST_BID_NET - T2.M_BN_CUST_BID_NET = 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN T1.M_BN_CUST_BID_NET = 0 AND (T2.M_BN_CUST_BID_NET = 0 OR T2.M_BN_CUST_BID_NET IS NULL) THEN NULL      
      ELSE T1.M_BN_CUST_BID_NET
    END BN_CUST_BID_NET,  
    CASE 
      WHEN T1.M_BN_TR_ASK_NET - T2.M_BN_TR_ASK_NET = 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN T1.M_BN_TR_ASK_NET = 0 AND (T2.M_BN_TR_ASK_NET = 0 OR T2.M_BN_TR_ASK_NET IS NULL) THEN NULL      
      ELSE T1.M_BN_TR_ASK_NET
    END BN_TR_ASK_NET,  
    CASE 
      WHEN T1.M_BN_TR_BID_NET - T2.M_BN_TR_BID_NET = 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN T1.M_BN_TR_BID_NET = 0 AND (T2.M_BN_TR_BID_NET = 0 OR T2.M_BN_TR_BID_NET IS NULL) THEN NULL      
      ELSE T1.M_BN_TR_BID_NET
    END BN_TR_BID_NET,
    CASE 
      WHEN T1.M_BN_TR_BID_SPREAD - T2.M_BN_TR_BID_SPREAD = 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN T1.M_BN_TR_BID_SPREAD = 0 AND (T2.M_BN_TR_BID_SPREAD = 0 OR T2.M_BN_TR_BID_SPREAD IS NULL) THEN NULL      
      ELSE T1.M_BN_TR_BID_SPREAD
    END BN_TR_BID_SPREAD,
    CASE 
      WHEN T1.M_BN_TR_ASK_SPREAD - T2.M_BN_TR_ASK_SPREAD = 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN T1.M_BN_TR_ASK_SPREAD = 0 AND (T2.M_BN_TR_ASK_SPREAD = 0 OR T2.M_BN_TR_ASK_SPREAD IS NULL) THEN NULL      
      ELSE T1.M_BN_TR_ASK_SPREAD
    END BN_TR_ASK_SPREAD,
    CASE 
      WHEN T1.M_BN_CUST_BID_SPREAD - T2.M_BN_CUST_BID_SPREAD = 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN T1.M_BN_CUST_BID_SPREAD = 0 AND (T2.M_BN_CUST_BID_SPREAD = 0 OR T2.M_BN_CUST_BID_SPREAD IS NULL) THEN NULL      
      ELSE T1.M_BN_CUST_BID_SPREAD
    END BN_CUST_BID_SPREAD,
    CASE 
      WHEN T1.M_BN_CUST_ASK_SPREAD - T2.M_BN_CUST_ASK_SPREAD = 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN T1.M_BN_CUST_ASK_SPREAD = 0 AND (T2.M_BN_CUST_ASK_SPREAD = 0 OR T2.M_BN_CUST_ASK_SPREAD IS NULL) THEN NULL      
      ELSE T1.M_BN_CUST_ASK_SPREAD
    END BN_CUST_ASK_SPREAD
    
  FROM FX_PUBLISH_LATEST_REP T1
  LEFT OUTER JOIN FX_PUBLISH_PREVIOUS_REP T2
  ON T1.M_COUNTERPARTY = T2.M_COUNTERPARTY AND T1.M_CONTRACT = T2.M_CONTRACT
)

TRIM(M_DESC): CM19 SQL request
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select 
T1.M_CMP_TYPO as TradeTypology,
T1.M_CNT_TYPO as ContractTypology ,
T1.M_CONTRACT as Contract,
T1.M_NB as Trade_Number,
T1.M_TP_BLEI as LegalEntityIdentifier,
T1.M_TP_CNTRP as Counterparty,
T1.M_TP_CNTRPID as CntrpyID ,
T1.M_TP_DTETRN as Tradedate,
T1.M_TP_PFOLIO as Portfolio,
T1.M_TP_DTEEXP as Expiry_Date,
(case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV0='V' ) then T1.M_TP_RTDCN02
     else case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV1='V' )  then T1.M_TP_RTDCN12
               else T1.M_TP_RTDCN02
          end
end)as COUPON_PER,
(case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV0='F' ) then T1. M_TP_RTMRTE0
 
     else case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV1='F' )  then T1. M_TP_RTMRTE1
               else 0
          end
end)as COUPON_RATE,
(case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV0='F' ) then  T1.M_TP_RTMCNV0
     else case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV1='F' )  then T1.M_TP_RTMCNV0 
               else ''
          end
end)as DAY_COUNT,
(case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV0='V' ) then T1.M_TP_RTMNDX0
     else case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV1='V' )  then T1.M_TP_RTMNDX1
               else ''
          end
end)as FLOAT_INDEX_PER,
(case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV0='V' ) then upper(T1.M_TP_RTMFRC0)
     else case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV1='V' )  then upper(T1.M_TP_RTMFRC1)
               else upper(T1.M_TP_RTMFRC0)
          end
end)as FLOAT_PAY_PER,
(case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV0='V' ) then T1.M_TP_RTFXC02
     else case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV1='V' )  then T1.M_TP_RTFXC12
               else 0
          end
end)as FLOAT_RATE,
(case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV0='V') and (T1.M_TP_RTFV1='V') then T1.M_TP_RTFXC12
     else 0
end)as FLOAT_RATE2,
(case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV0='V' ) then upper(T1.M_TP_RTMFRF0)
     else case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV1='V' )  then upper(T1.M_TP_RTMFRF1)
               else ''
          end
end)as FLOAT_RESET_FREQUENCY,
(case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV0='V') and (T1.M_TP_RTFV1='V') then T1.M_TP_RTMNDX1
     else ''
end)as FLOAT2_INDEX_PER,
(case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV0='V' ) then T1.M_TP_RTMMRG0
     else case when (T1.M_TP_RTFV1='V' )  then T1.M_TP_RTMMRG1
               else 0
          end
end)as SPREAD,
T2.M_AGR_ID as CollateralAgreement,
T1.M_TP_TRADER as Trader,
T1.M_TP_TYPO as TradeCategory ,
T1.M_TRN_FMLY as Family,
T1.M_TRN_GRP as Group_,
T1.M_TRN_GTYPE as GroupType,
T1.M_TRN_TYPE as Type_,
T1.M_REF_DATA as REF_DATA_TP,

case when T2.M_AGR_ID is NULL  then 'Uncollaterized'
     else T2.M_AGR_ID
end as  COLLATERIZED
 from 
 COL_TP_REP T1 left  outer join  
 (
 Select C1.M_REF_DATA as M_REF_DATA, C1.M_TRN_4012 as ContractID, C1.M_AGR_ID as M_AGR_ID from COL_MLC_CONT_CSA_REP C1 
 union 
 Select C2.M_REF_DATA as M_REF_DATA, C2.M_TRN_4012 as ContractID, C2.M_AGR_ID as M_AGR_ID from COL_MLC_CONT_IM_REP C2
 union
 Select C3.M_REF_DATA as M_REF_DATA, C3.M_TRN_4012 as ContractID, C3.M_AGR_ID as M_AGR_ID from COL_MLC_CONT_GMR_REP C3
 --union --commented as GMSLA type collateral agreements not part of BAB
 --Select C4.M_REF_DATA as M_REF_DATA, C4.M_TRN_4012 as ContractID, C4.M_AGR_ID as M_AGR_ID from COL_MLC_CONT_GMS_REP C4
) T2
on  
( 
	T1.M_CONTRACT= cast(T2.ContractID as int) and T1.M_REF_DATA =  T2.M_REF_DATA
)
where (T2.M_AGR_ID is NULL or T2.M_AGR_ID like '%Unknown%')
and T1.M_REF_DATA =@MxDataSetKey:N

when TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN=TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST then 'CUR'
