case 
when TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO) in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing') and PARTIES.M_BANK='Y'       then UDF.M_PROD_CODE||'_01'
when TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO) in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing') and PARTIES.M_BROKER='Y'     then UDF.M_PROD_CODE||'_02'
when TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO) in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing') and PARTIES.M_CORPORATE='Y'  then UDF.M_PROD_CODE||'_03'
else UDF.M_PROD_CODE end as Category_Code,
TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN as Trade_Date,
'' as Dealer_Desk,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as Deal_Currency,
UDF.M_COMMOD_CD as Commodity_Code,
UDF.M_COMMODITY as Commodity_Name,
DECODE(TRIM(UDF.M_COMMODITY),'','',TPALL.M_TP_PRICE) as Com_Unit_Price,
DECODE(TRIM(UDF.M_COMMODITY),'','',TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2) as Commodity_Quantity,
PARTIES_BRK.M_CIF as Broker_CIF,
TRIM(PARTIES_BRK.M_NAME) as Broker_NAME,
--UDF.M_IS_BROKER2 as Bank,
--M_TP_BROLBL0,M_TP_BROLBL1,M_TP_BROLBL2,M_TP_BROLBL3,
case 
when TPALL.M_TP_FEE0!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE0
when TPALL.M_TP_FEE1!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE1
when TPALL.M_TP_FEE2!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE2
else TPALL.M_TP_FEE3 end as Brokerage_Amt,
TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP as Sale_Counterparty,
TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME) Counterparty_Name,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST as Settlement_Date,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP  as Maturity_Date,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as Principal,
SPOT2.M_MID,SPOT22.M_MID,TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,
case 
when TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR='USD' then TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL 
when TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR='SAR' then DECODE(NVL(SPOT22.M_MID,0),0,0,TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL/NVL(SPOT22.M_MID,0)) 
else DECODE(NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0),0,0,TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL/NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0)) end as Principal_in_USD,
ABS(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)) as RATE,
/*ROUND(
((TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*ABS(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)))/360)
*
(TP_RT.M_TP_RTMAT0 -TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST),2) */

ABS(NVL(CF.AMT,0)) as  Total_Profit,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST as No_Of_Days,
/*ROUND(
(
((TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*ABS(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)))/360)
*
(TP_RT.M_TP_RTMAT0 -TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST) 
) */
ABS(NVL(CF.AMT,0))+TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as Sell_Amount,	-- total profit+nominal
TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*ABS(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)) as SUM_PRODUCT,
ABS(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)) as Market_Rate,

case when TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST=0 then 0
else ABS(NVL(CF.AMT,0))/(TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST) 
end as Accrual,

TPALL.M_TP_YIELD as Yield,

TPALL.M_TP_TRADER as Inputter2,
TPALL.M_TP_TRADER as Inputter2_name,
TPALL.M_TP_TIMSYS as Inputter2_Time,

NVL(TRIM(INPUT1.M_STP_LST_VD),'') as Inputter1,
case 
when TRIM(INPUT1.M_STP_LST_VD) like 'MX_%' then INPUT1.M_STP_LST_VD
else  NVL(TRIM(INPUT1.M_USERNAME),'') end as Inputter1_name,
case 
when TRIM(INPUT1.M_STP_LTVLTM) is null then ''
else TO_CHAR(INPUT1.M_STP_LTVLTM / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24) + TO_DATE('1970-01-01 08:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') end
as Inputter1_Time,

NVL(TRIM(AUTH.M_STP_LST_VD),'') as Authorizer,
case 
when TRIM(AUTH.M_STP_LST_VD) like 'MX_%' then AUTH.M_STP_LST_VD
else NVL(TRIM(AUTH.M_USERNAME),'')  end as Authorizer_name,
case 
when TRIM(AUTH.M_STP_LTVLTM) is null then ''
else TO_CHAR(AUTH.M_STP_LTVLTM / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24) + TO_DATE('1970-01-01 08:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') end
as Authorizer_time,

UDF.M_PROD_CODE as Cparty_Limit_Code,
'SA0010001' as Company_Name,
'' as Dept_Code,
'' as Final_Rating,
case 
when TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ('SGDM','SFRM','LTM') then TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP
else null end
as LTM_Final_Maturity_Date,
DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2),'LIVE','LIVE','MKT_OP','LIVE','DEAD','DEAD') as TRADE_STATUS,
TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO

from TP_ALL_REP TPALL
--left outer join TP_RT_REP TP_RT
--on TPALL.M_NB=TP_RT.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TP_RT.M_REF_DATA
left outer join TRD_UDF_REP UDF
ON TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=UDF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=UDF.M_REF_DATA
left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
on TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP=PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES_BRK
on TRIM(UDF.M_IS_BROKER1)=TRIM(PARTIES_BRK.M_DSP_LABEL) and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES_BRK.M_REF_DATA
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2
on SPOT2.M_DATE =TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM ='SAR' and SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN=TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT22
on SPOT22.M_DATE =TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and SPOT22.M_CCY_NUM ='SAR' and SPOT22.M_CCY_DEN='USD'
left outer join
(
   select M_REF_DATA,M_FC_ID,MAX(M_STP_LST_VD) M_STP_LST_VD, MAX(M_STP_LTVLTM) M_STP_LTVLTM,MAX(M_STP_LVGP) M_STP_LVGP,MAX(M_USERNAME) M_USERNAME
   from STPFC_ENTRY_TBL_REP where M_STP_VL_LVL='NonEcoValidated' and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
   group by M_FC_ID,M_REF_DATA     
) INPUT1
on TPALL.M_CONTRACT=INPUT1.M_FC_ID and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=INPUT1.M_REF_DATA
left outer join
(
   select M_REF_DATA,M_FC_ID,MAX(M_STP_LST_VD) M_STP_LST_VD, MAX(M_STP_LTVLTM) M_STP_LTVLTM,MAX(M_STP_LVGP) M_STP_LVGP,MAX(M_USERNAME) M_USERNAME
   from STPFC_ENTRY_TBL_REP where M_STP_VL_LVL='Matched' and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
   group by M_FC_ID,M_REF_DATA
) AUTH
on TPALL.M_CONTRACT=AUTH.M_FC_ID and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=AUTH.M_REF_DATA
left outer join
(
   select M_NB,M_REF_DATA,sum(M_F_AMOUNT) AMT from CASH_FLOW_REP
   where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN'
   group by M_NB,M_REF_DATA
) CF
on CF.M_NB=TPALL.M_NB and CF.M_REF_DATA=TPALL.M_REF_DATA
where 
TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
--and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
AND TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in (
'Murabaha Borrowing','Murabaha Placement',
'Wakala Borrowing','Wakala Placement',
'DPM Murabaha',
'RR SAMA','LTM','SAMA Bill'
,'SGDM','SFRM','Wakala Borrowing CFC'
,'RR Waad','Repo Waad' -- newly added as per user request
)
and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N' --and TPALL.M_AMD_STS2<>'CA' and TPALL.M_AMD_STS2<>'NA'
--and TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_MOPLSTL)!='RPL_M' and TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_MOPLSTL)!='RPL_D' -- remove cancelled deals
and (
TPALL.M_TP_MOPLSTL not like '%RPL_M%' 
and TPALL.M_TP_MOPLSTL not like '%RPL_D%'
or 
(TPALL.M_TP_MOPLSTL like '%RPL_M%' and TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2)<>'DEAD')
)
and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN,'YYYYMMDD')=TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2,'YYYYMMDD')
order by TPALL.M_NB asc

TRIM(M_DESC): IM DM Extraction
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
SELECT
M_IDENTITY as MX_UID,
TO_CHAR(M_VALUATION,'YYYY-MM-DD') as VALUATION_DATE,
M_AGREEMENT                       as AGREEMENT_NAME,
M_BASE_CURR                       as BASE_CURRENCY,
M_IM_ROLE                         as IM_ROLE,
/*CASE WHEN ISNULL(M_IM_MODEL,'')='' AND M_MX_IS_TOT=1
        THEN 'Total'
       WHEN ISNULL(M_IM_MODEL,'')!='' AND M_MX_IS_TOT=1
        THEN 'Model'
          ELSE 'Silo'
END AS CALCULATION_LEVEL,*/
CASE WHEN upper(M_MX_TOT_KEY) =  'IM_ROLE'
    	 THEN 'Total'
     WHEN upper(M_MX_TOT_KEY) = 'IM_MODEL'
       THEN 'Model'
     WHEN  trim(M_MX_TOT_KEY) is NULL 
     	 THEN 'Silo'
END AS CALCULATION_LEVEL,
M_IM_MODEL                       as IM_MODEL,
M_SILO as SILO,
ROUND(M_IM_EXPOSU,6)             as IM_EXPOSURE
from BIM_IM_RESULTS_REP
where upper(M_MX_TOT_KEY) IN ('IM_ROLE','IM_MODEL')
 or trim(M_MX_TOT_KEY) is NULL
order by M_VALUATION,M_AGREEMENT,M_BASE_CURR,M_IM_ROLE,M_IM_MODEL,M_SILO

TRIM(M_DESC): Account entries extraction for the FAH system
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
-- Select All Credit on 1 line -New
SELECT
T1.M_NB_RULE AS NB_RULE,
T1.M_REF_DATA AS REF_DATA,
'MX' AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
T1.M_SYS_DATE AS AS_OF_DATE,
TO_CHAR(T1.M_EN_ORIG_NB) AS ACCOUNTING_ENTRY_ID,
CASE 
  WHEN T1.M_FX_O_NB = 0 AND T1.M_NB_OFFSET != 0 THEN TO_CHAR(T1.M_NB_OFFSET)
  WHEN T1.M_FX_O_NB = 0 THEN TO_CHAR(T1.M_EN_ORIG_NB)
  ELSE TO_CHAR(T1.M_FX_O_NB)
END BALANCING_ENTRY_ID,
T1.M_SYS_DATE AS TRADE_DATE,
T1.M_VAL_DATE AS VALUE_DATE,
TO_CHAR(T1.M_NB_TRN) AS TRADE_ID,
CASE
  WHEN M_TYPE_NB = 'TRN' AND M_TRN_GRP IN ('BOND','EQUIT') THEN (SELECT MAX(M_TP_ISIN) FROM ACC_LIVE_DEALS_REP DEALS WHERE DEALS.M_NB = M_NB_TRN  AND DEALS.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N )
  WHEN M_TYPE_NB = 'LIQ' THEN (SELECT M_SE_ISIN FROM ACC_SECURITIES_REP SEC WHERE TRIM(SEC.M_SE_D_LABEL) = TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(M_EN_COMMENT,';;','; ;'), '[^;]+',1,4)) AND SEC.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)
  WHEN M_TYPE_NB = 'PAY' AND M_TRN_GRP NOT IN ('BOND','EQUIT') THEN (SELECT TO_CHAR(MAX(M_DF_OCNTREF)) FROM ACC_DLV_CASH_REP DLV_CASH WHERE DLV_CASH.M_DF_REF = M_NB_TRN AND DLV_CASH.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)
  WHEN M_TYPE_NB = 'PAY' AND M_TRN_GRP IN ('BOND','EQUIT') THEN (SELECT MAX(M_TP_ISIN) FROM ACC_LIVE_DEALS_REP DEALS WHERE DEALS.M_NB = (SELECT TO_CHAR(M_DF_TRDREF) FROM ACC_DLV_CASH_REP DLV_CASH WHERE DLV_CASH.M_DF_REF = M_NB_TRN AND DLV_CASH.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N) AND DEALS.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)
  ELSE NULL
END PARENT_LVL_1,
CASE
  WHEN M_TRN_GRP IN ('BOND','EQUIT') THEN TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(M_EN_COMMENT,';;','; ;'), '[^;]+',1,1))
  ELSE NULL
END PARENT_LVL_2,
--CAST (TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,1)) AS VARCHAR(2)) AS COMPANY,
'01' AS COMPANY,
--TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2)) AS BRANCH,
--TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,3)) AS GL_PRODUCT,
CASE
	WHEN TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
	ELSE TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))
END BRANCH,   
CASE
	WHEN TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,3)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,3))) < 4 THEN '0000'
	ELSE TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,3))
END GL_PRODUCT,
CASE
	WHEN TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) IS NULL THEN '00000'
	ELSE TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4))   
END GL_ACCOUNT,
CASE 
	WHEN TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,5)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,5))) < 8 THEN '00000000'
 ELSE TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,5))
END COUNTERPARTY,
CASE
  WHEN TRIM(T1.M_FX_O_CUR) is NOT NULL THEN T1.M_FX_O_CUR
  ELSE T1.M_EN_CUR
END CURRENCY,
CAST(-1 * T1.M_EN_AMT AS NUMBER(25, 8)) AS AMOUNT_LCY,
CASE
  WHEN TRIM(T1.M_FX_O_CUR) IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(-1 * T1.M_FX_O_AMT AS NUMBER(25, 8))
  ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER(25, 8))
END AMOUNT_FCY,
CASE
  WHEN TRIM(T1.M_FX_O_CUR) IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(T1.M_FXCV_RATE AS NUMBER(25, 8))
  ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER(25, 8))
END CCY_EXCHANGE_RATE,
TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') AS LOAD_TIMESTAMP
from 
ACC_ENTRIES_REP T1
WHERE 
T1.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
AND (T1.M_FX_O_NB != 0 OR (T1.M_FX_O_NB = 0 AND TRIM(T1.M_INSTRUMENT) = 'SAR'))
GROUP BY 
T1.M_EN_AMT,
T1.M_EN_CREDIT, 
T1.M_EN_CUR, 
T1.M_EN_DATE,T1.M_ENTITY, T1.M_ACC_SEC,T1.M_VAL_DATE,T1.M_NB_TRN,T1.M_TRN_GRP,T1.M_EN_COMMENT,T1.M_TYPE_NB,T1.M_EN_CREDIT,T1.M_FX_O_CUR,T1.M_EN_CUR,T1.M_REF_DATA,T1.M_FX_O_AMT,T1.M_EN_ORIG_NB,T1.M_FX_O_NB,T1.M_NB_OFFSET,T1.M_FXCV_RATE,
T1.M_NB_RULE,T1.M_SYS_DATE

  WHEN M_TYPE_NB = 'PAY' AND M_TRN_GRP IN ('BOND','EQUIT') THEN (SELECT MAX(M_TP_ISIN) FROM ACC_LIVE_DEALS_REP DEALS WHERE DEALS.M_NB = (SELECT TO_CHAR(M_DF_TRDREF) FROM ACC_DLV_CASH_REP DLV_CASH WHERE DLV_CASH.M_DF_REF = M_NB_TRN AND DLV_CASH.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N) AND DEALS.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)

TRIM(M_DESC): BAB_NOSTRO_RSK
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select rownum ,NOS.*
from BAB_NOS_RSK_MX_REP NOS where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
--from BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP NOS where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N

SELECT M_REF_DATA,
       M_DEN,
       M_LABEL,
       M_NUM,	
       M_RATE
FROM ERM_FX_REP WHERE M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N

SELECT 
M_REF_DATA,
COUNTERPARTY,
CONTRACT,
REM_CUST_ASK_NET,
REM_CUST_BID_NET,
REM_TR_ASK_NET,
REM_TR_BID_NET,
CAST(REM_TR_BID_SPREAD AS NUMBER(10,5)) AS REM_TR_BID_SPREAD,
CAST(REM_TR_ASK_SPREAD AS NUMBER(10,5)) AS REM_TR_ASK_SPREAD,
CAST(REM_CUST_BID_SPREAD AS NUMBER(10,5)) AS REM_CUST_BID_SPREAD,
CAST(REM_CUST_ASK_SPREAD AS NUMBER(10,5)) AS REM_CUST_ASK_SPREAD,
BN_CUST_ASK_NET,
BN_CUST_BID_NET,
BN_TR_ASK_NET,
BN_TR_BID_NET,
CAST(BN_TR_BID_SPREAD AS NUMBER(10,5)) AS BN_TR_BID_SPREAD,
CAST(BN_TR_ASK_SPREAD AS NUMBER(10,5)) AS BN_TR_ASK_SPREAD,
CAST(BN_CUST_BID_SPREAD AS NUMBER(10,5)) AS BN_CUST_BID_SPREAD,
CAST(BN_CUST_ASK_SPREAD AS NUMBER(10,5)) AS BN_CUST_ASK_SPREAD,
BID,
ASK
FROM
  (  
  SELECT
    DISTINCT
      M_REF_DATA,
    	M_COUNTERPA AS COUNTERPARTY,
      M_CONTRACT AS CONTRACT,
      -- REMITTANCE
      M_REMITTAN5 AS REM_CUST_ASK_NET,
      M_REMITTAN6 AS REM_CUST_BID_NET,
      M_REMITTAN7 AS REM_TR_ASK_NET,
      M_REMITTAN8 AS REM_TR_BID_NET,
	  M_REMITTAN4 AS REM_TR_BID_SPREAD,
	  M_REMITTAN1 AS REM_TR_ASK_SPREAD,
      M_REMITTAN2 AS REM_CUST_ASK_SPREAD,
	  M_REMITTAN3 AS REM_CUST_BID_SPREAD,
      -- BANK NOTE
      M_BANK_NOT4 AS BN_CUST_ASK_NET,
      M_BANK_NOT5 AS BN_CUST_BID_NET,
      M_BANK_NOT7 AS BN_TR_ASK_NET,
      M_BANK_NOT8 AS BN_TR_BID_NET,
      M_BANK_NOTE AS BN_TR_BID_SPREAD,
	  M_BANK_NOT1 AS BN_TR_ASK_SPREAD,
      M_BANK_NOT2 AS BN_CUST_BID_SPREAD,
	  M_BANK_NOT3 AS BN_CUST_ASK_SPREAD,      
      M_BID AS BID,
      M_ASK AS ASK,
      DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY M_REF_DATA DESC)  rk
    FROM
      FX_RATES_PUBLISH_REP A
    WHERE
      TRIM(M_COUNTERPA) IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 
      M_REF_DATA, M_COUNTERPA, M_CONTRACT,
      M_REMITTAN4, M_REMITTAN1, M_REMITTAN2, M_REMITTAN3, M_REMITTAN5, M_REMITTAN6, M_REMITTAN7, M_REMITTAN8,
      M_BANK_NOTE, M_BANK_NOT1, M_BANK_NOT2, M_BANK_NOT3, M_BANK_NOT4, M_BANK_NOT5, M_BANK_NOT7, M_BANK_NOT8,
      M_BID, M_ASK
    ) T1
    
WHERE T1.rk = 1

TRIM(M_DESC): T24 Bond Transcation Recon
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
SELECT 
'BOND' as TradeType,
M_ID as ID,
M_VALUEDATE as ValueDate,
M_MATURITY as MaturityDate,
abs(M_POSITION) as Nominal,
M_ISIN as ISIN,
M_INSTRUMEN as Instrument,
M_SETTLEME1 as SettlementMethod,
M_CURRENCY as Currency,
M_COUNTERPA as Counterparty,
case
when M_BUY_SELL = 'B' THEN 'buy'
when M_BUY_SELL = 'S' THEN 'sell'
ELSE ''
end as BuySell,
M_SETTLEMEN as SettlementDate,
M_CLEANPRIC as CleanPrice
FROM T24_TRN_RECON_REP
WHERE trim(M_TYPOLOGY) = 'Sukuk'

TRIM(M_DESC): T24-CTRP-Recon
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
SELECT 
'Party' as type,
'insert' as action,
trim(M_DSP_LBL) as FULL_NAME,
M_SECTOR as Sector,
trim(M_ADDRESS2) || ' ' || trim(M_ADDRESS3) || ' ' || trim(M_ADDRESS4) as STREET_ADDRESS,
M_CITY as CITY,
M_COUNTRY as COUNTRY,
M_TEL as TELEPHONE,
M_TELEX as FAX,
M_SWIFT as SWIFT,
M_EMAIL as EMAIL,
M_U_CTP_TYPE as COUNTERPARTY_TYPE,
M_U_SEGMENT as SEGMENT,
M_U_CTP_CODE as COUNTERPARTY_CODE
FROM T24_CTRP_RECON_REP

TRIM(M_DESC): T24 Equity Transcation Recon
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
SELECT 
'Equity' as TradeType,
M_ID as ID,
M_VALUEDATE as ValueDate,
abs(M_POSITION) as Quantity,
M_ISIN as ISIN,
M_INSTRUMEN as Instrument,
M_COUNTERPA as Counterparty,
M_CURRENCY as Currency,
case
when M_BUY_SELL = 'B' THEN 'buy'
when M_BUY_SELL = 'S' THEN 'sell'
ELSE ''
end as BuySell,
M_SETTLEMEN as SettlementDate,

FROM T24_TRN_RECON_REP
WHERE trim(M_TYPOLOGY) = 'Equity'

TRIM(M_DESC): T24 FXFWD Transcation Recon
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
SELECT 
'FXFWD' as TradeType,
M_ID as ID,
M_VALUEDATE as TradeDate,
M_PORTFOLIO as Portfolio,
M_COUNTERPA as Counterparty,
M_MATURITY as ValueDate,
M_INSTRUMEN as CurrencyPair,
abs(M_POSITION) as Quantity,
M_CLEANPRIC as traderSpotRate,
M_CLEANPRIC as clientSpotRate,

FROM T24_TRN_RECON_REP
WHERE trim(M_TYPOLOGY) = 'FX Waad'

TRIM(M_DESC): T24 FXSPOT Transcation Recon
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
SELECT 
'FXSPOT' as TradeType,
M_ID as ID,
case
when trim(M_TYPOLOGY) = 'Banknotes' THEN 'BN'
when trim(M_TYPOLOGY) = 'Spot' THEN 'SPOT'
ELSE ''
end as Typology,
M_INSTRUMEN as CurrencyPair,
M_VALUEDATE as ValueDate,
abs(M_POSITION) as Quantity,
M_CLEANPRIC as ClientRate,
M_CLEANPRIC as CoverRate,
M_CTRP as Counterparty,
M_IS_TREAS as IsTreasury,
M_IS_AGGR as IsAggregated,
M_TYPE as Type,
M_CHANNEL as Channel
FROM T24_TRN_RECON_REP
WHERE (trim(M_TYPOLOGY) = 'Spot' OR trim(M_TYPOLOGY) = 'Banknotes')

TRIM(M_DESC): T24 MD Recon

'fgrt' AS Type,

TRIM(M_DESC): T24 SSI Recon
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
SELECT 
'siRuleElement' as type,
'Insert' as action,
M_START as START_DATE,
M_END as END_DATE,
case
when M_TYPE = 0 THEN 'Both'
when M_TYPE = 1 THEN 'Credit'
when M_TYPE = 2 THEN 'Debit'
ELSE ''
end as DEBIT_OR_CREDIT,
M_CURRENCY as CCY,
case
when M_TYPE = 0 THEN 'Nostro'
when M_TYPE = 1 THEN 'Vostro'
when M_TYPE = 2 THEN 'Both'
ELSE ''
end as NOSTRO_OR_VOSTRO, 
case
when M_NATURE = 0 THEN 'TRUE'
when M_NATURE = 1 THEN 'FALSE'
ELSE ''
end as MULTIPLE,
M_STL_METHOD as DELIVERY_MODE,
M_CSNS_ACC as CNS_ACC,
M_DSP_LABEL as CNS_LBL,
M_BEN_ACC as BEN_ACC,
M_BEN_SWF as BEN_SWF,
M_INT1_LBL as INT1_LBL,
M_INT1_SWF as INT1_SWF,
M_INT2_LBL as INT2_LBL,
M_INT2_SWF as INT2_SWF
FROM T24_SSI_RECON_REP

SELECT
'MX' AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY'), 'DD-MM-YYYY') AS AS_OF_DATE,
'MX_ACCOUNTING_ENTRIES_REP        ' AS TABLE_NAME,
TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') AS MX_START_TIME,
TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') AS MX_END_TIME,
'P' AS MX_STATUS
FROM 
	DUAL

SELECT
'MX' AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,

'MX_ACCOUNTING_ENTRIES_REP        ' AS TABLE_NAME,
TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') AS MX_START_TIME,
TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') AS MX_END_TIME,
'S' AS MX_STATUS
FROM 
	DUAL

SELECT
M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
M_AS_OF_DATE AS AS_OF_DATE,
M_TABLE_NAME AS TABLE_NAME,
M_MX_START_TIME AS MX_START_TIME,
M_MX_END_TIME AS MX_END_TIME,

WHERE M_MX_STATUS = 'P'
AND M_AS_OF_DATE = TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY'), 'DD-MM-YYYY')
AND TRIM(M_TABLE_NAME) = 'MX_ACCOUNTING_ENTRIES_REP'

CAST(GB_Description AS CHAR(51)) AS GB_Description,
CAST(Deal_Type AS VARCHAR2(21)) AS Deal_Type,
CAST(Category_Code AS VARCHAR(10)) AS Category_Code,
CAST(Trade_Date AS DATE) AS Trade_Date,
CAST(Dealer_Desk AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS Dealer_Desk,
CAST(Deal_Currency AS VARCHAR2(3)) AS Deal_Currency,
CAST(Commodity_Code AS VARCHAR(20)) AS Commodity_Code,
CAST(Commodity_Name AS VARCHAR2(15)) Commodity_Name,
CAST(Com_Unit_Price AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS Com_Unit_Price,
CAST(Commodity_Quantity AS NUMBER(24)) AS Commodity_Quantity,
CAST(Broker_CIF AS VARCHAR2(50)) AS Broker_CIF,
CAST(Broker_Name AS VARCHAR2(255)) AS Broker_Name,
CAST(Brokerage_Amt AS NUMBER(20,2)) AS Brokerage_Amt,
CAST(Sale_Counterparty AS VARCHAR2(50)) AS Sale_Counterparty,
CAST(Counterparty_Name AS VARCHAR2(255)) AS Counterparty_Name,
CAST(Settlement_Date AS DATE) AS Settlement_Date,
CAST(Maturity_Date AS DATE) AS Maturity_Date,
CAST(Principal AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS Principal,
CAST(Principal_in_USD AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS Principal_in_USD,
CAST(Rate AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS Rate,
CAST(Total_Profit AS NUMBER(23,2)) AS Total_Profit,
CAST(No_Of_Days AS VARCHAR(20)) AS No_Of_Days,
CAST(Sell_Amount AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS Sell_Amount,
CAST(SUM_PRODUCT AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS SUM_PRODUCT,
CAST(Market_Rate AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS Market_Rate,
CAST(Accrual AS NUMBER(20,2)) AS Accrual,
CAST(Yield AS NUMBER(20,2)) AS Yield,
CAST(Inputter_2 AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS Inputter_2,
CAST(Inputter_2_name AS VARCHAR2(35)) AS Inputter_2_name,
CAST(Inputter_2_time AS VARCHAR2(35)) AS Inputter_2_time,
CAST(Inputter_1 AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS Inputter_1,
CAST(Inputter_1_name AS VARCHAR2(35)) AS Inputter_1_name,
CAST(Inputter_1_time AS VARCHAR2(35)) AS Inputter_1_time,
CAST(Authorizer AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS Authorizer,
CAST(Authorizer_name AS VARCHAR2(35)) AS Authorizer_name,
CAST(Authorizer_time AS VARCHAR2(35)) AS Authorizer_time,
CAST(Cparty_Limit_Code AS NUMBER(10,4)) AS Cparty_Limit_Code,
CAST(Company_Name AS VARCHAR2(20)) AS Company_Name,
CAST(Dept_Code AS VARCHAR(30)) AS Dept_Code,
CAST(Final_Rating AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS Final_Rating,
CAST(LTM_Final_Maturity_Date AS DATE) AS LTM_Final_Maturity_Date,
--CAST(Dates AS VARCHAR(10)) AS Dates,
CAST(GL_CAT AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS GL_CAT,
CAST(GL_Line AS VARCHAR2(30)) AS GL_Line,
CAST(LastUpdatedDt AS DATE) AS LastUpdatedDt
from
(
SELECT DISTINCT
TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2 as Record_Status,
TPALL.M_NB as Transaction_Ref,
TPALL.M_TP_GID as T24_Reference,
(TPALL.M_CNT_VS2-1) as No_of_Amendments,
TPALL.M_CMP_TYPDSC as GB_Description,
TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO as Deal_Type,
(CASE 
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Murabaha Borrowing' AND TRIM(TPALL.M_CNT_USG)='DI' AND TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO) LIKE '%LM%' THEN 21008
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Murabaha Borrowing' AND TRIM(TPALL.M_CNT_USG)='DI' AND TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO) NOT LIKE '%LM%' THEN 21003
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Murabaha Borrowing' THEN 21001
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='LTM' THEN 21002
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Wakala Borrowing' THEN 21004
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Repo SAMA' THEN 21075
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Murabaha Placement' THEN 21076
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='DPM Murabaha' THEN 21078
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Wakala Placement' THEN 21079
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Repo Murabaha' THEN 21211
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='RR SAMA' THEN 21251
ELSE 0 END) AS Category_Code,
--TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN,'YYYYMMDD') as Trade_Date,
TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN as Trade_Date,
STS3.M_FOP_INT_GP AS Dealer_Desk,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as Deal_Currency,
--UDF.M_COMMOD_CD AS Commodity_Code,
TPALL.M_COMMODITY_CODE AS Commodity_Code,
--UDF.M_COMMODITY AS Commodity_Name,
TPALL.M_COMMODITY_NAME AS Commodity_Name,
-- UDF.M_IS_BRPRICE AS Com_Unit_Price,
TPALL.M_COMMODITY_BRK_FEE AS Com_Unit_Price,
DECODE(TPALL.M_COMMODITY_BRK_FEE,0,0,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ/TPALL.M_COMMODITY_BRK_FEE) AS Commodity_Quantity,
--UDF.M_IS_BROKER1 as Broker_CIF,
TPALL.M_BROKER1 as Broker_CIF,
--UDF.M_BRK1_NAME as Broker_Name,
TPALL.M_UDF_BRK_NAME as Broker_Name,
M_BROKER_FEE as Brokerage_Amt,
TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP as Sale_Counterparty,
TPALL.M_CPTY_NAME as Counterparty_Name,
--PARTIES.M_NAME as Counterparty_Name,
--TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST, 'YYYYMMDD') as Settlement_Date,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST as Settlement_Date,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP as Maturity_Date,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as Principal,
ROUND(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'USD',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,DECODE(NVL(SPOT.M_MID,0),0,0,TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*NVL(1/SPOT.M_MID,0))),2) as Principal_in_USD,
--M_COVER_RATE AS Rate,
DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO),'Depo CapFloorCollar',6.08207,M_COVER_RATE) AS Rate, ---6.08207==>M_TP_RTFXC02
CF.M_F_AMOUNT AS Total_Profit,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST as No_Of_Days,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL+CF.M_F_AMOUNT as Sell_Amount,
--TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*M_COVER_RATE as SUM_PRODUCT,
--M_COVER_RATE AS Market_Rate,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*decode(TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO),'Depo CapFloorCollar',6.08207,M_COVER_RATE) as SUM_PRODUCT,
DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO),'Depo CapFloorCollar',6.08207,M_COVER_RATE) AS Market_Rate,
--ABS(NVL(TPALL.M_TP_RTACR02,0)) as Accrual,
PLMV.M_ACCRUAL_C as Accrual,
0 as Yield,
STS2.M_STP_LST_VD as Inputter_2,
STS2.M_USERNAME as Inputter_2_name,
STS2.M_STS_TMLNG AS Inputter_2_time,
DECODE(STS1.M_STP_LST_VD,null,STS3.M_STP_LST_VD,STS1.M_STP_LST_VD) as Inputter_1,
DECODE(STS1.M_USERNAME,null,STS3.M_USERNAME,STS1.M_USERNAME) as Inputter_1_name,
DECODE(STS1.M_STS_TMLNG,null,STS3.M_STS_TMLNG,STS1.M_STS_TMLNG) AS Inputter_1_time,
STS3.M_STP_LST_VD as Authorizer,
STS3.M_USERNAME as Authorizer_name,
STS3.M_STS_TMLNG AS Authorizer_time,
LMTCODES.LIMIT_REF as Cparty_Limit_Code,
'SA0010001' as Company_Name,
--TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO as Dept_Code,
GL_ACC.GL_DEPT_CODE as Dept_Code,
' ' as Final_Rating,
--(CASE WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='LTM' THEN TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP,'YYYYMMDD') ELSE '' END) LTM_Final_Maturity_Date,
(CASE WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='LTM' THEN TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP END) LTM_Final_Maturity_Date,
--TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTESYS,'dd/mm/yyyy') as Dates,
--UDF.M_PROD_CODE as GL_CAT,
TPALL.M_PRODUCT_CODE as GL_CAT,
GL_ACC.GL_ACCT as GL_Line,
TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 as LastUpdatedDt
from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP TPALL
left outer join (        
select sum(M_EN_AMT) CPN_AMT,M_NB_TRN from ACC_ENTRIES_REP where TRIM(M_EN_TYPELBL)='ACCRUAL' group by M_NB_TRN) CPN
ON TPALL.M_NB=CPN.M_NB_TRN
left outer join (select M_NB, M_REF_DATA, SUM(ABS(M_F_AMOUNT)) M_F_AMOUNT from CASH_FLOW_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN'
group by  M_NB, M_REF_DATA) CF
    ON TPALL.M_NB=CF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=CF.M_REF_DATA
left outer join PL_DETAILED_REP PL
    ON TPALL.M_NB=PL.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PL.M_REF_DATA
--left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
--  ON TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP=PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
left outer join TP_ALL_EXT_REP TPALLEXT
    ON TPALL.M_NB=TPALLEXT.M_NB AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TPALLEXT.M_REF_DATA
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT 
    ON TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT.M_DATE and TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR)=TRIM(SPOT.M_CCY_NUM) and TRIM(SPOT.M_CCY_DEN)='USD'
left outer join
(select MAX(M_STP_LST_VD) as M_STP_LST_VD, MAX(M_STP_LTVLTM) as M_STS_TMLNG, M_FC_ID, M_FOP_INT_GP, MAX(M_USERNAME) as M_USERNAME, M_REF_DATA from STPFC_ENTRY_TBL_REP where M_STP_VL_LVL='Initial' and M_STP_LTVLTM IS NOT NULL group by M_FC_ID,M_FOP_INT_GP,M_REF_DATA) STS1--100)
    ON TPALL.M_CONTRACT=STS1.M_FC_ID AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA=STS1.M_REF_DATA
left outer join
(select MAX(M_STP_LST_VD) as M_STP_LST_VD, MAX(M_STP_LTVLTM) as M_STS_TMLNG, M_FC_ID, M_FOP_INT_GP, MAX(M_USERNAME) as M_USERNAME, M_REF_DATA from STPFC_ENTRY_TBL_REP where M_STP_VL_LVL='EventPending' and M_STP_LTVLTM IS NOT NULL group by M_FC_ID,M_FOP_INT_GP,M_REF_DATA) STS2--100)
    ON TPALL.M_CONTRACT=STS2.M_FC_ID AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA=STS2.M_REF_DATA
left outer join
(select max(M_STP_LST_VD) as M_STP_LST_VD, MAX(M_STP_LTVLTM) as M_STS_TMLNG, M_FC_ID, M_FOP_INT_GP, max(M_USERNAME) as M_USERNAME, M_REF_DATA from STPFC_ENTRY_TBL_REP where M_STP_VL_LVL in('NonEcoValidated','Matched') and M_STP_LTVLTM IS NOT NULL group by M_FC_ID,M_FOP_INT_GP,M_REF_DATA) STS3--100)
    ON TPALL.M_CONTRACT=STS3.M_FC_ID AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA=STS3.M_REF_DATA
--left outer join TRD_UDF_REP UDF
--    ON TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=UDF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=UDF.M_REF_DATA
left outer join PLA_MV_REP PLMV
    ON TPALL.M_NB=PLMV.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PLMV.M_REF_DATA
left OUTER JOIN
(select TRIM(M_T24CODE) as LIMIT_REF, TRIM(regexp_substr(M_LIMITPRODU, '[^##]+', 1, level)) as LIMIT_PRODUCT from LIMIT_CODES_REP
where TRIM(M_LIMITPRODU) not in ('NOT_DEFINED','N/A') AND TRIM(M_T24CODE) not in ('NOT_DEFINED','N/A')
connect by level <= regexp_count(M_LIMITPRODU, '[^##]+') group by M_T24CODE, M_LIMITPRODU, level) LMTCODES
on TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)=LMTCODES.LIMIT_PRODUCT
LEFT OUTER JOIN
(
select TAB1.M_NB, TAB1.M_TP_BUY, TAB1.M_EN_AMT, TAB1.M_EN_CUR, TAB1.M_NB_RULE, TAB1.M_NB_ENTRY, TAB1.GL_ACCT, TAB1.GL_DEPT_CODE from 
(select distinct T1.M_NB, T1.M_TP_BUY, T2.M_EN_AMT, T2.M_EN_CUR, T2.M_NB_RULE, T2.M_NB as M_NB_ENTRY, MAX(T2.M_NB) over (partition BY T1.M_NB) M_MAX_NB_ENTRY,
(CASE WHEN T1.M_TP_BS='B' THEN DECODE(TRIM(T2.M_EN_DEBIT), 'Migration Account','Migration Account', TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)))
ELSE DECODE(TRIM(T2.M_EN_CREDIT), 'Migration Account','Migration Account',TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4))) END) AS GL_ACCT,
(CASE WHEN T1.M_TP_BS='B' THEN 
(CASE
	WHEN TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
	ELSE TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))
END)
ELSE 
(CASE
	WHEN TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
	ELSE TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))
END)
END) AS GL_DEPT_CODE
from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP T1, ACC_JOURNAL_REP T2, ACC_RULES_REP T3, ACC_ENTRIES_REP T4
where T1.M_TP_BUY=T2.M_NB_BS and ROUND(T1.M_TP_NOMINAL,2)=ROUND(T2.M_EN_AMT,2) and T1.M_REF_DATA=T2.M_REF_DATA and T1.M_NB=T2.M_NB_TRN and T1.M_TP_NOMCUR=T2.M_EN_CUR 
and T2.M_NB_RULE=T3.M_RULE_NB
and (T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Payable%' or T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Receivable%' or T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Balances%' or T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Capital-Pay%' or T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Capital-Receive%' )
--or T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Initial Capital-Settlement%') 
and T3.M_RULE_LB not like '%OBS%' and T2.M_NB_TRN<>0
and TRIM(T2.M_NB)=TRIM(T4.M_NB(+)) and NVL(T4.M_NB_REVERSE,'N') <> 'Y'
--and T1.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Placement','DPM Murabaha','RR SAMA','RR Murabaha','RR Waad','Murabaha Borrowing','Repo SAMA','Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad','LTM','SFRM','SGDM')
and T1.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Depo CapFloorCollar','Murabaha Placement','DPM Murabaha','RR SAMA','RR Murabaha','RR Waad','Murabaha Borrowing','Repo SAMA','Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad','LTM','SFRM','SGDM')
AND TRIM(T1.M_TP_STATUS2) in ('LIVE','MKT_OP')
and T1.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N) TAB1 
where M_NB_ENTRY=M_MAX_NB_ENTRY

UNION ALL

select TAB1.M_NB, TAB1.M_TP_BUY, TAB1.M_EN_AMT, TAB1.M_EN_CUR, TAB1.M_NB_RULE, TAB1.M_NB_ENTRY, TAB1.GL_ACCT, TAB1.GL_DEPT_CODE from 
(select distinct T1.M_NB, T1.M_TP_BUY, T2.M_EN_AMT, T2.M_EN_CUR, T2.M_NB_RULE, T2.M_NB as M_NB_ENTRY, MAX(T2.M_NB) over (partition BY T1.M_NB) M_MAX_NB_ENTRY,
(CASE WHEN T1.M_TP_BS='B' THEN DECODE(TRIM(T2.M_EN_DEBIT), 'Migration Account','Migration Account', TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)))
ELSE DECODE(TRIM(T2.M_EN_CREDIT), 'Migration Account','Migration Account',TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4))) END) AS GL_ACCT,
(CASE WHEN T1.M_TP_BS='B' THEN 
(CASE
	WHEN TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
	ELSE TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))
END)
ELSE 
(CASE
	WHEN TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
	ELSE TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))
END)
END) AS GL_DEPT_CODE
from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP T1, ACC_JOURNAL_REP T2, ACC_RULES_REP T3, ACC_ENTRIES_REP T4
where T1.M_TP_BUY=T2.M_NB_BS and ROUND(T1.M_TP_NOMINAL,2)=ROUND(T2.M_EN_AMT,2) and T1.M_REF_DATA=T2.M_REF_DATA and T1.M_NB=T2.M_NB_TRN and T1.M_TP_NOMCUR=T2.M_EN_CUR 
and T2.M_NB_RULE=T3.M_RULE_NB
and (T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Payable%' or T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Receivable%' or T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Balances%' or T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Capital-Pay%' or T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Capital-Receive%') 
and T3.M_RULE_LB not like '%OBS%' and T2.M_NB_TRN<>0
and TRIM(T2.M_NB)=TRIM(T4.M_NB(+)) and NVL(T4.M_NB_REVERSE,'N') <> 'Y'
and T1.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Wakala Placement','Wakala Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing CFC','Wakala Placement CFC')
AND TRIM(T1.M_TP_STATUS2) in ('LIVE','MKT_OP')
and T1.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and T2.M_EN_DATE<TO_DATE('12-DEC-22','DD-MON-YY') and T3.M_RULE_NB not in (1022, 1030)) TAB1 
where M_NB_ENTRY=M_MAX_NB_ENTRY

UNION ALL

select TAB1.M_NB, TAB1.M_TP_BUY, TAB1.M_EN_AMT, TAB1.M_EN_CUR, TAB1.M_NB_RULE, TAB1.M_NB_ENTRY, TAB1.GL_ACCT, TAB1.GL_DEPT_CODE from 
(select distinct T1.M_NB, T1.M_TP_BUY, T2.M_EN_AMT, T2.M_EN_CUR, T2.M_NB_RULE, T2.M_NB as M_NB_ENTRY, MAX(T2.M_NB) over (partition BY T1.M_NB) M_MAX_NB_ENTRY,
(CASE WHEN T1.M_TP_BS='B' THEN DECODE(TRIM(T2.M_EN_DEBIT), 'Migration Account','Migration Account', TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)))
ELSE DECODE(TRIM(T2.M_EN_CREDIT), 'Migration Account','Migration Account',TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4))) END) AS GL_ACCT,
(CASE WHEN T1.M_TP_BS='B' THEN 
(CASE
	WHEN TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
	ELSE TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))
END)
ELSE 
(CASE
	WHEN TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
	ELSE TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))
END)
END) AS GL_DEPT_CODE
from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP T1, ACC_JOURNAL_REP T2, ACC_RULES_REP T3, ACC_ENTRIES_REP T4
where T1.M_TP_BUY=T2.M_NB_BS and ROUND(T1.M_TP_NOMINAL,2)=ROUND(T2.M_EN_AMT,2) and T1.M_REF_DATA=T2.M_REF_DATA and T1.M_NB=T2.M_NB_TRN and T1.M_TP_NOMCUR=T2.M_EN_CUR 
and T2.M_NB_RULE=T3.M_RULE_NB
and (T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Payable%' or T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Receivable%' or T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Balances%' or T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Capital-Pay%' or T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Capital-Receive%' 
or T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Initial Capital-Settlement%') 
and T3.M_RULE_LB not like '%OBS%' and T2.M_NB_TRN<>0
and TRIM(T2.M_NB)=TRIM(T4.M_NB(+)) and NVL(T4.M_NB_REVERSE,'N') <> 'Y'
and T1.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Wakala Placement','Wakala Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing CFC','Wakala Placement CFC')
AND TRIM(T1.M_TP_STATUS2) in ('LIVE','MKT_OP')
and T1.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and T2.M_EN_DATE>=TO_DATE('12-DEC-22','DD-MON-YY') and T3.M_RULE_NB not in (1020, 1029)) TAB1 
where M_NB_ENTRY=M_MAX_NB_ENTRY
) GL_ACC
on TPALL.M_NB=GL_ACC.M_NB and TPALL.M_TP_BUY=GL_ACC.M_TP_BUY 
where 
--TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Placement','DPM Murabaha','Wakala Placement','RR SAMA','RR Murabaha','RR Waad','Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing','Repo SAMA','Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad','LTM','SFRM','SGDM','Wakala Borrowing CFC','Wakala Placement CFC')
TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Placement','DPM Murabaha','Wakala Placement','RR SAMA','RR Murabaha','RR Waad','Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing','Repo SAMA','Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad','LTM','SFRM','SGDM','Wakala Borrowing CFC','Wakala Placement CFC','Depo CapFloorCollar')
AND TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2) in ('LIVE','MKT_OP')
AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N' 
order by TRANSACTION_REF)

select 
CAST (STMT_TYPE          AS VARCHAR2(30))           STMT_TYPE,
CAST (ACCOUNT_NUMBER     AS VARCHAR2(30))           ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
CAST (BOOKING_DATE       AS VARCHAR2(8))            BOOKING_DATE,
CAST (VALUE_DATE         AS VARCHAR2(8))            VALUE_DATE,
CAST (AMOUNT             AS DECIMAL(24,2))          AMOUNT,
CAST (DC_MARK            AS VARCHAR2(1))            DC_MARK,
CAST (CURRENCY           AS VARCHAR2(3))            CURRENCY,
CAST (REFERENCE1         AS VARCHAR2(30))           REFERENCE1,
CAST (REFERENCE2         AS VARCHAR2(30))           REFERENCE2,
CAST (REFERENCE3         AS VARCHAR2(30))           REFERENCE3,
CAST (NARRATIVE1         AS VARCHAR2(30))           NARRATIVE1,
CAST (NARRATIVE2         AS VARCHAR2(30))           NARRATIVE2,
CAST (NARRATIVE3         AS VARCHAR2(30))           NARRATIVE3,
CAST (NARRATIVE4         AS VARCHAR2(30))           NARRATIVE4,
CAST (TRANS_TYPE_ID_CODE AS VARCHAR2(30))           TRANS_TYPE_ID_CODE,
CAST (NARRATIVE5         AS VARCHAR2(30))           NARRATIVE5,
CAST (NARRATIVE6         AS VARCHAR2(30))           NARRATIVE6

from (
   
   select
       'OPENING' as STMT_TYPE
       ,'008100000300008' as ACCOUNT_NUMBER
       ,TO_CHAR(BOOK_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') as BOOKING_DATE
       ,'' as VALUE_DATE
       ,(case when OPEN_AMT<0 then ABS(OPEN_AMT) else -1*ABS(OPEN_AMT) end) as AMOUNT
       ,(case when OPEN_AMT<0 then 'C' else 'D' end) as DC_MARK
       ,M_CURRENCY as CURRENCY
       ,'' as  REFERENCE1
       ,'' as REFERENCE2
       ,'' as REFERENCE3
       ,'' as NARRATIVE1
       ,'' as NARRATIVE2
       ,'' as NARRATIVE3
       ,'' as NARRATIVE4
       ,'' as TRANS_TYPE_ID_CODE
       ,'' as NARRATIVE5
       ,'' as NARRATIVE6
   from 
   ( 
   select NVL(sum(M_AMOUNT),0) as OPEN_AMT,M_REP_DATE2+1 as BOOK_DATE,M_CURRENCY
   from BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP
   where 
   TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)='008100000300008'
   AND M_REF_DATA=@Mx_MLC_BAB:N and TRIM(M_CURRENCY)='SAR'
   group by M_REP_DATE2,M_CURRENCY
   )
   
   union all
   
   select
       'STMT' as STMT_TYPE
       ,'008100000300008' as ACCOUNT_NUMBER
       ,TO_CHAR((case 
           when NOS.M_PROD_ID=0 and NOS.M_PRODUCERO=0 then NOS.M_VALUE_DAT
           else NVL(TP_ALL.M_TP_DTETRN,NOS.M_VALUE_DAT)
           end),'YYYYMMDD') as BOOKING_DATE
       ,TO_CHAR(NOS.M_VALUE_DAT,'YYYYMMDD') as VALUE_DATE
       ,(case when NOS.M_AMOUNT<0 then ABS(NOS.M_AMOUNT) else -1*ABS(NOS.M_AMOUNT) end) as AMOUNT
       ,(case when NOS.M_AMOUNT<0 then 'C' else 'D' end) as DC_MARK
       ,NOS.M_CURRENCY as CURRENCY
       ,case 
                       when NOS.M_PRODUCER1 IN ('FT Nostro Nostro') then 'MX'
                       when NOS.M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Banknotes','Dual Currency Deposit','Spot','SAMA Bill') or M_PRODUCER1 like '%FX%' then 'MXFX'
                       when NOS.M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad','Murabaha Borrowing','Repo SAMA','RR SAMA','Murabaha Borrowing',
                       'Wakala Placement','SAMA Purchase','RR Murabaha','RR Waad','Murabaha Placement','Wakala Borrowing','DPM Murabaha') then 'MXMM'
                       when NOS.M_PRODUCER1 like '%LTM%' or M_PRODUCER1 like '%Sukuk%' then 'MXFI'
                       when NOS.M_PRODUCER1 like '%Fund%' or M_PRODUCER1 like '%Equity%' then 'MXEQ'
                       when NOS.M_PRODUCER1 like '%PRS%' then 'MXIR'
                       --when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('DPM Murabaha','SFRM','SGDM') then 'MXIR'   
                       when NOS.M_PRODUCER1 IN ('SFRM','SGDM') then 'MXIR'       
                       when NOS.M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Brokerage Fee') then 'MXBR'
                       when NOS.M_PRODUCER1 IN ('SCF','SCF BR VAT RC','SCF BR WHT PAY','SCF BR VAT') then 'MXSCF'
                       when NOS.M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Collateral') then 'MXCOL'
                       else 'MX' end || NVL(TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT,NOS.M_ID) as  REFERENCE1
       ,UTI_DATA.M_UTI_REF as REFERENCE2
       ,'SAMASARIXXX' as REFERENCE3
       ,'' as NARRATIVE1
       ,'' as NARRATIVE2
       ,'Murex Outgoing' as NARRATIVE3
       --- default set of accounts as per the finace user request
       ,case 
       when NOS.M_AMOUNT>0 then 
       DECODE(TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_V_BEN_ACC),'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KSA','DUMMYNOSTROKSA','','008100000300024',TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_V_BEN_ACC))
       --NVL(TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_V_BEN_ACC),'008100000300024') 
       else 
       --NVL(TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_N_CSNS_ACC),'008100000300008') 
       DECODE(TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_N_CSNS_ACC),'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KSA','DUMMYNOSTROKSA','','008100000300008',TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_N_CSNS_ACC))
       end as NARRATIVE4 --Debit Account number
       ,'MUREX' as TRANS_TYPE_ID_CODE
       --- default set of accounts as per the finace user request
       ,case when NOS.M_AMOUNT<0 then 
       NVL(TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_V_BEN_ACC),'008100000300024') 
       --DECODE(TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_V_BEN_ACC),'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KSA','DUMMYNOSTROKSA','','008100000300024',TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_V_BEN_ACC))
       else 
       NVL(TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_N_CSNS_ACC),'008100000300008') 
       --DECODE(TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_N_CSNS_ACC),'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KSA','DUMMYNOSTROKSA','','008100000300008',TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_N_CSNS_ACC))
       end as NARRATIVE5 --Credit Account number
       ,UTI_DATA.M_UTI_REF as NARRATIVE6
   
   from 
   (
       select * from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP 
       where 
       TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)='008100000300008' and M_AMOUNT !=0 
       and TRIM(M_BENEFICIA) is not null and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N) is not null 
       AND TRIM(M_PRODUCER1) not in ('Murabaha Commodity','SCF','SCF BR VAT RC','SCF BR WHT PAY','SCF BR VAT','SCF BR WHT NPAY')
       AND TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')
       AND M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
   ) NOS, 
   (
       select distinct M_CONTRACT, M_REF_DATA,M_TP_DTETRN,M_REP_DATE2, M_TP_TIMSYS,M_CNT_SRCMOD 
       from TP_ALL_REP 
       where 
       M_REF_DATA=@Mx_BAB_KSA:N
       AND (TRIM(M_CNT_SRCMOD)<>'T24.NOSTRO' or TRIM(M_CNT_SRCMOD) is null)
   ) TP_ALL,
   (
   select M_DEAL_REF,M_FC_ID,M_UTI_REF from STPDOC_ENTRY_UTI_REP where 
   M_REF_DATA=@Mx_BAB_KSA:N
   ) UTI_DATA,
   (
       select 
       M_DF_OREF, M_DF_CNTREF as Contract_Id,M_DF_TRDREF as TradeID,M_DF_QTY, --,M_V_INT1_LBL,M_V_INT1_SWF,
       regexp_replace(M_N_CSNS_ACC,'_|-|/','') M_N_CSNS_ACC,M_N_CSNS_LBL, M_N_CSNS_SWF,
       regexp_replace(M_V_BEN_ACC,'_|-|/','') M_V_BEN_ACC,M_V_BEN_LBL,M_V_BEN_SWF from  ACC_DLV_CASH_REP
       where  M_REF_DATA=@Mx_ACC_DAILY:N
   ) DLV_CASH
   
   where 
   1=1
   and TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT(+)=DECODE(NOS.M_PROD_ID,0,NOS.M_PRODUCERO,NOS.M_PROD_ID)
   and (
      NOS.M_VALUE_DAT=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@Mx_BAB_KSA:N
      ) --or TRIM(TP_ALL.M_REP_DATE2) is null
   )
   and UTI_DATA.M_FC_ID(+)=DECODE(NOS.M_PROD_ID,0,NOS.M_PRODUCERO,NOS.M_PROD_ID)
   and DLV_CASH.Contract_Id(+)=DECODE(NOS.M_PROD_ID,0,NOS.M_PRODUCERO,NOS.M_PROD_ID)
   and DLV_CASH.M_DF_QTY(+)=ABS(NOS.M_AMOUNT)
   and DLV_CASH.M_DF_OREF(+)=NOS.M_ID 
   
   union all
   
   select
       'CLOSING' as STMT_TYPE
       ,'008100000300008' as ACCOUNT_NUMBER
       ,TO_CHAR(BOOK_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') as BOOKING_DATE
       ,'' as VALUE_DATE
       ,(case when OPEN_AMT<0 then ABS(OPEN_AMT) else -1*ABS(OPEN_AMT) end) as AMOUNT
       ,(case when OPEN_AMT<0 then 'C' else 'D' end) as DC_MARK
       ,M_CURRENCY as CURRENCY
       ,'' as  REFERENCE1
       ,'' as REFERENCE2
       ,'' as REFERENCE3
       ,'' as NARRATIVE1
       ,'' as NARRATIVE2
       ,'' as NARRATIVE3
       ,'' as NARRATIVE4
       ,'' as TRANS_TYPE_ID_CODE
       ,'' as NARRATIVE5
       ,'' as NARRATIVE6
   from 
   ( 
      select NVL(sum(M_AMOUNT),0) as OPEN_AMT,M_REP_DATE2 as BOOK_DATE,M_CURRENCY
      from BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP
      where 
      TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)='008100000300008'
      AND M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and TRIM(M_CURRENCY)='SAR'
      group by M_REP_DATE2,M_CURRENCY
   )
)

WITH ACC_TRIAL_BAL AS (
    select GL_ACCOUNT,GL_PRODUCT,CURRENCY,AS_OF_DATE,Round(M_NETBALANCE,2) as AMOUNT_FCY,
    TO_CHAR(ROUND(DECODE(TRIM(ACC_BAL.CURRENCY),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT22.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT22.M_MID))) ),8)) as SPOT,    
    Round(M_NETBALANCE*DECODE(ACC_BAL.CURRENCY,'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT22.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT22.M_MID)))),2) AMOUNT_LCY,
    DECODE(ACC_BAL.GL_PRODUCT,
    1335,'Sukuk Floating',1330,'Sukuk Fixed',1415,'Real Estate Funds',1525,'Private Equity',1520,'REIT',1305,'LTM',6710,'Sukuk Issuance',PCODE.M_TYPOLOGY) as PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION
    ,DECODE(TRIM(ACC_DET.M_CATEGORY0),'96341','Trade Commitments, Borrowings',NVL(ACC_DET.M_DESC,'')) as ACCOUNT_DESC

    from (  select * from (  
                    SELECT M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
                       M_AS_OF_DATE as AS_OF_DATE,
                       M_GL_PRODUCT as GL_PRODUCT,
                       M_GL_ACCOUNT as GL_ACCOUNT,
                       M_CURRENCY as CURRENCY,
                       M_SYS_DATE,
                       CASE
                         WHEN SUM(M_EN_AMT) IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(SUM(M_EN_AMT) AS NUMBER (25,8))
                         ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (25,8))
                       END M_NETBALANCE, --M_CLOSING_BALANCE,
                       M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
                FROM (SELECT 'MX' AS M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
                              M_AS_OF_DATE,
                              '01' AS M_COMPANY,
                              M_SYS_DATE,
                              CASE
                                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
                                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2))
                              END M_BRANCH,
                              CASE
                                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3))) < 4 THEN '0000'
                                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3))
                              END M_GL_PRODUCT,
                              CASE
                               WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,4)) IS NULL THEN '00000'
                                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,4))
                              END M_GL_ACCOUNT,
                              CASE
                                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5))) < 8 THEN '00000000'
                                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5))
                              END M_COUNTERPARTY,
                              M_EN_CUR AS M_CURRENCY,
                              CASE
                                WHEN M_EN_AMT IS NOT NULL THEN CAST((-1*M_EN_AMT) AS NUMBER (25,8))
                                ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (25,8))
                              END M_EN_AMT,
                              TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') AS M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
                       FROM ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP T1
                       WHERE T1.M_FX_O_NB = 0
                       UNION ALL
                       SELECT 'MX' AS M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
                              M_AS_OF_DATE,
                              '01' AS M_COMPANY,
                              M_SYS_DATE,
                              CASE
                                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
                                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2))
                              END M_BRANCH,
                              CASE
                                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3))) < 4 THEN '0000'
                                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3))
                              END M_GL_PRODUCT,
                              CASE
                                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,4)) IS NULL THEN '00000'
                                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,4))
                              END M_GL_ACCOUNT,
                              CASE
                                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5))) < 8 THEN '00000000'
                                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5))
                              END M_COUNTERPARTY,
                              M_EN_CUR AS M_CURRENCY,
                              CASE
                                WHEN M_EN_AMT IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(M_EN_AMT AS NUMBER (25,8))
                                ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (25,8))
                              END M_EN_AMT,
                              TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') AS M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
                       FROM ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP T1
                       WHERE T1.M_FX_O_NB = 0
)
                GROUP BY M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
                         M_AS_OF_DATE,
                         M_GL_PRODUCT,
                         M_GL_ACCOUNT,
                         M_CURRENCY,
                         M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP,
                         M_SYS_DATE
                ) where M_NETBALANCE<>0
    ) ACC_BAL
    left outer join BAB_PRODUCT_CODE_REP PCODE
       on ACC_BAL.GL_PRODUCT=PCODE.M_PROD_CODE AND PCODE.M_PROD_CODE NOT in (1520,1305,1310,1640,1650,6460,6710) AND PCODE.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2    
        on SPOT2.M_DATE=ACC_BAL.AS_OF_DATE  and TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM)='SAR'  and TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN)=TRIM(DECODE(ACC_BAL.CURRENCY,'CNH','CNY',ACC_BAL.CURRENCY))
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT22    
        on SPOT22.M_DATE=ACC_BAL.AS_OF_DATE and TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_DEN)='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_NUM)=TRIM(DECODE(ACC_BAL.CURRENCY,'CNH','CNY',ACC_BAL.CURRENCY))
    left outer join ACC_DETAILS_REP ACC_DET
       on TRIM(ACC_DET.M_CATEGORY0)=TRIM(ACC_BAL.GL_ACCOUNT) and ( TRIM(ACC_DET.M_CATEGORY0)<>'96341' OR (TRIM(ACC_DET.M_CATEGORY0)='27125' and TRIM(ACC_DET.M_DESC) !='Inventory') )


)
select Account#,Account_Description,Product#,Product_Description,CURRENCY, Amount,
(case when TRIM(CURRENCY)='SAR' then Amount else Amount_IN_SAR end) as Amount_IN_SAR,SPOT
from (

----Heading Start
    select '' as Account#,'                                 Bank Albilad    '  as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
   '' CURRENCY, '' as Amount,'' as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where rownum=1
union all
    select '' as Account#,
    '     Trial Balance Summary Report By Account and Product  ' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
    '' CURRENCY, '' as Amount,'' as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where rownum=1
union all
    select ' ' as Account#,'                                 Murex TMS       ' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,' ' as Product_Description,
    '' CURRENCY, '' as Amount,'' as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT   from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where rownum=1
union all
    select ' ' as Account#,'            Report Date : '|| AS_OF_DATE
    as Account_Description,'' as Product#,' ' as Product_Description,
    '' CURRENCY, '' as Amount,'' as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where rownum=1
----Heading end

----Start----
union all
    select 'ASSETS' as Account#,'' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
    '' as CURRENCY, '' as Amount,'' as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where rownum=1
        union all
    select * from (
       select '                             '||TO_CHAR(GL_ACCOUNT) as Account#,NVL(ACCOUNT_DESC,' ') as Account_Description,TO_CHAR(GL_PRODUCT) as Product#,Product_Description,
       CURRENCY, TO_CHAR(sum(AMOUNT_FCY)) as Amount,TO_CHAR(sum(AMOUNT_LCY)) as Amount_IN_SAR,SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL TB
       where GL_ACCOUNT like '1%'
       group by TO_CHAR(GL_ACCOUNT),TO_CHAR(GL_PRODUCT),CURRENCY,Product_Description,NVL(ACCOUNT_DESC,' '),SPOT
       order by TO_CHAR(GL_ACCOUNT),TO_CHAR(GL_PRODUCT),CURRENCY,Product_Description,NVL(ACCOUNT_DESC,' '),SPOT asc
    ) where Amount<>0
       union all
    select 'TOTAL ASSETS' as Account#,'' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
    '' CURRENCY, TO_CHAR(sum(AMOUNT_FCY)) as Amount,TO_CHAR(sum(AMOUNT_LCY)) as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where GL_ACCOUNT like '1%'
        union all
    select '(?... Account Range for Assets 10001 - 19999)' as Account#,'' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
    '' as CURRENCY, '' as Amount,'' as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where rownum=1
    union all
    select '' as Account#,'' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
    '' CURRENCY, '' as Amount,'' as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where rownum=1
----End----   
----Start----
union all
    select 'LIABILITIES' as Account#,'' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
    '' as CURRENCY, '' as CURRENCY_Amount,'' as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where rownum=1
        union all
    select * from (
       select '                             '||TO_CHAR(GL_ACCOUNT) as Account#,NVL(ACCOUNT_DESC,' ') as Account_Description,TO_CHAR(GL_PRODUCT) as Product#,Product_Description,
       CURRENCY, TO_CHAR(sum(AMOUNT_FCY)) as Amount,TO_CHAR(sum(AMOUNT_LCY)) as Amount_IN_SAR,SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL TB  
       where GL_ACCOUNT like '2%'
       group by TO_CHAR(GL_ACCOUNT),TO_CHAR(GL_PRODUCT),CURRENCY,Product_Description,NVL(ACCOUNT_DESC,' '),SPOT
       order by TO_CHAR(GL_ACCOUNT),TO_CHAR(GL_PRODUCT),CURRENCY,Product_Description,NVL(ACCOUNT_DESC,' '),SPOT asc
    ) where Amount<>0
        union all
    select 'TOTAL LIABILITIES' as Account#,'' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
    '' CURRENCY, TO_CHAR(sum(AMOUNT_FCY)) as Amount,TO_CHAR(sum(AMOUNT_LCY)) as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where GL_ACCOUNT like '2%'
        union all
    select '(?. Account Range for Liabilities 20001 - 29999)' as Account#,'' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
    '' as CURRENCY, '' as Amount,'' as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where rownum=1
    union all
    select '' as Account#,'' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
    '' CURRENCY, '' as Amount,'' as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where rownum=1
----End----   
----Start----
union all
    select 'SHAREHOLDERS EQUITY' as Account#,'' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
    '' as CURRENCY, '' as CURRENCY_Amount,'' as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where rownum=1
        union all
    select * from (
       select '                             '||TO_CHAR(GL_ACCOUNT) as Account#,NVL(ACCOUNT_DESC,' ') as Account_Description,TO_CHAR(GL_PRODUCT) as Product#,Product_Description,
       CURRENCY, TO_CHAR(sum(AMOUNT_FCY)) as Amount,TO_CHAR(sum(AMOUNT_LCY)) as Amount_IN_SAR,SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL TB
       where GL_ACCOUNT like '3%'
       group by TO_CHAR(GL_ACCOUNT),TO_CHAR(GL_PRODUCT),CURRENCY,Product_Description,NVL(ACCOUNT_DESC,' '),SPOT
       order by TO_CHAR(GL_ACCOUNT),TO_CHAR(GL_PRODUCT),CURRENCY,Product_Description,NVL(ACCOUNT_DESC,' '),SPOT asc
    ) where Amount<>0
        union all
    select 'TOTAL SHAREHOLDERS EQUITY' as Account#,'' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
    '' CURRENCY, TO_CHAR(sum(AMOUNT_FCY)) as Amount,TO_CHAR(sum(AMOUNT_LCY)) as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where GL_ACCOUNT like '3%'
        union all
    select '(?. Account Range for Equity  30001 - 39999)' as Account#,'' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
    '' as CURRENCY, '' as Amount,'' as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where rownum=1
    union all
    select '' as Account#,'' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
    '' CURRENCY, '' as Amount,'' as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where rownum=1
  ----End----   
----Start----  
union all
    select 'INCOME' as Account#,'' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
    '' as CURRENCY, '' as CURRENCY_Amount,'' as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where rownum=1
        union all

       group by TO_CHAR(GL_ACCOUNT),TO_CHAR(GL_PRODUCT),CURRENCY,Product_Description,NVL(ACCOUNT_DESC,' '),SPOT
       order by TO_CHAR(GL_ACCOUNT),TO_CHAR(GL_PRODUCT),CURRENCY,Product_Description,NVL(ACCOUNT_DESC,' '),SPOT asc
    ) where Amount<>0
    union all
    select '' as Account#,'' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
    '' CURRENCY, '' as Amount,'' as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where rownum=1
----End----   
----Start----
union all
    select 'TOTAL OFF BALANCE SHEET' as Account#,'' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
    '' CURRENCY, TO_CHAR(sum(AMOUNT_FCY)) as Amount,TO_CHAR(sum(AMOUNT_LCY)) as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL 
    where GL_ACCOUNT like '8%' or GL_ACCOUNT like '9%'
        union all
    select '(?. Account Range for off Balance Sheet from 80001 - 99999)' as Account#,'' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
    '' as CURRENCY, '' as Amount,'' as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where rownum=1        
 union all
    select '' as Account#,'' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
    '' CURRENCY, '' as Amount,'' as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where rownum=1
----End----   
----Start----  Migration
union all
    select '' as Account#,'' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
    '' CURRENCY, '' as Amount,'' as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where rownum=1
    union all
   select * from (
       select '' as Account#,'Migration Account' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
       CURRENCY, TO_CHAR(sum(AMOUNT_FCY)) as Amount,TO_CHAR(sum(AMOUNT_LCY)) as Amount_IN_SAR,SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL TB
       where GL_ACCOUNT='Migration Account'
       group by TO_CHAR(GL_ACCOUNT),TO_CHAR(GL_PRODUCT),CURRENCY,Product_Description,NVL(ACCOUNT_DESC,' '),SPOT
       order by TO_CHAR(GL_ACCOUNT),TO_CHAR(GL_PRODUCT),CURRENCY,Product_Description,NVL(ACCOUNT_DESC,' '),SPOT asc
    ) where Amount<>0
    
----End----   Migration
----Start----
union all
    select 'GRAND TOTAL' as Account#,'' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
    '' CURRENCY, TO_CHAR(sum(AMOUNT_FCY)) as Amount,TO_CHAR(sum(AMOUNT_LCY)) as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL 
    where 1=1
----End----
)  A*/

WITH BN_ALL_ACC_FOR_BN as (  
    select NOSTRO.M_PROD_ID,NOSTRO.M_ACCOUNT_N,NOSTRO.M_AMOUNT,NOSTRO.M_CURRENCY ,NOSTRO.M_VALIDATIO,tpall.M_PTF_PAREN3,TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO,TPALL.M_NB,
    case 
           when TPALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD='mx' then 'Cash Center' 
           when TPALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD='T24.FX' and TRIM(UDF.M_CHANNEL) is not null then UDF.M_CHANNEL
           else 'Not_updated' 
           end as DIVISION,
           --UDF.M_CASH_CNTR as REGION,
           case
           when trim(UDF.M_CASH_CNTR) IS NULL THEN ' '
           when UDF.M_CASH_CNTR IN ('Riyadh Cash Unit','Qassim Cash and Clearing Unit') then 'Central'
           when UDF.M_CASH_CNTR IN ('Makkah Cash and Clearing Unit','Madinah Cash and Clearing Unit','Jeddah Cash and Clearing Unit') then 'Western'
           when UDF.M_CASH_CNTR IN ('AlAhsaa Cash Unit','Dammam Cash and Clearing Unit') then 'Eastern'
           when UDF.M_CASH_CNTR IN ('Jazan Cash and Clearing Unit','Khamis Mushait Cash and Clearing Unit') then 'Southern'
           when UDF.M_CASH_CNTR IN ('Tabuk Cash and Clearing Unit') then 'Northern'
           else 'New Cash Center' end as REGION,
           UDF.M_CATEGORY,
    DECODE(NOSTRO.M_CURRENCY,'SAR',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,0) as ACC_BALANCE_SAR,
    DECODE(NOSTRO.M_CURRENCY,'SAR',0,TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL) as BALANCE_FCY
    
    from 
    BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP NOSTRO,TP_ALL_REP  TPALL , TRD_UDF_REP UDF
    where 
    NOSTRO.M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Banknotes', 'Banknotes Credit') and NOSTRO.M_VALIDATIO='Settled' -- as per bussiness input to get only settled details
    and NOSTRO.M_REF_DATA = (select MAX(M_REF_DATA) from dyn_audit_rep where M_OUTPUTTBL='BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR.REP' and M_TAG_DATA='MLC_BAB' and M_DELETED='N')
    and NOSTRO.M_PROD_ID=TPALL.M_CONTRACT and TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
    and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YYYY') AND tpall.M_PTF_PAREN3<>'INTERBANK'
    and TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=UDF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=UDF.M_REF_DATA 
)

select M_ACCOUNT_N as ACC,M_CURRENCY as CURRENCY,DIVISION,REGION,' ' as BRANCH, sum(ACC_BALANCE_SAR) ACC_BALANCE_SAR, sum(BALANCE_FCY) BALANCE_FCY 
from BN_ALL_ACC_FOR_BN
group by M_ACCOUNT_N,M_CURRENCY,DIVISION,REGION

WITH BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT_DETAILS as (
select
    TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 REP_DATE,
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR CURRENCY,
    NVL(SUM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL),0) as  LIMIT_FCY
from TP_ALL_REP  TPALL
where TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
and TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO IN ('Banknotes', 'Banknotes Credit')
and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' 
and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTESYS, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YYYY')
group by TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_REP_DATE2
)

select REP_DATE,CURRENCY,BALANCE_FCY, LIMIT_FCY as MAX_BALANCE_LIMIT_FCY,
BALANCE_FCY*NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0) as ACTUAL_BALANCE_SAR, LIMIT_FCY*NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0) as MAX_BALANCE_LIMIT_SAR,
(BALANCE_FCY/LIMIT_FCY)*100 || '%' LIMIT_CONSUMPTION, NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0) as RATE
from 
        (
        select 'AED' as CURRENCY,REP_DATE,
        NVL(( select LIMIT_FCY from BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT_DETAILS where CURRENCY='AED'),0) as BALANCE_FCY,
        (select M_TARGETAMOUNT from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where M_REPORTNAME='BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT' and M_TARGETMONTH IN ('AED')) as LIMIT_FCY 
        from BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT_DETAILS where rownum=1
            union all
        select 'AUD' as CURRENCY,REP_DATE,
        NVL(( select LIMIT_FCY from BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT_DETAILS where CURRENCY='AUD'),0) as BALANCE_FCY,
        (select M_TARGETAMOUNT from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where M_REPORTNAME='BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT' and M_TARGETMONTH IN ('AUD')) as  LIMIT_FCY 
        from BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT_DETAILS where rownum=1
            union all
        select 'BHD' as CURRENCY,REP_DATE,
        NVL(( select LIMIT_FCY from BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT_DETAILS where CURRENCY='BHD'),0) as BALANCE_FCY,
        (select M_TARGETAMOUNT from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where M_REPORTNAME='BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT' and M_TARGETMONTH IN ('BHD')) as  LIMIT_FCY 
        from BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT_DETAILS where rownum=1
            union all
        select 'CAD' as CURRENCY,REP_DATE,
        NVL(( select LIMIT_FCY from BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT_DETAILS where CURRENCY='CAD'),0) as BALANCE_FCY,
        (select M_TARGETAMOUNT from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where M_REPORTNAME='BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT' and M_TARGETMONTH IN ('CAD')) as  LIMIT_FCY 
        from BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT_DETAILS where rownum=1
            union all
        select 'CHF' as CURRENCY,REP_DATE,
        NVL(( select LIMIT_FCY from BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT_DETAILS where CURRENCY='CHF'),0) as BALANCE_FCY,
        (select M_TARGETAMOUNT from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where M_REPORTNAME='BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT' and M_TARGETMONTH IN ('CHF')) as  LIMIT_FCY 
        from BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT_DETAILS where rownum=1
            union all
        select 'EGP' as CURRENCY,REP_DATE,
        NVL(( select LIMIT_FCY from BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT_DETAILS where CURRENCY='EGP'),0) as BALANCE_FCY,
        (select M_TARGETAMOUNT from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where M_REPORTNAME='BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT' and M_TARGETMONTH IN ('EGP')) as  LIMIT_FCY 
        from BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT_DETAILS where rownum=1
            union all
        select 'EUR' as CURRENCY,REP_DATE,
        NVL(( select LIMIT_FCY from BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT_DETAILS where CURRENCY='EUR'),0) as BALANCE_FCY,
        (select M_TARGETAMOUNT from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where M_REPORTNAME='BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT' and M_TARGETMONTH IN ('EUR')) as  LIMIT_FCY 
        from BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT_DETAILS where rownum=1
            union all

        (select M_TARGETAMOUNT from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where M_REPORTNAME='BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT' and M_TARGETMONTH IN ('PHP')) as  LIMIT_FCY

        (select M_TARGETAMOUNT from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where M_REPORTNAME='BN_CURR_BAL_VS_LIMIT' and M_TARGETMONTH IN ('QAR')) as  LIMIT_FCY

WITH BN_LOCATION as (
    select 
       TPALL.M_REP_DATE2,
       TPALL.M_NB,
       TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,
       TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,
       TPALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD,
       UDF.M_CHANNEL,
       case 
       when TPALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD='mx' then 'Cash Center' 
       when TPALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD='T24.FX' and TRIM(UDF.M_CHANNEL) is not null then UDF.M_CHANNEL
       else 'Not_updated' 
       end as DIVISION,
       UDF.M_CASH_CNTR as CASH_CNTR
    from TP_ALL_REP  TPALL , TRD_UDF_REP UDF
    where TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
    and TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO IN ('Banknotes', 'Banknotes Credit')
   -- and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
    AND tpall.M_PTF_PAREN3<>'INTERBANK'
    and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YYYY')
    and TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=UDF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=UDF.M_REF_DATA
)

WITH BN_REVENUE_VOLUME as (
    select 
       
       TPALL.M_NB as REF_NO,
       TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 as PROCESSING_DATE,
       DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ) as DEBIT_CURRENCY,
       DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ) as CREDIT_CURRENCY,
       
       DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S'
       ,DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_UQTY,'SAR',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0)) 
       ,DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ,'SAR',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*NVL(SPOT3.M_MID,0))
       )as LOC_AMT_CREDITED,       
       
       DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B'
       ,DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_UQTY,'SAR',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0)) 
       ,DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ,'SAR',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*NVL(SPOT3.M_MID,0))
       )as LOC_AMT_DEBITED,
       TPALL.M_TP_PRICE as CUSTOMER_RATE,
       DECODE(TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0,0,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG1,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0) as COVER_RATE --rate-margin need to update or get coverrate from screen after CR completed implementation

              
    from TP_ALL_REP  TPALL , TRD_UDF_REP UDF,MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2,MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT3, TP_RT_REP TPRT
    where TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
    and TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO IN ('Banknotes','Banknotes Credit')
   -- and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
    AND tpall.M_PTF_PAREN3<>'INTERBANK' and TPALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD='mx'
    and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTESYS, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YYYY')
    and TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=UDF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=UDF.M_REF_DATA
    and SPOT2.M_DATE(+)=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM(+)='SAR' and SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN(+)=TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR
    and SPOT3.M_DATE(+)=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and SPOT3.M_CCY_NUM(+)='SAR' and SPOT3.M_CCY_DEN(+)=TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ
    and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TPRT.M_REF_DATA(+) and TPALL.M_NB=TPRT.M_NB(+)
)

select 'Details' as BREAKDOWN,REF_NO,PROCESSING_DATE,DEBIT_CURRENCY,CREDIT_CURRENCY,LOC_AMT_CREDITED,LOC_AMT_DEBITED,
ABS(LOC_AMT_CREDITED-LOC_AMT_DEBITED) as PROFIT, CUSTOMER_RATE,COVER_RATE, 0 as ORDER1, 0 as TARGET,'' as DDATE,'' as PERNCT
,0 as SAR_VOLUME
from BN_REVENUE_VOLUME

union all

select 'ProfitVsTarget' as BREAKDOWN,0 as REF_NO,null as PROCESSING_DATE,'' as DEBIT_CURRENCY,'' as CREDIT_CURRENCY,0 as LOC_AMT_CREDITED,

    (select sum(ABS(LOC_AMT_CREDITED-LOC_AMT_DEBITED)) from BN_REVENUE_VOLUME where TO_CHAR(PROCESSING_DATE, 'MON')='NOV') as PROFIT,
     11 as ORDER1,
    (select M_TARGETAMOUNT from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where M_REPORTNAME='BN_REVENUE_VOLUME' and M_TARGETMONTH='NOV') as TARGET
    ,'NOV'||TO_CHAR(PROCESSING_DATE,'YYYY') as DDATE,
    (select sum(ABS(LOC_AMT_CREDITED)) from BN_REVENUE_VOLUME where TO_CHAR(PROCESSING_DATE, 'MON')='NOV') as SAR_VOLUME
    from BN_REVENUE_VOLUME where rownum=1
union all
     select
    (select sum(ABS(LOC_AMT_CREDITED-LOC_AMT_DEBITED)) from BN_REVENUE_VOLUME where TO_CHAR(PROCESSING_DATE, 'MON')='DEC') as PROFIT,
     12 as ORDER1,
    (select M_TARGETAMOUNT from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where M_REPORTNAME='BN_REVENUE_VOLUME' and M_TARGETMONTH='DEC') as TARGET
    ,'DEC'||TO_CHAR(PROCESSING_DATE,'YYYY') as DDATE,
    (select sum(ABS(LOC_AMT_CREDITED)) from BN_REVENUE_VOLUME where TO_CHAR(PROCESSING_DATE, 'MON')='DEC') as SAR_VOLUME
    from BN_REVENUE_VOLUME where rownum=1 
)

union all

select 'Annual' as BREAKDOWN,0 as REF_NO,null as PROCESSING_DATE,'' as DEBIT_CURRENCY,'' as CREDIT_CURRENCY,0 as LOC_AMT_CREDITED,
    0 as LOC_AMT_DEBITED,PROFIT,0 as CUSTOMER_RATE,0 as COVER_RATE,0 as ORDER1,TARGET,' ' as DDATE
    ,ROUND((NVL(PROFIT,0)/NVL(TARGET,1))*100,0)||'%' as PERNCT,0 as SAR_VOLUME
    from
(
     select
    (select sum(ABS(LOC_AMT_CREDITED-LOC_AMT_DEBITED)) from BN_REVENUE_VOLUME) as PROFIT,
    (select sum(M_TARGETAMOUNT) from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where M_REPORTNAME='BN_REVENUE_VOLUME') as TARGET
    from BN_REVENUE_VOLUME where rownum=1
)

WITH BN_SALES_PER_BRANCH as (
    select 
       TPALL.M_REP_DATE2,
       TPALL.M_NB,
       TPALL.M_TP_BUY,
       TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,
       TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as CURRENCY,
       TPALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD,
       UDF.M_CHANNEL,
       case 
       when TPALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD='mx' then 'Cash Center' 
       when TPALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD='T24.FX' and TRIM(UDF.M_CHANNEL) is not null then UDF.M_CHANNEL
       else 'Not_updated' 
       end as DIVISION,
       case
       when TRIM(UDF.M_CASH_CNTR) is not null then UDF.M_CASH_CNTR else 'Not_updated' 
       end as BRANCH
       ,DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',
        DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,'SAR',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0)) 
        ,0) as AMOUNT_SAR_SELL
       ,DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',
       DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,'SAR',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0),TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL)
       ,0) as AMOUNT_FCY_SELL
       ,DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',
        DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,'SAR',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0)) 
        ,0) as AMOUNT_SAR_BUY
       ,DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',
       DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,'SAR',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0),TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL)
       ,0) as AMOUNT_FCY_BUY    
       ,DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',1,0) NO_TXN_SELL
       ,DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',1,0) NO_TXN_BUY
       
    from TP_ALL_REP  TPALL , TRD_UDF_REP UDF,MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2
    where TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
    and TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO IN ('Banknotes', 'Banknotes Credit')
   -- and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
    AND tpall.M_PTF_PAREN3<>'INTERBANK' and TPALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD='mx'
    and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTESYS, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YYYY')
    and TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=UDF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=UDF.M_REF_DATA
    and SPOT2.M_DATE(+)=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM(+)='SAR' and SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN(+)=TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR
)


select 'Details' as BREAKDOWN,
CURRENCY,DIVISION,BRANCH,M_TP_BUY, NO_TXN_SELL, AMOUNT_SAR_SELL/1000000 AMOUNT_SAR_SELL, AMOUNT_FCY_SELL/1000000 AMOUNT_FCY_SELL, 
AMOUNT_SAR_BUY/1000000 AMOUNT_SAR_BUY, AMOUNT_FCY_BUY/1000000 AMOUNT_FCY_BUY,NO_TXN_BUY
,ABS(AMOUNT_SAR_SELL-AMOUNT_FCY_SELL)/1000000 as PROFIT_SELL,ABS(AMOUNT_SAR_BUY-AMOUNT_FCY_BUY)/1000000 as PROFIT_BUY,0 as NOMINAL
from
(
    select CURRENCY,DIVISION,BRANCH,M_TP_BUY,sum(AMOUNT_SAR_SELL) AMOUNT_SAR_SELL,sum(AMOUNT_FCY_SELL) AMOUNT_FCY_SELL,
    sum(AMOUNT_SAR_BUY) AMOUNT_SAR_BUY,sum(AMOUNT_FCY_BUY) AMOUNT_FCY_BUY, sum(NO_TXN_SELL) NO_TXN_SELL,sum(NO_TXN_BUY) NO_TXN_BUY
    from BN_SALES_PER_BRANCH
    group by CURRENCY,DIVISION,BRANCH,M_TP_BUY
) 

union all

select 'BUY_SELL' as BREAKDOWN,
'' CURRENCY,'' DIVISION,'' BRANCH,DECODE(M_TP_BUY,'B','BUY','SELL') M_TP_BUY, 0 NO_TXN_SELL, 0 AMOUNT_SAR_SELL, 
0 AMOUNT_FCY_SELL, 0 AMOUNT_SAR_BUY, 0 AMOUNT_FCY_BUY,0 NO_TXN_BUY
,0 as PROFIT_SELL,0 as PROFIT_BUY, sum(M_TP_NOMINAL) NOMINAL
from BN_SALES_PER_BRANCH
group by M_TP_BUY

WITH BN_TODAY_VS_YEST as (
    select 
        TPALL.M_REP_DATE2,
        TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR CURRENCY,
        NVL(SUM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL),0) as CURRENCY_BAL_TDAY,
        0 as CURRENCY_BAL_YDAY
    from TP_ALL_REP  TPALL
    where TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
    and TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO IN ('Banknotes', 'Banknotes Credit')
    and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' 
    and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTESYS, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YYYY')
    group by TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_REP_DATE2
    
    union all 
    
    select 
        TPALL.M_REP_DATE2,
        TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR CURRENCY,
        0 as CURRENCY_BAL_TDAY,
        NVL(SUM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL),0) as CURRENCY_BAL_YDAY
        
    from TP_ALL_REP  TPALL
    where TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalData_Yesterday:N
    and TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO IN ('Banknotes', 'Banknotes Credit')
    and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' 
    and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTESYS, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YYYY')
    group by TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_REP_DATE2
)

YESTERDAY_FCY,TODAY_FCY,YESTERDAY_FCY-TODAY_FCY as DIFFERENCE_FCY ,
case when YESTERDAY_FCY=0 then 0 else ((YESTERDAY_FCY-TODAY_FCY)/YESTERDAY_FCY) *100 end  || '%' as PERCENTAGE_FCY
from (
        select 'AED' as CURRENCY,CURRENCY_BAL_YDAY*NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,1) as YESTERDAY_SAR,CURRENCY_BAL_TDAY*NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,1) as TODAY_SAR

--BSBM MM Borrowing  
select
    TRN_ALL.M_NB as REF_NO,
    TRN_ALL.M_CIF as CIF,
    TRN_ALL.M_CPTY_NAME as NAME1,
			TRN_ALL.M_TP_DTEFST as START_DATE,
    TRN_ALL.M_TP_DTEEXP as MATURITY_DATE,
    TRN_ALL.M_NO_OF_DAYS as DAYS1,
    TRN_ALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as AMOUNT,
    case 
    when TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Repo Waad' then TRN_ALL.M_TP_RPRATE
    else TRN_ALL.M_TP_PRICE END as RATE,
    case 
      when M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing') and M_BANK='Y'       then M_PRODUCT_CODE||'_01'
      when M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing') and M_BROKER='Y'     then M_PRODUCT_CODE||'_02'
      when M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing') and M_CORPORATE='Y'  then M_PRODUCT_CODE||'_03'
    else M_PRODUCT_CODE end as Category,
   M_TP_DTETRN as TRADE_DATE,
   M_CMP_TYPO as Product,
   M_TP_NOMCUR as CURRENCY,
   NVL(M_PROFIT_AMOUNT,0) as Profit,
    case 
    when TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Repo Waad' then TRN_ALL.M_TP_RPRATE
   else TRN_ALL.M_TP_PRICE END as MONEY_MARKET_RATE,
   M_SALES_MARGIN as SPREAD,
    case 
    when TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Repo Waad' then TRN_ALL.M_TP_RPRATE
   else TRN_ALL.M_TP_PRICE-M_SALES_MARGIN END as CUSTOMER_RATE,
   TRN_ALL.M_TP_PFOLIO as PORTFOLIO,
      TRN_ALL.M_TP_TIMSYS as BOOKING_TIME,
   case 
   when TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_CUSTOMER)='Y' then 'Retail'
   when TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_BANK)='Y' then 'InterBank'
   when TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_CORPORATE)='Y' then 'Corporate'
   else '' end as CLIENT_TYPE
from 
BAB_TRN_ALL_REP TRN_ALL
where ---TRN_ALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' and 
TRN_ALL.M_TP_INT='N'
and TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing','Repo SAMA','Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad','SAMA Bill','Wakala Placement CFC')

WITH FX_NON_DOMESTIC AS (
SELECT
M_NB as TRADE_NO,
M_CPTY_NAME as COUNTER_PARTY_NAME,
M_CIF as CIF,
M_BUY_CCY as CURRENCY_BOUGHT,
M_SELL_CCY as CURRENCY_SOLD,
M_TP_DTETRN as DEAL_DATE,
TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN, 'YYYY') AS TRADE_YEAR,
CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN, 'MM') IN ('01','02','03') THEN 'Q1' WHEN TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN, 'MM') IN ('04','05','06') THEN 'Q2' WHEN TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN, 'MM') IN ('07','08','09') THEN 'Q3' ELSE 'Q4' END AS TRADE_QTR,
TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN, 'MON') AS TRADE_MON,
TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN, 'MM') AS TRADE_MON_NUM,
M_BUY_AMOUNT as AMOUNT_BOUGHT,
M_SELL_AMOUNT as AMOUNT_SOLD,
DECODE(M_BUY_CCY,'SAR',1,NVL(BUY_SPOT.M_MID,NVL(1/BUY_SPOT2.M_MID,0))) * M_BUY_AMOUNT * (1/1000000) as BUY_LCY_EQUIV,
DECODE(M_SELL_CCY,'SAR',1,NVL(SELL_SPOT.M_MID,NVL(1/SELL_SPOT2.M_MID,0))) * M_SELL_AMOUNT * (1/1000000) as SELL_LCY_EQUIV
from 
   BAB_TRN_ALL_REP TRN_ALL
   left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP BUY_SPOT

   left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP BUY_SPOT2

   left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SELL_SPOT
       on TRN_ALL.M_REP_DATE2=SELL_SPOT.M_DATE and TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_SELL_CCY)=TRIM(SELL_SPOT.M_CCY_DEN)  and SELL_SPOT.M_CCY_NUM='SAR'
   left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SELL_SPOT2

   where M_TP_INT='N' and M_CMP_TYPO IN ('Spot','FX Waad','FX Murabaha','Split Value','SAMA Purchase','FX Swap','Time Option')

)

TRIM(M_DESC): FX Unit FXd deals SQL
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
WITH FX_DEALS AS (
   SELECT 
   TRN_ALL.M_NB as REF_NO,
   TRN_ALL.M_CPTY_NAME as CUST_NAME,
   TRN_ALL.M_CIF as CIF,
   TRN_ALL.M_BUY_CCY as CCY_BOUGHT,
   TRN_ALL.M_SELL_CCY as CCY_SOLD,
   TRN_ALL.M_TP_DTETRN as DEAL_DATE,
   TRN_ALL.M_TP_DTETRN+2 as SPOT_DATE,
   TRN_ALL.M_BUY_AMOUNT * (1/1000000) as AMOUNT_BOUGHT,
   TRN_ALL.M_SELL_AMOUNT * (1/1000000) as AMOUNT_SOLD,
   DECODE(M_BUY_CCY,'SAR',1,NVL(BUY_SPOT.M_MID,NVL(1/BUY_SPOT2.M_MID,0))) * M_BUY_AMOUNT * (1/1000000) as BUY_LCY_EQUIV,
   DECODE(M_SELL_CCY,'SAR',1,NVL(SELL_SPOT.M_MID,NVL(1/SELL_SPOT2.M_MID,0))) * M_SELL_AMOUNT * (1/1000000) as SELL_LCY_EQUIV,
   TRN_ALL.M_TP_NOMINAL_MIL_SAR as NOMINAL,   
   TRN_ALL.M_TRN_MON as TRADE_MON,
   TRN_ALL.M_REP_MON as REP_MON,
   TRN_ALL.M_TRN_YEAR as TRADE_YEAR,
   TRN_ALL.M_REP_YEAR as REP_YEAR,
   TO_DATE((TRN_ALL.M_TRN_MON || ' ' || TRN_ALL.M_TRN_YEAR), 'MON YYYY') AS VOL_MON,
   TRN_ALL.M_INSTRUMENT,
   TRN_ALL.M_TP_DTEPMT as M_VALUE_DATE,
   CASE WHEN (TRIM(NVL(TRN_ALL.M_PORTFOLIO,'')) IN ('SL_FX_SP_TSD', 'SAL_FX_FWD') AND TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO) IN ('Spot','FX Waad')) THEN 'Sales'
   ELSE TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO END as PRODUCT,
   CASE WHEN (TRIM(NVL(TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO,'')) = 'Banknotes') OR (TRIM(NVL(TRN_ALL.M_PORTFOLIO,'')) IN ('SL_FX_SP_TSD', 'SAL_FX_FWD') AND TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO) IN ('Spot','FX Waad')) THEN M_TP_FXGFWD
   ELSE TRN_ALL.M_TP_PRICE END as DEAL_RATE
   ,TRN_ALL.M_REP_DATE2,BUY_SPOT.M_DATE,BUY_SPOT2.M_DATE,SELL_SPOT.M_DATE,SELL_SPOT2.M_DATE
   ,NVL(BUY_SPOT.M_MID,NVL(1/BUY_SPOT2.M_MID,0)),NVL(SELL_SPOT.M_MID,NVL(1/SELL_SPOT2.M_MID,0)) 
   ,DECODE(M_BUY_CCY,'SAR',1,NVL(BUY_SPOT.M_MID,NVL(1/BUY_SPOT2.M_MID,0))) as BUY_CONV_RATE
   ,DECODE(M_SELL_CCY,'SAR',1,NVL(SELL_SPOT.M_MID,NVL(1/SELL_SPOT2.M_MID,0))) as SELL_CONV_RATE
   ,M_REVALUATION_AMOUNT AS PL
   FROM 
   BAB_TRN_ALL_REP TRN_ALL
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP BUY_SPOT
       on TRN_ALL.M_REP_DATE2=BUY_SPOT.M_DATE and TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_BUY_CCY)=TRIM(BUY_SPOT.M_CCY_DEN)  and BUY_SPOT.M_CCY_NUM='SAR'
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP BUY_SPOT2
       on TRN_ALL.M_REP_DATE2=BUY_SPOT2.M_DATE and TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_BUY_CCY)=TRIM(BUY_SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM)  and BUY_SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN='SAR'	
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SELL_SPOT
       on TRN_ALL.M_REP_DATE2=SELL_SPOT.M_DATE and TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_SELL_CCY)=TRIM(SELL_SPOT.M_CCY_DEN)  and SELL_SPOT.M_CCY_NUM='SAR'
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SELL_SPOT2
       on TRN_ALL.M_REP_DATE2=SELL_SPOT2.M_DATE and TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_SELL_CCY)=TRIM(SELL_SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM)  and SELL_SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN='SAR'
    left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES 
       on TRIM(NVL(TRN_ALL.M_TP_CNTRPID,''))=TRIM(NVL(PARTIES.M_LABEL,'')) and TRN_ALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
   
   where 
   M_TP_INT='N' 
   and M_CMP_TYPO IN ('Spot','FX Waad','FX Murabaha','Split Value','SAMA Purchase','FX Swap','Time Option','Banknotes')
   and TRIM(M_CPTY_NAME) NOT IN ('FX_RETAIL_AGGR','FX_RETAIL','FX_CORPORATE_AGGR','TECH COUNTERPARTY')
   and TRIM(NVL(M_SOURCE_MODULE,'')) IN ('mx','FXT')
)

CAST('Daily' AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS BREAKDOWN,
CAST(REF_NO AS NUMBER(30,0)) AS REF_NO,
CAST(CUST_NAME AS VARCHAR2(255)) AS CUST_NAME,
CAST(CIF AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS CIF,

CAST(CCY_SOLD AS VARCHAR2(3)) AS CCY_SOLD,
CAST(DEAL_DATE AS DATE) AS DEAL_DATE,
CAST(SPOT_DATE AS DATE) AS SPOT_DATE,
CAST(AMOUNT_BOUGHT*1000000 AS NUMBER(26,2)) AS AMOUNT_BOUGHT, ---- Updated to show actual numbers in data list and millions in chart
CAST(AMOUNT_SOLD*1000000 AS NUMBER(26,2)) AS AMOUNT_SOLD,
CAST(BUY_LCY_EQUIV*1000000 AS NUMBER(26,2)) AS BUY_LCY_EQUIV,
CAST(SELL_LCY_EQUIV*1000000 AS NUMBER(26,2)) AS SELL_LCY_EQUIV,
CAST(VOL_MON AS DATE) AS TRD_MON,
CAST(TO_CHAR(VOL_MON, 'MON-YYYY') AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS VOL_MON,
CAST(0 AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS VOL_VALUE, 
CAST(PRODUCT AS VARCHAR(30)) AS PRODUCT,
CAST(DEAL_RATE AS NUMBER(25,5)) AS DEAL_RATE,
CAST(M_VALUE_DATE AS DATE) AS VALUE_DATE,
CAST(BUY_CONV_RATE AS NUMBER(25,5)) AS BUY_CONV_RATE,
CAST(SELL_CONV_RATE AS NUMBER(25,5)) AS SELL_CONV_RATE,
CAST(PL AS NUMBER(26,2)) AS PL
from FX_DEALS

SELECT DISTINCT

CAST('Monthly' AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS BREAKDOWN,
CAST(0 AS NUMBER(30,0)) AS REF_NO,
CAST(CUST_NAME AS VARCHAR2(255)) AS CUST_NAME,
CAST(CIF AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS CIF,

--0 as ORDER1,

CAST(0 AS NUMBER(25,5)) AS DEAL_RATE,

CAST(0 AS NUMBER(25,5)) AS BUY_CONV_RATE,
CAST(0 AS NUMBER(25,5)) AS SELL_CONV_RATE,

from FX_DEALS
