TRIM(M_DESC): FX Unit FXd deals SQL
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
WITH FX_DEALS AS (
   
SELECT  
		 DECODE(SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_BOUGHT,'SAR',1,NVL(BUY_SPOT.M_MID,NVL(1/BUY_SPOT2.M_MID,0))) * SCOPE_TRDS.AMOUNT_BOUGHT as BUY_LCY_EQUIV,
   DECODE(SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_SOLD,'SAR',1,NVL(SELL_SPOT.M_MID,NVL(1/SELL_SPOT2.M_MID,0))) * SCOPE_TRDS.AMOUNT_SOLD as SELL_LCY_EQUIV,
   
   CASE WHEN (TRIM(SCOPE_TRDS.M_PL_CUR) = TRIM(SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_BOUGHT)) THEN SCOPE_TRDS.PL_FCY * DECODE(SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_BOUGHT,'SAR',1,NVL(BUY_SPOT.M_MID,NVL(1/BUY_SPOT2.M_MID,0))) 
   ELSE SCOPE_TRDS.PL_FCY * DECODE(SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_SOLD,'SAR',1,NVL(SELL_SPOT.M_MID,NVL(1/SELL_SPOT2.M_MID,0)))
   END AS PL_SAR,
   -- ** Changes for USD *** --
   --TRN_ALL.M_TP_NOMCUR AS NOM_CUR,
   DECODE(SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_BOUGHT,'USD',1, NVL(BUY_SPOT_USD.M_MID,NVL(1/BUY_SPOT2_USD.M_MID,0))) * SCOPE_TRDS.AMOUNT_BOUGHT as BUY_USD_EQUIV,
   DECODE(SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_SOLD,'USD',1,NVL(SELL_SPOT_USD.M_MID,NVL(1/SELL_SPOT2_USD.M_MID,0)) ) * SCOPE_TRDS.AMOUNT_SOLD as SELL_USD_EQUIV,
   
   CASE WHEN (TRIM(SCOPE_TRDS.M_PL_CUR) = TRIM(SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_BOUGHT)) THEN SCOPE_TRDS.PL_FCY * DECODE(SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_BOUGHT,'USD',1, NVL(BUY_SPOT_USD.M_MID,NVL(1/BUY_SPOT2_USD.M_MID,0)))
   ELSE SCOPE_TRDS.PL_FCY * DECODE(SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_SOLD,'USD',1,NVL(SELL_SPOT_USD.M_MID,NVL(1/SELL_SPOT2_USD.M_MID,0)) )
   END AS PL_USD,
   
     CASE 
    WHEN SCOPE_TRDS.M_TP_NOMCUR='USD' THEN SCOPE_TRDS.NOMINAL
    WHEN SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_BOUGHT = SCOPE_TRDS.M_TP_NOMCUR THEN (SCOPE_TRDS.NOMINAL * NVL(BUY_SPOT_USD.M_MID,NVL(1/BUY_SPOT2_USD.M_MID,0)) )
    ELSE (SCOPE_TRDS.NOMINAL * NVL(SELL_SPOT_USD.M_MID,NVL(1/SELL_SPOT2_USD.M_MID,0))) END
    AS NOMINAL_USD,
    
    CASE 
    WHEN SCOPE_TRDS.M_TP_NOMCUR='USD' THEN 1
    WHEN SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_BOUGHT = SCOPE_TRDS.M_TP_NOMCUR THEN (NVL(BUY_SPOT_USD.M_MID,NVL(1/BUY_SPOT2_USD.M_MID,0)))
    ELSE (NVL(SELL_SPOT_USD.M_MID,NVL(1/SELL_SPOT2_USD.M_MID,0))) END
    AS NOMINAL_USD_CONV_RATE,   
   BUY_SPOT.M_DATE,BUY_SPOT2.M_DATE,SELL_SPOT.M_DATE,SELL_SPOT2.M_DATE
   ,NVL(BUY_SPOT.M_MID,NVL(1/BUY_SPOT2.M_MID,0)),NVL(SELL_SPOT.M_MID,NVL(1/SELL_SPOT2.M_MID,0)) 
   ,DECODE(SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_BOUGHT,'SAR',1,NVL(BUY_SPOT.M_MID,NVL(1/BUY_SPOT2.M_MID,0))) as BUY_CONV_RATE
   ,DECODE(SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_SOLD,'SAR',1,NVL(SELL_SPOT.M_MID,NVL(1/SELL_SPOT2.M_MID,0))) as SELL_CONV_RATE
   
   ,DECODE(SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_BOUGHT,'USD',1,NVL(BUY_SPOT_USD.M_MID,NVL(BUY_SPOT2_USD.M_MID,0)) ) as BUY_USD_CONV_RATE
   ,DECODE(SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_SOLD,'USD',1,NVL(SELL_SPOT_USD.M_MID,NVL(SELL_SPOT2_USD.M_MID,0)) ) as SELL_USD_CONV_RATE
   ,SCOPE_TRDS.*
   
   FROM

		(SELECT 
   TRN_ALL.M_NB as REF_NO,
   TRN_ALL.M_CPTY_NAME as CUST_NAME,
   TRN_ALL.M_CIF as CIF,
   TRN_ALL.M_BUY_CCY as CCY_BOUGHT,
   TRN_ALL.M_SELL_CCY as CCY_SOLD,
   CASE WHEN TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_BUY_CCY) = TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_TP_NOMCUR) THEN TRN_ALL.M_SELL_CCY
   ELSE TRN_ALL.M_BUY_CCY END AS M_PL_CUR,
   TRN_ALL.M_TP_DTETRN as DEAL_DATE,
   TRN_ALL.M_TP_DTETRN+2 as SPOT_DATE,
   TRN_ALL.M_BUY_AMOUNT * (1/1000000) as AMOUNT_BOUGHT,
   TRN_ALL.M_SELL_AMOUNT * (1/1000000) as AMOUNT_SOLD,
   TRN_ALL.M_TP_NOMINAL_MIL as NOMINAL,   
   TRN_ALL.M_TP_NOMINAL_MIL_SAR as NOMINAL_SAR,
   TRN_ALL.M_TP_NOMCUR AS M_TP_NOMCUR,
   TRN_ALL.M_REP_DATE2 AS M_REP_DATE2,
   TRN_ALL.M_REF_DATA AS M_REF_DATA,
   TRN_ALL.M_TP_CNTRPID,
   TRN_ALL.M_TRN_MON as TRADE_MON,
   TRN_ALL.M_REP_MON as REP_MON,
   TRN_ALL.M_TRN_YEAR as TRADE_YEAR,
   TRN_ALL.M_REP_YEAR as REP_YEAR,
   TO_DATE((TRN_ALL.M_TRN_MON || ' ' || TRN_ALL.M_TRN_YEAR), 'MON YYYY') AS VOL_MON,
   TRN_ALL.M_INSTRUMENT,
   TRN_ALL.M_TP_DTEPMT as M_VALUE_DATE,
   CASE 
   WHEN (TRIM(NVL(TRN_ALL.M_PORTFOLIO,'')) IN ('SL_FX_SP_TSD', 'SAL_FX_FWD') AND TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO) IN ('Spot')) THEN 'Sales - SPOT'
   WHEN (TRIM(NVL(TRN_ALL.M_PORTFOLIO,'')) IN ('SL_FX_SP_TSD', 'SAL_FX_FWD') AND TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO) IN ('FX Waad')) THEN 'Sales - FX WAAD'
   ELSE TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO END as PRODUCT,
   CASE WHEN (TRIM(NVL(TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO,'')) = 'Banknotes') OR (TRIM(NVL(TRN_ALL.M_PORTFOLIO,'')) IN ('SL_FX_SP_TSD', 'SAL_FX_FWD') AND TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO) IN ('Spot','FX Waad')) THEN M_TP_FXGFWD
   ELSE TRN_ALL.M_TP_PRICE END as DEAL_RATE
 --  ,TRN_ALL.M_REP_DATE2   
   ,TRN_ALL.M_REVALUATION_AMOUNT AS PL_FCY
   
   FROM 
   BAB_TRN_ALL_REP TRN_ALL
    where 
   M_TP_INT='N' 
   and M_CMP_TYPO IN ('Spot','FX Waad','FX Murabaha','Split Value','SAMA Purchase','FX Swap','Time Option','Banknotes')
   and TRIM(NVL(M_SOURCE_MODULE,'')) IN ('mx','FXT') 
-- and TRIM(M_CPTY_NAME) NOT IN ('FX_RETAIL_AGGR','FX_RETAIL','FX_CORPORATE_AGGR','TECH COUNTERPARTY')
   ) SCOPE_TRDS
   
   
   
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP BUY_SPOT
       on SCOPE_TRDS.M_REP_DATE2=BUY_SPOT.M_DATE and TRIM(SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_BOUGHT)=TRIM(BUY_SPOT.M_CCY_DEN)  and BUY_SPOT.M_CCY_NUM='SAR'
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP BUY_SPOT2
       on SCOPE_TRDS.M_REP_DATE2=BUY_SPOT2.M_DATE and TRIM(SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_BOUGHT)=TRIM(BUY_SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM)  and BUY_SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN='SAR'	
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SELL_SPOT
       on SCOPE_TRDS.M_REP_DATE2=SELL_SPOT.M_DATE and TRIM(SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_SOLD)=TRIM(SELL_SPOT.M_CCY_DEN)  and SELL_SPOT.M_CCY_NUM='SAR'
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SELL_SPOT2
       on SCOPE_TRDS.M_REP_DATE2=SELL_SPOT2.M_DATE and TRIM(SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_SOLD)=TRIM(SELL_SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM)  and SELL_SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN='SAR'
       
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP BUY_SPOT_USD
       on SCOPE_TRDS.M_REP_DATE2=BUY_SPOT_USD.M_DATE and TRIM(SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_BOUGHT)=TRIM(BUY_SPOT_USD.M_CCY_DEN)  and BUY_SPOT_USD.M_CCY_NUM='USD'
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP BUY_SPOT2_USD
       on SCOPE_TRDS.M_REP_DATE2=BUY_SPOT2_USD.M_DATE and TRIM(SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_BOUGHT)=TRIM(BUY_SPOT2_USD.M_CCY_NUM)  and BUY_SPOT2_USD.M_CCY_DEN='USD'	
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SELL_SPOT_USD
       on SCOPE_TRDS.M_REP_DATE2=SELL_SPOT_USD.M_DATE and TRIM(SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_SOLD)=TRIM(SELL_SPOT_USD.M_CCY_DEN)  and SELL_SPOT_USD.M_CCY_NUM='USD'
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SELL_SPOT2_USD
       on SCOPE_TRDS.M_REP_DATE2=SELL_SPOT2_USD.M_DATE and TRIM(SCOPE_TRDS.CCY_SOLD)=TRIM(SELL_SPOT2_USD.M_CCY_NUM)  and SELL_SPOT2_USD.M_CCY_DEN='USD'
       
    left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES 
       on TRIM(NVL(SCOPE_TRDS.M_TP_CNTRPID,''))=TRIM(NVL(PARTIES.M_LABEL,'')) and SCOPE_TRDS.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
   
  
)

WITH FX_NON_DOMESTIC as (
select 
M_NB as REF_NO,
M_CPTY_NAME as COUNTER_PARTY_NAME,
M_CIF as CIF,
M_TP_DTETRN as DEAL_DATE,
M_BUY_CCY as CURRENCY_BOUGHT,
M_SELL_CCY as CURRENCY_SOLD,
M_BUY_AMOUNT * (1/1000000) as AMOUNT_BOUGHT,
M_SELL_AMOUNT * (1/1000000)  as AMOUNT_SOLD,
M_TP_NOMINAL_MIL as NOMINAL,
M_TRN_MON as TRADE_MON,
M_REP_MON as REP_MON,
M_TRN_YEAR as TRADE_YEAR,
M_REP_YEAR as REP_YEAR,
M_TP_DTEPMT as M_VALUE_DATE,
DECODE(M_BUY_CCY,'SAR',1,NVL(BUY_SPOT.M_MID,NVL(1/BUY_SPOT2.M_MID,0))) * M_BUY_AMOUNT * (1/1000000) as BUY_LCY_EQUIV,
DECODE(M_SELL_CCY,'SAR',1,NVL(SELL_SPOT.M_MID,NVL(1/SELL_SPOT2.M_MID,0))) * M_SELL_AMOUNT * (1/1000000) as SELL_LCY_EQUIV
   from 
   BAB_TRN_ALL_REP TRN_ALL
   
      left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP BUY_SPOT
       on TRN_ALL.M_REP_DATE2=BUY_SPOT.M_DATE and TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_BUY_CCY)=TRIM(BUY_SPOT.M_CCY_DEN)  and BUY_SPOT.M_CCY_NUM='SAR'
   left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP BUY_SPOT2
       on TRN_ALL.M_REP_DATE2=BUY_SPOT2.M_DATE and TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_BUY_CCY)=TRIM(BUY_SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM)  and BUY_SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN='SAR'	
   left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SELL_SPOT
       on TRN_ALL.M_REP_DATE2=SELL_SPOT.M_DATE and TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_SELL_CCY)=TRIM(SELL_SPOT.M_CCY_DEN)  and SELL_SPOT.M_CCY_NUM='SAR'
   left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SELL_SPOT2
       on TRN_ALL.M_REP_DATE2=SELL_SPOT2.M_DATE and TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_SELL_CCY)=TRIM(SELL_SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM)  and SELL_SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN='SAR'
       
   where 
   M_TP_INT='N' -- and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD'
   and M_CMP_TYPO IN ('Spot','FX Waad','FX Murabaha','Split Value','SAMA Purchase','FX Swap','Time Option') ----,'Banknotes') --- excluded BN as per user request
   and TRIM(M_CPTY_NAME) NOT IN ('FX_RETAIL_AGGR','FX_RETAIL','FX_CORPORATE_AGGR','BANK MUSCAT RIYADH', 'NATIONAL BANK OF KUWAIT SA JED')
   and (TRIM(M_INSTRUMENT)='USD/SAR' or TRIM(M_INSTRUMENT)='SAR/USD')  
   and M_CPTY_COUNTRY not like '%Saudi Arabia%' 

)

select NOS.M_BENEFICIA as COUNTERPARTY,sum(NOS.M_AMOUNT) AMOUNT, 
NVL((
    select sum(M_MAX) from BAB_CPTY_NL_TYPO_REP 
    where M_KEY='<All>' and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
),0)+sum(NVL(CPTY_LIMIT.M_MAX,0)) as Limit
,NOS.M_CURRENCY as CURRENCY 
from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP NOS,BAB_CPTY_NL_TYPO_REP CPTY_LIMIT
where 
NOS.M_REF_DATA= @MxDataSetKey:N
and NOS.M_SETTLEMEN='SETTLED'
and TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY) is not null and TRIM(NOS.M_VALUE_DAT) is not null
and NOS.M_BENEFICIA=CPTY_LIMIT.M_KEY(+) and NOS.M_REF_DATA=CPTY_LIMIT.M_REF_DATA(+)
group by NOS.M_BENEFICIA,NOS.M_CURRENCY

WITH CPTYLIMITS_MONITORING as (
    select CIF,COUNTER_PARTY, SAR_TOTAL, USD_TOTAL,LIMIT_AMOUNT as USD_LIMIT,
    case 
    when LIMIT_AMOUNT=0 then ''
    when USD_TOTAL-LIMIT_AMOUNT >0 then 'Excess' 
    else 'Non Excess' end as USD_LIMIT_EXCESS, ---- TOTAL-LIMIT
    case when LIMIT_AMOUNT=0 then 0 else (USD_TOTAL/LIMIT_AMOUNT)*100 end as UTILIZED,LIMIT_TENOR,LIMIT_EXPIRY
    from (
        select CIF,COUNTER_PARTY,SUM(SAR_TOTAL) SAR_TOTAL,SUM(USD_TOTAL) USD_TOTAL,LIMIT_AMOUNT as LIMIT_AMOUNT,LIMIT_TENOR,LIMIT_EXPIRY
        from (
                select 
                TPALL.M_NB,
                PARTIES.M_CIF as CIF,
                TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME) as COUNTER_PARTY,
                TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,
                TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,              
                DECODE(TRIM(M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',M_TP_NOMINAL,M_TP_NOMINAL* NVL(SPOT_SAR.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT_SAR2.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT_SAR2.M_MID)))) as  SAR_TOTAL,
                DECODE(TRIM(M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',M_TP_NOMINAL,M_TP_NOMINAL* NVL(SPOT_SAR.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT_SAR2.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT_SAR2.M_MID)))) * (1/SPOT_USD.M_MID) as USD_TOTAL,
                
                NVL(CPTY_LIMIT_BYTYPO.LIMIT_AMOUNT,0) as LIMIT_AMOUNT,
                NVL(CPTY_LIMIT_BYTYPO.LIMIT_TENOR,0) as LIMIT_TENOR,
                CPTY_LIMIT_BYTYPO.LIMIT_EXPIRY
                
                from TP_ALL_REP  TPALL, PARTIES_REP PARTIES,
                (
                     select 
                     TRIM(M_KEY) as CPTY_ID,sum(M_MAX) LIMIT_AMOUNT, 
                     ROUND(NVL((Max(M_ENDDATE)-Max(M_EFFECTIVED)),0)/30,0) as LIMIT_TENOR ,Max(M_ENDDATE) as LIMIT_EXPIRY
                     from BAB_CPTY_NL_TYPO_REP 
                     where M_CURRENCY='USD' and M_STATUS='Validated' 
                     and M_ENDDATE>=(select M_REP_DATE2 from  TP_ALL_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N  and rownum=1)
                     and M_EFFECTIVED<=(select M_REP_DATE2 from  TP_ALL_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N  and rownum=1)
                      and M_SECONDKEY in ('Money Market')
                     group by M_KEY
                ) CPTY_LIMIT_BYTYPO
                , MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_SAR, MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_SAR2,MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_USD
                where 
                TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
                and M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD' and M_TP_INT='N' and M_CMP_TYPO in 
                (
                'Murabaha Placement','DPM Murabaha','Wakala Placement','RR SAMA','RR Murabaha','RR Waad'
                ,'Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing','Repo SAMA','Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad','LTM','SFRM','SGDM'
                )
                and TPALL.M_TP_CNTRPID=PARTIES.M_LABEL(+) and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA(+)
                and TRIM(PARTIES.M_CIF)=CPTY_LIMIT_BYTYPO.CPTY_ID(+)
                 and SPOT_SAR.M_DATE(+) =TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and SPOT_SAR.M_CCY_NUM(+)='SAR' and SPOT_SAR.M_CCY_DEN(+)=TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR
                 and SPOT_SAR2.M_DATE(+)=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and SPOT_SAR2.M_CCY_DEN(+)='SAR' and SPOT_SAR2.M_CCY_NUM(+)=TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR    
                 and SPOT_USD.M_DATE(+)  =TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and SPOT_USD.M_CCY_NUM(+) ='SAR' and SPOT_USD.M_CCY_DEN(+) ='USD'
        )
        group by CIF,COUNTER_PARTY,LIMIT_AMOUNT,LIMIT_TENOR,LIMIT_EXPIRY
    )
)

select CIF,COUNTER_PARTY, SAR_TOTAL, USD_TOTAL,USD_LIMIT,USD_LIMIT_EXCESS,ROUND(UTILIZED*100,3)||' %' UTILIZED,
ROUND((USD_TOTAL/(select sum(USD_TOTAL) from CPTYLIMITS_MONITORING))*100,3)||' %' CONCENTRATION,
LIMIT_TENOR as TENOR_MONTH, --- get from BAB_CPTY_NL_TYPO_REP 
LIMIT_EXPIRY as EXPIRY
from CPTYLIMITS_MONITORING
 group by CIF,COUNTER_PARTY, SAR_TOTAL, USD_TOTAL,USD_LIMIT,USD_LIMIT_EXCESS,UTILIZED,LIMIT_TENOR,LIMIT_EXPIRY

select 
TPALL.M_NB as DEAL_NO,
TPALL.M_INSTRUMENT as COMPANY_NAME,
' ' as TADAWUL_CODE, --- Pending input from AK
TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN as DEAL_DATE,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEPMT as VALUE_DATE,
TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2 as QUANTITY,
TPALL.M_TP_PRICE as PRICE,
TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE as TOTAL,
' ' as COMMISSION, --- Pending input from AK
DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',(TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)+0,(TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)-0) as NET_TOTAL, 
-- Buy deal total+commision,sell deal total-commission
TPALL.M_TP_ACCSCT as ACCOUNTING_SECTION,
DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B','BUY','SELL') as TRANSACTION_TYPE,
TPALL.M_TP_BROLBL0 as BROKER,
-- Below fields added for Validation feedback - 17072022
TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO as Portfolio, 
TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME) as Counter_Party,
TPALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD as Source_Module,
TPALL.M_TP_TRADER as Trader_User
from TP_ALL_REP TPALL
left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
on TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP=PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
where TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
--and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
AND TPALL.M_TRN_FMLY='EQD'
and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N' and TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_MOPLSTL) not in ('RPL_M','RPL_D')
--AND TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in('Equity','Equity DPM','Managed Fund','Mutual Fund','ETF','REIT','Private Equity')
--and TPALL.M_TP_DTESYS=(select MAX(M_REP_DATE2) as  M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)
and TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2
order by TPALL.M_INSTRUMENT, TPALL.M_NB

SELECT M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
       M_AS_OF_DATE,
       M_TRADE_ID,
       M_COMPANY,
       M_BRANCH,
       M_GL_PRODUCT,
       M_GL_ACCOUNT,
       M_COUNTERPARTY,
       M_CURRENCY,
       CASE
         WHEN SUM(M_EN_AMT) IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(SUM(M_EN_AMT) AS NUMBER (25,8))
         ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (25,8))
       END M_CLOSING_BALANCE,
       M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
FROM ((SELECT 'MX' AS M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
              M_AS_OF_DATE,
              M_NB_TRN AS M_TRADE_ID,
              '01' AS M_COMPANY,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2))
              END M_BRANCH,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3))) < 4 THEN '0000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3))
              END M_GL_PRODUCT,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,4)) IS NULL THEN '00000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,4))
              END M_GL_ACCOUNT,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5))) < 8 THEN '00000000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5))
              END M_COUNTERPARTY,
              M_EN_CUR AS M_CURRENCY,
              CASE
                WHEN M_EN_AMT IS NOT NULL THEN CAST((-1*M_EN_AMT) AS NUMBER (25,8))
                ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (25,8))
              END M_EN_AMT,
              TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') AS M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
       FROM ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP T1
       WHERE M_NB_TRN IN (SELECT M_NB_TRN
                          FROM ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP T2
                          WHERE T2.M_SYS_DATE = T2.M_AS_OF_DATE)
       AND   T1.M_FX_O_NB = 0)
       UNION ALL
       SELECT 'MX' AS M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
              M_AS_OF_DATE,
              M_NB_TRN AS M_TRADE_ID,
              '01' AS M_COMPANY,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2))
              END M_BRANCH,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3))) < 4 THEN '0000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3))
              END M_GL_PRODUCT,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,4)) IS NULL THEN '00000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,4))
              END M_GL_ACCOUNT,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5))) < 8 THEN '00000000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5))
              END M_COUNTERPARTY,
              M_EN_CUR AS M_CURRENCY,
              CASE
                WHEN M_EN_AMT IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(M_EN_AMT AS NUMBER (25,8))
                ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (25,8))
              END M_EN_AMT,
              TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') AS M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
       FROM ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP T1
       WHERE M_NB_TRN IN (SELECT M_NB_TRN
                          FROM ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP T2
                          WHERE T2.M_SYS_DATE = T2.M_AS_OF_DATE)
       AND   T1.M_FX_O_NB = 0)
GROUP BY M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
         M_AS_OF_DATE,
         M_TRADE_ID,
         M_COMPANY,
         M_BRANCH,
         M_GL_PRODUCT,
         M_GL_ACCOUNT,
         M_COUNTERPARTY,
         M_CURRENCY,
         M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP

select 
TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2 AS DealStatus,
TPALL.M_NB AS Reference1,
UDF.M_IS_BROKER1 as Broker,
UDF.M_IS_BROKER2 as Bank,
TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO as TYPE1,
TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME) as Counter_Party,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as Currency,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as Principle_Amount,
TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN as Trade_Date,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEPMT as Value_Date,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP  as Maturity_Date,
ABS(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)) as RATE,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_TP_DTESYS as DAYS1,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL+CF.M_F_AMOUNT as Maturity_Amount,
TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO as Portfolio, 
case 
when TPALL.M_TP_FEE0!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE0
when TPALL.M_TP_FEE1!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE1
when TPALL.M_TP_FEE2!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE2
else TPALL.M_TP_FEE3 end as Broker_Fee,
TPALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD as Source_Module,
TPALL.M_TP_TRADER as Trader_User
from TP_ALL_REP TPALL
left outer join (
select M_NB, M_REF_DATA, SUM(ABS(M_F_AMOUNT)) M_F_AMOUNT from CASH_FLOW_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN'
group by  M_NB, M_REF_DATA
) CF
ON TPALL.M_NB=CF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=CF.M_REF_DATA
left outer join TRD_UDF_REP UDF
ON TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=UDF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=UDF.M_REF_DATA
left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
on TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP=PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
where TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
--and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N' and TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_MOPLSTL) not in ('RPL_M','RPL_D')
AND TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in('LTM','LTM Callable','LTM Range','LTM CapFloorCollar','LTM Range Callable','SGDM','SFRM','Sukuk','Sukuk Issuance','Sukuk Fund')
AND TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2
order by TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO

TRIM(M_DESC): Sql to generate daily FX Blotter Report
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select
   TRN_ALL.M_NB AS DEAL_REFERENCE,
   TRN_ALL.M_TP_DTETRN as Trade_Date,
   TRN_ALL.M_BUY_AMOUNT as BUY_AMOUNT, 
   TRN_ALL.M_BUY_CCY as BUY_CURRENCY,
   TRN_ALL.M_TP_PRICE as RATE,
   TRN_ALL.M_SELL_AMOUNT as SELL_AMOUNT,
   TRN_ALL.M_SELL_CCY as SELL_CURRENCY,
   TRN_ALL.M_TP_DTEPMT as Value_Date,
   '' as REUTERS_REF,
   TRN_ALL.M_CPTY_NAME as Counter_Party,
   TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO,
   TRN_ALL.M_TP_PFOLIO as Portfolio, 
   TRN_ALL.M_SOURCE_MODULE as Source_Module,
   TRN_ALL.M_TRADER_USER as Trader_User,
   case when TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Banknotes' then TRN_ALL.M_TP_FXGFWD else null END AS Cover_Rate,
   TRN_ALL.M_TP_FXGFWD AS Final_Fwd_Rate,
   TRN_ALL.M_SALES_MARGIN AS Margin,
   TRN_ALL.M_DEAL_STATUS AS DEAL_STATUS,
   TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO AS PRODUCT,
   null AS PNL,
   TRN_ALL.M_CONTRACT as CONTRACT_ID,
   TRN_ALL.M_CIF as CIF

from 
BAB_TRN_ALL_REP TRN_ALL 
where TRN_ALL.M_TP_INT='N' 
   and TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO) in ('Spot','FX Waad','FX Murabaha','SAMA Purchase','FX Swap','Time Option','Banknotes')
   and TRN_ALL.M_TP_DTETRN=TRN_ALL.M_REP_DATE2

SELECT
M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
M_AS_OF_DATE AS AS_OF_DATE,
M_TABLE_NAME AS TABLE_NAME,
M_MX_START_TIME AS MX_START_TIME,
M_MX_END_TIME AS MX_END_TIME,
M_MX_STATUS AS MX_STATUS
FROM 
	ACC_CONTROL_HIST_REP
WHERE M_MX_STATUS = 'P'
AND M_AS_OF_DATE = TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY'), 'DD-MM-YYYY')
AND TRIM(M_TABLE_NAME) = 'MX_CONTRACT_BALANCES_REP'

SELECT M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
       M_AS_OF_DATE,
       M_GL_PRODUCT,
       DECODE(ACC_ENTRY.M_GL_PRODUCT,1335,'Sukuk Floating',1330,'Sukuk Fixed',1415,'Real Estate Funds',1525,'Private Equity',1520,'REIT',1305,'LTM',6710,'Sukuk Issuance',PCODE.M_TYPOLOGY) as M_GL_PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION,
       M_GL_ACCOUNT,
       ACC_DETAILS.M_DESC as M_GL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION,
       M_CURRENCY,
       --M_SYS_DATE,
       M_CLOSING_BALANCE,
       M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
   from    
(

SELECT M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
       M_AS_OF_DATE,
       M_GL_PRODUCT,
       M_GL_ACCOUNT,
       M_CURRENCY,
       --M_SYS_DATE,
       CASE
         WHEN SUM(M_EN_AMT) IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(SUM(M_EN_AMT) AS NUMBER (25,8))
         ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (25,8))
       END M_CLOSING_BALANCE,
       M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
FROM ((SELECT 'MX' AS M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
              M_AS_OF_DATE,
              '01' AS M_COMPANY,
              --M_SYS_DATE,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2))
              END M_BRANCH,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3))) < 4 THEN '0000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3))
              END M_GL_PRODUCT,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,4)) IS NULL THEN '00000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,4))
              END M_GL_ACCOUNT,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5))) < 8 THEN '00000000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5))
              END M_COUNTERPARTY,
              M_EN_CUR AS M_CURRENCY,
              CASE
                WHEN M_EN_AMT IS NOT NULL THEN CAST((-1*M_EN_AMT) AS NUMBER (25,8))
                ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (25,8))
              END M_EN_AMT,
              TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') AS M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
       FROM ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP T1
       WHERE /*M_NB_TRN IN (SELECT M_NB_TRN
                         FROM ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP T2
                         WHERE T2.M_SYS_DATE = T2.M_AS_OF_DATE  AND T1.M_EN_CUR = T2.M_EN_CUR AND T2.M_FX_O_NB = 0 AND T1.M_EN_CREDIT = T2.M_EN_CREDIT)
				AND*/  T1.M_FX_O_NB = 0)
       UNION ALL
       SELECT 'MX' AS M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
              M_AS_OF_DATE,
              '01' AS M_COMPANY,
              --M_SYS_DATE,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2))
              END M_BRANCH,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3))) < 4 THEN '0000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3))
              END M_GL_PRODUCT,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,4)) IS NULL THEN '00000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,4))
              END M_GL_ACCOUNT,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5))) < 8 THEN '00000000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5))
              END M_COUNTERPARTY,
              M_EN_CUR AS M_CURRENCY,
              CASE
                WHEN M_EN_AMT IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(M_EN_AMT AS NUMBER (25,8))
                ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (25,8))
              END M_EN_AMT,
              TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') AS M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
       FROM ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP T1
       WHERE /*M_NB_TRN IN (SELECT M_NB_TRN
                         FROM ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP T2
                         WHERE T2.M_SYS_DATE = T2.M_AS_OF_DATE  AND T1.M_EN_CUR = T2.M_EN_CUR AND T2.M_FX_O_NB = 0 AND T1.M_EN_DEBIT = T2.M_EN_DEBIT)
				AND*/  T1.M_FX_O_NB = 0)
--where M_SYS_DATE < '6-Oct-2021'
GROUP BY M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
         M_AS_OF_DATE,
         M_GL_PRODUCT,
         M_GL_ACCOUNT,
         M_CURRENCY,
         M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP--,
         --M_SYS_DATE

) ACC_ENTRY
    left outer join BAB_PRODUCT_CODE_REP PCODE
        on ACC_ENTRY.M_GL_PRODUCT=PCODE.M_PROD_CODE AND PCODE.M_PROD_CODE NOT in (1520,1305,1310,1640,1650,6460,6710) AND PCODE.M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalData_BAB_KSA:N      
    left outer join ACC_DETAILS_REP ACC_DETAILS
        on ACC_DETAILS.M_CATEGORY0=ACC_ENTRY.M_GL_ACCOUNT --- and ACC_DETAILS.M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalData:N

select 
CAST (M_VALUE_DATE AS  DATE) M_VALUE_DATE,
CAST (sum(M_INVESTMENT_MIL)   	 			 AS DECIMAL(32,8)) M_INVESTMENT_MIL,
CAST(RANK() OVER (ORDER BY M_VALUE_DATE desc) AS NUMBER(3)) M_MY_RANK
from BAB_INV_SUKUK_OS_DETAILS_REP
group by M_VALUE_DATE

select 
TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2 AS DealStatus,
TPALL.M_NB AS Reference1,
UDF.M_IS_BROKER1 as Broker,
UDF.M_IS_BROKER2 as Bank,
TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO as TYPE1,
TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME) as Counter_Party,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as Currency,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as Principal_Amount,
TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN as Trade_Date,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST as Value_Date,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP  as Maturity_Date,
ABS(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)) as COVER_RATE,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST as DAYS1,
(CASE WHEN CF.M_F_TYPELAB2='FIX' THEN 'FIXED' ELSE 'FLOATING' END) Leg0_Direction, 
CF.M_F_AMOUNT as Leg0_Maturity_Amount,
(CASE WHEN CF1.M_F_TYPELAB2='FIX' THEN 'FIXED' ELSE 'FLOATING' END) Leg1_Direction, 
CF1.M_F_AMOUNT as Leg1_Maturity_Amount,
case 
when TPALL.M_TP_FEE0!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE0
when TPALL.M_TP_FEE1!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE1
when TPALL.M_TP_FEE2!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE2
else TPALL.M_TP_FEE3 end as Broker_Fee,
TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO as Portfolio, 
TPALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD as Source_Module,
TPALL.M_TP_TRADER as Trader_User,
TPALL.M_TP_SMRTE as Sales_Margin_BP,
UDF.M_VAAMT as Sales_Margin_Amount,
ABS(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE+TPALL.M_TP_SMRTE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED+TPALL.M_TP_SMRTE,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE+TPALL.M_TP_SMRTE)) as CLIENT_RATE
from TP_ALL_REP TPALL
left outer join (
select M_NB, M_REF_DATA, M_F_LEG, M_F_TYPELAB2, SUM(M_F_AMOUNT) M_F_AMOUNT from CASH_FLOW_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN' and M_F_LEG=0
group by  M_NB, M_REF_DATA, M_F_LEG, M_F_TYPELAB2 
) CF
ON TPALL.M_NB=CF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=CF.M_REF_DATA
left outer join (
select M_NB, M_REF_DATA, M_F_LEG, M_F_TYPELAB2, SUM(M_F_AMOUNT) M_F_AMOUNT from CASH_FLOW_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN' and M_F_LEG=1
group by  M_NB, M_REF_DATA, M_F_LEG, M_F_TYPELAB2 
) CF1
ON TPALL.M_NB=CF1.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=CF1.M_REF_DATA
left outer join TRD_UDF_REP UDF
ON TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=UDF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=UDF.M_REF_DATA
left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
on TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP=PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
where TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
--and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N' and TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_MOPLSTL) not in ('RPL_M','RPL_D')
--AND TPALL.M_AMD_STS2<>'NA' AND TPALL.M_AMD_STS2<>'CA'
AND TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in('PRS','PRS Range','PRS CapFloorCollar','PRS Inverse Floater','Depo Callable','Depo Range','Depo CapFloorCollar','Depo Range Callable')
and TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2
order by TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO

TRIM(M_DESC): Final extraction to get the end result
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select 
--cast(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY'), 'DD-MM-YYYY') as DATE) AS AS_OF_DATE,
--cast(TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') as TIMESTAMP(9) ) AS INSERT_DATE_TIME,
CAST (M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER  AS CHAR(30))            ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
CAST (M_SWIFT_ADDRESS   AS CHAR(30))            SWIFT_ADDRESS,
CAST (M_CURRENCY        AS CHAR(3))             CURRENCY,
CAST (NVL(M_CLOSING_BALANCE,0) AS DECIMAL(26,3))       CLOSING_BALANCE, 
CAST (NVL(M_OPENING_BALANCE,0) AS DECIMAL(26,3))       OPENING_BALANCE,
CAST (M_SND_REFERENCE   AS VARCHAR2(24))        SND_REFERENCE,
CAST (M_FST_REFERENCE   AS VARCHAR2(24))        FST_REFERENCE, 
CAST (M_AMOUNT          AS DECIMAL(26,3))       AMOUNT,
CAST (M_TRADE_DATE      AS DATE)                TRADE_DATE,
CAST (M_BLANK           AS CHAR(5))             BLANK,
CAST (M_VALUE_DATE      AS DATE)                VALUE_DATE,
CAST (M_TYPE            AS VARCHAR2(10))        TYPE,
CAST (M_D_C             AS CHAR(1))             D_C,
CAST (M_DEPARTMENT_CODE AS CHAR(3))             DEPARTMENT_CODE,
CAST (M_TRADE_DATETIME  AS VARCHAR2(30))        TRADE_DATETIME,
CAST (M_CONTRACT        AS DECIMAL(24,0))       CONTRACT,
CAST (M_MY_RANK           AS DECIMAL(24,0))       MY_RANK
from (
             select M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
										M_SWIFT_ADDRESS, M_CURRENCY, 
             M_OPENING_BALANCE+M_CLOSING_BALANCE as M_CLOSING_BALANCE,
             M_OPENING_BALANCE,
             M_SND_REFERENCE, M_FST_REFERENCE, M_AMOUNT, M_TRADE_DATE, 
             M_BLANK, M_VALUE_DATE, M_TYPE, M_D_C, M_DEPARTMENT_CODE, M_TRADE_DATETIME, M_CONTRACT,M_MY_RANK
             from MX_SAMA_NOSTRO_RECON_T2_REP --where M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER='008108118830444'
             ORDER BY M_MY_RANK,M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CONTRACT
)
--where SUBSTR(TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER),0,3)='008'
ORDER BY M_MY_RANK,M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CONTRACT

TRIM(M_DESC): SQL REQUEST FOR MM DEALS
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select 
M_NB AS Reference1,
M_BROKER1 as Broker,
M_BROKER2 as Bank,
M_CMP_TYPO as TYPE1,
M_CPTY_NAME as Counter_Party,
M_TP_NOMCUR as Currency,
M_TP_NOMINAL as Principle_Amount,
M_TP_DTETRN as Trade_Date,
--M_TP_DTEPMT as Value_Date,
M_TP_DTEFST as Value_Date,
M_TP_DTEEXP  as Maturity_Date,
M_NO_OF_DAYS as DAYS1,
M_MATURITY_AMOUNT as Maturity_Amount,
M_PORTFOLIO as Portfolio, 
--PIR#19 deployment, as per user request updated to get the commodity broker fee instead of trade broker fee posted
--M_BROKER_FEE as Broker_Fee,
M_COMMODITY_BRK_FEE as Broker_Fee,
M_SOURCE_MODULE as Source_Module,
M_TRADER_USER as Trader_User,
M_COVER_RATE as Cover_Rate,
M_SALES_MARGIN as Sales_Margin,
M_CUSTOMER_RATE AS Customer_Rate,
M_DEAL_STATUS AS DEAL_STATUS,
M_CIF as CIF,
M_CONTRACT as CONTRACT_ID,
case 
      when M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing') and M_BANK='Y'       then M_PRODUCT_CODE||'_01'
      when M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing') and M_BROKER='Y'     then M_PRODUCT_CODE||'_02'
      when M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing') and M_CORPORATE='Y'  then M_PRODUCT_CODE||'_03'
    else M_PRODUCT_CODE end as Category
from 
BAB_TRN_ALL_REP
where M_TP_DTETRN=M_REP_DATE2
AND M_CMP_TYPO in 
('Murabaha Borrowing','Murabaha Placement','DPM Murabaha','Wakala Borrowing',
 'Wakala Placement','Repo SAMA','Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad',
 'RR SAMA','RR Murabaha','RR Waad','SAMA Bill',
    --additionally added as per user request
 'Wakala Borrowing CFC')
AND M_TP_INT='N'

select 
--TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2 AS DealStatus,
CAST(TPALL.M_NB AS NUMBER(30)) AS Reference1,
CAST(UDF.M_IS_BROKER1 AS VARCHAR2(50)) as Broker,
CAST(UDF.M_IS_BROKER2 AS VARCHAR2(50)) as Bank,
CAST(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO AS VARCHAR2(20)) as TYPE1,
CAST(NVL(TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME),TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP) AS VARCHAR2(50)) as Counter_Party,
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR AS VARCHAR2(3)) as Currency,
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL AS NUMBER(26,2)) as Principle_Amount,
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN AS DATE) as Trade_Date,
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_DTEPMT AS DATE) as Value_Date,
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP  AS DATE) as Maturity_Date,
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN AS NUMBER(5)) as DAYS1,
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL+CF.M_F_AMOUNT AS NUMBER(26,2)) as Maturity_Amount,
-- Below fields added by Rajesh for Validation feedback from Tata - 12072022
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO AS VARCHAR2(25)) as Portfolio, 
CAST(case 
when TPALL.M_TP_FEE0!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE0
when TPALL.M_TP_FEE1!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE1
when TPALL.M_TP_FEE2!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE2
else TPALL.M_TP_FEE3 end AS NUMBER(26,2)) as Broker_Fee,
CAST(TPALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD AS VARCHAR2(10)) as Source_Module,
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_TRADER AS VARCHAR2(15)) as Trader_User,
CAST(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE) AS NUMBER(26,2)) as Cover_Rate,
--ABS(DECODE(TPALLEXT.M_TP_CMPSM02,0,TPALLEXT.M_TP_CMPSM12,TPALLEXT.M_TP_CMPSM02)) 
CAST(NVL(M_TP_SMRTE,0) AS NUMBER(26,2)) as Sales_Margin,
--(ABS(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)) - ABS(DECODE(TPALLEXT.M_TP_CMPSM02,0,TPALLEXT.M_TP_CMPSM12,TPALLEXT.M_TP_CMPSM02))) AS Customer_Rate,
CAST(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)- NVL(M_TP_SMRTE,0) AS NUMBER(26,2)) AS Customer_Rate,
CAST(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2),'DEAD','DEAD','LIVE') AS VARCHAR2(5)) AS DEAL_STATUS,
CAST(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 AS DATE) as REPORT_DATE,
CAST(NVL(TRIM(PARTIES.M_CIF),'') AS VARCHAR2(20)) as CIF

from TP_ALL_REP TPALL
left outer join (
select M_NB, M_REF_DATA, SUM(ABS(M_F_AMOUNT)) M_F_AMOUNT from CASH_FLOW_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN'
group by  M_NB, M_REF_DATA
) CF
ON TPALL.M_NB=CF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=CF.M_REF_DATA
left outer join TRD_UDF_REP UDF
ON TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=UDF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=UDF.M_REF_DATA
left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
on TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP=PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
left outer join TP_ALL_EXT_REP TPALLEXT
ON TPALL.M_NB=TPALLEXT.M_NB AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TPALLEXT.M_REF_DATA
where TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
---and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' --commented as per user request to see all deals except cancelled
--AND TPALL.M_AMD_STS2<>'NA' AND TPALL.M_AMD_STS2<>'CA'
AND TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Murabaha Placement','DPM Murabaha','Wakala Borrowing','Wakala Placement','Repo SAMA','Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad','RR SAMA','RR Murabaha','RR Waad','SAMA Bill',
--additionally added as per user request
'Wakala Borrowing CFC')
AND TPALL.M_TP_INT='N' 
   and TPALL.M_TP_MOPLSTL not like '%RPL_D%'
  --- and TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_MOPLSTL) not in ('RPL_M','RPL_D')
--AND TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO in ('IB_BRW_MH_FCY','IB_BRW_MH_LCY','IB_BRW_WK_FCY','IB_BRW_WK_LCY','IB_PLC_MH_FCY','LM_DI_VAN','IB_RREP_SAM_LCY','IB_RREP_SAM_FCY','IB_REP_SAMA_FCY','IB_REP_SAMA_LCY')
   ---and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'MONYY')=TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'MONYY')
   and 
   (
   			TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'MONYY')=(select to_char(SYSDATE,'MONYY') from dual)
       or
      TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'MONYY')=(select to_char(SYSDATE-30,'MONYY') from dual)
       or
      TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'MONYY')=(select to_char(SYSDATE-60,'MONYY') from dual)
   )
order by TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO

TRIM(M_DESC): E_BAB_DLY_BLTR_PRS_RGE - ADOC Report
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
/*
This PRS Range report (ADOC)  will trigger by business daily from the murex GUI .
The deals are booked ( Murex system Date) on same day need to capture in the report only for this  "PRS Range" product in murex system.
Only expecting to see the external deals ( Portfolio vs Counterparty deals ) only in the report.
Only expecting to see the entity "CE BAB KSA" deals in the report .
Only expecting to see typology = "PRS Range" deals in the report .
Expecting to see all Live,MKT_OP and DEAD deals in the report.
*/

SELECT 
BAB_DBLTR.M_CONTRACT AS TRN_NB,
TRIM(BAB_DBLTR.M_CMP_TYPO) AS TYPOLOGY,
TRIM(BAB_DBLTR.M_H_CTP_CODE)  AS CUSTOMER,
TRIM(BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_NOMCUR) AS CURRENCY,
BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_NOMINAL AS AMOUNT,
BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_DTETRN as TRADE_DATE,
BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_DTEFST as VALUE_DATE,
BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_DTEEXP AS MATURITY_DATE,
TRIM(BAB_DBLTR.M_INSTRUMENT) AS MARKET_INDEX,
TRIM(BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_TRADER) AS TRADER,
TRIM(BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_PFOLIO) AS PORTFOLIO,
TRIM(BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_STATUS2) as STATUS

from 
BAB_DBLTR_PRSRGE_REP BAB_DBLTR 
WHERE 
BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_INT='N'  -- TO CAPTURE ONLY EXTERNAL DEALS 
AND TRIM(BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_ENTITY)='CE BAB KSA'  -- TO CAPTURE ONLY KSA ENTITY DEALS
AND TRIM(BAB_DBLTR.M_CMP_TYPO) ='PRS Range'  -- ONLY TO CAPTURE THESE TYPOLOGY DEALS
AND TO_CHAR(BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_DTESYS,'YYYYMMDD')=@SYSTEM_DATE:D
--AND (BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_DTESYS)=@SYSTEM_DATE:D
--AND (BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_DTESYS>='01-FEB-2024' AND BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_DTESYS<='28-FEB-2024') -- system date is used to capture the present deals and if any back dated deals booked.
order by BAB_DBLTR.M_CONTRACT

TRIM(M_DESC): SQL REQUEST FOR IR DEALS
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select 
TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2 AS DealStatus,
TPALL.M_NB AS Reference1,
UDF.M_IS_BROKER1 as Broker,
UDF.M_IS_BROKER2 as Bank,
TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO as TYPE1,
TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME) as Counter_Party,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as Currency,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as Principal_Amount,
TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN as Trade_Date,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST as Value_Date,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP  as Maturity_Date,
ABS(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)) as COVER_RATE,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST as DAYS1,
(CASE WHEN CF.M_F_TYPELAB2='FIX' THEN 'FIXED' ELSE 'FLOATING' END) Leg0_Direction, 
CF.M_F_AMOUNT as Leg0_Maturity_Amount,
(CASE WHEN CF1.M_F_TYPELAB2='FIX' THEN 'FIXED' ELSE 'FLOATING' END) Leg1_Direction, 
CF1.M_F_AMOUNT as Leg1_Maturity_Amount,
case 
when TPALL.M_TP_FEE0!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE0
when TPALL.M_TP_FEE1!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE1
when TPALL.M_TP_FEE2!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE2
else TPALL.M_TP_FEE3 end as Broker_Fee,
TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO as Portfolio, 
TPALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD as Source_Module,
TPALL.M_TP_TRADER as Trader_User,
TPALL.M_TP_SMRTE as Sales_Margin_BP,
UDF.M_VAAMT as Sales_Margin_Amount,
ABS(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE+TPALL.M_TP_SMRTE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED+TPALL.M_TP_SMRTE,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE+TPALL.M_TP_SMRTE)) as CLIENT_RATE
from TP_ALL_REP TPALL
left outer join (
select M_NB, M_REF_DATA, M_F_LEG, M_F_TYPELAB2, SUM(M_F_AMOUNT) M_F_AMOUNT from CASH_FLOW_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN' and M_F_LEG=0
group by  M_NB, M_REF_DATA, M_F_LEG, M_F_TYPELAB2 
) CF
ON TPALL.M_NB=CF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=CF.M_REF_DATA
left outer join (
select M_NB, M_REF_DATA, M_F_LEG, M_F_TYPELAB2, SUM(M_F_AMOUNT) M_F_AMOUNT from CASH_FLOW_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN' and M_F_LEG=1
group by  M_NB, M_REF_DATA, M_F_LEG, M_F_TYPELAB2
) CF1
ON TPALL.M_NB=CF1.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=CF1.M_REF_DATA
left outer join TRD_UDF_REP UDF
ON TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=UDF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=UDF.M_REF_DATA
left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
on TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP=PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
where TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
--and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N' --and TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_MOPLSTL) not in ('RPL_M','RPL_D')

SELECT CCY, SUM(ORIGINAL_CCY_AMOUNT) ORIGINAL_CCY_AMOUNT
,SUM(SAR_EQUIVALENT) SAR_EQUIVALENT
,sum(SPOT_POSITION) SPOT_POSITION
,sum(FORWARD_POSITION) FORWARD_POSITION
,sum(SHORT_POSITION)  SHORT_POSITION
,sum(LONG_POSITION) LONG_POSITION
,sum(NET_DIFFERENCE) NET_DIFFERENCE 
,sum(NET_DIFFERENCE_ABSOLUTE) NET_DIFFERENCE_ABSOLUTE
,sum(USD_EQUIVALENT) USD_EQUIVALENT
,sum(USD_EQUIVALENT_ABSOLUTE) USD_EQUIVALENT_ABSOLUTE
,SAR_RATE,USD_RATE
from(
        ----- Main Query
        select COMB_TAB.M_CURRENCY CCY
        ,SUM(COMB_TAB.M_AMOUNT) as ORIGINAL_CCY_AMOUNT
        ,SUM(COMB_TAB.M_AMOUNT * DECODE(TRIM(M_CURRENCY),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT_SAR.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT_SAR2.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT_SAR2.M_MID)))) ) as SAR_EQUIVALENT
        ,0 as SPOT_POSITION
        ,SUM(COMB_TAB.FORWARD_POSITION) as FORWARD_POSITION
        --,0 as FORWARD_POSITION
        ,SUM(COMB_TAB.SHORT_POS) as SHORT_POSITION
        ,SUM(COMB_TAB.LONG_POS) as LONG_POSITION
        ,SUM(COMB_TAB.LONG_POS)+SUM(COMB_TAB.SHORT_POS) + SUM(COMB_TAB.FORWARD_POSITION) as NET_DIFFERENCE
        ,ABS(SUM(COMB_TAB.LONG_POS)+SUM(COMB_TAB.SHORT_POS) + SUM(COMB_TAB.FORWARD_POSITION)) as NET_DIFFERENCE_ABSOLUTE
        ,SUM(COMB_TAB.M_AMOUNT * DECODE(TRIM(M_CURRENCY),'USD',1,NVL(SPOT_USD.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT_USD2.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT_USD2.M_MID)))) ) as USD_EQUIVALENT
        ,ABS(SUM(COMB_TAB.M_AMOUNT * DECODE(TRIM(M_CURRENCY),'USD',1,NVL(SPOT_USD.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT_USD2.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT_USD2.M_MID))))) ) as USD_EQUIVALENT_ABSOLUTE
        ,DECODE(TRIM(M_CURRENCY),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT_SAR.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT_SAR2.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT_SAR2.M_MID)))) as SAR_RATE
        ,DECODE(TRIM(M_CURRENCY),'USD',1,NVL(SPOT_USD2.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT_USD.M_MID,0),0,0,(SPOT_USD.M_MID)))) as USD_RATE
         
        from 
        
        (
            select M_CURRENCY,(-1 * M_AMOUNT) AS M_AMOUNT, M_REPORT_DATE, 0 as FORWARD_POSITION,
            case when (-1 * M_AMOUNT) > 0 then (-1 * M_AMOUNT) else 0 END as LONG_POS,
            case when (-1 * M_AMOUNT) < 0 then (-1 * M_AMOUNT) else 0 END as SHORT_POS  
            from BAB_NOP_MUX_DATA_REP
            where TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_PRODUCT_CODE) || ',' || ''  || ',' || '1' in 
            (select distinct TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_CATEGORY) || ',' || TRIM(M_NOS_ACC) || ',' || TRIM(M_SIGN_FLAG) from BAB_GLCD_INCLUDE_REP where UPPER(TRIM(M_SOURCE))='MUREX')
            AND TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_PRODUCT_CODE) || ',' || ''  || ',' || '1' NOT IN ('85101,1610,,1', '95101,1610,,1', '85121,1640,,1', '95121,1640,,1')
          
            UNION ALL
            
            select M_CURRENCY, M_AMOUNT , M_REPORT_DATE, 0 as FORWARD_POSITION
            ,case when M_AMOUNT > 0 then M_AMOUNT else 0 END as LONG_POS 
            ,case when M_AMOUNT < 0 then M_AMOUNT else 0 END as SHORT_POS  
            from BAB_NOP_MUX_DATA_REP
            where TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_PRODUCT_CODE) || ',' || ''  || ',' || '0' in 
            (select distinct TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_CATEGORY) || ',' || TRIM(M_NOS_ACC) || ',' || TRIM(M_SIGN_FLAG) from BAB_GLCD_INCLUDE_REP where UPPER(TRIM(M_SOURCE))='MUREX')
            AND TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_PRODUCT_CODE) || ',' || ''  || ',' || '0' NOT IN ('85101,1610,,0', '95101,1610,,0', '85121,1640,,0', '95121,1640,,0')

            union all
            
            select M_CURRENCY,(-1 * M_AMOUNT) AS M_AMOUNT, M_REPORT_DATE, (-1 * M_AMOUNT) AS FORWARD_POSITION
            ,0 as LONG_POS, 0 as SHORT_POS  
            from BAB_NOP_MUX_DATA_REP
            where TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_PRODUCT_CODE) || ',' || ''  || ',' || '1' in 
            (select distinct TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_CATEGORY) || ',' || TRIM(M_NOS_ACC) || ',' || TRIM(M_SIGN_FLAG) from BAB_GLCD_INCLUDE_REP where UPPER(TRIM(M_SOURCE))='MUREX')
            AND TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_PRODUCT_CODE) || ',' || ''  || ',' || '1' IN ('85101,1610,,1', '95101,1610,,1', '85121,1640,,1', '95121,1640,,1')

            UNION ALL
            
            select M_CURRENCY, M_AMOUNT , M_REPORT_DATE, M_AMOUNT AS FORWARD_POSITION
            ,0 as LONG_POS, 0 as SHORT_POS  
            from BAB_NOP_MUX_DATA_REP
            where TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_PRODUCT_CODE) || ',' || ''  || ',' || '0' in 
            (select distinct TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_CATEGORY) || ',' || TRIM(M_NOS_ACC) || ',' || TRIM(M_SIGN_FLAG) from BAB_GLCD_INCLUDE_REP where UPPER(TRIM(M_SOURCE))='MUREX')
            AND TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_PRODUCT_CODE) || ',' || ''  || ',' || '0' IN ('85101,1610,,0', '95101,1610,,0', '85121,1640,,0', '95121,1640,,0')
            
            union all
            select M_CURRENCY, (-1 * M_AMOUNT) AS M_AMOUNT, M_REPORT_DATE, 0 as FORWARD_POSITION
            ,case when (-1 * M_AMOUNT) > 0 then (-1 * M_AMOUNT) else 0 END as LONG_POS 
            ,case when (-1 * M_AMOUNT) < 0 then (-1 * M_AMOUNT) else 0 END as SHORT_POS
            from BAB_NOP_EXT_DATA_REP 
            where TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_CATEGORY) || ',' || TRIM(M_NOSTRO_ACC_NO) || ',' || '1'  in 
            (select distinct TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_CATEGORY) || ',' || TRIM(M_NOS_ACC) || ',' || TRIM(M_SIGN_FLAG) from BAB_GLCD_INCLUDE_REP where UPPER(TRIM(M_SOURCE))='T24')
       
            union all
     
            select M_CURRENCY, M_AMOUNT, M_REPORT_DATE, 0 as FORWARD_POSITION
            ,case when M_AMOUNT>0 then M_AMOUNT else 0 END as LONG_POS 
            ,case when M_AMOUNT<0 then M_AMOUNT else 0 END as SHORT_POS
            from BAB_NOP_EXT_DATA_REP 
            where TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_CATEGORY) || ',' || TRIM(M_NOSTRO_ACC_NO) || ',' || '0'  in 
            (select distinct TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_CATEGORY) || ',' || TRIM(M_NOS_ACC) || ',' || TRIM(M_SIGN_FLAG) from BAB_GLCD_INCLUDE_REP where UPPER(TRIM(M_SOURCE))='T24')
                 
        ) COMB_TAB
        left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_SAR
             on SPOT_SAR.M_REF_DATA = 1842 and TRIM(SPOT_SAR.M_CCY_NUM)='SAR'  and TRIM(SPOT_SAR.M_CCY_DEN)=TRIM(COMB_TAB.M_CURRENCY)
        left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_SAR2
             on SPOT_SAR2.M_REF_DATA=1842  and TRIM(SPOT_SAR2.M_CCY_DEN)='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT_SAR2.M_CCY_NUM)=TRIM(COMB_TAB.M_CURRENCY)    
        left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_USD
             on SPOT_USD.M_REF_DATA =1842  and TRIM(SPOT_USD.M_CCY_NUM)='USD'  and TRIM(SPOT_USD.M_CCY_DEN)=TRIM(COMB_TAB.M_CURRENCY)
        left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_USD2
             on SPOT_USD2.M_REF_DATA=1842  and TRIM(SPOT_USD2.M_CCY_DEN)='USD' and TRIM(SPOT_USD2.M_CCY_NUM)=TRIM(COMB_TAB.M_CURRENCY ) 
         group by COMB_TAB.M_CURRENCY
                  ,DECODE(TRIM(M_CURRENCY),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT_SAR.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT_SAR2.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT_SAR2.M_MID))))
         , DECODE(TRIM(M_CURRENCY),'USD',1,NVL(SPOT_USD2.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT_USD.M_MID,0),0,0,(SPOT_USD.M_MID))))
)
group by CCY,SAR_RATE,USD_RATE

-- Investments Summary Report
select INVESTMENT_TYPE,AMOUNT_INVESTED, MTM, UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS, 
DECODE(AMOUNT_INVESTED,0,0,ROUND(UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS/AMOUNT_INVESTED,6)*100) as UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS_PERTG,
DIVIDENDS_RECEIVED,ALCO_LIMIT, ALCO_LIMIT-AMOUNT_INVESTED as UNUTILIZED, 
--ROUND(decode(AMOUNT_INVESTED,0,0,(ALCO_LIMIT/AMOUNT_INVESTED)*100),0) as UTILIZED_PER
case when ALCO_LIMIT=0 then 0 else ROUND(AMOUNT_INVESTED/ALCO_LIMIT,6)*100 END as UTILIZED_PER
from
(
select INVESTMENT_TYPE,NVL(sum(AMOUNT_INVESTED),0) AMOUNT_INVESTED, NVL(sum(MTM),0) MTM, 
(NVL(sum(MTM),0)-NVL(sum(AMOUNT_INVESTED),0) ) UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS,
sum(DIVIDENDS_RECEIVED) DIVIDENDS_RECEIVED,
sum(ALCO_LIMIT) ALCO_LIMIT 
from
(
--limits
    select 'Murabaha/Equity Mutual Funds' as INVESTMENT_TYPE, 0 as AMOUNT_INVESTED, 0 as MTM, 0  as UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS, 0 as DIVIDENDS_RECEIVED,
    NVL((select sum(M_LIMIT) from BAB_LMT_TRY_LMT_REP where TRIM(M_ASSETCLASS)='Mutual Funds' and TRIM(M_SUB_CLASS) ='Equity Based'),0) as ALCO_LIMIT

-- Limit Utilization Report
select
BREAKDOWN,
ORDER_NUM,
INVESTMENT_TYPE,
AMOUNT_INVESTED, 
 MTM, 
UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS, 
case when UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS>=0 then UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS else 0 end as UNREALIZED_GAIN,
case when UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS<0  then UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS else 0 end as  UNREALIZED_LOSS,
DECODE(AMOUNT_INVESTED,0,0,ROUND(UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS/AMOUNT_INVESTED,6)*100) as UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS_PERTG,
NVL(DIVIDENDS_RECEIVED,0)as DIVIDENDS_RECEIVED,
NVL(ALCO_LIMIT,0) as ALCO_LIMIT,
(ALCO_LIMIT-AMOUNT_INVESTED) as UNUTILIZED, 
DECODE(ALCO_LIMIT,0,0,ROUND(AMOUNT_INVESTED/ALCO_LIMIT,6)*100) as UTILIZED_PER,
DECODE(ALCO_LIMIT,0,0,ROUND((ALCO_LIMIT-AMOUNT_INVESTED)/ALCO_LIMIT,6)*100) as UNUTILIZED_PER
from
(
    
    select 
    BREAKDOWN,ORDER_NUM,INVESTMENT_TYPE, 
    sum(AMOUNT_INVESTED) as AMOUNT_INVESTED, sum(MTM) as MTM, 
    sum(MTM)-sum(AMOUNT_INVESTED) as UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS,
    sum(DIVIDENDS_RECEIVED) as DIVIDENDS_RECEIVED, sum(ALCO_LIMIT) as ALCO_LIMIT
    from
    (
 --------------------Murabaha/Equity Mutual Funds------------------------------------
        select 'Details' as BREAKDOWN,
        1 as ORDER_NUM,'Murabaha/Equity Mutual Funds' as INVESTMENT_TYPE, 0 as AMOUNT_INVESTED, 0 as MTM, 0 as DIVIDENDS_RECEIVED,
        NVL((select sum(M_LIMIT) from BAB_LMT_TRY_LMT_REP where TRIM(M_ASSETCLASS)='Mutual Funds' and TRIM(M_SUB_CLASS) ='Equity Based'),0) as ALCO_LIMIT
        from BAB_LMT_TRY_LMT_REP where rownum=1       
    union all
        select 'Details' as BREAKDOWN,

        M_MTM_MIL_SAR as MTM, 0 as DIVIDENDS_RECEIVED,

        from BAB_LIMIT_UTLN_DATA_REP
        where 
        TRIM(M_UDF_INVTYP) IN ('Money Market Funds','Mutual Fund - Equity')
        and M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD'
        and  M_INSTRUMENT IN
        (

select
TRADE_ID,SERIAL_NUMBER,DEAL_DATE,VALUE_DATE,INVESTMENT_COMPANY_NAME,MUTUAL_FUND_NAME,DEAL_CURRENCY,UNITS_SUBSCRIBED,PER_UNIT_PURCHASE_PRICE,NAV1,
TOTAL_PURCHASE_AMOUNT,MTM,
MTM-TOTAL_PURCHASE_AMOUNT as UNRELALISED_GAIN_LOSS,
DIVIDENT,
(MTM-TOTAL_PURCHASE_AMOUNT)+DIVIDENT as TOTAL_INCOME,
MTM+DIVIDENT as NET_TOTAL,
--case 
--when ((MTM-TOTAL_PURCHASE_AMOUNT)+DIVIDENT) <=0 THEN 0
--else 
(((MTM-TOTAL_PURCHASE_AMOUNT)+DIVIDENT)/TOTAL_PURCHASE_AMOUNT) PA_RETURN
from
(
select 
M_NB as TRADE_ID,
DECODE(TRIM(M_SEC_SE_CODE),'',M_SEC_SE_ISIN,M_SEC_SE_CODE) as  SERIAL_NUMBER,
M_TP_DTETRN as DEAL_DATE,
M_TP_DTEPMT as VALUE_DATE,
TRIM(M_CPTY_NAME) as INVESTMENT_COMPANY_NAME,---check fund name for instrument
M_SE_F_NAME as MUTUAL_FUND_NAME,
M_TP_NOMCUR as DEAL_CURRENCY,
M_TP_LQTY2 as UNITS_SUBSCRIBED,
M_TP_PRICE as PER_UNIT_PURCHASE_PRICE,
M_TP_BUY,
M_MTM_MIL_SAR * 1000000 as NAV1, --- Changed as per AK input -- convert to whole numbers to match with other field values
M_MTM_MIL_SAR * 1000000 as MTM,  -- convert to whole numbers to match with other field values
M_CUR_POS_MIL_SAR_BS*1000000 as TOTAL_PURCHASE_AMOUNT, -- convert to whole numbers to match with other field values
0 as DIVIDENT --- Pending input from AK
from 
BAB_LIMIT_UTLN_DATA_REP
where 
TRIM(M_UDF_INVTYP) IS NOT NULL and M_UDF_INVTYP IN ('Managed Fund - Equity','Managed Fund - Others')
    and  M_INSTRUMENT IN
    (
        select M_INSTRUMENT from (select sum(M_TP_LQTY2_BS) AGG_QTY,M_INSTRUMENT,M_UDF_INVTYP
        from BAB_LIMIT_UTLN_DATA_REP
        where 
        TRIM(M_UDF_INVTYP) IN ('Managed Fund - Equity','Managed Fund - Others')
        and M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD'
        group by M_INSTRUMENT,M_UDF_INVTYP
        ) where AGG_QTY>0
    )
)

TPALL.M_NB as TRADE_ID,
DECODE(TRIM(SEC.M_SE_CODE),'',SEC.M_SE_ISIN,SEC.M_SE_CODE) as  SERIAL_NUMBER,
TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN as DEAL_DATE,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEPMT as VALUE_DATE,
TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME) as INVESTMENT_COMPANY_NAME,---check fund name for instrument
SEC.M_SE_F_NAME as MUTUAL_FUND_NAME,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as DEAL_CURRENCY,
TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2 as UNITS_SUBSCRIBED,
TPALL.M_TP_PRICE as PER_UNIT_PURCHASE_PRICE,
TPALL.M_TP_BUY,
----(TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)-PL.M_PL_NFMV2 as NAV1, --- settlement value -market value
PL.M_PL_NFMV2 as NAV1, --- Changed as per AK input
PL.M_PL_NFMV2 as MTM,
( case 
    when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_FMLY)='EQD' then TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE
    when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='BOND' then TPALL.M_TP_IPAY-TPALL.M_TP_ACCAMT
    else TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL end
)  *  DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,'SAR',1,TRUNC(NVL(SAR_SPOT.M_MID,0),2))
as TOTAL_PURCHASE_AMOUNT,
0 as DIVIDENT --- Pending input from AK
from TP_ALL_REP TPALL ,SECURITIES_REP SEC ,PARTIES_REP PARTIES,PL_DETAILED_REP PL, MD_FXRATE_REP SAR_SPOT
where TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
AND SEC.M_SE_LABEL(+)=TPALL.M_INSTRLABEL AND SEC.M_REF_DATA(+)=TPALL.M_REF_DATA 
AND TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP=PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL(+) and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA(+)
and TPALL.M_NB=PL.M_NB(+) and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PL.M_REF_DATA(+)
and SAR_SPOT.M_DATE(+)=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and SAR_SPOT.M_CCY_NUM(+)='SAR' and SAR_SPOT.M_CCY_DEN(+)=TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR
and TRIM(SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP) IS NOT NULL and SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP IN ('Managed Fund - Others','Mutual Fund - Equity','Sukuk Fund') -------'Real Estate Funds')
and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
--and TRIM(M_TP_PURPOSE) <> 'Corporate action execution'
)*/

WITH INNER_BLOCK AS
(
select T1.EXCHANGE_RATE_CURRENCY, T1.EXCHANGE_RATE_FXRATE,
ROUND(SUM(T1.ASSET_AMT), 2) AS TOTAL_ASSETS_AMOUNT,
ROUND(SUM(T1.ASSET_SMPD), 2) AS TOTAL_ASSETS_SMPD,
ROUND(DECODE(SUM(T1.ASSET_AMT),0,0,(SUM(T1.ASSET_SMPD) / SUM(T1.ASSET_AMT))), 6) AS TOTAL_ASSETS_RATE,
(-1*ROUND(SUM(T1.LIAB_AMT), 2)) AS TOTAL_LIABILITY_AMOUNT,
(-1*ROUND(SUM(T1.LIAB_SMPD), 2)) AS TOTAL_LIABILITY_SMPD,
ROUND(DECODE(SUM(T1.LIAB_AMT),0,0,(SUM(T1.LIAB_SMPD) / SUM(T1.LIAB_AMT))), 6) AS TOTAL_LIABILITY_RATE,
ROUND(NVL(T1.Limit1,0), 6) as LIMIT_REF
FROM
(
SELECT 'ASSET' as BRKDWN, M_NB, M_TP_NOMCUR as EXCHANGE_RATE_CURRENCY, NVL(M_TP_NOMINAL,0) as ASSET_AMT, 0 as LIAB_AMT, M_COVER_RATE, 
--NVL(M_TP_NOMINAL*M_COVER_RATE,0) as ASSET_SMPD, 
case when M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Placement','DPM Murabaha','Wakala Placement','RR SAMA','RR Murabaha','RR Waad','LTM', 'SAMA Bill') then NVL(M_TP_NOMINAL*M_COVER_RATE, 0) 
     when M_CMP_TYPO in ('SFRM') then NVL(M_TP_NOMINAL*NVL((M_LAST_COUPON_RATE + M_TP_YIELD),0), 0)
     when M_CMP_TYPO in ('SGDM') then NVL(M_TP_NOMINAL*NVL((M_LAST_COUPON_RATE),0), 0)
     when M_CMP_TYPO in ('Wakala Placement CFC') then NVL(M_TP_NOMINAL*NVL((M_LAST_COUPON_RATE + M_COVER_RATE),0), 0)
     else 0 end as ASSET_SMPD,       
0 as LIAB_SMPD, DECODE(TRIM(M_TP_NOMCUR), 'SAR', 1, NVL((select NVL(M_MID,0) from MD_FXRATE_REP where M_REF_DATA=1842 and TRIM(M_CCY_PAIR)=(TRIM(M_TP_NOMCUR) || '/SAR')),0)) as EXCHANGE_RATE_FXRATE,
NVL((select M_TARGETAMOUNT from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where M_REPORTNAME='RISK_MMGAP_SUM' and TRIM(M_TARGETMONTH)=TRIM(M_TP_NOMCUR)),0) as Limit1
from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP
where M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD'
and M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Placement','DPM Murabaha','Wakala Placement','RR SAMA','RR Murabaha','RR Waad', 'LTM', 'SFRM', 'SGDM', 'SAMA Bill', 'Wakala Placement CFC')
and M_TP_INT='N' and M_TP_DTEFST<=M_REP_DATE2 and (M_TP_DTEEXP-M_REP_DATE2>=1) and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N 

UNION ALL

SELECT 'LIABILITY' as BRKDWN, M_NB, M_TP_NOMCUR as EXCHANGE_RATE_CURRENCY, 0 as ASSET_AMT, NVL(M_TP_NOMINAL,0) as LIAB_AMT, M_COVER_RATE, 0 as ASSET_SMPD, 
--NVL(M_TP_NOMINAL*M_COVER_RATE,0) as LIAB_SMPD,
case when M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing','Repo SAMA','Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad') then NVL(M_TP_NOMINAL*M_COVER_RATE, 0) 
     when M_CMP_TYPO in ('Wakala Borrowing CFC') then NVL(M_TP_NOMINAL*NVL((M_LAST_COUPON_RATE + M_COVER_RATE),0), 0) 
     else 0 end as LIAB_SMPD,
DECODE(TRIM(M_TP_NOMCUR), 'SAR', 1, NVL((select NVL(M_MID,0) from MD_FXRATE_REP where M_REF_DATA=1842 and TRIM(M_CCY_PAIR)=(TRIM(M_TP_NOMCUR) || '/SAR')),0)) as EXCHANGE_RATE_FXRATE,
NVL((select M_TARGETAMOUNT from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where M_REPORTNAME='RISK_MMGAP_SUM' and TRIM(M_TARGETMONTH)=TRIM(M_TP_NOMCUR)),0) as Limit1
from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP
where M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD'
and M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing','Repo SAMA','Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad', 'Wakala Borrowing CFC', 'Depo CapFloorCollar')
and M_TP_INT='N' and M_TP_DTEFST<=M_REP_DATE2 and (M_TP_DTEEXP-M_REP_DATE2>=1) and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N 
) T1 
group by  T1.EXCHANGE_RATE_CURRENCY, T1.EXCHANGE_RATE_FXRATE, T1.Limit1, 0, NVL(T1.Limit1,0)
)

select 1 AS ORDER1, EXCHANGE_RATE_CURRENCY, ROUND(EXCHANGE_RATE_FXRATE,5) AS EXCHANGE_RATE_FXRATE, TOTAL_ASSETS_AMOUNT, ROUND((TOTAL_ASSETS_AMOUNT * EXCHANGE_RATE_FXRATE),2) AS TOTAL_ASSETS_AMOUNT_IN_SAR, ROUND(TOTAL_ASSETS_RATE,5) AS TOTAL_ASSETS_RATE,
TOTAL_LIABILITY_AMOUNT, ROUND((TOTAL_LIABILITY_AMOUNT * EXCHANGE_RATE_FXRATE),2) AS TOTAL_LIABILITY_AMOUNT_IN_SAR, ROUND(TOTAL_LIABILITY_RATE,5) AS TOTAL_LIABILITY_RATE, 
ROUND ((TOTAL_ASSETS_AMOUNT + TOTAL_LIABILITY_AMOUNT), 2) AS NET_POSITION_AMOUNT, (ROUND((TOTAL_ASSETS_AMOUNT + TOTAL_LIABILITY_AMOUNT), 2) * EXCHANGE_RATE_FXRATE) AS NET_POSITION_AMOUNT_IN_SAR,
ROUND(DECODE ( (TOTAL_ASSETS_AMOUNT + TOTAL_LIABILITY_AMOUNT) , 0, 0, ((TOTAL_ASSETS_SMPD + TOTAL_LIABILITY_SMPD) / (TOTAL_ASSETS_AMOUNT + TOTAL_LIABILITY_AMOUNT))), 5) AS NET_POSITION_BREAK_RATE,
ROUND(DECODE ( (TOTAL_ASSETS_AMOUNT + TOTAL_LIABILITY_AMOUNT) , 0, 0, LIMIT_REF - (TOTAL_ASSETS_AMOUNT + TOTAL_LIABILITY_AMOUNT)), 2) as GAP_EXCESS
from INNER_BLOCK

UNION ALL

SELECT 2 AS ORDER1, EXCHANGE_RATE_CURRENCY, EXCHANGE_RATE_FXRATE, TOTAL_ASSETS_AMOUNT, SUM(TOTAL_ASSETS_AMOUNT_IN_SAR) AS TOTAL_ASSETS_AMOUNT_IN_SAR,
ROUND((SUM(TOTAL_ASSETS_SMPD_IN_SAR) / SUM(TOTAL_ASSETS_AMOUNT_IN_SAR)),5) AS TOTAL_ASSETS_RATE, TOTAL_LIABILITY_AMOUNT, 
SUM(TOTAL_LIABILITY_AMOUNT_IN_SAR) AS TOTAL_LIABILITY_AMOUNT_IN_SAR, ROUND((SUM(TOTAL_LIABILITY_SMPD_IN_SAR) / SUM(TOTAL_LIABILITY_AMOUNT_IN_SAR)),5) AS TOTAL_LIABILITY_RATE,
NET_POSITION_AMOUNT, SUM(NET_POSITION_AMOUNT_IN_SAR) AS NET_POSITION_AMOUNT_IN_SAR,
ROUND((SUM(NET_POSITION_SMPD_IN_SAR) / SUM(NET_POSITION_AMOUNT_IN_SAR)),5) AS NET_POSITION_BREAK_RATE, 0 AS GAP_EXCESS
FROM 
(
select 'TOTAL' AS EXCHANGE_RATE_CURRENCY, NULL AS EXCHANGE_RATE_FXRATE, NULL AS TOTAL_ASSETS_AMOUNT, ROUND((TOTAL_ASSETS_AMOUNT * EXCHANGE_RATE_FXRATE),2) AS TOTAL_ASSETS_AMOUNT_IN_SAR,
ROUND(TOTAL_ASSETS_RATE,5) AS TOTAL_ASSETS_RATE,
ROUND((TOTAL_ASSETS_SMPD * EXCHANGE_RATE_FXRATE),2) AS TOTAL_ASSETS_SMPD_IN_SAR,
NULL AS TOTAL_LIABILITY_AMOUNT, ROUND((TOTAL_LIABILITY_AMOUNT * EXCHANGE_RATE_FXRATE),2) AS TOTAL_LIABILITY_AMOUNT_IN_SAR, ROUND(TOTAL_LIABILITY_RATE,5) AS TOTAL_LIABILITY_RATE, 
ROUND((TOTAL_LIABILITY_SMPD * EXCHANGE_RATE_FXRATE),2) AS TOTAL_LIABILITY_SMPD_IN_SAR,
NULL AS NET_POSITION_AMOUNT, (ROUND((TOTAL_ASSETS_AMOUNT + TOTAL_LIABILITY_AMOUNT), 2) * EXCHANGE_RATE_FXRATE) AS NET_POSITION_AMOUNT_IN_SAR,
ROUND(DECODE ( (TOTAL_ASSETS_AMOUNT + TOTAL_LIABILITY_AMOUNT) , 0, 0, ((TOTAL_ASSETS_SMPD + TOTAL_LIABILITY_SMPD) / (TOTAL_ASSETS_AMOUNT + TOTAL_LIABILITY_AMOUNT))), 5) AS NET_POSITION_BREAK_RATE,
(ROUND((TOTAL_ASSETS_SMPD + TOTAL_LIABILITY_SMPD), 2) * EXCHANGE_RATE_FXRATE) AS NET_POSITION_SMPD_IN_SAR,
ROUND(DECODE ( (TOTAL_ASSETS_AMOUNT + TOTAL_LIABILITY_AMOUNT) , 0, 0, LIMIT_REF - (TOTAL_ASSETS_AMOUNT + TOTAL_LIABILITY_AMOUNT)), 2) as GAP_EXCESS
from INNER_BLOCK 
) group by EXCHANGE_RATE_CURRENCY, EXCHANGE_RATE_FXRATE, TOTAL_ASSETS_AMOUNT

with MM_GAP as 
(
    select 
    BUCKET as ORDER1,
    case when BUCKET<=7 then BUCKET || ' days' else BUCKET2 end as BUCKET,
    M_REP_DATE2+BUCKET as DATE_FROM,
    M_TP_DTEEXP as DATE_TO, 
    sum(MURABAHA_PLACEMENT_AMT) as MURABAHA_PLACEMENT_AMT,
    sum(DPM_MURABAHA_AMT) as DPM_MURABAHA_AMT,
    sum(WAKALA_PLACEMENT_AMT) as WAKALA_PLACEMENT_AMT,
    sum(RR_SAMA_AMT) as RR_SAMA_AMT,
    sum(RR_MURABAHA_AMT) as RR_MURABAHA_AMT,
    sum(RR_WAAD_AMT) as RR_WAAD_AMT,
    sum(TOTAL_ASSETS) TOTAL_ASSETS,
    sum(MURABAHA_BORROWING_AMT) as MURABAHA_BORROWING_AMT,
    sum(WAKALA_BORROWING_AMT) as WAKALA_BORROWING_AMT,
    sum(REPO_SAMA_AMT) as REPO_SAMA_AMT,
    sum(REPO_MURABAHA_AMT) as REPO_MURABAHA_AMT,
    sum(REPO_WAAD_AMT) as REPO_WAAD_AMT, 
    sum(TOTAL_LIABILITY) TOTAL_LIABILITY,
    NVL(sum(TOTAL_ASSETS),0)-ABS(NVL(sum(TOTAL_LIABILITY),0)) as NET_POSITION
    from
    (
        select 
        M_REP_DATE2,M_TP_DTEEXP,(M_TP_DTEEXP-M_REP_DATE2) as BUCKET,'' as BUCKET2,
        M_CMP_TYPO,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'Murabaha Placement',M_TP_NOMINAL,0) as MURABAHA_PLACEMENT_AMT,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'DPM Murabaha',M_TP_NOMINAL,0)       as DPM_MURABAHA_AMT,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'Wakala Placement',M_TP_NOMINAL,0)   as WAKALA_PLACEMENT_AMT,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'RR SAMA',M_TP_NOMINAL,0)            as RR_SAMA_AMT,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'RR Murabaha',M_TP_NOMINAL,0)        as RR_MURABAHA_AMT,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'RR Waad',M_TP_NOMINAL,0)            as RR_WAAD_AMT,
        case when 
        M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Placement','DPM Murabaha','Wakala Placement','RR SAMA','RR Murabaha','RR Waad')
        then M_TP_NOMINAL else 0 end as TOTAL_ASSETS,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'Murabaha Borrowing',M_TP_NOMINAL,0) as MURABAHA_BORROWING_AMT,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'Wakala Borrowing',M_TP_NOMINAL,0)   as WAKALA_BORROWING_AMT,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'Repo SAMA',M_TP_NOMINAL,0)          as REPO_SAMA_AMT,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'Repo Murabaha',M_TP_NOMINAL,0)      as REPO_MURABAHA_AMT,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'Repo Waad',M_TP_NOMINAL,0)          as REPO_WAAD_AMT,
        case when 
        M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing','Repo SAMA','Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad')
        then M_TP_NOMINAL else 0 end as TOTAL_LIABILITY
        from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP --TP_ALL_REP 
        where 
        --M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and 
        M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD' and M_TP_INT='N'
        and M_CMP_TYPO in 
        (
        'Murabaha Placement','DPM Murabaha','Wakala Placement','RR SAMA','RR Murabaha','RR Waad'
        ,'Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing','Repo SAMA','Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad'
        )
        and (M_TP_DTEEXP-M_REP_DATE2>=1 and M_TP_DTEEXP-M_REP_DATE2<=7)
        and M_TP_NOMCUR=@Currency:C  
        
        union all
        
         select 
        M_REP_DATE2,M_REP_DATE2+30 as M_TP_DTEEXP,8 as BUCKET, '8 days to 1 Month' as BUCKET2,
        M_CMP_TYPO,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'Murabaha Placement',M_TP_NOMINAL,0) as MURABAHA_PLACEMENT_AMT,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'DPM Murabaha',M_TP_NOMINAL,0)       as DPM_MURABAHA_AMT,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'Wakala Placement',M_TP_NOMINAL,0)   as WAKALA_PLACEMENT_AMT,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'RR SAMA',M_TP_NOMINAL,0)            as RR_SAMA_AMT,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'RR Murabaha',M_TP_NOMINAL,0)        as RR_MURABAHA_AMT,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'RR Waad',M_TP_NOMINAL,0)            as RR_WAAD_AMT,
        case when 
        M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Placement','DPM Murabaha','Wakala Placement','RR SAMA','RR Murabaha','RR Waad')
        then M_TP_NOMINAL else 0 end as TOTAL_ASSETS,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'Murabaha Borrowing',M_TP_NOMINAL,0) as MURABAHA_BORROWING_AMT,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'Wakala Borrowing',M_TP_NOMINAL,0)   as WAKALA_BORROWING_AMT,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'Repo SAMA',M_TP_NOMINAL,0)          as REPO_SAMA_AMT,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'Repo Murabaha',M_TP_NOMINAL,0)      as REPO_MURABAHA_AMT,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'Repo Waad',M_TP_NOMINAL,0)          as REPO_WAAD_AMT,
        case when 
        M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing','Repo SAMA','Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad')
        then M_TP_NOMINAL else 0 end as TOTAL_LIABILITY
        from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP --TP_ALL_REP 
        where 
        --M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and 
        M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD' and M_TP_INT='N'
        and M_CMP_TYPO in 
        (
        'Murabaha Placement','DPM Murabaha','Wakala Placement','RR SAMA','RR Murabaha','RR Waad'
        ,'Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing','Repo SAMA','Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad'
        )
        and (M_TP_DTEEXP-M_REP_DATE2>=8 and M_TP_DTEEXP-M_REP_DATE2<=30)
        and M_TP_NOMCUR=@Currency:C
        
         union all
        
         select 
        M_REP_DATE2,M_REP_DATE2+60 as M_TP_DTEEXP,9 as BUCKET, '2 Months' as BUCKET2,
        M_CMP_TYPO,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'Murabaha Placement',M_TP_NOMINAL,0) as MURABAHA_PLACEMENT_AMT,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'DPM Murabaha',M_TP_NOMINAL,0)       as DPM_MURABAHA_AMT,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'Wakala Placement',M_TP_NOMINAL,0)   as WAKALA_PLACEMENT_AMT,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'RR SAMA',M_TP_NOMINAL,0)            as RR_SAMA_AMT,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'RR Murabaha',M_TP_NOMINAL,0)        as RR_MURABAHA_AMT,
        DECODE(TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO),'RR Waad',M_TP_NOMINAL,0)            as RR_WAAD_AMT,
        case when 
        M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Placement','DPM Murabaha','Wakala Placement','RR SAMA','RR Murabaha','RR Waad')

--CAST(B.M_DF_BCTPRF AS NUMBER(10)) AS BROKER_NO,

ELSE '27981' END AS VARCHAR(40)) AS CUST_ACC_NO,

END AS NUMBER(24,8))AS CUST_NO_NOM_LCY,

--FROM BAB_TRN_ALL_REP A, ACC_DLV_CASH_REP B 
FROM TP_ALL_REP A
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2
    on A.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT2.M_DATE and A.M_TP_NOMCUR=SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN  and SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM='SAR'
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT22
    on A.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT22.M_DATE and A.M_TP_NOMCUR=SPOT22.M_CCY_NUM  and SPOT22.M_CCY_DEN='SAR'
    left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
    on A.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA and TRIM(A.M_TP_SECISS)=TRIM(PARTIES.M_CIF)
    , ACC_DLV_CASH_REP B

      select

        PARTIES.M_CIF as CIF,

    NVL(sum(PL),0) as PL_2020,0 as PL_2021,  0 as PL_2022 ,0 as PL_2023 , 0 as VOLUME_YTD
    from 
    (
        select 
        TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, TPALL.M_NB,TPALL.M_AMD_STS2,
        PARTIES.M_CIF as CIF,
        TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME) as CUSTOMER_NAME,
        DECODE(TRIM(TRD_UDF.M_CATEGORY),' ',TRIM(TRD_UDF.M_CATEGORY),'Not_Used') as DIVISION,
        'Not_Used' as SEGMENT1,
        PARTIES.M_CITY as RESIDENCE,
        PARTIES.M_COUNTRY as NATIONALITY,
        'NA' as REGION,
        TPALL.M_TP_TRADER as RELATIONSHIP_MANAGER,
        NVL(TRIM(RM.M_TREASURYRM),'Not_Used') as TREASURY_RM,
        NVL(TRIM(RM.M_ACCOFFICER),'Not_Used') as ACC_OFFICER,
        PARTIES.M_TEL as MOBILE_NO,
         ROUND((PL_DET.M_PL_CSFCP2 + PL_DET.M_PL_CSFRV2 + PL_DET.M_PL_FPNFCP2 + PL_DET.M_PL_FPNFRV2 + PL_DET.M_PL_NFMV2+ PL_DET.M_PL_FTFI2 + PL_DET.M_PL_CSFI2),0) as PL,
         TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as NOMINAL          
        from TP_ALL_REP TPALL,  PARTIES_REP PARTIES,TRD_UDF_REP TRD_UDF,PL_DETAILED_REP PL_DET,BAB_ACC_USER_RM_REP RM
        where TPALL.M_REF_DATA =@MxDataSetKey:N 
        and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N' and TPALL.M_AMD_STS2<>'NA' and TPALL.M_AMD_STS2<>'CA'
        and TPALL.M_TP_CNTRPID=PARTIES.M_LABEL(+) and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA(+)
        and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TRD_UDF.M_REF_DATA(+) and TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=TRD_UDF.M_NB(+)
        and TPALL.M_NB=PL_DET.M_NB(+) and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PL_DET.M_REF_DATA(+)
        and TRIM(PARTIES.M_CIF)=TRIM(RM.M_CIF(+))
        and (TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SAL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SALES_%')
        and TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO not like 'SCF BR%'
        and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'YYYY')=  2020
    ) PL_2020
    where TRIM(RELATIONSHIP_MANAGER) NOT IN ('MX_IMPORT')
    group by CIF,CUSTOMER_NAME,DIVISION,SEGMENT1,RESIDENCE,NATIONALITY,REGION,RELATIONSHIP_MANAGER,TREASURY_RM,ACC_OFFICER,MOBILE_NO 
)
  group by CIF,CUSTOMER_NAME,DIVISION,SEGMENT1,RESIDENCE,NATIONALITY,REGION,RELATIONSHIP_MANAGER,TREASURY_RM,ACC_OFFICER,MOBILE_NO

 (

    where M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N and M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
    and ( M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SL_%' or M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SAL_%' or M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SALES_%')
    and M_CMP_TYPO not like 'SCF BR%'
    and TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTESYS, 'MONYYYY') >= CONCAT('DEC',TO_CHAR((select MAX(M_REP_DATE2) as  M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N), 'YYYY'))
    and TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTESYS, 'MONYYYY') <= CONCAT('DEC',TO_CHAR((select MAX(M_REP_DATE2) as  M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N), 'YYYY'))
    group by M_CMP_TYPO,M_TP_TRADER
 )

-- Sales FT BLotter (BIB- Branch)--Sales FT Transactions
   select
    'Daily' as BREAKDOWN,
    TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN as  DATE1,
    TPALL.M_NB as REF_NO,
    DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME),' ') as CUST_NAME_CR,
    DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ) as DEBIT_CCY,
    DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ) as CREDIT_CCY,
    DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME),' ') as CUST_NAME_DR,
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as LOC_AMT_DEBITED,
    TPALL.M_TP_PRICE as TREASURY_RATE,
    TPALL.M_TP_PRICE+NVL(DECODE(TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0,0,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG1,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0),0) as CUSTOMER_RATE,
    NVL(DECODE(TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0,0,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG1,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0),0) as CUSTOMER_SPREAD, --rate-margin need to update or get coverrate from screen after CR completed implementation
    (
        (NVL((DECODE(TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0,0,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG1,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0)),0)-TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)
        /DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ)
    ) * DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',SPOT.M_MID,SPOT2.M_MID)
    as TOTAL_PROFIT,  ---coverrate-cusrate/sold amut
    TPALL.M_TP_TRADER as INPUTTER,
    DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',PARTIES.M_CIF,' ') as CIF_CREDIT,
    DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',PARTIES.M_CIF,' ') as CIF_DEBIT,
    DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_CMNT0),' ',TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_CMNT0),'No_Used') as TREASURY_RM,
    ' ' as CHANNEL, 0 as COUNT1

    from TP_ALL_REP TPALL, TP_RT_REP TPRT, PARTIES_REP PARTIES, MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT, MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2
    where TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
    and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TPRT.M_REF_DATA(+) and TPALL.M_NB=TPRT.M_NB(+)
    and TPALL.M_TP_CNTRPID=PARTIES.M_LABEL(+) and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA(+)
    and SPOT.M_DATE(+) =TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and SPOT.M_CCY_NUM(+) ='SAR' and SPOT.M_CCY_DEN(+) =TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR
			and SPOT2.M_DATE(+)=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM(+)='SAR' and SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN(+)=TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ
    and (TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SAL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SALES_%')
    and TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO not like 'SCF BR%'
    and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTESYS, 'MONYYYY') >=  TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'MONYYYY')
    
    union all
     -- Sales FT BLotter (BIB- Branch)-- Treasury RM 
   select
   'RM Vs Channel' as BREAKDOWN,
    null as  DATE1,
    0 as REF_NO,
    ' ' as CUST_NAME_CR,
    ' ' as DEBIT_CCY,
    ' ' as CREDIT_CCY,
    ' ' as CUST_NAME_DR,
    0 as LOC_AMT_DEBITED,
    0 as TREASURY_RATE,
    0 as CUSTOMER_RATE,
    0 as CUSTOMER_SPREAD, 
    0 as TOTAL_PROFIT,
    ' ' as INPUTTER,
    ' ' as CIF_CREDIT,
    ' ' as CIF_DEBIT,
    TREASURY_RM,CHANNEL, SUM(COUNT1) as COUNT1
    from (
        select
        DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_CMNT0),' ',TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_CMNT0),'No_Used') as TREASURY_RM,
        DECODE(TRIM(TRD_UDF.M_CHANNEL),' ',TRIM(TRD_UDF.M_CHANNEL),'Not_Defined') as CHANNEL,
        1 as COUNT1
        from TP_ALL_REP TPALL ,TRD_UDF_REP TRD_UDF
        where TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
        and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TRD_UDF.M_REF_DATA(+) and TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=TRD_UDF.M_NB(+)
        and (TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SAL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SALES_%')
        and TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO not like 'SCF BR%'
        and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTESYS, 'MONYYYY') >=  TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'MONYYYY')
    ) group by TREASURY_RM,CHANNEL

select 
'Details' as BREAKDOWN,
--TPALL.CIF,TPALL.SHORT_NAME_EN,
LMT.CIF,TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME) as SHORT_NAME_EN,
LMT.LIMIT_CURRENCY,
TPALL.REPORTING_DATE,
LMT.EFFECTIVE_DATE,
LMT.APPROVAL_DATE,
LMT.EXPIRY_DATE,
LMT.LIMIT1,
(NVL(LMT.LIMIT1,0)-NVL(NOM_SUM,0)) as AVAIL_LIMIT,
LMT.VALDN_STATUS as LIMIT_STATUS,
0 as LIMIT_STATUS_COUNT,
0 as EXPIRY_COUNT
from 
(
    select CIF, LIMIT_CURRENCY, APPROVAL_DATE, EXPIRY_DATE, EFFECTIVE_DATE, LIMIT1, VALDN_STATUS from 
    (
        select CIF,LIMIT_CURRENCY,MAX(APPROVAL_DATE) APPROVAL_DATE,REP_DATE,
        MAX(EXPIRY_DATE) EXPIRY_DATE, MIN(EFFECTIVE_DATE) EFFECTIVE_DATE,MAX(LIMIT1) LIMIT1,VALDN_STATUS
        from (
            select 
            M_KEY as CIF,
            --M_KEY as SHORT_NAME_EN,
            M_CURRENCY as LIMIT_CURRENCY,
            M_VALIDATION as APPROVAL_DATE,
            case when TO_CHAR(M_ENDDATE)='13-NOV-69' then TO_DATE('31-DEC-99','DD-MON-YY')
            else M_ENDDATE end as EXPIRY_DATE,
            case when TO_CHAR(M_EFFECTIVED)='01-JAN-70' then TO_DATE('01-JAN-01','DD-MON-YY')
            else M_EFFECTIVED end as EFFECTIVE_DATE,
            M_MAX as LIMIT1,
            M_STATUS as VALDN_STATUS,
            (select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalData_BAB_KSA:N and rownum=1) as REP_DATE
            from BAB_CPTY_NL_TYPO_REP CPTY_NL
            where CPTY_NL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
            and M_STATUS='Validated' ---check filter to be aplied
            and M_KEY<>'<All>' --and M_KEY='10001641'
            )
        group by CIF,LIMIT_CURRENCY,VALDN_STATUS,REP_DATE
    )
    where EFFECTIVE_DATE<=REP_DATE and EXPIRY_DATE>=REP_DATE 
    and (TO_CHAR(EFFECTIVE_DATE,'YYYY')=TO_CHAR(REP_DATE,'YYYY') or TO_CHAR(EXPIRY_DATE,'YYYY')=TO_CHAR(REP_DATE,'YYYY'))
) LMT
left outer join (
    select 
        TP_ALL.M_TP_CNTRP as CIF,
        TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME) as SHORT_NAME_EN,
        M_REP_DATE2 as REPORTING_DATE,
        sum(TP_ALL.M_TP_NOMINAL) NOM_SUM 
    from TP_ALL_REP TP_ALL
    left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
        on TRIM(TP_ALL.M_TP_CNTRP)=TRIM(PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL) and TP_ALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
    where 
    TP_ALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalData_BAB_KSA:N
    and TP_ALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' and TP_ALL.M_TP_INT='N' --and M_TRN_FMLY='CURR' 
    and ( TP_ALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SL_%' or TP_ALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SAL_%' or TP_ALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SALES_%')
    and TP_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO not like 'SCF BR%'
    and TO_CHAR(TP_ALL.M_TP_DTETRN,'YYYY')=TO_CHAR(TP_ALL.M_REP_DATE2,'YYYY')
    group by TP_ALL.M_TP_CNTRP,PARTIES.M_NAME,TP_ALL.M_REP_DATE2
) TPALL
 on LMT.CIF=TPALL.CIF
  left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
        on TRIM(LMT.CIF)=TRIM(PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL) and PARTIES.M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalData_BAB_KSA:N

union all

select 
'Limit Status' as BREAKDOWN,
'' as CIF,'' as SHORT_NAME_EN,'' as LIMIT_CURRENCY,null as REPORTING_DATE,null as EFFECTIVE_DATE,null as APPROVAL_DATE,
null as EXPIRY_DATE,0 as LIMIT1,0 as AVAIL_LIMIT,
LMT2.LIMIT_STATUS as LIMIT_STATUS,
LMT2.LIMIT_STATUS_COUNT as LIMIT_STATUS_COUNT,
0 as EXPIRY_COUNT
from (
    select LIMIT_STATUS, count(*) as LIMIT_STATUS_COUNT from
    (
    select 
    case 
    when A.EXPIRY_DATE>=A.REP_DATE then 'ACTIVE'
    when A.EXPIRY_DATE<A.REP_DATE then 'EXPIRED'
    else 'RENWAL' end as LIMIT_STATUS 
    from (
            select 
            M_KEY as CIF,
            --M_KEY as SHORT_NAME_EN,
            M_CURRENCY as LIMIT_CURRENCY,
            M_VALIDATION as APPROVAL_DATE,
            case when TO_CHAR(M_ENDDATE)='13-NOV-69' then TO_DATE('31-DEC-99','DD-MON-YY')
            else M_ENDDATE end as EXPIRY_DATE,
            case when TO_CHAR(M_EFFECTIVED)='01-JAN-70' then TO_DATE('01-JAN-01','DD-MON-YY')
            else M_EFFECTIVED end as EFFECTIVE_DATE,
            M_MAX as LIMIT1,
            M_STATUS as VALDN_STATUS,
            (select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalData_BAB_KSA:N and rownum=1) as REP_DATE
            from BAB_CPTY_NL_TYPO_REP CPTY_NL
            where CPTY_NL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
            and M_STATUS='Validated' ---check filter to be aplied
            and M_KEY<>'<All>' --and M_KEY='10001641'
        ) A
    ) B
    group by LIMIT_STATUS
)LMT2

union all

select 
'Limit Status' as BREAKDOWN,
'' as CIF,'' as SHORT_NAME_EN,'' as LIMIT_CURRENCY,null as REPORTING_DATE,null as EFFECTIVE_DATE,null as APPROVAL_DATE,
LMT3.EXPIRY_DATE,0 as LIMIT1,0 as AVAIL_LIMIT,
'' as LIMIT_STATUS,
0 as LIMIT_STATUS_COUNT,
LMT3.EXPIRY_COUNT as EXPIRY_COUNT
from (
    select EXPIRY_DATE, count(*) as EXPIRY_COUNT from
       (
           select 
            M_KEY as CIF,
            --M_KEY as SHORT_NAME_EN,
            M_CURRENCY as LIMIT_CURRENCY,
            M_VALIDATION as APPROVAL_DATE,
            case when TO_CHAR(M_ENDDATE)='13-NOV-69' then TO_DATE('31-DEC-99','DD-MON-YY')
            else M_ENDDATE end as EXPIRY_DATE,
            case when TO_CHAR(M_EFFECTIVED)='01-JAN-70' then TO_DATE('01-JAN-01','DD-MON-YY')
            else M_EFFECTIVED end as EFFECTIVE_DATE,
            M_MAX as LIMIT1,
            M_STATUS as VALDN_STATUS,
            (select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalData_BAB_KSA:N and rownum=1) as REP_DATE
            from BAB_CPTY_NL_TYPO_REP CPTY_NL
            where CPTY_NL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
            and M_STATUS='Validated' ---check filter to be aplied
            and M_KEY<>'<All>' --and M_KEY='10001641'
        ) A
        where A.EXPIRY_DATE<A.REP_DATE
        group by EXPIRY_DATE
)LMT3
