-- Sales Trade Finance
   select
    'Daily Revenue' as BREAKDOWN,
    0 as LC_NUMBER,
    null as  VALUE_DATE,
    ' ' as CIF,
    ' ' as CUSTOMER_NAME,
    ' ' as CCY,
    0 as AMOUNT,
    0 as PROFIT,
    0 as CUSTOMER_SPREAD,
    0 as CUSTOMER_RATE,
    0 as COVER_RATE,
    0 as SPREAD,
    M_REP_DATE2 as DAILY_DATE,
    M_TP_NOMINAL as DAILY_REVENUE,
    ' ' as M_TP_BUY
    from
    (
        select TPALL.M_REP_DATE2,sum(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL) M_TP_NOMINAL
        from TP_ALL_REP TPALL, TRD_UDF_REP TRD_UDF
        where TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
        and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TRD_UDF.M_REF_DATA(+) and TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=TRD_UDF.M_NB(+)
        and (TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SAL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SALES_%')
        and TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO not like 'SCF BR%'
        and TRD_UDF.M_CHANNEL='Trade Finance'
        and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'YYYY') =  TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YYYY')
       ---and  TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2
       -- and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'MONYYYY') <=  TO_CHAR((select MAX(M_REP_DATE2) as  M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N), 'MONYYYY')
       group by TPALL.M_REP_DATE2
    )
    
    union all
    
     select
    'TF Revenue' as BREAKDOWN,
    0 as LC_NUMBER,
    null as  VALUE_DATE,
    ' ' as CIF,
    ' ' as CUSTOMER_NAME,
    ' ' as CCY,
    0 as AMOUNT,
    0 as PROFIT,
    0 as CUSTOMER_SPREAD,
    0 as CUSTOMER_RATE,
    0 as COVER_RATE,
    0 as SPREAD,
    null as DAILY_DATE,
    M_TP_NOMINAL as DAILY_REVENUE,
    M_TP_BUY as M_TP_BUY
    from
    (
        select DECODE(M_TP_BUY,'B','BUY','SELL') M_TP_BUY,sum(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL) M_TP_NOMINAL
        from TP_ALL_REP TPALL, TRD_UDF_REP TRD_UDF
        where TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
        and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TRD_UDF.M_REF_DATA(+) and TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=TRD_UDF.M_NB(+)
        and (TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SAL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SALES_%')
        and TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO not like 'SCF BR%'
        and TRD_UDF.M_CHANNEL='Trade Finance'
        and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'YYYY') =  TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YYYY')
       group by TPALL.M_TP_BUY
    )
    
  union all
  
  select
   'Daily Details' as BREAKDOWN,
    TPALL.M_NB as LC_NUMBER,
    TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN as  VALUE_DATE,
    PARTIES.M_CIF as CIF,
    TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME) as CUSTOMER_NAME,
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as CCY,
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as AMOUNT,
     NVL(DECODE(TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0,0,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG1,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0),0) as CUSTOMER_SPREAD, --rate-margin need to update or get coverrate from screen after CR completed implementation
    (
        NVL((DECODE(TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0,0,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG1,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0)),0)-TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)
        /DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ
    ) as PROFIT,  ---coverrate-cusrate/sold amut
    TPALL.M_TP_PRICE as CUSTOMER_RATE,
    TPALL.M_TP_PRICE+NVL(DECODE(TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0,0,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG1,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0),0) as COVER_RATE,
    NVL(DECODE(TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0,0,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG1,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0),0) as SPREAD,
    null as  DAILY_DATE,
    0 as DAILY_REVENUE,
    ' ' as M_TP_BUY
    
    from TP_ALL_REP TPALL, TP_RT_REP TPRT, PARTIES_REP PARTIES,TRD_UDF_REP TRD_UDF
    where TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
    and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TPRT.M_REF_DATA(+) and TPALL.M_NB=TPRT.M_NB(+)
    and TPALL.M_TP_CNTRPID=PARTIES.M_LABEL(+) and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA(+)
    and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TRD_UDF.M_REF_DATA(+) and TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=TRD_UDF.M_NB(+)
    and (TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SAL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SALES_%')
    and TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO not like 'SCF BR%'
    and TRD_UDF.M_CHANNEL='Trade Finance'
    and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'YYYY') >=  TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YYYY')

WITH SALES_TSD_DATA AS (
SELECT 
			M_NB as TSD_ID, 
			M_TP_DTETRN as DEAL_DATE,
    TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN, 'MM-MON-YYYY') AS DEAL_MON,
    TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN, 'MON-YYYY') AS TRD_MON,
    TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN, 'YYYY') AS DEAL_YR,
    M_TP_CNTRP as CUSTOMER,           
    M_TP_CNTRPFN as CUSTOMER_NAME,
    M_SELL_CCY as CCY_SELL,
    M_BUY_CCY as CCY_BUY,
    CASE WHEN M_BUY_CCY = M_TP_NOMCUR THEN M_TP_NOMINAL
    ELSE ABS(M_TP_QTYEQS) END AS BUY_AMOUNT,
    CASE WHEN M_SELL_CCY = M_TP_NOMCUR THEN M_TP_NOMINAL
    ELSE ABS(M_TP_QTYEQS) END AS SOLD_AMOUNT,
    NVL(M_TP_PRICE,M_TP_PRICED) as CUSTOMER_RATE,
    NVL(M_TP_FXGFWD, M_COVER_RATE) as DEAL_COVERING,
    M_TP_SMRTE AS SALES_MARGIN,
    M_TP_SMAMT as SALES_PROFIT,
    TRIM(M_TP_PFOLIO) as PORTFOLIO,
    M_CMP_TYPO AS PRODUCT,
    (M_TP_SMAMT * M_SPTCV_SAR) AS SALES_PROFIT_SAR
    FROM SAL_RPT_MX_DATA_REP WHERE TRIM(M_TP_PFOLIO) ='SL_FX_SP_TSD' AND M_AMD_STS2<>'CA' AND M_STP_STATUS<>'Cancelled')

        TRIM(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTY)) as CCY_BUY,
        --NVL(((DECODE(TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0,0,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG1,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0))-TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)/DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ),0) as SALES_PROFIT  ---coverrate-cusrate/sold amut
        NVL(((TPALL.M_TP_PRICE-DECODE(TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0,0,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG1,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0)) * DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ)),0) as SALES_PROFIT
        from TP_ALL_REP TPALL, TP_RT_REP TPRT
        where TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
        and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TPRT.M_REF_DATA(+) and TPALL.M_NB=TPRT.M_NB(+)
        and (TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SAL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SALES_%')
        and TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO not like 'SCF BR%'
        and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YYYY')
    ) 
    where SALES_PROFIT!=0
    group by CCY_BUY
    
     -----Sales profit CCY_SELL Section Data Retrieval
    union all
    
    select
    'CCY_SELL' as BREAKDOWN,
    0 as TSD_ID,
    null as DEAL_DATE,
    ' ' as CUSTOMER,           
    ' ' as CUSTOMER_NAME,
    CCY_SELL as CCY_SELL,
    ' ' as CCY_BUY,
    0 as SOLD_AMOUNT,
    0 as SOLD_AMOUNT_TO_CUS,
    0 as CUSTOMER_RATE,
    0 as DEAL_COVERING, 
    NVL(SUM(SALES_PROFIT),0) as SALES_PROFIT,
    0 as FREQ_COUNT
    
    from
   (
        select --TPALL.M_NB,M_TP_UQTY,M_TP_BUY,M_TP_NOMCUR,M_TP_UQTY,M_TP_UQTY,
        TRIM(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTY)) as CCY_SELL,
        --NVL(((DECODE(TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0,0,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG1,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0))-TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)/DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ),0) as SALES_PROFIT  ---coverrate-cusrate/sold amut
        NVL(((TPALL.M_TP_PRICE-DECODE(TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0,0,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG1,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0)) * DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ)),0) as SALES_PROFIT
        from TP_ALL_REP TPALL, TP_RT_REP TPRT
        where TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
        and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TPRT.M_REF_DATA(+) and TPALL.M_NB=TPRT.M_NB(+)
        and (TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SAL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SALES_%')
        and TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO not like 'SCF BR%'
        and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YYYY')
    ) 
    where SALES_PROFIT!=0
    group by CCY_SELL*/

WITH TDD_CUST_SOLUTIONS as (
select
TPALL.M_NB,
M_REP_DATE2,
M_TP_DTETRN,
M_TP_NOMINAL,
M_CMP_TYPO,
M_TP_PFOLIO,
TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN,'MON') TRADE_MON,
TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN,'YY') TRADE_YEAR,
TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'MON') REP_MON,
TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YY') REP_YEAR,
TRD_UDF.M_CHANNEL,
case
when TRD_UDF.M_CHANNEL='Trade finance' Then 'Trade finance' 
when M_CMP_TYPO in ('FX Waad','Spot','FX Murabaha','FX Swap','Time Option','SAMA Purchase','Banknotes') or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'IB_FX%' or M_CMP_TYPO like '%PRS%' then 'TSD'
--else 'Fund Transfer'
else ' '
end as PRODUCT

from TP_ALL_REP  TPALL
left outer join TRD_UDF_REP TRD_UDF
on TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=TRD_UDF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TRD_UDF.M_REF_DATA and TRD_UDF.M_CHANNEL='Trade finance'

where TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YYYY')
and ( 
    --fx deals
    TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Banknotes','FX Waad','Spot','FX Murabaha','FX Swap','Time Option','SAMA Purchase')
    or M_CMP_TYPO like '%PRS%'
    --Sales portfolios
    or (TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SL_FX%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SAL_FX%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'IB_FX%')
    and TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO not like 'IB_FX_NOSTRO'
    and TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO not like 'SCF BR%' 
    --need fund tramsfer deals logic peding from bussiness
    )
)

M_CUMULATIVE_POSITION as CUMULATIVE_POSITION,
case 
when M_BUCKET like '%days%' then '< 15,000,000' 
when M_BUCKET IN ('2 Months','3 Months')   then '< 9,000,000'
when M_BUCKET IN ('4 Months','5 Months','6 Months')   then '< 5,500,000'
when M_BUCKET IN ('7 Months','8 Months','9 Months','10 Months','11 Months','12 Months') then'< 3,500,000'
else ''
end as CUMULATIVE_LIMIT_GREEN,
case 
when M_BUCKET like '%days%' then '15,000,000 - 16,500,000' 
when M_BUCKET IN ('2 Months','3 Months')   then '9,000,000 - 10,000,000'
when M_BUCKET IN ('4 Months','5 Months','6 Months')   then '5,500,000 - 6,000,000'
when M_BUCKET IN ('7 Months','8 Months','9 Months','10 Months','11 Months','12 Months') then '3,500,000 - 4,000,000'
else ''
end as CUMULATIVE_LIMIT_AMBER,
case 
when M_BUCKET like '%days%' then '> 16,500,000' 
when M_BUCKET IN ('2 Months','3 Months')   then '> 10,000,000'
when M_BUCKET IN ('4 Months','5 Months','6 Months')   then '>6,000,000'
when M_BUCKET IN ('7 Months','8 Months','9 Months','10 Months','11 Months','12 Months') then '>4,000,000'
else ''
end as CUMULATIVE_LIMIT_RED,
case

--Security Position Report
    WITH ERM_SEC_POS_REPORT as (
    select M_SE_ISIN, M_TP_DTEFST, NOMINAL, POSITION_INITIAL_VALUE, ATT1, ATT2, ATT4, M_TP_RTACR02, M_TP_DTETRN, M_TP_NOMINAL,
         case when NOMINAL>0 then 'L' else 'S' end as L_S,M_CIF
    from(
        select M_SE_ISIN, min(M_TP_DTEFST) as M_TP_DTEFST,sum(NOMINAL) NOMINAL,sum(POSITION_INITIAL_VALUE) POSITION_INITIAL_VALUE,
        ATT1,ATT2,ATT4,sum(M_TP_RTACR02) M_TP_RTACR02,MAX(M_TP_DTETRN) M_TP_DTETRN, sum(M_TP_NOMINAL) M_TP_NOMINAL,M_CIF
        from (
              
              select PARTIES.M_CIF,
              TPALL.M_NB,
              TRIM(DECODE(TRIM(SEC.M_SE_GROUP),'Bond',SEC.M_SE_ISIN,SEC.M_SE_D_LABEL)) as M_SE_ISIN,
              TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST,'DD/MM/YYYY') as M_TP_DTEFST,
              ABS(case  
                  when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='EQUIT' then TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2 ---*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE 
                  --when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='BOND' then TPALL.M_TP_IPAY-TPALL.M_TP_ACCAMT 
                  else TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL end) 
                  * DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_BS),'B',1,-1) as NOMINAL, -- for sell needs nominal to be negative amount
              DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_BS),'B','L','S') as L_S,
              NVL(LIQ.M_SEC_MKT_P,EQ_MKT_VAL.M_MP_SPOT2) as BID_PRICE,
              /*ABS(case  
                  when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='BOND' then (PL_DET.M_MP_SPOT2/100)*TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_SECLOTU
                  else PL_DET.M_MP_SPOT2*TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_SECLOTU
              end)*/
              ABS(case  
                  when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='BOND' then (LIQ.M_SEC_MKT_P/100)*TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_SECLOTU
                  else EQ_MKT_VAL.M_MP_SPOT2*TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_SECLOTU
              end)
              * DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_BS),'B',1,-1)  as POSITION_INITIAL_VALUE, -- for sell needs nominal to be negative amount
              case 
              when TRIM(SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP)='Mutual Fund - Equity' then 'MUTUAL_FUND'
              when SEC.M_SE_GROUP IN ('Bond')   then 'SUKUK' 
              when SEC.M_SE_GROUP IN ('Equity') then 'EQUITY' 
              else null end as ATT1,
              TRIM(SEC.M_SE_F_NAME) as ATT2,
              TRIM(SEC.M_SE_CUR) as ATT4,
              --TPALL.M_TP_RTACR02,
              0 as M_TP_RTACR02,
              TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN,'DD/MM/YYYY') as M_TP_DTETRN,
              TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL 
          
              from 
              ( 
                 select M_REF_DATA,M_TP_SECLBL,M_TP_PFOLIO,M_TP_BS,M_TRN_GRP,M_TP_LQTY2,M_TP_SECLOTU
                 ,M_TP_DTETRN,M_TP_NOMINAL,M_NB,M_TP_DTEFST,M_TP_RTACR02 from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP where M_INSTRUMENT IN
                  (
                       select M_INSTRUMENT from 
                      (   select  sum(TP_ALL.M_TP_LQTY2*DECODE(TP_ALL.M_TP_BS,'B',1,-1)) AGG_QTY,TP_ALL.M_INSTRUMENT from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP  TP_ALL
                          where TP_ALL.M_TP_INT='N' and TP_ALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
                          and TRIM(TP_ALL.M_TRN_GRP) IN ('BOND','EQUIT') and TP_ALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
                          group by TP_ALL.M_INSTRUMENT
                      ) where AGG_QTY>0
                  )  
                      and M_TP_INT='N' and M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
                      and TRIM(M_TRN_GRP) IN ('BOND','EQUIT') and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
              ) TPALL
              , SECURITIES_REP SEC,PARTIES_REP PARTIES,PLA_LIQBDAVP_REP LIQ
                 , (
                    select distinct M_REF_DATA,M_INSTRUMENT, M_MP_SPOT2
                    from pla_mv_rep where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
                   -- and M_INSTRUMENT like '%BUPA.SA%'
                    and M_NB in (
                        select MAX(M_NB) M_NB from pla_mv_rep where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N 
                        and TRIM(M_TRN_GRP) in ('EQUIT')  --and M_INSTRUMENT like '%BUPA.SA%'
                        group by M_INSTRUMENT
                    )
                    --and M_INSTRUMENT like '%ATEL LEASING INCOM%'  
                ) EQ_MKT_VAL
    where
              TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
              and TPALL.M_TP_SECLBL=SEC.M_SE_LABEL(+) and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=SEC.M_REF_DATA(+)
              and PARTIES.M_LABEL(+)=SEC.M_SE_ISS and PARTIES.M_REF_DATA(+)=SEC.M_REF_DATA
             and TRIM(SEC.M_SE_D_LABEL)=TRIM(LIQ.M_INSTRUMEN(+)) and SEC.M_REF_DATA=LIQ.M_REF_DATA(+)
             and TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO)=TRIM(LIQ.M_PORTFOLIO(+)) -- To fix the duplicates records
             and TRIM(SEC.M_SE_D_LABEL)=TRIM(EQ_MKT_VAL.M_INSTRUMENT(+)) and SEC.M_REF_DATA=EQ_MKT_VAL.M_REF_DATA(+)
             --- and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N' and M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
             --- and TPALL.M_TRN_GRP IN ('BOND','EQUIT')
              
        )
        group by M_SE_ISIN,ATT1,ATT2,ATT4,M_CIF
    )
    where NOMINAL>0 or (NOMINAL<0 and TRIM(M_CIF)='10347908') and trim(M_SE_ISIN) is not null
    )

select
ORDER1,BUCKET,DATE_FROM,DATE_TO,
NVL(TOTAL_ASSETS,0) as TOTAL_ASSETS ,
NVL(TOTAL_LIABILITY,0) as TOTAL_LIABILITY,
(NVL(TOTAL_LIABILITY,0) + NVL(TOTAL_ASSETS,0)) as NET_POSITION
--NVL(TOTAL_LIABILITY,0)-ABS(NVL(TOTAL_ASSETS,0)) as NET_POSITION
from 
(
    select BUCKET as ORDER1,
    case 
    when BUCKET<=9 then BUCKET || '  days' 
    else BUCKET || ' days' END as BUCKET,
    M_REP_DATE2+BUCKET as DATE_FROM,M_TP_DTEEXP as DATE_TO, sum(TOTAL_ASSETS) TOTAL_ASSETS, 
    sum(TOTAL_LIABILITY) TOTAL_LIABILITY
    from
    (
        select M_REP_DATE2,M_TP_DTEEXP,(M_TP_DTEEXP-M_REP_DATE2) as BUCKET,NVL(M_F_AMOUNT,0) as TOTAL_ASSETS, 0 as TOTAL_LIABILITY
        from
        (
            select M_NB,M_REF_DATA,sum(M_F_AMOUNT) M_F_AMOUNT ---,M_F_CURRENCY,M_F_CCFRMCD1,M_F_CCFRMCD2,M_F_CCFXG0,M_F_CCRATE,M_F_VALUE
            from CASH_FLOW_REP 
            where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N --and M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN' 
            and (select M_REP_DATE2 from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP where rownum=1)<=M_F_VALUE --M_F_CCFRMCD1

            and M_F_FLAGLIAB='N'
            group by M_NB,M_REF_DATA

-- Sukuk Limit Utilization Report
select 
DECODE(ENTITY,'KSA Sovereign',1,'KSA Financial Institution',2,'KSA Corporation',3,'GCC & International Sovereign',4,'GCC & International Financial Institutions',5,'GCC & International Corporations',6,'International Sukuk',7) as ORDER1,
ENTITY,MINIMUM_EXTERNAL_RATING,RATED_SUKUK_LIMIT,UNRATED_SUKUK_LIMIT,RATED_OS_AMT,UNRATED_OS_AMT,
case 
when RATED_OS_AMT=0 then ' '
when RATED_OS_AMT!=0 and RATED_OS_AMT<=RATED_SUKUK_LIMIT then 'Comply'
else 'Non Comply' END as RATED_LIMIT_COMPLIANCE,
case 
when UNRATED_OS_AMT=0 then ' '
when UNRATED_OS_AMT!=0 and UNRATED_OS_AMT<=RATED_SUKUK_LIMIT then 'Comply'
else 'Non Comply' END as UNRATED_LIMIT_COMPLIANCE
from
(
    select 
    ENTITY,MINIMUM_EXTERNAL_RATING,
    sum(RATED_SUKUK_LIMIT) RATED_SUKUK_LIMIT,
    sum(UNRATED_SUKUK_LIMIT) UNRATED_SUKUK_LIMIT,
    sum(RATED_OS_AMT) RATED_OS_AMT, 
    sum(UNRATED_OS_AMT) UNRATED_OS_AMT
    from
    (
            select 
            'KSA Sovereign' as ENTITY,' ' as MINIMUM_EXTERNAL_RATING, NVL(M_LIMIT,0) RATED_SUKUK_LIMIT, NVL(M_UNRATED,0) as UNRATED_SUKUK_LIMIT,0 as RATED_OS_AMT,0 as UNRATED_OS_AMT
            from BAB_LMT_TRY_LMT_REP where TRIM(M_SUB_CLASS)='KSA Sovereign'

             select

-- Sukuk Summary Report

select 'Detail' as BREAKDOWN,
DECODE(SUKUK,'KSA Sovereign',1,'KSA Financial Institution',2,'KSA Corporation',3,'GCC Sovereign',4,'GCC Financial Institution',5,'GCC Corporation',6,'International Sukuk',7) as ORDER1,
SUKUK,  TOTAL,  LIMIT1,
case 
WHEN REGEXP_SUBSTR(Utilization, '.') = '.' and Utilization<1 then '0'||ROUND(Utilization,10) || ' %'
WHEN REGEXP_SUBSTR(Utilization, '.') = '.' then ROUND(Utilization,10) || ' %'
WHEN Utilization>1 then  round(Utilization,10)||' %'
else '0'||round(Utilization,10) || ' %' end as UTILIZATION
from (
select ENTITY as SUKUK, RATED_OS_AMT as Total, RATED_SUKUK_LIMIT as Limit1,decode(RATED_SUKUK_LIMIT,0,0,(RATED_OS_AMT/RATED_SUKUK_LIMIT)) as Utilization
from
(
    select 
    ENTITY,MINIMUM_EXTERNAL_RATING,sum(RATED_SUKUK_LIMIT) RATED_SUKUK_LIMIT,sum(UNRATED_SUKUK_LIMIT) UNRATED_SUKUK_LIMIT,sum(RATED_OS_AMT)/1000000 RATED_OS_AMT
    from
    (
            select 
            'KSA Sovereign' as ENTITY,' ' as MINIMUM_EXTERNAL_RATING, NVL(M_LIMIT,0) RATED_SUKUK_LIMIT, NVL(M_UNRATED,0) as UNRATED_SUKUK_LIMIT,0 as RATED_OS_AMT,0 as UNRATED_OS_AMT

            from BAB_LMT_TRY_LMT_REP where TRIM(M_SUB_CLASS)='KSA FI'

             from BAB_LMT_TRY_LMT_REP where TRIM(M_SUB_CLASS)='GCC Sovereign'

            from BAB_LMT_TRY_LMT_REP where TRIM(M_SUB_CLASS)='GCC FI'

    case

--- VaR Sukuk Portfolio
select 
    TRN_ALL.M_NB,
    PARTIES.M_NAME as ISSUER,
    TRN_ALL.M_INSTRUMENT as SECURITY_NAME,
    TRN_ALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as CURRENCY,
    TRN_ALL.M_TP_NOMINAL_MIL_SAR*1000000 as INVESTMENT_SR,
    TRN_ALL.M_SEC_BT_COUPON as BENCHMARK, 
    TRN_ALL.M_LAST_COUPON_RATE|| '%' as LAST_COUPON_RATE,
    CF.M_F_CCRATE|| '%' as NEXT_COUPON_RATE,
    --- 0 || '%' as YTM, --logic pending
    TRN_ALL.M_TP_YIELD as YTM,
    TRN_ALL.M_TP_DTEPMT as VALUE_DATE,
    TRN_ALL.M_SEC_SE_MAT as SUKUK_MATURITY,
    ROUND((TRN_ALL.M_SEC_SE_MAT-TRN_ALL.M_TP_DTEPMT)/360,0) as Tenor_year,
    M_LAST_COUPON_DATE as LAST_COUPON_DATE,
    (((TRN_ALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*CF.M_F_CCRATE)/360)*180)/100 as PROJCTED_COUPON, -- can use CF.M_F_AMOUNT
    M_NEXT_COUPON_DATE as NEXT_COUPON_DATE,
    DECODE(TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_TP_ACCSCT),'AC','Amortized',TRN_ALL.M_TP_ACCSCT) as  Classification,
    0 as VAR1  -- pending logic from User/var module not implemented
from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP TRN_ALL
left join 
(  
    select CF.M_NB,M_F_VALUE,SUM(CF.M_F_AMOUNT) M_F_AMOUNT, CF.M_REF_DATA ,CF.M_TP_DTESYS, 
    CF.M_F_VALUE-CF.M_TP_DTESYS, CF.M_F_CCRATE,rank() OVER (PARTITION BY CF.M_NB ORDER BY CF.M_F_VALUE-CF.M_TP_DTESYS) RANK
    from cash_flow_rep CF ,BAB_TRN_ALL_REP TRN_ALL
    where CF.M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN' and CF.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
    and TRN_ALL.M_NB=CF.M_NB and TRN_ALL.M_REF_DATA=CF.M_REF_DATA AND TRN_ALL.M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD' 
    AND TRN_ALL.M_TP_INT='N' AND TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Sukuk','Sukuk Fund')--,'Sukuk Issuance') 
    group by CF.M_NB,CF.M_F_VALUE,CF.M_REF_DATA,CF.M_TP_DTESYS,CF.M_F_CCRATE
) CF 
ON TRN_ALL.M_NB=CF.M_NB  and TRN_ALL.M_NEXT_COUPON_DATE=CF.M_F_VALUE  and TRN_ALL.M_REF_DATA=CF.M_REF_DATA
    left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
on TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_TP_SECISS)=TRIM(PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL) and TRN_ALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
    where 1=1 -- TRN_ALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
    AND TRN_ALL.M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD' AND TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Sukuk','Sukuk Fund')--,'Sukuk Issuance') 
    AND TRN_ALL.M_TP_INT='N'

            AND TPALL.M_TP_INT='N' AND TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Sukuk','Sukuk Fund')--,'Sukuk Issuance') 
            group by CF.M_NB,CF.M_F_VALUE,CF.M_REF_DATA,CF.M_TP_DTESYS,CF.M_F_CCRATE
         ) CF 
            ON TPALL.M_NB=CF.M_NB  and TP_RT.M_TP_RTDCN02=CF.M_F_VALUE  and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=CF.M_REF_DATA
         left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
										on TPALL.M_TP_SECISS=PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
         left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2
             on SPOT2.M_DATE=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM='SAR' and SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN=TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR
        where TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
        AND TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD' AND TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Sukuk','Sukuk Fund')--,'Sukuk Issuance')

WITH LIQ_MOB_DI_FI_NONFI as (
    SELECT
    TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 as REPORT_DATE,
    TPALL.M_NB as TRANSACTION_REF,

    (CASE WHEN PARTIES.M_AGENT=1 THEN 'AGENT'
    ELSE (CASE WHEN PARTIES.M_BROKER='Y' THEN 'BROKER'
    ELSE (CASE WHEN PARTIES.M_CORPORATE='Y' THEN 'CORPORATE'
    ELSE (CASE WHEN PARTIES.M_CUSTODIAN='Y' THEN 'CUSTODIAN'
    ELSE (CASE WHEN PARTIES.M_GARANTOR='Y' THEN 'GUARANTOR'
    ELSE (CASE WHEN PARTIES.M_CUSTOMER='Y' THEN 'CUSTOMER'
    ELSE (CASE
    WHEN PARTIES.M_BANK='Y'         then 'BANK'
    WHEN PARTIES.M_BRANCH='Y'       then 'BRANCH'
    WHEN PARTIES.M_CLEARER='Y'      then 'CLEARER'
    WHEN PARTIES.M_CLIENT='Y'       then 'CLIENT'
    WHEN PARTIES.M_FICTIVE='Y'      then 'FICTIVE'
    WHEN PARTIES.M_GROUP='Y'        then 'GROUP'
    WHEN PARTIES.M_INT_PARTY='Y'    then 'INTERNAL PARTY'

    WHEN PARTIES.M_STATE='Y'        then 'STATE'
    WHEN PARTIES.M_SUBSIDIARY='Y'   then 'SUBSIDIARY'
    else ' ' end) end) end) end) end) end) end) ELSE TRIM(PARTIES.M_SEGMENT) END as SEGMENT,

    WHEN (NVL(TRIM(PARTIES.M_SEGMENT),' ') = 'Banks') THEN 'NON FI'
    ELSE 'FI' END as CAT,

select 'FI_NONFI' as BREAKDOWN, 0 as TRANSACTION_REF, ' ' as CIF, ' ' as SHORT_NAME_EN, AMOUNT, AMOUNT_IN_SAR, ' ' as CURRENCY, null as S_DATE, null as M_DATE,

ROUND((SHORT_NAME_EN / SUM(SHORT_NAME_EN) OVER (PARTITION BY REPORT_DATE))*100,4)  || '%' as NO_OF_CUST_PERCNT, 
ROUND(AMOUNT_IN_SAR / SUM(AMOUNT_IN_SAR) OVER (PARTITION BY REPORT_DATE)*100,4) || '%' as VOL_PER,
0 as DI_VOL_SUM,0 as DI_VOL_TARGET from LIQ_MOB_DI_FI_NONFI_2 
group by 'FI_NONFI', REPORT_DATE, 0, ' ', ' ', AMOUNT, AMOUNT_IN_SAR, ' ', null, null, CAT, SUB_CAT, SEGMENT, TRANSACTION_REF, SHORT_NAME_EN, 0, 0 

UNION ALL

select 'Details' as BREAKDOWN, TRANSACTION_REF, CIF, SHORT_NAME_EN, AMOUNT, AMOUNT_IN_SAR, CURRENCY, S_DATE, M_DATE, 
--CASE WHEN  SEGMENT IN ('AGENT','BROKER','CLS MEMBER','CORPORATE','CUSTODIAN','GUARANTOR','INVESTMENT MANAGER','CUSTOMER') THEN 'FI' ELSE 'NON FI' end as CAT

from LIQ_MOB_DI_FI_NONFI

UNION ALL
 
select 'VOL_VS_TARGET' as BREAKDOWN, 0 as TRANSACTION_REF, ' ' as CIF, ' ' as SHORT_NAME_EN, 0 as AMOUNT, 0 as AMOUNT_IN_SAR, ' ' as CURRENCY,
null as S_DATE, null as m_date, CAT, ' ' AS M_SUB_CAT, ' ' AS SEGMENT, 0 as M_NO_OF_TXN, 0 as NO_OF_CUST, ' ' as NO_OF_CUST_PERCNT, ' ' as VOL_PER, 
ROUND(sum(AMOUNT_IN_SAR)/1000000000,4) as DI_VOL_SUM, 
CASE WHEN TRIM(CAT) = 'FI' THEN (SELECT M_TARGETAMT/1000000000 from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where TRIM(M_TARGETMON) = 'FI')
WHEN TRIM(CAT) = 'NON FI' THEN (SELECT M_TARGETAMT/1000000000 from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where TRIM(M_TARGETMON) = 'NON FI')
ELSE 0 END as DI_VOL_TARGET from LIQ_MOB_DI_FI_NONFI_2 
--ROUND(90000000000/1000000000,4) as DI_VOL_TARGET from LIQ_MOB_DI_FI_NONFI_2 
group by 'VOL_VS_TARGET', CAT, 0, ' ', null, 90000000000/1000000000

with MM_GAP as 
(
    select 
    BUCKET as ORDER1,
    case when BUCKET<=7 then BUCKET || ' days' else BUCKET2 end as BUCKET,
    M_REP_DATE2+BUCKET as DATE_FROM,
    M_TP_DTEEXP as DATE_TO, 
    sum(MURABAHA_PLACEMENT_AMT) as MURABAHA_PLACEMENT_AMT,
    sum(DPM_MURABAHA_AMT) as DPM_MURABAHA_AMT,
    sum(WAKALA_PLACEMENT_AMT) as WAKALA_PLACEMENT_AMT,
    sum(RR_SAMA_AMT) as RR_SAMA_AMT,
    sum(RR_MURABAHA_AMT) as RR_MURABAHA_AMT,
    sum(RR_WAAD_AMT) as RR_WAAD_AMT,
    sum(LTM_AMT) as LTM_AMT,
    sum(SFRM_AMT) as SFRM_AMT,
    sum(SGDM_AMT) as SGDM_AMT,
    sum(SAMA_Bill_AMT) as SAMA_Bill_AMT,
    sum(WAKALA_PLACEMENT_CFC_AMT) as WAKALA_PLACEMENT_CFC_AMT,
    
    sum(MURABAHA_PLACEMENT_SMPD) as MURABAHA_PLACEMENT_SMPD,
    sum(DPM_MURABAHA_SMPD) as DPM_MURABAHA_SMPD,
    sum(WAKALA_PLACEMENT_SMPD) as WAKALA_PLACEMENT_SMPD,
    sum(RR_SAMA_SMPD) as RR_SAMA_SMPD,
    sum(RR_MURABAHA_SMPD) as RR_MURABAHA_SMPD,
    sum(RR_WAAD_SMPD) as RR_WAAD_SMPD,
    sum(LTM_SMPD) as LTM_SMPD,
    sum(SFRM_SMPD) as SFRM_SMPD,
    sum(SGDM_SMPD) as SGDM_SMPD,
    sum(SAMA_Bill_SMPD) as SAMA_Bill_SMPD,
    sum(WAKALA_PLACEMENT_CFC_SMPD) as WAKALA_PLACEMENT_CFC_SMPD,
    --DECODE(sum(TOTAL_ASSETS),0,0,sum(TOTAL_ASSETS_SMPD)/sum(TOTAL_ASSETS)) as TOTAL_ASSETS_SMPD,
    sum(TOTAL_ASSETS_SMPD) as TOTAL_ASSETS_SMPD,
    sum(TOTAL_ASSETS) TOTAL_ASSETS,
    
    -1*sum(MURABAHA_BORROWING_AMT) as MURABAHA_BORROWING_AMT,
    -1*sum(WAKALA_BORROWING_AMT) as WAKALA_BORROWING_AMT,
    -1*sum(REPO_SAMA_AMT) as REPO_SAMA_AMT,
    -1*sum(REPO_MURABAHA_AMT) as REPO_MURABAHA_AMT,
    -1*sum(REPO_WAAD_AMT) as REPO_WAAD_AMT, 
    -1*sum(WAKALA_BORROWING_CFC_AMT) as WAKALA_BORROWING_CFC_AMT, 
    
    -1*sum(MURABAHA_BORROWING_SMPD) as MURABAHA_BORROWING_SMPD,
    -1*sum(WAKALA_BORROWING_SMPD) as WAKALA_BORROWING_SMPD,
    -1*sum(REPO_SAMA_SMPD) as REPO_SAMA_SMPD,
    -1*sum(REPO_MURABAHA_SMPD) as REPO_MURABAHA_SMPD,
    -1*sum(REPO_WAAD_SMPD) as REPO_WAAD_SMPD, 
    -1*sum(WAKALA_BORROWING_CFC_SMPD) as WAKALA_BORROWING_CFC_SMPD, 
    -1*SUM(CD_ISSUANCE_SMPD) AS CD_ISSUANCE_SMPD,
    --DECODE(sum(TOTAL_LIABILITY),0,0,sum(TOTAL_LIABILITY_SMPD)/sum(TOTAL_LIABILITY)) as TOTAL_LIABILITY_SMPD,
    -1*sum(TOTAL_LIABILITY_SMPD) as TOTAL_LIABILITY_SMPD,
    -1*sum(TOTAL_LIABILITY) TOTAL_LIABILITY,
    --DECODE(sum(TOTAL_ASSETS),0,0,NVL((sum(TOTAL_ASSETS_SMPD)/sum(TOTAL_ASSETS)),0)) - DECODE(sum(TOTAL_LIABILITY),0,0,ABS(NVL((sum(TOTAL_LIABILITY_SMPD)/sum(TOTAL_LIABILITY)),0))) as NET_POSITION_SMPD,
    NVL(sum(TOTAL_ASSETS_SMPD),0)-ABS(NVL(sum(TOTAL_LIABILITY_SMPD),0)) as NET_POSITION_SMPD,
    NVL(sum(TOTAL_ASSETS),0)-ABS(NVL(sum(TOTAL_LIABILITY),0)) as NET_POSITION
    from
    (

TRIM(M_DESC): E_FXU_FT_NOSTRO_DEALS
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
SELECT DISTINCT FIN_TAB_1.*, FIN_TAB_2.M_NAME AS PAY_COUNTERPARTY, FIN_TAB_3.M_NAME AS RECEIVE_COUNTERPARTY, FIN_TAB_2.M_CTRY_DESC AS PAY_CPT_COUNTRY, FIN_TAB_3.M_CTRY_DESC AS RECEIVE_CPT_COUNTRY  FROM
--(SELECT TAB_1.M_NB AS TRADE_NO, TAB_1.M_CONTRACT AS CONTRACT_NO, TAB_1.M_TP_DTETRN AS DEAL_DATE, TAB_1.M_TP_DTEFST AS VALUE_DATE, TAB_1.VALUE_DT_MON AS VALUE_DT_MON, TAB_1.MVALUE_DT_MON AS UE_DT_MON, TAB_1.M _TP_DTEEXP AS EXPIRY_DATE, TAB_1.M_TP_NOMCUR AS NOMINAL_CURRENCY,
(SELECT TAB_1.M_NB AS TRADE_NO, TAB_1.M_CONTRACT AS CONTRACT_NO, TAB_1.M_TP_DTETRN AS DEAL_DATE, TAB_1.M_TP_DTEFST AS VALUE_DATE, TAB_1.VALUE_DT_MON AS VALUE_DT_MON, TAB_1.VALUE_DT_YR AS VALUE_DT_YR, TAB_1.M_TP_DTEEXP AS EXPIRY_DATE, TAB_1.M_TP_NOMCUR AS NOMINAL_CURRENCY,
TAB_1.M_TP_NOMINAL AS NOMINAL, TAB_1.M_TP_NOMINAL_MIL AS NOMINAL_IN_MIL, TAB_1.M_TP_NOMINAL_MIL_SAR AS NOMINAL_MIL_IN_SAR, TAB_1.M_TRADER_USER, TAB_1.M_REVALUATION_AMOUNT, TAB_1.DEBIT_ACC, TAB_2.CREDIT_ACC FROM

(SELECT A.M_ACCOUNT_N AS DEBIT_ACC, NULL AS CREDIT_ACC, B.* from 
(SELECT DISTINCT M_ACCOUNT_N, M_PROD_ID, M_PRODUCERO, M_VALUE_DAT, M_AMOUNT  from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP WHERE TRIM(M_PRODUCER1) = 'FT Nostro Nostro') A, 
(SELECT M_NB, M_CONTRACT, M_TP_DTETRN, M_TP_DTEFST, 
--TO_CHAR(SUBSTR(M_TP_DTEFST, 4,6)) AS VALUE_DT_MON, 
--CAST(ltrim(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(M_TP_DTEFST,'DD-MON-YY'),'MON-YYYY'),'0') AS VARCHAR(10)) AS VALUE_DT_MON,
--TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTEFST, 'MON-YY') AS VALUE_DT_MON,
TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTEFST, 'MM') || TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTEFST, 'MON-YY') AS VALUE_DT_MON,
TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTEFST, 'YYYY') AS VALUE_DT_YR,
M_TP_DTEEXP, M_TP_NOMCUR, M_TP_NOMINAL, M_TP_NOMINAL_MIL, M_TP_NOMINAL_MIL_SAR, M_TRADER_USER, M_REVALUATION_AMOUNT from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP where
M_REVALUATION_AMOUNT < 0 and M_CMP_TYPO = 'FT Nostro Nostro' order by M_NB) B
where DECODE(A.M_PROD_ID,0,A.M_PRODUCERO,A.M_PROD_ID) = B.M_CONTRACT AND A.M_VALUE_DAT = B.M_TP_DTEFST AND A.M_AMOUNT = -1*B.M_TP_NOMINAL
) TAB_1, 

(SELECT NULL AS DEBIT_ACC, A.M_ACCOUNT_N AS CREDIT_ACC, B.* from 
--BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP A, 
(SELECT DISTINCT M_ACCOUNT_N, M_PROD_ID, M_PRODUCERO, M_VALUE_DAT, M_AMOUNT from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP WHERE TRIM(M_PRODUCER1) = 'FT Nostro Nostro') A, 
(SELECT M_NB, M_CONTRACT, M_TP_DTETRN, M_TP_DTEFST, 
--TO_CHAR(SUBSTR(M_TP_DTEFST, 4,6)) AS VALUE_DT_MON, 
--CAST(ltrim(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(M_TP_DTEFST,'DD-MON-YY'),'MON-YYYY'),'0') AS VARCHAR(10)) AS VALUE_DT_MON,
--TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTEFST, 'MON-YY') AS VALUE_DT_MON,
TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTEFST, 'MM') || TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTEFST, 'MON-YY') AS VALUE_DT_MON,
TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTEFST, 'YYYY') AS VALUE_DT_YR,
M_TP_DTEEXP, M_TP_NOMCUR, M_TP_NOMINAL, M_TP_NOMINAL_MIL, M_TP_NOMINAL_MIL_SAR, M_TRADER_USER, M_REVALUATION_AMOUNT from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP where
M_REVALUATION_AMOUNT > 0 and M_CMP_TYPO = 'FT Nostro Nostro' order by M_NB) B
where DECODE(A.M_PROD_ID,0,A.M_PRODUCERO,A.M_PROD_ID) = B.M_CONTRACT AND A.M_VALUE_DAT = B.M_TP_DTEFST AND A.M_AMOUNT = B.M_TP_NOMINAL) TAB_2
WHERE TAB_1.M_CONTRACT = TAB_2.M_CONTRACT) FIN_TAB_1,
(select distinct TRIM(M_DSP_LABEL) AS M_DSP_LABEL, M_NAME, M_CTRY_DESC from PARTIES_REP where M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N) FIN_TAB_2,
(select distinct TRIM(M_DSP_LABEL) AS M_DSP_LABEL, M_NAME, M_CTRY_DESC from PARTIES_REP where M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N) FIN_TAB_3
WHERE 
SUBSTR(FIN_TAB_1.DEBIT_ACC,4,8) = FIN_TAB_2.M_DSP_LABEL
AND SUBSTR(FIN_TAB_1.CREDIT_ACC,4,8) = FIN_TAB_3.M_DSP_LABEL

TRIM(M_DESC): sql to generate the IFRS MM Report
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
WITH IFRS_MM_MONEY_MARKET as 
(
    select 
        DECODE(TRIM(PARTIES.M_CIF),'','0000000000',PARTIES.M_CIF) as CUSTOMER_ID,
        ---NVL(MON_CF.MON_AMT,0) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT, --ledger Balance
        ---DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,'SAR',NVL(MON_CF.MON_AMT,0),'KES',NVL(MON_CF.MON_AMT,0)*0.03130,NVL(MON_CF.MON_AMT,0)*NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT22.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT22.M_MID)))) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT_LCY, --ledger Balance in SAR
        NVL(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,0) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT,
        DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,'SAR',NVL(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,0),'KES',NVL(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,0)*0.03130,NVL(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,0)*NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT22.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT22.M_MID)))) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT_LCY,        
        TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as CURRENCY,
        DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO),'SAMA Bill',1120,'Murabaha Placement',1135,'Wakala Placement',1145,'DPM Murabaha',1140,'LTM',1305,'RR SAMA',1105,'SFRM',1325,'SGDM',1320) as CATEGORY,
        ABS(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE))  as INTEREST_RATE,
        TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN,'YYYYMMDD') as VALUE_DATE,
        TO_CHAR(TP_RT.M_TP_RTMAT0,'YYYYMMDD')  as MATURITY_DATE,
        'MM-'||TPALL.M_NB AS CONTRACT_ID,
        NVL(TPALL.M_TP_RTACR02,0) as ACCRUED_INTEREST,
        DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO),'SAMA Bill',1120,'Murabaha Placement',1135,'Wakala Placement',1145,'DPM Murabaha',1140,'LTM',1305,'RR SAMA',1105,'SFRM',1325,'SGDM',1320) AS PRODUCT,
        TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO AS PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION,
        DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,'SAR',1,'KES',0.03130,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT22.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT22.M_MID)))) AS EXCHANGE_RATE,
        'AMC' AS IFRS9_CLASSIFICATION,
        NULL as CCF
    from 
    TP_ALL_REP TPALL
    left outer join TP_RT_REP TP_RT
    		ON TPALL.M_NB=TP_RT.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TP_RT.M_REF_DATA
   /* left outer join (    
        select sum(M_EN_AMT) MON_AMT,M_NB_TRN from ACC_ENTRIES_REP 
        where M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalData_ACC_DAILY:N
        group by M_NB_TRN
    ) MON_CF
        ON TPALL.M_NB=MON_CF.M_NB_TRN ---and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=MON_CF.M_REF_DATA
        */
    left outer join TRD_UDF_REP TRD_UDF
        ON TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=TRD_UDF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TRD_UDF.M_REF_DATA
    left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
        on TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP=PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2    
        on SPOT2.M_DATE=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM)='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN)=DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'CNH','CNY',TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR))
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT22    
        on SPOT22.M_DATE=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_DEN)='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_NUM)=DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'CNH','CNY',TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR))

    where 
    TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
    and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N' and TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN<=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and TP_RT.M_TP_RTMAT0>=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2
    AND TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ( 'SAMA Bill','Murabaha Placement','Wakala Placement','DPM Murabaha','LTM','RR SAMA','SFRM','SGDM')
)
select 
			cast(TRIM(CUSTOMER_ID) as VARCHAR2(50)) as CUSTOMER_ID,
    cast(OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT as NUMBER(24,2)) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT,
    cast(OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT_LCY as NUMBER(24,2)) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT_LCY,
    cast(TRIM(CURRENCY) as VARCHAR2(3)) as CURRENCY,
    cast(TRIM(CATEGORY) as VARCHAR2(10)) as CATEGORY,
    cast(INTEREST_RATE as NUMBER(24,6)) as INTEREST_RATE,
    cast(TRIM(VALUE_DATE) as VARCHAR2(10)) as VALUE_DATE,
    cast(TRIM(MATURITY_DATE) as VARCHAR2(10)) as MATURITY_DATE,
    cast(TRIM(CONTRACT_ID) as VARCHAR2(30)) as CONTRACT_ID,
    cast(ACCRUED_INTEREST as NUMBER(24,6)) as ACCRUED_INTEREST,
    cast(TRIM(PRODUCT) as VARCHAR2(10)) as PRODUCT,
    cast(TRIM(PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION) as VARCHAR2(50)) as PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION,
    cast(EXCHANGE_RATE as NUMBER(24,6)) as EXCHANGE_RATE,
    cast(TRIM(IFRS9_CLASSIFICATION) as VARCHAR2(10)) as IFRS9_CLASSIFICATION
   -- cast(CCF as VARCHAR2(10)) as CCF
from IFRS_MM_MONEY_MARKET

with INV_DIRECT_EQUITY as (
select * from 
BAB_TRN_ALL_REP where M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
and TRIM(M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP) IS NOT NULL and M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP IN ('Listed Equity')
)

select 
    'Blotter' As BREAKDOWN,
    0000 as TADAWUL_CODE, --- Pending input from AK
    M_NB as DEAL_REFERENCE,
    M_SEC_F_NAME as COMPANY_NAME,
    M_TP_DTETRN as DEAL_DATE,
    M_TP_DTEPMT as VALUE_DATE,
    DECODE(M_TP_BUY,'B','BUY','SELL') as TRANSACTION_TYPE,
    M_TP_PRICE as PRICE,
    M_TP_LQTY2 as QUANTITY,
    M_BROKER_FEE as COMMISSION, --- As per business input logic updated as broker fee
    DECODE(M_TP_BUY,'B', 
    	M_CURRENCY_POS+M_BROKER_FEE, -- Buy deal total+commision
    	M_CURRENCY_POS-M_BROKER_FEE  -- sell deal total-commission
    ) as NET_TOTAL,      
    ' ' as SECURITY1,
    ' ' as SEC_NAME,
    M_CURRENCY_POS_MIL_SAR as POSITION1,
    0 as MARKET,
    0 as COST1,
    0 as TOTAL_COST,
    0 as MARKET_VALUE,
    0 ||'%' as PERCENTAGE_UNREALIZED,
    0 as UNREALIZED_PROFIT,
    '' as DDate,
    0 as Target1,
    0 as MON_MARKET_VAL,
    0 as ORDER1
   
from INV_DIRECT_EQUITY

union all

select
    'Position' As BREAKDOWN,
    0000 as TADAWUL_CODE, 
    0 DEAL_REFERENCE,
    ' ' as COMPANY_NAME,
    null as DEAL_DATE,
    null as VALUE_DATE,
    ' ' as TRANSACTION_TYPE,
    0 as PRICE,
    0 as QUANTITY,
    0 as COMMISSION,
    0 as NET_TOTAL,
    SECURITY1,
    SEC_NAME,
    AGG_POSITION,
    AVG_MARKET as  AGG_MARKET,
    AVG_COST as AGG_COST,
    TOTAL_COST,
    MARKET_VALUE,
    case when MARKET_VALUE=0 then 0 else 
    ROUND((MARKET_VALUE-TOTAL_COST)/MARKET_VALUE,2) end ||'%' as PERCENTAGE_UNREALIZED,
    MARKET_VALUE-TOTAL_COST as UNREALIZED_PROFIT,  ---MARKET_VALUE-TOTAL_COST
    '' as DDate,
    0 as Target1,
    0 as MON_MARKET_VAL,
    0 as ORDER1
    from 
    (
        select SECURITY1,SEC_NAME,AGG_POSITION,AVG_MARKET,AVG_COST,
        AGG_POSITION*AVG_COST as TOTAL_COST,
        AGG_POSITION*AVG_MARKET as MARKET_VALUE
        from (
            select
            SECURITY1,
            SEC_NAME,
            ABS(SUM(POSITION1)) as AGG_POSITION,
            AVG(MARKET) as AVG_MARKET,
            case when SUM(BUY_POSITION)=0 then 0 else
            SUM(BUY_COST)/SUM(BUY_POSITION) end as AVG_COST
            from
            (
                select
                M_INSTRLABEL as SECURITY1,
                M_INSTRUMENT as SEC_NAME,
                M_TP_BUY,           
                --M_TP_LQTY2 
                --M_CURRENCY_POS as POSITION1,
                M_TP_LQTY2 * DECODE(M_TP_BUY,'B',1,-1) as POSITION1, --- PIR#19 update as per user confirmation
                M_MARKET_PRICE as MARKET,
                DECODE(M_TP_BUY,'B',M_TP_LQTY2*M_TP_PRICE,0) as COST1, --- PIR#19 update as per user confirmation
                M_TP_LQTY2 * DECODE(M_TP_BUY,'B',NVL(M_TP_PRICE,0),0) as BUY_COST,--- PIR#19 update as per user confirmation
                 M_TP_LQTY2 * DECODE(M_TP_BUY,'B',1,0) as BUY_POSITION
                from INV_DIRECT_EQUITY
            )
            group by SECURITY1,SEC_NAME
        ) POS_SUB
    ) POS_MAIN

                                -----    else TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL end
                                -----)

WITH INV_LTM AS (
    select 
    M_NB AS TRANSACTION_REF,
    M_CPTY_NAME as COUNTERPARTY_NAME,
    M_TP_NOMINAL as PRINCIPAL,
    M_TP_NOMINAL_MIL as PRINCIPAL_MIL,
    M_TP_NOMCUR as CURRENCY,
    M_TP_DTETRN as START_DATE,
    M_TP_DTEEXP  as MATURITY_DATE,
    M_NO_OF_DAYS as NO_OF_DAYS
    --0 as ORDER1,
    --'' as DDate
    -----------
    ,M_TRN_MON as TRN_MON
    ,M_TRN_YEAR as TRN_YEAR
    ,M_REP_MON as REP_MON
    ,M_REP_YEAR as REP_YEAR
    ,M_TP_RTFV0,M_TP_PRICE
    ----------- 
    ---- Logic as per the user given calculation logic
    ,case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('31-JAN'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') and M_TP_DTETRN<=TO_DATE('31-JAN'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then (M_TP_PRICE/100) * M_TP_NOMINAL * 31 * (1/1000000) * (1/360) else 0 end as JAN_REV
    ,case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('28-FEB'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') and M_TP_DTETRN<=TO_DATE('28-FEB'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then (M_TP_PRICE/100) * M_TP_NOMINAL * 28 * (1/1000000) * (1/360) else 0 end as FEB_REV
    ,case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('31-MAR'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') and M_TP_DTETRN<=TO_DATE('31-MAR'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then (M_TP_PRICE/100) * M_TP_NOMINAL * 31 * (1/1000000) * (1/360) else 0 end as MAR_REV
    ,case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('30-APR'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') and M_TP_DTETRN<=TO_DATE('30-APR'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then (M_TP_PRICE/100) * M_TP_NOMINAL * 30 * (1/1000000) * (1/360) else 0 end as APR_REV
    ,case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('31-MAY'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') and M_TP_DTETRN<=TO_DATE('31-MAY'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then (M_TP_PRICE/100) * M_TP_NOMINAL * 31 * (1/1000000) * (1/360) else 0 end as MAY_REV
    ,case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('30-JUN'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') and M_TP_DTETRN<=TO_DATE('30-JUN'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then (M_TP_PRICE/100) * M_TP_NOMINAL * 30 * (1/1000000) * (1/360) else 0 end as JUN_REV
    ,case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('31-JUL'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') and M_TP_DTETRN<=TO_DATE('31-JUL'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then (M_TP_PRICE/100) * M_TP_NOMINAL * 31 * (1/1000000) * (1/360) else 0 end as JUL_REV
    ,case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('31-AUG'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') and M_TP_DTETRN<=TO_DATE('31-AUG'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then (M_TP_PRICE/100) * M_TP_NOMINAL * 31 * (1/1000000) * (1/360) else 0 end as AUG_REV
    ,case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('30-SEP'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') and M_TP_DTETRN<=TO_DATE('30-SEP'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then (M_TP_PRICE/100) * M_TP_NOMINAL * 30 * (1/1000000) * (1/360) else 0 end as SEP_REV
    ,case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('31-OCT'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') and M_TP_DTETRN<=TO_DATE('31-OCT'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then (M_TP_PRICE/100) * M_TP_NOMINAL * 31 * (1/1000000) * (1/360) else 0 end as OCT_REV
    ,case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('30-NOV'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') and M_TP_DTETRN<=TO_DATE('30-NOV'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then (M_TP_PRICE/100) * M_TP_NOMINAL * 30 * (1/1000000) * (1/360) else 0 end as NOV_REV
    ,case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('31-DEC'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') and M_TP_DTETRN<=TO_DATE('31-DEC'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then (M_TP_PRICE/100) * M_TP_NOMINAL * 31 * (1/1000000) * (1/360) else 0 end as DEC_REV
    
    from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP 
    where 1=1 and  M_CMP_TYPO in ('LTM','LTM Callable','LTM CapFloor','LTM CapFloorCollar','LTM Collar','LTM Range Callable') --- ,'LTM Range' --- removed LTM Range as oper user request as it was creating duplicate entries
    and M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
)

BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
with INV_DIVIDENT as (    
    select 
    BREAKDOWN,
    DDATE M_DDATE, 
    DIV_INCM_CLOSING as M_DIV_INCM_CLOSING,
    ------sum(DIV_INCM_CLOSING) as M_DIV_INCM_CLOSING, 
    --sum(DIV_INCM_TARGET) as M_DIV_INCM_TARGET,
    ------sum(MF_INCM_CLOSING) as M_MF_INCM_CLOSING,
    MF_INCM_CLOSING as M_MF_INCM_CLOSING, 
    --sum(MF_INCM_TARGET) as M_MF_INCM_TARGET,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY DDATE asc)as M_MY_RANK,
    0 as M_NET_DAILY,M_REP_YR,M_SEC_F_NAME
    from
    (
    select 
    'EQD' as BREAKDOWN,
    M_TP_DTETRN as DDATE,

TRIM(M_DESC): Second intermediate to update closing balances data
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select 
CAST (M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER  AS CHAR(30))            ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
CAST (M_SWIFT_ADDRESS   AS CHAR(30))            SWIFT_ADDRESS,
CAST (M_CURRENCY        AS CHAR(3))             CURRENCY,
CAST (M_CLOSING_BALANCE AS DECIMAL(26,3))       CLOSING_BALANCE, 
CAST (M_OPENING_BALANCE AS DECIMAL(26,3))       OPENING_BALANCE,
CAST (M_SND_REFERENCE   AS VARCHAR2(24))        SND_REFERENCE,
CAST (M_FST_REFERENCE   AS VARCHAR2(24))        FST_REFERENCE, 
CAST (M_AMOUNT          AS DECIMAL(26,3))       AMOUNT,
CAST (M_TRADE_DATE      AS DATE)                TRADE_DATE,
CAST (M_BLANK           AS CHAR(5))             BLANK,
CAST (M_VALUE_DATE      AS DATE)                VALUE_DATE,
CAST (M_TYPE            AS VARCHAR2(10))        TYPE,
CAST (M_D_C             AS CHAR(1))             D_C,
CAST (M_DEPARTMENT_CODE AS CHAR(3))             DEPARTMENT_CODE,
CAST (M_TRADE_DATETIME  AS VARCHAR2(30))        TRADE_DATETIME,
CAST (M_CONTRACT        AS DECIMAL(24,0))       CONTRACT,
CAST (M_MY_RANK         AS DECIMAL(24,0))       MY_RANK
from (
 select T1.M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, T1.M_SWIFT_ADDRESS, T1.M_CURRENCY,  T1.M_CLOSING_BALANCE,
    case when T1.M_MY_RANK=1 then T1.M_OPENING_BALANCE
    else (
       T1.M_OPENING_BALANCE+
       (SELECT NVL(SUM(M_CLOSING_BALANCE),0) FROM MX_NOSTRO_RECON_T1_REP T2 WHERE T2.M_MY_RANK<T1.M_MY_RANK AND T2.M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER=T1.M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
    )  end as M_OPENING_BALANCE, 
    T1.M_SND_REFERENCE, T1.M_FST_REFERENCE, T1.M_AMOUNT, T1.M_TRADE_DATE, 
    T1.M_BLANK, T1.M_VALUE_DATE, T1.M_TYPE, T1.M_D_C, T1.M_DEPARTMENT_CODE, T1.M_TRADE_DATETIME, T1.M_CONTRACT,T1.M_MY_RANK
    from MX_SAMA_NOSTRO_RECON_T1_REP T1 --where M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER='008108118830444'
    ORDER BY T1.M_MY_RANK,T1.M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,T1.M_CONTRACT
)
ORDER BY M_MY_RANK,M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CONTRACT

BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select 
LRB_CPTYTYPO.M_KEY        							as Counterparties,
LRB_CPTYTYPO.M_SECONDKEY  							as limitproducts,
LRB_CPTYTYPO.M_GROUP      							as Group1,
LRB_CPTYTYPO.M_TIMEBUCKET 							as Timebuckets,
LRB_CPTYTYPO.M_PILLAR     							as Pillar,
LRB_CPTYTYPO.M_MAX0       							as Limit_Amount, 
LRB_CPTYTYPO.M_MAXCURR0   							as Limit_Currency,
LRB_CPTYTYPO.M_MAXEXPOSUR          as LIMIT_EXPOSURE,
LRB_CPTYTYPO.M_AVAILABLE0          as LIMIT_available,
ROUND(LRB_CPTYTYPO.M_PUTILIZATI,0) AS used_percnt,
ROUND(LRB_CPTYTYPO.M_PAVAILABLE,0) AS avAIL_percnt,
TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME) as M_NAME,
DECODE(PARTIES.M_AGENT,0,'Agent,','')||DECODE(PARTIES.M_BANK,'Y','Bank,','')||
DECODE(PARTIES.M_BRANCH,'Y','Branch,','')||DECODE(PARTIES.M_BROKER,'Y','Broker,','')||
DECODE(PARTIES.M_CLEARER,'Y','Clearer,','')||DECODE(PARTIES.M_CLIENT,'Y','Client,','')||
DECODE(PARTIES.M_CORPORATE,'Y','Corporate,','')||DECODE(PARTIES.M_CUSTODIAN,'Y','Custodian,','')||
DECODE(PARTIES.M_CUSTOMER,'Y','Customer,','')||DECODE(PARTIES.M_FICTIVE,'Y','Fictive,','')||
DECODE(PARTIES.M_GARANTOR,'Y','Garantor,','')||DECODE(PARTIES.M_GROUP,'Y','Group,','')||
DECODE(PARTIES.M_INT_PARTY,'Y','Int Party,','')||DECODE(PARTIES.M_ISSUER,'Y','Issuer,','')||
DECODE(PARTIES.M_STATE,'Y','State,','')||DECODE(PARTIES.M_SUBSIDIARY,'Y','Subsidiary,','') as M_CATEGORY
from 
BAB_LRB_CPTYTYPO_REP LRB_CPTYTYPO
left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
    on TRIM(PARTIES.M_CIF)=TRIM(LRB_CPTYTYPO.M_KEY) and PARTIES.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N

WITH INV_MF as (
        select
        M_TRN_FMLY,M_TRN_GRP,M_TP_NOMCUR,M_TP_DTEEXP,
        M_NB,
        M_SE_F_NAME as INV_COMPANY,
        M_TP_LQTY2 as  NO_OF_UNITS,
        M_TP_PRICE as COST1,-- need logic       
        M_CURRENCY_POS_SAR as INVESTMENT_SR,
        M_CURRENCY_POS_MIL_SAR as INVESTMENT_SR_MIL,
        M_MARKET_PRICE as MARKET_PRICE,
        M_MTM as MARKET_VALUE,
        case 
            when TRIM(M_UDF_INVTYP) IN ('Money Market Funds','Mutual Fund - Equity')        then 'Mutual Fund' 
            when TRIM(M_UDF_INVTYP) IN ('Managed Fund - Equity','Managed Fund - Others')    then 'Managed Fund'
            when TRIM(M_UDF_INVTYP) IN ('REIT','Real Estate Funds')                         then 'Real_Estate'
            else '' end 
        As BREAKDOWN,
        TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN,'YY') as TRADE_YR,
        TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN,'MON')  as TRADE_MON,
        TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YY') as REP_YR,
        TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYY') as REP_YEAR,
        TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'MON')  as REP_MON

    where TRIM(M_UDF_INVTYP) IS NOT NULL and TRIM(M_UDF_INVTYP) IN ('Money Market Funds','Mutual Fund - Equity','Managed Fund - Equity','Managed Fund - Others','REIT','Real Estate Funds')

TRIM(M_DESC): SQL to generate investment Sukuk OS report dashboard
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
with INV_SUK_OS as (
    select M_NB,M_REP_YR,M_REP_DATE2,M_TP_DTETRN,M_TP_DTEEXP,M_CURRENCY_POS_MIL_SAR,M_TP_DTEPMT
    from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP 
    where M_CMP_TYPO in ('Sukuk') and M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD' and M_TP_INT='N'
)

select M_ORDER1 as ORDER1 ,'Daily' as BreakDown,M_DDATE as DDATE,M_TARGET1 as Target1,
M_CLOSING as Closing, M_VARIANCE1 as Variance1, M_ACHIEVEMENTS as Achievements
from INV_SUKUK_OS_2_REP

union all 

select
1 as ORDER1,
'Monthly' as BreakDown,
TO_DATE('31-JAN-'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MM-YY')   as DDate,
NVL((select M_TARGETAMT from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON='JAN'),0) as Target1,
NVL((
    select sum(M_CURRENCY_POS_MIL_SAR) 
    from INV_SUK_OS
    where M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('31-JAN-'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MM-YY') and  M_TP_DTEPMT<=TO_DATE('31-JAN-'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MM-YY') --and M_TP_DTETRN>=TO_DATE('01-JAN-'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MM-YY')
),0)
as Closing,
0 as Variance1,
0||' %' as  Achievements
from INV_SUK_OS
where 1=1 and rownum=1

union all

select
2 as ORDER1,
'Monthly' as BreakDown,
case when
    MOD('20'||M_REP_YR,4)=0 AND
    (
        MOD('20'||M_REP_YR,100)!=0 OR
        MOD('20'||M_REP_YR,400)=0
    ) THEN
    TO_DATE('29-FEB-'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MM-YY')  else TO_DATE('28-FEB-'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MM-YY')

    (
        MOD('20'||M_REP_YR,100)!=0 OR

0 as Variance1,

TRIM(M_DESC): SQL to generate investment Sukuk Revenue report dashboard
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
WITH INV_SUK_REV AS (
    select 
    M_NB,M_TP_DTETRN,M_TP_DTEEXP,--TO_DATE('31-DEC'||M_REP_YR_NUM,'DD-MON-YY')

    case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('31-JAN'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then M_CURRENCY_POS_MIL_SAR * (TO_DATE('31-JAN'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY')-M_TP_DTETRN) * (1/360) else 0 end as JAN_REV,
    case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('28-FEB'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then M_CURRENCY_POS_MIL_SAR * (TO_DATE('28-FEB'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY')-M_TP_DTETRN) * (1/360) else 0 end as FEB_REV,
    case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('31-MAR'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then M_CURRENCY_POS_MIL_SAR * (TO_DATE('31-MAR'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY')-M_TP_DTETRN) * (1/360) else 0 end as MAR_REV,
    case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('30-APR'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then M_CURRENCY_POS_MIL_SAR * (TO_DATE('30-APR'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY')-M_TP_DTETRN) * (1/360) else 0 end as APR_REV,
    case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('31-MAY'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then M_CURRENCY_POS_MIL_SAR * (TO_DATE('31-MAY'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY')-M_TP_DTETRN) * (1/360) else 0 end as MAY_REV,
    case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('30-JUN'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then M_CURRENCY_POS_MIL_SAR * (TO_DATE('30-JUN'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY')-M_TP_DTETRN) * (1/360) else 0 end as JUN_REV,
    case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('31-JUL'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then M_CURRENCY_POS_MIL_SAR * (TO_DATE('31-JUL'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY')-M_TP_DTETRN) * (1/360) else 0 end as JUL_REV,
    case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('31-AUG'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then M_CURRENCY_POS_MIL_SAR * (TO_DATE('31-AUG'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY')-M_TP_DTETRN) * (1/360) else 0 end as AUG_REV,
    case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('30-SEP'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then M_CURRENCY_POS_MIL_SAR * (TO_DATE('30-SEP'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY')-M_TP_DTETRN) * (1/360) else 0 end as SEP_REV,
    case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('31-OCT'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then M_CURRENCY_POS_MIL_SAR * (TO_DATE('31-OCT'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY')-M_TP_DTETRN) * (1/360) else 0 end as OCT_REV,
    case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('30-NOV'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then M_CURRENCY_POS_MIL_SAR * (TO_DATE('30-NOV'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY')-M_TP_DTETRN) * (1/360) else 0 end as NOV_REV,
    case when M_TP_DTEEXP>=TO_DATE('31-DEC'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY') then M_CURRENCY_POS_MIL_SAR * (TO_DATE('31-DEC'||M_REP_YR,'DD-MON-YY')-M_TP_DTETRN) * (1/360) else 0 end as DEC_REV
    from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP
    where        
    --M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD' and 
    M_TP_INT='N' 
    and TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO) in ('Sukuk')
) 

select
1              as ORDER1,
'Yearly'       as BREAKDOWN, 
'January'      as DDate,
NVL((select sum(JAN_REV) from INV_SUK_REV),0) as YTD_REVENUE,
NVL((select M_TARGETAMT from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_REV' and M_TARGETMON='JAN'),0) as YTD_TARGET,
'0%'           as YTD_ACHIEVEMENTS,
0              as DLY_REVENUE, 
0              as DLY_TARGET, 
'0%'           as DLY_ACHIEVEMENTS
from 
INV_SUK_REV where 1=1 and rownum=1

union all 

select
2               as ORDER1,

WITH LIQ_MOB_DI_OS_CUST_SUMMARY as (
    select
    TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 as REPORT_DATE,
    TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME) as DI_CUSTOMER,
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as DI_AMOUNT
    ,TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTESYS,'MON') as TRADE_MON
    ,TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'MON') as REP_MON
    ,TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTESYS,'YYYY') as TRADE_YEAR
    ,TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYY') as REP_YEAR

    from TP_ALL_REP TPALL ,PARTIES_REP PARTIES
    where TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
    and TPALL.M_TP_CNTRPID=PARTIES.M_LABEL(+) and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA(+)
    and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' 
    and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
    and TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'LM_%'
    and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTESYS, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YYYY')  
)
--Daily Details
select 'DAILY' as BREAKDOWN,TO_CHAR(REPORT_DATE,'DDMONYYYY') as REPORT_DATE,
count(DI_CUSTOMER) as NO_DI_CUSTOMER, sum(DI_AMOUNT) as DI_AMOUNT , rank() OVER (PARTITION BY REPORT_DATE ORDER BY REPORT_DATE desc) AS DATE_RANK
from LIQ_MOB_DI_OS_CUST_SUMMARY
group by REPORT_DATE

union all

--Quarterly Details
select 'QTR' as BREAKDOWN, REPORT_DATE, sum(NO_DI_CUSTOMER), sum(DI_AMOUNT) , QTR_RANK
from
(
    select '1st quarter '||TRADE_YEAR as REPORT_DATE,0 as NO_DI_CUSTOMER, 0 as DI_AMOUNT,1 as QTR_RANK
    from LIQ_MOB_DI_OS_CUST_SUMMARY where rownum=1
union all
    select '1st quarter '||TRADE_YEAR as REPORT_DATE,count(DI_CUSTOMER) as NO_DI_CUSTOMER, sum(DI_AMOUNT) as DI_AMOUNT,1 as QTR_RANK
    from LIQ_MOB_DI_OS_CUST_SUMMARY
    where TRADE_MON in ('JAN','FEB','MAR')
    group by '1st quarter '||TRADE_YEAR
union all   
    select '2nd quarter '||TRADE_YEAR as REPORT_DATE,0 as NO_DI_CUSTOMER, 0 as DI_AMOUNT,2 as QTR_RANK
    from LIQ_MOB_DI_OS_CUST_SUMMARY where rownum=1
union all

select
CAST (SUKUK_CONTRACT_ID         AS NUMBER(24))    M_SUKUK_CONTRACT_ID,
CAST (SUKUK_ISIN                AS CHAR(14))      M_SUKUK_ISIN,
CAST (TRANSACTION_REFERENCE     AS NUMBER(24))    M_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,
CAST (ISSUER                    AS CHAR(50))      M_ISSUER,
CAST (ISSUER_COUNTRY            AS CHAR(30))      M_ISSUER_COUNTRY,
CAST (PRINCIPLE                 AS DECIMAL(24,2)) M_PRINCIPLE,
CAST (INVESTMENT                AS DECIMAL(24,2)) M_INVESTMENT,
CAST (CURRENCY                  AS CHAR(10))      M_CURRENCY,
CAST (ISSUANCE_DATE             AS DATE)          M_ISSUANCE_DATE,
CAST (DEAL_DATE                 AS DATE)          M_DEAL_DATE,
CAST (VALUE_DATE                AS DATE)          M_VALUE_DATE,
CAST (MATURITY_DATE             AS DATE)          M_MATURITY_DATE,
CAST (COUPON_RATE               AS CHAR(10))      M_COUPON_RATE,
CAST (BENCHMARK_RATE            AS DECIMAL(24,2)) M_BENCHMARK_RATE,
CAST (COUPON_FREQUENCY          AS CHAR(5))       M_COUPON_FREQUENCY,
CAST (NEXT_COUPON_DATE          AS DATE)          M_NEXT_COUPON_DATE,
CAST (NEXT_COUPON_AMOUNT        AS DECIMAL(24,2)) M_NEXT_COUPON_AMOUNT,
CAST (MARK_TO_MARKET            AS DECIMAL(24,2)) M_MARK_TO_MARKET,
CAST (MARKETABLE_NONMARKETABLE  AS CHAR(10))      M_MARKETABLE_NONMARKETABLE,
CAST (ACCOUNTING_TREATMENT      AS CHAR(10))      M_ACCOUNTING_TREATMENT,
CAST (RATING                    AS CHAR(10))      M_RATING,
CAST (FIXED_FLOAT               AS CHAR(10))      M_FIXED_FLOAT,
CAST (ORIGIONAL_TENOR           AS NUMBER(5))     M_ORIGIONAL_TENOR,
CAST (RESIDUAL_TENOR            AS NUMBER(5))     M_RESIDUAL_TENOR,
CAST (PORTFOLIO_DURATION        AS NUMBER(5))     M_PORTFOLIO_DURATION,
CAST (UNREALIZED_PNL            AS DECIMAL(24,2)) M_UNREALIZED_PNL,
CAST (ACCRUED_PROFIT            AS DECIMAL(24,2)) M_ACCRUED_PROFIT,
 ----Additional columns as per user request
CAST (INVESTMENT_SAR            AS DECIMAL(24,2)) M_INVESTMENT_SAR,
CAST (NOMINAL                   AS DECIMAL(24,2)) M_NOMINAL,
CAST (BOOK_YIELD                AS DECIMAL(32,8)) M_BOOK_YIELD,
CAST (NOMINAL-INVESTMENT        AS DECIMAL(24,2)) M_PREMIUM_DISCOUNT
,CAST(INSTRUMENT AS VARCHAR2(40)) AS M_INSTRUMENT
,CAST(TP_LQTY2_BS AS DECIMAL(24,2)) AS M_TP_LQTY2_BS

from (
            --Risk Sukuk Detail
            select
            TPALL.M_CONTRACT as SUKUK_CONTRACT_ID,
            SEC.M_SE_ISIN as SUKUK_ISIN,
            TPALL.M_NB as TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,
            TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME) as ISSUER,
            TRIM(PARTIES.M_CTRY_DESC) as ISSUER_COUNTRY,
            NVL(SEC.M_SE_NOUT,0) as PRINCIPLE, 
            --(   case 
            --    when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_FMLY)='EQD' then TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE
            --    when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='BOND' then TPALL.M_TP_IPAY-TPALL.M_TP_ACCAMT
            --    else TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL end
            --)   as INVESTMENT, -- Updated as per the observation
            TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as INVESTMENT,
            TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as CURRENCY,
            SEC.M_SE_ISSD as ISSUANCE_DATE, --TP_RT.M_TP_RTDCC02
            TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN as DEAL_DATE,
            TPALL.M_TP_DTEPMT as VALUE_DATE,
            SEC.M_SE_MAT as MATURITY_DATE,
            DECODE(TRIM(SEC.M_BT_COUPON),'Fixed',SEC.M_SE_COUP,
            DECODE(NVl(CPN.M_F_CCRATE,0),0,SEC.M_SE_COUP,CPN.M_F_CCRATE)
            ) || ' %' as COUPON_RATE,
            0 as BENCHMARK_RATE,-- YTM value from Security
            TP_RT.M_TP_RTMFRC0 as COUPON_FREQUENCY,
            CF.M_F_VALUE as NEXT_COUPON_DATE,
            ABS(CF.M_F_AMOUNT) as NEXT_COUPON_AMOUNT,
            PL.M_PL_NFMV2 as MARK_TO_MARKET,
            '' as MARKETABLE_NONMARKETABLE,  -----------logic pending from AK / User
            TPALL.M_TP_ACCSCT as ACCOUNTING_TREATMENT,
            '' as RATING,  -- rating of security once added from BBG
            SEC.M_BT_COUPON as FIXED_FLOAT, -- BOND Type>>>coupon 
            SEC.M_SE_MAT-SEC.M_SE_ISSD  as ORIGIONAL_TENOR,
            SEC.M_SE_MAT-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 as RESIDUAL_TENOR,
            TPALL.M_REP_DATE2-TPALL.M_TP_DTEPMT as PORTFOLIO_DURATION,
            --PL.M_PL_FPNFCP2 + PL.M_PL_FPNFRV2 + PL.M_PL_NFMV2 + PL.M_PL_FTFI2 as UNREALIZED_PNL, 
            PL.M_PL_NFMV2-(   case 
                when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_FMLY)='EQD' then TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE
                when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='BOND' then TPALL.M_TP_IPAY-TPALL.M_TP_ACCAMT
                else TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL end
            )  as UNREALIZED_PNL, -- MTM-priciciple investment amount
            NVL(ACCURED_CPN.M_F_AMOUNT,0) as ACCRUED_PROFIT
            --((ACCURED_CPN.M_F_AMOUNT*TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL)/100)     
            ----Additional columns as per user request
           ,(   case 
                when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_FMLY)='EQD' then TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE
                when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='BOND' then TPALL.M_TP_IPAY-TPALL.M_TP_ACCAMT
                else TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL end
            ) * DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT22.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT22.M_MID))))    as INVESTMENT_SAR
            ,TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as NOMINAL
            ,TPALL.M_TP_YIELD as BOOK_YIELD
            ,TPALL.M_INSTRUMENT AS INSTRUMENT
            ,TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2 * DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',1,-1) AS TP_LQTY2_BS
            
        from TP_ALL_REP TPALL
        left outer join SECURITIES_REP SEC
            ON TPALL.M_INSTRLABEL=SEC.M_SE_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=SEC.M_REF_DATA
        left outer join TP_RT_REP TP_RT
           ON TPALL.M_NB=TP_RT.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TP_RT.M_REF_DATA
        left join 
         (  
             select M_REF_DATA,M_NB,M_F_AMOUNT,M_F_CCFRMCD1,M_F_CCFRMCD2,M_F_VALUE,M_TP_DTESYS from cash_flow_rep 
            where M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN' and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
            --group by M_NB,M_F_VALUE,M_REF_DATA,M_TP_DTESYS
         ) CF 
            ON TPALL.M_NB=CF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=CF.M_REF_DATA and CF.M_F_VALUE=TP_RT.M_TP_RTDCN02
         left outer join  PL_DETAILED_REP PL
            ON TPALL.M_NB=PL.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PL.M_REF_DATA
         left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
                    on TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_SECISS)=TRIM(PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL) and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
         left outer join 
             (
                 select M_NB,M_REF_DATA,M_F_CURRENCY,M_F_CCFRMCD1,M_F_CCFRMCD2,M_F_CCFXG0,M_F_CCRATE,M_F_VALUE
                from CASH_FLOW_REP 
                where M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN' 
                and (select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and rownum=1)>=M_F_CCFRMCD1 
                and (select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and rownum=1)<M_F_CCFRMCD2
            ) CPN
            ON TPALL.M_NB=CPN.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=CPN.M_REF_DATA 
        left outer join 
         (   
            select M_NB,M_REF_DATA,sum(M_F_AMOUNT) M_F_AMOUNT ---M_F_CURRENCY,M_F_CCFRMCD1,M_F_CCFRMCD2,M_F_CCFXG0,M_F_CCRATE,M_F_VALUE
            from CASH_FLOW_REP 
            where M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN' 
            and (
            (select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and rownum=1)>=M_F_CCFRMCD1 
            or 
            (select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and rownum=1)<M_F_CCFRMCD2
            )
            and M_F_VALUE<=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and rownum=1)
            group by M_NB,M_REF_DATA
        ) ACCURED_CPN
            ON TPALL.M_NB=ACCURED_CPN.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=ACCURED_CPN.M_REF_DATA
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2    
        on SPOT2.M_DATE=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2  and TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM)='SAR'  and TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN)=TRIM(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,'CNH','CNY',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR))
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT22    
        on SPOT22.M_DATE=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_DEN)='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_NUM)=TRIM(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,'CNH','CNY',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR))
        where TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
        AND TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Sukuk')
        AND TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD'
        AND TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
        and (TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_MOPLSTL) not in ('RPL_D', 'RPL_M') or TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_MOPLSTL) is null)
)

select
--cast(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY'), 'DD-MM-YYYY') as DATE) AS AS_OF_DATE,
--cast(TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') as TIMESTAMP(9) )AS INSERT_DATE_TIME,
cast(NOS.M_CURRENCY as VARCHAR2(3)) as CURRENCY,
cast(DECODE(TRIM(PARTIES.M_CIF),'','0000000000',TO_CHAR(TRIM(PARTIES.M_CIF))) as VARCHAR2(50)) as CUSTOMER,
cast(case when TRIM(NOS.M_SERVICER) like '%SAUDI ARABIAN M%' or TRIM(NOS.M_SERVICER)='10000030' then '5010' else '5002' end as VARCHAR2(10)) as CATEGORY,
cast(null as DATE) as OPENING_DATE,
cast(NVl(NR.M_KEY,'')||NVl(NR.M_SECONDKEY,'')  as VARCHAR2(40)) as LIMIT_REF,
cast('AC-'||TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N) as VARCHAR2(50)) as CONTRACT_ID,  ---check the feasibility to get the mirror acc instead of nostro account
cast(NVL(NOS.M_AMOUNT,0) as NUMBER(24,2)) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT,
cast(
	case 
 when TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY)='SAR' then NVL(NOS.M_AMOUNT,0)*1
 when TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY)='KES' then NVL(NOS.M_AMOUNT,0)*0.03130
	else NVL(NOS.M_AMOUNT,0) * TRUNC(DECODE(NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0),0,DECODE(NVL(SPOT22.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT22.M_MID)),SPOT2.M_MID),6)
   
   end
as NUMBER(24,2)) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT_LCY,
--cast(NVL(ACR.ACCURAL,0) as NUMBER(24,6)) as ACCRUED_INTEREST,
cast(null as NUMBER(24,6)) as ACCRUED_INTEREST,  --- since there is no account interest maintained bussiness accepted to sent as null
cast(
	case when TO_CHAR(NR.M_ENDDATE,'DDMMYY')='131169' then '20601231' else TO_CHAR(NR.M_ENDDATE,'YYYYMMDD') end    
as VARCHAR2(8)) as  LIMIT_EXP_DATE,
cast(NVL(NR.M_MAX,0) as NUMBER(24))  as LIMIT_AMOUNT,
cast(null as NUMBER(24))  as NO_O_DAYS,
cast(
    case 
    when TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY)='SAR' then 1
    when TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY)='KES' then 0.031300
    else TRUNC(DECODE(NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0),0,DECODE(NVL(SPOT22.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT22.M_MID)),SPOT2.M_MID),6)
    end
as NUMBER(24,6)) EXCHANGE_RATE,
cast('AMC' as VARCHAR2(3)) as IFRS9_Classification,
cast(null as VARCHAR2(10)) as CCF,
cast(null as NUMBER(24,6)) as LI_INTERNAL_AMOUNT     

from 
(
    select M_REF_DATA,M_ACCOUNT_N,M_CURRENCY,M_SERVICER,sum(M_AMOUNT) M_AMOUNT
    from BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP
    where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N 
    and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N) is not null and TRIM(M_CURRENCY) is not null and SUBSTR(TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N),0,3)='008'
    and TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED') 
    group by M_REF_DATA,M_ACCOUNT_N,M_CURRENCY,M_SERVICER
) NOS
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2    
  on  SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN)=DECODE(TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY),'CNH','CNY',TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY)) and SPOT2.M_REF_DATA = 1440
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT22    
  on SPOT22.M_CCY_DEN='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_NUM)=DECODE(TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY),'CNH','CNY',TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY)) and SPOT22.M_REF_DATA = 1440   
left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
  on NOS.M_SERVICER=PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL and PARTIES.M_REF_DATA = 1445
left outer join 
(
   SELECT M_REF_DATA,M_OPERATION,M_VALIDATION,M_SECONDKEY,M_CREATIONDA M_CREATIONDA,M_MAX,M_KEY,M_ENDDATE,M_EFFECTIVED
   ,RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY M_KEY ORDER BY M_VALIDATION,M_EFFECTIVED asc) R_RANK
    FROM BAB_NOSTRO_RISK_REP
    WHERE M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
    AND M_OPERATION NOT LIKE '%Cancel%'
 ) NR
  on TRIM(NR.M_KEY)=TRIM(NOS.M_SERVICER) and  NR.M_REF_DATA = NOS.M_REF_DATA and TRIM(NR.M_SECONDKEY)=TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY) and NR.R_RANK=1
  left outer join
(  
   select CONTR.M_ACCOUNT_N,sum(NVL(TPALL.M_TP_RTACR02,0)) ACCURAL
   from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP CONTR,TP_ALL_REP TPALL
   where CONTR.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=1445
   and CONTR.M_PROD_ID=TPALL.M_CONTRACT
   group by CONTR.M_ACCOUNT_N
) ACR 
ON TRIM(ACR.M_ACCOUNT_N)=TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)
where 
1=1

WITH LIQ_MOB_DI_PER_CATEGORY as (
    select
    TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 as REPORT_DATE,
    TPALL.M_NB as TRANSACTION_REF, 
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR AS TXN_CCY,
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as DI_VOLUME_VALUE,
    CASE WHEN TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR='SAR' THEN TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL 
    ELSE (TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL * (CAST(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0))) AS DECIMAL(24,3))))
    END AS DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR,
    TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 as REMAINING_DAYS,
    case 
    when TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2  >=0  AND  TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2<=30  then '1MON'
    when TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2  >30  AND  TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2<=90  then '1_3'
    when TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2  >90  AND  TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2<=120 then '3_4'
    when TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2  >120 AND  TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2<=180 then '4_6'
    when TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2  >180 AND  TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2<=240 then '6_8'
    when TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2  >240 AND  TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2<=365 then '8_12'
    when TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2  >365 AND  TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2<=730 then '1_2_YEARS'
    when TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2  >730 AND  TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2<=1826 then '2_5_YEARS'
    when TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2  >1826 then 'ABOVE_5_YEARS'
    else 'OTHER' END as DI_CAT_PERIOD
    from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP TPALL 
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2
    on TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT2.M_DATE and TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR)=TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN) and TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM)='SAR'
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT22
    on TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT22.M_DATE and TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR)=TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_NUM) and TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_DEN)='SAR'
    where TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N 
    and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' 
    and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
    and TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'LM_%')
select ORDER1,REPORT_DATE,DI_CAT, TXN_CCY, NO_OF_DEALS, NVL(DI_VOLUME,0) DI_VOLUME, NVL(DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR,0) DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR, CALC_VAL*NVL(DI_VOLUME,0) as NEW_VOLUME_WEIGHT, CALC_VAL*NVL(DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR,0) as NEW_VOLUME_WEIGHT_IN_SAR
from 
(
    select 1 as ORDER1,TO_CHAR(REPORT_DATE,'DDMonYYYY') as REPORT_DATE,'WITHIN 1 MONTH' as DI_CAT,  TXN_CCY, count(*) as NO_OF_DEALS,
    sum(DI_VOLUME_VALUE) AS DI_VOLUME, sum(DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR) AS DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR, (105/100) as CALC_VAL from 
    LIQ_MOB_DI_PER_CATEGORY where DI_CAT_PERIOD='1MON' group by TXN_CCY, 1, TO_CHAR(REPORT_DATE,'DDMonYYYY'), 'WITHIN 1 MONTH', (105/100)
    
    UNION ALL
    
    select 2 as ORDER1,TO_CHAR(REPORT_DATE,'DDMonYYYY') as REPORT_DATE,'1 - 3 MONTHS' as DI_CAT, TXN_CCY, count(*) as NO_OF_DEALS,
    sum(DI_VOLUME_VALUE) AS DI_VOLUME, sum(DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR) AS DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR, (110/100) as CALC_VAL from 
    LIQ_MOB_DI_PER_CATEGORY where DI_CAT_PERIOD='1_3' group by TXN_CCY, 2, TO_CHAR(REPORT_DATE,'DDMonYYYY'), '1 - 3 MONTHS', (110/100)
    
    UNION ALL
    
    select 3 as ORDER1,TO_CHAR(REPORT_DATE,'DDMonYYYY') as REPORT_DATE,'3 - 4 MONTHS' as DI_CAT, TXN_CCY, count(*) as NO_OF_DEALS,
    sum(DI_VOLUME_VALUE) AS DI_VOLUME, sum(DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR) AS DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR, (115/100) as CALC_VAL from 
    LIQ_MOB_DI_PER_CATEGORY where DI_CAT_PERIOD='3_4' group by TXN_CCY, 3, TO_CHAR(REPORT_DATE,'DDMonYYYY'), '3 - 4 MONTHS', (115/100)
    
    UNION ALL
    
    select 4 as ORDER1,TO_CHAR(REPORT_DATE,'DDMonYYYY') as REPORT_DATE,'4 - 6 MONTHS' as DI_CAT, TXN_CCY, count(*) as NO_OF_DEALS,
    sum(DI_VOLUME_VALUE) AS DI_VOLUME, sum(DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR) AS DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR, (120/100) as CALC_VAL from 
    LIQ_MOB_DI_PER_CATEGORY where DI_CAT_PERIOD='4_6' group by TXN_CCY, 4, TO_CHAR(REPORT_DATE,'DDMonYYYY'), '4 - 6 MONTHS', (120/100)
    
    UNION ALL
    select 5 as ORDER1,TO_CHAR(REPORT_DATE,'DDMonYYYY') as REPORT_DATE,'6 - 8 MONTHS' as DI_CAT, TXN_CCY, count(*) as NO_OF_DEALS,
    sum(DI_VOLUME_VALUE) AS DI_VOLUME, sum(DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR) AS DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR, (130/100) as CALC_VAL from 
    LIQ_MOB_DI_PER_CATEGORY where DI_CAT_PERIOD='6_8' group by TXN_CCY, 5, TO_CHAR(REPORT_DATE,'DDMonYYYY'), '6 - 8 MONTHS', (130/100)
    
    UNION ALL
    select 6 as ORDER1,TO_CHAR(REPORT_DATE,'DDMonYYYY') as REPORT_DATE,'8 - 12 MONTHS' as DI_CAT, TXN_CCY, count(*) as NO_OF_DEALS,
    sum(DI_VOLUME_VALUE) AS DI_VOLUME, sum(DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR) AS DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR, (140/100) as CALC_VAL from 
    LIQ_MOB_DI_PER_CATEGORY where DI_CAT_PERIOD='8_12' group by TXN_CCY, 6, TO_CHAR(REPORT_DATE,'DDMonYYYY'), '8 - 12 MONTHS', (140/100)
    
    UNION ALL

    select 7 as ORDER1,TO_CHAR(REPORT_DATE,'DDMonYYYY') as REPORT_DATE,'01 - 02 YEARS' as DI_CAT, TXN_CCY, count(*) as NO_OF_DEALS,
    sum(DI_VOLUME_VALUE) AS DI_VOLUME, sum(DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR) AS DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR, (150/100) as CALC_VAL from 
    LIQ_MOB_DI_PER_CATEGORY where DI_CAT_PERIOD='1_2_YEARS' group by TXN_CCY, 7, TO_CHAR(REPORT_DATE,'DDMonYYYY'), '01 - 02 YEARS', (150/100)
    
    UNION ALL

    select 8 as ORDER1,TO_CHAR(REPORT_DATE,'DDMonYYYY') as REPORT_DATE,'02 - 05 YEARS' as DI_CAT, TXN_CCY, count(*) as NO_OF_DEALS,
    sum(DI_VOLUME_VALUE) AS DI_VOLUME, sum(DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR) AS DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR, (170/100) as CALC_VAL from 
    LIQ_MOB_DI_PER_CATEGORY where DI_CAT_PERIOD='2_5_YEARS' group by TXN_CCY, 7, TO_CHAR(REPORT_DATE,'DDMonYYYY'), '02 - 05 YEARS', (170/100)
    
        UNION ALL

    select 9 as ORDER1,TO_CHAR(REPORT_DATE,'DDMonYYYY') as REPORT_DATE,'OVER 05 YEARS' as DI_CAT, TXN_CCY, count(*) as NO_OF_DEALS,
    sum(DI_VOLUME_VALUE) AS DI_VOLUME, sum(DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR) AS DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR, (190/100) as CALC_VAL from 
    LIQ_MOB_DI_PER_CATEGORY where DI_CAT_PERIOD='ABOVE_5_YEARS' group by TXN_CCY, 7, TO_CHAR(REPORT_DATE,'DDMonYYYY'), 'OVER 05 YEARS', (190/100)
    )

WITH LIQ_MOB_DI_PER_CLIENT as (
   SELECT
    TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 as REPORT_DATE,
    TPALL.M_NB as TRANSACTION_REF,
    TRIM(TPALL.M_CPTY_NAME) as CUSTOMER_NAME,  
    TPALL.M_CIF as CIF,
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as AMOUNT,
    CASE WHEN TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR='SAR' THEN TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL 
    ELSE (TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL * (CAST(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0))) AS DECIMAL(24,3))))
    END AS AMOUNT_IN_SAR,    
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as CURRENCY,
    TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST as VALUE_DATE,
    TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP  as MATURITY_DATE,
    TPALL.M_CUSTOMER_RATE as ACTUAL_RATE,
    TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 as AVG_DAYS,
--   TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST as AVG_DAYS,
    NVL(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0) as SMPD_AMOUNT,
    NVL(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*(TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2),0) as SMPD_DAYS
    from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP TPALL
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2
    on TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT2.M_DATE and TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR)=TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN) and TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM)='SAR'
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT22
    on TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT22.M_DATE and TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR)=TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_NUM) and TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_DEN)='SAR'
    where TPALL.M_REF_DATA =  @MxDataSetKey:N
    and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' 
    and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
    and TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'LM_%'
--    and M_NB=671
)

, 

LIQ_MOB_DI_PER_CLIENT_CONSOLD as (
   SELECT REPORT_DATE, 0 as TRANSACTION_REF, CUSTOMER_NAME, CIF, SUM(AMOUNT) AS AMOUNT, 
   SUM(AMOUNT_IN_SAR) AS AMOUNT_IN_SAR,
--   SUM(AMOUNT_IN_SAR) OVER (PARTITION BY REPORT_DATE) VOL_PERCNT, 
   CURRENCY, NULL AS VALUE_DATE, NULL AS MATURITY_DATE,
   ROUND(sum(SMPD_AMOUNT)/sum(AMOUNT),4) as ACTUAL_RATE, ROUND(sum(SMPD_DAYS)/sum(AMOUNT),2) as AVG_DAYS, --SUM(SMPD_AMOUNT) AS SMPD_AMOUNT, SUM(SMPD_DAYS) AS SMPD_DAYS, 
   count(CUSTOMER_NAME) as NO_DI
   FROM(
   SELECT
    TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 as REPORT_DATE,
    TPALL.M_NB as TRANSACTION_REF,
    TRIM(TPALL.M_CPTY_NAME) as CUSTOMER_NAME,  
    TPALL.M_CIF as CIF,
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as AMOUNT,
    CASE WHEN TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR='SAR' THEN TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL 
    ELSE (TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL * (CAST(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0))) AS DECIMAL(24,3))))
    END AS AMOUNT_IN_SAR,    
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as CURRENCY,
    TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST as VALUE_DATE,
    TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP  as MATURITY_DATE,
    TPALL.M_TP_PRICE as ACTUAL_RATE,
    TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 as AVG_DAYS,
    NVL(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0) as SMPD_AMOUNT,
    NVL(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*(TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2),0) as SMPD_DAYS
    from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP TPALL
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2
    on TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT2.M_DATE and TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR)=TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN) and TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM)='SAR'
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT22
    on TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT22.M_DATE and TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR)=TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_NUM) and TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_DEN)='SAR'
    where TPALL.M_REF_DATA =  @MxDataSetKey:N
    and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' 
    and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
    and TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'LM_%' ) 
    group by REPORT_DATE, 0, CUSTOMER_NAME, CIF, CURRENCY, NULL, NULL--, AMOUNT_IN_SAR
    
    )
    
    SELECT 'Per_Client' as BREAKDOWN,  MAX(TRANSACTION_REF) AS TRANSACTION_REF, CUSTOMER_NAME, CIF, SUM(AMOUNT) AS AMOUNT, SUM(AMOUNT_IN_SAR) AS AMOUNT_IN_SAR, 0 AS TOTAL_PROFIT, 0 AS TOTAL_PROFIT_IN_SAR,
--MAX(VALUE_DATE) AS VALUE_DATE, MAX(MATURITY_DATE) AS MATURITY_DATE, 
null as VALUE_DATE,null as MATURITY_DATE,
MAX(AVG_DAYS) AS AVG_DAYS, null AS TOTAL_DAYS, ROUND(MAX(ACTUAL_RATE),4) as AVG_RATE, CURRENCY, 
ROUND (SUM(AMOUNT_IN_SAR) / (SUM(AMOUNT_IN_SAR) OVER (PARTITION BY REPORT_DATE)),6)*100 VOL_PERCNT,
SUM(NO_DI) AS NO_DI, SUM(AMOUNT) AS DI_VOLUME, SUM(AMOUNT_IN_SAR) AS DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR
FROM LIQ_MOB_DI_PER_CLIENT_CONSOLD
GROUP  BY REPORT_DATE, CUSTOMER_NAME, CURRENCY, 'Per_Client', CIF, 0, AMOUNT_IN_SAR, null

UNION ALL
    
    
select 'Per_Deal' as BREAKDOWN, TRANSACTION_REF, CUSTOMER_NAME, CIF, AMOUNT, AMOUNT_IN_SAR, ROUND(AMOUNT*(ACTUAL_RATE/100)*((MATURITY_DATE-VALUE_DATE)/360),2) as TOTAL_PROFIT,
ROUND(AMOUNT_IN_SAR*(ACTUAL_RATE/100)*((MATURITY_DATE-VALUE_DATE)/360),2) as TOTAL_PROFIT_IN_SAR,
--ROUND(AMOUNT_IN_SAR*(ACTUAL_RATE/360)*AVG_DAYS,0) as TOTAL_PROFIT_IN_SAR,
VALUE_DATE, MATURITY_DATE, AVG_DAYS, (MATURITY_DATE-VALUE_DATE) AS TOTAL_DAYS, ROUND(ACTUAL_RATE,4) as AVG_RATE, CURRENCY,
ROUND (AMOUNT_IN_SAR / (SUM(AMOUNT_IN_SAR) OVER (PARTITION BY REPORT_DATE)),6)*100 VOL_PERCNT, 0 as NO_DI,0 as DI_VOLUME, 0 AS DI_VOLUME_IN_SAR
from LIQ_MOB_DI_PER_CLIENT
