TRIM(M_DESC): E_BAB_DLY_BLTR_PRS_CFC - ADOC Report
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
/* 
This PRS CapFloorCollar report (ADOC)  will trigger by business daily from the murex GUI .
The deals are booked ( Murex system Date) on same day need to capture in the report only for this "PRS CapFloorCollar" product in murex system.
Only expecting to see the external deals ( Portfolio vs Counterparty deals ) only in the report.
Only expecting to see the entity "CE BAB KSA" deals in the report .
Only expecting to see typology = "PRS CapFloorCollar" deals in the report .
Expecting to see all Live,MKT_OP and DEAD deals in the report.
*/

SELECT 
BAB_DBLTR.M_CONTRACT AS TRN_NB,
TRIM(BAB_DBLTR.M_CMP_TYPO) AS TYPOLOGY,
TRIM(BAB_DBLTR.M_H_CTP_CODE)  AS CUSTOMER,
TRIM(BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_NOMCUR) AS CURRENCY,
BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_NOMINAL AS AMOUNT,
BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_DTETRN as TRADE_DATE,
BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_DTEFST as VALUE_DATE,
BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_DTEEXP AS MATURITY_DATE,
TRIM(BAB_DBLTR.M_INSTRUMENT) AS MARKET_INDEX,
TRIM(BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_TRADER) AS TRADER,
TRIM(BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_PFOLIO) AS PORTFOLIO,
TRIM(BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_STATUS2) as STATUS

from 
BAB_DBLTR_PRSCFC_REP BAB_DBLTR 
WHERE 
BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_INT='N'  -- TO CAPTURE ONLY EXTERNAL DEALS 
AND TRIM(BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_ENTITY)='CE BAB KSA'  -- TO CAPTURE ONLY KSA ENTITY DEALS
AND TRIM(BAB_DBLTR.M_CMP_TYPO) ='PRS CapFloorCollar'  -- ONLY TO CAPTURE THESE TYPOLOGY DEALS
AND TO_CHAR(BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_DTESYS,'YYYYMMDD')=@SYSTEM_DATE:D
--AND (BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_DTESYS>='01-FEB-2024' AND BAB_DBLTR.M_TP_DTESYS<='28-FEB-2024') -- system date is used to capture the present deals and if any back dated deals booked.
order by BAB_DBLTR.M_CONTRACT

WITH LIQ_MOB_DI_PER_CLIENT as (
    select
    TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 as REPORT_DATE,
    TPALL.M_NB as TRANSACTION_REF,
    NVL(TRIM(TPALL.M_CPTY_NAME),TPALL.M_CPTY_NAME) as CUSTOMER_NAME,  
    TPALL.M_CIF as CIF,
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as AMOUNT,
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as CURRENCY,
    TPALL.M_TP_DTEPMT as VALUE_DATE,
    TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP  as MATURITY_DATE,
    TPALL.M_TP_PRICE as ACTUAL_RATE,
    TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 as AVG_DAYS
    from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP TPALL
    where TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N 
    and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' 
    and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
    and TPALL.M_PORTFOLIO like 'LM_%'
    and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YYYY')  
)
select 
CAST(CUSTOMER_NAME as VARCHAR2(255)) as CUSTOMER_NAME,
CAST(count(TRANSACTION_REF) as DECIMAL(10,0)) as COUNT_REF, 
CAST(sum(AMOUNT) as DECIMAL(10,0)) as SUM_AMT, 
CAST(SUM(ACTUAL_RATE)  as DECIMAL(10,0)) as SUM_RATE, 
CAST(sum(AVG_DAYS) as  DECIMAL(10,0)) as SUM_AVGD
from LIQ_MOB_DI_PER_CLIENT 
group by CUSTOMER_NAME

WITH LIQ_MOB_DI_PREMIUM as (
    select
    TPALL.M_NB as TRANSACTION_REF,
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as CURRENCY,
    TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN as START_DATE,
    TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP as MATURITY_DATE,
    NVL(TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN,0) as NO_OF_DAYS,
    TPALL.M_CIF as CIF,
    NVL(TRIM(TPALL.M_CPTY_NAME),TPALL.M_CPTY_NAME) as NAME,
    NVL(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,0) as AMOUNT,
    CASE WHEN TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR='SAR' THEN TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL ELSE (TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL * M_SPOT_SAR_RATE) END AS AMOUNT_IN_SAR,
    NVL(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0) as  RATE,
    NVL(UDFR.M_CATEGORY,0) as SAIBOR_LIBOR,
--  0 as  SAIBOR_LIBOR, --market rate field is getting added ti trading templated, once implemented by Murex pick from there.
    NVL((TPALL.M_TP_PRICE-UDFR.M_CATEGORY),0) as  PREMIUM, ---- rate-SAIBOR_LIBOR
    NVL((TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*NVL(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE-UDFR.M_CATEGORY,0)),0) as SMPRDT,
    NVL((TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*NVL(TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN,0)),0) as SMPRDT_TENOR,
    CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(PARTIES.M_SEGMENT),' ') = ' ' THEN
    (CASE WHEN PARTIES.M_AGENT=1 THEN 'AGENT'
    ELSE (CASE WHEN PARTIES.M_BROKER='Y' THEN 'BROKER'
    ELSE (CASE WHEN PARTIES.M_CORPORATE='Y' THEN 'CORPORATE'
    ELSE (CASE WHEN PARTIES.M_CUSTODIAN='Y' THEN 'CUSTODIAN'
    ELSE (CASE WHEN PARTIES.M_GARANTOR='Y' THEN 'GUARANTOR'
    ELSE (CASE WHEN PARTIES.M_CUSTOMER='Y' THEN 'CUSTOMER'
    ELSE (CASE
    WHEN PARTIES.M_BANK='Y'         then 'BANK'
    WHEN PARTIES.M_BRANCH='Y'       then 'BRANCH'
    WHEN PARTIES.M_CLEARER='Y'      then 'CLEARER'
    WHEN PARTIES.M_CLIENT='Y'       then 'CLIENT'
    WHEN PARTIES.M_FICTIVE='Y'      then 'FICTIVE'
    WHEN PARTIES.M_GROUP='Y'        then 'GROUP'
    WHEN PARTIES.M_INT_PARTY='Y'    then 'INTERNAL PARTY'  
    WHEN PARTIES.M_ISSUER='Y'       then 'ISSUER'
    WHEN PARTIES.M_LEG_ENT='Y'      then 'LEGAL ENTITY' 
    WHEN PARTIES.M_STATE='Y'        then 'STATE'
    WHEN PARTIES.M_SUBSIDIARY='Y'   then 'SUBSIDIARY'
    else ' ' end) end) end) end) end) end) end) ELSE TRIM(PARTIES.M_SEGMENT) END as SEGMENT
    ,TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN,'MON') as TRADE_MON
    ,TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'MON') as REP_MON
    ,TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN,'YY') as TRADE_YEAR
    ,TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YY') as REP_YEAR
    from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP TPALL 
    left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
    on TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_CNTRPID)=TRIM(PARTIES.M_LABEL) and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
    left outer join TRD_UDF_REP UDFR
    on TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=UDFR.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=UDFR.M_REF_DATA
    where TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N 
    and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
    and TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'LM_%'
    and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YYYY')  
)

WITH LIQ_MOB_MAUTRITY_OS_DI as (
    SELECT
    TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 as REPORT_DATE,
    TPALL.M_NB as TRANSACTION_REF,
    TPALL.M_CIF,
    TPALL.M_CPTY_NAME,
    CAST(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL AS NUMBER(24,3)) as AMOUNT,    
    CAST(CASE WHEN TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR='SAR' THEN TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL ELSE (TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL * M_SPOT_SAR_RATE) END AS NUMBER(24,3)) AS AMOUNT_IN_SAR,
    CAST(CAST(CASE WHEN TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR='SAR' THEN TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL ELSE (TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL * M_SPOT_SAR_RATE) END AS NUMBER(24,3)) / 1000000 AS NUMBER(24,3)) AS AMOUNT_IN_SAR_IN_MIO,
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as CURRENCY,
    TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST as VALUE_DATE,
    TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP  as MATURITY_DATE,
    TPALL.M_TP_PRICE as ACTUAL_RATE,
    TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 as REMAINING_DAYS
    from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP TPALL
    where TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
    and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' 
    and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
    and TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'LM_%'
)
select * from LIQ_MOB_MAUTRITY_OS_DI

with DPM_PERF as (
    select T1.ORDER1,T1.T_MON,T1.T_YEAR,T1.T_YY,T1.NUMBER_OF_UNITS,
    (select sum(NUMBER_OF_UNITS) from(
           select 
            DECODE(TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN, 'MON'),'JAN',1,'FEB',2,'MAR',3,'APR',4,'MAY',5,'JUN',6,'JUL',7,'AUG',8,'SEP',9,'OCT',10,'NOV',11,'DEC',12) as ORDER1,
            --rownum as ORDER1,
            TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN, 'MON') as T_MON,
            TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN, 'YYYY') as T_YEAR,
            TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN, 'YY') as T_YY,
            sum(DECODE(M_TP_BUY,'B',M_TP_LQTY2,-M_TP_LQTY2)) as NUMBER_OF_UNITS,
            --0 as CUMLT_NO_OF_UNITS,
            sum(M_CURRENCY_POS) as COST1,
            --0 as CUMLT_COST1,
            sum(M_MTM_MKT_VAL) as MARKET_VALUE,
            sum(M_UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS) as UNREAL_GAIN_LOSS,--PL.M_PL_CGU2
            M_SEC_SECTOR_LABEL as SECTOR_LBL
            from 
            BAB_TRN_ALL_REP
            where 
            TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO) ='Equity DPM'
            and M_TRN_YEAR=M_REP_YEAR
            group by M_TP_DTETRN,M_SEC_SECTOR_LABEL
      ) T2 WHERE T2.ORDER1<=T1.ORDER1) as CUMLT_NO_OF_UNITS,
    T1.COST1,
    (select sum(COST1) from(
            select 
            DECODE(TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN, 'MON'),'JAN',1,'FEB',2,'MAR',3,'APR',4,'MAY',5,'JUN',6,'JUL',7,'AUG',8,'SEP',9,'OCT',10,'NOV',11,'DEC',12) as ORDER1,
            --rownum as ORDER1,
            TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN, 'MON') as T_MON,
            TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN, 'YYYY') as T_YEAR,
            TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN, 'YY') as T_YY,
            sum(DECODE(M_TP_BUY,'B',M_TP_LQTY2,-M_TP_LQTY2)) as NUMBER_OF_UNITS,
            --0 as CUMLT_NO_OF_UNITS,
            sum(M_CURRENCY_POS) as COST1,
            --0 as CUMLT_COST1,
            sum(M_MTM_MKT_VAL) as MARKET_VALUE,
            sum(M_UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS) as UNREAL_GAIN_LOSS,--PL.M_PL_CGU2
            M_SEC_SECTOR_LABEL as SECTOR_LBL
            from 
            BAB_TRN_ALL_REP
            where 
            TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO) ='Equity DPM'
            and M_TRN_YEAR=M_REP_YEAR
            group by M_TP_DTETRN,M_SEC_SECTOR_LABEL
            order by ORDER1
      ) T3 WHERE T3.ORDER1<=T1.ORDER1) as CUMLT_COST1,
    T1.MARKET_VALUE,T1.UNREAL_GAIN_LOSS,T1.SECTOR_LBL
    from(
           select 
            DECODE(TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN, 'MON'),'JAN',1,'FEB',2,'MAR',3,'APR',4,'MAY',5,'JUN',6,'JUL',7,'AUG',8,'SEP',9,'OCT',10,'NOV',11,'DEC',12) as ORDER1,
            --rownum as ORDER1,
            TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN, 'MON') as T_MON,
            TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN, 'YYYY') as T_YEAR,
            TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN, 'YY') as T_YY,
            sum(DECODE(M_TP_BUY,'B',M_TP_LQTY2,-M_TP_LQTY2)) as NUMBER_OF_UNITS,
            --0 as CUMLT_NO_OF_UNITS,
            sum(M_CURRENCY_POS) as COST1,
            --0 as CUMLT_COST1,
            sum(M_MTM_MKT_VAL) as MARKET_VALUE,
            sum(M_UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS) as UNREAL_GAIN_LOSS,--PL.M_PL_CGU2
            M_SEC_SECTOR_LABEL as SECTOR_LBL
            from 
            BAB_TRN_ALL_REP
            where 
            TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO) ='Equity DPM'
            and M_TRN_YEAR=M_REP_YEAR
            group by M_TP_DTETRN,M_SEC_SECTOR_LABEL
      ) T1
)

---Total View
select 'Total' as BREAKDOWN,'' as M_DDATE,0 M_CUM_NUMBER_OF_UNITS,0 M_CUM_COST1,0 PRICE,0 TOTAL_NAV,
'' as MONTHLY_CHANGE,'Total Cost' as HOLDING_POSITION,sum(COST1) as HP_VAL, 0 as DPM, 0 as BENCH, 0 as DIFFERENCE
from DPM_PERF

union all

select 'Total' as BREAKDOWN,'' as M_DDATE,0 M_CUM_NUMBER_OF_UNITS,0 M_CUM_COST1,0 PRICE,0 TOTAL_NAV,
'' as MONTHLY_CHANGE,'Market Value' as HOLDING_POSITION,sum(MARKET_VALUE) as HP_VAL, 0 as DPM, 0 as BENCH, 0 as DIFFERENCE
from DPM_PERF

union all

select 'Total' as BREAKDOWN,'' as M_DDATE,0 M_CUM_NUMBER_OF_UNITS,0 M_CUM_COST1,0 PRICE,0 TOTAL_NAV,
'' as MONTHLY_CHANGE,'Unrealized Gain/Loss' as HOLDING_POSITION,sum(UNREAL_GAIN_LOSS) as HP_VAL, 0 as DPM, 0 as BENCH, 0 as DIFFERENCE
from DPM_PERF

---sector view
union all
select 'Sector' as BREAKDOWN,'' as M_DDATE,0 M_CUM_NUMBER_OF_UNITS,0 M_CUM_COST1,0 PRICE,0 TOTAL_NAV,
'' as MONTHLY_CHANGE,SECTOR_LBL as HOLDING_POSITION,count(*) as HP_VAL, 0 as DPM, 0 as BENCH, 0 as DIFFERENCE
from DPM_PERF 
where TRIM(SECTOR_LBL) is not null 
group by SECTOR_LBL

---Monthly view
union all
select 'Monthly' as BREAKDOWN,M_DDATE,CUMLT_NO_OF_UNITS as M_CUM_NUMBER_OF_UNITS,CUMLT_COST1 as M_CUM_COST1,
PRICE,TOTAL_NAV,MONTHLY_CHANGE,'' as HOLDING_POSITION, HP_VAL, 0 as DPM, 0 as BENCH, 0 as DIFFERENCE
from (
select '31-JAN-'||T_YY as M_DDATE,0 as CUMLT_NO_OF_UNITS,0 as CUMLT_COST1,0 as PRICE,0 as TOTAL_NAV, 0 || '%' as MONTHLY_CHANGE,1 as HP_VAL from DPM_PERF where rownum=1 and 0=(select count(*) from DPM_PERF where T_MON='JAN')

select (case when MOD(20||T_YY,4)=0 AND ( MOD(20||T_YY,100)!=0 OR MOD(20||T_YY,400)=0) THEN 29 else 28 end)||'-FEB-'||T_YY as M_DDATE,
0 as CUMLT_NO_OF_UNITS,0 as CUMLT_COST1,0 as PRICE,0 as TOTAL_NAV, 0 || '%' as MONTHLY_CHANGE,2 as HP_VAL from DPM_PERF where rownum=1 and 0=(select count(*) from DPM_PERF where T_MON='FEB')
union all
select '30-MAR-'||T_YY as M_DDATE,0 as CUMLT_NO_OF_UNITS,0 as CUMLT_COST1,0 as PRICE,0 as TOTAL_NAV, 0 || '%' as MONTHLY_CHANGE,3 as HP_VAL from DPM_PERF where rownum=1 and 0=(select count(*) from DPM_PERF where T_MON='MAR')

    select  
    DECODE(T_MON,'JAN',31,'FEB',

    when SEC.M_SE_SECTOR IN (904,907,901,906,895,898,896,897,911,903,902,905) then (select NVL(M_LIMIT,0) from BAB_SECTOR_LIMIT_REP where M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N and  M_SECTOR='Real Estate')   --'Real Estate'
    when SEC.M_SE_SECTOR IN (509,508,507,506,512,513,530,526,514,521,889,511,516,518,531,523,524,890,525,522,519,529,532,527,515,510,534,533,528) then (select NVL(M_LIMIT,0) from BAB_SECTOR_LIMIT_REP where M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N and  M_SECTOR='Consumer Staples')  --'Consumer Staples'
    when SEC.M_SE_SECTOR IN (562,557,551,547,546,548,563,549,552,564,556,555,558,559,565,566,545,553,554,560,561,567) then (select NVL(M_LIMIT,0) from BAB_SECTOR_LIMIT_REP where M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N and  M_SECTOR='Consumer Discretionary')    --'Consumer Discretionary'
    when SEC.M_SE_SECTOR IN (892,891,579,893,894,581,575,574,908) then (select NVL(M_LIMIT,0) from BAB_SECTOR_LIMIT_REP where M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N and  M_SECTOR='Utilities')  --'Utilities'
    when SEC.M_SE_SECTOR IN (542,535,536,537,538,539,540,543,541) then (select NVL(M_LIMIT,0) from BAB_SECTOR_LIMIT_REP where M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N and  M_SECTOR='Health Care')  --'Health Care'
    when SEC.M_SE_SECTOR IN (482,481,478,500,888,909,477,476,485,483,494,486,910,489,502,484,479,490,480,492,503,493,475,495,496,499,497,498,504) then (select NVL(M_LIMIT,0) from BAB_SECTOR_LIMIT_REP where M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N and  M_SECTOR='Industrials')   --'Industrials'
    when SEC.M_SE_SECTOR IN (615,611,616,612,617,613,610,608,609,614,618,550) then (select NVL(M_LIMIT,0) from BAB_SECTOR_LIMIT_REP where M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N and  M_SECTOR='Information Technology')  --'Information Technology'
    else 0 END)/100)*SEC.M_SE_NOUT,0) - NVL(SEC.M_SE_NOUT,0) as BUFFER_EXCESS_OVER_LIMIT  -- limit-investment cost 
    from TP_ALL_REP TPALL
    left outer join SECURITIES_REP SEC
    ON TPALL.M_INSTRLABEL=SEC.M_SE_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=SEC.M_REF_DATA
    left outer join PL_DETAILED_REP PL
			ON TPALL.M_NB=PL.M_NB AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PL.M_REF_DATA
    where TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N AND TPALL.M_TRN_FMLY='EQD'
    --AND TRIM(SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP) IS NOT NULL and SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP like '%Equity%'
    AND TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD'
) group by INDICATOR1

select 
sectors,
case 
WHEN REGEXP_SUBSTR(Portfolio_Concentration, '.') = '.'
THEN Portfolio_Concentration||' %' else
Portfolio_Concentration||'.000000 %' END as Portfolio_Concentration,  -- ||'.00%' 
Market_Concentration|| '.000000 %' as Market_Concentration,
Limit1|| '.000000 %' as Limit1,
case 
WHEN REGEXP_SUBSTR(Portfolio_Concentration, '.') = '.'
THEN
Round((Limit1-Portfolio_Concentration),6)||' %' else
Round((Limit1-Portfolio_Concentration),6)||'.000000 %' 
END as Unutilized,
case when Portfolio_Concentration<=Limit1 then 'Comply' else 'NonComply' END as Compliance
from 
(
select 'Financials' as sectors,
(select NVL(M_LIMIT,0)   from BAB_SECTOR_LIMIT_REP where M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N and  M_SECTOR='Financial') as Limit1,
(select NVL(M_MKT_CON,0) from BAB_SECTOR_LIMIT_REP where M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N and  M_SECTOR='Financial') as Market_Concentration,
PC as Portfolio_Concentration 
from (
    select case when AMT_SECTORWISE=0 OR AMT_EQ_WHOLE=0 THEN 0 else ROUND((AMT_SECTORWISE/AMT_EQ_WHOLE),6) END as PC from
    (
        select SUM(AMT_SECTORWISE) AMT_SECTORWISE, SUM(AMT_EQ_WHOLE) AMT_EQ_WHOLE 
        from
        (
            select NVL(SUM(TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE),0) as AMT_SECTORWISE,0 as AMT_EQ_WHOLE
            from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP TPALL
            where TRIM(M_TRN_FMLY)='EQD' 
            AND M_SEC_SECTOR IN  (914,584,583,585,600,604,605,594,912,588,586,589,602,592,593,603,606,607,587,590,591,601)

            from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP TPALL
            where  TRIM(M_TRN_FMLY)='EQD'
        )
    )
)

-- Funds Summary Report
select INVESTMENT_TYPE,AMOUNT_INVESTED, MTM, UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS, 
DECODE(AMOUNT_INVESTED,0,0,ROUND(UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS/AMOUNT_INVESTED,6)*100) as UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS_PERTG,
DIVIDENDS_RECEIVED,ALCO_LIMIT, ALCO_LIMIT-AMOUNT_INVESTED as UNUTILIZED, 
--ROUND(decode(AMOUNT_INVESTED,0,0,(ALCO_LIMIT/AMOUNT_INVESTED)*100),0) as UTILIZED_PER
ROUND(AMOUNT_INVESTED/ALCO_LIMIT,6)*100 as UTILIZED_PER
from
(
select INVESTMENT_TYPE,NVL(sum(AMOUNT_INVESTED),0) AMOUNT_INVESTED, NVL(sum(MTM),0) MTM, 
NVL(sum(MTM),0)-NVL(sum(AMOUNT_INVESTED),0) UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS,
sum(DIVIDENDS_RECEIVED) DIVIDENDS_RECEIVED,
sum(ALCO_LIMIT) ALCO_LIMIT  -- Expect to input in millions for ALCO Limit in the user
from
(
--limits
    select 'Murabaha/Equity Mutual Funds' as INVESTMENT_TYPE, 0 as AMOUNT_INVESTED, 0 as MTM, 0  as UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS, 0 as DIVIDENDS_RECEIVED,
    (select sum(M_LIMIT) from BAB_LMT_TRY_LMT_REP where TRIM(M_ASSETCLASS)='Mutual Funds' and TRIM(M_SUB_CLASS) ='Equity Based') as ALCO_LIMIT
    from BAB_LMT_TRY_LMT_REP where rownum=1
union all
    select 'Managed Funds' as INVESTMENT_TYPE, 0 as AMOUNT_INVESTED, 0 as MTM, 0  as UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS, 0 as DIVIDENDS_RECEIVED,
    (select M_LIMIT from BAB_LMT_TRY_LMT_REP where TRIM(M_ASSETCLASS) IN ('Other type of fund')) as ALCO_LIMIT
    from BAB_LMT_TRY_LMT_REP where rownum=1
union all
    select 'Real Estate Funds and REITs' as INVESTMENT_TYPE, 0 as AMOUNT_INVESTED, 0 as MTM, 0  as UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS, 0 as DIVIDENDS_RECEIVED,
    (select M_LIMIT from BAB_LMT_TRY_LMT_REP where TRIM(M_ASSETCLASS) IN ('Real Estate Funds')) as ALCO_LIMIT
    from BAB_LMT_TRY_LMT_REP where rownum=1
union all
    select 'DPM Equity' as INVESTMENT_TYPE, 0 as AMOUNT_INVESTED, 0 as MTM, 0  as UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS, 0 as DIVIDENDS_RECEIVED,
    (select M_LIMIT from BAB_LMT_TRY_LMT_REP where TRIM(M_SUB_CLASS) IN ('DPM Equity')) as ALCO_LIMIT
    from BAB_LMT_TRY_LMT_REP where rownum=1
union all
    select 'Direct Equity' as INVESTMENT_TYPE, 0 as AMOUNT_INVESTED, 0 as MTM, 0  as UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS, 0 as DIVIDENDS_RECEIVED,
    (select M_LIMIT from BAB_LMT_TRY_LMT_REP where TRIM(M_ASSETCLASS) ='Equity - DPM  / Direct Dealing' and M_SUB_CLASS='Local Equity and International Equity') as ALCO_LIMIT
    from BAB_LMT_TRY_LMT_REP where rownum=1
union all
    select 'Unquoted Equity' as INVESTMENT_TYPE, 0 as AMOUNT_INVESTED, 0 as MTM, 0  as UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS, 0 as DIVIDENDS_RECEIVED,
    (select M_LIMIT from BAB_LMT_TRY_LMT_REP where TRIM(M_ASSETCLASS) IN ('Unquoted Equities')) as ALCO_LIMIT

SELECT M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
       M_AS_OF_DATE,
       M_COMPANY,
       M_BRANCH,
       M_GL_PRODUCT,
       M_GL_ACCOUNT,
       M_COUNTERPARTY,
       M_CURRENCY,
       CASE
         WHEN SUM(M_EN_AMT) IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(SUM(M_EN_AMT) AS NUMBER (25,8))
         ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (25,8))
       END M_CLOSING_BALANCE,
       M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
FROM ((SELECT 'MX' AS M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
              M_AS_OF_DATE,
              '01' AS M_COMPANY,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2))
              END M_BRANCH,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3))) < 4 THEN '0000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3))
              END M_GL_PRODUCT,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,4)) IS NULL THEN '00000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,4))
              END M_GL_ACCOUNT,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5))) < 8 THEN '00000000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5))
              END M_COUNTERPARTY,
              M_EN_CUR AS M_CURRENCY,
              CASE
                WHEN M_EN_AMT IS NOT NULL THEN CAST((-1*M_EN_AMT) AS NUMBER (25,8))
                ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (25,8))
              END M_EN_AMT,
              TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') AS M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
       FROM ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP T1
       WHERE /*M_NB_TRN IN (SELECT M_NB_TRN
                         FROM ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP T2
                         WHERE T2.M_SYS_DATE = T2.M_AS_OF_DATE AND T1.M_EN_CUR = T2.M_EN_CUR AND T2.M_FX_O_NB = 0 AND T1.M_EN_CREDIT = T2.M_EN_CREDIT)
				AND*/  T1.M_FX_O_NB = 0)
       UNION ALL
       SELECT 'MX' AS M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
              M_AS_OF_DATE,
              '01' AS M_COMPANY,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2))
              END M_BRANCH,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3))) < 4 THEN '0000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3))
              END M_GL_PRODUCT,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,4)) IS NULL THEN '00000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,4))
              END M_GL_ACCOUNT,
              CASE
                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5))) < 8 THEN '00000000'
                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5))
              END M_COUNTERPARTY,
              M_EN_CUR AS M_CURRENCY,
              CASE
                WHEN M_EN_AMT IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(M_EN_AMT AS NUMBER (25,8))
                ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (25,8))
              END M_EN_AMT,
              TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') AS M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
       FROM ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP T1
       WHERE /*M_NB_TRN IN (SELECT M_NB_TRN
                         FROM ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP T2
                         WHERE T2.M_SYS_DATE = T2.M_AS_OF_DATE AND T1.M_EN_CUR = T2.M_EN_CUR AND T2.M_FX_O_NB = 0 AND T1.M_EN_DEBIT = T2.M_EN_DEBIT)
				AND */  T1.M_FX_O_NB = 0)
GROUP BY M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
         M_AS_OF_DATE,
         M_COMPANY,
         M_BRANCH,
         M_GL_PRODUCT,
         M_GL_ACCOUNT,
         M_COUNTERPARTY,
         M_CURRENCY,
         M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP

WITH IFRS_SECURITY_MASTER as 
(
select 
ISSUE_DATE, MATURITY_DATE, EXCEPTIONAL_RATING, SECURITY_RATING, SEC_INT_RATING, ISSUER,CONTRACT_ID, 
sum(OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT) OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT,
sum(OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT_LCY) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT_LCY,
sum(ACCRUED_INTEREST) ACCRUED_INTEREST,
CURRENCY, PRODUCT, PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION, EXCHANGE_RATE, IFRS9_CLASSIFICATION, sum(OUTSATNDING_PREMIUM_DISCOUNT) OUTSATNDING_PREMIUM_DISCOUNT, SECURITY_CODE
from (
    select
    TPALL.M_NB,
    SEC.M_SE_ISSD as ISSUE_DATE,
    SEC.M_SE_MAT as MATURITY_DATE,
    null as EXCEPTIONAL_RATING,
    null as SECURITY_RATING,
    null as SEC_INT_RATING,
    DECODE(TRIM(PARTIES.M_CIF),'','00000000',TO_CHAR(TRIM(PARTIES.M_CIF))) as ISSUER,
    'SC-'||SEC.M_SE_ISIN as CONTRACT_ID,
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT,
    case 
        when TPALL.M_TP_SECCUR='SAR' then TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL 
        when TPALL.M_TP_SECCUR='KES' then TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*0.03130 
        else TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*DECODE(NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0),0,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0),NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0))
    end as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT_LCY,
    NVL(TPALL.M_TP_RTACR02,0) as ACCRUED_INTEREST,
    TPALL.M_TP_SECCUR as CURRENCY,
   null as PRODUCT,
   'SUKUK.TREASURY' as PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION,
    case 
        when TPALL.M_TP_SECCUR='SAR' then 1 
        when TPALL.M_TP_SECCUR='KES' then 0.03130 
        else DECODE(NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0),0,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0),NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0))
    end as Exchange_Rate,
    'AMC' as IFRS9_CLASSIFICATION,
    CF.M_F_AMOUNT as OUTSATNDING_PREMIUM_DISCOUNT,
    SEC.M_SE_CODE as SECURITY_CODE
    from 
    TP_ALL_REP TPALL
    left join SECURITIES_REP SEC
        ON TPALL.M_TP_SECLBL=SEC.M_SE_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=SEC.M_REF_DATA
    left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
      on TPALL.M_TP_SECISS=PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2
        on SPOT2.M_DATE =TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM) ='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN)=DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_SECCUR),'CNH','CNY',TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_SECCUR))
     left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT22
      on SPOT22.M_DATE =TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_DEN) ='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_NUM)=DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_SECCUR),'CNH','CNY',TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_SECCUR))
      left outer join
      (
          select M_NB,M_REF_DATA,sum(M_F_AMOUNT) M_F_AMOUNT
          from cash_flow_rep where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
          and M_F_TYPELAB0='CAP' and M_F_TYPELAB1='NOM' and M_F_TYPELAB2='DIFF'
          group by M_NB,M_REF_DATA
     ) CF
     on CF.M_NB=TPALL.M_NB and CF.M_REF_DATA=TPALL.M_REF_DATA
    where 
    TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
    and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
    AND TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Sukuk')
 )
 group by ISSUE_DATE, MATURITY_DATE, EXCEPTIONAL_RATING, SECURITY_RATING, SEC_INT_RATING, ISSUER,CONTRACT_ID, 
 CURRENCY, PRODUCT, PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION, EXCHANGE_RATE, IFRS9_CLASSIFICATION, SECURITY_CODE

)
select 

--cast(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY'), 'DD-MM-YYYY') as DATE) AS AS_OF_DATE,
--cast(TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') as TIMESTAMP(9) ) AS INSERT_DATE_TIME,
cast(TRIM(TO_CHAR(ISSUE_DATE,'YYYYMMDD')) as VARCHAR2(10)) as ISSUE_DATE,
cast(TRIM(TO_CHAR(MATURITY_DATE,'YYYYMMDD')) as VARCHAR2(10)) as MATURITY_DATE,
cast(EXCEPTIONAL_RATING as VARCHAR2(5)) as EXCEPTIONAL_RATING,
cast(SECURITY_RATING as VARCHAR2(5)) as SECURITY_RATING,
cast(SEC_INT_RATING as VARCHAR2(5)) as SEC_INT_RATING,
cast(TRIM(ISSUER) as VARCHAR2(20)) as ISSUER,
cast(TRIM(CONTRACT_ID) as VARCHAR2(24)) as CONTRACT_ID, 
cast(OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT as NUMBER(24,2)) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT, 
cast(OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT_LCY as NUMBER(24,2)) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT_LCY, 
cast(ACCRUED_INTEREST as NUMBER(24,6)) as ACCRUED_INTEREST, 
cast(CURRENCY as VARCHAR2(3)) as CURRENCY, 
cast(TRIM(PRODUCT) as VARCHAR2(10)) as PRODUCT, 
cast(TRIM(PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION) as VARCHAR2(20)) as PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION, 
cast(EXCHANGE_RATE as NUMBER(24,6)) as EXCHANGE_RATE, 
cast(TRIM(IFRS9_CLASSIFICATION) as VARCHAR2(5)) as IFRS9_CLASSIFICATION, 
cast(OUTSATNDING_PREMIUM_DISCOUNT as NUMBER(24,6)) as OUTSATNDING_PREMIUM_DISCOUNT, 
cast(TRIM(SECURITY_CODE) as VARCHAR2(20)) as SECURITY_CODE
from IFRS_SECURITY_MASTER

    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  IS_MULTI_FAMILY	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  HEDGED	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  TRANSACTOR_REVOLVER	,
    CAST(NULL AS  VARCHAR2(50)	) AS  CAPFLOOR_INDEX_NAME	,
    CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR2(100)) AS  NPE_DATE	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  FIRST_FORBEARANCE	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  FLAG_TRIGGER_BEFORE	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  FLAG_TRIGGER_AFTER	,
    CAST('MUREX' AS  VARCHAR2(20)	) AS  IMPORT_SOURCE	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  STATUS4EYES	,
    CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR2(100)) AS  FERMAT_ID	,
    CAST(NULL AS  VARCHAR2(16)	) AS  STAGING_SOURCE	,
    CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR2(100)) AS  SCENARIO_ID	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  CHECK_ERROR_NUMBER	,
    CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR2(100)) AS  CHECK_DATETIME	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  CHECK_CONSTRAINTS	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  CHECK_MODE	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  CHECK_ERROR_STATUS	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  CHECK_ERROR_STATUS_G	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  CHECK_ERROR_STATUS_R	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  CHECK_ERROR_STATUS_M	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  CHECK_ERROR_STATUS_A	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  CHECK_ERROR_STATUS_B	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  CHECK_ERROR_STATUS_K	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  CHECK_ERROR_STATUS_S	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  CHECK_ERROR_STATUS_L	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  CHECK_ERROR_STATUS_O	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  CHECK_ERROR_STATUS_T	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  CHECK_ERROR_STATUS_W	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  CHECK_ERROR_STATUS_Y	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  CHECK_ERROR_STATUS_D	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  CHECK_ERROR_STATUS_V	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  CHECK_ERROR_STATUS_X	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  CHECK_ERROR_STATUS_Z	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  CHECK_ERROR_STATUS_F	,
    CAST( null as VARCHAR2(1)	) AS  CHECK_ERROR_STATUS_E	
    FROM
    (select
    TP_RT.M_TP_RTFV0,
    TPALL.M_TP_ACCSCT,--ADDED BY LARA
    TPALL.M_TP_YIELD, --ADDED BY LARA
    TPALL.M_NB as CONTRACT_REFERENCE,
    TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_GID) as F_CONTRACT_REFERENCE,
    NVL(TRIM(TRD_UDF.M_PROD_CODE),'0000') AS CONTRACT_TYPE,
    TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO as CONTRACT_DESC,
    CASE WHEN TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO = 'DPM Murabaha' then TRD_UDF.M_AGENT
    else TRIM(PARTIES.M_CIF) end AS COUNTERPARTY_CODE,
    TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN AS TRADE_DATE,
    TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST AS VALUE_DATE,
    --TPALL.M_TP_DTEPMT as VALUE_DATE,
    TP_RT.M_TP_RTMAT0 as MATURITY_DATE,
    TPALL.M_TP_PRICE as RATE_VALUE,
    TP_RT.M_TP_RTMFRP0,
    case
    when TP_RT.M_TP_RTMFRP0 like '%y%' then 'A'
    when TP_RT.M_TP_RTMFRP0='6m' then 'S'
    when TP_RT.M_TP_RTMFRP0='3m' then 'Q'
    when TP_RT.M_TP_RTMFRP0 like '%m%' or TP_RT.M_TP_RTMFRP0 like '%w%' then 'M'
    else 'N' end as PERIODICITY,
    CAST (4 AS NUMBER(18,2)) as ACCRUAL_BASIS,
    'F' as AMORTIZING_TYPE,
    CF.M_F_VALUE as NEXT_COUPON_DATE,
    case 
    when trim(M_CMP_TYPO) in ('Murabaha Placement','DPM Murabaha','Wakala Placement','RR SAMA','RR Murabaha','RR Waad', 'SAMA Purchase') then TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL
    when trim(M_CMP_TYPO) in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing','Repo SAMA','Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad','Wakala Borrowing CFC','Depo CapFloorCollar') then (-1)*TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL
    else TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL end as NOMINAL,    
    --NVL(TPALL.M_TP_RTACR02,0) as ACCRUALS,
    CASE WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO) IN ('Murabaha Placement','DPM Murabaha','Wakala Placement','RR SAMA','RR Murabaha','RR Waad','SAMA Purchase') THEN ABS(NVL(PLMV.M_ACCRUAL_C,0))
	     			WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO) IN ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing','Repo SAMA','Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad','Wakala Borrowing CFC','Depo CapFloorCollar','CD Issuance') THEN (-1)*ABS(NVL(PLMV.M_ACCRUAL_C,0))
							ELSE ABS(NVL(PLMV.M_ACCRUAL_C,0))	
			END as ACCRUALS,  
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as CURRENCY,
    NULL AS UNPAID_PRINCIPAL,
    NULL AS INTERESTS_AND_CHARGES,
    NULL AS MKT_SPREAD,
    NULL AS FEES,
    --case
    --when TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing','DPM Murabaha')
    --then TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL ELSE -1*TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL END OUTSTANDING,
    case 
    when trim(M_CMP_TYPO) in ('Murabaha Placement','DPM Murabaha','Wakala Placement','RR SAMA','RR Murabaha','RR Waad', 'SAMA Purchase') then TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL
    when trim(M_CMP_TYPO) in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing','Repo SAMA','Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad','Wakala Borrowing CFC','Depo CapFloorCollar') then (-1)*TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL
    else TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL end as OUTSTANDING,
    NULL as ACCRUED_FEES,
    case when TP_RT.M_TP_RTFV0='F' then 'FIXED' else 'FLOATING' END as RATE_TYPE,
    case when TP_RT.M_TP_RTFV0='F' then '' else 
    (
    case when TPALL.M_TP_RTMFRP0 like '%y%' then '0'||UPPER(TRIm(TPALL.M_TP_RTMFRP0))||'00M00D' 
    when TPALL.M_TP_RTMFRP0 like '%m%' then '00Y0'||UPPER(TRIm(TPALL.M_TP_RTMFRP0))||'00D'
    when TPALL.M_TP_RTMFRP0 like '%od%' then '00Y00M01D'
    when TPALL.M_TP_RTMFRP0 like '%w%' then '00Y00M'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(TPALL.M_TP_RTMFRP0,0,1))*7||'D'
    else '00Y00M00D' end
    )
    end as TENOR,
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR||'_LIB_SWAP' as CURVE_NAME,
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR||'_LIB_SWAP' as DISCOUNT_CURVE_NAME,
    PARTIES.M_SECTOR_ID
    from TP_ALL_REP TPALL
    left outer join TRD_UDF_REP TRD_UDF
    				on TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=TRD_UDF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TRD_UDF.M_REF_DATA
    left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
    				on TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP=PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
    left outer join TP_RT_REP TP_RT
    			on TPALL.M_NB=TP_RT.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TP_RT.M_REF_DATA
    left join
    (
       select M_NB,M_F_VALUE
       ,SUM(M_F_AMOUNT) M_F_AMOUNT
            , M_REF_DATA ,M_TP_DTESYS,
       M_F_VALUE-M_TP_DTESYS, rank() OVER (PARTITION BY M_NB ORDER BY M_F_VALUE-M_TP_DTESYS) RANK
       from CASH_FLOW_REP
       where M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN'
       and M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
       and M_F_VALUE>=M_TP_DTESYS
       group by M_NB,M_F_VALUE,M_REF_DATA,M_TP_DTESYS
    ) CF
    			ON TPALL.M_NB=CF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=CF.M_REF_DATA and CF.RANK=2
    left outer join PLA_MV_REP PLMV
    			ON TPALL.M_NB=PLMV.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PLMV.M_REF_DATA

    where
    TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
    and TPALL.M_AMD_STS2 <> 'NA'
    and (TPALL.M_TRN_GRP='LN_BR' or trim(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO) IN ('SGDM','SFRM','RR Waad','Repo Waad','SAMA Purchase'))
    and M_TP_INT='N' and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
    ) A

WITH TDD_FX_GAINS as (
select
M_NB,
M_REP_DATE2,
M_TP_DTETRN,
M_TP_NOMINAL,
M_CMP_TYPO,
M_TP_PFOLIO,
TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN,'MON') TRADE_MON,
TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'MON') REP_MON,
case 
when TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Banknotes') then 'BANK NOTE'
when M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SL_FX%' or M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SAL_FX%' then 'SALES'
when M_CMP_TYPO in ('FX Waad','Spot','FX Murabaha') or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'IB_FX%' then 'FX'
else ' '
end as UNIT_NAME
from TP_ALL_REP  TPALL
where TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YYYY')
and ( 
    --Banknotes
    TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Banknotes','FX Waad','Spot','FX Murabaha')
    --Sales portfolios
    or (TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SL_FX%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SAL_FX%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'IB_FX%')
    and TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO not like 'IB_FX_NOSTRO'
    and TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO not like 'SCF BR%'   
    )
)

select 'YTD Bank Note' as BREAKDOWN,
(select sum(M_TP_NOMINAL)/1000000 from TDD_FX_GAINS where UNIT_NAME='BANK NOTE') REVENUE, 
(select M_TARGETAMOUNT from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where M_REPORTNAME='TDD_FX_GAINS' and M_TARGETMONTH='YTD_BANK_NOTE') Target,'' as MONTH,'' as UNIT_NAME
from TDD_FX_GAINS where rownum=1

union all
select 'YTD SALES' as BREAKDOWN,
(select sum(M_TP_NOMINAL)/1000000 from TDD_FX_GAINS where UNIT_NAME='SALES') REVENUE,
(select M_TARGETAMOUNT from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where M_REPORTNAME='TDD_FX_GAINS' and M_TARGETMONTH='YTD_SALES') Target ,'' as MONTH,'' as UNIT_NAME
from TDD_FX_GAINS where rownum=1
union all
select 'YTD FX UNIT' as BREAKDOWN,
(select sum(M_TP_NOMINAL)/1000000 from TDD_FX_GAINS where UNIT_NAME='FX') REVENUE,
(select M_TARGETAMOUNT from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where M_REPORTNAME='TDD_FX_GAINS' and M_TARGETMONTH='YTD_FX_UNIT') Target ,'' as MONTH,'' as UNIT_NAME
from TDD_FX_GAINS where rownum=1
union all
select 'BY UNIT' as BREAKDOWN,NVL(sum(M_TP_NOMINAL),0)/1000000 M_TP_NOMINAL,0 as Target,MONTH,UNIT_NAME
from
(select M_TP_NOMINAL,TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'MONYYYY') as MONTH,UNIT_NAME
from TDD_FX_GAINS where TRADE_MON=REP_MON
)
group by MONTH,UNIT_NAME
union all
select 'FX_MONTH_PERF' as BREAKDOWN,
(
    (select NVL(sum(M_TP_NOMINAL),0) from TDD_FX_GAINS where UNIT_NAME<>'SALES' and TRADE_MON=REP_MON)
    -
    (select NVL(sum(M_TP_NOMINAL),0) from TDD_FX_GAINS where UNIT_NAME='SALES' and TRADE_MON=REP_MON)
)/1000000 as REVENUE,
(select M_TARGETAMOUNT from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where M_REPORTNAME='TDD_FX_GAINS' and M_TARGETMONTH='FX_MONTH_PERF') as Target,TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'MONYYYY') as MONTH,'' as UNIT_NAME
from
TDD_FX_GAINS where rownum=1
union all
select 'FX_YTD_PERF' as BREAKDOWN,
(
    (select NVL(sum(M_TP_NOMINAL),0) from TDD_FX_GAINS where UNIT_NAME<>'SALES')
    -
    (select NVL(sum(M_TP_NOMINAL),0) from TDD_FX_GAINS where UNIT_NAME='SALES')
)/1000000 as REVENUE,
(select M_TARGETAMOUNT from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where M_REPORTNAME='TDD_FX_GAINS' and M_TARGETMONTH='FX_YTD_PERF') as Target,' ' as MONTH,'' as UNIT_NAME
from
TDD_FX_GAINS where rownum=1

WITH TDD_INVESTMENT as (
    select 
    --TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 as DDATE,
    case 
      when TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO) in ('Sukuk') AND SEC.M_COUNTRY='SA'                           and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR=619              then 'Sukuk Outstanding'---'KSA Sovereign'   -- 619=government
      when TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO) in ('Sukuk') AND SEC.M_COUNTRY IN ('AE','KW','QA','OM','BH')  and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR=619              then 'Sukuk Outstanding'---'GCC Sovereign'   -- 619=government
      when TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO) in ('Sukuk') AND SEC.M_COUNTRY='SA'                           and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR=585              then 'Sukuk Outstanding'---'KSA FI'          -- 585=Banks
      when TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO) in ('Sukuk') AND SEC.M_COUNTRY IN ('AE','KW','QA','OM','BH')  and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR=585              then 'Sukuk Outstanding'---'GCC FI'          -- 585=Banks
      when TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO) in ('Sukuk') AND SEC.M_COUNTRY='SA' and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR NOT IN (585,619)                           then 'Sukuk Outstanding'---'KSA Corporate'   -- Not in governrment & Bank
      when TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO) in ('Sukuk') AND SEC.M_COUNTRY IN ('AE','KW','QA','OM','BH')  and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR NOT IN (585,619) then 'Sukuk Outstanding'---'GCC Corporate'   -- Not in governrment & Bank
      when TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO) in ('Sukuk') AND SEC.M_COUNTRY NOT IN ('SA','AE','KW','QA','OM','BH')                              then 'Sukuk Outstanding'---'International'   -- All international other than SA and GCC
      else 'Investment and Others' 
    end as PRODUCT_TYPE,
    /*(case 
       when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_FMLY)='EQD' then TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE
       when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='BOND' then TPALL.M_TP_IPAY-TPALL.M_TP_ACCAMT
       else TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL 
   end) * (1/1000000) * DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0))) AS  CURRENCY_POS_MIL_SAR,*/
   
			TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL * (1/1000000) * DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0))) as CURRENCY_POS_MIL_SAR,
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL * (1/1000000) * DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0))) as TP_NOMINAL,
    ----TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO,
    TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2,'YY') AS REP_YEAR,
    TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN,'YY') AS TRADE_YEAR,
    ----TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2,'MON') AS REP_MON,
    TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN,'MON') AS TRADE_MON,
    TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN,'MONYY') AS TRADE_MON_YR
    from 
    TP_ALL_REP TPALL
    left outer join SECURITIES_REP SEC  
    				on TPALL.M_TP_SECLBL=SEC.M_SE_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=SEC.M_REF_DATA 
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2
    				on TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT2.M_DATE and TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR=SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN  and SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM='SAR'
			left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT22
    				on TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT22.M_DATE and TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR=SPOT22.M_CCY_NUM  and SPOT22.M_CCY_DEN='SAR'
    
    where
    TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N -- and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
    
    and
    ( 
        TPALL.M_TP_MOPLSTL not like '%RPL_D%' or 
        TPALL.M_TP_MOPLSTL not like '%RPL_M%' or 
        (TPALL.M_TP_MOPLSTL like '%RPL_M%' and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD')
    )
    and
    (
    TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in 
    (
        ---Sukuks
        'Sukuk','Sukuk Fund'--,'Sukuk Issuance',
        --Investments
        ,'DPM Murabaha','Equity DPM'
        ,'LTM','LTM Callable','LTM CapFloor','LTM CapFloorCollar','LTM Collar','LTM Range','LTM Range Callable'
     )
    or 
    --Investments
    TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_FMLY)='EQD'
    or 
    --Investments
    TRIM(SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP) IS NOT NULL
    )
   -- and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2,'YYYY')=TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN,'YYYY')
)

select 'Details' as BREAKDOWN,'Sukuk Outstanding' as PRODUCT_TYPE,
NVL((select sum(CURRENCY_POS_MIL_SAR) from TDD_INVESTMENT where PRODUCT_TYPE='Sukuk Outstanding' and TRADE_YEAR=REP_YEAR),0) NOMINAL, 
NVL((select sum(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='TDD_INVESTMENT_SUK'),0) as TARGET,
0 as Achievement, '' MONTH, 0 as ORDER1

WITH MM_OUTSTANDING as (
    select 
    TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 as DDATE,
    TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO as PRODUCT,
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL* (1/1000000) * DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0))) as NOMINAL,
    TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO,
    TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2,'YY') AS REP_YEAR,
    TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN,'YY') AS TRADE_YEAR,
    TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2,'MON') AS REP_MON,
    TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN,'MON') AS TRADE_MON
    from
    TP_ALL_REP TPALL 
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2
    				on TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT2.M_DATE and TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR=SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN  and SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM='SAR'
			left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT22
    				on TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT22.M_DATE and TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR=SPOT22.M_CCY_NUM  and SPOT22.M_CCY_DEN='SAR'
    where
    TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO in ('IB_BRW_MH_FCY','IB_BRW_MH_LCY','IB_BRW_WK_FCY','IB_BRW_WK_LCY','IB_PLC_MH_FCY','IB_PLC_MH_LCY','IB_PLC_WK_FCY','IB_PLC_WK_LCY')
    and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
    and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
)

select 'Details' as BREAKDOWN,DDATE,PRODUCT,PORTFOLIO_CLOSING, (select M_TARGETAMT from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='TDD_MM_OUTSTANDING' and M_TARGETMON='DAILY') as TARGET,  
ROUND(PORTFOLIO_CLOSING/(select M_TARGETAMT from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='TDD_MM_OUTSTANDING' and M_TARGETMON='DAILY'),2)*100  as Achievements, '' MONTH, 0 as ORDER1
from
(
    select DDATE,PRODUCT,SUM(NOMINAL) PORTFOLIO_CLOSING from MM_OUTSTANDING
    where REP_MON=TRADE_MON
    group by DDATE,PRODUCT
)
union all

select 'OS_VS_TARGET' as BREAKDOWN,DDATE,PRODUCT,PORTFOLIO_CLOSING, (select sum(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='TDD_MM_OUTSTANDING' and M_TARGETMON<>'DAILY') as TARGET,

from
(
    select DDATE,PRODUCT,SUM(NOMINAL) PORTFOLIO_CLOSING from MM_OUTSTANDING
    where REP_YEAR=TRADE_YEAR
    group by DDATE,PRODUCT
)
    union all

WITH TDD_SALES_PERFORMANCE_FCD as ( 
select
M_NB,
M_REP_DATE2,
M_TP_DTETRN,
M_TP_NOMINAL,
M_TP_BUY,
DECODE(M_TP_BUY,'B',M_TP_NOMINAL*-1,0) DEBIT_AMT,
DECODE(M_TP_BUY,'S',M_TP_NOMINAL,0) CREDIT_AMT,
M_CMP_TYPO,
M_TP_PFOLIO,
TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN,'MON') TRADE_MON,
TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN,'YYYY') TRADE_YEAR,
TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'MON') REP_MON
from TP_ALL_REP  TPALL
where TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YYYY')
and ( 
    --Sales portfolios
    (TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SL_FX%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SAL_FX%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'IB_FX%')
    and TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO not like 'IB_FX_NOSTRO'
    and TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO not like 'SCF BR%'   
    )
)

select 'YTD Sales Performance' as BREAKDOWN,PERFORMANCE,PERFORMANCE_CATG,0 as Target,'' as MONTH,order1,null as DDATE,0 as DEBIT, 0 as CREDIT, 0 as NET_DAILY,0 as CLOSING
from
(
 select 
    (select NVL(sum(M_TP_NOMINAL),0)  from TDD_SALES_PERFORMANCE_FCD ) PERFORMANCE, 
    'Performance' as PERFORMANCE_CATG, 1 as order1
    from TDD_SALES_PERFORMANCE_FCD where rownum=1
        union all
    select 
    (
        (select NVL(sum(M_TARGETAMOUNT),0) from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where M_REPORTNAME='TDD_SALES_PERFORMANCE_FCD')
        -
        (select NVL(sum(M_TP_NOMINAL),0)  from TDD_SALES_PERFORMANCE_FCD)
    ) PERFORMANCE,
    'Target' as PERFORMANCE_CATG, 1 as order1
    from TDD_SALES_PERFORMANCE_FCD where rownum=1
)

union all

    from TDD_SALES_PERFORMANCE_FCD where rownum=1
    union all --- OCT
    
     select 
    (select (NVL(sum(DEBIT_AMT),0)+NVL(sum(DEBIT_AMT),0))  from TDD_SALES_PERFORMANCE_FCD where TRADE_MON='NOV') NET_DAILY, 
    (select NVL(M_TARGETAMOUNT,0) from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where M_REPORTNAME='TDD_SALES_PERFORMANCE_FCD' and M_TARGETMONTH='NOV') Target,
    'NOV'||TRADE_YEAR as MONTH , 11 as order1
    from TDD_SALES_PERFORMANCE_FCD where rownum=1
    union all --- NOV
    
     select 
    (select (NVL(sum(DEBIT_AMT),0)+NVL(sum(DEBIT_AMT),0))  from TDD_SALES_PERFORMANCE_FCD where TRADE_MON='DEC') NET_DAILY, 
    (select NVL(M_TARGETAMOUNT,0) from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where M_REPORTNAME='TDD_SALES_PERFORMANCE_FCD' and M_TARGETMONTH='DEC') Target,
    'DEC'||TRADE_YEAR as MONTH , 12 as order1
    from TDD_SALES_PERFORMANCE_FCD where rownum=1
    --------- DEC
)

select
            TPALL.M_NB as TRADE_ID,
            --TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO,
            TPALL.M_INSTRLABEL as SECURITY1,
            TPALL.M_INSTRUMENT as SEC_NAME,
            SEC.M_SE_D_LABEL as DEPOT,
            SEC.M_SE_F_NAME as DEPOT_NAME,
            TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as POSITION,
            DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2,-TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2) as VD_POSITION,
            0 as UNSETT_CR,
            0 as UNSETT_DR,
            ' ' as PEND_RECEIPTS,
            0 as BLOCKED,
            TPALL.M_TP_PRICE as PRICE,
            TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as CCY,
            TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE as VALUE,
            PL.M_PL_CGU2 as UNREALIZED_PNL,
            (TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)-ABS(PL.M_PL_CGU2) as CURR_COST_OF_POSN,
            PL.M_PL_CGU2 as UNREALIZED_PNL_EOD,
            DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2,0,0,
            TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL/DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2,-TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2)) as CURR_AVG_PRICE
            
            from TP_ALL_REP TPALL
            left outer join SECURITIES_REP SEC
                ON TPALL.M_INSTRLABEL=SEC.M_SE_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=SEC.M_REF_DATA
            left outer join PL_DETAILED_REP PL
                ON TPALL.M_NB=PL.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PL.M_REF_DATA
            where TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
            and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'          
            AND TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Equity','Equity DPM','Managed Fund','Sukuk')
           -- AND (TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Equity DPM') or TRIM(SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP) IS NOT NULL)            
            AND TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2
            AND TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'

from 
( 
	select M_ACCOUNT_N,M_ACT_DESC,M_ACT_TYPE,M_AMOUNT,M_CURRENCY,M_SERVICER from 
    (
        select TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)||'_'||TRIM(M_CURRENCY) as M_ACCOUNT_N,'' as M_ACT_DESC,5002 as M_ACT_TYPE,sum(M_AMOUNT) M_AMOUNT,M_CURRENCY,TRIM(M_SERVICER) AS M_SERVICER from BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP
        where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N) is not null and TRIM(M_CURRENCY) is not null
        group by M_ACCOUNT_N,M_CURRENCY,M_SERVICER
    ) MAIN_TAB
    where TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N) is not null and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)<>'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KSA_'
)
NOST_MOODY
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	(SELECT DISTINCT M_KEY,M_ENDDATE,M_MAX ,(SELECT distinct (M_REP_DATE2) FROM BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N) AS M_REPORTING_DATE,M_SECONDKEY
		FROM BAB_NOSTRO_RISK_REP 
		WHERE  M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N --(SELECT MAX(M_REF_DATA) FROM BAB_NOSTRO_RISK_REP)
		AND M_ENDDATE >= ( SELECT distinct (M_REP_DATE2) FROM BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)
	) BAB_NOSTRO_RISK
ON TRIM(BAB_NOSTRO_RISK.M_KEY)=TRIM(NOST_MOODY.M_SERVICER)  and  TRIM(BAB_NOSTRO_RISK.M_SECONDKEY)=TRIM(NOST_MOODY.M_CURRENCY)

select
            TPALL.M_NB as TRADE_ID,
            --TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO,
            TPALL.M_INSTRLABEL as SECURITY1,
            TPALL.M_INSTRUMENT as SEC_NAME,
            SEC.M_SE_D_LABEL as DEPOT,
            SEC.M_SE_F_NAME as DEPOT_NAME,
            TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as POSITION,
            DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2,-TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2) as VD_POSITION,
            0 as UNSETT_CR,
            0 as UNSETT_DR,
            ' ' as PEND_RECEIPTS,
            0 as BLOCKED,
            TPALL.M_TP_PRICE as PRICE,
            TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as CCY,
            TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE as VALUE,
            PL.M_PL_CGU2 as UNREALIZED_PNL,
            (TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)-ABS(PL.M_PL_CGU2) as CURR_COST_OF_POSN,
            PL.M_PL_CGU2 as UNREALIZED_PNL_EOD,
            DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2,0,0,
            TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL/DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2,-TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2)) as CURR_AVG_PRICE
            
            from TP_ALL_REP TPALL
            left outer join SECURITIES_REP SEC
                ON TPALL.M_INSTRLABEL=SEC.M_SE_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=SEC.M_REF_DATA
            left outer join PL_DETAILED_REP PL
                ON TPALL.M_NB=PL.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PL.M_REF_DATA
            where TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
            and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'          
            AND TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Equity','Equity DPM','Managed Fund','Sukuk')
            --AND (TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Equity DPM') or TRIM(SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP) IS NOT NULL)   
            --AND TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN,'MONYY')=TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2,'MONYY')
            AND TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'

WITH TROPS_SUKUK_DAILY as (
    select 
    TPALL.M_INSTRUMENT as SUKUK_NAME,
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as currency,
    TPALL.M_NB as S_M,
    CF.M_F_VALUE as COUPON_DATE,
    CF.M_F_CCRATE as COUPON_PROFIT_RATE,
    SEC.M_SE_ISIN as ISIN,
    TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2 as investment,
    TPALL.M_REP_DATE2,
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*NVL(CF.M_F_CCRATE,0) as COUPON_PROFIT_AMOUNT
    
    from
        TP_ALL_REP TPALL
    left join SECURITIES_REP SEC 
         ON TPALL.M_TP_SECLBL=SEC.M_SE_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=SEC.M_REF_DATA
         left join 
         (  
            select M_NB,M_F_CCRATE,M_F_VALUE,TO_CHAR(M_F_VALUE,'MONYY'),SUM(M_F_AMOUNT) M_F_AMOUNT, M_REF_DATA ,M_TP_DTESYS, 
            M_F_VALUE-M_TP_DTESYS, rank() OVER (PARTITION BY M_NB ORDER BY M_F_VALUE-M_TP_DTESYS) RANK
            from cash_flow_rep 
            where M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN' and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
            and TO_CHAR(M_F_VALUE,'MONYY')=TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTESYS,'MONYY')
            group by M_NB,M_F_VALUE,M_REF_DATA,M_TP_DTESYS,M_F_CCRATE     
         ) CF 
         ON TPALL.M_NB=CF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=CF.M_REF_DATA and CF.RANK=1
    where
       TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD'
      --and TRIM(SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP) IS NOT NULL and SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP IN ('Sukuk Fund')
      and TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Sukuk','Sukuk Fund') --,'Sukuk Issuance')
      AND TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
      --and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD' and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
      --and M_TP_INITSD<>'N'
      )
  
     select SUKUK_NAME,CURRENCY as CCY,S_M,COUPON_DATE,COUPON_PROFIT_RATE,TRIM(ISIN) as ISIN,COUPON_PROFIT_AMOUNT from TROPS_SUKUK_DAILY 
     where 
     --COUPON_PROFIT_AMOUNT!=0 and 
     COUPON_DATE=M_REP_DATE2

SELECT

TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') AS MX_START_TIME,

select 
CAST (M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER  AS CHAR(30))            ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
CAST (''   AS CHAR(30))            SWIFT_ADDRESS,
CAST (M_CURRENCY        AS CHAR(3))             CURRENCY,
CAST (M_CLOSING_BALANCE AS DECIMAL(26,3))       CLOSING_BALANCE, 
CAST (M_OPENING_BALANCE AS DECIMAL(26,3))       OPENING_BALANCE,
CAST (M_2ND_REFERENCE   AS VARCHAR2(24))        SND_REFERENCE,
CAST (M_1ST_REFERENCE   AS VARCHAR2(24))        FST_REFERENCE, 
CAST (M_AMOUNT          AS DECIMAL(26,3))       AMOUNT,
CAST (M_TRADE_DATE      AS DATE)                TRADE_DATE,
CAST (M_BLANK           AS CHAR(5))             BLANK,
CAST (M_VALUE_DATE      AS DATE)                VALUE_DATE,
CAST (M_TYPE            AS VARCHAR2(10))        TYPE,
CAST (M_D_C             AS CHAR(1))             D_C,
CAST (M_DEPARTMENT_CODE AS CHAR(3))             DEPARTMENT_CODE,
CAST (M_TRADE_DATETIME  AS VARCHAR2(30))        TRADE_DATETIME,
CAST (M_CONTRACT        AS DECIMAL(24,0))       CONTRACT,
CAST (MY_RANK           AS DECIMAL(24,0))       MY_RANK
from (
    SELECT 
    M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, M_CURRENCY,
    CASE WHEN MY_RANK=1 THEN CALC_AMT+0  -- GET OPENING BALANCE FOR YESTERDAY
    ELSE CALC_AMT END 
    AS M_CLOSING_BALANCE, 
    
    /*(select NVL(sum(M_AMOUNT),0) from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP WHERE TO_CHAR(M_VALUE_DAT,'YYYYMMDD')='20220806' 
    and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)=TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)) as M_OPENING_BALANCE, */
    
    ---get opening as closing of 6th or migration date
    /*(select sum(M_AMOUNT) from BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP WHERE TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYYMMDD')='20220806' 
    and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)=TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) and TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')) as M_OPENING_BALANCE,*/
    
    (
        select NVL(sum(M_AMOUNT),0) from BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP --- BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP 
        WHERE 
       -- TO_CHAR(M_VALUE_DAT,'YYYYMMDD')=TO_CHAR((select M_REP_DATE2-1 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N),'YYYYMMDD')
        TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYYMMDD')=TO_CHAR((select M_REP_DATE2-1 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N),'YYYYMMDD')
        and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)=TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
        and TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')
        
    ) as M_OPENING_BALANCE,
   ---- -14193643.03 as M_OPENING_BALANCE, 
    M_2ND_REFERENCE, M_1ST_REFERENCE, M_AMOUNT, M_TRADE_DATE, 
    M_BLANK, M_VALUE_DATE, M_TYPE, M_D_C, M_DEPARTMENT_CODE, M_TRADE_DATETIME, M_CONTRACT,MY_RANK
    from 
    (
     select M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, M_CURRENCY, 
     M_CLOSING_BALANCE, M_OPENING_BALANCE, M_2ND_REFERENCE, M_1ST_REFERENCE, M_AMOUNT as CALC_AMT,
     (case when M_AMOUNT<0 then ABS(M_AMOUNT) else -1*ABS(M_AMOUNT) end) as M_AMOUNT, M_TRADE_DATE, 
     M_BLANK, M_VALUE_DATE, M_TYPE, (case when M_AMOUNT<0 then 'C' else 'D' end) M_D_C, M_DEPARTMENT_CODE, M_TRADE_DATETIME, M_CONTRACT,RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER ORDER BY M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_VALUE_DATE,M_CONTRACT) MY_RANK
        from (    
        select M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CURRENCY,sum(M_CLOSING_BALANCE) M_CLOSING_BALANCE,sum(M_OPENING_BALANCE) M_OPENING_BALANCE,
        M_TYPE||M_2ND_REFERENCE as M_2ND_REFERENCE,M_TYPE||M_1ST_REFERENCE as M_1ST_REFERENCE,sum(M_AMOUNT) M_AMOUNT,M_TRADE_DATE,M_BLANK,M_VALUE_DATE,M_TYPE,M_DEPARTMENT_CODE,M_TRADE_DATETIME,M_CONTRACT
        from (
               select --DISTINCT
                M_ACCOUNT_N as M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER
               --,'' as M_SWIFT_ADDRESS
               ,M_CURRENCY as M_CURRENCY
               ,0 as M_CLOSING_BALANCE
               ,0 as M_OPENING_BALANCE
               ,NVL(TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT,NOS.M_ID) as M_2ND_REFERENCE
               ,NVL(TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT,NOS.M_ID) as M_1ST_REFERENCE
               ,M_AMOUNT as M_AMOUNT
               
                ----As per business requirement for entries generated for flows by events eg: Netting-----
                  --,TP_ALL.M_TP_DTESYS as M_TRADE_DATE
                  ,case 
                    when NOS.M_PROD_ID=0 and NOS.M_PRODUCERO=0 then M_VALUE_DAT
                    else TP_ALL.M_TP_DTESYS 
                   end as M_TRADE_DATE
                ----As per business requirement for entries generated for flows by events eg: Netting-----
                     
               ,null as M_BLANK
               ,M_VALUE_DAT as M_VALUE_DATE
                ,case 
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('FT Nostro Nostro') then 'MX'
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Banknotes','Dual Currency Deposit','Spot','SAMA Bill') or M_PRODUCER1 like '%FX%' then 'MXFX'
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad','Murabaha Borrowing','Repo SAMA','RR SAMA','Murabaha Borrowing',
                'Wakala Placement','SAMA Purchase','RR Murabaha','RR Waad','Murabaha Placement','Wakala Borrowing','DPM Murabaha') then 'MXMM'
                when M_PRODUCER1 like '%LTM%' or M_PRODUCER1 like '%Sukuk%' then 'MXFI'
                when M_PRODUCER1 like '%Fund%' or M_PRODUCER1 like '%Equity%' then 'MXEQ'
                when M_PRODUCER1 like '%PRS%' then 'MXIR'
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('SFRM','SGDM') then 'MXIR'       
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Brokerage Fee') then 'MXBR'
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('SCF','SCF BR VAT RC','SCF BR WHT PAY','SCF BR VAT') then 'MXSCF'
                else 'MX' end as M_TYPE
               --,case when M_AMOUNT<0 then 'D' else 'C' end as M_D_C
               ,'999' as M_DEPARTMENT_CODE
               ,TP_ALL.M_TP_DTESYS ||' '||M_TP_TIMSYS as M_TRADE_DATETIME
               ,TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT
              
               from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP NOS,(select distinct M_CONTRACT, M_REF_DATA,M_TP_DTESYS,M_REP_DATE2, M_TP_TIMSYS,M_CNT_SRCMOD from TP_ALL_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N 
               and M_CONTRACT<>1550----- Fix for prod id=0 amd produer0=0
               ) TP_ALL
               where 1=1
               ---and TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT(+)=NOS.M_PROD_ID  -- fix as per pega case C-1226227
               and TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT(+)=DECODE(NOS.M_PROD_ID,0,NOS.M_PRODUCERO,NOS.M_PROD_ID) -- fix as per pega case C-1226227
               and TP_ALL.M_REF_DATA(+)=@MxDataSetKey:N
               and TRIM(NOS.M_BENEFICIA) is not null and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N) is not null 
               and NOS.M_AMOUNT !=0 --and NOS.M_SETTLEMEN in 'SETTLED' 
               and NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N<>'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KS' 
               ---- aggrgate change
              --------------------- to get data from migration data--------------
               /*AND TO_CHAR(M_VALUE_DAT,'YYYYMMDD')<>'20220806' --- since the data migrated on 6th august --- need to change once whole sum data is finalised
               AND M_VALUE_DAT>to_date('06-AUG-22','DD-MON-YY') --- need to change once whole sum data is finalised
               and (M_VALUE_DAT<=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N) or TRIM(TP_ALL.M_REP_DATE2) is null)*/
               -------------------------------------to get data from migration data--------------
               
               ---As per user request neglecting commodity, scf

              
               -- AND TRIM(M_PRODUCER1) not in ('Murabaha Commodity','SCF','SCF BR VAT RC','SCF BR WHT PAY','SCF BR VAT','Collateral','SCF BR WHT NPAY')
												--	ADDED on 04 MAY 2023 for Cash Divident 
               AND NVL(TRIM(M_PRODUCER1),M_PRODUCER1) not in ('Murabaha Commodity','SCF','SCF BR VAT RC','SCF BR WHT PAY','SCF BR VAT','Collateral','SCF BR WHT NPAY')
               ---As per user request neglecting T24 deals and ones which was not picked due to prod id coming as zero
              ----- AND (TRIM(TP_ALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD)<>'T24.NOSTRO')-- or M_PROD_ID=0) --- Fix for prod id=0 amd produer0=0 ---commented for fix
               
               AND (TRIM(TP_ALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD)<>'T24.NOSTRO' or TRIM(TP_ALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD) is null) ----- Fix for prod id=0 amd produer0=0
               
               AND TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')  /*AND TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT<>1550*/ ----- Fix for prod id=0 amd produer0=0
               -------only last EOD data-----
               AND (M_VALUE_DAT=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)) /* or TRIM(TP_ALL.M_REP_DATE2) is null)*/----- Fix for prod id=0 amd produer0=0
               and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)<>'008100000300008' ---Excluding SAMA Nostro
               --and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N) in ('008100018590003')
               and DECODE(NOS.M_PROD_ID,0,NOS.M_PRODUCERO,NOS.M_PROD_ID)<>1550 ----- Fix for prod id=0 amd produer0=0
               -------only last EOD data-----
               ------------------- and TRIM(NOS.M_VALIDATIO)='Settled' --- in ('Released','Settled','TechSettled','InstrToValidate')   
               --and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)='008100014040009' --JPM
               --and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)='008100018830004' ---SCB
               --ORDER BY M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CONTRACT
               
                union all
               
               select 
                M_ACCOUNT_N as M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER
               --,'' as M_SWIFT_ADDRESS
               ,M_CURRENCY as M_CURRENCY
               ,0 as M_CLOSING_BALANCE
               ,0 as M_OPENING_BALANCE
               ,NOS.M_PROD_ID as M_2ND_REFERENCE
               ,NOS.M_PROD_ID as M_1ST_REFERENCE
               ,M_AMOUNT as M_AMOUNT
               ,M_VALUE_DAT as M_TRADE_DATE
               ,null as M_BLANK
               ,M_VALUE_DAT as M_VALUE_DATE ---TP_ALL.M_TP_DTEPMT
              ,'MXCOL' as M_TYPE
               --,case when M_AMOUNT<0 then 'D' else 'C' end as M_D_C
               ,'999' as M_DEPARTMENT_CODE
               ,'' as M_TRADE_DATETIME
               ,NOS.M_PROD_ID
               
               from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP NOS
               where 1=1
               and TRIM(NOS.M_BENEFICIA) is not null and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N) is not null 
               and NOS.M_AMOUNT !=0 
               and NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N<>'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KS'
               ---- aggrgate change
               /* and TO_CHAR(M_VALUE_DAT,'YYYYMMDD')<>'20220806' --- since the data migrated on 6th august
               AND M_VALUE_DAT>to_date('06-AUG-22','DD-MON-YY') --- need to change once whole sum data is finalised
               and M_VALUE_DAT<=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)*/
               ---- aggrgate change
               AND M_VALUE_DAT=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)
               /*AND M_VALUE_DAT<=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)*/
               AND TRIM(M_PRODUCER1) in ('Collateral')
               AND TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')
               and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)<>'008100000300008' -- ---Excluding SAMA Nostro
               --and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N) in ('008100018590003')
               ------------and TRIM(M_VALIDATIO)='Settled' ---- in ('Released','Settled','TechSettled','InstrToValidate')   
               
           )
           group by M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CURRENCY,M_2ND_REFERENCE,M_1ST_REFERENCE,M_TRADE_DATE,M_BLANK,M_VALUE_DATE,M_TYPE,M_DEPARTMENT_CODE,M_TRADE_DATETIME,M_CONTRACT
           )
    )  where M_AMOUNT !=0
    ORDER BY MY_RANK,M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CONTRACT
)
ORDER BY MY_RANK,M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CONTRACT

TRIM(M_DESC): Second intermediate to update closing balances data
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select 
CAST (M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER  AS CHAR(30))            ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
CAST (M_SWIFT_ADDRESS   AS CHAR(30))            SWIFT_ADDRESS,
CAST (M_CURRENCY        AS CHAR(3))             CURRENCY,
CAST (M_CLOSING_BALANCE AS DECIMAL(26,3))       CLOSING_BALANCE, 
CAST (M_OPENING_BALANCE AS DECIMAL(26,3))       OPENING_BALANCE,
CAST (M_SND_REFERENCE   AS VARCHAR2(24))        SND_REFERENCE,
CAST (M_FST_REFERENCE   AS VARCHAR2(24))        FST_REFERENCE, 
CAST (M_AMOUNT          AS DECIMAL(26,3))       AMOUNT,
CAST (M_TRADE_DATE      AS DATE)                TRADE_DATE,
CAST (M_BLANK           AS CHAR(5))             BLANK,
CAST (M_VALUE_DATE      AS DATE)                VALUE_DATE,
CAST (M_TYPE            AS VARCHAR2(10))        TYPE,
CAST (M_D_C             AS CHAR(1))             D_C,
CAST (M_DEPARTMENT_CODE AS CHAR(3))             DEPARTMENT_CODE,
CAST (M_TRADE_DATETIME  AS VARCHAR2(30))        TRADE_DATETIME,
CAST (M_CONTRACT        AS DECIMAL(24,0))       CONTRACT,
CAST (M_MY_RANK         AS DECIMAL(24,0))       MY_RANK
from (
 select T1.M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, T1.M_SWIFT_ADDRESS, T1.M_CURRENCY,  T1.M_CLOSING_BALANCE,
    case when T1.M_MY_RANK=1 then T1.M_OPENING_BALANCE
    else (
       T1.M_OPENING_BALANCE+
       (SELECT NVL(SUM(M_CLOSING_BALANCE),0) FROM MX_NOSTRO_RECON_T1_REP T2 WHERE T2.M_MY_RANK<T1.M_MY_RANK AND T2.M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER=T1.M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
    )  end as M_OPENING_BALANCE, 
    T1.M_SND_REFERENCE, T1.M_FST_REFERENCE, T1.M_AMOUNT, T1.M_TRADE_DATE, 
    T1.M_BLANK, T1.M_VALUE_DATE, T1.M_TYPE, T1.M_D_C, T1.M_DEPARTMENT_CODE, T1.M_TRADE_DATETIME, T1.M_CONTRACT,T1.M_MY_RANK
    from MX_NOSTRO_RECON_T1_REP T1 --where M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER='008108118830444'
    ORDER BY T1.M_MY_RANK,T1.M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,T1.M_CONTRACT
)
ORDER BY M_MY_RANK,M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CONTRACT

select 
--cast(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY'), 'DD-MM-YYYY') as DATE) AS AS_OF_DATE,
--cast(TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') as TIMESTAMP(9) ) AS INSERT_DATE_TIME,

CAST (M_SND_REFERENCE   AS VARCHAR2(24))        SND_REFERENCE,
CAST (M_FST_REFERENCE   AS VARCHAR2(24))        FST_REFERENCE, 
CAST (M_AMOUNT          AS DECIMAL(26,3))       AMOUNT,
CAST (M_TRADE_DATE      AS DATE)                TRADE_DATE,
CAST (M_BLANK           AS CHAR(5))             BLANK,
CAST (M_VALUE_DATE      AS DATE)                VALUE_DATE,
CAST (M_TYPE            AS VARCHAR2(10))        TYPE,
CAST (M_D_C             AS CHAR(1))             D_C,
CAST (M_DEPARTMENT_CODE AS CHAR(3))             DEPARTMENT_CODE,
CAST (M_TRADE_DATETIME  AS VARCHAR2(30))        TRADE_DATETIME,
CAST (M_CONTRACT        AS DECIMAL(24,0))       CONTRACT,
CAST (M_MY_RANK           AS DECIMAL(24,0))       MY_RANK
from (
             select M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
										M_SWIFT_ADDRESS, M_CURRENCY, 
             M_OPENING_BALANCE+M_CLOSING_BALANCE as M_CLOSING_BALANCE,
             M_OPENING_BALANCE,
             M_SND_REFERENCE, M_FST_REFERENCE, M_AMOUNT, M_TRADE_DATE, 
             M_BLANK, M_VALUE_DATE, M_TYPE, M_D_C, M_DEPARTMENT_CODE, M_TRADE_DATETIME, M_CONTRACT,M_MY_RANK
             from MX_NOSTRO_RECON_T2_REP --where M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER='008108118830444'
             ORDER BY M_MY_RANK,M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CONTRACT
)
--where SUBSTR(TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER),0,3)='008'
ORDER BY M_MY_RANK,M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CONTRACT
