TRIM(M_DESC): sql to generate the IFRS MM Report
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
WITH IFRS_MM_MONEY_MARKET as 
(
    select 
        DECODE(TRIM(PARTIES.M_CIF),'','0000000000',PARTIES.M_CIF) as CUSTOMER_ID,
        ---NVL(MON_CF.MON_AMT,0) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT, --ledger Balance
        ---DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,'SAR',NVL(MON_CF.MON_AMT,0),'KES',NVL(MON_CF.MON_AMT,0)*0.03130,NVL(MON_CF.MON_AMT,0)*NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT22.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT22.M_MID)))) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT_LCY, --ledger Balance in SAR
        NVL(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,0) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT,
        DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,'SAR',NVL(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,0),'KES',NVL(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,0)*0.03130,NVL(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,0)*NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT22.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT22.M_MID)))) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT_LCY,        
        TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as CURRENCY,
        DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO),'SAMA Bill',1120,'Murabaha Placement',1135,'Wakala Placement',1145,'DPM Murabaha',1140,'LTM',1305,'RR SAMA',1105) as CATEGORY,
        ABS(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE))  as INTEREST_RATE,
        TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN,'YYYYMMDD') as VALUE_DATE,
        TO_CHAR(TP_RT.M_TP_RTMAT0,'YYYYMMDD')  as MATURITY_DATE,
        'MM-'||TPALL.M_NB AS CONTRACT_ID,
        NVL(TPALL.M_TP_RTACR02,0) as ACCRUED_INTEREST,
        DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO),'SAMA Bill',1120,'Murabaha Placement',1135,'Wakala Placement',1145,'DPM Murabaha',1140,'LTM',1305,'RR SAMA',1105) AS PRODUCT,
        TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO AS PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION,
        DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,'SAR',1,'KES',0.03130,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT22.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT22.M_MID)))) AS EXCHANGE_RATE,
        'AMC' AS IFRS9_CLASSIFICATION,
        NULL as CCF
    from 
    TP_ALL_REP TPALL
    left outer join TP_RT_REP TP_RT
    		ON TPALL.M_NB=TP_RT.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TP_RT.M_REF_DATA
   /* left outer join (    
        select sum(M_EN_AMT) MON_AMT,M_NB_TRN from ACC_ENTRIES_REP 
        where M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalData_ACC_DAILY:N
        group by M_NB_TRN
    ) MON_CF
        ON TPALL.M_NB=MON_CF.M_NB_TRN ---and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=MON_CF.M_REF_DATA
        */
    left outer join TRD_UDF_REP TRD_UDF
        ON TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=TRD_UDF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TRD_UDF.M_REF_DATA
    left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
        on TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP=PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2    
        on SPOT2.M_DATE=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM)='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN)=DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'CNH','CNY',TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR))
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT22    
        on SPOT22.M_DATE=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_DEN)='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_NUM)=DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'CNH','CNY',TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR))

    where 
    TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
    and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N' and TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN<=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and TP_RT.M_TP_RTMAT0>=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2
    AND TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ( 'SAMA Bill','Murabaha Placement','Wakala Placement','DPM Murabaha','LTM','RR SAMA')
)
select 
 			cast(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY'), 'DD-MM-YYYY') as DATE) AS AS_OF_DATE,
    cast(TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') as TIMESTAMP(9) )AS INSERT_DATE_TIME,
			cast(TRIM(CUSTOMER_ID) as VARCHAR2(50)) as CUSTOMER_ID,
    cast(OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT as NUMBER(24,2)) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT,
    cast(OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT_LCY as NUMBER(24,2)) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT_LCY,
    cast(TRIM(CURRENCY) as VARCHAR2(3)) as CURRENCY,
    cast(TRIM(CATEGORY) as VARCHAR2(10)) as CATEGORY,
    cast(INTEREST_RATE as NUMBER(24,6)) as INTEREST_RATE,
    cast(TRIM(VALUE_DATE) as VARCHAR2(10)) as VALUE_DATE,
    cast(TRIM(MATURITY_DATE) as VARCHAR2(10)) as MATURITY_DATE,
    cast(TRIM(CONTRACT_ID) as VARCHAR2(30)) as CONTRACT_ID,
    cast(ACCRUED_INTEREST as NUMBER(24,6)) as ACCRUED_INTEREST,
    cast(TRIM(PRODUCT) as VARCHAR2(10)) as PRODUCT,
    cast(TRIM(PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION) as VARCHAR2(50)) as PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION,
    cast(EXCHANGE_RATE as NUMBER(24,6)) as EXCHANGE_RATE,
    cast(TRIM(IFRS9_CLASSIFICATION) as VARCHAR2(10)) as IFRS9_CLASSIFICATION
   -- cast(CCF as VARCHAR2(10)) as CCF
from IFRS_MM_MONEY_MARKET

select 
CAST (M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER  AS CHAR(30))            ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
CAST (''   AS CHAR(30))            SWIFT_ADDRESS,
CAST (M_CURRENCY        AS CHAR(3))             CURRENCY,
CAST (M_CLOSING_BALANCE AS DECIMAL(26,3))       CLOSING_BALANCE, 
CAST (M_OPENING_BALANCE AS DECIMAL(26,3))       OPENING_BALANCE,
CAST (M_2ND_REFERENCE   AS VARCHAR2(24))        SND_REFERENCE,
CAST (M_1ST_REFERENCE   AS VARCHAR2(24))        FST_REFERENCE, 
CAST (M_AMOUNT          AS DECIMAL(26,3))       AMOUNT,
CAST (M_TRADE_DATE      AS DATE)                TRADE_DATE,
CAST (M_BLANK           AS CHAR(5))             BLANK,
CAST (M_VALUE_DATE      AS DATE)                VALUE_DATE,
CAST (M_TYPE            AS VARCHAR2(10))        TYPE,
CAST (M_D_C             AS CHAR(1))             D_C,
CAST (M_DEPARTMENT_CODE AS CHAR(3))             DEPARTMENT_CODE,
CAST (M_TRADE_DATETIME  AS VARCHAR2(30))        TRADE_DATETIME,
CAST (M_CONTRACT        AS DECIMAL(24,0))       CONTRACT,
CAST (MY_RANK           AS DECIMAL(24,0))       MY_RANK
from (
    SELECT 
    M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, M_CURRENCY,
    CASE WHEN MY_RANK=1 THEN CALC_AMT+0  -- GET OPENING BALANCE FOR YESTERDAY
    ELSE CALC_AMT END 
    AS M_CLOSING_BALANCE, 
    
    /*(select NVL(sum(M_AMOUNT),0) from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP WHERE TO_CHAR(M_VALUE_DAT,'YYYYMMDD')='20220806' 
    and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)=TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)) as M_OPENING_BALANCE, */
    
    ---get opening as closing of 6th or migration date
    /*(select sum(M_AMOUNT) from BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP WHERE TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYYMMDD')='20220806' 
    and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)=TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) and TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')) as M_OPENING_BALANCE,*/
    
    (
        select NVL(sum(M_AMOUNT),0) from BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP --- BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP 
        WHERE 
       -- TO_CHAR(M_VALUE_DAT,'YYYYMMDD')=TO_CHAR((select M_REP_DATE2-1 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N),'YYYYMMDD')
        TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYYMMDD')=TO_CHAR((select M_REP_DATE2-1 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N),'YYYYMMDD')
        and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)=TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
        and TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')
        
    ) as M_OPENING_BALANCE,
   ---- -14193643.03 as M_OPENING_BALANCE, 
    M_2ND_REFERENCE, M_1ST_REFERENCE, M_AMOUNT, M_TRADE_DATE, 
    M_BLANK, M_VALUE_DATE, M_TYPE, M_D_C, M_DEPARTMENT_CODE, M_TRADE_DATETIME, M_CONTRACT,MY_RANK
    from 
    (
     select M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, M_CURRENCY, 
     M_CLOSING_BALANCE, M_OPENING_BALANCE, M_2ND_REFERENCE, M_1ST_REFERENCE, M_AMOUNT as CALC_AMT,
     (case when M_AMOUNT<0 then ABS(M_AMOUNT) else -1*ABS(M_AMOUNT) end) as M_AMOUNT, M_TRADE_DATE, 
     M_BLANK, M_VALUE_DATE, M_TYPE, (case when M_AMOUNT<0 then 'C' else 'D' end) M_D_C, M_DEPARTMENT_CODE, M_TRADE_DATETIME, M_CONTRACT,RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER ORDER BY M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_VALUE_DATE,M_CONTRACT) MY_RANK
        from (    
        select M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CURRENCY,sum(M_CLOSING_BALANCE) M_CLOSING_BALANCE,sum(M_OPENING_BALANCE) M_OPENING_BALANCE,
        M_TYPE||M_2ND_REFERENCE as M_2ND_REFERENCE,M_TYPE||M_1ST_REFERENCE as M_1ST_REFERENCE,sum(M_AMOUNT) M_AMOUNT,M_TRADE_DATE,M_BLANK,M_VALUE_DATE,M_TYPE,M_DEPARTMENT_CODE,M_TRADE_DATETIME,M_CONTRACT
        from (
               select --DISTINCT
                M_ACCOUNT_N as M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER
               --,'' as M_SWIFT_ADDRESS
               ,M_CURRENCY as M_CURRENCY
               ,0 as M_CLOSING_BALANCE
               ,0 as M_OPENING_BALANCE
               ,NVL(TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT,NOS.M_ID) as M_2ND_REFERENCE
               ,NVL(TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT,NOS.M_ID) as M_1ST_REFERENCE
               ,M_AMOUNT as M_AMOUNT
               ,TP_ALL.M_TP_DTESYS as M_TRADE_DATE
               ,null as M_BLANK
               ,M_VALUE_DAT as M_VALUE_DATE
                ,case 
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('FT Nostro Nostro') then 'MX'
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Banknotes','Dual Currency Deposit','Spot','SAMA Bill') or M_PRODUCER1 like '%FX%' then 'MXFX'
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad','Murabaha Borrowing','Repo SAMA','RR SAMA','Murabaha Borrowing',
                'Wakala Placement','SAMA Purchase','RR Murabaha','RR Waad','Murabaha Placement','Wakala Borrowing','DPM Murabaha') then 'MXMM'
                when M_PRODUCER1 like '%LTM%' or M_PRODUCER1 like '%Sukuk%' then 'MXFI'
                when M_PRODUCER1 like '%Fund%' or M_PRODUCER1 like '%Equity%' then 'MXEQ'
                when M_PRODUCER1 like '%PRS%' then 'MXIR'
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('SFRM','SGDM') then 'MXIR'       
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Brokerage Fee') then 'MXBR'
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('SCF','SCF BR VAT RC','SCF BR WHT PAY','SCF BR VAT') then 'MXSCF'
                else 'MX' end as M_TYPE
               --,case when M_AMOUNT<0 then 'D' else 'C' end as M_D_C
               ,'999' as M_DEPARTMENT_CODE
               ,TP_ALL.M_TP_DTESYS ||' '||M_TP_TIMSYS as M_TRADE_DATETIME
               ,TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT
              
               from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP NOS,(select distinct M_CONTRACT, M_REF_DATA,M_TP_DTESYS,M_REP_DATE2, M_TP_TIMSYS,M_CNT_SRCMOD from TP_ALL_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N 
               and M_CONTRACT<>1550----- Fix for prod id=0 amd produer0=0
               ) TP_ALL
               where 1=1
               ---and TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT(+)=NOS.M_PROD_ID  -- fix as per pega case C-1226227
               and TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT(+)=DECODE(NOS.M_PROD_ID,0,NOS.M_PRODUCERO,NOS.M_PROD_ID) -- fix as per pega case C-1226227
               and TP_ALL.M_REF_DATA(+)=@MxDataSetKey:N
               and TRIM(NOS.M_BENEFICIA) is not null and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N) is not null 
               and NOS.M_AMOUNT !=0 --and NOS.M_SETTLEMEN in 'SETTLED' 
               and NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N<>'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KS' 
               ---- aggrgate change
              --------------------- to get data from migration data--------------
               /*AND TO_CHAR(M_VALUE_DAT,'YYYYMMDD')<>'20220806' --- since the data migrated on 6th august --- need to change once whole sum data is finalised
               AND M_VALUE_DAT>to_date('06-AUG-22','DD-MON-YY') --- need to change once whole sum data is finalised
               and (M_VALUE_DAT<=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N) or TRIM(TP_ALL.M_REP_DATE2) is null)*/
               -------------------------------------to get data from migration data--------------
               
               ---As per user request neglecting commodity, scf
               AND TRIM(M_PRODUCER1) not in ('Murabaha Commodity','SCF','SCF BR VAT RC','SCF BR WHT PAY','SCF BR VAT','Collateral','SCF BR WHT NPAY')
               ---As per user request neglecting T24 deals and ones which was not picked due to prod id coming as zero
              ----- AND (TRIM(TP_ALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD)<>'T24.NOSTRO')-- or M_PROD_ID=0) --- Fix for prod id=0 amd produer0=0 ---commented for fix
               
               AND (TRIM(TP_ALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD)<>'T24.NOSTRO' or TRIM(TP_ALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD) is null) ----- Fix for prod id=0 amd produer0=0
               
               AND TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')  /*AND TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT<>1550*/ ----- Fix for prod id=0 amd produer0=0
               -------only last EOD data-----
               AND (M_VALUE_DAT=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)) /* or TRIM(TP_ALL.M_REP_DATE2) is null)*/----- Fix for prod id=0 amd produer0=0
               and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)<>'008100000300008' ---Excluding SAMA Nostro
               and DECODE(NOS.M_PROD_ID,0,NOS.M_PRODUCERO,NOS.M_PROD_ID)<>1550 ----- Fix for prod id=0 amd produer0=0
               -------only last EOD data-----
               ------------------- and TRIM(NOS.M_VALIDATIO)='Settled' --- in ('Released','Settled','TechSettled','InstrToValidate')   
               --and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)='008100014040009' --JPM
               --and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)='008100018830004' ---SCB
               --ORDER BY M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CONTRACT
               
                union all
               
               select 
                M_ACCOUNT_N as M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER
               --,'' as M_SWIFT_ADDRESS
               ,M_CURRENCY as M_CURRENCY
               ,0 as M_CLOSING_BALANCE
               ,0 as M_OPENING_BALANCE
               ,NOS.M_PROD_ID as M_2ND_REFERENCE
               ,NOS.M_PROD_ID as M_1ST_REFERENCE
               ,M_AMOUNT as M_AMOUNT
               ,null as M_TRADE_DATE
               ,null as M_BLANK
               ,M_VALUE_DAT as M_VALUE_DATE ---TP_ALL.M_TP_DTEPMT
              ,'MXCOL' as M_TYPE
               --,case when M_AMOUNT<0 then 'D' else 'C' end as M_D_C
               ,'999' as M_DEPARTMENT_CODE
               ,'' as M_TRADE_DATETIME
               ,NOS.M_PROD_ID
               
               from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP NOS
               where 1=1
               and TRIM(NOS.M_BENEFICIA) is not null and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N) is not null 
               and NOS.M_AMOUNT !=0 
               and NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N<>'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KS'
               ---- aggrgate change
               /* and TO_CHAR(M_VALUE_DAT,'YYYYMMDD')<>'20220806' --- since the data migrated on 6th august
               AND M_VALUE_DAT>to_date('06-AUG-22','DD-MON-YY') --- need to change once whole sum data is finalised
               and M_VALUE_DAT<=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)*/
               ---- aggrgate change
               AND M_VALUE_DAT=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)
               /*AND M_VALUE_DAT<=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)*/
               AND TRIM(M_PRODUCER1) in ('Collateral')
               AND TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')
               and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)<>'008100000300008' -- ---Excluding SAMA Nostro
               ------------and TRIM(M_VALIDATIO)='Settled' ---- in ('Released','Settled','TechSettled','InstrToValidate')   
               
           )
           group by M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CURRENCY,M_2ND_REFERENCE,M_1ST_REFERENCE,M_TRADE_DATE,M_BLANK,M_VALUE_DATE,M_TYPE,M_DEPARTMENT_CODE,M_TRADE_DATETIME,M_CONTRACT
           )
    )  where M_AMOUNT !=0
    ORDER BY MY_RANK,M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CONTRACT
)
ORDER BY MY_RANK,M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CONTRACT

select 
CAST (STMT_TYPE          AS VARCHAR2(30))           STMT_TYPE,
CAST (ACCOUNT_NUMBER     AS VARCHAR2(30))           ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
CAST (BOOKING_DATE       AS VARCHAR2(8))            BOOKING_DATE,
CAST (VALUE_DATE         AS VARCHAR2(8))            VALUE_DATE,
CAST (AMOUNT             AS DECIMAL(24,2))          AMOUNT,
CAST (DC_MARK            AS VARCHAR2(1))            DC_MARK,
CAST (CURRENCY           AS VARCHAR2(3))            CURRENCY,
CAST (REFERENCE1         AS VARCHAR2(30))           REFERENCE1,
CAST (REFERENCE2         AS VARCHAR2(30))           REFERENCE2,
CAST (REFERENCE3         AS VARCHAR2(30))           REFERENCE3,
CAST (NARRATIVE1         AS VARCHAR2(30))           NARRATIVE1,
CAST (NARRATIVE2         AS VARCHAR2(30))           NARRATIVE2,
CAST (NARRATIVE3         AS VARCHAR2(30))           NARRATIVE3,
CAST (NARRATIVE4         AS VARCHAR2(30))           NARRATIVE4,
CAST (TRANS_TYPE_ID_CODE AS VARCHAR2(30))           TRANS_TYPE_ID_CODE,
CAST (NARRATIVE5         AS VARCHAR2(30))           NARRATIVE5,
CAST (NARRATIVE6         AS VARCHAR2(30))           NARRATIVE6

from (
   
   select
       'OPENING' as STMT_TYPE
       ,'008100000300008' as ACCOUNT_NUMBER
       ,TO_CHAR(BOOK_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') as BOOKING_DATE
       ,'' as VALUE_DATE
       ,(case when OPEN_AMT<0 then ABS(OPEN_AMT) else -1*ABS(OPEN_AMT) end) as AMOUNT
       ,(case when OPEN_AMT<0 then 'C' else 'D' end) as DC_MARK
       ,M_CURRENCY as CURRENCY
       ,'' as  REFERENCE1
       ,'' as REFERENCE2
       ,'' as REFERENCE3
       ,'' as NARRATIVE1
       ,'' as NARRATIVE2
       ,'' as NARRATIVE3
       ,'' as NARRATIVE4
       ,'' as TRANS_TYPE_ID_CODE
       ,'' as NARRATIVE5
       ,'' as NARRATIVE6
   from 
   ( 
   select NVL(sum(M_AMOUNT),0) as OPEN_AMT,M_REP_DATE2+1 as BOOK_DATE,M_CURRENCY
   from BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP
   where 
   TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)='008100000300008'
   AND M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalData_MLC_BAB:N and TRIM(M_CURRENCY)='SAR'
   group by M_REP_DATE2,M_CURRENCY
   )
   
   union all
   
   select
       'STMT' as STMT_TYPE
       ,'008100000300008' as ACCOUNT_NUMBER
       ,TO_CHAR((case 
           when NOS.M_PROD_ID=0 and NOS.M_PRODUCERO=0 then NOS.M_VALUE_DAT
           else NVL(TP_ALL.M_TP_DTETRN,NOS.M_VALUE_DAT)
           end),'YYYYMMDD') as BOOKING_DATE
       ,TO_CHAR(NOS.M_VALUE_DAT,'YYYYMMDD') as VALUE_DATE
       ,(case when NOS.M_AMOUNT<0 then ABS(NOS.M_AMOUNT) else -1*ABS(NOS.M_AMOUNT) end) as AMOUNT
       ,(case when NOS.M_AMOUNT<0 then 'C' else 'D' end) as DC_MARK
       ,NOS.M_CURRENCY as CURRENCY
       ,case 
                       when NOS.M_PRODUCER1 IN ('FT Nostro Nostro') then 'MX'
                       when NOS.M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Banknotes','Dual Currency Deposit','Spot','SAMA Bill') or M_PRODUCER1 like '%FX%' then 'MXFX'
                       when NOS.M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad','Murabaha Borrowing','Repo SAMA','RR SAMA','Murabaha Borrowing',
                       'Wakala Placement','SAMA Purchase','RR Murabaha','RR Waad','Murabaha Placement','Wakala Borrowing','DPM Murabaha') then 'MXMM'
                       when NOS.M_PRODUCER1 like '%LTM%' or M_PRODUCER1 like '%Sukuk%' then 'MXFI'
                       when NOS.M_PRODUCER1 like '%Fund%' or M_PRODUCER1 like '%Equity%' then 'MXEQ'
                       when NOS.M_PRODUCER1 like '%PRS%' then 'MXIR'
                       --when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('DPM Murabaha','SFRM','SGDM') then 'MXIR'   
                       when NOS.M_PRODUCER1 IN ('SFRM','SGDM') then 'MXIR'       
                       when NOS.M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Brokerage Fee') then 'MXBR'
                       when NOS.M_PRODUCER1 IN ('SCF','SCF BR VAT RC','SCF BR WHT PAY','SCF BR VAT') then 'MXSCF'
                       when NOS.M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Collateral') then 'MXCOL'
                       else 'MX' end || NVL(TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT,NOS.M_ID) as  REFERENCE1
       ,UTI_DATA.M_UTI_REF as REFERENCE2
       ,'SAMASARIXXX' as REFERENCE3
       ,'' as NARRATIVE1
       ,'' as NARRATIVE2
       ,'Murex Outgoing' as NARRATIVE3
       --- default set of accounts as per the finace user request
       ,case 
       when NOS.M_AMOUNT>0 then 
       DECODE(TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_V_BEN_ACC),'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KSA','DUMMYNOSTROKSA','','008100000300024',TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_V_BEN_ACC))
       --NVL(TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_V_BEN_ACC),'008100000300024') 
       else 
       --NVL(TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_N_CSNS_ACC),'008100000300008') 
       DECODE(TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_N_CSNS_ACC),'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KSA','DUMMYNOSTROKSA','','008100000300008',TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_N_CSNS_ACC))
       end as NARRATIVE4 --Debit Account number
       ,'MUREX' as TRANS_TYPE_ID_CODE
       --- default set of accounts as per the finace user request
       ,case when NOS.M_AMOUNT<0 then 
       NVL(TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_V_BEN_ACC),'008100000300024') 
       --DECODE(TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_V_BEN_ACC),'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KSA','DUMMYNOSTROKSA','','008100000300024',TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_V_BEN_ACC))
       else 
       NVL(TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_N_CSNS_ACC),'008100000300008') 
       --DECODE(TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_N_CSNS_ACC),'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KSA','DUMMYNOSTROKSA','','008100000300008',TRIM(DLV_CASH.M_N_CSNS_ACC))
       end as NARRATIVE5 --Credit Account number
       ,UTI_DATA.M_UTI_REF as NARRATIVE6
   
   from 
   (
       select * from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP 
       where 
       TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)='008100000300008' and M_AMOUNT !=0 
       and TRIM(M_BENEFICIA) is not null and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N) is not null 
       AND TRIM(M_PRODUCER1) not in ('Murabaha Commodity','SCF','SCF BR VAT RC','SCF BR WHT PAY','SCF BR VAT','SCF BR WHT NPAY')
       AND TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')
       AND M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
   ) NOS, 
   (
       select distinct M_CONTRACT, M_REF_DATA,M_TP_DTETRN,M_REP_DATE2, M_TP_TIMSYS,M_CNT_SRCMOD 
       from TP_ALL_REP 
       where 
       M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalData_BAB_KSA:N
       AND (TRIM(M_CNT_SRCMOD)<>'T24.NOSTRO' or TRIM(M_CNT_SRCMOD) is null)
   ) TP_ALL,
   (
   select M_DEAL_REF,M_FC_ID,M_UTI_REF from STPDOC_ENTRY_UTI_REP where 
   M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalData_BAB_KSA:N
   ) UTI_DATA,
   (
       select 
       M_DF_OREF, M_DF_CNTREF as Contract_Id,M_DF_TRDREF as TradeID,M_DF_QTY, --,M_V_INT1_LBL,M_V_INT1_SWF,
       regexp_replace(M_N_CSNS_ACC,'_|-|/','') M_N_CSNS_ACC,M_N_CSNS_LBL, M_N_CSNS_SWF,
       regexp_replace(M_V_BEN_ACC,'_|-|/','') M_V_BEN_ACC,M_V_BEN_LBL,M_V_BEN_SWF from  ACC_DLV_CASH_REP
       where  M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalData_ACC_DAILY:N
   ) DLV_CASH
   
   where 
   1=1
   and TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT(+)=DECODE(NOS.M_PROD_ID,0,NOS.M_PRODUCERO,NOS.M_PROD_ID)
   and (
      NOS.M_VALUE_DAT=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalData_BAB_KSA:N
      ) --or TRIM(TP_ALL.M_REP_DATE2) is null
   )
   and UTI_DATA.M_FC_ID(+)=DECODE(NOS.M_PROD_ID,0,NOS.M_PRODUCERO,NOS.M_PROD_ID)
   and DLV_CASH.Contract_Id(+)=DECODE(NOS.M_PROD_ID,0,NOS.M_PRODUCERO,NOS.M_PROD_ID)
   and DLV_CASH.M_DF_QTY(+)=ABS(NOS.M_AMOUNT)
   and DLV_CASH.M_DF_OREF(+)=NOS.M_ID 
   
   union all
   
   select
       'CLOSING' as STMT_TYPE
       ,'008100000300008' as ACCOUNT_NUMBER
       ,TO_CHAR(BOOK_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') as BOOKING_DATE
       ,'' as VALUE_DATE
       ,(case when OPEN_AMT<0 then ABS(OPEN_AMT) else -1*ABS(OPEN_AMT) end) as AMOUNT
       ,(case when OPEN_AMT<0 then 'C' else 'D' end) as DC_MARK
       ,M_CURRENCY as CURRENCY
       ,'' as  REFERENCE1
       ,'' as REFERENCE2
       ,'' as REFERENCE3
       ,'' as NARRATIVE1
       ,'' as NARRATIVE2
       ,'' as NARRATIVE3
       ,'' as NARRATIVE4
       ,'' as TRANS_TYPE_ID_CODE
       ,'' as NARRATIVE5
       ,'' as NARRATIVE6
   from 
   ( 
      select NVL(sum(M_AMOUNT),0) as OPEN_AMT,M_REP_DATE2 as BOOK_DATE,M_CURRENCY
      from BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP
      where 
      TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)='008100000300008'
      AND M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and TRIM(M_CURRENCY)='SAR'
      group by M_REP_DATE2,M_CURRENCY
   )
)

SELECT
'MX' AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY'), 'DD-MM-YYYY') AS AS_OF_DATE,
'MX_ACC_ENTRIES_SUMMARY_REP       ' AS TABLE_NAME,
TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') AS MX_START_TIME,
TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') AS MX_END_TIME,
'S' AS MX_STATUS
FROM 
	DUAL

SELECT M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
       M_AS_OF_DATE,
       'ALL' AS M_RECONILIATION_LEVEL,
       CAST(COUNT(M_CURRENCY) AS NUMERIC(10,0)) AS M_TOTAL_NUM_OF_ENTRIES,
       CASE
         WHEN SUM(M_EN_AMT) IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(SUM(M_EN_AMT) AS NUMBER (25,8))
         ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (25,8))
       END M_TOTAL_DEBIT_MVMT,
       CASE
         WHEN SUM(M_EN_AMT) IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(SUM(M_EN_AMT) AS NUMBER (25,8))
         ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (25,8))
       END M_TOTAL_CREDIT_MVMT,
       M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
FROM (SELECT 'MX' AS M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
             M_AS_OF_DATE,
             M_NB_TRN AS M_TRADE_ID,
             M_EN_CUR AS M_CURRENCY,
             CASE
               WHEN TRIM(M_EN_AMT) IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(M_EN_AMT AS NUMBER (25,8))
               ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (25,8))
             END M_EN_AMT,
             TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') AS M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
      FROM ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP T1
      WHERE /*M_NB_TRN IN (SELECT M_NB_TRN
                         FROM ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP T2
                         WHERE T2.M_SYS_DATE = T2.M_AS_OF_DATE AND T1.M_EN_CUR = T2.M_EN_CUR AND T2.M_FX_O_NB = 0)
      AND */  T1.M_FX_O_NB = 0)
GROUP BY M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
         M_AS_OF_DATE,
         --M_CURRENCY,
         M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
UNION ALL
SELECT M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
       M_AS_OF_DATE,
       M_CURRENCY AS M_RECONILIATION_LEVEL,
       CAST(COUNT(M_CURRENCY) AS NUMERIC(10,0)) AS M_TOTAL_NUM_OF_ENTRIES,
       CASE
         WHEN SUM(M_EN_AMT) IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(SUM(M_EN_AMT) AS NUMBER (25,8))
         ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (25,8))
       END M_TOTAL_DEBIT_MVMT,
       CASE
         WHEN SUM(M_EN_AMT) IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(SUM(M_EN_AMT) AS NUMBER (25,8))
         ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (25,8))
       END M_TOTAL_CREDIT_MVMT,
       M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
FROM (SELECT 'MX' AS M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
             M_AS_OF_DATE,
             M_NB_TRN AS M_TRADE_ID,
             M_EN_CUR AS M_CURRENCY,
             CASE
               WHEN TRIM(M_EN_AMT) IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(M_EN_AMT AS NUMBER (25,8))
               ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (25,8))
             END M_EN_AMT,
             TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') AS M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
      FROM ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP T1
      WHERE /*M_NB_TRN IN (SELECT M_NB_TRN
                         FROM ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP T2
                         WHERE T2.M_SYS_DATE = T2.M_AS_OF_DATE AND T1.M_EN_CUR = T2.M_EN_CUR AND  T2.M_EN_CUR != 'SAR' AND T2.M_FX_O_NB = 0)
      AND   */  T1.M_EN_CUR != 'SAR'
      AND   T1.M_FX_O_NB = 0)
GROUP BY M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
         M_AS_OF_DATE,
         M_CURRENCY,
         M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
UNION ALL
SELECT M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
       M_AS_OF_DATE,
       M_CURRENCY AS M_RECONILIATION_LEVEL,
       CAST(COUNT(M_CURRENCY) AS NUMERIC(10,0)) AS M_TOTAL_NUM_OF_ENTRIES,
       CASE
         WHEN SUM(M_EN_AMT) IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(SUM(M_EN_AMT) AS NUMBER (25,8))
         ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (25,8))
       END M_TOTAL_DEBIT_MVMT,
       CASE
         WHEN SUM(M_EN_AMT) IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(SUM(M_EN_AMT) AS NUMBER (25,8))
         ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (25,8))
       END M_TOTAL_CREDIT_MVMT,
       M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
FROM (SELECT 'MX' AS M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
             M_AS_OF_DATE,
             M_NB_TRN AS M_TRADE_ID,
             M_EN_CUR AS M_CURRENCY,
             CASE
               WHEN TRIM(M_EN_AMT) IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(M_EN_AMT AS NUMBER (25,8))
               ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (25,8))
             END M_EN_AMT,
             TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') AS M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
      FROM ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP T1
      WHERE /*M_NB_TRN IN (SELECT M_NB_TRN
                         FROM ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP T2
                         WHERE T2.M_SYS_DATE = T2.M_AS_OF_DATE AND T1.M_EN_CUR = T2.M_EN_CUR AND T2.M_EN_CUR = 'SAR' AND T2.M_FX_O_NB = 0)
      AND   */  T1.M_EN_CUR = 'SAR'
      AND   T1.M_FX_O_NB = 0)
GROUP BY M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
         M_AS_OF_DATE,
         M_CURRENCY,
         M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP

TRIM(M_DESC): Nostro Risk limit configured details along with exposure & available details
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select distinct
LRB_NOS.M_AVAILABLE0, LRB_NOS.M_KEY, LRB_NOS.M_MAX0, LRB_NOS.M_MAXCURR0, 
LRB_NOS.M_MAXEXPOSUR, LRB_NOS.M_MAXUTILIZA, LRB_NOS.M_PAVAILABLE, LRB_NOS.M_PUTILIZATI, 
LRB_NOS.M_RISK, LRB_NOS.M_SECONDKEY, LRB_NOS.M_UTILIZATIO, LRB_NOS.M_GROUP, 
LRB_NOS.M_PILLAR, LRB_NOS.M_TIMEBUCKET,TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME) as M_NAME,
DECODE(PARTIES.M_AGENT,0,'Agent,','')||DECODE(PARTIES.M_BANK,'Y','Bank,','')||
DECODE(PARTIES.M_BRANCH,'Y','Branch,','')||DECODE(PARTIES.M_BROKER,'Y','Broker,','')||
DECODE(PARTIES.M_CLEARER,'Y','Clearer,','')||DECODE(PARTIES.M_CLIENT,'Y','Client,','')||
DECODE(PARTIES.M_CORPORATE,'Y','Corporate,','')||DECODE(PARTIES.M_CUSTODIAN,'Y','Custodian,','')||
DECODE(PARTIES.M_CUSTOMER,'Y','Customer,','')||DECODE(PARTIES.M_FICTIVE,'Y','Fictive,','')||
DECODE(PARTIES.M_GARANTOR,'Y','Garantor,','')||DECODE(PARTIES.M_GROUP,'Y','Group,','')||
DECODE(PARTIES.M_INT_PARTY,'Y','Int Party,','')||DECODE(PARTIES.M_ISSUER,'Y','Issuer,','')||
DECODE(PARTIES.M_STATE,'Y','State,','')||DECODE(PARTIES.M_SUBSIDIARY,'Y','Subsidiary,','') as M_CATEGORY

from 
BAB_LRB_NOS_RISK_REP LRB_NOS
left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
    on TRIM(PARTIES.M_CIF)=TRIM(LRB_NOS.M_KEY) and PARTIES.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N

select
cast(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY'), 'DD-MM-YYYY') as DATE) AS AS_OF_DATE,
cast(TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') as TIMESTAMP(9) )AS INSERT_DATE_TIME,
cast(NOS.M_CURRENCY as VARCHAR2(3)) as CURRENCY,
cast(DECODE(TRIM(PARTIES.M_CIF),'','0000000000',TO_CHAR(TRIM(PARTIES.M_CIF))) as VARCHAR2(50)) as CUSTOMER,
cast(case when TRIM(NOS.M_SERVICER) like '%SAUDI ARABIAN M%' or TRIM(NOS.M_SERVICER)='10000030' then '5010' else '5002' end as VARCHAR2(10)) as CATEGORY,
cast(null as DATE) as OPENING_DATE,
cast(NVl(NR.M_KEY,'')||NVl(NR.M_SECONDKEY,'')  as VARCHAR2(40)) as LIMIT_REF,
cast('AC-'||TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N) as VARCHAR2(50)) as CONTRACT_ID,  ---check the feasibility to get the mirror acc instead of nostro account
cast(NVL(NOS.M_AMOUNT,0) as NUMBER(24,6)) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT,
cast(
	case 
 when TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY)='SAR' then NVL(NOS.M_AMOUNT,0)*1
 when TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY)='KES' then NVL(NOS.M_AMOUNT,0)*0.03130
	else NVL(NOS.M_AMOUNT,0) * TRUNC(DECODE(NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0),0,DECODE(NVL(SPOT22.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT22.M_MID)),SPOT2.M_MID),6)
   
   end
as NUMBER(24,6)) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT_LCY,
--cast(NVL(ACR.ACCURAL,0) as NUMBER(24,6)) as ACCRUED_INTEREST,
cast(null as NUMBER(24,6)) as ACCRUED_INTEREST,  --- since there is no account interest maintained bussiness accepted to sent as null
cast(
	case when TO_CHAR(NR.M_ENDDATE,'DDMMYY')='131169' then '20601231' else TO_CHAR(NR.M_ENDDATE,'YYYYMMDD') end    
as VARCHAR2(8)) as  LIMIT_EXP_DATE,
cast(NVL(NR.M_MAX,0) as NUMBER(24))  as LIMIT_AMOUNT,
cast(null as NUMBER(24))  as NO_O_DAYS,
cast(
    case 
    when TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY)='SAR' then 1
    when TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY)='KES' then 0.031300
    else TRUNC(DECODE(NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0),0,DECODE(NVL(SPOT22.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT22.M_MID)),SPOT2.M_MID),6)
    end
as NUMBER(24,6)) EXCHANGE_RATE,
cast('AMC' as VARCHAR2(3)) as IFRS9_Classification,
cast(null as VARCHAR2(10)) as CCF,
cast(null as NUMBER(24,6)) as LI_INTERNAL_AMOUNT     

from 
(
    select M_REF_DATA,M_ACCOUNT_N,M_CURRENCY,M_SERVICER,sum(M_AMOUNT) M_AMOUNT
    from BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP
    where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N 
    and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N) is not null and TRIM(M_CURRENCY) is not null and SUBSTR(TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N),0,3)='008'
    group by M_REF_DATA,M_ACCOUNT_N,M_CURRENCY,M_SERVICER
) NOS
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2    
  on  SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN)=DECODE(TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY),'CNH','CNY',TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY)) and SPOT2.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataBAB_MDS:N 
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT22    
  on SPOT22.M_CCY_DEN='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_NUM)=DECODE(TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY),'CNH','CNY',TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY)) and SPOT22.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataBAB_MDS:N    
left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
  on NOS.M_SERVICER=PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL and PARTIES.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataBAB_KSA:N
left outer join 
(
   SELECT M_REF_DATA,M_OPERATION,M_VALIDATION,M_SECONDKEY,M_CREATIONDA M_CREATIONDA,M_MAX,M_KEY,M_ENDDATE,M_EFFECTIVED
   ,RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY M_KEY ORDER BY M_VALIDATION,M_EFFECTIVED asc) R_RANK
    FROM BAB_NOSTRO_RISK_REP
    WHERE M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
    AND M_OPERATION NOT LIKE '%Cancel%'
 ) NR
  on TRIM(NR.M_KEY)=TRIM(NOS.M_SERVICER) and  NR.M_REF_DATA = NOS.M_REF_DATA and TRIM(NR.M_SECONDKEY)=TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY) and NR.R_RANK=1
  left outer join
(  
   select CONTR.M_ACCOUNT_N,sum(NVL(TPALL.M_TP_RTACR02,0)) ACCURAL
   from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP CONTR,TP_ALL_REP TPALL
   where CONTR.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalDataBAB_KSA:N

DECODE(RT.M_TP_RTFV1,'F','Fixed','Floating') as TYPE_LEG2,

when TPALL.M_TP_FEE1!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE1
when TPALL.M_TP_FEE2!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE2
else TPALL.M_TP_FEE3 end as Broker_Fee,
TPALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD as Source_Module,
TPALL.M_TP_TRADER as Trader_User
from TP_ALL_REP TPALL
--left outer join (
--select M_NB, M_REF_DATA, SUM(ABS(M_F_AMOUNT)) M_F_AMOUNT from CASH_FLOW_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN'

group by  M_NB, M_REF_DATA, M_F_LEG, M_F_TYPELAB2 
) CF1
ON TPALL.M_NB=CF1.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=CF1.M_REF_DATA
left outer join (

cast(NOS.M_CURRENCY as VARCHAR2(3)) as CURRENCY,
cast(DECODE(TRIM(PARTIES.M_CIF),'','0000000000',TO_CHAR(TRIM(PARTIES.M_CIF))) as VARCHAR2(50)) as CUSTOMER,
cast(case when TRIM(NOS.M_SERVICER) like '%SAUDI ARABIAN M%' or TRIM(NOS.M_SERVICER)='10000030' then '5010' else '5002' end as VARCHAR2(10)) as CATEGORY,
cast(null as DATE) as OPENING_DATE,
cast(NVl(NR.M_KEY,'')||NVl(NR.M_SECONDKEY,'')  as VARCHAR2(40)) as LIMIT_REF,
cast('AC-'||TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N) as VARCHAR2(50)) as CONTRACT_ID,  ---check the feasibility to get the mirror acc instead of nostro account
cast(NVL(NOS.M_AMOUNT,0) as NUMBER(24,2)) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT,
cast(
	case 
 when TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY)='SAR' then NVL(NOS.M_AMOUNT,0)*1
 when TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY)='KES' then NVL(NOS.M_AMOUNT,0)*0.03130
	else NVL(NOS.M_AMOUNT,0) * TRUNC(DECODE(NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0),0,DECODE(NVL(SPOT22.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT22.M_MID)),SPOT2.M_MID),6)
   
   end
as NUMBER(24,2)) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT_LCY,
--cast(NVL(ACR.ACCURAL,0) as NUMBER(24,6)) as ACCRUED_INTEREST,
cast(null as NUMBER(24,6)) as ACCRUED_INTEREST,  --- since there is no account interest maintained bussiness accepted to sent as null
cast(
	case when TO_CHAR(NR.M_ENDDATE,'DDMMYY')='131169' then '20601231' else TO_CHAR(NR.M_ENDDATE,'YYYYMMDD') end    
as VARCHAR2(8)) as  LIMIT_EXP_DATE,
cast(NVL(NR.M_MAX,0) as NUMBER(24))  as LIMIT_AMOUNT,
cast(null as NUMBER(24))  as NO_O_DAYS,
cast(
    case 
    when TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY)='SAR' then 1
    when TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY)='KES' then 0.031300
    else TRUNC(DECODE(NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0),0,DECODE(NVL(SPOT22.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT22.M_MID)),SPOT2.M_MID),6)
    end
as NUMBER(24,6)) EXCHANGE_RATE,
cast('AMC' as VARCHAR2(3)) as IFRS9_Classification,
cast(null as VARCHAR2(10)) as CCF,
cast(null as NUMBER(24,6)) as LI_INTERNAL_AMOUNT     

from 
(
    select M_REF_DATA,M_ACCOUNT_N,M_CURRENCY,M_SERVICER,sum(M_AMOUNT) M_AMOUNT
    from BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP
    where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N 
    and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N) is not null and TRIM(M_CURRENCY) is not null and SUBSTR(TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N),0,3)='008'
    and TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED') 
    group by M_REF_DATA,M_ACCOUNT_N,M_CURRENCY,M_SERVICER
) NOS
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2    
  on  SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN)=DECODE(TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY),'CNH','CNY',TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY)) and SPOT2.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataBAB_MDS:N 
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT22    
  on SPOT22.M_CCY_DEN='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_NUM)=DECODE(TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY),'CNH','CNY',TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY)) and SPOT22.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataBAB_MDS:N    
left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
  on NOS.M_SERVICER=PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL and PARTIES.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataBAB_KSA:N
left outer join 
(
   SELECT M_REF_DATA,M_OPERATION,M_VALIDATION,M_SECONDKEY,M_CREATIONDA M_CREATIONDA,M_MAX,M_KEY,M_ENDDATE,M_EFFECTIVED
   ,RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY M_KEY ORDER BY M_VALIDATION,M_EFFECTIVED asc) R_RANK
    FROM BAB_NOSTRO_RISK_REP
    WHERE M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
    AND M_OPERATION NOT LIKE '%Cancel%'
 ) NR
  on TRIM(NR.M_KEY)=TRIM(NOS.M_SERVICER) and  NR.M_REF_DATA = NOS.M_REF_DATA and TRIM(NR.M_SECONDKEY)=TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY) and NR.R_RANK=1
  left outer join
(  
   select CONTR.M_ACCOUNT_N,sum(NVL(TPALL.M_TP_RTACR02,0)) ACCURAL
   from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP CONTR,TP_ALL_REP TPALL
   where CONTR.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalDataBAB_KSA:N
   and CONTR.M_PROD_ID=TPALL.M_CONTRACT
   group by CONTR.M_ACCOUNT_N
) ACR 
ON TRIM(ACR.M_ACCOUNT_N)=TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)
where 
1=1
--    NOS.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
--and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N) is not null and TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY) is not null and SUBSTR(TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N),0,3)='008'
--group by NOS.M_CURRENCY,NOS.M_SERVICER,NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N,SPOT2.M_MID,PARTIES.M_CIF,NR.M_KEY,NR.M_SECONDKEY,NR.M_MAX,NR.M_ENDDATE,SPOT22.M_MID,ACR.ACCURAL

select 
CAST ('Monthly' AS CHAR(30)) BRK_DOWN,
CAST (DDATE AS CHAR(30)) DDATE, 
CAST (sum(DIV_INCM_CLOSING) AS DECIMAL(24,0)) DIV_INCM_CLOSING, 
CAST (0  AS DECIMAL(24,0)) DIV_INCM_TARGET,
CAST (sum(MF_INCM_CLOSING)  AS DECIMAL(24,0)) MF_INCM_CLOSING, 
CAST (0   AS DECIMAL(24,0)) MF_INCM_TARGET,
CAST (0 AS DECIMAL(10,0)) MY_RANK,
CAST (0 AS DECIMAL(24,0)) NET_DAILY
from
(
            
    select  
    TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'MONYYYY') as DDATE,
    NVL(sum(M_TP_NOMINAL),0) as DIV_INCM_CLOSING,
    0 as MF_INCM_CLOSING
    from TP_ALL_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
    and TRIM(M_TP_PURPOSE) = 'Corporate action execution' and TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN,'YYYY')=TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYY')
    group by TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'MONYYYY')
    
    union all
    
        select  
    TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'MONYYYY') as DDATE,
    0 as DIV_INCM_CLOSING,
    NVL(sum(M_TP_NOMINAL),0) as MF_INCM_CLOSING
    from TP_ALL_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
    and M_CMP_TYPO in ('SCF')
    and TRIM(M_TP_PURPOSE) = 'Corporate action execution' and TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN,'YYYY')=TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYY')
    group by TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'MONYYYY')
    
)
group by DDATE

TRIM(M_DESC): Inception data sql
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select 
CAST (M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER  AS CHAR(30))            ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
CAST (''   AS CHAR(30))            SWIFT_ADDRESS,
CAST (M_CURRENCY        AS CHAR(3))             CURRENCY,
CAST (M_CLOSING_BALANCE AS DECIMAL(26,3))       CLOSING_BALANCE, 
CAST (M_OPENING_BALANCE AS DECIMAL(26,3))       OPENING_BALANCE,
CAST (M_2ND_REFERENCE   AS VARCHAR2(24))        SND_REFERENCE,
CAST (M_1ST_REFERENCE   AS VARCHAR2(24))        FST_REFERENCE, 
CAST (M_AMOUNT          AS DECIMAL(26,3))       AMOUNT,
CAST (M_TRADE_DATE      AS DATE)                TRADE_DATE,
CAST (M_BLANK           AS CHAR(5))             BLANK,
CAST (M_VALUE_DATE      AS DATE)                VALUE_DATE,
CAST (M_TYPE            AS VARCHAR2(10))        TYPE,
CAST (M_D_C             AS CHAR(1))             D_C,
CAST (M_DEPARTMENT_CODE AS CHAR(3))             DEPARTMENT_CODE,
CAST (M_TRADE_DATETIME  AS VARCHAR2(30))        TRADE_DATETIME,
CAST (M_CONTRACT        AS DECIMAL(24,0))       CONTRACT,
CAST (MY_RANK           AS DECIMAL(24,0))       MY_RANK
from (
    SELECT 
    M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, M_CURRENCY,
    CASE WHEN MY_RANK=1 THEN CALC_AMT+0  -- GET OPENING BALANCE FOR YESTERDAY
    ELSE CALC_AMT END 
    AS M_CLOSING_BALANCE, 
    
    /*(select NVL(sum(M_AMOUNT),0) from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP WHERE TO_CHAR(M_VALUE_DAT,'YYYYMMDD')='20220806' 
    and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)=TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)) as M_OPENING_BALANCE, */
    
    ---get opening as closing of 6th or migration date
    /*(select sum(M_AMOUNT) from BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP WHERE TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYYMMDD')='20220806' 
    and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)=TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) and TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')) as M_OPENING_BALANCE,*/
    
   /* (
        select NVL(sum(M_AMOUNT),0) from BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP --- BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP 
        WHERE 
       -- TO_CHAR(M_VALUE_DAT,'YYYYMMDD')=TO_CHAR((select M_REP_DATE2-1 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N),'YYYYMMDD')
        TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYYMMDD')=TO_CHAR((select M_REP_DATE2-1 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N),'YYYYMMDD')
        and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)=TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
        and TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')
        
    ) as M_OPENING_BALANCE,*/
    
        ---get opening as closing of 6th or migration date
    (select sum(M_AMOUNT) from BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP WHERE TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYYMMDD')='20220806' 
    and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_N)=TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) and TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')) as M_OPENING_BALANCE,
    
   ---- -14193643.03 as M_OPENING_BALANCE, 
    M_2ND_REFERENCE, M_1ST_REFERENCE, M_AMOUNT, M_TRADE_DATE, 
    M_BLANK, M_VALUE_DATE, M_TYPE, M_D_C, M_DEPARTMENT_CODE, M_TRADE_DATETIME, M_CONTRACT,MY_RANK
    from 
    (
     select M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, M_CURRENCY, 
     M_CLOSING_BALANCE, M_OPENING_BALANCE, M_2ND_REFERENCE, M_1ST_REFERENCE, M_AMOUNT as CALC_AMT,
     (case when M_AMOUNT<0 then ABS(M_AMOUNT) else -1*ABS(M_AMOUNT) end) as M_AMOUNT, M_TRADE_DATE, 
     M_BLANK, M_VALUE_DATE, M_TYPE, (case when M_AMOUNT<0 then 'C' else 'D' end) M_D_C, M_DEPARTMENT_CODE, M_TRADE_DATETIME, M_CONTRACT,RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY M_CURRENCY,M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER ORDER BY M_CURRENCY,M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_VALUE_DATE,M_CONTRACT) MY_RANK
        from (    
        select M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CURRENCY,sum(M_CLOSING_BALANCE) M_CLOSING_BALANCE,sum(M_OPENING_BALANCE) M_OPENING_BALANCE,
        M_TYPE||M_2ND_REFERENCE as M_2ND_REFERENCE,M_TYPE||M_1ST_REFERENCE as M_1ST_REFERENCE,sum(M_AMOUNT) M_AMOUNT,M_TRADE_DATE,M_BLANK,M_VALUE_DATE,M_TYPE,M_DEPARTMENT_CODE,M_TRADE_DATETIME,M_CONTRACT
        from (
               select --DISTINCT
                M_ACCOUNT_N as M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER
               --,'' as M_SWIFT_ADDRESS
               ,M_CURRENCY as M_CURRENCY
               ,0 as M_CLOSING_BALANCE
               ,0 as M_OPENING_BALANCE
               ,NVL(TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT,NOS.M_ID) as M_2ND_REFERENCE
               ,NVL(TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT,NOS.M_ID) as M_1ST_REFERENCE
               ,M_AMOUNT as M_AMOUNT
               
                ----As per business requirement for entries generated for flows by events eg: Netting-----
                  --,TP_ALL.M_TP_DTESYS as M_TRADE_DATE
                  ,case 
                    when NOS.M_PROD_ID=0 and NOS.M_PRODUCERO=0 then M_VALUE_DAT
                    else TP_ALL.M_TP_DTESYS 
                   end as M_TRADE_DATE
                ----As per business requirement for entries generated for flows by events eg: Netting-----
                     
               ,null as M_BLANK
               ,M_VALUE_DAT as M_VALUE_DATE
                ,case 
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('FT Nostro Nostro') then 'MX'
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Banknotes','Dual Currency Deposit','Spot','SAMA Bill') or M_PRODUCER1 like '%FX%' then 'MXFX'
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad','Murabaha Borrowing','Repo SAMA','RR SAMA','Murabaha Borrowing',
                'Wakala Placement','SAMA Purchase','RR Murabaha','RR Waad','Murabaha Placement','Wakala Borrowing','DPM Murabaha') then 'MXMM'
                when M_PRODUCER1 like '%LTM%' or M_PRODUCER1 like '%Sukuk%' then 'MXFI'
                when M_PRODUCER1 like '%Fund%' or M_PRODUCER1 like '%Equity%' then 'MXEQ'
                when M_PRODUCER1 like '%PRS%' then 'MXIR'
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('SFRM','SGDM') then 'MXIR'       
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Brokerage Fee') then 'MXBR'
                when M_PRODUCER1 IN ('SCF','SCF BR VAT RC','SCF BR WHT PAY','SCF BR VAT') then 'MXSCF'
                else 'MX' end as M_TYPE
               --,case when M_AMOUNT<0 then 'D' else 'C' end as M_D_C
               ,'999' as M_DEPARTMENT_CODE
               ,TP_ALL.M_TP_DTESYS ||' '||M_TP_TIMSYS as M_TRADE_DATETIME
               ,TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT
              
               from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP NOS,(select distinct M_CONTRACT, M_REF_DATA,M_TP_DTESYS,M_REP_DATE2, M_TP_TIMSYS,M_CNT_SRCMOD from TP_ALL_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N 
               and M_CONTRACT<>1550----- Fix for prod id=0 amd produer0=0
               ) TP_ALL
               where 1=1
               ---and TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT(+)=NOS.M_PROD_ID  -- fix as per pega case C-1226227
               and TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT(+)=DECODE(NOS.M_PROD_ID,0,NOS.M_PRODUCERO,NOS.M_PROD_ID) -- fix as per pega case C-1226227
               and TP_ALL.M_REF_DATA(+)=@MxDataSetKey:N
               and TRIM(NOS.M_BENEFICIA) is not null and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N) is not null 
               and NOS.M_AMOUNT !=0 --and NOS.M_SETTLEMEN in 'SETTLED' 
               and NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N<>'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KS' 
               ---- aggrgate change
              --------------------- to get data from migration data--------------
               /*AND TO_CHAR(M_VALUE_DAT,'YYYYMMDD')<>'20220806' --- since the data migrated on 6th august --- need to change once whole sum data is finalised
               AND M_VALUE_DAT>to_date('06-AUG-22','DD-MON-YY') --- need to change once whole sum data is finalised
               and (M_VALUE_DAT<=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N) or TRIM(TP_ALL.M_REP_DATE2) is null)*/
               -------------------------------------to get data from migration data--------------
               
               ---As per user request neglecting commodity, scf
               AND TRIM(M_PRODUCER1) not in ('Murabaha Commodity','SCF','SCF BR VAT RC','SCF BR WHT PAY','SCF BR VAT','Collateral','SCF BR WHT NPAY')
               ---As per user request neglecting T24 deals and ones which was not picked due to prod id coming as zero
              ----- AND (TRIM(TP_ALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD)<>'T24.NOSTRO')-- or M_PROD_ID=0) --- Fix for prod id=0 amd produer0=0 ---commented for fix
               
               AND (TRIM(TP_ALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD)<>'T24.NOSTRO' or TRIM(TP_ALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD) is null) ----- Fix for prod id=0 amd produer0=0
               
               AND TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')  /*AND TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT<>1550*/ ----- Fix for prod id=0 amd produer0=0
               -------only last EOD data-----
               -----AND (M_VALUE_DAT=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)) /* or TRIM(TP_ALL.M_REP_DATE2) is null)*/----- Fix for prod id=0 amd produer0=0
               
               --inception data
               AND M_VALUE_DAT>to_date('06-AUG-22','DD-MON-YY') 
               and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)<>'008100000300008' ---Excluding SAMA Nostro
               --and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)='008100000300008' ---Excluding SAMA Nostro
               ---and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N) in ('008100018830004','008100685380009')
               and DECODE(NOS.M_PROD_ID,0,NOS.M_PRODUCERO,NOS.M_PROD_ID)<>1550 ----- Fix for prod id=0 amd produer0=0
               -------only last EOD data-----
               ------------------- and TRIM(NOS.M_VALIDATIO)='Settled' --- in ('Released','Settled','TechSettled','InstrToValidate')   
               --and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)='008100014040009' --JPM
               --and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)='008100018830004' ---SCB
               --ORDER BY M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CONTRACT
               
                union all
               
               select 
                M_ACCOUNT_N as M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER
               --,'' as M_SWIFT_ADDRESS
               ,M_CURRENCY as M_CURRENCY
               ,0 as M_CLOSING_BALANCE
               ,0 as M_OPENING_BALANCE
               ,NOS.M_PROD_ID as M_2ND_REFERENCE
               ,NOS.M_PROD_ID as M_1ST_REFERENCE
               ,M_AMOUNT as M_AMOUNT
               ,M_VALUE_DAT as M_TRADE_DATE
               ,null as M_BLANK
               ,M_VALUE_DAT as M_VALUE_DATE ---TP_ALL.M_TP_DTEPMT
              ,'MXCOL' as M_TYPE
               --,case when M_AMOUNT<0 then 'D' else 'C' end as M_D_C
               ,'999' as M_DEPARTMENT_CODE
               ,'' as M_TRADE_DATETIME
               ,NOS.M_PROD_ID
               
               from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP NOS
               where 1=1
               and TRIM(NOS.M_BENEFICIA) is not null and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N) is not null 
               and NOS.M_AMOUNT !=0 
               and NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N<>'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KS'
               ---- aggrgate change
               /* and TO_CHAR(M_VALUE_DAT,'YYYYMMDD')<>'20220806' --- since the data migrated on 6th august
               AND M_VALUE_DAT>to_date('06-AUG-22','DD-MON-YY') --- need to change once whole sum data is finalised
               and M_VALUE_DAT<=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)*/
               ---- aggrgate change
               ----------AND M_VALUE_DAT=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)               
               AND M_VALUE_DAT>to_date('06-AUG-22','DD-MON-YY')
               /*AND M_VALUE_DAT<=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)*/
               AND TRIM(M_PRODUCER1) in ('Collateral')
               AND TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')
               and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)<>'008100000300008' -- ---Excluding SAMA Nostro
              --and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N)='008100000300008' -- ---Excluding SAMA Nostro
              ---- and TRIM(NOS.M_ACCOUNT_N) in ('008100018830004','008100685380009')
               ------------and TRIM(M_VALIDATIO)='Settled' ---- in ('Released','Settled','TechSettled','InstrToValidate')   
               
           )
           group by M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CURRENCY,M_2ND_REFERENCE,M_1ST_REFERENCE,M_TRADE_DATE,M_BLANK,M_VALUE_DATE,M_TYPE,M_DEPARTMENT_CODE,M_TRADE_DATETIME,M_CONTRACT
           )
    )  where M_AMOUNT !=0
    ORDER BY MY_RANK,M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CONTRACT
)
ORDER BY MY_RANK,M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CONTRACT

TRIM(M_DESC): Second intermediate to update closing balances data
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select 
CAST (M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER  AS CHAR(30))            ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
CAST (M_SWIFT_ADDRESS   AS CHAR(30))            SWIFT_ADDRESS,
CAST (M_CURRENCY        AS CHAR(3))             CURRENCY,
CAST (M_CLOSING_BALANCE AS DECIMAL(26,3))       CLOSING_BALANCE, 
CAST (M_OPENING_BALANCE AS DECIMAL(26,3))       OPENING_BALANCE,
CAST (M_SND_REFERENCE   AS VARCHAR2(24))        SND_REFERENCE,
CAST (M_FST_REFERENCE   AS VARCHAR2(24))        FST_REFERENCE, 
CAST (M_AMOUNT          AS DECIMAL(26,3))       AMOUNT,
CAST (M_TRADE_DATE      AS DATE)                TRADE_DATE,
CAST (M_BLANK           AS CHAR(5))             BLANK,
CAST (M_VALUE_DATE      AS DATE)                VALUE_DATE,
CAST (M_TYPE            AS VARCHAR2(10))        TYPE,
CAST (M_D_C             AS CHAR(1))             D_C,
CAST (M_DEPARTMENT_CODE AS CHAR(3))             DEPARTMENT_CODE,
CAST (M_TRADE_DATETIME  AS VARCHAR2(30))        TRADE_DATETIME,
CAST (M_CONTRACT        AS DECIMAL(24,0))       CONTRACT,
CAST (M_MY_RANK         AS DECIMAL(24,0))       MY_RANK
from (
 select T1.M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, T1.M_SWIFT_ADDRESS, T1.M_CURRENCY,  T1.M_CLOSING_BALANCE,
    case when T1.M_MY_RANK=1 then T1.M_OPENING_BALANCE
    else (
       T1.M_OPENING_BALANCE+
       (SELECT NVL(SUM(M_CLOSING_BALANCE),0) FROM MX_NOSTRO_RECON_T1_INCP_REP T2 WHERE T2.M_MY_RANK<T1.M_MY_RANK AND T2.M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER=T1.M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER AND T2.M_CURRENCY =T1.M_CURRENCY)
    )  end as M_OPENING_BALANCE, 
    T1.M_SND_REFERENCE, T1.M_FST_REFERENCE, T1.M_AMOUNT, T1.M_TRADE_DATE, 
    T1.M_BLANK, T1.M_VALUE_DATE, T1.M_TYPE, T1.M_D_C, T1.M_DEPARTMENT_CODE, T1.M_TRADE_DATETIME, T1.M_CONTRACT,T1.M_MY_RANK
    from MX_NOSTRO_RECON_T1_INCP_REP T1 --where M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER='008108118830444'
    ORDER BY T1.M_MY_RANK,T1.M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,T1.M_CONTRACT
)
ORDER BY M_MY_RANK,M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,M_CONTRACT

TRIM(M_DESC): Final extraction to get the end result
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select 
--cast(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY'), 'DD-MM-YYYY') as DATE) AS AS_OF_DATE,
--cast(TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') as TIMESTAMP(9) ) AS INSERT_DATE_TIME,
CAST (M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER  AS CHAR(30))            ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
CAST (M_SWIFT_ADDRESS   AS CHAR(30))            SWIFT_ADDRESS,
CAST (M_CURRENCY        AS CHAR(3))             CURRENCY,
CAST (NVL(M_CLOSING_BALANCE,0) AS DECIMAL(26,3))       CLOSING_BALANCE, 
CAST (NVL(M_OPENING_BALANCE,0) AS DECIMAL(26,3))       OPENING_BALANCE,
CAST (M_SND_REFERENCE   AS VARCHAR2(24))        SND_REFERENCE,

WITH ACC_TRIAL_BAL AS (
    select GL_ACCOUNT,GL_PRODUCT,CURRENCY,AS_OF_DATE,M_NETBALANCE as AMOUNT_FCY,
    TO_CHAR(DECODE(TRIM(ACC_BAL.CURRENCY),'SAR',1,'KES',0.03130, NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT22.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT22.M_MID))) )) as SPOT,    
    M_NETBALANCE*DECODE(ACC_BAL.CURRENCY,'SAR',1,'KES',0.03130,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT22.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT22.M_MID)))) AMOUNT_LCY,
    DECODE(ACC_BAL.GL_PRODUCT,
    1335,'Sukuk Floating',1330,'Sukuk Fixed',1415,'Real Estate Funds',1525,'Private Equity',1520,'REIT',1305,'LTM',6710,'Sukuk Issuance',PCODE.M_TYPOLOGY) as PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION
    ,DECODE(TRIM(ACC_DET.M_CATEGORY0),'96341','Trade Commitments, Borrowings',NVL(ACC_DET.M_DESC,'')) as ACCOUNT_DESC
    from (                    
                    ---- Get SAR Details
                select SAR_TABLE.GL_ACCOUNT,SAR_TABLE.GL_PRODUCT,SAR_TABLE.CURRENCY,SAR_TABLE.AS_OF_DATE,
                --SAR_TABLE.M_NETBALANCE,--NON_SAR_TABLE.M_NETBALANCE as NON_SAR, 
                case 
                when NVL(SAR_TABLE.M_NETBALANCE,0)<=0 then NVL(SAR_TABLE.M_NETBALANCE,0)+(ABS(NVL(NON_SAR_TABLE.M_NETBALANCE,0))*DECODE(SAR_TABLE.CURRENCY,'SAR',1,'KES',0.03130,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT22.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT22.M_MID)))))
                else NVL(SAR_TABLE.M_NETBALANCE,0)-(ABS(NVL(NON_SAR_TABLE.M_NETBALANCE,0))*DECODE(SAR_TABLE.CURRENCY,'SAR',1,'KES',0.03130,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT22.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT22.M_MID))))) end as M_NETBALANCE
                
                from 
                (
                    select 
                    GL_ACCOUNT,GL_PRODUCT,CURRENCY,AS_OF_DATE,sum(M_NETBALANCE) M_NETBALANCE
                    from 
                    (
                        select 
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) as GL_ACCOUNT,
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,3)) as GL_PRODUCT,
                        TRIM(M_CURRENCY) as CURRENCY,
                        M_BAL_DATE as AS_OF_DATE,
                        M_NETBALANCE
                        from ACC_DAILY_BAL_REP ACC_BAL 
                        where 
                        M_BAL_DATE=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)
                        and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT)<>'Migration Account' and M_CURRENCY='SAR'
                        and 
                        (
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) like '8%' or 
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) like '9%' or 
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) like '5%' or 
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) like '4%' or 
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) like '3%' or 
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) like '2%' or 
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) like '1%'
                        )
                        union all
                        
                        select 
                            'Migration Account' as GL_ACCOUNT,
                            '' as GL_PRODUCT,
                            TRIM(M_CURRENCY) as CURRENCY,
                            M_BAL_DATE as AS_OF_DATE,
                            M_NETBALANCE
                            from ACC_DAILY_BAL_REP ACC_BAL 
                        where 
                        M_BAL_DATE=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)
                        and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT)='Migration Account' and M_CURRENCY='SAR'
                    )
                    --- where GL_ACCOUNT='11101'
                    group by GL_ACCOUNT,GL_PRODUCT,CURRENCY,AS_OF_DATE
                ) SAR_TABLE    
                left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2    
                on SPOT2.M_DATE=SAR_TABLE.AS_OF_DATE and SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN)=DECODE(SAR_TABLE.CURRENCY,'CNH','CNY',SAR_TABLE.CURRENCY)
                left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT22    
                on SPOT22.M_DATE=SAR_TABLE.AS_OF_DATE and SPOT22.M_CCY_DEN='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_NUM)=DECODE(SAR_TABLE.CURRENCY,'CNH','CNY',SAR_TABLE.CURRENCY)
                left outer join 
                (
                    select 
                    GL_ACCOUNT,GL_PRODUCT,AS_OF_DATE,sum(M_NETBALANCE) M_NETBALANCE
                    from 
                    (
                        select 
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) as GL_ACCOUNT,
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,3)) as GL_PRODUCT,
                        --TRIM(M_CURRENCY) as CURRENCY,
                        M_BAL_DATE as AS_OF_DATE,
                        M_NETBALANCE
                        from ACC_DAILY_BAL_REP ACC_BAL 
                        where 
                        M_BAL_DATE=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)
                        and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT)<>'Migration Account' and M_CURRENCY!='SAR'
                        and 
                        (
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) like '8%' or 
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) like '9%' or 
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) like '5%' or 
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) like '4%' or 
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) like '3%' or 
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) like '2%' or 
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) like '1%'
                        )
                        union all
                        
                        select 
                            'Migration Account' as GL_ACCOUNT,
                            '' as GL_PRODUCT,
                            --TRIM(M_CURRENCY) as CURRENCY,
                            M_BAL_DATE as AS_OF_DATE,
                            M_NETBALANCE
                            from ACC_DAILY_BAL_REP ACC_BAL 
                        where 
                        M_BAL_DATE=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)
                        and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT)='Migration Account' and M_CURRENCY!='SAR'
                    )
                    --- where GL_ACCOUNT='11101'
                    group by GL_ACCOUNT,GL_PRODUCT,AS_OF_DATE
                ) NON_SAR_TABLE 
                on SAR_TABLE.GL_ACCOUNT=NON_SAR_TABLE.GL_ACCOUNT and SAR_TABLE.GL_PRODUCT=NON_SAR_TABLE.GL_PRODUCT 
                
                union all 
                ---- Get Non SAR Details
                select 
                    GL_ACCOUNT,GL_PRODUCT,CURRENCY,AS_OF_DATE,sum(M_NETBALANCE) M_NETBALANCE
                    from 
                    (
                        select 
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) as GL_ACCOUNT,
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,3)) as GL_PRODUCT,
                        TRIM(M_CURRENCY) as CURRENCY,
                        M_BAL_DATE as AS_OF_DATE,
                        M_NETBALANCE
                        from ACC_DAILY_BAL_REP ACC_BAL 
                        where 
                        M_BAL_DATE=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)
                        and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT)<>'Migration Account' and M_CURRENCY!='SAR'
                        and 
                        (
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) like '8%' or 
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) like '9%' or 
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) like '5%' or 
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) like '4%' or 
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) like '3%' or 
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) like '2%' or 
                        TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC_BAL.M_ACCOUNT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) like '1%'
                        )
                        union all
                        
                        select 
                            'Migration Account' as GL_ACCOUNT,
                            '' as GL_PRODUCT,
                            TRIM(M_CURRENCY) as CURRENCY,
                            M_BAL_DATE as AS_OF_DATE,
                            M_NETBALANCE
                            from ACC_DAILY_BAL_REP ACC_BAL 
                        where 
                        M_BAL_DATE=(select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N)
                        and TRIM(M_ACCOUNT)='Migration Account' and M_CURRENCY!='SAR'
                    )
                    --- where GL_ACCOUNT='11101'
                    group by GL_ACCOUNT,GL_PRODUCT,CURRENCY,AS_OF_DATE                   
    ) ACC_BAL
    left outer join BAB_PRODUCT_CODE_REP PCODE
        on ACC_BAL.GL_PRODUCT=PCODE.M_PROD_CODE AND PCODE.M_PROD_CODE NOT in (1520,1305,1310,1640,1650,6460,6710) AND PCODE.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2    
        on SPOT2.M_DATE=ACC_BAL.AS_OF_DATE and SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN)=DECODE(ACC_BAL.CURRENCY,'CNH','CNY',ACC_BAL.CURRENCY)
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT22    
        on SPOT22.M_DATE=ACC_BAL.AS_OF_DATE and SPOT22.M_CCY_DEN='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_NUM)=DECODE(ACC_BAL.CURRENCY,'CNH','CNY',ACC_BAL.CURRENCY)
    left outer join ACC_DETAILS_REP ACC_DET
    		on TRIM(ACC_DET.M_CATEGORY0)=TRIM(ACC_BAL.GL_ACCOUNT) and TRIM(ACC_DET.M_CATEGORY0)<>'96341'
)

from (

    select '' as Account#,'                                 Bank Albilad    '  as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
    '' CURRENCY, '' as Amount,'' as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where rownum=1
union all
    select '' as Account#,
    '     Trial Balance Summary Report By Account and Product  ' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,
    '' CURRENCY, '' as Amount,'' as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where rownum=1
union all
    select ' ' as Account#,'                                 Murex TMS       ' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,' ' as Product_Description,
    '' CURRENCY, '' as Amount,'' as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT   from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where rownum=1

    select ' ' as Account#,'            Report Date : '|| AS_OF_DATE
    as Account_Description,'' as Product#,' ' as Product_Description,
    '' CURRENCY, '' as Amount,'' as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where rownum=1
----Heading end

       select '                             '||TO_CHAR(GL_ACCOUNT) as Account#,NVL(ACCOUNT_DESC,' ') as Account_Description,TO_CHAR(GL_PRODUCT) as Product#,Product_Description,

       where GL_ACCOUNT like '1%'

    union all
    select '' as Account#,'' as Account_Description,'' as Product#,'' as Product_Description,

 union all

    '' as CURRENCY, '' as CURRENCY_Amount,'' as Amount_IN_SAR,'' as SPOT  from ACC_TRIAL_BAL where rownum=1
        union all

TRIM(M_DESC): FX  Unit Nostro Data
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select  DISTINCT
 CAST(NOS.M_REP_DATE2  AS DATE) as DDATE
,CAST(NOS.M_CURRENCY AS VARCHAR2(3)) as CURRENCY
,CAST(NOS.M_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(24,2)) as AMOUNT
,CAST(NOS.M_SERVICER AS VARCHAR2(15)) as SERVICER
,CAST(DECODE(NOS.M_CURRENCY,'USD',NOS.M_AMOUNT,NOS.M_AMOUNT*NVL(SPOT_USD_1.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT_USD_2.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT_USD_2.M_MID))))  AS DECIMAL(32,8)) as AMOUNT_USD
,CAST(DECODE(NOS.M_CURRENCY,'SAR',NOS.M_AMOUNT,NOS.M_AMOUNT*NVL(SPOT_SAR_1.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT_SAR_2.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT_SAR_2.M_MID))))  AS DECIMAL(32,8)) as AMOUNT_SAR
,CAST(TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME) AS VARCHAR2(50)) as COUNTERPARTY
--,CAST(DECODE(NOS.M_CURRENCY,'USD',1,NVL(SPOT_USD_1.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT_USD_2.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT_USD_2.M_MID))))  AS DECIMAL(32,8)) as FX_CONV_RATE_USD
--,CAST(DECODE(NOS.M_CURRENCY,'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT_SAR_1.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT_SAR_2.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT_SAR_2.M_MID))))  AS DECIMAL(32,8)) as FX_CONV_RATE_SAR
from 
(
    select DISTINCT M_REP_DATE2,M_CURRENCY,sum(M_AMOUNT) as M_AMOUNT ,M_SERVICER from BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP
    where TRIM(M_TYPE)='CLOSING' and TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')   
    and TRIM(M_CURRENCY) is not null and TRIM(M_REP_DATE2) is not null 
    and M_AMOUNT <> 0 and TRIM(NVL(M_SERVICER, '')) <> 'BANK ALBILAD'
    --and M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalData_MLC_BAB:N 
    group by M_REP_DATE2,M_CURRENCY,M_SERVICER
)NOS
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_USD_1
	 ON TRIM(SPOT_USD_1.M_CCY_NUM) ='USD' and TRIM(SPOT_USD_1.M_CCY_DEN)=TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY) and SPOT_USD_1.M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalData_BAB_MDS:N --BAB_MDS
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_USD_2
  	ON TRIM(SPOT_USD_2.M_CCY_DEN) ='USD' and TRIM(SPOT_USD_2.M_CCY_NUM)=TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY) and SPOT_USD_2.M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalData_BAB_MDS:N --BAB_MDS
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_SAR_1
	 ON TRIM(SPOT_SAR_1.M_CCY_NUM) ='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT_SAR_1.M_CCY_DEN)=TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY) and SPOT_SAR_1.M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalData_BAB_MDS:N --BAB_MDS
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_SAR_2
  	ON TRIM(SPOT_SAR_2.M_CCY_DEN) ='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT_SAR_2.M_CCY_NUM)=TRIM(NOS.M_CURRENCY) and SPOT_SAR_2.M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalData_BAB_MDS:N --BAB_MDS 
left outer join  PARTIES_REP PARTIES
  ON TRIM(PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL)=TRIM(NOS.M_SERVICER) and PARTIES.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N -- BAB_KSA

select 
CAST(TPALL.M_NB AS NUMBER(30)) AS DEAL_REFERENCE,
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN AS DATE) as Trade_Date,
--TPALL.M_TP_BS as BUY_SELL,
CAST(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_BS),'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,M_TP_QTYEQ) AS NUMBER(26,2)) as BUY_AMOUNT,
CAST(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_BS),'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,M_TP_UQTYEQ) AS VARCHAR2(3)) as BUY_CURRENCY,
CAST(ABS(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)) AS NUMBER(26,10)) as RATE,
CAST(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_BS),'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,M_TP_QTYEQ) AS NUMBER(26,2)) as SELL_AMOUNT,
CAST(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_BS),'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,M_TP_UQTYEQ) AS VARCHAR2(3)) as SELL_CURRENCY,
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_DTEPMT as DATE ) as Value_Date,
CAST(' ' AS VARCHAR2(1)) as REUTERS_REF,
CAST(case when TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME) is not null then TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME) else TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP) end AS VARCHAR2(50)) as Counter_Party,
-- Below fields added as a part of validation comments - 20072022
CAST(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO AS VARCHAR2(50)) as CMP_TYPO,
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO AS VARCHAR2(25)) as Portfolio, 
CAST(TPALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD AS VARCHAR2(25)) as Source_Module,
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_TRADER AS VARCHAR2(20)) as Trader_User,
CAST(case when TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Banknotes' then TPALL.M_TP_FXGFWD else null END AS NUMBER(26,10)) AS Cover_Rate,
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_FXGFWD AS NUMBER(26,10)) AS Final_Fwd_Rate,
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_SMRTE AS NUMBER(26,10)) AS Margin,
CAST(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2),'DEAD','DEAD','LIVE') AS VARCHAR2(5)) AS DEAL_STATUS,
CAST(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO AS VARCHAR2(25)) AS PRODUCT,
CAST(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 AS DATE) as REPORT_DATE,
--CAST(case when TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Banknotes' then nvl(UDF.M_VAAMT,0) else null END  AS NUMBER(26,10)) AS PNL
CAST(NULL  AS NUMBER(26,10)) AS PNL,
CAST(TPALL.M_CONTRACT AS NUMBER(30)) AS CONTRACT_REF,
CAST(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_BUY),'B','Buy','S','Sell','')  AS VARCHAR2(5)) as SIDE

from 
TP_ALL_REP TPALL
left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
    on TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP)=TRIM(PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL) and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
--left outer join TRD_UDF_REP UDF
		--	ON TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=UDF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=UDF.M_REF_DATA
where 
   TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
   and M_TP_INT='N' 
   --and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' 
   and TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO) in ('Spot','FX Waad','FX Murabaha','SAMA Purchase','FX Swap','Time Option','Banknotes')
   --- and TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_MOPLSTL) not in ('RPL_M','RPL_D') 
   and TPALL.M_TP_MOPLSTL not like '%RPL_D%'
   and 
   (
   			TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'MONYY')=(select to_char(SYSDATE,'MONYY') from dual)
       or
      TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'MONYY')=(select to_char(SYSDATE-30,'MONYY') from dual)
       or
      TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'MONYY')=(select to_char(SYSDATE-60,'MONYY') from dual)
   )
   
   order by TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO

-----Details Section Data Retrieval
    select
    'Daily' as BREAKDOWN,
    TPALL.M_NB as TSD_ID,
    TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN as DEAL_DATE,
    PARTIES.M_CIF as CUSTOMER,           
    TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME) as CUSTOMER_NAME,
    DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ) as CCY_SELL,
    DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ) as CCY_BUY,
    DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ) as SOLD_AMOUNT,
    DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ)*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE as SOLD_AMOUNT_TO_CUS,
    TPALL.M_TP_PRICE as CUSTOMER_RATE,
   -- DECODE(TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0,0,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG1,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0) as DEAL_COVERING, --rate-margin need to update or get coverrate from screen after CR completed implementation
    ABS(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)) as DEAL_COVERING,
    ---((DECODE(TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0,0,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG1,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0))-TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)/DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ) as SALES_PROFIT,  ---coverrate-cusrate/sold amut
   -- ((TPALL.M_TP_PRICE-DECODE(TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0,0,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG1,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0)) * DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ)) as SALES_PROFIT, --cusrate-coverrate*sol amount
    UDF.M_VAAMT as SALES_PROFIT,
    0 as FREQ_COUNT
    
    from TP_ALL_REP TPALL, TP_RT_REP TPRT ,PARTIES_REP PARTIES,TRD_UDF_REP UDF
    where TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
    and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TPRT.M_REF_DATA(+) and TPALL.M_NB=TPRT.M_NB(+)
    and TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP=PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL(+) and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA(+)
    and TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=UDF.M_NB(+) and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=UDF.M_REF_DATA(+)
    and (TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SAL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SALES_%')
    and TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO not like 'SCF BR%'
    and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'MONYYYY') = TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'MONYYYY') 
    
    -----Frequency Section Data Retrieval
    union all
   -- select * from (
    select
    'Frequency' as BREAKDOWN,
    0 as TSD_ID,
    null as DEAL_DATE,
    ' ' as CUSTOMER,           
    DECODE(TRIM(M_TP_CMNT0),'','NOT_DEFINED',TRIM(M_TP_CMNT0)) as CUSTOMER_NAME,
    ' ' as CCY_SELL,
    ' ' as CCY_BUY,
    0 as SOLD_AMOUNT,
    0 as SOLD_AMOUNT_TO_CUS,
    0 as CUSTOMER_RATE,
    0 as DEAL_COVERING, 
    0 as SALES_PROFIT,
    case 
    when UPPER(TRIM(M_TP_CMNT0))='BY EMAIL' then 1
    when UPPER(TRIM(M_TP_CMNT0))='BY PHONE' then 1
    else 1
    END as FREQ_COUNT
    
    from TP_ALL_REP TPALL 
    where TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
    and (TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SAL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SALES_%')
    and TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO not like 'SCF BR%'
    and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YYYY')
   -- )
   -- where TRIM(CUSTOMER_NAME) <> ' '
       -----Sales profit CCY_BUY Section Data Retrieval
    union all
    select
    'CCY_BUY' as BREAKDOWN,
    0 as TSD_ID,
    null as DEAL_DATE,
    ' ' as CUSTOMER,           
    ' ' as CUSTOMER_NAME,
    ' ' as CCY_SELL,
    CCY_BUY as CCY_BUY,
    0 as SOLD_AMOUNT,
    0 as SOLD_AMOUNT_TO_CUS,
    0 as CUSTOMER_RATE,
    0 as DEAL_COVERING, 
    NVL(SUM(SALES_PROFIT),0) as SALES_PROFIT,
    0 as FREQ_COUNT
    
    from
   (
        select
        TRIM(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTY)) as CCY_BUY,
        --NVL(((DECODE(TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0,0,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG1,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0))-TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)/DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ),0) as SALES_PROFIT  ---coverrate-cusrate/sold amut
        NVL(((TPALL.M_TP_PRICE-DECODE(TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0,0,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG1,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0)) * DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ)),0) as SALES_PROFIT
        from TP_ALL_REP TPALL, TP_RT_REP TPRT
        where TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
        and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TPRT.M_REF_DATA(+) and TPALL.M_NB=TPRT.M_NB(+)
        and (TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SAL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SALES_%')
        and TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO not like 'SCF BR%'
        and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YYYY')
    ) 
    where SALES_PROFIT!=0
    group by CCY_BUY
    
     -----Sales profit CCY_SELL Section Data Retrieval
    union all
    
    select
    'CCY_SELL' as BREAKDOWN,
    0 as TSD_ID,
    null as DEAL_DATE,
    ' ' as CUSTOMER,           
    ' ' as CUSTOMER_NAME,
    CCY_SELL as CCY_SELL,
    ' ' as CCY_BUY,
    0 as SOLD_AMOUNT,
    0 as SOLD_AMOUNT_TO_CUS,
    0 as CUSTOMER_RATE,
    0 as DEAL_COVERING, 
    NVL(SUM(SALES_PROFIT),0) as SALES_PROFIT,
    0 as FREQ_COUNT
    
    from
   (
        select --TPALL.M_NB,M_TP_UQTY,M_TP_BUY,M_TP_NOMCUR,M_TP_UQTY,M_TP_UQTY,
        TRIM(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTY)) as CCY_SELL,
        --NVL(((DECODE(TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0,0,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG1,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0))-TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)/DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ),0) as SALES_PROFIT  ---coverrate-cusrate/sold amut
        NVL(((TPALL.M_TP_PRICE-DECODE(TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0,0,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG1,TPRT.M_TP_RTMMRG0)) * DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ)),0) as SALES_PROFIT
        from TP_ALL_REP TPALL, TP_RT_REP TPRT
        where TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
        and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TPRT.M_REF_DATA(+) and TPALL.M_NB=TPRT.M_NB(+)
        and (TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SAL_%' or TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'SALES_%')
        and TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO not like 'SCF BR%'
        and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YYYY')
    ) 
    where SALES_PROFIT!=0
    group by CCY_SELL

SELECT ERM.M_NB AS TRADEID,

       ERM.M_TP_LENTDSP AS ENTITY,
       ERM.M_TP_PFOLIO AS PORTFOLIO,

         ON LIQ.M_PORTFOLIO = ERM.M_TP_PFOLIO

WHERE ERM.M_CMP_TYPO IN ('Equity','Equity DPM','Private Equity','Sukuk Fund','Managed Fund','Mutual Fund','ETF','REIT')
AND   ERM.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalData:N

WITH IFRS_SECURITY_MASTER as 
(
select 
ISSUE_DATE, MATURITY_DATE, EXCEPTIONAL_RATING, SECURITY_RATING, SEC_INT_RATING, ISSUER,CONTRACT_ID, 
sum(OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT) OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT,
sum(OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT_LCY) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT_LCY,
sum(ACCRUED_INTEREST) ACCRUED_INTEREST,
CURRENCY, PRODUCT, PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION, EXCHANGE_RATE, IFRS9_CLASSIFICATION, sum(OUTSATNDING_PREMIUM_DISCOUNT) OUTSATNDING_PREMIUM_DISCOUNT, SECURITY_CODE
from (
    select
    TPALL.M_NB,
    SEC.M_SE_ISSD as ISSUE_DATE,
    SEC.M_SE_MAT as MATURITY_DATE,
    null as EXCEPTIONAL_RATING,
    null as SECURITY_RATING,
    null as SEC_INT_RATING,
    DECODE(TRIM(PARTIES.M_CIF),'','00000000',TO_CHAR(TRIM(PARTIES.M_CIF))) as ISSUER,
    'SC-'||SEC.M_SE_ISIN as CONTRACT_ID,
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT,
    case 
        when TPALL.M_TP_SECCUR='SAR' then TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL 
        when TPALL.M_TP_SECCUR='KES' then TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*0.03130 
        else TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*DECODE(NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0),0,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0),NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0))
    end as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT_LCY,
    NVL(TPALL.M_TP_RTACR02,0) as ACCRUED_INTEREST,
    TPALL.M_TP_SECCUR as CURRENCY,
   null as PRODUCT,
   'SUKUK.TREASURY' as PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION,
    case 
        when TPALL.M_TP_SECCUR='SAR' then 1 
        when TPALL.M_TP_SECCUR='KES' then 0.03130 
        else DECODE(NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0),0,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0),NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0))
    end as Exchange_Rate,
    'AMC' as IFRS9_CLASSIFICATION,
    CF.M_F_AMOUNT as OUTSATNDING_PREMIUM_DISCOUNT,
    SEC.M_SE_CODE as SECURITY_CODE
    from 
    TP_ALL_REP TPALL
    left join SECURITIES_REP SEC
        ON TPALL.M_TP_SECLBL=SEC.M_SE_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=SEC.M_REF_DATA
    left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
      on TPALL.M_TP_SECISS=PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2
        on SPOT2.M_DATE =TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM) ='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN)=DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_SECCUR),'CNH','CNY',TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_SECCUR))
     left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT22
      on SPOT22.M_DATE =TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_DEN) ='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_NUM)=DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_SECCUR),'CNH','CNY',TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_SECCUR))
      left outer join
      (
          select M_NB,M_REF_DATA,sum(M_F_AMOUNT) M_F_AMOUNT
          from cash_flow_rep where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
          and M_F_TYPELAB0='CAP' and M_F_TYPELAB1='NOM' and M_F_TYPELAB2='DIFF'
          group by M_NB,M_REF_DATA
     ) CF
     on CF.M_NB=TPALL.M_NB and CF.M_REF_DATA=TPALL.M_REF_DATA
    where 
    TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
    and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
    AND TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Sukuk')
 )
 group by ISSUE_DATE, MATURITY_DATE, EXCEPTIONAL_RATING, SECURITY_RATING, SEC_INT_RATING, ISSUER,CONTRACT_ID, 
 CURRENCY, PRODUCT, PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION, EXCHANGE_RATE, IFRS9_CLASSIFICATION, SECURITY_CODE

)
select 

cast(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY'), 'DD-MM-YYYY') as DATE) AS AS_OF_DATE,
cast(TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') as TIMESTAMP(9) ) AS INSERT_DATE_TIME,
cast(TRIM(TO_CHAR(ISSUE_DATE,'YYYYMMDD')) as VARCHAR2(10)) as ISSUE_DATE,
cast(TRIM(TO_CHAR(MATURITY_DATE,'YYYYMMDD')) as VARCHAR2(10)) as MATURITY_DATE,
cast(EXCEPTIONAL_RATING as VARCHAR2(5)) as EXCEPTIONAL_RATING,
cast(SECURITY_RATING as VARCHAR2(5)) as SECURITY_RATING,
cast(SEC_INT_RATING as VARCHAR2(5)) as SEC_INT_RATING,
cast(TRIM(ISSUER) as VARCHAR2(20)) as ISSUER,
cast(TRIM(CONTRACT_ID) as VARCHAR2(24)) as CONTRACT_ID, 
cast(OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT as NUMBER(24,2)) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT, 
cast(OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT_LCY as NUMBER(24,2)) as OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT_LCY, 
cast(ACCRUED_INTEREST as NUMBER(24,6)) as ACCRUED_INTEREST, 
cast(CURRENCY as VARCHAR2(3)) as CURRENCY, 
cast(TRIM(PRODUCT) as VARCHAR2(10)) as PRODUCT, 
cast(TRIM(PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION) as VARCHAR2(20)) as PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION, 
cast(EXCHANGE_RATE as NUMBER(24,6)) as EXCHANGE_RATE, 
cast(TRIM(IFRS9_CLASSIFICATION) as VARCHAR2(5)) as IFRS9_CLASSIFICATION, 
cast(OUTSATNDING_PREMIUM_DISCOUNT as NUMBER(24,6)) as OUTSATNDING_PREMIUM_DISCOUNT, 
cast(TRIM(SECURITY_CODE) as VARCHAR2(20)) as SECURITY_CODE
from IFRS_SECURITY_MASTER
