SELECT CP.M_CIF 
    , CP.M_DSP_LABEL AS NAME
    , CASE
        WHEN TPALL.M_TP_BUY = 'B'THEN 'Purchase'
        ELSE 'Sale'
    END AS Transaction_Type
    , TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR AS CURRENCY1
    , TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ AS CURRENCY2
    , TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL AS AMOUNT1
    , TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ AS AMOUNT2
    , TPALL.M_TP_PRICE AS DEAL_RATE
    , TPALL.M_TP_PRICE AS TREASURY_RATE
    , TPALL.M_TP_PRICE AS COVER_RATE
    , TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN AS DEAL_DATE
    , TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP AS VALUE_DATE
    , UDF.M_VDATE1 as SHIPMENT_DATE
    , TPALL.M_TP_DTEPMT AS SETTLEMENT_DATE 
    , ERM.M_MAXUTILIZA AS LIMIT_AMOUNT
    , ERM.M_AVAILABLE1 AS AVAILABLE_LIMIT
    , ERM.M_UTILIZATI0 AS UTILIZED_LIMIT
FROM TP_ALL_REP TPALL
    LEFT JOIN PARTIES_REP CP
        ON TPALL.M_REF_DATA = CP.M_REF_DATA
            AND TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP = CP.M_DSP_LABEL
    LEFT JOIN ERM_CPSR_UTLIM_REP ERM
        ON ERM.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataERM:N
           AND TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP)= TRIM(ERM.M_KEY)
    LEFT JOIN TRD_UDF_REP UDF
        ON  TPALL.M_REF_DATA = UDF.M_REF_DATA
            AND TPALL.M_NB = UDF.M_TRADE_REF
 
 
WHERE 1 = 1
    AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
    AND trim(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO) = 'Banknotes Credit'
    AND TPALL.M_TP_INT = 'N'

from
(
    select TRIM(M_TP_NOMCUR) as M_TP_NOMCUR,TRIM(M_TP_PFOLIO) as M_TP_PFOLIO, TRIM(M_NB) as M_NB,
    M_TP_FXGFWD,M_TP_PRICED,M_TP_NOMINAL,M_REP_DATE2,M_TP_DTETRN,M_TP_DTEEXP,TRIM(M_TP_UQTYEQ) as M_TP_UQTYEQ,
    TRIM(M_CNTLEVTL2) as M_CNTLEVTL2,TRIM(M_TP_MOPLSTL) as M_TP_MOPLSTL,M_CNTLEVTDT2,M_TP_TIMSYS,TRIM(M_TP_BUY) as M_TP_BUY,
    TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO) as M_CMP_TYPO,M_TP_CNTRP,M_REF_DATA,M_CONTRACT,TRIM(M_INSTRUMENT) as M_INSTRUMENT, M_TP_QTYEQ, M_PL_SM2, M_CNT_ORG
    from  TP_ALL_REP  TPALL
    where (TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO LIKE '%PRS%' OR TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO IN ('FX Waad', 'FX Swap'))       
           AND TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2) in ('LIVE','MKT_OP')
           AND TPALL.M_AMD_STS2 <> 'NA'
           AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
           and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
           and TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP!='10000030'
)TP_ALL
left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
on TRIM(TP_ALL.M_TP_CNTRP)=TRIM(PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL) and TP_ALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
left outer join
(
   select MAX(M_STP_LTVLTM) CONF_TIME, M_FC_ID,M_REF_DATA
   from STPFC_ENTRY_TBL_REP
   where TRIM(M_STP_LTVLTM) IS NOT NULL and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
   group by M_FC_ID,M_REF_DATA
) STPFC
                ON TP_ALL.M_CONTRACT=STPFC.M_FC_ID AND TP_ALL.M_REF_DATA=STPFC.M_REF_DATA
left outer join
(
    select M_NB,M_REF_DATA,M_TP_RTFV0,M_TP_RTFV1,M_TP_RTMMRG0,M_TP_RTMMRG1,
    M_TP_RTMCNV0,M_TP_RTMCNV1,M_TP_RTCUR1,M_TP_RTCUR0,M_TP_RTMRTE0,M_TP_RTMRTE1,M_TP_RTMNDD0, M_TP_RTMNDD1,
    (case
    when M_TP_RTMFRP0 like '%y%' then 'Y'
    when M_TP_RTMFRP0='6m' then 'S'
    when M_TP_RTMFRP0='3m' then 'Q'
    when M_TP_RTMFRP0 like '%m%' then 'M'
                when M_TP_RTMFRP0 like '%w%' then 'W'
                when M_TP_RTMFRP0 not like '%od%' and M_TP_RTMFRP0 like '%d%' then 'D'
    else 'A' end) as LEG1_FREQ,
    (case
    when M_TP_RTMFRP1 like '%y%' then 'Y'
    when M_TP_RTMFRP1='6m' then 'S'
    when M_TP_RTMFRP1='3m' then 'Q'
    when M_TP_RTMFRP1 like '%m%' then 'M'
    when M_TP_RTMFRP1 like '%w%' then 'W'
    when M_TP_RTMFRP1 not like '%od%' and M_TP_RTMFRP1 like '%d%' then 'D'
		else 'A' end) as LEG2_FREQ
    , regexp_replace(M_TP_RTMFRP0, '[^0-9]', '') as LEG1_MULT
    , regexp_replace(M_TP_RTMFRP1, '[^0-9]', '') as LEG2_MULT
from TP_RT_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N

) TP_RT
on TP_ALL.M_NB=TP_RT.M_NB and TP_ALL.M_REF_DATA=TP_RT.M_REF_DATA
left outer join CPTY_LEGALID_REP CPTY_LEGALID
  on TRIM(CPTY_LEGALID.M_CIF)=TRIM(PARTIES.M_CIF)
where 1=1
)

select 
CAST ('Daily' AS CHAR(30)) BRK_DOWN,
CAST (DDATE AS CHAR(30)) DDATE, 
CAST (sum(DIV_INCM_CLOSING) AS DECIMAL(24,0)) DIV_INCM_CLOSING, 
CAST (sum(DIV_INCM_TARGET)  AS DECIMAL(24,0)) DIV_INCM_TARGET,
CAST (sum(MF_INCM_CLOSING)  AS DECIMAL(24,0)) MF_INCM_CLOSING, 
CAST (sum(MF_INCM_TARGET)   AS DECIMAL(24,0)) MF_INCM_TARGET,
CAST (RANK() OVER (ORDER BY DDATE asc) AS DECIMAL(10,0)) MY_RANK,
CAST (0 AS DECIMAL(24,0)) NET_DAILY
from
(
select  
M_TP_DTETRN as DDATE,
NVL(sum(M_TP_NOMINAL),0) as DIV_INCM_CLOSING,
(select NVL(M_TARGETAMOUNT,0) from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where  M_REPORTNAME='INV_MF_DIV_INCOME' and M_TARGETMONTH='DAILY') as DIV_INCM_TARGET,
0 as MF_INCM_CLOSING,
0 as MF_INCM_TARGET
from TP_ALL_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
and TRIM(M_TP_PURPOSE) = 'Corporate action execution' and TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN,'MONYY')=TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'MONYY')
group by M_TP_DTETRN

union all

select  
M_TP_DTETRN as DDATE,
0 as DIV_INCM_CLOSING,
0 as DIV_INCM_TARGET,
NVL(sum(M_TP_NOMINAL),0) as MF_INCM_CLOSING,
(select NVL(M_TARGETAMOUNT,0) from BAB_REP_TARGETD_REP where   M_REPORTNAME='INV_MF_DIV_INCOME' and M_TARGETMONTH='DAILYMF') as MF_INCM_TARGET
from TP_ALL_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N 
and M_CMP_TYPO in ('SCF')
and TRIM(M_TP_PURPOSE) = 'Corporate action execution' and TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN,'MONYY')=TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'MONYY')
group by M_TP_DTETRN
)
where DIV_INCM_CLOSING>0 or MF_INCM_CLOSING>0
group by DDATE order by DDATE asc

select 
M_NB AS Reference1,
M_BROKER1 as Broker,
M_BROKER2 as Bank,
M_CMP_TYPO as TYPE1,
M_CPTY_NAME as Counter_Party,
M_TP_NOMCUR as Currency,
M_TP_NOMINAL as Principle_Amount,
M_TP_DTETRN as Trade_Date,
--M_TP_DTEPMT as Value_Date,
M_TP_DTEFST as Value_Date,
M_TP_DTEEXP  as Maturity_Date,
M_NO_OF_DAYS as DAYS1,
M_MATURITY_AMOUNT as Maturity_Amount,
M_PORTFOLIO as Portfolio, 
--PIR#19 deployment, as per user request updated to get the commodity broker fee instead of trade broker fee posted
--M_BROKER_FEE as Broker_Fee,
M_COMMODITY_BRK_FEE as Broker_Fee,
M_SOURCE_MODULE as Source_Module,
M_TRADER_USER as Trader_User,
M_COVER_RATE as Cover_Rate,
M_SALES_MARGIN as Sales_Margin,
M_CUSTOMER_RATE AS Customer_Rate,
M_DEAL_STATUS AS DEAL_STATUS,
M_CIF as CIF,
M_CONTRACT as CONTRACT_ID,
case 
      when M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing') and M_BANK='Y'       then M_PRODUCT_CODE||'_01'
      when M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing') and M_BROKER='Y'     then M_PRODUCT_CODE||'_02'
      when M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing') and M_CORPORATE='Y'  then M_PRODUCT_CODE||'_03'
    else M_PRODUCT_CODE end as Category
from 
BAB_TRN_ALL_REP
where M_CMP_TYPO in 
('Murabaha Borrowing','Murabaha Placement','DPM Murabaha','Wakala Borrowing',
 'Wakala Placement','Repo SAMA','Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad',
 'RR SAMA','RR Murabaha','RR Waad','SAMA Bill',
    --additionally added as per user request
 'Wakala Borrowing CFC')
AND M_TP_INT='N'
AND SYSDATE-M_TP_DTETRN<=60

TRIM(M_DESC): SQL to generate investment Sukuk OS report dashboard
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select 
CAST (rank() OVER (ORDER BY A.M_TP_DTEPMT desc) AS NUMBER(5)) as ORDER2
--,CAST (A.M_TP_DTETRN       			 								AS DATE) as TRADE_DATE
,CAST (A.M_TP_DTEPMT       			 								AS DATE) as TRADE_DATE
,CAST (A.M_REP_DATE2       			 								AS DATE) as REPORT_DATE
,CAST (A.CLOSING AS DECIMAL(32,8)) as CLOSING
/*,CAST (A.MONTH_NAME as VARCHAR(3)) as MONTH_NAME
,CAST (
case 
            when MONTH_NAME='JAN' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('JAN')),0)
            when MONTH_NAME='FEB' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('FEB')),0)
            when MONTH_NAME='MAR' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('MAR')),0)
            when MONTH_NAME='APR' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('APR')),0)
            when MONTH_NAME='MAY' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('MAY')),0)
            when MONTH_NAME='JUN' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('JUN')),0)
            when MONTH_NAME='JUL' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('JUL')),0)
            when MONTH_NAME='AUG' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('AUG')),0)
            when MONTH_NAME='SEP' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('SEP')),0)
            when MONTH_NAME='OCT' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('OCT')),0)
            when MONTH_NAME='NOV' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('NOV')),0)
            when MONTH_NAME='DEC' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('DEC')),0)
            else 0 ---NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('DEC')),0)
         end 
AS DECIMAL(24,2)) as Target1*/

from(
select 
----M_REP_DATE2-M_TP_DTETRN ORDER1,M_TP_DTETRN,M_REP_DATE2, --TRIM(SUBSTR(M_TP_DTETRN,4,3)) MONTH_NAME,
M_REP_DATE2-M_TP_DTEPMT ORDER1,M_TP_DTEPMT,M_REP_DATE2,
sum(M_CURRENCY_POS_MIL_SAR) as CLOSING 
from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP 
where 
M_CMP_TYPO in ('Sukuk') and M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD' and M_TP_INT='N'
---group by M_TP_DTETRN,M_REP_DATE2
group by M_TP_DTEPMT,M_REP_DATE2
) A

TRIM(M_DESC): E_TRN_ALL_DLY_REP
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select distinct
CAST(TPALL.M_NB                                             AS NUMBER(30))    AS NB
,CAST(TPALL.M_CONTRACT                                       AS NUMBER(30))    AS CONTRACT
,CAST(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2                                      AS DATE)         AS REP_DATE2
,CAST(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN                                      AS DATE)         AS TP_DTETRN
,CAST(TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP                                      AS DATE)         AS TP_DTEEXP
,CAST(TPALL.M_TP_DTEPMT                                       AS DATE)        AS TP_DTEPMT
,CAST(TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST                                       AS DATE)        AS TP_DTEFST
,CAST(TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YYYY')                     AS VARCHAR2(4))  AS REP_YEAR
,CAST(TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'YYYY')                     AS VARCHAR2(4))  AS TRN_YEAR
,CAST(TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YY')                       AS VARCHAR2(2))  AS REP_YR
,CAST(TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YY')                       AS NUMBER(2))  AS REP_YR_NUM
,CAST(TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'YY')                       AS VARCHAR2(2))  AS TRN_YR
,CAST(TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'MON')                      AS VARCHAR2(3))  AS REP_MON
,CAST(TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'MON')                      AS VARCHAR2(3))  AS TRN_MON
,CAST(TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)                                 AS VARCHAR2(30)) AS CMP_TYPO
,CAST(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR                                      AS VARCHAR2(3))  AS TP_NOMCUR
,CAST(TPALL.M_TRN_FMLY                                       AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS TRN_FMLY
,CAST(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP                                        AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS TRN_GRP
--,CAST(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL                                     AS DECIMAL(24,2)) AS TP_NOMINAL
,CAST(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL                                     AS NUMBER(24,8)) AS TP_NOMINAL
,CAST(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL * (1/1000000)                       AS DECIMAL(24,8)) AS TP_NOMINAL_MIL
,CAST(
   TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL 
   * (1/1000000)
   * DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0)))
                                                            AS DECIMAL(24,8)) AS TP_NOMINAL_MIL_SAR
,CAST(TPALL.M_TP_INT 																															AS VARCHAR2(1)) as TP_INT
,CAST(TPALL.M_INSTRUMENT AS VARCHAR2(35)) AS INSTRUMENT
,CAST(TPALL.M_INSTRLABEL AS VARCHAR2(20)) AS INSTRLABEL
,CAST(TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2 AS DECIMAL(24,2)) AS TP_LQTY2
,CAST(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE AS DECIMAL(25,8)) AS TP_PRICE
,CAST(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2) AS VARCHAR2(7)) AS TP_STATUS2

,CAST(TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO AS VARCHAR2(30)) as Portfolio 
,CAST(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2),'DEAD','DEAD','LIVE') AS VARCHAR2(5)) AS DEAL_STATUS
,CAST(case 
    when TPALL.M_TP_FEE0!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE0
    when TPALL.M_TP_FEE1!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE1
    when TPALL.M_TP_FEE2!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE2
    else TPALL.M_TP_FEE3 end AS NUMBER(26,2)) as BROKER_FEE
,CAST(TPALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD AS VARCHAR2(10)) as SOURCE_MODULE
,CAST(TPALL.M_TP_TRADER AS VARCHAR2(15)) as TRADER_USER
,CAST(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_PURPOSE) AS VARCHAR2(40)) as TP_PURPOSE
,CAST( DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ) AS VARCHAR2(3)) as BUY_CCY
,CAST( DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ) AS VARCHAR2(3)) as SELL_CCY
,CAST( DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ) AS NUMBER(26,2)) as BUY_AMOUNT
,CAST( DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ) AS NUMBER(26,2)) as SELL_AMOUNT
,CAST(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_BUY) AS VARCHAR2(1))  AS TP_BUY
,CAST(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_BS) AS VARCHAR2(1))  AS TP_BS
,CAST(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_ACCSCT) AS VARCHAR2(15))  AS TP_ACCSCT
,CAST(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_SECISS) AS VARCHAR2(15))  AS TP_SECISS


----Client Specific Calcualtions
,CAST(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL+CF_CPN.M_F_AMOUNT AS NUMBER(26,2)) as MATURITY_AMOUNT
,CAST(CF_CPN.M_F_AMOUNT AS NUMBER(26,2)) as PROFIT_AMOUNT
,CAST(TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN AS NUMBER(5)) as NO_OF_DAYS
,CAST(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE) AS NUMBER(25,8)) as COVER_RATE
,CAST(DECODE(NVL(TPALL.M_TP_SMRTE,0),0,TP_RT.M_TP_RTMMRG0,TPALL.M_TP_SMRTE) AS NUMBER(26,2)) as SALES_MARGIN
--,CAST(NVL(TPALL.M_TP_SMRTE,0) AS NUMBER(26,2)) as SALES_MARGIN
,CAST(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE - NVL(M_TP_SMRTE,0) AS NUMBER(26,2)) AS CUSTOMER_RATE
,CAST( case when NVL(M_TP_PRICED,0)=0 then 0 else NVL(M_TP_PRICED,0)-NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,0) end AS NUMBER(26,2)) as FX_ACCRUALS
,CAST((case 
    when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_FMLY)='EQD' then TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE
    when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='BOND' then TPALL.M_TP_IPAY-TPALL.M_TP_ACCAMT
    else TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL 
end) AS DECIMAL(30,6))                                      AS CURRENCY_POS
,CAST((case 
    when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_FMLY)='EQD' then TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE
    when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='BOND' then TPALL.M_TP_IPAY-TPALL.M_TP_ACCAMT
    else TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL 
end) * DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0)))
AS DECIMAL(32,8))                                            AS  CURRENCY_POS_SAR
,CAST((case 
    when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_FMLY)='EQD' then TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE
    when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='BOND' then TPALL.M_TP_IPAY-TPALL.M_TP_ACCAMT
    else TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL 
end) * (1/1000000) AS DECIMAL(32,8))                        AS  CURRENCY_POS_MIL
,CAST(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0))) AS DECIMAL(15,8)) SPOT_RATE
,CAST((case 
    when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_FMLY)='EQD' then TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE
    when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='BOND' then TPALL.M_TP_IPAY-TPALL.M_TP_ACCAMT
    else TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL 
end) * (1/1000000) * DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0)))
AS DECIMAL(32,8))                                            AS  CURRENCY_POS_MIL_SAR
,CAST( case when DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ)='SAR' 
   then DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ) 
   else DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ)*NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,1) 
   END AS NUMBER(26,2)
) as BUY_LCY_EQUIV ---SAR Equivalent
,CAST( case when DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ)='SAR' 
then DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ) 
else DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ)*NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,1)
END AS NUMBER(26,2)) as SELL_LCY_EQUIV ---SAR Equivalent
,CAST(TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO AS VARCHAR2(20)) AS TP_PFOLIO
,CAST(TPALL.M_TP_GID AS VARCHAR2(30)) AS TP_GID
,CAST(TPALL.M_CNT_VS2  AS DECIMAL(26,2)) as CNT_VS2
,CAST(TPALL.M_TP_TIMSYS AS VARCHAR2(15)) AS TP_TIMSYS
,CAST(TPALL.M_TP_YIELD AS DECIMAL(32,6)) as TP_YIELD
--,CAST(TPALL.M_REF_DATA AS NUMBER(10)) as REF_DATA
,CAST(PL.M_REF_DATA AS NUMBER(10)) as REF_DATA
,CAST(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP) AS VARCHAR2(35)) as TP_CNTRP
,CAST(TPALL.M_UDF_REF2 AS NUMBER(30)) as UDF_REF2
,CAST(TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ AS DECIMAL(24,2)) as TP_QTYEQ
,CAST(TRIM(TPALL.M_CNT_USG) AS VARCHAR2(5)) as CNT_USG
,CAST(TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPDSC) AS VARCHAR2(30)) as CMP_TYPDSC
,CAST(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_CNTRPID) AS VARCHAR2(15)) as TP_CNTRPID
,CAST(M_TP_DTESYS AS DATE) AS TP_DTESYS
,CAST(TPALL.M_TP_IQTYS AS DECIMAL(24,8)) AS TP_IQTYS

------Security Deails
,CAST(SEC.M_COUNTRY                                           AS VARCHAR2(2)) AS SEC_COUNTRY
,CAST(SEC.M_SE_SECTOR AS NUMBER(10)) AS SEC_SECTOR
,CAST(case 
when SEC.M_COUNTRY='SA'                           and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR=619              then 'KSA Sovereign'   -- 619=government
when SEC.M_COUNTRY IN ('AE','KW','QA','OM','BH')  and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR=619              then 'GCC Sovereign'   -- 619=government
when SEC.M_COUNTRY='SA'                           and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR in (583,584,585)              then 'KSA FI'          -- 585=Banks
when SEC.M_COUNTRY IN ('AE','KW','QA','OM','BH')  and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR in (583,584,585)              then 'GCC FI'          -- 585=Banks
when SEC.M_COUNTRY='SA' and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR NOT IN (583,584,585,619)                           then 'KSA Corporate'   -- Not in governrment & Bank
when SEC.M_COUNTRY IN ('AE','KW','QA','OM','BH')  and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR NOT IN (583,584,585,619) then 'GCC Corporate'   -- Not in governrment & Bank
when SEC.M_COUNTRY NOT IN ('SA','AE','KW','QA','OM','BH')                              then 'International'   -- All international other than SA and GCC
else '' 
end AS VARCHAR2(15)) AS SEC_TYPE_CLASSFN
,CAST(TRIM(SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP)  AS VARCHAR2(50)) SEC_UDF_INVTYP
,CAST(TRIM(SEC.M_SE_F_NAME) AS VARCHAR2(40)) SEC_F_NAME
,CAST(TPALL.M_TP_FXGFWD AS DECIMAL(26,8)) TP_FXGFWD
,CAST(TRIM(SEC.M_BT_COUPON) AS VARCHAR2(40)) SEC_BT_COUPON
,CAST(SEC.M_SE_MAT AS DATE)         AS SEC_SE_MAT
,CAST(TRIM(SEC.M_SE_LABEL) AS VARCHAR2(40)) SEC_SE_LABEL
,CAST(TRIM(SEC.M_SECTOR_LBL) AS VARCHAR2(50)) SEC_SECTOR_LABEL
,CAST(TRIM(SEC.M_SE_ISIN) AS VARCHAR2(20)) AS SEC_SE_ISIN
,CAST(TRIM(SEC.M_SE_CUR) AS VARCHAR2(20)) AS SEC_SE_CUR
,CAST(SEC.M_SE_ISSD AS DATE) AS SEC_ISU_DATE


----Pl Detailed details
,CAST(NVL(PL.M_PL_NFMV2,0) AS DECIMAL(24,2)) AS MTM_MKT_VAL
,CAST(NVL(PL.M_PL_NFMV2,0) * (1/1000000) AS DECIMAL(24,8)) AS MTM_MKT_VAL_MIL
,CAST(ROUND((PL.M_PL_CSFCP2 + PL.M_PL_CSFRV2 + PL.M_PL_FPNFCP2 + PL.M_PL_FPNFRV2 + PL.M_PL_NFMV2),0) AS DECIMAL(32,8)) as REVALUATION_AMOUNT
,CAST(ROUND((PL.M_PL_CSFCP2 + PL.M_PL_CSFRV2 + PL.M_PL_FPNFCP2 + PL.M_PL_FPNFRV2 + PL.M_PL_NFMV2),0)
* DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0))) AS DECIMAL(32,8)) as REVALUATION_AMOUNT_SAR
--,CAST((PL.M_PL_FPNFCP2 + PL.M_PL_FPNFRV2 + PL.M_PL_NFMV2 + PL.M_PL_FTFI2) AS DECIMAL(24,2)) UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS
--,CAST((PL.M_PL_FPNFCP2 + PL.M_PL_FPNFRV2 + PL.M_PL_NFMV2 + PL.M_PL_FTFI2)* (1/1000000)  AS DECIMAL(24,8)) UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS_MIL
,CAST(M_PL_CGU2 AS DECIMAL(24,2)) UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS
,CAST(M_PL_CGU2 AS DECIMAL(24,8)) UNREALIZED_GAIN_LOSS_MIL
,CAST(PL.M_MP_SPOT2 AS DECIMAL(24,8)) AS MARKET_PRICE
,CAST(CASE WHEN PL.M_PL_CUR='SAR' THEN PL.M_PLIRDACS12
           WHEN PL.M_PL_CUR='USD' THEN (PL.M_SC2_PL_MV * PL.M_PL_ACCMV2)
					END
				AS DECIMAL(16,2)) AS PREV_DAY_ACC

----Parties Details
,CAST(PARTIES.M_CIF AS VARCHAR2(10)) as CIF
,CAST(NVL(TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME),TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP)) AS VARCHAR2(255)) as CPTY_NAME
,CAST(TRIM(PARTIES.M_CTRY_DESC) AS VARCHAR2(40)) as CPTY_COUNTRY
,CAST(PARTIES.M_BANK AS VARCHAR2(1)) as BANK
,CAST(PARTIES.M_BROKER AS VARCHAR2(1)) as BROKER
,CAST(PARTIES.M_CORPORATE AS VARCHAR2(1)) as CORPORATE
,CAST(PARTIES.M_CUSTOMER AS VARCHAR2(1)) as CUSTOMER

-------UDF

,CAST(UDF.M_IS_BROKER1 AS VARCHAR2(20)) as BROKER1
,CAST(UDF.M_IS_BROKER2 AS VARCHAR2(20)) as BROKER2
,CAST(UDF.M_PROD_CODE AS VARCHAR2(10)) as PRODUCT_CODE
,CAST(UDF.M_COMMOD_CD AS VARCHAR2(15)) as COMMODITY_CODE
,CAST(UDF.M_COMMODITY AS VARCHAR2(25)) as COMMODITY_NAME
--,CAST(UDF.M_IS_BRPRICE AS DECIMAL(24,4)) AS COMMODITY_BRK_FEE
,CAST(UDF.M_IS_BRPRICE AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS COMMODITY_BRK_FEE
,CAST(UDF.M_BRK1_NAME AS VARCHAR2(255)) AS UDF_BRK_NAME

-------TP_RT
,CAST(TP_RT.M_TP_RTFV0 AS VARCHAR2(15)) as TP_RTFV0
,CAST(TP_RT.M_TP_RTFV1 AS VARCHAR2(15)) as TP_RTFV1
,CAST(DECODE(TP_RT.M_TP_RTMRTE0,0,TP_RT.M_TP_RTFXC02,TP_RT.M_TP_RTMRTE0) AS NUMBER(19,6)) AS LAST_COUPON_RATE
,CAST(TP_RT.M_TP_RTDCC02 AS DATE) as LAST_COUPON_DATE
,CAST(NVL(TP_RT.M_TP_RTDCN02,TP_RT.M_TP_RTDKC02) AS DATE) as NEXT_COUPON_DATE
,CAST(TP_RT.M_TP_RPRATE AS DECIMAL(25,8)) AS TP_RPRATE

-----Broker party
,CAST(PARTIES_BRK.M_CIF AS VARCHAR2(25)) as BROKER_CIF
,CAST(TRIM(PARTIES_BRK.M_NAME) AS VARCHAR2(30)) as BROKER_NAME
,CAST(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'USD',1,NVL(SPOT_USD2.M_MID,NVL(SPOT_USD22.M_MID,0)))  AS DECIMAL(32,6)) as SPOT_USD_RATE
,CAST(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0)))  AS DECIMAL(32,6)) as SPOT_SAR_RATE



from 
(
   select 
   MAX(M_CNT_VS2) as M_CNT_VS2,
   M_REF_DATA,M_NB ,MAX(M_CONTRACT) M_CONTRACT,M_REP_DATE2,M_TP_DTETRN,M_TP_DTEEXP,M_TP_DTEPMT,M_TP_DTEFST,M_CMP_TYPO,
   M_TP_NOMCUR,M_TP_UQTYEQ,M_TRN_FMLY,M_TRN_GRP,M_TP_NOMINAL,M_TP_INT,M_INSTRUMENT,
   M_INSTRLABEL,M_TP_LQTY2,M_TP_PRICE,M_TP_STATUS2,M_TP_PFOLIO,M_TP_FEE0,M_TP_FEE1,M_TP_FEE2,M_TP_FEE3,M_CNT_SRCMOD,M_TP_TRADER,M_TP_PURPOSE
   ,M_TP_BUY,M_TP_QTYEQ,M_TP_PRICED,M_TP_SMRTE,M_TP_IPAY,M_TP_ACCAMT,MAX(M_TP_GID) M_TP_GID,M_TP_TIMSYS,M_TP_YIELD,M_TP_FXGFWD,M_TP_CNTRP,M_TP_SECLBL
   ,M_TP_CNTRPID,MAX(M_UDF_REF2) M_UDF_REF2,M_TP_MOPLSTL,M_CNT_USG,M_CMP_TYPDSC,M_TP_BS,M_TP_ACCSCT,M_TP_SECISS,M_TP_DTESYS, M_TP_IQTYS
   --from TP_ALL_REP 
   from TP_ALL_DLY_REP 
   where
   --M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and
 		-- no cancelled deals #PIR 19 Deployment as per User request
		 (TRIM(M_TP_MOPLSTL) not in ('RPL_D', 'RPL_M') or TRIM(M_TP_MOPLSTL) is null)
   group by M_REF_DATA,M_NB,M_REP_DATE2,M_TP_DTETRN,M_TP_DTEEXP,M_TP_DTEPMT,M_TP_DTEFST,M_CMP_TYPO,
   M_TP_NOMCUR,M_TP_UQTYEQ,M_TRN_FMLY,M_TRN_GRP,M_TP_NOMINAL,M_TP_INT,M_INSTRUMENT,
   M_INSTRLABEL,M_TP_LQTY2,M_TP_PRICE,M_TP_STATUS2,M_TP_PFOLIO,M_TP_FEE0,M_TP_FEE1,M_TP_FEE2,M_TP_FEE3,M_CNT_SRCMOD,M_TP_TRADER,M_TP_PURPOSE
   ,M_TP_BUY,M_TP_QTYEQ,M_TP_PRICED,M_TP_SMRTE,M_TP_IPAY,M_TP_ACCAMT,M_TP_TIMSYS,M_TP_YIELD,M_TP_FXGFWD,M_TP_CNTRP,M_TP_SECLBL
   ,M_TP_CNTRPID,M_TP_MOPLSTL,M_CNT_USG,M_CMP_TYPDSC,M_TP_BS,M_TP_ACCSCT,M_TP_SECISS,M_TP_DTESYS,M_TP_IQTYS
)  TPALL 
left outer join SECURITIES_REP SEC
    ON TPALL.M_TP_SECLBL=SEC.M_SE_LABEL and @MxDataSetKey:N=SEC.M_REF_DATA 
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2
    on TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT2.M_DATE and TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR=SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN  and SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM='SAR'
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT22
    on TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT22.M_DATE and TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR=SPOT22.M_CCY_NUM  and SPOT22.M_CCY_DEN='SAR'
left outer join PL_DETAILED_REP PL
    on TPALL.M_NB=PL.M_NB AND @MxDataSetKey:N=PL.M_REF_DATA
left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
    on TPALL.M_TP_CNTRPID=PARTIES.M_LABEL and @MxDataSetKey:N=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA 
left outer join (
    select M_NB, M_REF_DATA, SUM(ABS(M_F_AMOUNT)) M_F_AMOUNT from CASH_FLOW_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN'
    group by  M_NB, M_REF_DATA
    ) CF_CPN
    ON TPALL.M_NB=CF_CPN.M_NB and @MxDataSetKey:N=CF_CPN.M_REF_DATA
left outer join TRD_UDF_REP UDF
    ON TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=UDF.M_NB and @MxDataSetKey:N=UDF.M_REF_DATA
left outer join (select M_REF_DATA,M_NB,M_TP_RTFV0,M_TP_RTFV1,M_TP_RTMRTE0,M_TP_RTDCC02,M_TP_RTDCN02,M_TP_RTDKC02,M_TP_RTFXC02,M_TP_RTMMRG0,M_TP_RPRATE from TP_RT_REP where M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N) TP_RT
    on TPALL.M_NB=TP_RT.M_NB AND @MxDataSetKey:N=TP_RT.M_REF_DATA
left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES_BRK
    on TRIM(UDF.M_IS_BROKER1)=TRIM(PARTIES_BRK.M_DSP_LABEL) and @MxDataSetKey:N=PARTIES_BRK.M_REF_DATA
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_USD2
    on SPOT_USD2.M_DATE =TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and SPOT_USD2.M_CCY_NUM ='SAR' and SPOT_USD2.M_CCY_DEN='USD'
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_USD22
    on SPOT_USD22.M_DATE =TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and SPOT_USD22.M_CCY_NUM ='USD' and SPOT_USD22.M_CCY_DEN='SAR'
where 
1=1

select * from BAB_NOSTRO_BALANCES_REP
where 
SUBSTR(TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER),0,3)='008'

SELECT distinct
CAST(Record_Status AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS Record_Status,
CAST(Transaction_Ref AS NUMBER(10)) AS Transaction_Ref,
CAST(T24_Reference AS VARCHAR(25)) AS T24_Reference,
CAST(No_of_Amendments AS VARCHAR2(6)) AS No_of_Amendments,
CAST(GB_Description AS CHAR(51)) AS GB_Description,
CAST(Deal_Type AS VARCHAR2(21)) AS Deal_Type,
CAST(Category_Code AS VARCHAR(10)) AS Category_Code,
CAST(Trade_Date AS DATE) AS Trade_Date,
CAST(Dealer_Desk AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS Dealer_Desk,
CAST(Deal_Currency AS VARCHAR2(3)) AS Deal_Currency,
CAST(Commodity_Code AS VARCHAR(20)) AS Commodity_Code,
CAST(Commodity_Name AS VARCHAR2(15)) Commodity_Name,
CAST(Com_Unit_Price AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS Com_Unit_Price,
CAST(Commodity_Quantity AS NUMBER(24)) AS Commodity_Quantity,
CAST(Broker_CIF AS VARCHAR2(50)) AS Broker_CIF,
CAST(Broker_Name AS VARCHAR2(255)) AS Broker_Name,
CAST(Brokerage_Amt AS NUMBER(20,2)) AS Brokerage_Amt,
CAST(Sale_Counterparty AS VARCHAR2(50)) AS Sale_Counterparty,
CAST(Counterparty_Name AS VARCHAR2(255)) AS Counterparty_Name,
CAST(Settlement_Date AS DATE) AS Settlement_Date,
CAST(Maturity_Date AS DATE) AS Maturity_Date,
CAST(Principal AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS Principal,
CAST(Principal_in_USD AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS Principal_in_USD,
CAST(Rate AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS Rate,
CAST(Total_Profit AS NUMBER(23,2)) AS Total_Profit,
CAST(No_Of_Days AS VARCHAR(20)) AS No_Of_Days,
CAST(Sell_Amount AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS Sell_Amount,
CAST(SUM_PRODUCT AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS SUM_PRODUCT,
CAST(Market_Rate AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS Market_Rate,
CAST(Accrual AS NUMBER(20,2)) AS Accrual,
CAST(Yield AS NUMBER(20,2)) AS Yield,
CAST(Inputter_2 AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS Inputter_2,
CAST(Inputter_2_name AS VARCHAR2(35)) AS Inputter_2_name,
CAST(Inputter_2_time AS VARCHAR2(35)) AS Inputter_2_time,
CAST(Inputter_1 AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS Inputter_1,
CAST(Inputter_1_name AS VARCHAR2(35)) AS Inputter_1_name,
CAST(Inputter_1_time AS VARCHAR2(35)) AS Inputter_1_time,
CAST(Authorizer AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS Authorizer,
CAST(Authorizer_name AS VARCHAR2(35)) AS Authorizer_name,
CAST(Authorizer_time AS VARCHAR2(35)) AS Authorizer_time,
CAST(Cparty_Limit_Code AS NUMBER(10,4)) AS Cparty_Limit_Code,
CAST(Company_Name AS VARCHAR2(20)) AS Company_Name,
CAST(Dept_Code AS VARCHAR(30)) AS Dept_Code,
CAST(Final_Rating AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS Final_Rating,
CAST(LTM_Final_Maturity_Date AS DATE) AS LTM_Final_Maturity_Date,
--CAST(Dates AS VARCHAR(10)) AS Dates,
CAST(GL_CAT AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS GL_CAT,
CAST(GL_Line AS VARCHAR2(30)) AS GL_Line,
CAST(LastUpdatedDt AS DATE) AS LastUpdatedDt
from
(
SELECT DISTINCT
TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2 as Record_Status,
TPALL.M_NB as Transaction_Ref,
TPALL.M_TP_GID as T24_Reference,
(TPALL.M_CNT_VS2-1) as No_of_Amendments,
TPALL.M_CMP_TYPDSC as GB_Description,
TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO as Deal_Type,
(CASE 
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CNT_TYPO)='Murabaha Borrowing' AND TRIM(TPALL.M_CNT_USG)='DI' AND TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO) LIKE '%LM%' THEN 21008
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CNT_TYPO)='Murabaha Borrowing' AND TRIM(TPALL.M_CNT_USG)='DI' AND TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO) NOT LIKE '%LM%' THEN 21003
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CNT_TYPO)='Murabaha Borrowing' THEN 21001
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CNT_TYPO)='LTM' THEN 21002
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CNT_TYPO)='Wakala Borrowing' THEN 21004
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CNT_TYPO)='Repo SAMA' THEN 21211--21075
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CNT_TYPO)='Murabaha Placement' THEN 21076
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CNT_TYPO)='DPM Murabaha' THEN 21078
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CNT_TYPO)='Wakala Placement' THEN 21079
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CNT_TYPO)='Repo Murabaha' THEN 21211
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CNT_TYPO)='RR SAMA' THEN 21251
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CNT_TYPO) IN ('SGDM','SFRM') THEN 21075
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CNT_TYPO)='PRS' THEN 29070
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CNT_TYPO)='FX Waad' THEN 20020
ELSE 0 END) AS Category_Code,
--TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN,'YYYYMMDD') as Trade_Date,
TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN as Trade_Date,
STS3.M_FOP_INT_GP AS Dealer_Desk,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as Deal_Currency,
UDF.M_COMMOD_CD AS Commodity_Code,
UDF.M_COMMODITY AS Commodity_Name,
UDF.M_IS_BRPRICE AS Com_Unit_Price,
DECODE(UDF.M_IS_BRPRICE,0,0,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ/UDF.M_IS_BRPRICE) AS Commodity_Quantity,
UDF.M_IS_BROKER1 as Broker_CIF,
UDF.M_BRK1_NAME as Broker_Name,
case 
when TPALL.M_TP_FEE0!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE0
when TPALL.M_TP_FEE1!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE1
when TPALL.M_TP_FEE2!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE2
else TPALL.M_TP_FEE3 end as Brokerage_Amt,
TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP as Sale_Counterparty,
PARTIES.M_NAME as Counterparty_Name,
--TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST, 'YYYYMMDD') as Settlement_Date,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST as Settlement_Date,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP as Maturity_Date,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as Principal,
ROUND(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'USD',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,DECODE(NVL(SPOT.M_MID,0),0,0,TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*NVL(1/SPOT.M_MID,0))),2) as Principal_in_USD,
ABS(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)) AS Rate,
CF.M_F_AMOUNT AS Total_Profit,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST as No_Of_Days,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL+CF.M_F_AMOUNT as Sell_Amount,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*(ABS(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE))) as SUM_PRODUCT,
ABS(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)) AS Market_Rate,
--ABS(NVL(TPALL.M_TP_RTACR02,0)) as Accrual,
PLMV.M_ACCRUAL_C as Accrual,
0 as Yield,
STS2.M_STP_LST_VD as Inputter_2,
STS2.M_USERNAME as Inputter_2_name,
STS2.M_STS_TMLNG AS Inputter_2_time,
DECODE(STS1.M_STP_LST_VD,null,STS3.M_STP_LST_VD,STS1.M_STP_LST_VD) as Inputter_1,
DECODE(STS1.M_USERNAME,null,STS3.M_USERNAME,STS1.M_USERNAME) as Inputter_1_name,
DECODE(STS1.M_STS_TMLNG,null,STS3.M_STS_TMLNG,STS1.M_STS_TMLNG) AS Inputter_1_time,
STS3.M_STP_LST_VD as Authorizer,
STS3.M_USERNAME as Authorizer_name,
STS3.M_STS_TMLNG AS Authorizer_time,
LMTCODES.LIMIT_REF as Cparty_Limit_Code,
'SA0010001' as Company_Name,
--TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO as Dept_Code,
GL_ACC.GL_DEPT_CODE as Dept_Code,
' ' as Final_Rating,
--(CASE WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='LTM' THEN TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP,'YYYYMMDD') ELSE '' END) LTM_Final_Maturity_Date,
(CASE WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='LTM' THEN TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP END) LTM_Final_Maturity_Date,
--TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTESYS,'dd/mm/yyyy') as Dates,
UDF.M_PROD_CODE as GL_CAT,
GL_ACC.GL_ACCT as GL_Line,
TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 as LastUpdatedDt
from TP_ALL_REP TPALL
left outer join (        
select sum(M_EN_AMT) CPN_AMT,M_NB_TRN from ACC_ENTRIES_REP where TRIM(M_EN_TYPELBL)='ACCRUAL' group by M_NB_TRN) CPN
ON TPALL.M_NB=CPN.M_NB_TRN
left outer join (select M_NB, M_REF_DATA, SUM(ABS(M_F_AMOUNT)) M_F_AMOUNT from CASH_FLOW_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN'
group by  M_NB, M_REF_DATA) CF
    ON TPALL.M_NB=CF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=CF.M_REF_DATA
left outer join PL_DETAILED_REP PL
    ON TPALL.M_NB=PL.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PL.M_REF_DATA
left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
    ON TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP=PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
left outer join TP_ALL_EXT_REP TPALLEXT
    ON TPALL.M_NB=TPALLEXT.M_NB AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TPALLEXT.M_REF_DATA
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT 
    ON TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT.M_DATE and TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR=SPOT.M_CCY_NUM and SPOT.M_CCY_DEN='USD'
left outer join
(select MAX(M_STP_LST_VD) as M_STP_LST_VD, MAX(M_STP_LTVLTM) as M_STS_TMLNG, M_FC_ID, M_FOP_INT_GP, MAX(M_USERNAME) as M_USERNAME, M_REF_DATA from STPFC_ENTRY_TBL_REP where M_STP_VL_LVL='Initial' and M_STP_LTVLTM IS NOT NULL group by M_FC_ID,M_FOP_INT_GP,M_REF_DATA) STS1--@MxDataSetKey:N)
    ON TPALL.M_CONTRACT=STS1.M_FC_ID AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA=STS1.M_REF_DATA
left outer join
(select MAX(M_STP_LST_VD) as M_STP_LST_VD, MAX(M_STP_LTVLTM) as M_STS_TMLNG, M_FC_ID, M_FOP_INT_GP, MAX(M_USERNAME) as M_USERNAME, M_REF_DATA from STPFC_ENTRY_TBL_REP where M_STP_VL_LVL='EventPending' and M_STP_LTVLTM IS NOT NULL group by M_FC_ID,M_FOP_INT_GP,M_REF_DATA) STS2--@MxDataSetKey:N)
    ON TPALL.M_CONTRACT=STS2.M_FC_ID AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA=STS2.M_REF_DATA
left outer join
(select max(M_STP_LST_VD) as M_STP_LST_VD, MAX(M_STP_LTVLTM) as M_STS_TMLNG, M_FC_ID, M_FOP_INT_GP, max(M_USERNAME) as M_USERNAME, M_REF_DATA from STPFC_ENTRY_TBL_REP where M_STP_VL_LVL in('NonEcoValidated','Matched') and M_STP_LTVLTM IS NOT NULL group by M_FC_ID,M_FOP_INT_GP,M_REF_DATA) STS3--@MxDataSetKey:N)
    ON TPALL.M_CONTRACT=STS3.M_FC_ID AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA=STS3.M_REF_DATA
left outer join TRD_UDF_REP UDF
    ON TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=UDF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=UDF.M_REF_DATA
left outer join (select distinct M_NB,M_REF_DATA,M_ACCRUAL_C from PLA_MV_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N) PLMV
    ON TPALL.M_NB=PLMV.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PLMV.M_REF_DATA
left OUTER JOIN
(select TRIM(M_T24CODE) as LIMIT_REF, TRIM(regexp_substr(M_LIMITPRODU, '[^##]+', 1, level)) as LIMIT_PRODUCT from LIMIT_CODES_REP
where TRIM(M_LIMITPRODU) not in ('NOT_DEFINED','N/A') AND TRIM(M_T24CODE) not in ('NOT_DEFINED','N/A')
connect by level <= regexp_count(M_LIMITPRODU, '[^##]+') group by M_T24CODE, M_LIMITPRODU, level) LMTCODES
on TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)=LMTCODES.LIMIT_PRODUCT
LEFT OUTER JOIN
(
select TAB1.M_NB, TAB1.M_TP_BUY, TAB1.M_EN_AMT, TAB1.M_EN_CUR, TAB1.M_NB_RULE, TAB1.M_NB_ENTRY, TAB1.GL_ACCT, TAB1.GL_DEPT_CODE from 
(select distinct T1.M_NB, T1.M_TP_BUY, T2.M_EN_AMT, T2.M_EN_CUR, T2.M_NB_RULE, T2.M_NB as M_NB_ENTRY, MAX(T2.M_NB) over (partition BY T1.M_NB) M_MAX_NB_ENTRY,
--select distinct T1.M_NB, T1.M_TP_BUY, T2.M_EN_AMT, T2.M_EN_DEBIT, T2.M_EN_CREDIT, T2.M_EN_CUR, T2.M_NB_RULE, --T2.M_NB, --T1.M_REF_DATA,
(CASE WHEN T1.M_TP_BS='B' THEN DECODE(TRIM(T2.M_EN_DEBIT), 'Migration Account','Migration Account', TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)))
ELSE DECODE(TRIM(T2.M_EN_CREDIT), 'Migration Account','Migration Account',TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4))) END) AS GL_ACCT,
(CASE WHEN T1.M_TP_BS='B' THEN 
(CASE
	WHEN TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
	ELSE TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))
END)

ELSE 
(CASE
	WHEN TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
	ELSE TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))
END)

END) AS GL_DEPT_CODE
from TP_ALL_REP T1, ACC_JOURNAL_REP T2, ACC_RULES_REP T3, ACC_ENTRIES_REP T4
where T1.M_TP_BUY=T2.M_NB_BS and ROUND(T1.M_TP_NOMINAL,2)=ROUND(T2.M_EN_AMT,2) and T1.M_REF_DATA=T2.M_REF_DATA and T1.M_NB=T2.M_NB_TRN and T1.M_TP_NOMCUR=T2.M_EN_CUR 
and T2.M_NB_RULE=T3.M_RULE_NB
and (T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Payable%' or T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Receivable%' or T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Balances%' or T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Capital-Pay%' or T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Capital-Receive%' ) 
and T3.M_RULE_LB not like '%OBS%' and T2.M_NB_TRN<>0
and TRIM(T2.M_NB)=TRIM(T4.M_NB(+)) and NVL(T4.M_NB_REVERSE,'N') <>'Y' --and T4.M_EN_OFFSET=0
and T1.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N) TAB1 
where M_NB_ENTRY=M_MAX_NB_ENTRY) GL_ACC
on TPALL.M_NB=GL_ACC.M_NB and TPALL.M_TP_BUY=GL_ACC.M_TP_BUY 
where 
--TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Placement','DPM Murabaha','Wakala Placement','RR SAMA','RR Murabaha','RR Waad','Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing','Repo SAMA','Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad','LTM','SFRM','SGDM')
--AND
TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2) in ('LIVE','MKT_OP')
AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N' 
order by TRANSACTION_REF)

select 
M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
M_CLOSING_BALANCE*(-1) as M_CLOSING_BALANCE
from 
BAB_NOSTRO_BALANCES_REP
where SUBSTR(TRIM(M_ACCOUNT_NUMBER),0,3)='008'

TRIM(M_DESC): Sql to generate Monthly FX Blotter Report
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select
   TRN_ALL.M_NB AS DEAL_REFERENCE,
   TRN_ALL.M_TP_DTETRN as Trade_Date,
   TRN_ALL.M_BUY_AMOUNT as BUY_AMOUNT, 
   TRN_ALL.M_BUY_CCY as BUY_CURRENCY,
   TRN_ALL.M_TP_PRICE as RATE,
   TRN_ALL.M_SELL_AMOUNT as SELL_AMOUNT,
   TRN_ALL.M_SELL_CCY as SELL_CURRENCY,
   TRN_ALL.M_TP_DTEPMT as Value_Date,
   '' as REUTERS_REF,
   TRN_ALL.M_CPTY_NAME as Counter_Party,
   TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO,
   TRN_ALL.M_TP_PFOLIO as Portfolio, 
   TRN_ALL.M_SOURCE_MODULE as Source_Module,
   TRN_ALL.M_TRADER_USER as Trader_User,
   case when TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Banknotes' then TRN_ALL.M_TP_FXGFWD else null END AS Cover_Rate,
   TRN_ALL.M_TP_FXGFWD AS Final_Fwd_Rate,
   TRN_ALL.M_SALES_MARGIN AS Margin,
   TRN_ALL.M_DEAL_STATUS AS DEAL_STATUS,
   TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO AS PRODUCT,
   null AS PNL,
   TRN_ALL.M_CONTRACT as CONTRACT_ID,
   TRN_ALL.M_CIF as CIF

from 
BAB_TRN_ALL_REP TRN_ALL 
where TRN_ALL.M_TP_INT='N' 
   and TRIM(TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO) in ('Spot','FX Waad','FX Murabaha','SAMA Purchase','FX Swap','Time Option','Banknotes')
    /*  and 
   (
   			TO_CHAR(TRN_ALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'MONYY')=(select to_char(SYSDATE,'MONYY') from dual)
       or
      TO_CHAR(TRN_ALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'MONYY')=(select to_char(SYSDATE-30,'MONYY') from dual)
       or
      TO_CHAR(TRN_ALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'MONYY')=(select to_char(SYSDATE-60,'MONYY') from dual)
   )*/
   
	AND SYSDATE-M_TP_DTETRN<=60
   
   order by TRN_ALL.M_CMP_TYPO

TRIM(M_DESC): SQL to generate the investment Sukuk outstanding deals detail report
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select
CAST (REF_NO        			 								AS NUMBER(24))    M_REF_NO,
CAST (NAME1    					 										AS CHAR(30))      M_NAME1, 
CAST (VALUE_DATE 				 									AS DATE)          M_VALUE_DATE,
CAST (EXPIRY_DATE     			 						AS DATE)          M_EXPIRY_DATE,
CAST (CURRENCY     				 								AS CHAR(3))       M_CURRENCY,
CAST (INVESTMENT      	          AS DECIMAL(24,2)) M_INVESTMENT,
CAST (INVESTMENT/1000000    	 			 AS DECIMAL(32,8)) M_INVESTMENT_MIL,
CAST (TOTAL_ISSUE_SIZE        		 AS NUMBER(24))    M_TOTAL_ISSUE_SIZE,
CAST (RATE                       AS CHAR(10))      M_RATE,
CAST (NEXT_COUPON 				 							 AS DATE)          M_NEXT_COUPON,
CAST (COUPON_AMT                 AS DECIMAL(24,2)) M_COUPON_AMT,
CAST (CATEGORY1    				 							 AS CHAR(30))      M_CATEGORY1,
CAST (ACCRUED_PROFIT             AS DECIMAL(24,2)) M_ACCRUED_PROFIT,
CAST (PORTFOLIO    				 							 AS CHAR(15))      M_PORTFOLIO,
CAST (TO_CHAR(VALUE_DATE,'MON')  AS CHAR(3))       M_TRN_MON,
CAST (TO_CHAR(VALUE_DATE,'YY')   AS CHAR(2))       M_TRN_YR,
CAST (TO_CHAR(REP_DATE,'MON')    AS CHAR(3))       M_REP_MON,
CAST (TO_CHAR(REP_DATE,'YY')     AS CHAR(2))       M_REP_YR
from 
(
        select 
        TPALL.M_NB as REF_NO,
        TPALL.M_INSTRUMENT as NAME1,
        TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN as VALUE_DATE,
        TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP as EXPIRY_DATE,
        TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as CURRENCY,
        (   case 
            when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_FMLY)='EQD' then TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE
            when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='BOND' then TPALL.M_TP_IPAY-TPALL.M_TP_ACCAMT
            else TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL end
        ) as INVESTMENT,
        SEC.M_SE_NOUT as TOTAL_ISSUE_SIZE,
        CF1.M_F_CCRATE ||' %' as RATE,
        CF1.M_F_VALUE as NEXT_COUPON,
        --ABS(CF.M_F_AMOUNT) as COUPON_AMT,
        ABS(CF1.M_F_AMOUNT) as COUPON_AMT,
        CASE 
        WHEN SEC.M_COUNTRY='SA'  and TRIM(SEC.M_BT_SECTOR)='Government'                    then 'KSA Government'
        WHEN SEC.M_COUNTRY<>'SA' and TRIM(SEC.M_BT_SECTOR)='Government' and SEC.M_AREA=503 then 'GCC Government'
        WHEN SEC.M_COUNTRY='SA'  and TRIM(SEC.M_BT_SECTOR)='Corporate'                     then 'KSA Corporate'
        WHEN SEC.M_COUNTRY<>'SA' and TRIM(SEC.M_BT_SECTOR)='Corporate' and SEC.M_AREA=503  then 'GCC Corporate'
        WHEN SEC.M_COUNTRY='SA'  and TRIM(SEC.M_BT_SECTOR) NOT IN ('Government','Corporate')                     then 'KSA Financial Institution'
        WHEN SEC.M_COUNTRY<>'SA' and TRIM(SEC.M_BT_SECTOR) NOT IN ('Government','Corporate')  and SEC.M_AREA=503 then 'GCC Financial Institution'
        ELSE 'International' END
        as CATEGORY1,
        --(TPALL.M_TP_ACCCPN*TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL)/100 as Accured_Profit
        ((ABS(CF1.M_F_CCFRMNUM - CF1.DATDIF)*CF1.M_F_CCRATE*TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2)/360) as ACCRUED_PROFIT,
        TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO as PORTFOLIO,
        TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 as REP_DATE
        from
        (
              select M_NB,M_INSTRUMENT,M_TP_DTETRN,M_TP_DTEEXP,M_TP_NOMCUR,M_REP_DATE2,
              M_TP_LQTY2,M_TP_DTEFLWL,M_TP_ACCCPN,M_TP_NOMINAL,M_REF_DATA,M_TP_SECLBL, M_TP_PFOLIO,M_TP_ACCAMT,M_TP_IPAY,M_TRN_GRP,M_TRN_FMLY,M_TP_PRICE
              from TP_ALL_REP 
              where
              M_CMP_TYPO in ('Sukuk') --- ,'Sukuk Fund') --,'Sukuk Issuance')
              and M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD' and M_TP_INT='N' -- and TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN,'YYYY')= TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYY')
              and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N  
        ) TPALL
        left join SECURITIES_REP SEC 
            ON TPALL.M_TP_SECLBL=SEC.M_SE_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=SEC.M_REF_DATA
         left join 
         (  
                select M_NB,M_F_VALUE,SUM(M_F_AMOUNT) M_F_AMOUNT, M_REF_DATA ,M_TP_DTESYS, 
                M_F_VALUE-M_TP_DTESYS, rank() OVER (PARTITION BY M_NB ORDER BY M_F_VALUE-M_TP_DTESYS) RANK
                from cash_flow_rep 
                where M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN' and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
                group by M_NB,M_F_VALUE,M_REF_DATA,M_TP_DTESYS
         ) CF 
         ON TPALL.M_NB=CF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=CF.M_REF_DATA and CF.RANK=2
         -- Added by Rajesh for Rate column change as suggested by AK 11072022
         LEFT JOIN
        (select M_NB, M_REF_DATA,M_F_VALUE, M_F_AMOUNT, M_F_CCFRMNUM, M_TP_DTESYS, M_F_CCRATE, (M_F_VALUE-M_TP_DTESYS) AS DATDIF, rank() OVER (PARTITION BY M_NB ORDER BY M_F_VALUE-M_TP_DTESYS) RANK
            from cash_flow_rep 
            where M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN' and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N AND (M_F_VALUE-M_TP_DTESYS) >= 0
            group by M_NB,M_F_VALUE,M_REF_DATA, M_F_VALUE, M_F_AMOUNT, M_F_CCFRMNUM, M_TP_DTESYS, M_F_CCRATE) CF1
         ON TPALL.M_NB=CF1.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=CF1.M_REF_DATA and CF1.RANK=1
        where 
        1=1
)

TRIM(M_DESC): Limit Utilization Data Generation

    when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='BOND' then TPALL.M_TP_IPAY-TPALL.M_TP_ACCAMT

end) * DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0))) AS DECIMAL(32,8)) AS CURRENCY_POS_SAR,
CAST((case 
    when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_FMLY)='EQD' then TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE
    when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='BOND' then TPALL.M_TP_IPAY-TPALL.M_TP_ACCAMT

CAST((case

    when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='BOND' then TPALL.M_TP_IPAY-TPALL.M_TP_ACCAMT
    else TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL 
end) * (1/1000000) * DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0))) AS DECIMAL(32,8)) 
AS  CURRENCY_POS_MIL_SAR,
/*CAST((case 
    when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_FMLY)='EQD' then TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2 * TPALL.M_TP_PRICE * DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',1,-1)
    when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='BOND' then TPALL.M_TP_IPAY-TPALL.M_TP_ACCAMT
    else TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL 
end) * (1/1000000) * DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0))) AS DECIMAL(32,8)) AS  CUR_POS_MIL_SAR_BS,*/
TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL AS  CUR_POS_MIL_SAR_BS,
CAST(SEC.M_COUNTRY AS VARCHAR2(2)) AS COUNTRY,
CAST(SEC.M_SE_SECTOR AS NUMBER(4)) AS SE_SECTOR,
CAST(case 
   /*when SEC.M_COUNTRY='SA'                           and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR=619              then 'KSA Sovereign'   -- 619=government
   when SEC.M_COUNTRY IN ('AE','KW','QA','OM','BH')  and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR=619              then 'GCC Sovereign'   -- 619=government
   when SEC.M_COUNTRY='SA'                           and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR in (583,584,585)              then 'KSA FI'          -- 585=Banks
   when SEC.M_COUNTRY IN ('AE','KW','QA','OM','BH')  and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR in (583,584,585)             then 'GCC FI'          -- 585=Banks
   when SEC.M_COUNTRY='SA' and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR NOT IN (583,584,585,619)                           then 'KSA Corporate'   -- Not in governrment & Bank
   when SEC.M_COUNTRY IN ('AE','KW','QA','OM','BH')  and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR NOT IN (583,584,585,619) then 'GCC Corporate'   -- Not in governrment & Bank
   when SEC.M_COUNTRY NOT IN ('SA','AE','KW','QA','OM','BH') and TRIM(SEC.M_COUNTRY) is not null then 'International'   -- All international other than SA and GCC
   else '' */
   when SEC.M_COUNTRY IN 'SA'                           						and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR=619              then 'KSA Sovereign'   -- 619=government
   when SEC.M_COUNTRY IN ('AE','KW','QA','OM','BH')     						and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR=619              then 'GCC Sovereign'   -- 619=government
   when SEC.M_COUNTRY NOT IN ('SA','AE','KW','QA','OM','BH')   and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR=619              then 'INT Sovereign'   -- 619=government
   
   when SEC.M_COUNTRY IN 'SA'                           						and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR in (583,584,585)             then 'KSA FI'          -- 585=Banks
   when SEC.M_COUNTRY IN ('AE','KW','QA','OM','BH')  								and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR in (583,584,585)             then 'GCC FI'          -- 585=Banks
   when SEC.M_COUNTRY NOT IN ('SA','AE','KW','QA','OM','BH')   and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR in (583,584,585)             then 'INT FI'          -- 585=Banks

   when SEC.M_COUNTRY IN ('AE','KW','QA','OM','BH')            and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR NOT IN (583,584,585,619,0)     then 'GCC Corporate'   -- Not in governrment & Bank
   when SEC.M_COUNTRY NOT IN ('SA','AE','KW','QA','OM','BH')   and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR NOT IN (583,584,585,619,0)     then 'INT Corporate'   -- Not in governrment & Bank
   
   --when SEC.M_COUNTRY NOT IN ('SA','AE','KW','QA','OM','BH') and TRIM(SEC.M_COUNTRY) is not null then 'International'   -- All international other than SA and GCC

from 
    TP_ALL_REP TPALL 
left outer join SECURITIES_REP SEC
    ON TPALL.M_TP_SECLBL=SEC.M_SE_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=SEC.M_REF_DATA 
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2
    on TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT2.M_DATE and TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR=SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN  and SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM='SAR'
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT22
    on TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT22.M_DATE and TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR=SPOT22.M_CCY_NUM  and SPOT22.M_CCY_DEN='SAR'
left outer join PL_DETAILED_REP PL
			on TPALL.M_NB=PL.M_NB AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PL.M_REF_DATA
left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
		on TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP=PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
where 
TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N  
AND TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2) <> 'DEAD'

and M_CMP_TYPO NOT in ('Spot','SCF BR WHT NPAY','SCF BR VAT RC','Murabaha Com Paper','Wakala Borrowing CFC',
'Drawings','Wakala Placement','Wakala Borrowing','Murabaha Borrowing','PRS','SAMA Purchase')

and (TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_MOPLSTL) not in ('RPL_D', 'RPL_M') or TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_MOPLSTL) is null)
AND TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'

------Security Deails
,CAST(SEC.M_COUNTRY                                           AS VARCHAR2(2)) AS SEC_COUNTRY
,CAST(SEC.M_SE_SECTOR AS NUMBER(10)) AS SEC_SECTOR
,CAST(case 
when SEC.M_COUNTRY='SA'                           and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR=619              then 'KSA Sovereign'   -- 619=government
when SEC.M_COUNTRY IN ('AE','KW','QA','OM','BH')  and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR=619              then 'GCC Sovereign'   -- 619=government
when SEC.M_COUNTRY='SA'                           and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR in (583,584,585)              then 'KSA FI'          -- 585=Banks
when SEC.M_COUNTRY IN ('AE','KW','QA','OM','BH')  and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR in (583,584,585)              then 'GCC FI'          -- 585=Banks
when SEC.M_COUNTRY='SA' and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR NOT IN (583,584,585,619)                           then 'KSA Corporate'   -- Not in governrment & Bank
when SEC.M_COUNTRY IN ('AE','KW','QA','OM','BH')  and SEC.M_SE_SECTOR NOT IN (583,584,585,619) then 'GCC Corporate'   -- Not in governrment & Bank
when SEC.M_COUNTRY NOT IN ('SA','AE','KW','QA','OM','BH')                              then 'International'   -- All international other than SA and GCC
else '' 
end AS VARCHAR2(15)) AS SEC_TYPE_CLASSFN

,CAST(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0)))  AS DECIMAL(32,6)) as SPOT_SAR_RATE



from 
(
   select 
   MAX(M_CNT_VS2) as M_CNT_VS2,
   M_REF_DATA,M_NB ,MAX(M_CONTRACT) M_CONTRACT,M_REP_DATE2,M_TP_DTETRN,M_TP_DTEEXP,M_TP_DTEPMT,M_TP_DTEFST,M_CMP_TYPO,
   M_TP_NOMCUR,M_TP_UQTYEQ,M_TRN_FMLY,M_TRN_GRP,M_TP_NOMINAL,M_TP_INT,M_INSTRUMENT,
   M_INSTRLABEL,M_TP_LQTY2,M_TP_PRICE,M_TP_STATUS2,M_TP_PFOLIO,M_TP_FEE0,M_TP_FEE1,M_TP_FEE2,M_TP_FEE3,M_CNT_SRCMOD,M_TP_TRADER,M_TP_PURPOSE
   ,M_TP_BUY,M_TP_QTYEQ,M_TP_PRICED,M_TP_SMRTE,M_TP_IPAY,M_TP_ACCAMT,MAX(M_TP_GID) M_TP_GID,M_TP_TIMSYS,M_TP_YIELD,M_TP_FXGFWD,M_TP_CNTRP,M_TP_SECLBL
   ,M_TP_CNTRPID,MAX(M_UDF_REF2) M_UDF_REF2,M_TP_MOPLSTL,M_CNT_USG,M_CMP_TYPDSC,M_TP_BS,M_TP_ACCSCT,M_TP_SECISS,M_TP_DTESYS, M_TP_IQTYS, M_TP_SECLOTU,M_TP_RTACR02,M_TP_IQTY,M_TP_RTFXC02, M_TP_DTELST
   from TP_ALL_REP 
   where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
    		-- no cancelled deals #PIR 19 Deployment as per User request
   			and (TRIM(M_TP_MOPLSTL) not in ('RPL_D', 'RPL_M') or TRIM(M_TP_MOPLSTL) is null)
   group by M_REF_DATA,M_NB,M_REP_DATE2,M_TP_DTETRN,M_TP_DTEEXP,M_TP_DTEPMT,M_TP_DTEFST,M_CMP_TYPO,
   M_TP_NOMCUR,M_TP_UQTYEQ,M_TRN_FMLY,M_TRN_GRP,M_TP_NOMINAL,M_TP_INT,M_INSTRUMENT,
   M_INSTRLABEL,M_TP_LQTY2,M_TP_PRICE,M_TP_STATUS2,M_TP_PFOLIO,M_TP_FEE0,M_TP_FEE1,M_TP_FEE2,M_TP_FEE3,M_CNT_SRCMOD,M_TP_TRADER,M_TP_PURPOSE
   ,M_TP_BUY,M_TP_QTYEQ,M_TP_PRICED,M_TP_SMRTE,M_TP_IPAY,M_TP_ACCAMT,M_TP_TIMSYS,M_TP_YIELD,M_TP_FXGFWD,M_TP_CNTRP,M_TP_SECLBL
   ,M_TP_CNTRPID,M_TP_MOPLSTL,M_CNT_USG,M_CMP_TYPDSC,M_TP_BS,M_TP_ACCSCT,M_TP_SECISS,M_TP_DTESYS,M_TP_IQTYS, M_TP_SECLOTU,M_TP_RTACR02,M_TP_IQTY,M_TP_RTFXC02, M_TP_DTELST
)  TPALL 
left outer join SECURITIES_REP SEC
    ON TPALL.M_TP_SECLBL=SEC.M_SE_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=SEC.M_REF_DATA 
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2
    on TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT2.M_DATE and TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR=SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN  and SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM='SAR'
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT22
    on TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT22.M_DATE and TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR=SPOT22.M_CCY_NUM  and SPOT22.M_CCY_DEN='SAR'
left outer join PL_DETAILED_REP PL
    on TPALL.M_NB=PL.M_NB AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PL.M_REF_DATA
left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
    on TPALL.M_TP_CNTRPID=PARTIES.M_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA 
left outer join (
    select M_NB, M_REF_DATA, SUM(ABS(M_F_AMOUNT)) M_F_AMOUNT from CASH_FLOW_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN'
    group by  M_NB, M_REF_DATA
    ) CF_CPN
    ON TPALL.M_NB=CF_CPN.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=CF_CPN.M_REF_DATA
left outer join TRD_UDF_REP UDF
    ON TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=UDF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=UDF.M_REF_DATA
left outer join (select M_REF_DATA,M_NB,M_TP_RTFV0,M_TP_RTFV1,M_TP_RTMRTE0,M_TP_RTDCC02,M_TP_RTDCN02,M_TP_RTDKC02,M_TP_RTFXC02,M_TP_RTMMRG0,M_TP_RPRATE from TP_RT_REP where M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N) TP_RT
    on TPALL.M_NB=TP_RT.M_NB AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TP_RT.M_REF_DATA
left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES_BRK
    on TRIM(UDF.M_IS_BROKER1)=TRIM(PARTIES_BRK.M_DSP_LABEL) and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES_BRK.M_REF_DATA
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_USD2
    on SPOT_USD2.M_DATE =TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and SPOT_USD2.M_CCY_NUM ='SAR' and SPOT_USD2.M_CCY_DEN='USD'
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_USD22
    on SPOT_USD22.M_DATE =TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and SPOT_USD22.M_CCY_NUM ='USD' and SPOT_USD22.M_CCY_DEN='SAR'

1=1

TRIM(M_DESC): SQL to generate investment Sukuk Revenue report dashboard
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select
CAST (M_NB        														AS NUMBER(24))    M_NB,
CAST (TRN_DATE    														AS CHAR(9))       M_DDATE, 
CAST (ACCURAL/1000000 								    AS DECIMAL(32,8)) M_DLY_REVENUE,
CAST (TRN_MON     														AS CHAR(3))       M_TRN_MON,
CAST (REP_MON     														AS CHAR(3))       M_REP_MON,
CAST (REP_YEAR    														AS CHAR(4))       M_REP_YEAR,
CAST (REP_YR      														AS CHAR(2))       M_REP_YR,
--CAST (REP_DD_MON      										 AS CHAR(6))       M_REP_DD_MON,
CAST (NOM_CLOSING/1000000 								AS DECIMAL(32,8)) M_NOM_CLOSING,
CAST (M_TP_NOMCUR     											AS CHAR(3))       M_TP_NOMCUR
from 
(
   select 
   TP_ALL.M_NB,
   NVL(PLA_MV.M_ACCRUAL_C,0) ACCURAL, ---converted to millions
   TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN,'DD-MON-YY') as TRN_DATE,
   TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN,'MON') TRN_MON,
   TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'MON') REP_MON,
   TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYY') REP_YEAR,
   TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YY') REP_YR,
   TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'DD-MON') REP_DD_MON,
   NVL((case when TRIM(M_TRN_FMLY)='EQD' then M_TP_LQTY2*M_TP_PRICE when TRIM(M_TRN_GRP)='BOND' then M_TP_IPAY-M_TP_ACCAMT else M_TP_NOMINAL end),0) as NOM_CLOSING,
   M_TP_NOMCUR
   
    from 
    (
        select  M_NB,M_REF_DATA ,M_TP_DTETRN, M_REP_DATE2,M_TRN_FMLY,M_TP_LQTY2,M_TP_PRICE,M_TRN_GRP,M_TP_IPAY,M_TP_ACCAMT,M_TP_NOMINAL,M_TP_NOMCUR
        from 
        TP_ALL_REP 
        where 
        M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD' and M_TP_INT='N' 
        and TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO) in ('Sukuk')
        and TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN,'YYYY')= TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYY')
        and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N       
    ) TP_ALL
    left outer join  
    (
    select distinct M_NB,M_REF_DATA,M_ACCRUAL_C --- accural in acc currency ie in SAR
    from PLA_MV_REP 
    where 
    TRIM(M_CNT_TYPO) in ('Sukuk')
    and M_MV_LEG=0 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
    AND m_nb IN (
        select  M_NB  
        from 
        TP_ALL_REP 
        where 
        M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD' and M_TP_INT='N' 
        and TRIM(M_CMP_TYPO) in ('Sukuk') --,'Sukuk Fund')
        and TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN,'YYYY')= TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYY')
        and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N 
        )
    ) PLA_MV
    on TP_ALL.M_NB=PLA_MV.M_NB and TP_ALL.M_REF_DATA=PLA_MV.M_REF_DATA
    where 1=1
)

TRIM(M_DESC): SQL REQUEST FOR PRS DEALS
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select 
TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2 AS DEAL_STATUS,
TPALL.M_NB AS Reference1,
UDF.M_IS_BROKER1 as Broker,
UDF.M_IS_BROKER2 as Bank,
TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO as TYPE1,
TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME) as Counter_Party,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as Currency,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as Principal_Amount,
TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN as Trade_Date,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST as Value_Date,
--TPALL.M_TP_DTEPMT as Value_Date,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP  as Maturity_Date,
ABS(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)) as COVER_RATE,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST as DAYS1,
--TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_TP_DTESYS as DAYS1,
--TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL+CF.M_F_AMOUNT as Maturity_Amount,
DECODE(RT.M_TP_RTPR0,'P','Pay','Receive') as LEG1,
DECODE(RT.M_TP_RTPR1,'P','Pay','Receive') as LEG2,
DECODE(RT.M_TP_RTFV0,'F','Fixed','Floating') as TYPE_LEG1,
DECODE(RT.M_TP_RTFV1,'F','Fixed','Floating') as TYPE_LEG2,
RT.M_TP_RTCUR0 as CURRENCY_LEG1,
RT.M_TP_RTCUR1 as CURRENCY_LEG_2,
--ABS(DECODE(RT.M_TP_RTFV0,'F',RT.M_TP_RTMRTE0,RT.M_TP_RTFXC02+RT.M_TP_RTMMRG0)) as RATE_LEG1,
ABS(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE+TPALL.M_TP_SMRTE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED+TPALL.M_TP_SMRTE,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE+TPALL.M_TP_SMRTE)) as RATE_LEG1,
ABS(DECODE(RT.M_TP_RTFV1,'F',RT.M_TP_RTMRTE1,RT.M_TP_RTFXC12+RT.M_TP_RTMMRG1)) as RATE_LEG2,
RT.M_TP_RTMFRC0 as CALC_FREQ_LEG1,
RT.M_TP_RTMFRC1 as CALC_FREQ_LEG2,
-- Below fields added for Validation feedbacks - 24072022
TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO as Portfolio, 
CF1.M_F_AMOUNT as Leg1_Maturity_Amount,
CF2.M_F_AMOUNT as Leg2_Maturity_Amount,
TPALL.M_TP_SMRTE as Sales_Margin_BP,
UDF.M_VAAMT as Sales_Margin_Amount,
ABS(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE+TPALL.M_TP_SMRTE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED+TPALL.M_TP_SMRTE,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE+TPALL.M_TP_SMRTE)) as CLIENT_RATE,
case 
when TPALL.M_TP_FEE0!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE0
when TPALL.M_TP_FEE1!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE1
when TPALL.M_TP_FEE2!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE2
else TPALL.M_TP_FEE3 end as Broker_Fee,
TPALL.M_CNT_SRCMOD as Source_Module,
TPALL.M_TP_TRADER as Trader_User
from TP_ALL_REP TPALL
--left outer join (
--select M_NB, M_REF_DATA, SUM(ABS(M_F_AMOUNT)) M_F_AMOUNT from CASH_FLOW_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN'
--group by  M_NB, M_REF_DATA
--) CF
--ON TPALL.M_NB=CF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=CF.M_REF_DATA
left outer join TRD_UDF_REP UDF
ON TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=UDF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=UDF.M_REF_DATA
left outer join TP_RT_REP RT
ON TPALL.M_NB=RT.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=RT.M_REF_DATA
left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
on TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP=PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
left outer join (
select M_NB, M_REF_DATA, M_F_LEG, M_F_TYPELAB2, SUM(M_F_AMOUNT) M_F_AMOUNT from CASH_FLOW_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN' and M_F_LEG=0
group by  M_NB, M_REF_DATA, M_F_LEG, M_F_TYPELAB2 
) CF1
ON TPALL.M_NB=CF1.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=CF1.M_REF_DATA
left outer join (
select M_NB, M_REF_DATA, M_F_LEG, M_F_TYPELAB2, SUM(M_F_AMOUNT) M_F_AMOUNT from CASH_FLOW_REP where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN' and M_F_LEG=1
group by  M_NB, M_REF_DATA, M_F_LEG, M_F_TYPELAB2 
) CF2
ON TPALL.M_NB=CF2.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=CF2.M_REF_DATA
where TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
--and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
and M_TP_INT='N' and TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_MOPLSTL) not in ('RPL_M','RPL_D')
--AND TPALL.M_AMD_STS2<>'NA' AND TPALL.M_AMD_STS2<>'CA'
AND TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in('PRS','PRS Range','PRS CapFloorCollar','PRS Inverse Floater')
---AND TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN=to_date('20220518','YYYYMMDD')
--and TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2
--and TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN=to_date('20220616','YYYYMMDD')
   ---and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'MONYY')=TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'MONYY')
   and 
   (
   			TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'MONYY')=(select to_char(SYSDATE,'MONYY') from dual)
       or
      TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'MONYY')=(select to_char(SYSDATE-30,'MONYY') from dual)
       or
      TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'MONYY')=(select to_char(SYSDATE-60,'MONYY') from dual)
   )
order by TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO

FROM
(select
TP_RT.M_TP_RTFV0,
TPALL.M_NB as CONTRACT_REFERENCE,
TPALL.M_TP_GID as F_CONTRACT_REFERENCE,
NVL(TRIM(TRD_UDF.M_PROD_CODE),'0000') AS CONTRACT_TYPE,
TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO as CONTRACT_DESC,
PARTIES.M_CIF AS COUNTERPARTY_CODE,
TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN AS TRADE_DATE,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST AS VALUE_DATE,
--TPALL.M_TP_DTEPMT as VALUE_DATE,
TP_RT.M_TP_RTMAT0 as MATURITY_DATE,
TPALL.M_TP_PRICE as RATE_VALUE,
TP_RT.M_TP_RTMFRP0,
case
when TP_RT.M_TP_RTMFRP0 like '%y%' then 'A'
when TP_RT.M_TP_RTMFRP0='6m' then 'S'
when TP_RT.M_TP_RTMFRP0='3m' then 'Q'
when TP_RT.M_TP_RTMFRP0 like '%m%' or TP_RT.M_TP_RTMFRP0 like '%w%' then 'M'
else 'N' end as PERIODICITY,
CAST (4 AS NUMBER(18,2)) as ACCRUAL_BASIS,
'F' as AMORTIZING_TYPE,
CF.M_F_VALUE as NEXT_COUPON_DATE,
case 
when M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Placement','DPM Murabaha','Wakala Placement','RR SAMA','RR Murabaha','RR Waad') then TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL
when M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing','Repo SAMA','Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad') then (-1)*TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL
else TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL end as NOMINAL,
NVL(TPALL.M_TP_RTACR02,0) as ACCRUALS,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as CURRENCY,
0 as UNPAID_PRINCIPAL,
CAST(0 as NUMBER (20)) AS INTERESTS_AND_CHARGES,
0 as MKT_SPREAD,
0 as FEES,
--case
--when TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing','DPM Murabaha')
--then TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL ELSE -1*TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL END OUTSTANDING,
case 
when M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Placement','DPM Murabaha','Wakala Placement','RR SAMA','RR Murabaha','RR Waad') then TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL
when M_CMP_TYPO in ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing','Repo SAMA','Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad') then (-1)*TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL
else TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL end as OUTSTANDING,
CAST (0 AS NUMBER(18,2)) as ACCRUED_FEES,
case when TP_RT.M_TP_RTFV0='F' then 'FIXED' else 'FLOATING' END as RATE_TYPE,
case when TP_RT.M_TP_RTFV0='F' then '' else 
(
case when M_TP_RTMFRP0 like '%y%' then '0'||UPPER(TRIm(M_TP_RTMFRP0))||'00M00D' 
when M_TP_RTMFRP0 like '%m%' then '00Y0'||UPPER(TRIm(M_TP_RTMFRP0))||'00D'
when M_TP_RTMFRP0 like '%od%' then '00Y00M01D'
when M_TP_RTMFRP0 like '%w%' then '00Y00M'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(M_TP_RTMFRP0,0,1))*7||'D'
else '00Y00M00D' end
)
end as TENOR,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR||'_LIB_SWAP' as CURVE_NAME,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR||'_LIB_SWAP' as DISCOUNT_CURVE_NAME
from TP_ALL_REP TPALL
left outer join TRD_UDF_REP TRD_UDF
on TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=TRD_UDF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TRD_UDF.M_REF_DATA
left outer join PARTIES_REP PARTIES
on TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP=PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
left outer join TP_RT_REP TP_RT
on TPALL.M_NB=TP_RT.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=TP_RT.M_REF_DATA
left join
(
select M_NB,M_F_VALUE,SUM(M_F_AMOUNT) M_F_AMOUNT, M_REF_DATA ,M_TP_DTESYS,
M_F_VALUE-M_TP_DTESYS, rank() OVER (PARTITION BY M_NB ORDER BY M_F_VALUE-M_TP_DTESYS) RANK
from cash_flow_rep
where M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN'
and M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
and M_F_VALUE>=M_TP_DTESYS
group by M_NB,M_F_VALUE,M_REF_DATA,M_TP_DTESYS
) CF
ON TPALL.M_NB=CF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=CF.M_REF_DATA and CF.RANK=2

where
TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD'
and (TPALL.M_TRN_GRP='LN_BR' or TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO IN ('SGDM','SFRM'))
and M_TP_INT='N' and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N

select * from 
(SELECT
CAST (T1.M_ACCOUNT_N  AS CHAR(30)) ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
CAST (NVL(T1.M_OPENING_BALANCE,0) AS DECIMAL(26,3)) OPENING_BALANCE,
CAST (NVL(T3.T24_MOVEMENT,0) AS DECIMAL(26,3)) T24_MOVEMENT,
CAST (NVL(T1.M_CLOSING_BALANCE,0) AS DECIMAL(26,3)) CLOSING_BALANCE,
CAST (T1.M_VALUE_DATE AS DATE) VALUE_DATE
from
(select T1.M_ACCOUNT_N, T2.M_AMOUNT as M_OPENING_BALANCE,  T1.M_AMOUNT as M_CLOSING_BALANCE, T1.M_REP_DATE2 AS M_VALUE_DATE, M_REF_DATA--, T3.T24_MVMT AS T24_MOVEMENT--,T1.M_REF_DATA, T3.M_REF_DATA

(select M_ACCOUNT_N, M_REP_DATE2, M_REF_DATA, SUM(M_AMOUNT) AS M_AMOUNT from  BAB_NOSTRO_RSK_REP where
TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYYMMDD')=TO_CHAR((select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N),'YYYYMMDD')

and TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED') AND M_ACCOUNT_N is not null group by M_ACCOUNT_N, M_REP_DATE2, M_REF_DATA) T1,



(select M_ACCOUNT_N, M_REP_DATE2, SUM(M_AMOUNT) AS M_AMOUNT from  BAB_NST_RSK_C_REP where
TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYYMMDD')=TO_CHAR((select M_REP_DATE2-1 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N),'YYYYMMDD')

and TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED') AND M_ACCOUNT_N is not null group by M_ACCOUNT_N, M_REP_DATE2, M_REF_DATA) T2
--(select M_ACCOUNT_N, M_REF_DATA, M_BENEFICIA, SUM(M_AMOUNT) AS T24_MVMT from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP where M_PRODUCER1='SCF' and M_REF_DATA=421 and TRIM(M_BENEFICIA)='CTP_CORPORATE' AND TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED') AND DECODE(M_PROD_ID,0,M_PRODUCERO,M_PROD_ID)<>1550 group by M_ACCOUNT_N, M_REF_DATA, M_BENEFICIA) T3  
where

and TRIM(T1.M_REP_DATE2-1)=TRIM(T2.M_REP_DATE2(+))
--and T1.M_ACCOUNT_N='008100058780007'
--and TRIM(T1.M_ACCOUNT_N)=TRIM(T3.M_ACCOUNT_N(+))
--and T1.M_REF_DATA=T3.M_REF_DATA
--and T1.M_REF_DATA=428

LEFT OUTER JOIN
(select M_ACCOUNT_N, M_REF_DATA, M_BENEFICIA, SUM(M_AMOUNT) AS T24_MOVEMENT from BAB_NOSTRO_CONTR_REP where M_PRODUCER1='SCF' and
TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYYMMDD')=TO_CHAR((select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N),'YYYYMMDD')
--TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYYMMDD')=TO_CHAR((select M_REP_DATE2 from TP_ALL_REP where rownum=1 and M_REF_DATA=876),'YYYYMMDD')
and TRIM(M_BENEFICIA)='CTP_CORPORATE' AND TRIM(M_SETTLEMEN) in ('PENDING','SETTLED')

ON TRIM(T1.M_ACCOUNT_N)=TRIM(T3.M_ACCOUNT_N) and T1.M_REF_DATA=T3.M_REF_DATA and TRIM(T3.M_BENEFICIA) is not null) 
where TRIM(ACCOUNT_NUMBER) is not null and TRIM(ACCOUNT_NUMBER)<>' '

WITH NOSTRO_CURRENCY AS 
(
SELECT M_DDATE AS DDATE, M_CURRENCY AS CURRENCY, 
SUM(M_AMOUNT_USD) AS POSITION_USD,
SUM(M_AMOUNT_SAR) AS POSITION_SAR, 
DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY M_DDATE DESC) RANK_INQ ,
SUM(M_AMOUNT) AS POSITION_FCY
,M_COUNTERPARTY, M_SERVICER
FROM BAB_FXU_NOS_DATA_REP --where M_currency='CAD'
GROUP BY M_DDATE, M_CURRENCY,M_COUNTERPARTY, M_SERVICER
)

SELECT 
CAST(DDATE AS DATE) AS DDATE,
CAST(CURRENCY AS VARCHAR2(3)) AS CURRENCY,
--CAST(CONV_RATE_USD AS NUMBER(25,5)) AS CONV_RATE_USD,
CAST(POSITION_USD AS NUMBER(25,3)) AS POSITION_USD,
--CAST(CONV_RATE_SAR AS NUMBER(25,5)) AS CONV_RATE_SAR,
CAST(POSITION_SAR AS NUMBER(25,3)) AS POSITION_SAR,
CAST(POSITION_FCY AS NUMBER(25,3)) AS POSITION_FCY,
CAST(RANK_INQ AS NUMBER(3)) AS RANK_OUTQ,
CAST(AVG(POSITION_SAR) OVER (PARTITION BY CURRENCY ORDER BY RANK_INQ ROWS BETWEEN RANK_INQ PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS NUMBER(25,3)) AS AVG_POSN
,CAST(M_COUNTERPARTY AS VARCHAR2(255)) AS COUNTERPARTY,
CAST(M_SERVICER AS VARCHAR2(32)) AS CIF,
CAST(B.M_MAX0 AS NUMBER(25,3)) AS MAX_LIMIT
from NOSTRO_CURRENCY A
LEFT OUTER JOIN BAB_LRB_NOS_RISK_REP B
ON TRIM(A.CURRENCY) = TRIM(B.M_SECONDKEY) AND TRIM(A.M_SERVICER) = TRIM(B.M_KEY)
ORDER BY DDATE DESC

/*

AVG(POSITION_SAR) OVER (PARTITION BY CURRENCY ORDER BY RANK ROWS BETWEEN RANK PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS AVG_POSN
from NOSTRO_CURRENCY */

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN NST.M_PRODUCER1 IN ('FT Nostro Nostro') THEN 'MX'
        WHEN NST.M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Banknotes','Dual Currency Deposit','Spot','SAMA Bill') OR NST.M_PRODUCER1 LIKE '%FX%' THEN 'MXFX'
        WHEN NST.M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad','Murabaha Borrowing','Repo SAMA','RR SAMA','Murabaha Borrowing',
        'Wakala Placement','SAMA Purchase','RR Murabaha','RR Waad','Murabaha Placement','Wakala Borrowing','DPM Murabaha') THEN 'MXMM'
        WHEN NST.M_PRODUCER1 LIKE '%LTM%' OR NST.M_PRODUCER1 LIKE '%Sukuk%' THEN 'MXFI'
        WHEN NST.M_PRODUCER1 LIKE '%Fund%' OR NST.M_PRODUCER1 LIKE '%Equity%' THEN 'MXEQ'
        WHEN NST.M_PRODUCER1 LIKE '%PRS%' THEN 'MXIR'  
        WHEN NST.M_PRODUCER1 IN ('SFRM','SGDM') THEN 'MXIR'       
        WHEN NST.M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Brokerage Fee') THEN 'MXBR'
        WHEN NST.M_PRODUCER1 IN ('SCF','SCF BR VAT RC','SCF BR WHT PAY','SCF BR VAT') THEN 'MXSCF'
        WHEN NST.M_PRODUCER1 IN ('Collateral') THEN 'MXCOL'
        ELSE 'MX' END || NVL(TRN.M_CONTRACT,NST.M_ID) AS TRN_REF,
    ENT.M_EN_DEBIT AS DEBIT_ACCOUNT,
    ENT.M_EN_CUR AS DEBIT_CURRENCY, 
    (CASE WHEN REGEXP_SUBSTR(ENT.M_EN_DEBIT,'[^-]*-[^-]*-([^-]*)',1,1,NULL,1) IN ('1005', '1010') THEN ABS(ENT.M_EN_AMT) END) AS DEBIT_AMOUNT,
    ENT.M_EN_DATE AS DEBIT_VALUE_DATE,
    ENT.M_EN_CREDIT AS CREDIT_ACCOUNT,
    ENT.M_EN_CUR AS CREDIT_CURRENCY, 
    (CASE WHEN REGEXP_SUBSTR(ENT.M_EN_CREDIT,'[^-]*-[^-]*-([^-]*)',1,1,NULL,1) IN ('1005', '1010') THEN ABS(ENT.M_EN_AMT) END) AS CREDIT_AMOUNT,
    ENT.M_EN_DATE AS CREDIT_VALUE_DATE, 
    ENT.M_EN_CREDIT AS ACCOUNT_NB, 
    ENT.M_EN_CUR AS ACCOUNT_CURRENCY,
    NST_BAL.OPENING + NST_BAL.CUMULATIVE_MVT - NST.M_AMOUNT AS OPENING_BALANCE,
    NST.M_AMOUNT AS BAL_MOV,
    NST_BAL.OPENING + NST_BAL.CUMULATIVE_MVT AS CLOSING_BALANCE,
    TRN.M_TP_CNTRP AS CUSTOMER_CIF,
    ENT.M_NB AS ENTRY_REF,
    RUL.M_RULE_LB AS RULE_LABEL,
    NST.M_REP_DATE2 + 1 AS SYSTEM_DATE, 
    ENT.M_EN_COMMENT AS ENTRY_COMMENT
FROM BAB_NOSTRO_CASH_REP NST 
        LEFT JOIN TP_ALL_REP TRN
            ON NST.M_TRADEREFE = TRN.M_NB 
            		  AND NST.M_PRODUCER_ = 'Single financial contract'
                AND TRN.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataTRN:N
        LEFT JOIN ACC_ENTRIES_REP ENT 
            ON NST.M_REFERENCE = ENT.M_NB_TRN 
                AND ENT.M_TYPE_NB = 'PAY'
                AND ENT.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataACC:N 
        LEFT JOIN ACC_RULES_REP RUL
            ON ENT.M_NB_RULE = RUL.M_RULE_NB 
                AND RUL.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataRL:N 
        LEFT JOIN (SELECT NST.M_REFERENCE,
            SUM(CASE 
                WHEN NST.M_TYPE = 'OPENING' THEN NST.M_AMOUNT END)
                    OVER (PARTITION BY NST.M_ACCOUNT_N, NST.M_CURRENCY, NST.M_SETTLEMEN) AS OPENING,   
            SUM(NST.M_AMOUNT) 
                OVER (PARTITION BY NST.M_ACCOUNT_N, NST.M_CURRENCY, NST.M_SETTLEMEN) AS CLOSING,
                SUM(CASE WHEN NST.M_TYPE = 'MOVEMENT' THEN NST.M_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) 
                OVER (PARTITION BY NST.M_ACCOUNT_N, NST.M_CURRENCY, NST.M_SETTLEMEN 
                    ORDER BY NST.M_REFERENCE ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS CUMULATIVE_MVT
            FROM BAB_NOSTRO_CASH_REP NST
            WHERE NST.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataNST:N 
                AND NST.M_TYPE <> 'CLOSING'
        ) NST_BAL
            ON NST.M_REFERENCE = NST_BAL.M_REFERENCE
WHERE 
    NST.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
    --AND TRN.M_TP_DTETRN = TRN.M_REP_DATE2
    AND NST.M_VALUE_DAT = NST.M_REP_DATE2
    AND NST.M_TYPE = 'MOVEMENT'
    AND (REGEXP_SUBSTR(ENT.M_EN_CREDIT,'[^-]*-[^-]*-([^-]*)',1,1,NULL,1) = @MXACCOUNT:N--IN('1010','1005')
        OR REGEXP_SUBSTR(ENT.M_EN_DEBIT,'[^-]*-[^-]*-([^-]*)',1,1,NULL,1) = @MXACCOUNT:N)--IN('1010','1005'))

select

TOTAL_PURCHASE_AMOUNT,MTM,
MTM-TOTAL_PURCHASE_AMOUNT as UNRELALISED_GAIN_LOSS,
DIVIDENT,
(MTM-TOTAL_PURCHASE_AMOUNT)+DIVIDENT as TOTAL_INCOME,
MTM+DIVIDENT as NET_TOTAL,
--case 
--when ((MTM-TOTAL_PURCHASE_AMOUNT)+DIVIDENT) <=0 THEN 0
--else 
(((MTM-TOTAL_PURCHASE_AMOUNT)+DIVIDENT)/DECODE(TOTAL_PURCHASE_AMOUNT, 0, 1, TOTAL_PURCHASE_AMOUNT)) as PA_RETURN
from
(
select 
M_NB as TRADE_ID,
DECODE(TRIM(M_SEC_SE_CODE),'',M_SEC_SE_ISIN,M_SEC_SE_CODE) as  SERIAL_NUMBER,
M_TP_DTETRN as DEAL_DATE,
M_TP_DTEPMT as VALUE_DATE,

M_TP_LQTY2 as UNITS_SUBSCRIBED,
M_TP_PRICE as PER_UNIT_PURCHASE_PRICE,
M_TP_BUY,

M_MTM_MIL_SAR * 1000000 as MTM,
M_CUR_POS_MIL_SAR_BS /* 1000000 */ as TOTAL_PURCHASE_AMOUNT,
0 as DIVIDENT --- Pending input from AK
from BAB_LIMIT_UTLN_DATA_REP
where  
TRIM(M_UDF_INVTYP) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(M_UDF_INVTYP) IN ('REIT','Real Estate Funds')
			and  M_INSTRUMENT IN
    (
        select M_INSTRUMENT from (select sum(M_TP_LQTY2_BS) AGG_QTY,M_INSTRUMENT,M_UDF_INVTYP
        from BAB_LIMIT_UTLN_DATA_REP
        where 
        TRIM(M_UDF_INVTYP) IN ('REIT','Real Estate Funds')
        and M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD'
        group by M_INSTRUMENT,M_UDF_INVTYP
        ) where AGG_QTY>0
    ) 
)

    when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_FMLY)='EQD' then TPALL.M_TP_LQTY2*TPALL.M_TP_PRICE
    when TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_GRP)='BOND' then TPALL.M_TP_IPAY-TPALL.M_TP_ACCAMT
    else TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL end
)  as TOTAL_PURCHASE_AMOUNT,
--TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as TOTAL_PURCHASE_AMOUNT,
0 as DIVIDENT --- Pending input from AK
from TP_ALL_REP TPALL ,SECURITIES_REP SEC ,PARTIES_REP PARTIES,PL_DETAILED_REP PL
where 
TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
AND SEC.M_SE_LABEL=TPALL.M_INSTRLABEL AND SEC.M_REF_DATA=TPALL.M_REF_DATA
AND TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP=PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL(+) and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA(+)
and TPALL.M_NB=PL.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PL.M_REF_DATA
and TRIM(SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP) IS NOT NULL AND SEC.M_UDF_INVTYP='Real Estate Funds'   --- IN ('REIT',)
AND TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD'

--and TRIM(M_TP_PURPOSE) <> 'Corporate action execution'
)*/

TRIM(M_DESC): E_CPTYLIMITS_MONITORING_V1
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
WITH CPTYLIMITS_MONITORING_ASSET as (
    select CIF,COUNTER_PARTY, SAR_TOTAL, USD_TOTAL,LIMIT_AMOUNT as USD_LIMIT,
    case
    when LIMIT_AMOUNT=0 then ''
    when LIMIT_AMOUNT - USD_TOTAL < 0 then 'Excess'
    else 'Non Excess' end as USD_LIMIT_EXCESS, ---- TOTAL-LIMIT
    case when LIMIT_AMOUNT=0 then 0 else (USD_TOTAL/LIMIT_AMOUNT)*100 end as UTILIZED,LIMIT_TENOR,LIMIT_EXPIRY, CUST_SEGMENT
    from (
        select CIF,COUNTER_PARTY,SUM(SAR_TOTAL) SAR_TOTAL,SUM(USD_TOTAL) USD_TOTAL,LIMIT_AMOUNT as LIMIT_AMOUNT,LIMIT_TENOR,LIMIT_EXPIRY,CUST_SEGMENT
        from (
                select
                TPALL.M_NB,
                PARTIES.M_CIF as CIF,
                TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME) as COUNTER_PARTY,
                --TPALL.M_CIF as CIF,
                --TRIM(TPALL.M_CPTY_NAME) as COUNTER_PARTY,
                TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,
                TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,              
                DECODE(TRIM(M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',M_TP_NOMINAL,M_TP_NOMINAL* NVL(SPOT_SAR.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT_SAR2.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT_SAR2.M_MID)))) as  SAR_TOTAL,
                DECODE(TRIM(M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',M_TP_NOMINAL,M_TP_NOMINAL* NVL(SPOT_SAR.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT_SAR2.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT_SAR2.M_MID)))) * (1/SPOT_USD.M_MID) as USD_TOTAL,
                NVL(CPTY_LIMIT_BYTYPO.M_MAX0,0) as LIMIT_AMOUNT,
                ROUND(NVL((CPTY_LIMIT_BYTYPO.M_ENDDATE0-CPTY_LIMIT_BYTYPO.M_EFFECTDTE0),0)/30,0) as LIMIT_TENOR,
                CPTY_LIMIT_BYTYPO.M_ENDDATE0 AS LIMIT_EXPIRY,
                case
    when PARTIES.M_AGENT=1          then 'AGENT'
    when PARTIES.M_BANK='Y'         then 'BANK'
    when PARTIES.M_BRANCH='Y'       then 'BRANCH'
    when PARTIES.M_BROKER='Y'       then 'BROKER'
    when PARTIES.M_CORPORATE='Y'    then 'CORPORATE'
    when PARTIES.M_CLEARER='Y'      then 'CLEARER'
    when PARTIES.M_CLIENT='Y'       then 'CLIENT'
    when PARTIES.M_CUSTODIAN='Y'    then 'CUSTODIAN'
    when PARTIES.M_CUSTOMER='Y'     then 'CUSTOMER'
    when PARTIES.M_FICTIVE='Y'      then 'FICTIVE'
    when PARTIES.M_GROUP='Y'        then 'GROUP'
    when PARTIES.M_GARANTOR='Y'     then 'GUARANTOR'
    when PARTIES.M_INT_PARTY='Y'    then 'INTERNAL PARTY'  
    when PARTIES.M_ISSUER='Y'       then 'ISSUER'
    when PARTIES.M_LEG_ENT='Y'      then 'LEGAL ENTITY'
    when PARTIES.M_STATE='Y'        then 'STATE'
    when PARTIES.M_SUBSIDIARY='Y'   then 'SUBSIDIARY'
    else ' ' end as CUST_SEGMENT
                -- from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP  TPALL, PARTIES_REP PARTIES,
                from TP_ALL_REP  TPALL, PARTIES_REP PARTIES,
                (SELECT * FROM BAB_LRB_CPTYTYPO_REP WHERE  M_REF_DATA= 661
                and M_MAXCURR0='USD'
                and M_SECONDKEY in ('Money Market')) CPTY_LIMIT_BYTYPO
                , MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_SAR, MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_SAR2,MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_USD
                where
                TPALL.M_REF_DATA=9734
                and M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD' and M_TP_INT='N' and M_CMP_TYPO in
                ('Murabaha Placement','DPM Murabaha','Wakala Placement','RR SAMA','RR Murabaha','RR Waad','LTM','SFRM','SGDM', 'SAMA Bill', 'RR Waad')
                and TPALL.M_TP_CNTRPID=PARTIES.M_LABEL(+)
                and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA(+)
                and TRIM(PARTIES.M_CIF)=CPTY_LIMIT_BYTYPO.M_KEY(+)
                and SPOT_SAR.M_DATE(+) =TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and SPOT_SAR.M_CCY_NUM(+)='SAR' and SPOT_SAR.M_CCY_DEN(+)=TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR
                and SPOT_SAR2.M_DATE(+)=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and SPOT_SAR2.M_CCY_DEN(+)='SAR' and SPOT_SAR2.M_CCY_NUM(+)=TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR    
                and SPOT_USD.M_DATE(+)  =TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and SPOT_USD.M_CCY_NUM(+) ='SAR' and SPOT_USD.M_CCY_DEN(+) ='USD'
                and TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST<=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2
               
        )
        group by CIF, COUNTER_PARTY, LIMIT_AMOUNT, LIMIT_TENOR, LIMIT_EXPIRY, CUST_SEGMENT
    )
),
CPTYLIMITS_MONITORING_LIAB as (
    select CIF,COUNTER_PARTY, SAR_TOTAL, USD_TOTAL,LIMIT_AMOUNT as USD_LIMIT,
    case
    when LIMIT_AMOUNT=0 then ''
    when LIMIT_AMOUNT - USD_TOTAL < 0 then 'Excess'
    else 'Non Excess' end as USD_LIMIT_EXCESS, ---- TOTAL-LIMIT
    case when LIMIT_AMOUNT=0 then 0 else (USD_TOTAL/LIMIT_AMOUNT)*100 end as UTILIZED,LIMIT_TENOR,LIMIT_EXPIRY, CUST_SEGMENT
    from (
        select CIF,COUNTER_PARTY,SUM(SAR_TOTAL) SAR_TOTAL,SUM(USD_TOTAL) USD_TOTAL,LIMIT_AMOUNT as LIMIT_AMOUNT,LIMIT_TENOR,LIMIT_EXPIRY, CUST_SEGMENT
        from (
                select
                TPALL.M_NB,
                PARTIES.M_CIF as CIF,
                TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME) as COUNTER_PARTY,
              --TPALL.M_CIF as CIF,
              --TRIM(TPALL.M_CPTY_NAME) as COUNTER_PARTY,
                TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,
                TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,              
                DECODE(TRIM(M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',M_TP_NOMINAL,M_TP_NOMINAL* NVL(SPOT_SAR.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT_SAR2.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT_SAR2.M_MID)))) as  SAR_TOTAL,
                DECODE(TRIM(M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',M_TP_NOMINAL,M_TP_NOMINAL* NVL(SPOT_SAR.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT_SAR2.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT_SAR2.M_MID)))) * (1/SPOT_USD.M_MID) as USD_TOTAL,
               
                NVL(CPTY_LIMIT_BYTYPO.M_MAX0,0) as LIMIT_AMOUNT,
                ROUND(NVL((CPTY_LIMIT_BYTYPO.M_ENDDATE0-CPTY_LIMIT_BYTYPO.M_EFFECTDTE0),0)/30,0) as LIMIT_TENOR,
                CPTY_LIMIT_BYTYPO.M_ENDDATE0 AS LIMIT_EXPIRY,
                case
    when PARTIES.M_AGENT=1          then 'AGENT'
    when PARTIES.M_BANK='Y'         then 'BANK'
    when PARTIES.M_BRANCH='Y'       then 'BRANCH'
    when PARTIES.M_BROKER='Y'       then 'BROKER'
    when PARTIES.M_CORPORATE='Y'    then 'CORPORATE'
    when PARTIES.M_CLEARER='Y'      then 'CLEARER'
    when PARTIES.M_CLIENT='Y'       then 'CLIENT'
    when PARTIES.M_CUSTODIAN='Y'    then 'CUSTODIAN'
    when PARTIES.M_CUSTOMER='Y'     then 'CUSTOMER'
    when PARTIES.M_FICTIVE='Y'      then 'FICTIVE'
    when PARTIES.M_GROUP='Y'        then 'GROUP'
    when PARTIES.M_GARANTOR='Y'     then 'GUARANTOR'
    when PARTIES.M_INT_PARTY='Y'    then 'INTERNAL PARTY'  
    when PARTIES.M_ISSUER='Y'       then 'ISSUER'
    when PARTIES.M_LEG_ENT='Y'      then 'LEGAL ENTITY'
    when PARTIES.M_STATE='Y'        then 'STATE'
    when PARTIES.M_SUBSIDIARY='Y'   then 'SUBSIDIARY'
    else ' ' end as CUST_SEGMENT
               
              --  from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP  TPALL, PARTIES_REP PARTIES,
                from TP_ALL_REP  TPALL, PARTIES_REP PARTIES,
                (SELECT * FROM BAB_LRB_CPTYTYPO_REP WHERE  M_REF_DATA= 661
                and M_MAXCURR0='USD'
                and M_SECONDKEY in ('Money Market')) CPTY_LIMIT_BYTYPO
                , MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_SAR, MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_SAR2,MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_USD
                where
                TPALL.M_REF_DATA=9734
                and M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD' and M_TP_INT='N' and M_CMP_TYPO in
                ('Murabaha Borrowing','Wakala Borrowing','Repo SAMA','Repo Murabaha','Repo Waad', 'Wakala Borrowing CFC', 'Depo CapFloorCollar')
                and TPALL.M_TP_CNTRPID=PARTIES.M_LABEL(+)
                and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA(+)
                and TRIM(PARTIES.M_CIF)=CPTY_LIMIT_BYTYPO.M_KEY(+)
                and SPOT_SAR.M_DATE(+) =TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and SPOT_SAR.M_CCY_NUM(+)='SAR' and SPOT_SAR.M_CCY_DEN(+)=TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR
                and SPOT_SAR2.M_DATE(+)=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and SPOT_SAR2.M_CCY_DEN(+)='SAR' and SPOT_SAR2.M_CCY_NUM(+)=TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR    
                and SPOT_USD.M_DATE(+)  =TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 and SPOT_USD.M_CCY_NUM(+) ='SAR' and SPOT_USD.M_CCY_DEN(+) ='USD'
                and TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST<=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2
               
        )
        group by CIF, COUNTER_PARTY, LIMIT_AMOUNT, LIMIT_TENOR, LIMIT_EXPIRY, CUST_SEGMENT
    )
)

select 'ASSET' as BREAKDOWN, CIF, COUNTER_PARTY, SAR_TOTAL, USD_TOTAL,USD_LIMIT,USD_LIMIT_EXCESS,

UNION ALL

select 'LIABILITY' as BREAKDOWN, CIF, COUNTER_PARTY, SAR_TOTAL, USD_TOTAL,USD_LIMIT,USD_LIMIT_EXCESS,

--ROUND((USD_TOTAL/(select sum(USD_TOTAL) from CPTYLIMITS_MONITORING_LIAB))*100,3)||' %' CONCENTRATION,
