TRIM(M_DESC): E_RISK_EQUITY_REVALUATION_V1
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
with TAB1 as 
(
SELECT M_REF_DATA, M_INSTRLABEL, INDICATOR1, sum(INVESTMENT) as INVESTMENT, sum(QUANTITY) as QUANTITY, sum(AVERAGE_CST) as AVERAGE_COST, MARKET_PRICE, SUM(MARKET_VALUE) as MARKET_VALUE, max(RNK_CNT) as RNK_FIN, M_SEC_SECTOR, M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP, M_TP_NOMCUR, M_SPOT_RATE from
(select TPALL.M_REF_DATA, TPALL.M_INSTRLABEL, TPALL.M_INSTRUMENT as INDICATOR1,
--(NVL(TPALL.M_TP_IQTYS,0) * NVL(TPALL.M_COVER_RATE,0)) as INVESTMENT,
NVL(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL, 0) AS INVESTMENT,
NVL(TPALL.M_TP_IQTYS,0) as QUANTITY,
(NVL(TPALL.M_TP_IQTYS,0) * NVL(TPALL.M_COVER_RATE,0)) / NVL(TPALL.M_TP_IQTYS,0) as AVERAGE_CST,
NVL(PL.M_MP_SPOT2,0) as MARKET_PRICE,PL.M_PL_NFMV2 as MARKET_VALUE,
RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY TPALL.M_INSTRUMENT ORDER BY ((NVL(TPALL.M_TP_IQTYS,0) * NVL(TPALL.M_COVER_RATE,0)) / NVL(TPALL.M_TP_IQTYS,0)) ) AS RNK_CNT,
M_SEC_SECTOR, M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP, TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR, TPALL.M_SPOT_RATE
from 
BAB_TRN_ALL_REP TPALL left outer join PL_DETAILED_REP PL
ON TRIM(TPALL.M_NB)=PL.M_NB AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PL.M_REF_DATA where TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N AND TRIM(TPALL.M_TRN_FMLY)='EQD' AND TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD' and NVL(TPALL.M_TP_IQTYS,0) <>0 )
group by M_REF_DATA, M_INSTRLABEL, INDICATOR1, MARKET_PRICE, M_SEC_SECTOR, M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP, M_TP_NOMCUR, M_SPOT_RATE
)

select 'Sector Limit Utilization' as BREAKDOWN, TAB1.INDICATOR1,  0 as M_NB, TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP, 
case when TAB1.M_SEC_SECTOR IN (914,584,583,585,600,604,605,594,912,588,586,589,602,592,593,603,606,607,587,590,591,601) then 'Financial'

select 'Equity Portfolio Limit Report' as BREAKDOWN, TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP as INDICATOR1, 0 as M_NB, '' as M_UDF_INVTYP, '' as SECTOR,
TAB1.M_TP_NOMCUR as CURRENCY, sum(TAB1.INVESTMENT) as INVESTMENT, sum(TAB1.INVESTMENT * TAB1.M_SPOT_RATE) as INVESTMENT_IN_SAR,
0 as QUANTITY, 0 as AVERAGE_COST,  0 as COST_PRICE, 0 as TOTAL_COST, 0 as MARKET_PRICE,
sum(TAB1.MARKET_VALUE) as MARKET_VALUE, sum(TAB1.MARKET_VALUE*TAB1.M_SPOT_RATE) as MARKET_VALUE_IN_SAR,
case 
when NVL(TRIM(TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP),TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP) like '%DPM%' THEN 1000000000
when NVL(TRIM(TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP),TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP) like '%Listed Equity%' THEN 300000000
when NVL(TRIM(TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP),TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP) like '%Private Equity%' THEN 250000000
when NVL(TRIM(TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP),TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP) like '%Real Estate Funds%' THEN 400000000
else 0 END as SECTOR_LIMIT,
--0 as SECTOR_LIMIT,
--sum(SECTOR_LIMIT) SECTOR_LIMIT,
0 as LIMIT_UTILIZATION,
0 as UNREALIZED_PNL,
' ' as STOP_LOSS_TRIGGER_BUFFER,
--sum(BUFFER_EXCESS_OVER_LIMIT) BUFFER_EXCESS_OVER_LIMIT,
(case 
when NVL(TRIM(TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP),TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP) like '%DPM%' THEN 1000000000
when NVL(TRIM(TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP),TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP) like '%Listed Equity%' THEN 300000000
when NVL(TRIM(TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP),TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP) like '%Private Equity%' THEN 250000000
when NVL(TRIM(TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP),TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP) like '%Real Estate Funds%' THEN 400000000
else 0 END) - sum(TAB1.INVESTMENT * TAB1.M_SPOT_RATE) as BUFFER_EXCESS_OVER_LIMIT,
case when ((case 
when NVL(TRIM(TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP),TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP) like '%DPM%' THEN 1000000000
when NVL(TRIM(TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP),TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP) like '%Listed Equity%' THEN 300000000
when NVL(TRIM(TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP),TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP) like '%Private Equity%' THEN 250000000
when NVL(TRIM(TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP),TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP) like '%Real Estate Funds%' THEN 400000000
else 0 END) - sum(TAB1.INVESTMENT * TAB1.M_SPOT_RATE)) >=0 then 'Compliant' else 'Non Compliant' END as COMPLIANCE
--sum(BUFFER_EXCESS_OVER_LIMIT)-sum(INVESTMENT)>=0 then 'Complined' else 'Non Complined' END as COMPLIANCE
--0 - sum(INVESTMENT) >= 0 then 'Compliant' else 'Non Compliant' END as COMPLIANCE
from TAB1 where TAB1.QUANTITY <> 0
group by TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP, 'Equity Portfolio Limit Report', 0, '', ' ', 
TAB1.M_TP_NOMCUR, case when NVL(TRIM(TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP),TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP) like '%DPM%' THEN 1000000000 when NVL(TRIM(TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP),TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP) like '%Listed Equity%' THEN 300000000 when NVL(TRIM(TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP),TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP) like '%Private Equity%' THEN 250000000 when NVL(TRIM(TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP),TAB1.M_SEC_UDF_INVTYP) like '%Real Estate Funds%' THEN 400000000 else 0 END

WITH LIQ_MOB_DI_FI_NONFI as (
    select
    TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 as REPORT_DATE,
    TPALL.M_NB as TRANSACTION_REF,
    TPALL.M_CIF as CIF,
    NVL(TRIM(TPALL.M_CPTY_NAME),TPALL.M_CPTY_NAME) as SHORT_NAME_EN,
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as NEW_PRINCIPAL,
    TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as CURRENCY,
    TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN as S_DATE,
    TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP  as m_date,
    case
    when PARTIES.M_AGENT=1          then 'AGENT'
    when PARTIES.M_BANK='Y'         then 'BANK'
    when PARTIES.M_BRANCH='Y'       then 'BRANCH'
    when PARTIES.M_BROKER='Y'       then 'BROKER'
    when PARTIES.M_CORPORATE='Y'    then 'CORPORATE'
    when PARTIES.M_CLEARER='Y'      then 'CLEARER'
    when PARTIES.M_CLIENT='Y'       then 'CLIENT'
    when PARTIES.M_CUSTODIAN='Y'    then 'CUSTODIAN'
    when PARTIES.M_CUSTOMER='Y'     then 'CUSTOMER'
    when PARTIES.M_FICTIVE='Y'      then 'FICTIVE'
    when PARTIES.M_GROUP='Y'        then 'GROUP'
    when PARTIES.M_GARANTOR='Y'     then 'GUARANTOR'
    when PARTIES.M_INT_PARTY='Y'    then 'INTERNAL PARTY'  
    when PARTIES.M_ISSUER='Y'       then 'ISSUER'
    when PARTIES.M_LEG_ENT='Y'      then 'LEGAL ENTITY' 
    when PARTIES.M_STATE='Y'        then 'STATE'
    when PARTIES.M_SUBSIDIARY='Y'   then 'SUBSIDIARY'
    else ' ' end as SEGMENT --- arranged as to get the first item from the selected list
    ,PARTIES.M_ISS_CAT as SUB_CAT
    ,TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN,'MON') as TRADE_MON
    ,TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'MON') as REP_MON
    ,TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN,'YYYY') as TRADE_YEAR
    ,TO_CHAR(M_REP_DATE2,'YYYY') as REP_YEAR
    from BAB_TRN_ALL_REP TPALL ,PARTIES_REP PARTIES
    where TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N 
    and TPALL.M_CIF=PARTIES.M_CIF(+) and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA(+)
    and TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2<>'DEAD' 
    and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
    and TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO like 'LM_%'
    and TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2, 'YYYY')  
)

select CAST (CATEG AS VARCHAR2(30)) CATEG, CAST (SUB_CAT AS VARCHAR2(30)) SUB_CAT,CAST (SEGMENT AS VARCHAR2(30)) SEGMENT, 
CAST (NO_OF_TXN AS DECIMAL(10,0)) NO_OF_TXN, CAST (NEW_PRINCIPAL AS DECIMAL(24,8)) NEW_PRINCIPAL, CAST (NO_OF_CUST AS DECIMAL(10,0)) NO_OF_CUST
    from(
        select CAT as CATEG, SUB_CAT,SEGMENT, sum(NO_OF_TXN) NO_OF_TXN, sum(NEW_PRINCIPAL) NEW_PRINCIPAL,
        count(SHORT_NAME_EN) NO_OF_CUST
        from (
            select CAT, SUB_CAT,SEGMENT,count(*) as NO_OF_TXN,sum(NEW_PRINCIPAL) NEW_PRINCIPAL,SHORT_NAME_EN
            from
            (
                select
                SHORT_NAME_EN,SEGMENT,
                case 
                when 
                SEGMENT IN ('AGENT','BROKER','CLS MEMBER','CORPORATE','CUSTODIAN','GUARANTOR','INVESTMENT MANAGER','CUSTOMER') 
                THEN 'FI' ELSE 'NON FI' end as CAT, SUB_CAT,NEW_PRINCIPAL
                from LIQ_MOB_DI_FI_NONFI
            )
            group by CAT, SUB_CAT,SEGMENT,SHORT_NAME_EN
        ) group by CAT, SUB_CAT,SEGMENT
    ) group by NEW_PRINCIPAL,CATEG, SUB_CAT,SEGMENT,NO_OF_TXN,NO_OF_CUST

TRIM(M_DESC): BN Cash Data Extract
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
SELECT  
    TRN.M_NB AS CONTRACT_NUMBER,
    NST.M_REFERENCE AS PAYMENT_ID,
    NULL AS DEBIT_ACCOUNT,
    CASE WHEN NST.M_AMOUNT<0 THEN NST.M_CURRENCY END AS DEBIT_CURRENCY, 
    (CASE WHEN (NST.M_CURRENCY!='SAR' AND NST.M_AMOUNT <= 0) THEN ABS(NST.M_AMOUNT) ELSE 0 END) AS DEBIT_AMOUNT_FCY,
    (CASE WHEN (NST.M_CURRENCY='SAR' AND NST.M_AMOUNT <= 0)THEN ABS(NST.M_AMOUNT) ELSE 0 END) AS DEBIT_AMOUNT_LCY,
    NULL AS CREDIT_ACCOUNT,
    CASE WHEN NST.M_AMOUNT>0 THEN NST.M_CURRENCY END AS CREDIT_CURRENCY, 
    (CASE WHEN (NST.M_CURRENCY!='SAR' AND NST.M_AMOUNT >= 0) THEN NST.M_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS CREDIT_AMOUNT_FCY,
    (CASE WHEN (NST.M_CURRENCY='SAR' AND NST.M_AMOUNT >= 0) THEN NST.M_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS CREDIT_AMOUNT_LCY,
    NST.M_VALUE_DAT AS VALUE_DATE, 
    NST.M_VALUE_DAT AS POST_DATE,  
    TRN.M_TP_DTEEXP AS MATURITY_DATE,
    TRN.M_NB AS REFERENCE, 
    TRN.M_CMP_TYPO AS PRODUCT,
    TRN.M_TP_PRICE AS RATE,
    TRN.M_TP_CNTRP AS CUSTOMER_CIF, 
    TRN.M_TP_DTESYS || ' ' || TRN.M_TP_TIMSYS AS TRN_DATE_TIME,
    NST_BAL.OPENING + NST_BAL.CUMULATIVE_MVT - NST.M_AMOUNT AS OPENING_BALANCE,
    NST_BAL.OPENING + NST_BAL.CUMULATIVE_MVT AS CLOSING_BALANCE,
    NULL AS ENTRY_REF,
    NULL AS RULE_LABEL,
    NST.M_REP_DATE2 + 1 AS SYSTEM_DATE, 
    NULL AS ENTRY_COMMENT,
    NULL AS REVERSAL
FROM BAB_NOSTRO_CASH_REP NST 
        LEFT JOIN TP_ALL_REP TRN
            ON NST.M_TRADEREFE = TRN.M_NB 
                AND TRN.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataTRN:N  
        LEFT JOIN (SELECT NST.M_REFERENCE,
            SUM(CASE 
                WHEN NST.M_TYPE = 'OPENING' THEN NST.M_AMOUNT END)
                    OVER (PARTITION BY NST.M_ACCOUNT_N, NST.M_CURRENCY, NST.M_SETTLEMEN) AS OPENING, 
            SUM(NST.M_AMOUNT) 
                OVER (PARTITION BY NST.M_ACCOUNT_N, NST.M_CURRENCY, NST.M_SETTLEMEN) AS CLOSING,
            SUM(CASE WHEN NST.M_TYPE = 'MOVEMENT' THEN NST.M_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) 
                OVER (PARTITION BY NST.M_ACCOUNT_N, NST.M_CURRENCY, NST.M_SETTLEMEN 
                    ORDER BY NST.M_REFERENCE ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS CUMULATIVE_MVT
            FROM BAB_NOSTRO_CASH_REP NST
            WHERE NST.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataNST:N
                AND NST.M_TYPE <> 'CLOSING'
        ) NST_BAL
            ON NST.M_REFERENCE = NST_BAL.M_REFERENCE
WHERE NST.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N 
    AND TRN.M_TP_DTETRN = TRN.M_REP_DATE2
    AND TRN.M_CMP_TYPO = 'Banknotes'
    AND TRN.M_CNT_SRCMOD NOT LIKE '%T24%' 
    AND NST.M_TYPE = 'MOVEMENT'
SELECT * FROM MDV_BOND_TEST_REP

TRIM(M_DESC): Moodys Currency posiiton Details
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
WITH ERM_CURR_POSN as (
        select 
        COMB_TAB.M_CURRENCY CCY_CODE,
        SUM(COMB_TAB.SPOT_POSITION) AS SPOT_POSITION,
        SUM(COMB_TAB.FORWARD_POSITION) AS FORWARD_POSITION,
        ( SUM(COMB_TAB.SPOT_POSITION) + SUM(COMB_TAB.FORWARD_POSITION) ) AS NET_POSITION        
        from
        (
            
            select M_CURRENCY, (-1 * M_AMOUNT) AS SPOT_POSITION, 0 as FORWARD_POSITION from BAB_NOP_MUX_DATA_REP 
            where TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_PRODUCT_CODE) || ',' || ''  || ',' || '1' in 
            (select distinct TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_CATEGORY) || ',' || TRIM(M_NOS_ACC) || ',' || TRIM(M_SIGN_FLAG) from BAB_GLCD_INCLUDE_REP where UPPER(TRIM(M_SOURCE))='MUREX')
            AND TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_PRODUCT_CODE) || ',' || ''  || ',' || '1' NOT IN ('85101,1610,,1', '95101,1610,,1', '85121,1640,,1', '95121,1640,,1')
          
            UNION ALL
            
            select M_CURRENCY,0 AS SPOT_POSITION, (-1 * M_AMOUNT) AS FORWARD_POSITION from BAB_NOP_MUX_DATA_REP
            where TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_PRODUCT_CODE) || ',' || ''  || ',' || '1' in 
            (select distinct TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_CATEGORY) || ',' || TRIM(M_NOS_ACC) || ',' || TRIM(M_SIGN_FLAG) from BAB_GLCD_INCLUDE_REP where UPPER(TRIM(M_SOURCE))='MUREX')
            AND TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_PRODUCT_CODE) || ',' || ''  || ',' || '1' IN ('85101,1610,,1', '95101,1610,,1', '85121,1640,,1', '95121,1640,,1')

                        
            UNION ALL
            
            select M_CURRENCY, M_AMOUNT AS SPOT_POSITION , 0 as FORWARD_POSITION from BAB_NOP_MUX_DATA_REP
            where TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_PRODUCT_CODE) || ',' || ''  || ',' || '0' in 
            (select distinct TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_CATEGORY) || ',' || TRIM(M_NOS_ACC) || ',' || TRIM(M_SIGN_FLAG) from BAB_GLCD_INCLUDE_REP where UPPER(TRIM(M_SOURCE))='MUREX')
            AND TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_PRODUCT_CODE) || ',' || ''  || ',' || '0' NOT IN ('85101,1610,,0', '95101,1610,,0', '85121,1640,,0', '95121,1640,,0')
           
            UNION ALL
            
            select M_CURRENCY, 0 AS SPOT_POSITION , M_AMOUNT AS FORWARD_POSITION from BAB_NOP_MUX_DATA_REP
            where TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_PRODUCT_CODE) || ',' || ''  || ',' || '0' in 
            (select distinct TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_CATEGORY) || ',' || TRIM(M_NOS_ACC) || ',' || TRIM(M_SIGN_FLAG) from BAB_GLCD_INCLUDE_REP where UPPER(TRIM(M_SOURCE))='MUREX')
            AND TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_PRODUCT_CODE) || ',' || ''  || ',' || '0' IN ('85101,1610,,0', '95101,1610,,0', '85121,1640,,0', '95121,1640,,0')
            
            union all

            select M_CURRENCY, (-1 * M_AMOUNT) AS SPOT_POSITION, 0 as FORWARD_POSITION from BAB_NOP_EXT_DATA_REP 
            where TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_CATEGORY) || ',' || TRIM(M_NOSTRO_ACC_NO) || ',' || '1'  in 
            (select distinct TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_CATEGORY) || ',' || TRIM(M_NOS_ACC) || ',' || TRIM(M_SIGN_FLAG) from BAB_GLCD_INCLUDE_REP where UPPER(TRIM(M_SOURCE))='T24')

            union all

            select M_CURRENCY, M_AMOUNT AS SPOT_POSITION, 0 as FORWARD_POSITION from BAB_NOP_EXT_DATA_REP 
            where TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_CATEGORY) || ',' || TRIM(M_NOSTRO_ACC_NO) || ',' || '0'  in 
            (select distinct TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_CATEGORY) || ',' || TRIM(M_NOS_ACC) || ',' || TRIM(M_SIGN_FLAG) from BAB_GLCD_INCLUDE_REP where UPPER(TRIM(M_SOURCE))='T24')
            
        ) COMB_TAB
        group by M_CURRENCY
)

select

TRIM(M_DESC): Murex Net Open Position Data Extraction
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select 
     CAST(rownum AS NUMBER(10)) AS M_SL_No
    ,CAST(TO_CHAR(AS_OF_DATE,'DD-MON-YY') AS VARCHAR2(9)) AS M_REPORT_DATE
    ,CAST(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MM:SS') AS VARCHAR2(19)) AS M_DATE_AND_TIME
    ,CAST(GL_ACCOUNT AS NUMBER(5)) AS M_LINE_NO
    ,CAST(ACC_BAL.GL_PRODUCT AS NUMBER(10)) AS M_PRODUCT_CODE
    ,CAST(DECODE(ACC_BAL.GL_PRODUCT,1335,'Sukuk Floating',1330,'Sukuk Fixed',1415,'Real Estate Funds',1525,'Private Equity',1520,'REIT',1305,'LTM',6710,'Sukuk Issuance',PCODE.M_TYPOLOGY) AS VARCHAR2(30)) AS M_PRODUCT
    ,CAST(DECODE(TRIM(ACC_DET.M_CATEGORY0),'96341','Trade Commitments, Borrowings',NVL(ACC_DET.M_DESC,'')) AS VARCHAR2(40)) AS M_DESCRIPTION
    ,CAST(CURRENCY AS VARCHAR2(3)) AS M_CURRENCY 
    ,CAST(M_NETBALANCE AS DECIMAL(32,8)) M_AMOUNT

    from (  select * from (  
                    SELECT 
                    ---M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
                       M_AS_OF_DATE as AS_OF_DATE,
                       M_GL_PRODUCT as GL_PRODUCT,
                       M_GL_ACCOUNT as GL_ACCOUNT,
                       M_CURRENCY as CURRENCY,
                       ---M_SYS_DATE,
                       CASE
                         WHEN SUM(M_EN_AMT) IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(SUM(M_EN_AMT) AS NUMBER (32,8))
                         ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (32,8))
                       END M_NETBALANCE
                       --M_CLOSING_BALANCE,
                       --M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
                FROM (SELECT ---'MX' AS M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
                              M_AS_OF_DATE,
                              ---'01' AS M_COMPANY,
                              --M_SYS_DATE,
                              /*CASE
                                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
                                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2))
                              END M_BRANCH,*/
                              CASE
                                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3))) < 4 THEN '0000'
                                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3))
                              END M_GL_PRODUCT,
                              CASE
                               WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,4)) IS NULL THEN '00000'
                                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,4))
                              END M_GL_ACCOUNT,
                             /* CASE
                                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5))) < 8 THEN '00000000'
                                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5))
                              END M_COUNTERPARTY,*/
                              M_EN_CUR AS M_CURRENCY,
                              CASE
                                WHEN M_EN_AMT IS NOT NULL THEN CAST((-1*M_EN_AMT) AS NUMBER (25,8))
                                ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (25,8))
                              END M_EN_AMT
                              ---TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') AS M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
                       FROM ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP T1
                       WHERE T1.M_FX_O_NB = 0
                       UNION ALL
                            SELECT 
                              ---'MX' AS M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
                              M_AS_OF_DATE,
                              ---'01' AS M_COMPANY,
                              ---M_SYS_DATE,
                              /*CASE
                                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
                                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,2))
                              END M_BRANCH,*/
                              CASE
                                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3))) < 4 THEN '0000'
                                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,3))
                              END M_GL_PRODUCT,
                              CASE
                                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,4)) IS NULL THEN '00000'
                                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,4))
                              END M_GL_ACCOUNT,
                              /*CASE
                                WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5))) < 8 THEN '00000000'
                                ELSE TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(REPLACE(T1.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'),'[^-]+',1,5))
                              END M_COUNTERPARTY,*/
                              M_EN_CUR AS M_CURRENCY,
                              CASE
                                WHEN M_EN_AMT IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(M_EN_AMT AS NUMBER (25,8))
                                ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER (25,8))
                              END M_EN_AMT
                              ---TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') AS M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
                       FROM ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP T1
                       WHERE T1.M_FX_O_NB = 0
)
                GROUP BY --M_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
                         M_AS_OF_DATE,
                         M_GL_PRODUCT,
                         M_GL_ACCOUNT,
                         M_CURRENCY
                         --M_LOAD_TIMESTAMP,
                         --M_SYS_DATE
                ) where M_NETBALANCE<>0
    ) ACC_BAL
    left outer join BAB_PRODUCT_CODE_REP PCODE
       on ACC_BAL.GL_PRODUCT=PCODE.M_PROD_CODE AND PCODE.M_PROD_CODE NOT in (1520,1305,1310,1640,1650,6460,6710) AND PCODE.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2    
        on SPOT2.M_DATE=ACC_BAL.AS_OF_DATE  and TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM)='SAR'  and TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN)=TRIM(DECODE(ACC_BAL.CURRENCY,'CNH','CNY',ACC_BAL.CURRENCY))
    left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT22    
        on SPOT22.M_DATE=ACC_BAL.AS_OF_DATE and TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_DEN)='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_NUM)=TRIM(DECODE(ACC_BAL.CURRENCY,'CNH','CNY',ACC_BAL.CURRENCY))
    left outer join ACC_DETAILS_REP ACC_DET
       on TRIM(ACC_DET.M_CATEGORY0)=TRIM(ACC_BAL.GL_ACCOUNT) and ( TRIM(ACC_DET.M_CATEGORY0)<>'96341' OR (TRIM(ACC_DET.M_CATEGORY0)='27125' and TRIM(ACC_DET.M_DESC) !='Inventory') )

TRIM(M_DESC): Murex Net Open Position Data Extraction File and view
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
/*
select 'Murex' as M_SOURCE,M_REPORT_DATE, TO_CHAR(M_LINE_NO) AS M_LINE_NO, TO_CHAR(M_PRODUCT_CODE) as M_CATEGORY, null as M_NOSTRO_ACC_NO, M_DESCRIPTION, M_CURRENCY, M_AMOUNT,M_AMOUNT as M_TOTAL 
from BAB_NOP_MUX_DATA_REP
union all 
select M_SOURCE,TO_CHAR(M_REPORT_DATE,'DD-MON-YY') as M_REPORT_DATE, TO_CHAR(M_LINE_NO) AS M_LINE_NO, To_CHAR(M_CATEGORY) AS M_CATEGORY, TO_CHAR(M_NOSTRO_ACC_NO) AS M_NOSTRO_ACC_NO, M_DESCRIPTION, M_CURRENCY, M_AMOUNT,M_AMOUNT as M_TOTAL 
from BAB_NOP_EXT_DATA_REP
*/

SELECT NOP_FULL.M_SOURCE, NOP_FULL.M_REPORT_DATE, NOP_FULL.M_LINE_NO, NOP_FULL.M_CATEGORY, NOP_FULL.M_NOSTRO_ACC_NO, NOP_FULL.M_DESCRIPTION, NOP_FULL.M_CURRENCY, NOP_FULL.M_AMOUNT
,DECODE(TRIM(NOP_FULL.M_CURRENCY),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT_SAR.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT_SAR2.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT_SAR2.M_MID)))) as M_SAR_RATE,
(NOP_FULL.M_AMOUNT * DECODE(TRIM(NOP_FULL.M_CURRENCY),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT_SAR.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT_SAR2.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT_SAR2.M_MID))))) as M_TOTAL
from 
(
select 'Murex' as M_SOURCE,M_REPORT_DATE, DECODE(TRIM(TO_CHAR(M_LINE_NO)),'0','',TO_CHAR(M_LINE_NO)) AS M_LINE_NO, 
DECODE(TRIM(TO_CHAR(M_PRODUCT_CODE)),'0','',TO_CHAR(M_PRODUCT_CODE)) as M_CATEGORY, null as M_NOSTRO_ACC_NO, M_DESCRIPTION, M_CURRENCY, M_AMOUNT
from BAB_NOP_MUX_DATA_REP

union all 

select M_SOURCE, TO_CHAR(M_REPORT_DATE,'DD-MON-YY') as M_REPORT_DATE, DECODE(TRIM(TO_CHAR(M_LINE_NO)),'0','',TO_CHAR(M_LINE_NO)) AS M_LINE_NO,
DECODE(TRIM(TO_CHAR(M_CATEGORY)),'0','',TO_CHAR(M_CATEGORY)) AS M_CATEGORY, DECODE(TRIM(TO_CHAR(M_NOSTRO_ACC_NO)),'0','',TO_CHAR(M_NOSTRO_ACC_NO)) AS M_NOSTRO_ACC_NO, 
M_DESCRIPTION, M_CURRENCY, M_AMOUNT
from BAB_NOP_EXT_DATA_REP 
) NOP_FULL
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_SAR 
on SPOT_SAR.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalData_BAB_MDS:N and TRIM(SPOT_SAR.M_CCY_NUM)='SAR'  and TRIM(SPOT_SAR.M_CCY_DEN)=TRIM(NOP_FULL.M_CURRENCY)
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_SAR2
on SPOT_SAR2.M_REF_DATA= @MxHistoricalData_BAB_MDS:N and TRIM(SPOT_SAR2.M_CCY_DEN)='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT_SAR2.M_CCY_NUM)=TRIM(NOP_FULL.M_CURRENCY)

TRIM(M_DESC): DUMMY NOSTRO Account Data Extract
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
SELECT 
    TRN.M_NB AS TRN_REF,
    NULL AS DEBIT_ACCOUNT,
    CASE WHEN NST.M_AMOUNT<0 THEN NST.M_CURRENCY END AS DEBIT_CURRENCY, 
    (CASE WHEN NST.M_AMOUNT <= 0 THEN ABS(NST.M_AMOUNT) ELSE 0 END)  AS DEBIT_AMOUNT,
    NST.M_VALUE_DAT AS DEBIT_VALUE_DATE,
    NULL AS CREDIT_ACCOUNT,
    CASE WHEN NST.M_AMOUNT>0 THEN NST.M_CURRENCY END AS CREDIT_CURRENCY, 
    (CASE WHEN NST.M_AMOUNT >= 0 THEN ABS(NST.M_AMOUNT) ELSE 0 END) AS CREDIT_AMOUNT, 
    NST.M_VALUE_DAT AS CREDIT_VALUE_DATE, 
    NULL AS ACCOUNT_NB, 
    NST.M_CURRENCY AS ACCOUNT_CURRENCY,
    NST_BAL.OPENING + NST_BAL.CUMULATIVE_MVT - NST.M_AMOUNT AS OPENING_BALANCE,
    NST.M_AMOUNT AS BAL_MOV,
    NST_BAL.OPENING + NST_BAL.CUMULATIVE_MVT AS CLOSING_BALANCE
FROM BAB_NOSTRO_CASH_REP NST 
        LEFT JOIN TP_ALL_REP TRN
            ON NST.M_TRADEREFE = TRN.M_NB 
                AND TRN.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataTRN:N
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT NST.M_REFERENCE,
            SUM(CASE 
                WHEN NST.M_TYPE = 'OPENING' THEN NST.M_AMOUNT END)
                    OVER (PARTITION BY NST.M_ACCOUNT_N, NST.M_CURRENCY, NST.M_SETTLEMEN) AS OPENING, 
            SUM(CASE WHEN NST.M_TYPE = 'MOVEMENT' THEN NST.M_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) 
                OVER (PARTITION BY NST.M_ACCOUNT_N, NST.M_CURRENCY, NST.M_SETTLEMEN 
                    ORDER BY NST.M_REFERENCE ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS CUMULATIVE_MVT,  
            SUM(NST.M_AMOUNT) 
                OVER (PARTITION BY NST.M_ACCOUNT_N, NST.M_CURRENCY, NST.M_SETTLEMEN) AS CLOSING
            FROM BAB_NOSTRO_CASH_REP NST
            WHERE (NST.M_ACCOUNT_N LIKE 'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KS%' OR NST.M_BENEFICIA LIKE 'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KS%')
                AND NST.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataNST:N
                AND NST.M_TYPE <> 'CLOSING'
        ) NST_BAL
            ON NST.M_REFERENCE = NST_BAL.M_REFERENCE
WHERE 
    NST.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N 
    AND TRN.M_TP_DTETRN = TRN.M_REP_DATE2
    AND (NST.M_ACCOUNT_N LIKE 'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KS%' OR NST.M_BENEFICIA LIKE 'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KS%')
    AND NST.M_TYPE = 'MOVEMENT'

TRIM(M_DESC): �ccount entries extraction for the FAH system - NEW
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
-- Select All Credit on 1 line -New
SELECT
T1.M_NB_RULE AS NB_RULE,
T1.M_REF_DATA AS REF_DATA,
'MX' AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
T1.M_SYS_DATE AS AS_OF_DATE,
TO_CHAR(T1.M_EN_ORIG_NB) AS ACCOUNTING_ENTRY_ID,
CASE 
  WHEN T1.M_FX_O_NB = 0 AND T1.M_NB_OFFSET != 0 THEN TO_CHAR(T1.M_NB_OFFSET)
  WHEN T1.M_FX_O_NB = 0 AND TRIM(T1.M_X_CUR) IS NULL THEN TO_CHAR(T1.M_EN_ORIG_NB)
  WHEN T1.M_EN_TYPE = 7 AND TRIM(T1.M_X_CUR) IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(FXCONV.M_ORIGIN_NB)
  ELSE TO_CHAR(T1.M_FX_O_NB)
END BALANCING_ENTRY_ID,
T1.M_SYS_DATE AS TRADE_DATE,
T1.M_VAL_DATE AS VALUE_DATE,
TO_CHAR(T1.M_NB_TRN) AS TRADE_ID,
CASE
  WHEN M_TYPE_NB = 'TRN' AND M_TRN_GRP IN ('BOND','EQUIT') THEN (SELECT MAX(M_TP_ISIN) FROM ACC_LIVE_DEALS_REP DEALS WHERE DEALS.M_NB = M_NB_TRN  AND DEALS.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N )
  WHEN M_TYPE_NB = 'LIQ' THEN (SELECT M_SE_ISIN FROM ACC_SECURITIES_REP SEC WHERE TRIM(SEC.M_SE_D_LABEL) = TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(M_EN_COMMENT,';;','; ;'), '[^;]+',1,4)) AND SEC.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N)
  WHEN M_TYPE_NB = 'PAY' AND M_TRN_GRP NOT IN ('BOND','EQUIT') THEN (SELECT TO_CHAR(MAX(M_DF_OCNTREF)) FROM ACC_DLV_CASH_REP DLV_CASH WHERE DLV_CASH.M_DF_REF = M_NB_TRN AND DLV_CASH.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N)
  WHEN M_TYPE_NB = 'PAY' AND M_TRN_GRP IN ('BOND','EQUIT') THEN (SELECT MAX(M_TP_ISIN) FROM ACC_LIVE_DEALS_REP DEALS WHERE DEALS.M_NB = (SELECT TO_CHAR(M_DF_TRDREF) FROM ACC_DLV_CASH_REP DLV_CASH WHERE DLV_CASH.M_DF_REF = M_NB_TRN AND DLV_CASH.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N) AND DEALS.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N)
  ELSE NULL
END PARENT_LVL_1,
CASE
  WHEN M_TRN_GRP IN ('BOND','EQUIT') THEN TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(M_EN_COMMENT,';;','; ;'), '[^;]+',1,1))
  ELSE NULL
END PARENT_LVL_2,
--CAST (TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,1)) AS VARCHAR(2)) AS COMPANY,
'01' AS COMPANY,
--TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2)) AS BRANCH,
--TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,3)) AS GL_PRODUCT,
CASE
	WHEN TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
	ELSE TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))
END BRANCH,   
CASE
	WHEN TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,3)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,3))) < 4 THEN '0000'
	ELSE TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,3))
END GL_PRODUCT,
CASE
	WHEN TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)) IS NULL THEN '00000'
	ELSE TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4))   
END GL_ACCOUNT,
CASE 
	WHEN TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,5)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,5))) < 8 THEN '00000000'
 ELSE TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T1.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,5))
END COUNTERPARTY,
CASE
  WHEN TRIM(T1.M_FX_O_CUR) is NOT NULL THEN T1.M_FX_O_CUR
  WHEN T1.M_EN_TYPE = 7 AND TRIM(T1.M_X_CUR) IS NOT NULL THEN T1.M_X_CUR
  ELSE T1.M_EN_CUR
END CURRENCY,
CAST(-1 * T1.M_EN_AMT AS NUMBER(25, 8)) AS AMOUNT_LCY,
CASE
  WHEN TRIM(T1.M_FX_O_CUR) IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(-1 * T1.M_FX_O_AMT AS NUMBER(25, 8))
  WHEN T1.M_EN_TYPE = 7 AND TRIM(T1.M_X_CUR) IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(-1 * FXCONV.M_ORIGIN_AMT AS NUMBER(25,8))
  ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER(25, 8))
END AMOUNT_FCY,
CASE
  WHEN TRIM(T1.M_FX_O_CUR) IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(T1.M_FXCV_RATE AS NUMBER(25, 8))
  WHEN T1.M_EN_TYPE = 7 AND TRIM(T1.M_X_CUR) IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(FXCONV.M_CONV_RATE AS NUMBER(25,8))
  ELSE CAST(0 AS NUMBER(25, 8))
END CCY_EXCHANGE_RATE,
TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'),'DD-MON-RRHH24:MI:SS.FF') AS LOAD_TIMESTAMP
from 
ACC_ENTRIES_REP T1
LEFT JOIN ACC_ENT_FXCONV_REP FXCONV
    ON T1.M_REF_DATA = FXCONV.M_REF_DATA 
        AND T1.M_NB = FXCONV.M_NB
        AND T1.M_EN_TYPE = 7
WHERE 
T1.M_REF_DATA= @MxDataSetKey:N
AND (T1.M_FX_O_NB != 0 OR (T1.M_FX_O_NB = 0 AND TRIM(T1.M_INSTRUMENT) = 'SAR'))
AND T1.M_EN_COMMENT <> 'BALANCETRANSFER'
GROUP BY T1.M_EN_TYPE,
T1.M_EN_AMT,
T1.M_EN_CREDIT, 
T1.M_EN_CUR, 
T1.M_EN_DATE,T1.M_ENTITY, T1.M_ACC_SEC,T1.M_VAL_DATE,T1.M_NB_TRN,T1.M_TRN_GRP,T1.M_EN_COMMENT,T1.M_TYPE_NB,T1.M_EN_CREDIT,T1.M_FX_O_CUR,T1.M_EN_CUR,T1.M_REF_DATA,T1.M_FX_O_AMT,T1.M_EN_ORIG_NB,T1.M_FX_O_NB,T1.M_NB_OFFSET,T1.M_FXCV_RATE,

  ELSE TO_CHAR(TT1.M_FX_O_NB)

  WHEN M_TYPE_NB = 'PAY' AND M_TRN_GRP IN ('BOND','EQUIT') THEN (SELECT MAX(M_TP_ISIN) FROM ACC_LIVE_DEALS_REP DEALS WHERE DEALS.M_NB = (SELECT TO_CHAR(M_DF_TRDREF) FROM ACC_DLV_CASH_REP DLV_CASH WHERE DLV_CASH.M_DF_REF = M_NB_TRN AND DLV_CASH.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N) AND DEALS.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N)

TRIM(M_DESC): SQL to generate investment Sukuk OS report dashboard
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
select 
CAST (M_ORDER2      			 								AS NUMBER(5)) as ORDER1
,CAST (M_TRADE_DATE       			 								AS DATE) as DDate
,CAST (Target1      			 								AS DECIMAL(24,2)) as Target1
,CAST (Closing      			 								AS DECIMAL(24,2))  as Closing
,CAST (Closing-Target1      			 								AS DECIMAL(24,2)) as Variance1
,CAST (
(case when Closing=0 then 0 else (Round((Closing/Target1),5)*100) end ) ||' %' AS VARCHAR(10))  as Achievements 
from (
select M_ORDER2, M_TRADE_DATE, 
         case 
            when TO_CHAR(M_TRADE_DATE,'MON') ='JAN' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('JAN')),0)
            when TO_CHAR(M_TRADE_DATE,'MON') ='FEB' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('FEB')),0)
            when TO_CHAR(M_TRADE_DATE,'MON') ='MAR' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('MAR')),0)
            when TO_CHAR(M_TRADE_DATE,'MON') ='APR' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('APR')),0)
            when TO_CHAR(M_TRADE_DATE,'MON') ='MAY' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('MAY')),0)
            when TO_CHAR(M_TRADE_DATE,'MON') ='JUN' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('JUN')),0)
            when TO_CHAR(M_TRADE_DATE,'MON') ='JUL' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('JUL')),0)
            when TO_CHAR(M_TRADE_DATE,'MON') ='AUG' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('AUG')),0)
            when TO_CHAR(M_TRADE_DATE,'MON') ='SEP' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('SEP')),0)
            when TO_CHAR(M_TRADE_DATE,'MON') ='OCT' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('OCT')),0)
            when TO_CHAR(M_TRADE_DATE,'MON') ='NOV' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('NOV')),0)
            when TO_CHAR(M_TRADE_DATE,'MON') ='DEC' then NVL((select SUM(M_TARGETAMT) from BAB_LMT_RP_INV_REP where M_REPORTNAME='INV_SUKUK_OS' and M_TARGETMON IN ('DEC')),0)
         end as Target1
         ,case when A.M_ORDER2=1 then (select SUM(M_CLOSING) from INV_SUKUK_OS_1_REP ) 
         else (select SUM(B.M_CLOSING) from INV_SUKUK_OS_1_REP B where B.M_ORDER2>= A.M_ORDER2)
         end as Closing
    from INV_SUKUK_OS_1_REP A
)

TRIM(M_DESC): Murex Net Open Position Data Extraction File and view
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
SELECT NOP.M_SOURCE, NOP.M_REPORT_DATE, NOP.M_LINE_NO, NOP.M_CATEGORY, NOP.M_NOSTRO_ACC_NO, NOP.M_DESCRIPTION, NOP.M_CURRENCY, NOP.M_AMOUNT
,DECODE(TRIM(NOP.M_CURRENCY),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT_SAR.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT_SAR2.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT_SAR2.M_MID)))) as M_SAR_RATE,
(NOP.M_AMOUNT * DECODE(TRIM(NOP.M_CURRENCY),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT_SAR.M_MID,DECODE(NVL(SPOT_SAR2.M_MID,0),0,0,(1/SPOT_SAR2.M_MID))))) as M_TOTAL
from 
(

select 'Murex' as M_SOURCE, M_REPORT_DATE, DECODE(TRIM(TO_CHAR(M_LINE_NO)),'0','',TO_CHAR(M_LINE_NO)) AS M_LINE_NO,
DECODE(TRIM(TO_CHAR(M_PRODUCT_CODE)),'0','',TO_CHAR(M_PRODUCT_CODE)) as M_CATEGORY, null as M_NOSTRO_ACC_NO, M_DESCRIPTION, M_CURRENCY, M_AMOUNT
from BAB_NOP_MUX_DATA_REP where TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_PRODUCT_CODE) || ',' || '' || ',' || '0' in 
(select distinct TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_CATEGORY) || ',' || TRIM(M_NOS_ACC) || ',' || TRIM(M_SIGN_FLAG) from BAB_GLCD_INCLUDE_REP where UPPER(TRIM(M_SOURCE))='MUREX')

UNION ALL


select 'Murex' as M_SOURCE, M_REPORT_DATE, DECODE(TRIM(TO_CHAR(M_LINE_NO)),'0','',TO_CHAR(M_LINE_NO)) AS M_LINE_NO,
DECODE(TRIM(TO_CHAR(M_PRODUCT_CODE)),'0','',TO_CHAR(M_PRODUCT_CODE)) as M_CATEGORY, null as M_NOSTRO_ACC_NO, M_DESCRIPTION, M_CURRENCY, (-1 * M_AMOUNT) AS M_AMOUNT
from BAB_NOP_MUX_DATA_REP where TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_PRODUCT_CODE) || ',' || '' || ',' || '1' in 
(select distinct TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_CATEGORY) || ',' || TRIM(M_NOS_ACC) || ',' || TRIM(M_SIGN_FLAG) from BAB_GLCD_INCLUDE_REP where UPPER(TRIM(M_SOURCE))='MUREX')

union all 

select M_SOURCE,TO_CHAR(M_REPORT_DATE,'DD-MON-YY') as M_REPORT_DATE,DECODE(TRIM(TO_CHAR(M_LINE_NO)),'0','',TO_CHAR(M_LINE_NO)) AS M_LINE_NO, 
DECODE(TRIM(TO_CHAR(M_CATEGORY)),'0','',TO_CHAR(M_CATEGORY)) AS M_CATEGORY, DECODE(TRIM(TO_CHAR(M_NOSTRO_ACC_NO)),'0','',TO_CHAR(M_NOSTRO_ACC_NO)) AS M_NOSTRO_ACC_NO, 
M_DESCRIPTION, M_CURRENCY, M_AMOUNT from BAB_NOP_EXT_DATA_REP 
where TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_CATEGORY) || ',' || TRIM(M_NOSTRO_ACC_NO) || ',' || '0' in 
(select distinct TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_CATEGORY) || ',' || TRIM(M_NOS_ACC) || ',' || TRIM(M_SIGN_FLAG)  from BAB_GLCD_INCLUDE_REP where UPPER(TRIM(M_SOURCE))='T24')

UNION ALL

select M_SOURCE,TO_CHAR(M_REPORT_DATE,'DD-MON-YY') as M_REPORT_DATE,DECODE(TRIM(TO_CHAR(M_LINE_NO)),'0','',TO_CHAR(M_LINE_NO)) AS M_LINE_NO, 
DECODE(TRIM(TO_CHAR(M_CATEGORY)),'0','',TO_CHAR(M_CATEGORY)) AS M_CATEGORY, DECODE(TRIM(TO_CHAR(M_NOSTRO_ACC_NO)),'0','',TO_CHAR(M_NOSTRO_ACC_NO)) AS M_NOSTRO_ACC_NO, 
M_DESCRIPTION, M_CURRENCY, (-1 * M_AMOUNT) AS M_AMOUNT from BAB_NOP_EXT_DATA_REP 
where TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_CATEGORY) || ',' || TRIM(M_NOSTRO_ACC_NO) || ',' || '1' in 
(select distinct TRIM(M_LINE_NO) || ',' || TRIM(M_CATEGORY) || ',' || TRIM(M_NOS_ACC) || ',' || TRIM(M_SIGN_FLAG)  from BAB_GLCD_INCLUDE_REP where UPPER(TRIM(M_SOURCE))='T24')

) NOP
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_SAR 
on SPOT_SAR.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalData_BAB_MDS:N and TRIM(SPOT_SAR.M_CCY_NUM)='SAR'  and TRIM(SPOT_SAR.M_CCY_DEN)=TRIM(NOP.M_CURRENCY)
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT_SAR2
on SPOT_SAR2.M_REF_DATA=@MxHistoricalData_BAB_MDS:N  and TRIM(SPOT_SAR2.M_CCY_DEN)='SAR' and TRIM(SPOT_SAR2.M_CCY_NUM)=TRIM(NOP.M_CURRENCY)

    TO_CHAR(M_TP_DTETRN, 'MM-MON-YYYY') AS DEAL_MON,

TRIM(M_DESC): Request of Accounting Journal of Entries Report
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
SELECT DEBIT.M_NB AS REFERENCE
  , DEBIT.M_TYPE_NB AS ENTRY_TYPE
  , CASE 
      WHEN DEBIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'PAY' 
        THEN (CASE 
                WHEN DLV.M_DF_CNTCL IN ('mxCollateralStpIMARGIN_CALL', 'mxCollateralStpIEXPECTED_MARGIN_CALL') THEN 'Collateral'
                WHEN DLV.M_DF_CNTCL IN ('mxContractISINGLE', 'mxContractStbICONTRACT', 'mxContractFxISWAP') THEN 'Contract'
--                WHEN DLV.M_DF_CNTCL = 'mxInventoryNostroSecurityCorporateactionEvalICA_EXECUTION' THEN SUBSTRING(DLV.M_DF_IEVTCL, INSTR(DLV.M_DF_IEVTCL, 'Event'), + LENGTH('Event'))
              END)
      WHEN DEBIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'TRN' THEN 'Contract'
      WHEN DEBIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'LIQ' THEN 'NA'
      WHEN DEBIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'HDG' THEN 'NA'
    END AS PRODUCER_TYPE
  , CASE 
      WHEN DEBIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'PAY' AND DLV.M_DF_CNTCL IN ('mxContractISINGLE', 'mxContractStbICONTRACT', 'mxContractFxISWAP') THEN CAST(DLV.M_DF_CNTREF AS VARCHAR(20))
      WHEN DEBIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'TRN' THEN CAST(TPALL.M_CONTRACT AS VARCHAR(20))
      ELSE 'NA'
    END AS CONTRACT_NUM
  , DEBIT.M_EN_DEBIT AS CONSOL_KEY
  , CP.M_DSP_LABEL
  , SUBSTR(REGEXP_SUBSTR(DEBIT.M_EN_DEBIT, '(-[^-]+){3}([-])', 1, 1, NULL, 1), 2) AS GL_CODE
  , SUBSTR(REGEXP_SUBSTR(DEBIT.M_EN_DEBIT, '(-[^-]+){2}([-])', 1, 1, NULL, 1), 2) AS GL_PRODUCT
  , CASE WHEN DEBIT.M_X_CUR <> ' ' THEN  DEBIT.M_X_CUR ELSE DEBIT.M_EN_CUR END AS CURRENCY
  , DEBIT.M_EN_AMT AS DR_AMOUNT_SAR
  , 0 AS CR_AMOUNT_SAR
  , DEBIT.M_FX_O_AMT AS DR_AMOUNT_FCY
  , 0 AS CR_AMOUNT_FCY
  , CASE 
      WHEN DEBIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'TRN' THEN TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN 
      WHEN DEBIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'PAY' AND DLV.M_DF_CNTCL IN ('mxContractISINGLE', 'mxContractStbICONTRACT', 'mxContractFxISWAP') THEN TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN
      ELSE DEBIT.M_VAL_DATE
    END AS TXN_DATE
  , CASE 
      WHEN DEBIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'TRN' THEN TPALL.M_TP_DTEPMT
      WHEN DEBIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'PAY' AND DLV.M_DF_CNTCL IN ('mxContractISINGLE', 'mxContractStbICONTRACT', 'mxContractFxISWAP') THEN TPALL.M_TP_DTEPMT
      ELSE DEBIT.M_VAL_DATE
    END AS VALUE_DATE
FROM ACC_DLV_CASH_REP DLV
  LEFT JOIN ACC_ENTRIES_REP DEBIT
    ON DLV.M_REF_DATA = DEBIT.M_REF_DATA
      AND DLV.M_DF_REF = DEBIT.M_NB_TRN
  LEFT JOIN TP_ALL_REP TPALL
    ON (CASE 
          WHEN DEBIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'TRN' THEN DEBIT.M_ORIGIN_REF 
          WHEN DEBIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'PAY' AND DLV.M_DF_CNTCL IN ('mxContractISINGLE', 'mxContractStbICONTRACT', 'mxContractFxISWAP') THEN DLV.M_DF_TRDREF END) = TPALL.M_MRPL_ONB
      AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataTRN:N
  LEFT JOIN PARTIES_REP CP
    ON TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(DEBIT.M_EN_COMMENT, '^[^;]*;([^;]*)', 1, 1, NULL, 1)) = TRIM(CP.M_CIF)
      AND CP.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataTRN:N
WHERE 1 = 1
  AND DEBIT.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
  AND DEBIT.M_SYS_DATE = TPALL.M_REP_DATE2
  AND (DEBIT.M_FX_O_NB <> 0 OR (DEBIT.M_EN_CUR = 'SAR' AND DEBIT.M_FX_O_NB = 0))

  UNION ALL
  
SELECT CREDIT.M_NB AS REFERENCE
  , CREDIT.M_TYPE_NB AS ENTRY_TYPE
  , CASE 
      WHEN CREDIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'PAY' 
        THEN (CASE 
                WHEN DLV.M_DF_CNTCL IN ('mxCollateralStpIMARGIN_CALL', 'mxCollateralStpIEXPECTED_MARGIN_CALL') THEN 'Collateral'
                WHEN DLV.M_DF_CNTCL IN ('mxContractISINGLE', 'mxContractStbICONTRACT', 'mxContractFxISWAP') THEN 'Contract'
--                WHEN DLV.M_DF_CNTCL = 'mxInventoryNostroSecurityCorporateactionEvalICA_EXECUTION' THEN SUBSTRING(DLV.M_DF_IEVTCL, INSTR(DLV.M_DF_IEVTCL, 'Event'), + LENGTH('Event'))
              END)
      WHEN CREDIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'TRN' THEN 'Contract'
      WHEN CREDIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'LIQ' THEN 'NA'
      WHEN CREDIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'HDG' THEN 'NA'
    END AS PRODUCER_TYPE
  , CASE 
      WHEN CREDIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'PAY' AND DLV.M_DF_CNTCL IN ('mxContractISINGLE', 'mxContractStbICONTRACT', 'mxContractFxISWAP') THEN CAST(DLV.M_DF_CNTREF AS VARCHAR(20))
      WHEN CREDIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'TRN' THEN CAST(TPALL.M_CONTRACT AS VARCHAR(20))
      ELSE 'NA'
    END AS CONTRACT_NUM
  , CREDIT.M_EN_CREDIT AS CONSOL_KEY
  , CP.M_DSP_LABEL
  , SUBSTR(REGEXP_SUBSTR(CREDIT.M_EN_CREDIT, '(-[^-]+){3}([-])', 1, 1, NULL, 1), 2) AS GL_CODE
  , SUBSTR(REGEXP_SUBSTR(CREDIT.M_EN_CREDIT, '(-[^-]+){1}([-])', 1, 1, NULL, 1), 2) AS GL_PRODUCT
  , CASE WHEN CREDIT.M_X_CUR <> ' ' THEN  CREDIT.M_X_CUR ELSE CREDIT.M_EN_CUR END AS CURRENCY
  , 0 AS DR_AMOUNT_SAR
  , CREDIT.M_EN_AMT AS CR_AMOUNT_SAR
  , 0 AS DR_AMOUNT_FCY
  , CREDIT.M_FX_O_AMT AS CR_AMOUNT_FCY
  , CASE 
      WHEN CREDIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'TRN' THEN TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN 
      WHEN CREDIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'PAY' AND DLV.M_DF_CNTCL IN ('mxContractISINGLE', 'mxContractStbICONTRACT', 'mxContractFxISWAP') THEN TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN
      ELSE CREDIT.M_VAL_DATE
    END AS TXN_DATE
  , CASE 
      WHEN CREDIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'TRN' THEN TPALL.M_TP_DTEPMT
      WHEN CREDIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'PAY' AND DLV.M_DF_CNTCL IN ('mxContractISINGLE', 'mxContractStbICONTRACT', 'mxContractFxISWAP') THEN TPALL.M_TP_DTEPMT
      ELSE CREDIT.M_VAL_DATE
    END AS VALUE_DATE
FROM ACC_DLV_CASH_REP DLV
  LEFT JOIN ACC_ENTRIES_REP CREDIT
    ON DLV.M_REF_DATA = CREDIT.M_REF_DATA
      AND DLV.M_DF_REF = CREDIT.M_NB_TRN
  LEFT JOIN TP_ALL_REP TPALL
    ON (CASE 
          WHEN CREDIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'TRN' THEN CREDIT.M_ORIGIN_REF 
          WHEN CREDIT.M_TYPE_NB = 'PAY' AND DLV.M_DF_CNTCL IN ('mxContractISINGLE', 'mxContractStbICONTRACT', 'mxContractFxISWAP') THEN DLV.M_DF_TRDREF END) = TPALL.M_MRPL_ONB
      AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataTRN:N
  LEFT JOIN PARTIES_REP CP
    ON TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(CREDIT.M_EN_COMMENT, '^[^;]*;([^;]*)', 1, 1, NULL, 1)) = TRIM(CP.M_CIF)
      AND CP.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataTRN:N
WHERE 1 = 1
  AND CREDIT.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
  AND CREDIT.M_SYS_DATE = TPALL.M_REP_DATE2
  AND (CREDIT.M_FX_O_NB <> 0 OR (CREDIT.M_EN_CUR = 'SAR' AND CREDIT.M_FX_O_NB = 0))

TRIM(M_DESC): OLS Account Data Extract
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
SELECT 
    NST.M_REFERENCE AS PAYMENT_ID,
    NVL(TRN.M_CONTRACT, NST.M_ID) AS CONTRACT_NUMBER,
    NULL AS DEBIT_ACCOUNT,
    CASE WHEN NST.M_AMOUNT<0 THEN NST.M_CURRENCY END AS DEBIT_CURRENCY, 
    (CASE WHEN (NST.M_CURRENCY!='SAR' AND NST.M_AMOUNT <= 0) THEN ABS(NST.M_AMOUNT) ELSE 0 END) AS DEBIT_AMOUNT_FCY,
    (CASE WHEN (NST.M_CURRENCY='SAR' AND NST.M_AMOUNT <= 0)THEN ABS(NST.M_AMOUNT) ELSE 0 END) AS DEBIT_AMOUNT_LCY,
    NULL AS CREDIT_ACCOUNT,
    CASE WHEN NST.M_AMOUNT>0 THEN NST.M_CURRENCY END AS CREDIT_CURRENCY, 
    (CASE WHEN (NST.M_CURRENCY!='SAR' AND NST.M_AMOUNT >= 0) THEN NST.M_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS CREDIT_AMOUNT_FCY,
    (CASE WHEN (NST.M_CURRENCY='SAR' AND NST.M_AMOUNT >= 0) THEN NST.M_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS CREDIT_AMOUNT_LCY,
    NST.M_VALUE_DAT AS VALUE_DATE, 
    NST.M_VALUE_DAT AS POST_DATE, 
    TRN.M_TP_DTEEXP AS MATURITY_DATE,
    TRN.M_CONTRACT AS REFERENCE, 
    TRN.M_CMP_TYPO AS PRODUCT,
    TRN.M_TP_PRICE AS RATE, 
    TRN.M_TP_CNTRP AS CUSTOMER_CIF, 
    TRN.M_TP_DTESYS || ' ' || TRN.M_TP_TIMSYS AS TRN_DATE_TIME,
    NST_BAL.OPENING + NST_BAL.CUMULATIVE_MVT - NST.M_AMOUNT AS OPENING_BALANCE,
    NST_BAL.OPENING + NST_BAL.CUMULATIVE_MVT AS CLOSING_BALANCE,
    NULL AS ENTRY_REF,
    NULL AS RULE_LABEL,
    NST.M_REP_DATE2 + 1 AS SYSTEM_DATE, 
    NULL AS ENTRY_COMMENT,
    NULL AS REVERSAL,
    TRN.M_TP_STATUS2 AS STATUS 
FROM BAB_NOSTRO_CASH_REP NST 
        LEFT JOIN TP_ALL_REP TRN
            ON NST.M_TRADEREFE = TRN.M_NB 
            		  AND NST.M_PRODUCER_ = 'Single financial contract'
                AND TRN.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataTRN:N 
        LEFT JOIN (SELECT NST.M_REFERENCE,
            SUM(CASE 
                WHEN NST.M_TYPE = 'OPENING' THEN NST.M_AMOUNT END)
                    OVER (PARTITION BY NST.M_ACCOUNT_N, NST.M_CURRENCY, NST.M_SETTLEMEN) AS OPENING, 
            SUM(NST.M_AMOUNT) 
                OVER (PARTITION BY NST.M_ACCOUNT_N, NST.M_CURRENCY, NST.M_SETTLEMEN) AS CLOSING,
            SUM(CASE WHEN NST.M_TYPE = 'MOVEMENT' THEN NST.M_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) 
                OVER (PARTITION BY NST.M_ACCOUNT_N, NST.M_CURRENCY, NST.M_SETTLEMEN 
                    ORDER BY NST.M_REFERENCE ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS CUMULATIVE_MVT
            FROM BAB_NOSTRO_CASH_REP NST
            WHERE NST.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataNST:N 
                AND NST.M_TYPE <> 'CLOSING'
        ) NST_BAL
            ON NST.M_REFERENCE = NST_BAL.M_REFERENCE
WHERE 
    NST.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
    --AND TRN.M_TP_DTETRN = TRN.M_REP_DATE2
    AND NST.M_VALUE_DAT = TRN.M_REP_DATE2
    AND (NST.M_ACCOUNT_N LIKE 'DUMMY_NOSTRO_KS%' OR NST.M_VOS_ROUTE = 'SI-INT128241')
    AND NST.M_TYPE = 'MOVEMENT'
    AND TRN.M_CMP_TYPO NOT IN ('Banknotes', 'FT Nostro Nostro')
    AND TRN.M_CMP_TYPO != 'Murabaha Commodity'

WITH CALC AS
(
  SELECT SUM(LIQ.M_PRICE * DECODE(SIM.M_SAR_RATE, 0, 1, SIM.M_SAR_RATE) * LIQ.M_QUANTITY) AS TOTAL_AVP_SAR
  FROM MRL_SUKUK_LIQ_REP LIQ
  JOIN MRL_SUKUK_DUR_REP SIM
    ON TRIM (LIQ.M_PORTFOLIO) = TRIM (SIM.M_PORTFOLIO)
   AND TRIM (LIQ.M_INSTRUMENT) = TRIM (SIM.M_DISPLAY_LABEL)
)
SELECT SIM.M_H_ACC_CLS AS ACC_CLASS,
       SIM.M_DISPLAY_LABEL AS SE_D_LABEL,
       SIM.M_ISIN AS SE_ISIN,
       SIM.M_PORTFOLIO AS PORTFOLIO,
       SIM.M_TYPOLOGY AS TYPOLOGY,
       SIM.M_MODIF_DUR AS MODIF_DUR,
       LIQ.M_PRICE AS AVP,
       LIQ.M_CCY AS CCY,
       CAST(DECODE(SIM.M_SAR_RATE, 0, 1, SIM.M_SAR_RATE) AS NUMERIC(14,7)) AS SPTCV_SAR,
       CAST(LIQ.M_PRICE * DECODE(SIM.M_SAR_RATE, 0, 1, SIM.M_SAR_RATE) AS NUMERIC(28,7)) AS AVP_SAR,
       LIQ.M_QUANTITY AS QUANTITY,
       CAST(((LIQ.M_PRICE * LIQ.M_QUANTITY * DECODE(SIM.M_SAR_RATE, 0, 1, SIM.M_SAR_RATE)) / (SELECT TOTAL_AVP_SAR FROM CALC)) * SIM.M_MODIF_DUR AS NUMERIC(24,12)) AS WAVG_MODIF_DUR
FROM MRL_SUKUK_DUR_REP SIM
  JOIN MRL_SUKUK_LIQ_REP LIQ
    ON TRIM (LIQ.M_PORTFOLIO) = TRIM (SIM.M_PORTFOLIO)
   AND TRIM (LIQ.M_INSTRUMENT) = TRIM (SIM.M_DISPLAY_LABEL)

select TAB1.M_NB, TAB1.M_TP_BUY, TAB1.M_EN_AMT, TAB1.M_EN_CUR, TAB1.M_NB_RULE, TAB1.M_NB_ENTRY, TAB1.GL_ACCT, TAB1.GL_DEPT_CODE from

ELSE DECODE(TRIM(T2.M_EN_CREDIT), 'Migration Account','Migration Account',TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4))) END) AS GL_ACCT,

	WHEN TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
	ELSE TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))

(CASE WHEN T1.M_TP_BS='B' THEN DECODE(TRIM(T2.M_EN_DEBIT), 'Migration Account','Migration Account', TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)))
ELSE DECODE(TRIM(T2.M_EN_CREDIT), 'Migration Account','Migration Account',TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4))) END) AS GL_ACCT,

	WHEN TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
	ELSE TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))

	ELSE TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))

from TP_ALL_REP T1, ACC_JOURNAL_REP T2, ACC_RULES_REP T3, ACC_ENTRIES_REP T4
where T1.M_TP_BUY=T2.M_NB_BS and ROUND(T1.M_TP_NOMINAL,2)=ROUND(T2.M_EN_AMT,2) and T1.M_REF_DATA=T2.M_REF_DATA and T1.M_NB=T2.M_NB_TRN and T1.M_TP_NOMCUR=T2.M_EN_CUR

and (T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Payable%' or T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Receivable%' or T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Balances%' or T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Capital-Pay%' or T3.M_RULE_LB like '%Capital-Receive%')

and TRIM(T2.M_NB)=TRIM(T4.M_NB(+)) and NVL(T4.M_NB_REVERSE,'N') <> 'Y'
and T1.M_TRN_GRP IN ('REPO', 'IRS', 'LN_BR')
--AND TRIM(T1.M_TP_STATUS2) in ('LIVE','MKT_OP')
and T1.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N and T2.M_EN_DATE<TO_DATE('12-DEC-22','DD-MON-YY') and T3.M_RULE_NB not in (1022, 1030)) TAB1

select TAB1.M_NB, TAB1.M_TP_BUY, TAB1.M_EN_AMT, TAB1.M_EN_CUR, TAB1.M_NB_RULE, TAB1.M_NB_ENTRY, TAB1.GL_ACCT, TAB1.GL_DEPT_CODE from

(CASE WHEN T1.M_TP_BS='B' THEN DECODE(TRIM(T2.M_EN_DEBIT), 'Migration Account','Migration Account', TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)))
ELSE DECODE(TRIM(T2.M_EN_CREDIT), 'Migration Account','Migration Account',TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4))) END) AS GL_ACCT,

	WHEN TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
	ELSE TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))

	WHEN TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
	ELSE TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(T2.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))

END) AS GL_DEPT_CODE
from TP_ALL_REP T1, ACC_JOURNAL_REP T2, ACC_RULES_REP T3, ACC_ENTRIES_REP T4
where T1.M_TP_BUY=T2.M_NB_BS and ROUND(T1.M_TP_NOMINAL,2)=ROUND(T2.M_EN_AMT,2) and T1.M_REF_DATA=T2.M_REF_DATA and T1.M_NB=T2.M_NB_TRN and T1.M_TP_NOMCUR=T2.M_EN_CUR

SELECT 
CAST(Record_Status AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS Record_Status,
CAST(Transaction_Ref AS NUMBER(10)) AS Transaction_Ref,
CAST(T24_Reference AS VARCHAR(25)) AS T24_Reference,
CAST(No_of_Amendments AS VARCHAR2(6)) AS No_of_Amendments,
CAST(GB_Description AS CHAR(51)) AS GB_Description,
CAST(Deal_Type AS VARCHAR2(21)) AS Deal_Type,
CAST(Category_Code AS VARCHAR(10)) AS Category_Code,
CAST(Trade_Date AS DATE) AS Trade_Date,
CAST(Dealer_Desk AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS Dealer_Desk,
CAST(Deal_Currency AS VARCHAR2(3)) AS Deal_Currency,
CAST(Commodity_Code AS VARCHAR(20)) AS Commodity_Code,
CAST(Commodity_Name AS VARCHAR2(15)) Commodity_Name,
CAST(Com_Unit_Price AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS Com_Unit_Price,
CAST(Commodity_Quantity AS NUMBER(24)) AS Commodity_Quantity,
CAST(Broker_CIF AS VARCHAR2(50)) AS Broker_CIF,
CAST(Broker_Name AS VARCHAR2(255)) AS Broker_Name,
CAST(Brokerage_Amt AS NUMBER(20,2)) AS Brokerage_Amt,
CAST(Sale_Counterparty AS VARCHAR2(50)) AS Sale_Counterparty,
CAST(Counterparty_Name AS VARCHAR2(255)) AS Counterparty_Name,
CAST(Settlement_Date AS DATE) AS Settlement_Date,
CAST(Maturity_Date AS DATE) AS Maturity_Date,
CAST(Principal AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS Principal,
CAST(Principal_in_USD AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS Principal_in_USD,
CAST(Rate AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS Rate,
CAST(Total_Profit AS NUMBER(23,2)) AS Total_Profit,
CAST(No_Of_Days AS VARCHAR(20)) AS No_Of_Days,
CAST(Sell_Amount AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS Sell_Amount,
CAST(SUM_PRODUCT AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS SUM_PRODUCT,
CAST(Market_Rate AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS Market_Rate,
CAST(Accrual AS NUMBER(20,2)) AS Accrual,
CAST(Yield AS NUMBER(20,2)) AS Yield,
CAST(Inputter_2 AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS Inputter_2,
CAST(Inputter_2_name AS VARCHAR2(35)) AS Inputter_2_name,
CAST(Inputter_2_time AS VARCHAR2(35)) AS Inputter_2_time,
CAST(Inputter_1 AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS Inputter_1,
CAST(Inputter_1_name AS VARCHAR2(35)) AS Inputter_1_name,
CAST(Inputter_1_time AS VARCHAR2(35)) AS Inputter_1_time,
CAST(Authorizer AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS Authorizer,
CAST(Authorizer_name AS VARCHAR2(35)) AS Authorizer_name,
CAST(Authorizer_time AS VARCHAR2(35)) AS Authorizer_time,
CAST(Cparty_Limit_Code AS NUMBER(10,4)) AS Cparty_Limit_Code,
CAST(Company_Name AS VARCHAR2(20)) AS Company_Name,
CAST(Dept_Code AS VARCHAR(30)) AS Dept_Code,
CAST(Final_Rating AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS Final_Rating,
CAST(LTM_Final_Maturity_Date AS DATE) AS LTM_Final_Maturity_Date,
CAST(GL_CAT AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS GL_CAT,
CAST(GL_Line AS VARCHAR2(30)) AS GL_Line,
CAST(LastUpdatedDt AS DATE) AS LastUpdatedDt,
CAST(LastEvent AS VARCHAR2(30)) AS LastEvent
from
(  
SELECT DISTINCT
TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2 as Record_Status,
TPALL.M_NB as Transaction_Ref,
TPALL.M_TP_GID as T24_Reference,
(TPALL.M_CNT_VS2-1) as No_of_Amendments,
TPALL.M_CMP_TYPDSC as GB_Description,
TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO as Deal_Type,
(CASE 
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Murabaha Borrowing' AND TRIM(TPALL.M_CNT_USG)='DI' AND TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO) LIKE '%LM%' THEN 21008
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Murabaha Borrowing' AND TRIM(TPALL.M_CNT_USG)='DI' AND TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO) NOT LIKE '%LM%' THEN 21003
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Murabaha Borrowing' THEN 21001
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='LTM' THEN 21002
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Wakala Borrowing' THEN 21004
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Repo SAMA' THEN 21075
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Murabaha Placement' THEN 21076
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='DPM Murabaha' THEN 21078
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Wakala Placement' THEN 21079
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Repo Murabaha' THEN 21211
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='RR SAMA' THEN 21251
ELSE 0 END) AS Category_Code,
TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN as Trade_Date,
STS3.M_FOP_INT_GP AS Dealer_Desk,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR as Deal_Currency,
UDF.M_COMMOD_CD AS Commodity_Code,
UDF.M_COMMODITY AS Commodity_Name,
CAST(UDF.M_IS_BRPRICE AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS Com_Unit_Price,
DECODE(CAST(UDF.M_IS_BRPRICE AS NUMBER(25,2)),0,0,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ/CAST(UDF.M_IS_BRPRICE AS NUMBER(25,2))) AS Commodity_Quantity,
CAST(UDF.M_IS_BROKER1 AS VARCHAR2(20)) as Broker_CIF,
CAST(UDF.M_BRK1_NAME AS VARCHAR2(255))as Broker_Name,
CAST(case
      when TPALL.M_TP_FEE0!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE0     
      when TPALL.M_TP_FEE1!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE1     
      when TPALL.M_TP_FEE2!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE2     
      else TPALL.M_TP_FEE3 end AS NUMBER(26,2)
      ) as Brokerage_Amt,
TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP as Sale_Counterparty,
TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP) as Counterparty_Name,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST as Settlement_Date,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP as Maturity_Date,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL as Principal,
ROUND(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'USD',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,DECODE(NVL(SPOT.M_MID,0),0,0,TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*NVL(1/SPOT.M_MID,0))),2) as Principal_in_USD,
DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO),'Depo CapFloorCollar',6.08207,DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)) AS Rate, ---6.08207==>M_TP_RTFXC02
CF.M_F_AMOUNT AS Total_Profit,
TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST as No_Of_Days,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL+CF.M_F_AMOUNT as Sell_Amount,
TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*decode(TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO),'Depo CapFloorCollar',6.08207,DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)) as SUM_PRODUCT,
DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO),'Depo CapFloorCollar',6.08207,DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)) AS Market_Rate,
PLMV.M_ACCRUAL_C as Accrual,
0 as Yield,
STS2.M_STP_LST_VD as Inputter_2,
STS2.M_USERNAME as Inputter_2_name,
STS2.M_STS_TMLNG AS Inputter_2_time,
DECODE(STS1.M_STP_LST_VD,null,STS3.M_STP_LST_VD,STS1.M_STP_LST_VD) as Inputter_1,
DECODE(STS1.M_USERNAME,null,STS3.M_USERNAME,STS1.M_USERNAME) as Inputter_1_name,
DECODE(STS1.M_STS_TMLNG,null,STS3.M_STS_TMLNG,STS1.M_STS_TMLNG) AS Inputter_1_time,
STS3.M_STP_LST_VD as Authorizer,
STS3.M_USERNAME as Authorizer_name,
STS3.M_STS_TMLNG AS Authorizer_time,
LMTCODES.LIMIT_REF as Cparty_Limit_Code,
'SA0010001' as Company_Name,
GL_ACC.GL_DEPT_CODE as Dept_Code,
' ' as Final_Rating,
(CASE WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='LTM' THEN TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP END) LTM_Final_Maturity_Date,
UDF.M_PROD_CODE as GL_CAT,
GL_ACC.GL_ACCT as GL_Line,
TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 as LastUpdatedDt
, TPALL.M_CNTLIMPL2 as LastEvent
, TPALL.M_TP_CREATOR AS CREATOR
from TP_ALL_REP TPALL
left outer join 
    (select M_NB
      , SUM(ABS(M_F_AMOUNT)) M_F_AMOUNT 
    from CASH_FLOW_REP 
    where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
      and M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN'
    group by  M_NB) CF
      ON TPALL.M_NB=CF.M_NB
left outer join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT 
    ON TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT.M_DATE 
      and TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR)=TRIM(SPOT.M_CCY_NUM) 
      and TRIM(SPOT.M_CCY_DEN)='USD'
left outer join
  (select 
    MAX(M_STP_LST_VD) as M_STP_LST_VD 
    , MAX(M_STP_LTVLTM) as M_STS_TMLNG
    , M_FC_ID, M_FOP_INT_GP
    , MAX(M_USERNAME) as M_USERNAME 
  from STPFC_ENTRY_TBL_REP 
  where M_STP_VL_LVL='Initial' 
    and M_STP_LTVLTM IS NOT NULL 
    AND M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N --@MxDataSetKey:N
  group by M_FC_ID,M_FOP_INT_GP) STS1
    ON TPALL.M_CONTRACT=STS1.M_FC_ID
left outer join
(select MAX(M_STP_LST_VD) as M_STP_LST_VD
  , MAX(M_STP_LTVLTM) as M_STS_TMLNG
  , M_FC_ID
  , M_FOP_INT_GP
  , MAX(M_USERNAME) as M_USERNAME
from STPFC_ENTRY_TBL_REP 
where M_STP_VL_LVL='EventPending' 
  and M_STP_LTVLTM IS NOT NULL 
  and M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
group by M_FC_ID,M_FOP_INT_GP) STS2
    ON TPALL.M_CONTRACT=STS2.M_FC_ID
left outer join
(select max(M_STP_LST_VD) as M_STP_LST_VD
  , MAX(M_STP_LTVLTM) as M_STS_TMLNG
  , M_FC_ID, M_FOP_INT_GP
  , max(M_USERNAME) as M_USERNAME
from STPFC_ENTRY_TBL_REP 
where M_STP_VL_LVL in('NonEcoValidated','Matched') 
  and M_STP_LTVLTM IS NOT NULL 
  and M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
group by M_FC_ID,M_FOP_INT_GP) STS3
    ON TPALL.M_CONTRACT=STS3.M_FC_ID
left outer join PLA_MV_REP PLMV
    ON TPALL.M_NB=PLMV.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PLMV.M_REF_DATA
left OUTER JOIN
(select TRIM(M_T24CODE) as LIMIT_REF
  , TRIM(regexp_substr(M_LIMITPRODU, '[^##]+', 1, level)) as LIMIT_PRODUCT 
from LIMIT_CODES_REP
  where TRIM(M_LIMITPRODU) not in ('NOT_DEFINED','N/A') 
    AND TRIM(M_T24CODE) not in ('NOT_DEFINED','N/A')
connect by level <= regexp_count(M_LIMITPRODU, '[^##]+') 
group by M_T24CODE, M_LIMITPRODU, level) LMTCODES
on TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)=LMTCODES.LIMIT_PRODUCT
LEFT OUTER JOIN GL_ACC
on TPALL.M_NB=GL_ACC.M_NB and TPALL.M_TP_BUY=GL_ACC.M_TP_BUY 
left outer join TRD_UDF_REP UDF
    ON TPALL.M_UDF_REF2=UDF.M_NB and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=UDF.M_REF_DATA
where 
  (TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2) in ('LIVE','MKT_OP') OR (TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2 = 'DEAD' AND TPALL.M_CNTLIMPL2 = 'Cancel and Reissue'))
  AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
  and TPALL.M_TP_INT='N' 
order by TRANSACTION_REF)

TRIM(M_DESC): Sql to generate daily FX Blotter Report - TESTING
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):

TRIM(M_DESC): V2 RN
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
WITH
STS1 AS (select 
    MAX(M_STP_LST_VD) as M_STP_LST_VD 
    , MAX(M_STP_LTVLTM) as M_STS_TMLNG
    , M_FC_ID, M_FOP_INT_GP
    , MAX(M_USERNAME) as M_USERNAME 
  from STPFC_ENTRY_TBL_REP 
  where M_STP_VL_LVL='Initial' 
    and M_STP_LTVLTM IS NOT NULL 
    AND M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
  group by M_FC_ID,M_FOP_INT_GP),
STS2 AS (select MAX(M_STP_LST_VD) as M_STP_LST_VD
  , MAX(M_STP_LTVLTM) as M_STS_TMLNG
  , M_FC_ID
  , M_FOP_INT_GP
  , MAX(M_USERNAME) as M_USERNAME
from STPFC_ENTRY_TBL_REP 
where M_STP_VL_LVL='EventPending' 
  and M_STP_LTVLTM IS NOT NULL 
  and M_REF_DATA =  @MxDataSetKey:N
group by M_FC_ID,M_FOP_INT_GP),
STS3 AS (select max(M_STP_LST_VD) as M_STP_LST_VD
  , MAX(M_STP_LTVLTM) as M_STS_TMLNG
  , M_FC_ID, M_FOP_INT_GP
  , max(M_USERNAME) as M_USERNAME
from STPFC_ENTRY_TBL_REP 
where M_STP_VL_LVL in('NonEcoValidated','Matched') 
  and M_STP_LTVLTM IS NOT NULL 
  and M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
group by M_FC_ID,M_FOP_INT_GP) 
SELECT 
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2 AS VARCHAR2(10)) as Record_Status,
CAST(TPALL.M_NB AS NUMBER(10)) as Transaction_Ref,
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_GID AS VARCHAR(25)) as T24_Reference,
CAST((TPALL.M_CNT_VS2-1) AS VARCHAR2(6)) as No_of_Amendments,
CAST(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPDSC AS CHAR(51)) as GB_Description,
CAST(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO AS VARCHAR2(21)) as Deal_Type,
CAST((CASE 
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Murabaha Borrowing' AND TRIM(TPALL.M_CNT_USG)='DI' AND TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO) LIKE '%LM%' THEN 21008
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Murabaha Borrowing' AND TRIM(TPALL.M_CNT_USG)='DI' AND TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO) NOT LIKE '%LM%' THEN 21003
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Murabaha Borrowing' THEN 21001
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='LTM' THEN 21002
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Wakala Borrowing' THEN 21004
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Repo SAMA' THEN 21075
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Murabaha Placement' THEN 21076
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='DPM Murabaha' THEN 21078
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Wakala Placement' THEN 21079
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='Repo Murabaha' THEN 21211
WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='RR SAMA' THEN 21251
ELSE 0 END) AS VARCHAR(10)) AS Category_Code,
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN AS DATE) as Trade_Date,
CAST(STS3.M_FOP_INT_GP AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS Dealer_Desk,
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR AS VARCHAR2(3)) as Deal_Currency,
CAST(UDF.M_COMMOD_CD AS VARCHAR(20)) AS Commodity_Code,
CAST(UDF.M_COMMODITY AS VARCHAR2(15)) AS Commodity_Name,
CAST(NVL(UDF.M_IS_BRPRICE, 0) AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS Com_Unit_Price,
CAST(DECODE(CAST(NVL(UDF.M_IS_BRPRICE, 0) AS NUMBER(25,2)),0,0,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ/CAST(NVL(UDF.M_IS_BRPRICE, 0) AS NUMBER(25,2))) AS NUMBER(24)) AS Commodity_Quantity,
CAST(UDF.M_IS_BROKER1 AS VARCHAR2(50)) as Broker_CIF,
CAST(UDF.M_BRK1_NAME AS VARCHAR2(255))as Broker_Name,
CAST(case
      when TPALL.M_TP_FEE0!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE0     
      when TPALL.M_TP_FEE1!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE1     
      when TPALL.M_TP_FEE2!=0 then TPALL.M_TP_FEE2     
      else TPALL.M_TP_FEE3 end AS NUMBER(20,2)
      ) as Brokerage_Amt,
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP AS VARCHAR2(50)) as Sale_Counterparty,
CAST(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP) AS VARCHAR2(255)) as Counterparty_Name,
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST AS DATE) as Settlement_Date,
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP AS DATE) as Maturity_Date,
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL AS NUMBER(25,2)) as Principal,
CAST(ROUND(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'USD',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,DECODE(NVL(SPOT.M_MID,0),0,0,DECODE(SPOT.M_CCY_DEN, 'USD',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*NVL(1/SPOT.M_MID,0),TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*NVL(SPOT.M_MID,0)))),2) AS NUMBER(25,2)) as Principal_in_USD,
CAST(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO),'Depo CapFloorCollar',6.08207,DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)) AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS Rate, ---6.08207==>M_TP_RTFXC02
CAST(NVL(CF.M_F_AMOUNT, 0) AS NUMBER(23,2)) AS Total_Profit,
CAST((TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP-TPALL.M_TP_DTEFST) AS VARCHAR(20)) as No_Of_Days,
CAST((TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL+NVL(CF.M_F_AMOUNT, 0)) AS NUMBER(25,2)) as Sell_Amount,
CAST((TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL*decode(TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO),'Depo CapFloorCollar',6.08207,DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE))) AS NUMBER(25,2)) as SUM_PRODUCT,
CAST(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO),'Depo CapFloorCollar',6.08207,DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_PRICE,0,TPALL.M_TP_PRICED,TPALL.M_TP_PRICE)) AS NUMBER(25,2)) AS Market_Rate,
CAST(CASE 
    WHEN lower(RUL.M_RULE_LB) like '%accrual%' THEN NVL(ACC.M_EN_AMT , 0)
    ELSE 0 
END AS NUMBER(20, 2))as Accrual,
CAST(0 AS NUMBER(20,2)) as Yield,
CAST(STS2.M_STP_LST_VD AS VARCHAR2(10)) as Inputter_2,
CAST(STS2.M_USERNAME AS VARCHAR2(35)) as Inputter_2_name,
CAST(STS2.M_STS_TMLNG AS VARCHAR2(35)) AS Inputter_2_time,
CAST(DECODE(STS1.M_STP_LST_VD,null,STS3.M_STP_LST_VD,STS1.M_STP_LST_VD) AS VARCHAR2(10)) as Inputter_1,
CAST(DECODE(STS1.M_USERNAME,null,STS3.M_USERNAME,STS1.M_USERNAME) AS VARCHAR2(35)) as Inputter_1_name,
CAST(DECODE(STS1.M_STS_TMLNG,null,STS3.M_STS_TMLNG,STS1.M_STS_TMLNG) AS VARCHAR2(35)) AS Inputter_1_time,
CAST(STS3.M_STP_LST_VD AS VARCHAR2(10)) as Authorizer,
CAST(STS3.M_USERNAME AS VARCHAR2(35)) as Authorizer_name,
CAST(STS3.M_STS_TMLNG AS VARCHAR2(35)) AS Authorizer_time,
CAST(NVL(LMTCODES.M_LIMIT_REF, 0) AS NUMBER(10,4)) as Cparty_Limit_Code,
CAST('SA0010001' AS VARCHAR2(20)) as Company_Name,
CAST(CASE
	WHEN TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2)) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))) < 5 THEN '00000'
	ELSE TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,2))
END AS VARCHAR(30)) AS Dept_Code,
CAST(' ' AS VARCHAR2(10)) as Final_Rating,
CAST((CASE WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='LTM' THEN TPALL.M_TP_DTEEXP END) AS DATE) AS LTM_Final_Maturity_Date,
CAST(UDF.M_PROD_CODE AS VARCHAR2(10)) as GL_CAT,
CAST(CASE 
    WHEN TPALL.M_TP_BS = 'B' THEN DECODE(TRIM(ACC.M_EN_DEBIT), 'Migration Account','Migration Account', TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC.M_EN_DEBIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4))) 
    ELSE DECODE(TRIM(ACC.M_EN_CREDIT), 'Migration Account','Migration Account', TRIM(regexp_substr(replace(ACC.M_EN_CREDIT,'--','- -'), '[^-]+',1,4)))
END AS VARCHAR2(30)) as GL_Line,
CAST(TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 AS DATE) as LastUpdatedDt,
CAST(TPALL.M_CNTLIMPL2 AS VARCHAR2(30)) as LastEvent,
CAST(TPALL.M_TP_CREATOR AS NUMBER(20)) AS CREATOR
, CAST(CASE
    WHEN ACC.M_EN_TYPE = 0 THEN  'Capital'
    WHEN ACC.M_EN_TYPE = 6 THEN 'Accrual'
END AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS ENTRY_TYPE
from TP_ALL_REP TPALL
left join (SELECT ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP.*, MAX(ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP.M_SYS_DATE) OVER(PARTITION BY M_ORIGIN_REF) AS MAX_DATE FROM ACC_ENTRIES_ALL_REP WHERE M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataACC:N) ACC
    on TPALL.M_TP_BUY=ACC.M_NB_BS  
        AND ACC.M_ORIGIN_REF = TPALL.M_MRPL_ONB
        and TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR=ACC.M_EN_CUR 
        AND ACC.M_NB_TRN<>0 
        AND ACC.M_NB_REVERSE <> 'Y'
left join ACC_RULES_REP RUL
    on RUL.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataRUL:N
        AND ACC.M_NB_RULE=RUL.M_RULE_NB
left join 
    (select M_NB
      , SUM(ABS(M_F_AMOUNT)) M_F_AMOUNT 
    from CASH_FLOW_REP 
    where M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
      and M_F_TYPELAB1='CPN'
    group by  M_NB) CF
      ON TPALL.M_NB=CF.M_NB
left join MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT 
    ON TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT.M_DATE 
      AND (
        (TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR=SPOT.M_CCY_NUM AND M_CCY_DEN = 'USD') 
        OR (TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR = SPOT.M_CCY_DEN AND SPOT.M_CCY_NUM = 'USD')
            )
      AND SPOT.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataSPT:N
left join STS1
    ON TPALL.M_CONTRACT=STS1.M_FC_ID
left join STS2
    ON TPALL.M_CONTRACT=STS2.M_FC_ID
left join STS3
    ON TPALL.M_CONTRACT=STS3.M_FC_ID
left join LMTCODES_REP LMTCODES
on TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO=LMTCODES.M_LIMIT_PRODUCT 
left join TRD_UDF_REP UDF
    ON TPALL.M_NB=UDF.M_TRADE_REF
        and TPALL.M_REF_DATA=UDF.M_REF_DATA
where 1 = 1
  AND (TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2) in ('LIVE','MKT_OP') OR (TPALL.M_TP_STATUS2 = 'DEAD' AND TPALL.M_CNTLIMPL2 = 'Cancel and reissue'))
  AND (RUL.M_RULE_LB like '%Payable%' or RUL.M_RULE_LB like '%Receivable%' or RUL.M_RULE_LB like '%Balances%' or RUL.M_RULE_LB like '%Capital-Pay%' or RUL.M_RULE_LB like '%Capital-Receive%' or lower(RUL.M_RULE_LB) like '%accrual%'
  or RUL.M_RULE_LB LIKE '%Initial Capital-Settlement%')
  AND RUL.M_RULE_LB not like '%OBS%' 
  AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA= @MxDataSetKey:N
  AND TPALL.M_TP_INT='N'
  AND TPALL.M_TRN_GRP IN ('REPO', 'IRS', 'LN_BR')

TRIM(M_DESC): Sql to generate daily "FX Rate Tolerance Report"
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
WITH DAILY_FX_TOLERANCE as (

SELECT 
		M_CONTRACT_ID,
		M_DEAL_REFERENCE,
		M_PRODUCT,
		M_BUY_AMOUNT,
		M_BUY_CCY,
		M_RATE,
		M_COVER_RATE,
		M_SELL_AMOUNT,
		M_SELL_CCY,
		M_VALUE_DATE,
		M_TRADE_DATE,
		M_REP_DATE,
		M_REUTERS_REF,
		M_COUNTER_PARTY,
		M_CIF,
		M_PORTFOLIO,
		M_CURRENCY_PAIR,
		M_INDIRECT_CCY,
		M_EOD_RATE AS M_EOD_RATE,			
		/*
		CONV AT EOD RATE IN SAR :
		=========================
		If CURR CONV QUOTE is "D"
		Then if BUY CURRENCY is SAR then = SELL AMOUNT * EOD RATE
		Else if BUY CURRENCY is Not SAR  = BUY AMOUNT * EOD RATE
		
		If CURR CONV QUOTE is "I"
		Then if BUY CURRENCY is SAR then = SELL AMOUNT * (1 / EOD RATE)
		Else if BUY CURRENCY is Not SAR = BUY AMOUNT * (1 / EOD RATE)		
		*/
		CAST(
		CASE    WHEN  M_BUY_CCY='SAR' AND M_INDIRECT_CCY='D' THEN (M_SELL_AMOUNT*M_EOD_RATE)
				WHEN  M_BUY_CCY<>'SAR' AND M_INDIRECT_CCY='D' THEN (M_BUY_AMOUNT*M_EOD_RATE)
				WHEN  M_BUY_CCY='SAR' AND M_INDIRECT_CCY='I' THEN (M_SELL_AMOUNT*(1/M_EOD_RATE))
				WHEN  M_BUY_CCY<>'SAR' AND M_INDIRECT_CCY='I' THEN (M_BUY_AMOUNT*(1/M_EOD_RATE))
				END AS NUMBER(26,2)
				)  AS M_CONV_AT_EOD_RATE_IN_SAR,
		/*
		FX PL :
		=======
		If BUY CURRENCY is SAR
		Then FX PL = CONV AT EOD RATE IN SAR + BUY AMOUNT
							-- If BUY CURRENCY is not SAR ( <> SAR) 
							-- FX PL = SELL AMOUNT + CONV AT EOD RATE IN SAR
		If BUY CURRENCY is not SAR ( <> SAR)  and 
						If SELL CURRENCY = SAR 
                            TRUE --> CONV AT EOD RATE IN SAR + SELL AMOUNT
                             FALSE -->  SELL AMOUNT converted to SAR using the EOD rate for the value date+ BUY AMOUNT converted to SAR using the EOD rate for the value date. 	
		*/
		CAST(
		CASE WHEN  M_BUY_CCY='SAR' 
				THEN 
					((  CASE WHEN  M_BUY_CCY='SAR' AND M_INDIRECT_CCY='D' THEN (M_SELL_AMOUNT*M_EOD_RATE)
								WHEN  M_BUY_CCY<>'SAR' AND M_INDIRECT_CCY='D' THEN (M_BUY_AMOUNT*M_EOD_RATE)
								WHEN  M_BUY_CCY='SAR' AND M_INDIRECT_CCY='I' THEN (M_SELL_AMOUNT*(1/M_EOD_RATE))
								WHEN  M_BUY_CCY<>'SAR' AND M_INDIRECT_CCY='I' THEN (M_BUY_AMOUNT*(1/M_EOD_RATE))
							END) + M_BUY_AMOUNT)
				WHEN  M_BUY_CCY<>'SAR' AND M_SELL_CCY='SAR'
					THEN 
					((  CASE WHEN  M_BUY_CCY='SAR' AND M_INDIRECT_CCY='D' THEN (M_SELL_AMOUNT*M_EOD_RATE)
								WHEN  M_BUY_CCY<>'SAR' AND M_INDIRECT_CCY='D' THEN (M_BUY_AMOUNT*M_EOD_RATE)
								WHEN  M_BUY_CCY='SAR' AND M_INDIRECT_CCY='I' THEN (M_SELL_AMOUNT*(1/M_EOD_RATE))
								WHEN  M_BUY_CCY<>'SAR' AND M_INDIRECT_CCY='I' THEN (M_BUY_AMOUNT*(1/M_EOD_RATE))
							END) + M_SELL_AMOUNT)
				WHEN  M_BUY_CCY<>'SAR' AND M_SELL_CCY<>'SAR'
					  THEN 
					  --- (M_SELL_AMOUNT_LCY_EQUIV+M_BUY_AMOUNT_LCY_EQUIV)		
                      --- (M_BUY_SPOT_RATE * M_BUY_AMOUNT) + (M_SELL_AMOUNT*M_SELL_SPOT_RATE)
					  DECODE(M_TP_BUY,'B',((M_BUY_SPOT_RATE * M_BUY_AMOUNT) + (M_SELL_AMOUNT*M_SELL_SPOT_RATE)),((M_SELL_SPOT_RATE * M_BUY_AMOUNT) + (M_SELL_AMOUNT*M_BUY_SPOT_RATE)))
				END AS NUMBER(26,2)
				)  AS M_FX_PL
	FROM 
		(
			SELECT
				TPALL.M_CONTRACT AS M_CONTRACT_ID,
				TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_BUY) as M_TP_BUY,
				TPALL.M_NB AS M_DEAL_REFERENCE,
				TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO) AS M_PRODUCT,
				CAST( DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ) AS NUMBER(26,2)) AS M_BUY_AMOUNT,
				CAST( TRIM(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ)) AS VARCHAR2(3)) AS M_BUY_CCY,
				TPALL.M_TP_PRICE AS M_RATE,
				CASE WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO)='BANKNOTES' THEN TPALL.M_TP_FXGFWD ELSE NULL END AS M_COVER_RATE,
				-ABS(CAST( DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ) AS NUMBER(26,2))) AS M_SELL_AMOUNT,
				CAST( TRIM(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ)) AS VARCHAR2(3)) AS M_SELL_CCY,
				/*CAST(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ)*(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0)))) 
				     AS NUMBER(26,2) 
					 ) AS M_BUY_AMOUNT_LCY_EQUIV ,
				-ABS(CAST(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'S',TPALL.M_TP_NOMINAL,TPALL.M_TP_QTYEQ)*(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2_SEL.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT2_SELL.M_MID,0))))
                     AS NUMBER(26,2)
					 )) AS M_SELL_AMOUNT_LCY_EQUIV, ---SAR EQUIVALENT		*/		
				TPALL.M_TP_DTEPMT AS M_VALUE_DATE,
				TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN AS M_TRADE_DATE,
				TPALL.M_REP_DATE2 AS M_REP_DATE,
				'' AS M_REUTERS_REF,
				CAST(NVL(TRIM(PARTIES.M_NAME),TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP)) AS VARCHAR2(255)) as M_COUNTER_PARTY,
				CAST(PARTIES.M_CIF AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS M_CIF,
				TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_PFOLIO) AS M_PORTFOLIO, 
				TRIM(TPALL.M_INSTRUMENT) AS M_CURRENCY_PAIR,
				CAST(TRUNC(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0))),6) AS NUMBER(15,6)) M_BUY_SPOT_RATE,
				CAST(TRUNC(DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2_SEL.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT2_SELL.M_MID,0))),6) AS NUMBER(15,6)) M_SELL_SPOT_RATE,				
				CASE WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_INSTRUMENT)=trim(LKP_INDR_CCY.M_INDR_CCYPR) 
					THEN 'I' 
					ELSE 'D' 
					END AS M_INDIRECT_CCY,			
				TRIM(LKP_INDR_CCY.M_INDR_CCYPR) AS M_INDIRECT_CCY_LKP,
				/* 
					EOD RATE :
					===========
					If BUY CURRENCY = SAR:
					then:
					if CURR CONV QUOTE is = D
						then retrieve the closing rate for the SELL CURRENCY
					Else 
						1 /closing rate for the SELL CURRENCY
					If BUY CURRENCY not SAR:
					then:
					if CURR CONV QUOTE is = D
						then retrieve the closing rate for the BUY CURRENCY
					Else 
						1 / closing rate for the BUY CURRENCY
				*/
				 CAST(TRUNC(CASE 
				 
							WHEN  TRIM(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ))='SAR' 
								 AND (CASE WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_INSTRUMENT)=TRIM(LKP_INDR_CCY.M_INDR_CCYPR) THEN 'I' ELSE 'D' END)='D' 
								 AND TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ)='SAR' THEN NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0))
								 
							WHEN  TRIM(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ))='SAR' 
								 AND (CASE WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_INSTRUMENT)=TRIM(LKP_INDR_CCY.M_INDR_CCYPR) THEN 'I' ELSE 'D' END)='D' 
								 THEN DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2_SEL.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT2_SELL.M_MID,0)))
								 
							WHEN  TRIM(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ))='SAR' 
								AND (CASE WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_INSTRUMENT)=TRIM(LKP_INDR_CCY.M_INDR_CCYPR) THEN 'I' ELSE 'D' END)='I' 
								AND TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ)='SAR' THEN (1/NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0)))
								
							WHEN  TRIM(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ))='SAR' 
								AND (CASE WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_INSTRUMENT)=TRIM(LKP_INDR_CCY.M_INDR_CCYPR) THEN 'I' ELSE 'D' END)='I' 
								THEN (1/DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2_SEL.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT2_SELL.M_MID,0))))						
								
							WHEN  TRIM(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ))<>'SAR' 
								AND (CASE WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_INSTRUMENT)=TRIM(LKP_INDR_CCY.M_INDR_CCYPR)	THEN 'I' ELSE 'D' END)='D' 
								AND TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR)='SAR' THEN NVL(SPOT2_SEL.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT2_SELL.M_MID,0))
						
							WHEN  TRIM(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ))<>'SAR' 
								AND (CASE WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_INSTRUMENT)=TRIM(LKP_INDR_CCY.M_INDR_CCYPR)	THEN 'I' ELSE 'D' END)='D' 
								THEN DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0)))	
								
							WHEN  TRIM(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ))<>'SAR' 
								AND (CASE WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_INSTRUMENT)=TRIM(LKP_INDR_CCY.M_INDR_CCYPR) THEN 'I' ELSE 'D' END)='I' 
								AND TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR)='SAR' THEN (1/NVL(SPOT2_SEL.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT2_SELL.M_MID,0)))
								
							WHEN  TRIM(DECODE(TPALL.M_TP_BUY,'B',TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR,TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ))<>'SAR' 
								AND (CASE WHEN TRIM(TPALL.M_INSTRUMENT)=TRIM(LKP_INDR_CCY.M_INDR_CCYPR) THEN 'I' ELSE 'D' END)='I' 
								THEN (1/DECODE(TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR),'SAR',1,NVL(SPOT2.M_MID,NVL(1/SPOT22.M_MID,0))))
								
					END,6) AS NUMBER(26,6))   AS M_EOD_RATE

			FROM 
				TP_ALL_REP TPALL
				LEFT OUTER JOIN PARTIES_REP PARTIES
					ON TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_CNTRP)=TRIM(PARTIES.M_DSP_LABEL) AND TPALL.M_REF_DATA=PARTIES.M_REF_DATA
				LEFT OUTER JOIN MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2
					ON TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT2.M_DATE AND TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR=SPOT2.M_CCY_DEN  AND TRIM(SPOT2.M_CCY_NUM)='SAR'
				LEFT OUTER JOIN MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT22
					ON TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT22.M_DATE AND TPALL.M_TP_NOMCUR=SPOT22.M_CCY_NUM  AND TRIM(SPOT22.M_CCY_DEN)='SAR'
				LEFT OUTER JOIN MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2_SEL 
					ON TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT2_SEL.M_DATE AND TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ=SPOT2_SEL.M_CCY_DEN  AND TRIM(SPOT2_SEL.M_CCY_NUM)='SAR' 
                LEFT OUTER JOIN MD_FXRATE_REP SPOT2_SELL    
					ON TPALL.M_REP_DATE2=SPOT2_SELL.M_DATE AND TPALL.M_TP_UQTYEQ=SPOT2_SELL.M_CCY_NUM   AND TRIM(SPOT2_SELL.M_CCY_DEN)='SAR'						
				LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(M_INDR_CCYPR) AS M_INDR_CCYPR FROM BAB_LKP_INDR_CCY_REP) LKP_INDR_CCY
					ON TRIM(TPALL.M_INSTRUMENT)=TRIM(LKP_INDR_CCY.M_INDR_CCYPR)
				WHERE 
					--TPALL.M_REF_DATA = ( SELECT MAX(M_REF_DATA) FROM TP_ALL_REP) AND 
				TRIM(TPALL.M_TP_INT)='N' 
				AND TRIM(TPALL.M_CMP_TYPO) IN ('Spot')-- AND  TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2    
				--AND TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN=TPALL.M_REP_DATE2
				AND (TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN,'YYYYMMDD')>=@DATE1:D AND TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN,'YYYYMMDD')<=@DATE2:D )
				--AND ( TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN,'YYYYMMDD')>='20250701' AND TO_CHAR(TPALL.M_TP_DTETRN,'YYYYMMDD')<='20250706' )
				--and TPALL.M_NB in ('3608921','3608238','3608230','3608246','3612854','3855906','3609030','3608342','3608446'); 
		)
)
    SELECT 
    M_CONTRACT_ID,M_DEAL_REFERENCE,M_PRODUCT,M_BUY_AMOUNT,M_BUY_CCY,M_RATE,
    M_COVER_RATE,M_SELL_AMOUNT,M_SELL_CCY,M_VALUE_DATE,M_TRADE_DATE,
    M_REP_DATE,M_REUTERS_REF,M_COUNTER_PARTY,M_CIF,M_PORTFOLIO,
    M_CURRENCY_PAIR,M_INDIRECT_CCY,M_EOD_RATE,M_CONV_AT_EOD_RATE_IN_SAR,
    M_FX_PL,
	/*
	% (PERCENTAGE)) -->  "FX PL" / ABSOLUTE VALUE OF "CONV AT EOD RATE IN SAR" 
	*/
	CAST(CASE WHEN ABS(M_CONV_AT_EOD_RATE_IN_SAR)= 0 THEN 0 
			  ELSE (M_FX_PL/ABS(M_CONV_AT_EOD_RATE_IN_SAR))*100
			  END AS NUMBER(26,2)
	     ) AS M_PER
    FROM DAILY_FX_TOLERANCE
	ORDER BY M_DEAL_REFERENCE,M_REP_DATE

SELECT
    TP.M_NB AS TRADE_NUMBER
    ,TP.M_REP_DATE2 AS REPORTING_DATE
    ,TP.M_TP_INT AS INTERNAL
    ,TP.M_CNT_TYPO AS DEAL_TYPE
    ,TP.M_TP_CNTRP AS COUNTERPARTY_CIF
    ,TRIM(TP.M_TP_CNTRPFN) AS COUNTERPARTY_NAME
    ,TP.M_TP_DTEFST AS VALUE_DATE
    ,TP.M_TP_DTEEXP AS MATURITY_DATE
    ,(TP.M_TP_DTEEXP - TP.M_TP_DTEFST) AS ORIGINAL_TENOR
    ,(TP.M_TP_DTEEXP - TP.M_REP_DATE2)AS REMAINING_TENOR
    ,TP.M_TP_NOMCUR AS DEAL_CURRENCY
    ,CASE
        WHEN TP.M_TP_NOMCUR = 'SAR' THEN TP.M_TP_NOMINAL 
        ELSE TP.M_TP_NOMINAL*RT.M_MID
    END AS NOMINAL_SAR
    ,TP.M_TP_NOMINAL AS NOMINAL_SAR2
    ,RT.M_MID AS RATE
    ,TP.M_TP_PRICE AS CURRENT_RATE
    ,RNG.M_RNG_RATE0 AS RANGE_LOWER
    ,RNG.M_RNG_RATE1 AS RANGE_UPPER
FROM TP_ALL_REP TP
LEFT JOIN RANGE_INDEX_REP RNG
    ON RNG.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataRNG:N
    AND RNG.M_RNG_NB = TP.M_NB
LEFT JOIN MD_FXRATE_REP RT
    ON RT.M_REF_DATA = @MxHistoricalDataFX:N
    AND ((RT.M_CCY_DEN = TP.M_TP_NOMCUR
    AND RT.M_CCY_NUM = 'SAR')
    OR (RT.M_CCY_NUM = TP.M_TP_NOMCUR
    AND RT.M_CCY_DEN = 'SAR'))
WHERE TP.M_REF_DATA = @MxDataSetKey:N
    AND TP.M_CNT_TYPO LIKE '%LTM%'
    AND TP.M_TP_INT = 'N'
    AND TP.M_TP_PFOLIO IN ('INV_LTM_LCY','INV_LTM_FCY', 'LM_DI_VAN')
    AND TP.M_TP_STATUS2 <> 'DEAD'

TRIM(M_DESC): SQL request for FI daily blotter
BLOB_TO_CLOB(M_REQUEST):
SELECT 
    M_TP_NOMCUR as Currency,
    CASE 
          WHEN M_TP_BUY = 'B' THEN 'BUY'
          WHEN M_TP_BUY = 'S' THEN 'SELL'
    END AS BUY_SELL,
    SUM(M_TP_nominal) OVER (PARTITION BY M_TP_BUY, M_TP_NOMCUR) AS TOTAL_BUY_SELL,
    M_NB as Deal_ref,
    M_CMP_TYPO as Deal_type,
    M_TP_CNTRP as Client,
    M_TP_DTETRN as Trade_date,
    M_TP_DTEPMT as Value_Date,
    M_TP_DTEEXP as Maturity_date,
    M_TP_nominal as Purchase_Amount,
   ABS(DECODE(M_TP_PRICE,0,M_TP_PRICED,M_TP_PRICE)) as RATE
FROM TP_ALL_REP
WHERE M_TP_PFOLIO IN (
   'INV_LTM_FCY',
    'INV_LTM_LCY',
    'INV_SUK_LCY_AFS',
    'INV_SUK_LCY_HTM',
    'INV_SUK_FCY_AFS',
    'INV_SUK_FCY_HTM' 
) 
AND M_REF_DATA=@MxDataSetKey:N
